`DuckMarket_Config.json.example`:

```example
{
  "EnableNotifications": true,
  "NotificationSound": true,
  "NotificationDuration": 5.0,
  "ShowRecommendedPrice": true,
  "EnableDebugLog": false,
  "ApiBaseUrl": "https://api.example.com/api/v1",
  "WsBaseUrl": "wss://api.example.com/api/v1",
  "VersionsBaseUrl": "https://api.example.com/api/v1/versions",
  "AllowInsecureTlsForLoader": false,
  "SteamWebApiIdentity": "duckmarket"
}

```

`README.md`:

```md
# Duckov Market Mod

Duckov 联机市场 Mod 源码仓库，包含 `Core` 与 `Loader` 两个项目。  
本仓库源码由作者通过逆向并进行二次开发得到，已对逆向出来的阅读性差的变量名、方法名进行语义化处理，并且完善了前后端，可直接使用。  
只保留 Mod 相关内容，已经过脱敏处理，可用于二次开发与协作。

## 1. 项目结构

```text
Duckov_marketmod/
├─ duckmarket_core/                 # 主功能模块（UI、网络、Patch、配置）
├─ duckmarket_loader/               # 加载器（版本检查、下载、校验、加载 Core）
├─ mod_assets/
│  ├─ info.ini.example              # Mod 基础配置示例
│  └─ version/1.2.7/                # 版本目录（当前基线）
├─ DuckMarket_Config.json.example   # 运行配置示例
├─ DuckNewMarket.sln                # 解决方案（Core + Loader）
└─ README.md
```

## 2. 版本与目录约束

- 当前基线版本为 `1.2.7`。
- 运行时核心 DLL 应放在：`version/1.2.7/`。
- `info.ini` 里的以下字段约束：
  - `name=DuckNewMarket.Loader` 必须保持不变。
  - `displayName=...` 可以自定义。

## 3. 环境要求

### 3.1 必需软件

- Windows 10/11
- PowerShell 5+
- .NET SDK 8 或更高（建议 10）
- 已安装 `Escape from Duckov`

### 3.2 必需依赖文件

编译需要能访问以下 DLL：

- 游戏 Managed 目录（`Duckov_Data\Managed`）下的一系列 Unity/游戏 DLL。
- `0Harmony.dll`（通常来自 workshop 模组目录）。

## 4. 准备本地路径

请先确定以下两个路径（示例仅作参考）：

- `DuckovManagedDir` 示例：`D:\steam\steamapps\common\Escape from Duckov\Duckov_Data\Managed`
- `HarmonyDll` 示例：`D:\steam\steamapps\workshop\content\3167020\3591763519\version\1.2.7\0Harmony.dll`

可先用下面命令检查路径是否存在：

```powershell
Test-Path "D:\steam\steamapps\common\Escape from Duckov\Duckov_Data\Managed"
Test-Path "D:\steam\steamapps\workshop\content\3167020\3591763519\version\1.2.7\0Harmony.dll"
```

返回 `True` 才能继续。

## 5. 配置编译参数（详细）

项目已移除硬编码本机路径，必须通过环境变量或 `dotnet build` 参数传入。

### 5.1 推荐方式：环境变量

```powershell
$env:DUCKOV_MANAGED_DIR = "D:\steam\steamapps\common\Escape from Duckov\Duckov_Data\Managed"
$env:HARMONY_DLL = "D:\steam\steamapps\workshop\content\3167020\3591763519\version\1.2.7\0Harmony.dll"
$env:NEWTONSOFT_JSON_DLL = "$env:DUCKOV_MANAGED_DIR\Newtonsoft.Json.dll"
```

### 5.2 备选方式：构建参数

```powershell
dotnet build .\duckmarket_core\DuckMarket.Core.csproj -c Release `
  /p:DuckovManagedDir="D:\...\Duckov_Data\Managed" `
  /p:HarmonyDll="D:\...\0Harmony.dll"

dotnet build .\duckmarket_loader\DuckMarket.Loader.csproj -c Release `
  /p:DuckovManagedDir="D:\...\Duckov_Data\Managed"
```

## 6. 编译步骤（从零开始）

在仓库根目录执行：

```powershell
dotnet restore .\DuckNewMarket.sln
dotnet build .\duckmarket_core\DuckMarket.Core.csproj -c Release
dotnet build .\duckmarket_loader\DuckMarket.Loader.csproj -c Release
```

编译成功后关键输出：

- `duckmarket_core\bin\Release\netstandard2.1\DuckNewMarket.Core.dll`
- `duckmarket_loader\bin\Release\netstandard2.1\DuckNewMarket.Loader.dll`

## 7. 组装本地 Mod 目录（详细）

以下用 `<GameRoot>` 代表你的游戏目录，例如：`D:\steam\steamapps\common\Escape from Duckov`。

### 7.1 创建目标目录

```powershell
$modRoot = "<GameRoot>\Duckov_Data\Mods\DuckovNewMarket"
$coreDir = Join-Path $modRoot "version\1.2.7"
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $modRoot | Out-Null
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $coreDir | Out-Null
```

### 7.2 复制编译产物

```powershell
Copy-Item .\duckmarket_loader\bin\Release\netstandard2.1\DuckNewMarket.Loader.dll $modRoot -Force
Copy-Item .\duckmarket_core\bin\Release\netstandard2.1\DuckNewMarket.Core.dll $coreDir -Force
```

### 7.3 生成 info.ini

```powershell
Copy-Item .\mod_assets\info.ini.example (Join-Path $modRoot "info.ini") -Force
```

然后编辑 `info.ini`，确认：

- `name` 必须是 `DuckNewMarket.Loader`
- `displayName` 可自定义显示名
- `version` 保持 `1.2.7`

## 8. 配置运行参数（DuckMarket_Config.json）

将示例文件复制到 Mod 根目录并改为真实地址：

```powershell
Copy-Item .\DuckMarket_Config.json.example "<GameRoot>\Duckov_Data\Mods\DuckovNewMarket\DuckMarket_Config.json" -Force
```

关键字段说明：

- `ApiBaseUrl`: HTTP API 根地址（示例：`https://api.example.com/api/v1`）
- `WsBaseUrl`: WebSocket 根地址（示例：`wss://api.example.com/api/v1`）
- `VersionsBaseUrl`: 版本接口地址（示例：`https://api.example.com/api/v1/versions`）
- `AllowInsecureTlsForLoader`: 是否忽略 TLS 证书错误（生产环境建议 `false`）
- `SteamWebApiIdentity`: Steam 身份标识（按后端约定）

## 9. 启动验证（详细）

### 9.1 启动前检查

- 完全退出游戏后再覆盖 DLL（进程占用会导致复制失败）。
- 确认目标目录已包含：
  - `DuckNewMarket.Loader.dll`
  - `version\1.2.7\DuckNewMarket.Core.dll`
  - `info.ini`
  - `DuckMarket_Config.json`

### 9.2 启动后看日志

日志位置通常为：

`C:\Users\<你的用户名>\AppData\LocalLow\TeamSoda\Duckov\Player.log`

可用命令快速筛选：

```powershell
Select-String -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\AppData\LocalLow\TeamSoda\Duckov\Player.log" -Pattern "Duck Market Mod Loader Awake","Version Check","Loading mod dll at path"
```

若能看到加载与版本检查相关日志，说明链路基本正常。

## 10. 常见问题与处理

### 10.1 编译时报找不到 UnityEngine 或 TeamSoda DLL

- 原因：`DUCKOV_MANAGED_DIR` 未设置或路径错误。
- 处理：重新设置变量并确认 `Test-Path` 为 `True`。

### 10.2 编译时报找不到 0Harmony.dll

- 原因：`HARMONY_DLL` 未设置或版本目录不对。
- 处理：确认 `HARMONY_DLL` 指向真实文件。

### 10.3 游戏不加载新 DLL

- 原因：游戏进程占用旧文件、复制失败或目录层级错误。
- 处理：完全退出游戏后重拷贝；检查 DLL 是否在准确目录。

### 10.4 能加载但无法连接后端

- 原因：`DuckMarket_Config.json` 中 API/WS 地址不正确，或证书问题。
- 处理：校验 `ApiBaseUrl/WsBaseUrl/VersionsBaseUrl`；开发环境临时开启 `AllowInsecureTlsForLoader=true` 进行定位（生产请关闭）。

## 11. 开发迭代建议流程

1. 修改 `duckmarket_core` 或 `duckmarket_loader` 源码。
2. 执行编译命令。
3. 复制 DLL 到 Mod 目录。
4. 启动游戏并查看 `Player.log`。
5. 确认功能后再提交代码。

## 12. 安全与脱敏规则

- 禁止提交真实密码、Token、私有证书、SSH 凭据。
- 禁止提交本机绝对路径或个人环境说明。
- `DuckMarket_Config.json` 属于本地运行配置，不应包含生产敏感信息。

## 13. License

本项目使用 `MIT License`，详见仓库根目录 `LICENSE`。


```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Core.csproj`:

```csproj
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
  <PropertyGroup>
    <AssemblyName>DuckNewMarket.Core</AssemblyName>
    <GenerateAssemblyInfo>False</GenerateAssemblyInfo>
    <TargetFramework>netstandard2.1</TargetFramework>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <LangVersion>12.0</LangVersion>
    <AllowUnsafeBlocks>True</AllowUnsafeBlocks>
    <Nullable>annotations</Nullable>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <DuckovManagedDir Condition="'$(DuckovManagedDir)' == ''">$(DUCKOV_MANAGED_DIR)</DuckovManagedDir>
    <HarmonyDll Condition="'$(HarmonyDll)' == ''">$(HARMONY_DLL)</HarmonyDll>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <Target Name="ValidateLocalReferences" BeforeTargets="ResolveReferences">
    <Error Condition="'$(DuckovManagedDir)' == ''" Text="DuckovManagedDir is not set. Use /p:DuckovManagedDir=... or set DUCKOV_MANAGED_DIR." />
    <Error Condition="'$(HarmonyDll)' == ''" Text="HarmonyDll is not set. Use /p:HarmonyDll=... or set HARMONY_DLL." />
  </Target>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Reference Include="UnityEngine.CoreModule">
      <HintPath>$(DuckovManagedDir)\UnityEngine.CoreModule.dll</HintPath>
    </Reference>
    <Reference Include="UnityEngine.UI">
      <HintPath>$(DuckovManagedDir)\UnityEngine.UI.dll</HintPath>
    </Reference>
    <Reference Include="Unity.TextMeshPro">
      <HintPath>$(DuckovManagedDir)\Unity.TextMeshPro.dll</HintPath>
    </Reference>
    <Reference Include="TeamSoda.Duckov.Core">
      <HintPath>$(DuckovManagedDir)\TeamSoda.Duckov.Core.dll</HintPath>
    </Reference>
    <Reference Include="TeamSoda.Duckov.Utilities">
      <HintPath>$(DuckovManagedDir)\TeamSoda.Duckov.Utilities.dll</HintPath>
    </Reference>
    <Reference Include="UniTask">
      <HintPath>$(DuckovManagedDir)\UniTask.dll</HintPath>

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Core/DuckMarketConfig.cs`:

```cs
using System;

namespace DuckMarket.Core;

public class DuckMarketConfig
{
	public bool EnableNotifications { get; set; } = true;

	public bool NotificationSound { get; set; } = true;

	public float NotificationDuration { get; set; } = 5f;

	public bool ShowRecommendedPrice { get; set; } = true;

	public bool EnableDebugLog { get; set; }

	public string RefreshToken { get; set; } = string.Empty;

	public DateTime TokenExpiresAt { get; set; } = DateTime.MinValue;

	public string LastSteamId { get; set; } = string.Empty;

	public int LastUserId { get; set; }

	public string ApiBaseUrl { get; set; } = "https://api.example.com/api/v1";

	public string WsBaseUrl { get; set; } = "wss://api.example.com/api/v1";

	public string VersionsBaseUrl { get; set; } = "https://api.example.com/api/v1/versions";

	public bool AllowInsecureTlsForLoader { get; set; } = false;

	public string SteamWebApiIdentity { get; set; } = "duckmarket";

	public void ResetToDefaults()
	{
		EnableNotifications = true;
		NotificationSound = true;
		NotificationDuration = 5f;
		ShowRecommendedPrice = true;
		EnableDebugLog = false;
		ApiBaseUrl = "https://api.example.com/api/v1";
		WsBaseUrl = "wss://api.example.com/api/v1";
		VersionsBaseUrl = "https://api.example.com/api/v1/versions";
		AllowInsecureTlsForLoader = false;
		SteamWebApiIdentity = "duckmarket";
	}
}

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Core/DuckMarketSettings.cs`:

```cs
using System;

namespace DuckMarket.Core;

public static class DuckMarketSettings
{
	private static DuckMarketConfig _config;

	private static bool _initialized;

	public static bool EnableNotifications
	{
		get
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Initialize();
			}
			return _config.EnableNotifications;
		}
		set
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Initialize();
			}
			_config.EnableNotifications = value;
			SaveConfig();
		}
	}

	public static bool NotificationSound
	{
		get
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Initialize();
			}
			return _config.NotificationSound;
		}
		set
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Initialize();
			}
			_config.NotificationSound = value;
			SaveConfig();
		}
	}

	public static float NotificationDuration
	{
		get
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Initialize();
			}
			return _config.NotificationDuration;
		}
		set
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Initialize();
			}
			_config.NotificationDuration = value;
			SaveConfig();
		}
	}

	public static bool ShowRecommendedPrice
	{
		get
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Initialize();
			}
			return _config.ShowRecommendedPrice;
		}
		set
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Initialize();
			}
			_config.ShowRecommendedPrice = value;
			SaveConfig();
		}
	}

	public static bool EnableDebugLog
	{
		get
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Initialize();
			}
			return _config.EnableDebugLog;
		}
		set
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Initialize();
			}
			_config.EnableDebugLog = value;
			SaveConfig();
		}
	}

	public static string ApiBaseUrl
	{
		get
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Initialize();
			}
			return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_config.ApiBaseUrl) ? "https://api.example.com/api/v1" : _config.ApiBaseUrl;
		}
		set
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Initialize();
			}
			_config.ApiBaseUrl = value;
			SaveConfig();
		}
	}

	public static string WsBaseUrl
	{
		get
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Initialize();
			}
			return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_config.WsBaseUrl) ? "wss://api.example.com/api/v1" : _config.WsBaseUrl;
		}
		set
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Initialize();
			}
			_config.WsBaseUrl = value;
			SaveConfig();
		}
	}

	public static string VersionsBaseUrl
	{
		get
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Initialize();
			}
			return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_config.VersionsBaseUrl) ? "https://api.example.com/api/v1/versions" : _config.VersionsBaseUrl;
		}
		set
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Initialize();
			}
			_config.VersionsBaseUrl = value;
			SaveConfig();
		}
	}

	public static bool AllowInsecureTlsForLoader
	{
		get
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Initialize();
			}
			return _config.AllowInsecureTlsForLoader;
		}
		set
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Initialize();
			}
			_config.AllowInsecureTlsForLoader = value;
			SaveConfig();
		}
	}

	public static string SteamWebApiIdentity
	{
		get
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Initialize();
			}
			if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_config.SteamWebApiIdentity))
			{
				return "duckmarket";
			}
			return _config.SteamWebApiIdentity;
		}
		set
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Initialize();
			}
			_config.SteamWebApiIdentity = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? "duckmarket" : value.Trim();
			SaveConfig();
		}
	}

	public static void Initialize()
	{
		if (!_initialized)
		{
			_config = JsonConfigManager.LoadConfig();
			_initialized = true;
			Logger.Info("[DuckMarketSettings] ✅ 设置系统初始化完成");
			Logger.Info("[DuckMarketSettings] 配置文件路径: " + JsonConfigManager.GetConfigFilePath());
		}
	}

	private static void SaveConfig()
	{
		if (!_initialized)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[DuckMarketSettings] 设置系统未初始化,无法保存配置");
		}
		else
		{
			JsonConfigManager.SaveConfig(_config);
		}
	}

	public static void ResetToDefaults()
	{
		if (!_initialized)
		{
			Initialize();
		}
		_config.ResetToDefaults();
		SaveConfig();
		Logger.Info("[DuckMarketSettings] ✅ 设置已重置为默认值");
	}

	public static bool GetBoolSetting(string key, bool defaultValue)
	{
		if (!_initialized)
		{
			Initialize();
		}
		if (!(key == "DuckMarket_EnableNotifications"))
		{
			if (!(key == "DuckMarket_NotificationSound"))
			{
				if (!(key == "DuckMarket_ShowRecommendedPrice"))
				{
					if (key == "DuckMarket_EnableDebugLog")
					{
						return _config.EnableDebugLog;
					}
					return defaultValue;
				}
				return _config.ShowRecommendedPrice;
			}
			return _config.NotificationSound;
		}
		return _config.EnableNotifications;
	}

	public static void SetBoolSetting(string key, bool value)
	{
		if (!_initialized)
		{
			Initialize();
		}
		if (!(key == "DuckMarket_EnableNotifications"))
		{
			if (!(key == "DuckMarket_NotificationSound"))
			{
				if (!(key == "DuckMarket_ShowRecommendedPrice"))
				{
					if (key == "DuckMarket_EnableDebugLog")
					{
						_config.EnableDebugLog = value;
					}
				}
				else
				{
					_config.ShowRecommendedPrice = value;
				}
			}
			else
			{
				_config.NotificationSound = value;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			_config.EnableNotifications = value;
		}
		SaveConfig();
	}

	public static float GetFloatSetting(string key, float defaultValue)
	{
		if (!_initialized)
		{
			Initialize();
		}
		if (key == "DuckMarket_NotificationDuration")
		{
			return _config.NotificationDuration;
		}
		return defaultValue;
	}

	public static void SetFloatSetting(string key, float value)
	{
		if (!_initialized)
		{
			Initialize();
		}
		if (key == "DuckMarket_NotificationDuration")
		{
			_config.NotificationDuration = value;
		}
		SaveConfig();
	}

	public static void SaveAuthToken(string refreshToken, DateTime expiresAt, string steamId, int userId = 0)
	{
		if (!_initialized)
		{
			Initialize();
		}
		_config.RefreshToken = refreshToken;
		_config.TokenExpiresAt = expiresAt;
		_config.LastSteamId = steamId;
		_config.LastUserId = userId;
		SaveConfig();
		Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarketSettings] Auth token saved, expires at: {0:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss} UTC, user_id: {1}", expiresAt, userId));
	}

	public static string GetRefreshToken()
	{
		if (!_initialized)
		{
			Initialize();
		}
		return _config.RefreshToken;
	}

	public static DateTime GetTokenExpiresAt()
	{
		if (!_initialized)
		{
			Initialize();
		}
		return _config.TokenExpiresAt;
	}

	public static string GetLastSteamId()
	{
		if (!_initialized)
		{
			Initialize();
		}
		return _config.LastSteamId;
	}

	public static bool IsTokenValid()
	{
		if (!_initialized)
		{
			Initialize();
		}
		if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(_config.RefreshToken))
		{
			return false;
		}
		if (_config.TokenExpiresAt == DateTime.MinValue)
		{
			return false;
		}
		return DateTime.UtcNow < _config.TokenExpiresAt.AddDays(-1.0);
	}

	public static void ClearAuthToken()
	{
		if (!_initialized)
		{
			Initialize();
		}
		_config.RefreshToken = string.Empty;
		_config.TokenExpiresAt = DateTime.MinValue;
		_config.LastSteamId = string.Empty;
		SaveConfig();
		Logger.Info("[DuckMarketSettings] Auth token cleared");
	}
}

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Core/FleaMarketState.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using DuckMarket.Network;
using Saves;

namespace DuckMarket.Core;

public static class FleaMarketState
{
	private static GameState _currentState;

	public static GameState CurrentState
	{
		get
		{
			return _currentState;
		}
		private set
		{
			if (_currentState != value)
			{
				GameState currentState = _currentState;
				_currentState = value;
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[State] {0} -> {1}", currentState, value));
				FleaMarketState.OnStateChanged?.Invoke(currentState, value);
			}
		}
	}

	public static int CurrentSaveSlot => SavesSystem.CurrentSlot;

	public static bool IsAuthenticated => !string.IsNullOrEmpty(ApiClient.AuthToken);

	public static bool IsWebSocketConnected => WebSocketClient.IsConnected;

	public static event Action<GameState, GameState>? OnStateChanged;

	public static void SetState(GameState newState)
	{
		CurrentState = newState;
	}

	public static void Reset()
	{
		_currentState = GameState.Menu;
		Logger.Info("[State] Reset to Menu");
	}
}

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Core/JsonConfigManager.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.IO;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace DuckMarket.Core;

public static class JsonConfigManager
{
	private static readonly string ConfigDirectory;

	private static readonly string ConfigFilePath;

	private static readonly JsonSerializerSettings JsonSettings;

	static JsonConfigManager()
	{
		string directoryName = Path.GetDirectoryName(typeof(JsonConfigManager).Assembly.Location);
		if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(directoryName))
		{
			Logger.Error("[JsonConfigManager] 无法获取MOD目录路径");
			ConfigDirectory = Environment.CurrentDirectory;
		}
		else
		{
			string loaderDirectory = Directory.GetParent(directoryName)?.Parent?.FullName;
			if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(loaderDirectory) && Directory.Exists(loaderDirectory))
			{
				ConfigDirectory = loaderDirectory;
				Logger.Info("[JsonConfigManager] 使用loader目录: " + ConfigDirectory);
			}
			else
			{
				ConfigDirectory = directoryName;
				Logger.Warning("[JsonConfigManager] 无法获取loader目录,使用MOD目录: " + ConfigDirectory);
			}
		}
		ConfigFilePath = Path.Combine(ConfigDirectory, "DuckMarket_Config.json");
		Logger.Info("[JsonConfigManager] 配置文件路径: " + ConfigFilePath);
		JsonSettings = new JsonSerializerSettings
		{
			Formatting = (Formatting)1,
			NullValueHandling = (NullValueHandling)1
		};
	}

	public static DuckMarketConfig LoadConfig()
	{
		try
		{
			if (!File.Exists(ConfigFilePath))
			{
				Logger.Info("[JsonConfigManager] 配置文件不存在,创建默认配置");
				DuckMarketConfig duckMarketConfig = new DuckMarketConfig();
				SaveConfig(duckMarketConfig);
				return duckMarketConfig;
			}
			DuckMarketConfig duckMarketConfig2 = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<DuckMarketConfig>(File.ReadAllText(ConfigFilePath), JsonSettings);
			Logger.Info("[JsonConfigManager] ✅ 配置文件加载成功");
			if (duckMarketConfig2 == null)
			{
				duckMarketConfig2 = new DuckMarketConfig();
			}
			return duckMarketConfig2;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[JsonConfigManager] ❌ 加载配置文件失败: " + ex.Message);
			Logger.Error("[JsonConfigManager] 堆栈跟踪: " + ex.StackTrace);
			return new DuckMarketConfig();
		}
	}

	public static void SaveConfig(DuckMarketConfig config)
	{
		try
		{
			string contents = JsonConvert.SerializeObject((object)config, JsonSettings);
			File.WriteAllText(ConfigFilePath, contents);
			Logger.Info("[JsonConfigManager] ✅ 配置文件保存成功");
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[JsonConfigManager] ❌ 保存配置文件失败: " + ex.Message);
			Logger.Error("[JsonConfigManager] 堆栈跟踪: " + ex.StackTrace);
		}
	}

	public static string GetConfigFilePath()
	{
		return ConfigFilePath;
	}
}

```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Core/LocalizationManager.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Reflection;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;

namespace DuckMarket.Core;

public static class LocalizationManager
{
	public enum Language
	{
		ChineseSimplified,
		ChineseTraditional,
		English,
		Japanese,
		Korean,
		French,
		Vietnamese
	}

	private static Language _currentLanguage = Language.ChineseSimplified;

	private static readonly Dictionary<string, Dictionary<Language, string>> _translations = new Dictionary<string, Dictionary<Language, string>>();

	private static bool _initialized;

	public static event Action<Language> OnLanguageChanged;

	public static void Initialize()
	{
		if (_initialized)
		{
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			DetectGameLanguage();
			LoadTranslations();
			_initialized = true;
			Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[LocalizationManager] ✅ 初始化完成，当前语言: {0}", _currentLanguage));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[LocalizationManager] ❌ 初始化失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static void DetectGameLanguage()
	{
		SystemLanguage systemLanguage = Application.systemLanguage;
		int systemLanguageValue = (int)systemLanguage;
		_currentLanguage = systemLanguageValue switch
		{
			6 => Language.ChineseSimplified,
			14 => Language.French,
			22 => Language.Japanese,
			23 => Language.Korean,
			39 => Language.Vietnamese,
			40 => Language.ChineseSimplified,
			41 => Language.ChineseTraditional,
			_ => Language.English
		};
		Logger.Info(string.Format("[LocalizationManager] 检测到系统语言: {0} -> {1}", systemLanguage, _currentLanguage));
	}

	private static void LoadTranslations()
	{
		try
		{
			string directoryName = Path.GetDirectoryName(Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly().Location);
			string[] searchPaths = new string[3]
			{
				Path.Combine(directoryName, "Localization"),
				Path.Combine(directoryName, "..", "Localization"),
				Path.Combine(directoryName, "..\\..\\Localization")
			};
			string localizationDirectory = null;
			string[] array = searchPaths;
			foreach (string candidatePath in array)
			{
				if (Directory.Exists(candidatePath))
				{
					localizationDirectory = candidatePath;
					Logger.Verbose("[LocalizationManager] 找到本地化目录: " + localizationDirectory);
					break;
				}
			}
			if (localizationDirectory == null)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[LocalizationManager] ⚠️ 本地化目录不存在，使用默认翻译");
				LoadDefaultTranslations();
				return;
			}
			LoadLanguageFile(localizationDirectory, "zh-CN.txt", Language.ChineseSimplified);
			LoadLanguageFile(localizationDirectory, "zh-TW.txt", Language.ChineseTraditional);
			LoadLanguageFile(localizationDirectory, "en-US.txt", Language.English);
			LoadLanguageFile(localizationDirectory, "ja-JP.txt", Language.Japanese);
			LoadLanguageFile(localizationDirectory, "ko-KR.txt", Language.Korean);
			LoadLanguageFile(localizationDirectory, "fr-FR.txt", Language.French);
			LoadLanguageFile(localizationDirectory, "vi-VN.txt", Language.Vietnamese);
			Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[LocalizationManager] ✅ 加载了 {0} 个翻译条目", _translations.Count));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[LocalizationManager] ❌ 加载翻译文件失败: {0}", arg));
			LoadDefaultTranslations();
		}
	}

	private static void LoadLanguageFile(string directory, string filename, Language language)
	{
		try
		{
			string filePath = Path.Combine(directory, filename);
			if (!File.Exists(filePath))
			{
				Logger.Warning("[LocalizationManager] 语言文件不存在: " + filePath);
				return;
			}
			string[] lines = File.ReadAllLines(filePath);
			int loadedCount = 0;
			string[] array2 = lines;
			foreach (string line in array2)
			{
				if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(line) || line.StartsWith("#"))
				{
					continue;
				}
				string[] array3 = line.Split(new char[1] { '=' }, 2);
				if (array3.Length == 2)
				{
					string key = array3[0].Trim();
					string translation = array3[1].Trim();
					translation = translation.Replace("\n", " ").Replace("\t", "	").Replace("\r", " ");
					if (!_translations.ContainsKey(key))
					{
						_translations[key] = new Dictionary<Language, string>();
					}
					_translations[key][language] = translation;
					loadedCount++;
				}
			}
			Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[LocalizationManager] ✅ 加载 {0}: {1} 条", filename, loadedCount));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[LocalizationManager] ❌ 加载 {0} 失败: {1}", filename, arg));
		}
	}

	private static void LoadDefaultTranslations()
	{
		try
		{
			_translations["market.title"] = new Dictionary<Language, string>
			{
				{
					Language.ChineseSimplified,
					"鸭鸭市场"
				},
				{
					Language.ChineseTraditional,
					"鴨鴨市場"
				},
				{
					Language.English,
					"Duck Market"
				}
			};
			_translations["market.per_item"] = new Dictionary<Language, string>
			{
				{
					Language.ChineseSimplified,
					"每个物品"
				},
				{
					Language.ChineseTraditional,
					"每個物品"
				},
				{
					Language.English,
					"Per Item"
				}
			};
			_translations["market.seller"] = new Dictionary<Language, string>
			{
				{
					Language.ChineseSimplified,
					"卖家"
				},
				{
					Language.ChineseTraditional,
					"賣家"
				},
				{
					Language.English,
					"Seller"
				}
			};
			Logger.Verbose("[LocalizationManager] ✅ 加载了默认翻译");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[LocalizationManager] ❌ 加载默认翻译失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	public static string GetText(string key, string defaultValue = null)
	{
		if (!_initialized)
		{
			Initialize();
		}
		if (_translations.ContainsKey(key) && _translations[key].ContainsKey(_currentLanguage))
		{
			return _translations[key][_currentLanguage];
		}
		if (_translations.ContainsKey(key) && _translations[key].ContainsKey(Language.English))
		{
			return _translations[key][Language.English];
		}
		return defaultValue ?? key;
	}

	public static void SetLanguage(Language language)
	{
		if (_currentLanguage != language)
		{
			_currentLanguage = language;
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[LocalizationManager] 语言已切换为: {0}", language));
			LocalizationManager.OnLanguageChanged?.Invoke(language);
		}
	}

	public static Language GetCurrentLanguage()
	{
		return _currentLanguage;
	}

	public static string GetTextFormatted(string key, string defaultValue, params object[] args)
	{
		string localizedTemplate = GetText(key, defaultValue);
		try
		{
			return string.Format(localizedTemplate, args);
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[LocalizationManager] ❌ 格式化翻译文本失败: " + key + ", " + ex.Message);
			return localizedTemplate;
		}
	}
}



```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Core/LocalizationStrings.cs`:

```cs

using System.Text.RegularExpressions;

namespace DuckMarket.Core;

public static class LocalizationStrings
{
	private const string LegacyBrand = "鸭鸭市场";

	private const string CoexistBrand = "共存版鸭鸭市场";

	private const string LegacyBracketBrand = "[鸭鸭市场]";

	private const string CoexistBracketBrand = "[共存版鸭鸭市场]";

	public const string CoexistInteractionKey = "interaction.open_ducknewmarket";

	private static readonly Regex DuplicateCoexistBrandRegex = new Regex("(?:共存版){2,}鸭鸭市场", RegexOptions.Compiled);

	private static readonly Regex LegacyBrandRegex = new Regex("(?<!共存版)鸭鸭市场", RegexOptions.Compiled);

	private static string ApplyCoexistBrand(string text)
	{
		if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(text))
		{
			return text;
		}
		string text2 = text.Replace(LegacyBracketBrand, CoexistBracketBrand);
		text2 = DuplicateCoexistBrandRegex.Replace(text2, CoexistBrand);
		return LegacyBrandRegex.Replace(text2, CoexistBrand);
	}

	public static string GetSellerLabel()
	{
		return LocalizationManager.GetText("market.seller", "卖家");
	}

	public static string GetBuyerLabel()
	{
		return LocalizationManager.GetText("market.buyer", "买家");
	}

	public static string GetDemandLabel()
	{
		return LocalizationManager.GetText("market.demand", "需求");
	}

	public static string GetNotAuthenticatedError()

		return LocalizationManager.GetText("error.not_authenticated", "未登录或登录已过期，请重新登录");
	}

	public static string GetItemNotFoundError()
	{
		return LocalizationManager.GetText("error.item_not_found", "物品不存在或已被移除");
	}

	public static string GetOrderNotFoundError()
	{
		return LocalizationManager.GetText("error.order_not_found", "订单不存在或已被删除");
	}

	public static string GetOperationFailedError()
	{
		return LocalizationManager.GetText("error.operation_failed", "操作失败，请重试");
	}

	public static string GetExpiredText()
	{
		return LocalizationManager.GetText("time.expired", "已过期");
	}

	public static string GetSecondsText(int seconds)
	{
		return LocalizationManager.GetTextFormatted("time.seconds", "{0}秒", seconds);
	}

	public static string GetMinutesText(int minutes)
	{
		return LocalizationManager.GetTextFormatted("time.minutes", "{0}分钟", minutes);
	}

	public static string GetHoursText(int hours)
	{
		return LocalizationManager.GetTextFormatted("time.hours", "{0}小时", hours);
	}

	public static string GetHoursAndMinutesText(int hours, int minutes)
	{
		return LocalizationManager.GetTextFormatted("time.hours_minutes", "{0}小时{1}分", hours, minutes);
	}
}

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Core/ModVersion.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.IO;
using System.Reflection;

namespace DuckMarket.Core;

public static class ModVersion
{
	public static readonly string Version;

	public static readonly string UserAgent;

	public static readonly string DisplayVersion;

	static ModVersion()
	{
		try
		{
			Version version = Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly().GetName().Version;
			Version = string.Format("{0}.{1}.{2}", version.Major, version.Minor, version.Build);
			UserAgent = "DuckMarket-MOD/" + Version;
			DisplayVersion = "MOD v" + Version;
			Logger.Verbose("[ModVersion] ✅ Version initialized: " + Version);
			Logger.Info("[ModVersion]   - User-Agent: " + UserAgent);
			Logger.Info("[ModVersion]   - Display: " + DisplayVersion);
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Version = "1.1.0";
			UserAgent = "DuckMarket-MOD/" + Version;
			DisplayVersion = "MOD v" + Version;
			Logger.Error("[ModVersion] ❌ Failed to get assembly version, using default: " + Version);
			Logger.Error("[ModVersion] Error: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	public static string GetFullInfo()
	{
		try
		{
			Assembly executingAssembly = Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly();
			Version version = executingAssembly.GetName().Version;
			DateTime buildDate = GetBuildDate(executingAssembly);
			return string.Format("DuckMarket v{0} (Build: {1}, Date: {2:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss})", Version, version.Revision, buildDate);
		}
		catch
		{
			return "DuckMarket v" + Version;
		}
	}

	private static DateTime GetBuildDate(Assembly assembly)
	{
		try
		{
			string location = assembly.Location;
			if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(location) && File.Exists(location))
			{
				return File.GetLastWriteTime(location);
			}
		}
		catch
		{
		}
		return DateTime.Now;
	}
}

```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Core/NotificationQueue.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using Cysharp.Threading.Tasks;
using DuckMarket.Models;
using DuckMarket.Network;
using DuckMarket.Patches;
using DuckMarket.Services;
using Duckov.Economy;
using ItemStatsSystem;
using Newtonsoft.Json;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;

namespace DuckMarket.Core;

public static class NotificationQueue
{
	private static Queue<ItemSoldNotification> _queue = new Queue<ItemSoldNotification>();

	private static readonly object _lock = new object();

	private static string SaveFilePath => Path.Combine(Application.persistentDataPath, "FleaMarket_OfflineQueue.json");

	public static int Count
	{
		get
		{
			lock (_lock)
			{
				return _queue.Count;
			}
		}
	}

	public static void Initialize()
	{
		LoadFromDisk();
		Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationQueue] Initialized with {0} pending notifications", Count));
	}

	public static void Enqueue(ItemSoldNotification notification)
	{
		lock (_lock)
		{
			_queue.Enqueue(notification);
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationQueue] Enqueued: {0} x{1} = {2} RUB", notification.ItemName, notification.Quantity, notification.TotalPrice));
		}
		SaveToDisk();
	}

	public static async UniTask ProcessAllAsync()
	{
		int count = Count;
		if (count == 0)
		{
			Logger.Info("[NotificationQueue] No pending notifications to process");
			return;
		}
		Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationQueue] Processing {0} pending notifications with ACK...", count));
		long totalMoney = 0L;
		List<ItemSoldNotification> processedNotifications = new List<ItemSoldNotification>();
		List<int> notificationIdsToAck = new List<int>();
		lock (_lock)
		{
			while (_queue.Count > 0)
			{
				ItemSoldNotification itemSoldNotification = _queue.Dequeue();
				processedNotifications.Add(itemSoldNotification);
				totalMoney += itemSoldNotification.TotalPrice;
				if (itemSoldNotification.NotificationId > 0)
				{
					notificationIdsToAck.Add(itemSoldNotification.NotificationId);
				}
			}
		}
		bool ackSuccess = true;
		if (notificationIdsToAck.Count > 0)
		{
			try
			{
				int currentSaveSlot = FleaMarketState.CurrentSaveSlot;
				if (currentSaveSlot <= 0)
				{
					Logger.Warning(string.Format("[NotificationQueue] Invalid save slot: {0}", currentSaveSlot));
					lock (_lock)
					{
						foreach (ItemSoldNotification item in processedNotifications)
						{
							_queue.Enqueue(item);
						}
					}
					SaveToDisk();
					return;
				}
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[NotificationQueue] 🔄 Bulk ACKing {0} notifications...", notificationIdsToAck.Count));
				ackSuccess = await ApiClient.BulkAckNotificationsAsync(notificationIdsToAck, currentSaveSlot);
				if (!ackSuccess)
				{
					Logger.Error("[NotificationQueue] ❌ Bulk ACK failed, re-queueing notifications to prevent duplication");
					lock (_lock)
					{
						foreach (ItemSoldNotification item2 in processedNotifications)
						{
							_queue.Enqueue(item2);
						}
					}
					SaveToDisk();
					return;
				}
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[NotificationQueue] ✅ Bulk ACK success for {0} notifications", notificationIdsToAck.Count));
			}
			catch (Exception arg)
			{
				Logger.Error(string.Format("[NotificationQueue] Error during bulk ACK: {0}", arg));
				lock (_lock)
				{
					foreach (ItemSoldNotification item3 in processedNotifications)
					{
						_queue.Enqueue(item3);
					}
				}
				SaveToDisk();
				return;
			}
		}
		if (ackSuccess && totalMoney > 0)
		{
			await SendCashItemAsync(totalMoney);
		}
		if (processedNotifications.Count > 0 && ackSuccess)
		{
			ShowSummaryNotification(processedNotifications, totalMoney);
		}
		SaveToDisk();
		await UniTask.Yield();
	}

	public static void Clear()
	{
		lock (_lock)
		{
			_queue.Clear();
		}
		SaveToDisk();
		Logger.Info("[NotificationQueue] Cleared all notifications");
	}

	private static void SaveToDisk()
	{
		try
		{
			lock (_lock)
			{
				string contents = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(_queue.ToList(), Formatting.Indented);
				File.WriteAllText(SaveFilePath, contents);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[NotificationQueue] Failed to save to disk: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	private static void LoadFromDisk()
	{
		try
		{
			if (!File.Exists(SaveFilePath))
			{
				return;
			}
			List<ItemSoldNotification> list = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<List<ItemSoldNotification>>(File.ReadAllText(SaveFilePath));
			if (list != null)
			{
				lock (_lock)
				{
					_queue = new Queue<ItemSoldNotification>(list);
				}
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationQueue] Loaded {0} notifications from disk", list.Count));
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[NotificationQueue] Failed to load from disk: " + ex.Message);
			lock (_lock)
			{
				_queue.Clear();
			}
		}
	}

	private static void ShowSummaryNotification(List<ItemSoldNotification> notifications, long totalMoney)
	{
		if (notifications.Count == 1)
		{
			ItemSoldNotification itemSoldNotification = notifications[0];
			NotificationStyleCustomizer.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetSingleItemSoldNotification(itemSoldNotification.ItemName, itemSoldNotification.Quantity, itemSoldNotification.TotalPrice));
			return;
		}
		NotificationStyleCustomizer.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetMultipleItemsSoldNotification(notifications.Count, totalMoney));
		foreach (ItemSoldNotification notification in notifications)
		{
			Logger.Verbose(string.Format("  - {0} x{1} = {2:N0}  (买家: {3})", notification.ItemName, notification.Quantity, notification.TotalPrice, notification.BuyerUsername));
		}
	}

	private static async UniTask SendCashItemAsync(long amount)
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationQueue] Creating cash items: 总计 {0} 金币 (TypeID: {1})...", amount, 451));
			int remainingAmount = (int)amount;
			int itemCount = 0;
			while (remainingAmount > 0)
			{
				Item item = await ItemAssetsCollection.InstantiateAsync(451);
				if (item == null)
				{
					Logger.Error(string.Format("[NotificationQueue] Failed to create cash item (TypeID: {0}), adding remaining money directly: {1}", 451, remainingAmount));
					EconomyManager.Add(remainingAmount);
					break;
				}
				item.Initialize();
				int stackLimit = ((!item.Stackable) ? 1 : item.MaxStackCount);
				int stackCountToSend = (item.StackCount = Mathf.Min(remainingAmount, stackLimit));
				remainingAmount -= stackCountToSend;
				itemCount++;
				PlayerStoragePatch.BeginModPush();
				PlayerStorage.Push(item, toBufferDirectly: true);
				PlayerStoragePatch.EndModPush();
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationQueue] 📦 Cash item #{0} sent: {1} 金币 (剩余: {2})", itemCount, stackCountToSend, remainingAmount));
			}
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationQueue] ✅ All cash items sent to mail system: 总计 {0} 金币 (分{1}个包裹)", amount, itemCount));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[NotificationQueue] Error creating cash items: {0}", arg));
			EconomyManager.Add(amount);
		}
	}
}





```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Interactables/FleaMarketInteractable.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Collections;
using System.Reflection;
using DuckMarket.Core;
using Duckov.UI;
using FleaMarket.UI;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;

namespace DuckMarket.Interactables;

public class FleaMarketInteractable : InteractableBase
{
	private new void Awake()
	{
		try
		{
			FieldInfo field = typeof(InteractableBase).GetField("interactTime", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field != null)
			{
				field.SetValue(this, 0f);
			}
			base.interactableGroup = true;
			LocalizationManager.OnLanguageChanged += OnLanguageChanged;
			Logger.Info("[FleaMarketInteractable] Initialized successfully");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[FleaMarketInteractable] Error in Awake: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private new void Start()
	{
		try
		{
			StartCoroutine(DelayedUpdateInteractName());
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[FleaMarketInteractable] ✅ Start完成，当前语言: {0}", LocalizationManager.GetCurrentLanguage()));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[FleaMarketInteractable] Error in Start: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private new void OnDestroy()
	{
		LocalizationManager.OnLanguageChanged -= OnLanguageChanged;
	}

	private IEnumerator DelayedUpdateInteractName()
	{
		yield return null;
		yield return null;
		UpdateInteractName();
	}

	private void UpdateInteractName()
	{
		try
		{
			string openDuckMarketInteractionKey = LocalizationStrings.GetOpenDuckMarketInteractionKey();
			string localizedInteractName = LocalizationStrings.GetOpenDuckMarketInteractionName();
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[FleaMarketInteractable] 🌐 当前语言: {0}", LocalizationManager.GetCurrentLanguage()));
			Logger.Info("[FleaMarketInteractable] 🔍 预期翻译: " + localizedInteractName);
			try
			{
				Type type = Type.GetType("SodaCraft.Localizations.LocalizationManager, SodaLocalization");
				if (type != null)
				{
					MethodInfo method = type.GetMethod("SetOverrideText", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
					if (method != null)
					{
						method.Invoke(null, new object[2]
						{
							openDuckMarketInteractionKey,
							localizedInteractName
						});
						Logger.Info("[FleaMarketInteractable] ✅ 手动注入 localization override: " + openDuckMarketInteractionKey + " = " + localizedInteractName);
					}
				}
			}
			catch (Exception ex)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[FleaMarketInteractable] ⚠️ 手动注入失败（可能已经注入）: " + ex.Message);
			}
			InteractName = openDuckMarketInteractionKey;
			Logger.Info("[FleaMarketInteractable] ✅ 已设置 InteractName key = " + openDuckMarketInteractionKey);
			Logger.Info("[FleaMarketInteractable] 🔍 实际显示: " + InteractName);
		}
		catch (Exception ex2)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[FleaMarketInteractable] ❌ 更新交互名称失败: {0}", ex2));
			Logger.Error("Stack trace: " + ex2.StackTrace);
		}
	}

	private void OnLanguageChanged(LocalizationManager.Language newLanguage)
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[FleaMarketInteractable] 🌍 语言切换事件触发: {0}, 开始更新交互名称...", newLanguage));
			UpdateInteractName();
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[FleaMarketInteractable] ❌ 处理语言切换失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	protected override void OnInteractFinished()
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Info("[FleaMarketInteractable] Opening Duck Market (New UI) from Black Market Facility");
			DuckMarketView_NoteClone instance = DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Instance;
			if (instance != null)
			{
				if (!instance.open)
				{
					instance.Open((ManagedUIElement)null);
					Logger.Verbose("[FleaMarketInteractable] ✅ Duck Market (New UI) opened");
				}
				else
				{
					Logger.Info("[FleaMarketInteractable] Duck Market (New UI) already open");
				}
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Error("[FleaMarketInteractable] ❌ DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Instance is null");
				Logger.Info("[FleaMarketInteractable] Fallback to old Flea Market UI");
				FleaMarketUIManager.OpenFleaMarket();
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[FleaMarketInteractable] Failed to open Duck Market: {0}", arg));
			try
			{
				Logger.Info("[FleaMarketInteractable] Error fallback to old Flea Market UI");
				FleaMarketUIManager.OpenFleaMarket();
			}
			catch (Exception arg2)
			{
				Logger.Error(string.Format("[FleaMarketInteractable] Fallback also failed: {0}", arg2));
			}
		}
	}
}



```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Models/ListingCreationData.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using DuckMarket.Core;
using DuckMarket.Network;
using ItemStatsSystem;

namespace DuckMarket.Models;

public class ListingCreationData
{
	public Item Item { get; set; }

	public int Quantity { get; set; }

	public int MaxQuantity { get; set; }

	public decimal Price { get; set; }

	public decimal TotalPrice => (decimal)Quantity * Price;

	public bool UseDynamicPricing { get; set; }

	public decimal? BaseMarketPrice { get; set; }

	public decimal? MarketPrice { get; set; }

	public decimal OriginalValue
	{
		get
		{
			if (UseDynamicPricing && BaseMarketPrice.HasValue && BaseMarketPrice.Value > 0m)
			{
				return BaseMarketPrice.Value;
			}
			return GameOriginalValue;
		}
	}

	public decimal GameOriginalValue { get; set; }

	public string OriginalValueLabel
	{
		get
		{
			if (!UseDynamicPricing)
			{
				return "物品原价";
			}
			return "市场参考价";
		}
	}

	public decimal DurabilityAdjustedOriginalValue
	{
		get
		{
			if (UseDynamicPricing && MarketPrice.HasValue && Item.UseDurability)
			{
				return MarketPrice.Value;
			}
			if (!Item.UseDurability)
			{
				return OriginalValue;
			}
			float durabilityRatio = DurabilityPercent / 100f;
			return OriginalValue * (decimal)durabilityRatio;
		}
	}

	public decimal DurabilityPenalty
	{
		get
		{
			if (!Item.UseDurability)
			{
				return 0m;
			}
			return OriginalValue - DurabilityAdjustedOriginalValue;
		}
	}

	public decimal TaxFee => CalculateTax();

	public string MarketId { get; set; }

	public ItemCondition Condition { get; set; }

	public float DurabilityPercent { get; set; }

	public bool IsStackable { get; set; }

	public int ItemTypeId { get; set; }

	public string ItemDisplayName { get; set; }

	public int SaveSlot { get; set; }

	public ListingCreationData()
	{
		Quantity = 1;
		MaxQuantity = 1;
		Price = 0m;
		MarketId = "default";
		Condition = ItemCondition.Good;
		DurabilityPercent = 100f;
		IsStackable = false;
		SaveSlot = 1;
	}

	private decimal CalculateTax()
	{
		if (Quantity <= 0 || Price <= 0m || OriginalValue <= 0m)
		{
			return 0m;
		}
		double adjustedOriginalTotalValue = (double)(DurabilityAdjustedOriginalValue * (decimal)Quantity);
		double listingTotalValue = (double)(Price * (decimal)Quantity);
		double minimumTax = listingTotalValue * 0.05;
		double calculatedTax;
		if (listingTotalValue < adjustedOriginalTotalValue)
		{
			double priceGapFactor = Math.Log10(adjustedOriginalTotalValue / listingTotalValue);
			priceGapFactor = Math.Pow(priceGapFactor, 1.08);
			calculatedTax = adjustedOriginalTotalValue * 0.2 * 4.0 * priceGapFactor * 1.0;
		}
		else
		{
			double premiumFactor = Math.Log10(listingTotalValue / adjustedOriginalTotalValue);
			if (listingTotalValue > adjustedOriginalTotalValue)
			{
				premiumFactor = Math.Pow(premiumFactor, 1.08);
			}
			calculatedTax = listingTotalValue * 0.2 * 4.0 * premiumFactor * 1.0;
		}
		if (calculatedTax < minimumTax)
		{
			calculatedTax = minimumTax;
		}
		if (calculatedTax < 0.0)
		{
			calculatedTax = 0.0;
		}
		return (decimal)Math.Round(calculatedTax, 0);
	}

	public static ListingCreationData FromItem(Item item)
	{
		if (item == null)
		{
			return null;
		}
		float durabilityPercent = 100f;
		if (item.UseDurability && item.MaxDurability > 0f)
		{
			durabilityPercent = item.Durability / item.MaxDurability * 100f;
		}
		int val = ((!item.Stackable) ? 1 : item.StackCount);
		return new ListingCreationData
		{
			Item = item,
			ItemTypeId = item.TypeID,
			ItemDisplayName = item.DisplayName,
			Quantity = Math.Min(val, 1),
			MaxQuantity = Math.Min(val, 999),
			IsStackable = item.Stackable,
			DurabilityPercent = durabilityPercent,
			GameOriginalValue = item.Value,
			UseDynamicPricing = false
		};
	}

	public void UpdateDynamicPricing(ItemStatistics statistics)
	{
		if (statistics == null)
		{
			UseDynamicPricing = false;
		}
		else if (statistics.is_dynamic_pricing_active && statistics.base_market_price.HasValue)
		{
			UseDynamicPricing = true;
			BaseMarketPrice = statistics.base_market_price;
			MarketPrice = statistics.market_price;
			Logger.Info("[ListingCreationData] Dynamic pricing enabled: " + string.Format("base={0}, adjusted={1}, durability={2}%", BaseMarketPrice, MarketPrice, statistics.durability));
		}
		else
		{
			UseDynamicPricing = false;
			BaseMarketPrice = null;
			MarketPrice = null;
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[ListingCreationData] Dynamic pricing not available, using game original value: {0}", GameOriginalValue));
		}
	}

	public ValidationResult Validate()
	{
		if (Item == null)
		{
			return ValidationResult.Error(LocalizationStrings.GetItemNullError());
		}
		if (Quantity <= 0 || Quantity > MaxQuantity)
		{
			return ValidationResult.Error(LocalizationStrings.GetQuantityOutOfRangeError(MaxQuantity));
		}
		if (Price <= 0m)
		{
			return ValidationResult.Error(LocalizationStrings.GetPriceMustBePositiveError());
		}
		if (Price > 1000000m)
		{
			return ValidationResult.Error(LocalizationStrings.GetPriceExceedsOneMillionError());
		}
		if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(MarketId))
		{
			return ValidationResult.Error(LocalizationStrings.GetMarketNotSelectedError());
		}
		return ValidationResult.Success();
	}
}



```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Models/PurchaseOrder.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Globalization;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace DuckMarket.Models;

[Serializable]
public class PurchaseOrder
{
	[JsonProperty("order_id")]
	public int OrderId { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("user_id")]
	public int UserId { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("buyer_username")]
	public string BuyerName { get; set; } = "";

	[JsonProperty("item_type_id")]
	public int ItemTypeId { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("item_name")]
	public string ItemName { get; set; } = "";

	[JsonProperty("quantity")]
	public int Quantity { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("fulfilled_quantity")]
	public int FulfilledQuantity { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("price_per_unit")]
	public long PricePerUnit { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("min_durability")]
	public float? MinDurability { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("frozen_amount")]
	public long FrozenAmount { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("tax_paid")]
	public long TaxPaid { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("status")]
	public string Status { get; set; } = "pending";

	[JsonProperty("created_at")]
	public string CreatedAt { get; set; } = "";

	[JsonProperty("expires_at")]
	public string ExpiresAt { get; set; } = "";

	[JsonProperty("save_slot")]
	public int SaveSlot { get; set; }

	public int RemainingQuantity => Math.Max(0, Quantity - FulfilledQuantity);

	public float FulfillmentPercent
	{
		get
		{
			if (Quantity <= 0)
			{
				return 0f;
			}
			return (float)FulfilledQuantity / (float)Quantity * 100f;
		}
	}

	public int RemainingSeconds
	{
		get
		{
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(ExpiresAt))
			{
				return 0;
			}
			try
			{
				if (DateTime.TryParse(ExpiresAt, null, DateTimeStyles.AdjustToUniversal | DateTimeStyles.AssumeUniversal, out var result))
				{
					return Math.Max(0, (int)(result - DateTime.UtcNow).TotalSeconds);
				}
				if (DateTime.TryParse(ExpiresAt.TrimEnd('Z'), out result))
				{
					result = DateTime.SpecifyKind(result, DateTimeKind.Utc);
					return Math.Max(0, (int)(result - DateTime.UtcNow).TotalSeconds);
				}
			}
			catch (Exception ex)
			{
				Logger.Error("[PurchaseOrder] Failed to parse expires_at: " + ExpiresAt + ", Error: " + ex.Message);
			}
			return 0;
		}
	}

	public bool CanFulfill
	{
		get
		{
			if ((Status == "pending" || Status == "partial") && RemainingQuantity > 0)
			{
				return RemainingSeconds > 0;
			}
			return false;
		}
	}

	public string GetFormattedRemainingTime()
	{
		int remainingSeconds = RemainingSeconds;
		if (remainingSeconds <= 0)
		{
			return "已过期";
		}
		if (remainingSeconds < 60)
		{
			return string.Format("{0}秒", remainingSeconds);
		}
		if (remainingSeconds < 3600)
		{
			int minutes = remainingSeconds / 60;
			return string.Format("{0}分钟", minutes);
		}
		int totalHours = remainingSeconds / 3600;
		if (totalHours < 24)
		{
			int remainingMinutes = remainingSeconds % 3600 / 60;
			if (remainingMinutes <= 0)
			{
				return string.Format("{0}小时", totalHours);
			}
			return string.Format("{0}小时{1}分钟", totalHours, remainingMinutes);
		}
		int totalDays = totalHours / 24;
		int remainingHours = totalHours % 24;
		if (remainingHours <= 0)
		{
			return string.Format("{0}天", totalDays);
		}
		return string.Format("{0}天{1}小时", totalDays, remainingHours);
	}

	public string GetStatusDisplay()
	{
		string statusKey = Status?.ToLower();
		return statusKey switch
		{
			"pending" => "待供货",
			"partial" => string.Format("部分完成 ({0:F0}%)", FulfillmentPercent),
			"completed" => "已完成",
			"cancelled" => "已取消",
			"expired" => "已过期",
			_ => "未知",
		};
	}

	public bool IsMine(int currentUserId)
	{
		return UserId == currentUserId;
	}
}

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Models/ValidationResult.cs`:

```cs

namespace DuckMarket.Models;

public class ValidationResult
{
	public bool IsValid { get; set; }

	public string Message { get; set; }

	public static ValidationResult Success()
	{
		return new ValidationResult
		{
			IsValid = true,
			Message = ""
		};
	}

	public static ValidationResult Error(string message)
	{
		return new ValidationResult
		{
			IsValid = false,
			Message = message
		};
	}
}
