```cs
	private const string DefaultBaseUrl = "https://api.example.com/api/v1";

	private static bool _initialized;

	public static string? AuthToken { get; set; }

	public static bool IsInitialized => _initialized;

	public static int? CurrentUserId { get; set; }

	public static string BaseUrl
	{
		get
		{
			try
			{
				string apiBaseUrl = DuckMarketSettings.ApiBaseUrl;
				if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(apiBaseUrl))
				{
					return apiBaseUrl.TrimEnd('/');
				}
			}
			catch (Exception ex)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[ApiClient] Failed to load ApiBaseUrl from config: " + ex.Message);
			}
			return DefaultBaseUrl;
		}
	}

	public static string GetWebSocketBaseUrl()
	{
		try
		{
			string wsBaseUrl = DuckMarketSettings.WsBaseUrl;
			if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(wsBaseUrl))
			{
				return wsBaseUrl.TrimEnd('/');
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[ApiClient] Failed to load WsBaseUrl from config: " + ex.Message);
		}
		return BaseUrl.Replace("https://", "wss://").Replace("http://", "ws://");
	}

	public static void Initialize()
	{
		_initialized = true;
		ServicePointManager.ServerCertificateValidationCallback = (object sender, X509Certificate certificate, X509Chain chain, SslPolicyErrors sslPolicyErrors) => true;
		Logger.Info("API Client initialized with HTTP/2 support");
		Logger.Info("  - Protocol: HTTP/2 (auto-negotiated)");
		Logger.Info("  - Connection pooling: Enabled");
		Logger.Info("  - Multiplexing: Enabled");
		Logger.Info("  - Compression: gzip, deflate");
	}

	public static async void Cleanup()
	{
		await WebSocketClient.DisconnectAsync();
		AuthToken = null;
		_initialized = false;
		Logger.Info("API Client cleaned up");
	}

	private static int? ExtractUserIdFromToken(string jwtToken)
	{
		try
		{
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(jwtToken))
			{
				return null;
			}
			string[] array = jwtToken.Split('.');
			if (array.Length != 3)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[JWT] Invalid JWT format (expected 3 parts)");
				return null;
			}
			string payloadSegment = array[1];
			payloadSegment = payloadSegment.Replace('-', '+').Replace('_', '/');
			switch (payloadSegment.Length % 4)
			{
			case 2:
				payloadSegment += "==";
				break;
			case 3:
				payloadSegment += "=";
				break;
			}
			byte[] bytes = Convert.FromBase64String(payloadSegment);
			Dictionary<string, object> dictionary = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<Dictionary<string, object>>(Encoding.UTF8.GetString(bytes));
			if (dictionary != null && dictionary.ContainsKey("sub") && int.TryParse(dictionary["sub"].ToString(), out var result))
			{
				return result;
			}
			Logger.Warning("[JWT] 'sub' claim not found or invalid in JWT payload");
			return null;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[JWT] Error extracting user_id from token: " + ex.Message);
			return null;
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<bool> RegisterOrLoginAsync(string steamId, string username, string password)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Logger.Error("API Client not initialized");
				return false;
			}
			string loginUsername = username;
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(loginUsername))
			{
				try
				{
					loginUsername = SteamFriends.GetPersonaName();
					Logger.Info("Retrieved Steam username: " + loginUsername);
				}
				catch (Exception ex)
				{
					Logger.Warning("Failed to get Steam username: " + ex.Message);
					loginUsername = "Player";
				}
			}
			Logger.Info("Logging in with signed authentication: " + steamId + ", Username: " + loginUsername);
			AuthenticationSigner.SignedLoginRequest signedLoginRequest = AuthenticationSigner.CreateSignedLoginRequest(steamId, loginUsername);
			Dictionary<string, string> formData = new Dictionary<string, string>
			{
				{
					"steam_id",
					signedLoginRequest.SteamId
				},
				{
					"username",
					signedLoginRequest.Username
				},
				{
					"timestamp",
					signedLoginRequest.Timestamp.ToString()
				},
				{
					"nonce",
					signedLoginRequest.Nonce
				},
				{
					"signature",
					signedLoginRequest.Signature
				}
			};
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[SignedLogin] Sending signed login request with timestamp={0}, nonce={1}...", signedLoginRequest.Timestamp, signedLoginRequest.Nonce.Substring(0, 8)));
			var (registerResponse, statusCode, serverMessage) = await HttpClientWrapper.PostFormAsyncWithStatus<RegisterResponse>(BaseUrl + "/auth/steam-login-signed", formData);
			if (registerResponse != null && registerResponse.code == "SUCCESS" && registerResponse.data != null)
			{
				AuthToken = registerResponse.data.access_token;
				CurrentUserId = registerResponse.data.user_id;
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[SignedLogin] Login successful: {0} (User ID: {1})", registerResponse.data.username, CurrentUserId));
				return true;
			}
			string friendlyMessage = ResolveSignedLoginErrorMessage(statusCode, serverMessage);
			Logger.Error(string.Format("Signed login failed ({0}): {1}", statusCode, friendlyMessage));
			return false;
		}
		catch (Exception ex2)
		{
			Logger.Error("Exception in RegisterOrLoginAsync: " + ex2.Message);
			return false;
		}
	}

	[Obsolete("Use RefreshTokenAsync instead")]
	public static async UniTask<bool> VerifyTokenAsync(string token)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Logger.Error("API Client not initialized");
				return false;
			}
			Logger.Info("[Token] Verifying access token...");
			Dictionary<string, string> formData = new Dictionary<string, string> { 
			{
				"access_token",
				token
			} };
			var (tokenVerifyResponse, _, text) = await HttpClientWrapper.PostFormAsyncWithStatus<TokenVerifyResponse>(BaseUrl + "/auth/verify-token", formData);
			if (tokenVerifyResponse != null && tokenVerifyResponse.code == "SUCCESS" && tokenVerifyResponse.data != null)
			{
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[Token] Token is valid, user_id={0}", tokenVerifyResponse.data.user_id));
				AuthToken = token;
				CurrentUserId = tokenVerifyResponse.data.user_id;
				return true;
			}
			Logger.Warning("[Token] Token verification failed: " + text);
			return false;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[Token] Exception in VerifyTokenAsync: " + ex.Message);
			return false;
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<bool> RefreshTokenAsync(string refreshToken)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Logger.Error("API Client not initialized");
				return false;
			}
			Logger.Info("[Token] Refreshing access token...");
			Dictionary<string, string> formData = new Dictionary<string, string> { 
			{
				"refresh_token",
				refreshToken
			} };
			var (tokenRefreshResponse, _, text) = await HttpClientWrapper.PostFormAsyncWithStatus<TokenRefreshResponse>(BaseUrl + "/auth/refresh-token", formData);
			if (tokenRefreshResponse != null && tokenRefreshResponse.code == "SUCCESS" && tokenRefreshResponse.data != null)
			{
				Logger.Info("[Token] Token refreshed successfully");
				AuthToken = tokenRefreshResponse.data.access_token;
				if (tokenRefreshResponse.data.user_id > 0)
				{
					CurrentUserId = tokenRefreshResponse.data.user_id;
					Logger.Info(string.Format("[Token] User ID from response: {0}", CurrentUserId));
				}
				else
				{
					try
					{
						int? extractedUserId = ExtractUserIdFromToken(tokenRefreshResponse.data.access_token);
						if (!extractedUserId.HasValue)
						{
							Logger.Error("[Token] Failed to extract user_id from JWT token");
							return false;
						}
						CurrentUserId = extractedUserId.Value;
						Logger.Info(string.Format("[Token] User ID extracted from JWT: {0}", CurrentUserId));
					}
					catch (Exception ex)
					{
						Logger.Error("[Token] Error extracting user_id from JWT: " + ex.Message);
						return false;
					}
				}
				string steamId = tokenRefreshResponse.data.steam_id;
				if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(steamId))
				{
					steamId = SteamUser.GetSteamID().ToString();
				}
				DuckMarketSettings.SaveAuthToken(tokenRefreshResponse.data.refresh_token, DateTime.Parse(tokenRefreshResponse.data.expires_at), steamId, CurrentUserId.GetValueOrDefault());
				return true;
			}
			Logger.Warning("[Token] Token refresh failed: " + text);
			return false;
		}
		catch (Exception ex2)
		{
			Logger.Error("[Token] Exception in RefreshTokenAsync: " + ex2.Message);
			return false;
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<LoginSessionResponse> CreateLoginSessionAsync()
	{
		try
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Logger.Error("API Client not initialized");
				return null;
			}
			Logger.Info("[LoginSession] Creating login session...");
			var (loginSessionResponse, _, text) = await HttpClientWrapper.PostAsyncWithStatus<LoginSessionResponse>(BaseUrl + "/auth/create-login-session", null);
			if (loginSessionResponse != null && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(loginSessionResponse.session_id))
			{
				Logger.Info("[LoginSession] Session created: " + loginSessionResponse.session_id);
				return loginSessionResponse;
			}
			Logger.Warning("[LoginSession] Failed to create session: " + text);
			return null;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[LoginSession] Exception in CreateLoginSessionAsync: " + ex.Message);
			return null;
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<LoginSessionStatusResponse> GetLoginSessionStatusAsync(string sessionId)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Logger.Error("API Client not initialized");
				return null;
			}
			var (loginSessionStatusResponse, num, text) = await HttpClientWrapper.GetAsyncWithStatus<LoginSessionStatusResponse>(BaseUrl + "/auth/login-session/" + sessionId);
			if (loginSessionStatusResponse != null)
			{
				return loginSessionStatusResponse;
			}
			if (num == 404)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[LoginSession] Session not found or expired: " + sessionId);
				return new LoginSessionStatusResponse
				{
					status = "expired"
				};
			}
			Logger.Warning("[LoginSession] Failed to get session status: " + text);
			return null;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[LoginSession] Exception in GetLoginSessionStatusAsync: " + ex.Message);
			return null;
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<bool> LoginWithP2PTicketAsync(string steamId, string username)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Logger.Error("API Client not initialized");
				return false;
			}
			Logger.Info("[P2P] Starting P2P ticket login for: " + steamId + ", Username: " + username);
			for (int retryCount = 0; retryCount <= 2; retryCount++)
			{
				bool isRetry = retryCount > 0;
				if (isRetry)
				{
					Logger.Info(string.Format("[P2P] Retry attempt {0}/{1}...", retryCount, 2));
					Logger.Info("[P2P] Cancelling previous ticket and waiting 2 seconds to avoid race condition...");
					SteamTicketAuth.CancelCurrentTicket();
					await UniTask.Delay(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(2.0));
				}
				string ticket = await SteamTicketAuth.GetAuthSessionTicketAsync(!isRetry);
				if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(ticket))
				{
					if (retryCount == 0)
					{
						Logger.Warning("[P2P] Failed to get Steam auth ticket on first attempt");
						Logger.Info("[P2P] Steam may not be initialized yet, will retry");
					}
					else
					{
						Logger.Warning(string.Format("[P2P] Failed to get Steam auth ticket (attempt {0}/{1})", retryCount + 1, 3));
					}
					if (retryCount == 2)
					{
						Logger.Error("[P2P] Failed to get Steam auth ticket after all retries");
						Logger.Info("[P2P] Please use web login instead");
						return false;
					}
					continue;
				}
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[P2P] Got ticket, length: {0} (attempt {1}/{2})", ticket.Length, retryCount + 1, 3));
				Dictionary<string, string> formData = new Dictionary<string, string>
				{
					{
						"steam_id",
						steamId
					},
					{
						"username",
						username
					},
					{
						"ticket",
						ticket
					}
				};
				var (p2PTicketSubmitResponse, _, submitError) = await HttpClientWrapper.PostFormAsyncWithStatus<P2PTicketSubmitResponse>(BaseUrl + "/auth/p2p-ticket-submit", formData);
				if (p2PTicketSubmitResponse == null || p2PTicketSubmitResponse.code != "SUCCESS" || p2PTicketSubmitResponse.data == null)
				{
					Logger.Error(string.Format("[P2P] Failed to submit ticket (attempt {0}/{1}): {2}", retryCount + 1, 3, submitError));
					continue;
				}
				if (p2PTicketSubmitResponse.data.status == "verified")
				{
					Logger.Info("[P2P] Steam Auth Service validated ticket directly");
					AuthToken = p2PTicketSubmitResponse.data.access_token;
					CurrentUserId = p2PTicketSubmitResponse.data.user_id;
					if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(p2PTicketSubmitResponse.data.refresh_token))
					{
						DateTime expiresAt = DateTime.UtcNow.AddDays(30.0);
						DuckMarketSettings.SaveAuthToken(p2PTicketSubmitResponse.data.refresh_token, expiresAt, steamId, CurrentUserId.GetValueOrDefault());
						Logger.Info("[P2P] Refresh token saved");
					}
					Logger.Info(string.Format("[P2P] Login successful via Steam Auth Service: {0} (User ID: {1})", p2PTicketSubmitResponse.data.username, CurrentUserId));
					return true;
				}
				if (p2PTicketSubmitResponse.data.status == "failed")
				{
					if (retryCount < 2)
					{
						Logger.Warning(string.Format("[P2P] Validation failed: {0} (attempt {1}/{2})", p2PTicketSubmitResponse.data.error, retryCount + 1, 3));
						Logger.Info("[P2P] Will retry with new ticket...");
						continue;
					}
					Logger.Error("[P2P] Validation failed after all retries: " + p2PTicketSubmitResponse.data.error);
					return false;
				}
				string requestId = p2PTicketSubmitResponse.data.request_id;
				int onlineUsers = p2PTicketSubmitResponse.data.online_users;
				if (onlineUsers > 0)
				{
					Logger.Info(string.Format("[P2P] Ticket submitted for P2P validation, request_id={0}, {1} users online (attempt {2}/{3})", requestId, onlineUsers, retryCount + 1, 3));
				}
				else
				{
					Logger.Warning(string.Format("[P2P] Ticket submitted for P2P validation, request_id={0}, no users online (attempt {1}/{2})", requestId, retryCount + 1, 3));
				}
				bool shouldRetry = false;
				for (int pollCount = 0; pollCount < 5; pollCount++)
				{
					await UniTask.Delay(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(3.0));
					P2PTicketStatusResponse statusResponse = (await HttpClientWrapper.GetAsyncWithStatus<P2PTicketStatusResponse>(BaseUrl + "/auth/p2p-ticket-status/" + requestId)).Item1;
					if (statusResponse == null)
					{
						Logger.Warning(string.Format("[P2P] Failed to get status (poll {0}/{1}, attempt {2}/{3})", pollCount + 1, 5, retryCount + 1, 3));
						continue;
					}
					Logger.Info(string.Format("[P2P] Status: {0} (poll {1}/{2}, attempt {3}/{4})", statusResponse.code, pollCount + 1, 5, retryCount + 1, 3));
					if (statusResponse.code == "SUCCESS" && statusResponse.data != null)
					{
						AuthToken = statusResponse.data.access_token;
						CurrentUserId = statusResponse.data.user_id;
						if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(statusResponse.data.refresh_token))
						{
							DateTime expiresAt2 = DateTime.UtcNow.AddDays(30.0);
							DuckMarketSettings.SaveAuthToken(statusResponse.data.refresh_token, expiresAt2, steamId, CurrentUserId.GetValueOrDefault());
							Logger.Info("[P2P] Refresh token saved");
						}
						Logger.Info(string.Format("[P2P] Login successful via P2P: {0} (User ID: {1})", statusResponse.data.username, CurrentUserId));
						return true;
					}
					if (statusResponse.code == "FAILED")
					{
						if (retryCount < 2)
						{
							Logger.Warning(string.Format("[P2P] Validation failed: {0} (poll {1}/{2}, attempt {3}/{4})", statusResponse.data?.error_message, pollCount + 1, 5, retryCount + 1, 3));
							shouldRetry = true;
							break;
						}
						Logger.Error("[P2P] Validation failed after all retries: " + statusResponse.data?.error_message);
						return false;
					}
					if (statusResponse.code == "TIMEOUT")
					{
						Logger.Warning(string.Format("[P2P] Validation timeout (poll {0}/{1}, attempt {2}/{3})", pollCount + 1, 5, retryCount + 1, 3));
						shouldRetry = true;
						break;
					}
				}
				if (retryCount == 2)
				{
					Logger.Error(string.Format("[P2P] All attempts failed ({0} attempts, {1} seconds each)", 3, 15));
					return false;
				}
				if (!shouldRetry)
				{
					Logger.Warning(string.Format("[P2P] Polling completed without result, will retry with new ticket... (attempt {0}/{1})", retryCount + 1, 3));
				}
			}
			Logger.Error("[P2P] Login failed after all retries");
			return false;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[P2P] Exception in LoginWithP2PTicketAsync: " + ex.Message);
			return false;
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<bool> LoginWithSteamTicketAsync(string steamId, string username)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Logger.Error("API Client not initialized");
				return false;
			}
			Logger.Info("[SteamTicket] Starting Steam Ticket login for: " + steamId + ", Username: " + username);
			string ticket = await SteamTicketAuth.GetWebApiAuthTicketAsync(DuckMarketSettings.SteamWebApiIdentity);
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(ticket))
			{
				Logger.Error("[SteamTicket] Failed to get Steam auth ticket");
				return false;
			}
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[SteamTicket] Got ticket, length: {0}", ticket.Length));
			Dictionary<string, string> formData = new Dictionary<string, string>
			{
				{
					"steam_id",
					steamId
				},
				{
					"username",
					username
				},
				{
					"ticket",
					ticket
				}
			};
			var (steamTicketLoginResponse, statusCode, serverMessage) = await HttpClientWrapper.PostFormAsyncWithStatus<SteamTicketLoginResponse>(BaseUrl + "/auth/steam-ticket-login", formData);
			if (steamTicketLoginResponse != null && steamTicketLoginResponse.code == "SUCCESS" && steamTicketLoginResponse.data != null)
			{
				AuthToken = steamTicketLoginResponse.data.access_token;
				CurrentUserId = steamTicketLoginResponse.data.user_id;
				if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(steamTicketLoginResponse.data.refresh_token))
				{
					DateTime refreshTokenExpiryUtc = DateTime.UtcNow.AddDays(30.0);
					DuckMarketSettings.SaveAuthToken(steamTicketLoginResponse.data.refresh_token, refreshTokenExpiryUtc, steamId, CurrentUserId.GetValueOrDefault());
					Logger.Info(string.Format("[SteamTicket] Refresh token saved, expires at: {0:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss} UTC", refreshTokenExpiryUtc));
				}
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[SteamTicket] Login successful: {0} (User ID: {1})", steamTicketLoginResponse.data.username, CurrentUserId));
				return true;
			}
			string friendlyMessage = ResolveSteamTicketLoginErrorMessage(statusCode, serverMessage);
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[SteamTicket] Login failed ({0}): {1}", statusCode, friendlyMessage));
			return false;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[SteamTicket] Exception in LoginWithSteamTicketAsync: " + ex.Message);
			return false;
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<bool> RefreshAccessTokenAsync()
	{
		try
		{
			string refreshToken = DuckMarketSettings.GetRefreshToken();
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(refreshToken))
			{
				Logger.Warning("[RefreshToken] No refresh token available");
				return false;
			}
			Logger.Info("[RefreshToken] Refreshing access token...");
			Dictionary<string, string> formData = new Dictionary<string, string> { 
			{
				"refresh_token",
				refreshToken
			} };
			var (refreshTokenResponse, statusCode, serverMessage) = await HttpClientWrapper.PostFormAsyncWithStatus<RefreshTokenResponse>(BaseUrl + "/auth/refresh-token", formData);
			if (refreshTokenResponse != null && refreshTokenResponse.code == "SUCCESS" && refreshTokenResponse.data != null)
			{
				AuthToken = refreshTokenResponse.data.access_token;
				if (refreshTokenResponse.data.user_id > 0)
				{
					CurrentUserId = refreshTokenResponse.data.user_id;
					Logger.Info(string.Format("[RefreshToken] Token refreshed successfully (User ID: {0})", CurrentUserId));
				}
				else
				{
					try
					{
						int? extractedUserId = ExtractUserIdFromToken(refreshTokenResponse.data.access_token);
						if (!extractedUserId.HasValue)
						{
							Logger.Error("[RefreshToken] Failed to extract user_id from JWT token");
							return false;
						}
						CurrentUserId = extractedUserId.Value;
						Logger.Info(string.Format("[RefreshToken] Token refreshed successfully (User ID from JWT: {0})", CurrentUserId));
					}
					catch (Exception ex)
					{
						Logger.Error("[RefreshToken] Error extracting user_id from JWT: " + ex.Message);
						return false;
					}
				}
				return true;
			}
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[RefreshToken] Failed to refresh token ({0}): {1}", statusCode, serverMessage));
			DuckMarketSettings.ClearAuthToken();
			return false;
		}
		catch (Exception ex2)
		{
			Logger.Error("[RefreshToken] Exception: " + ex2.Message);
			return false;
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<bool> AuthenticateAsync(string steamId, string username, string password)
	{
		return await RegisterOrLoginAsync(steamId, username, password);
	}

	public static async UniTask<(List<Listing>? listings, int total)> GetListingsAsync(string? itemName = null, int? itemTypeId = null, string sortBy = "created_at", bool myListingsOnly = false, int skip = 0, int limit = 10)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Logger.Error("API Client not initialized");
				return (null, 0);
			}
			List<string> list = new List<string>();
			if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(itemName))
			{
				list.Add("item_name=" + UnityWebRequest.EscapeURL(itemName));
			}
			if (itemTypeId.HasValue && itemTypeId.Value > 0)
			{
				list.Add(string.Format("item_type_id={0}", itemTypeId.Value));
			}
			if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(sortBy))
			{
				list.Add("sort_by=" + sortBy);
			}
			if (myListingsOnly)
			{
				int? currentUserId = GetCurrentUserId();
				if (currentUserId.HasValue)
				{
					list.Add(string.Format("user_id={0}", currentUserId.Value));
				}
			}
			list.Add(string.Format("skip={0}", skip));
			list.Add(string.Format("limit={0}", limit));
			string queryString = string.Empty;
			if (list.Count > 0)
			{
				queryString = "?" + string.Join("&", list);
			}
			ListingsResponse listingsResponse = await GetAsync<ListingsResponse>("/listings" + queryString);
			if (listingsResponse?.data != null)
			{
				List<Listing> listings = listingsResponse.data.listings;
				int item = listingsResponse.data.total ?? listings?.Count ?? 0;
				return (listings, item);
			}
			return (null, 0);
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("Failed to get listings: " + ex.Message);
			return (null, 0);
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<(List<PurchaseOrder>? orders, int total)> GetPurchaseOrdersAsync(string? itemName = null, int? itemTypeId = null, string? status = null, bool myOrdersOnly = false, int skip = 0, int limit = 10)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Logger.Error("API Client not initialized");
				return (null, 0);
			}
			List<string> list = new List<string>();
			if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(itemName))
			{
				list.Add("item_name=" + UnityWebRequest.EscapeURL(itemName));
			}
			if (itemTypeId.HasValue && itemTypeId.Value > 0)
			{
				list.Add(string.Format("item_type_id={0}", itemTypeId.Value));
			}
			if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(status))
			{
				list.Add("status=" + status);
			}
			if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(status))
			{
				list.Add("status=active");
			}
			if (myOrdersOnly)
			{
				int? currentUserId = GetCurrentUserId();
				if (currentUserId.HasValue)
				{
					list.Add(string.Format("user_id={0}", currentUserId.Value));
					int currentSlot = SavesSystem.CurrentSlot;
					list.Add(string.Format("save_slot={0}", currentSlot));
				}
			}
			list.Add(string.Format("skip={0}", skip));
			list.Add(string.Format("limit={0}", limit));
			string queryString = string.Empty;
			if (list.Count > 0)
			{
				queryString = "?" + string.Join("&", list);
			}
			PurchaseOrdersResponse purchaseOrdersResponse = await GetAsync<PurchaseOrdersResponse>("/purchase-orders" + queryString);
			if (purchaseOrdersResponse?.Data != null)
			{
				PurchaseOrder[] orders = purchaseOrdersResponse.Data.Orders;
				int total = purchaseOrdersResponse.Data.Total;
				return (orders?.ToList() ?? new List<PurchaseOrder>(), total);
			}
			return (new List<PurchaseOrder>(), 0);
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("Failed to get purchase orders: " + ex.Message);
			return (new List<PurchaseOrder>(), 0);
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<ItemStatistics?> GetItemStatisticsAsync(int itemTypeId, float durability = 100f, int? saveSlot = null)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Logger.Error("API Client not initialized");
				return null;
			}
			string endpoint = string.Format("/listings/statistics/{0}?durability={1}", itemTypeId, durability);
			if (saveSlot.HasValue)
			{
				endpoint += string.Format("&save_slot={0}", saveSlot.Value);
			}
			ItemStatisticsResponse itemStatisticsResponse = await GetAsync<ItemStatisticsResponse>(endpoint);
			if (itemStatisticsResponse?.data != null)
			{
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[API] Item statistics: dynamic_active={0}, ", itemStatisticsResponse.data.is_dynamic_pricing_active) + string.Format("base_price={0}, market_price={1}", itemStatisticsResponse.data.base_market_price, itemStatisticsResponse.data.market_price));
				return itemStatisticsResponse.data;
			}
			return null;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("Failed to get item statistics: " + ex.Message);
			return null;
		}
	}

	private static int? GetCurrentUserId()
	{
		try
		{
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(AuthToken))
			{
				return null;
			}
			string[] array = AuthToken.Split('.');
			if (array.Length != 3)
			{
				return null;
			}
			string payloadSegment = array[1];
			switch (payloadSegment.Length % 4)
			{
			case 2:
				payloadSegment += "==";
				break;
			case 3:
				payloadSegment += "=";
				break;
			}
			byte[] bytes = Convert.FromBase64String(payloadSegment);
			Match match = Regex.Match(Encoding.UTF8.GetString(bytes), "\"sub\"\\s*:\\s*\"(\\d+)\"");
			if (match.Success && int.TryParse(match.Groups[1].Value, out var result))
			{
				return result;
			}
			return null;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("Failed to parse user ID from token: " + ex.Message);
			return null;
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<(bool success, int itemTypeId, string? itemName, int quantity, float? durability, float? durabilityLoss, string? errorMessage)> PurchaseItemAsync(int listingId, int quantity)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Logger.Error("API Client not initialized");
				return (false, 0, null, 0, null, null, "API 未初始化");
			}
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(AuthToken))
			{
				Logger.Error("Not authenticated");
				return (false, 0, null, 0, null, null, "未登录");
			}
			var data = new
			{
				listing_id = listingId,
				quantity = quantity
			};
			var (purchaseResponse, statusCode, errorBody) = await HttpClientWrapper.PostAsyncWithStatus<PurchaseResponse>(BaseUrl + "/purchases", data, AuthToken);
			if (purchaseResponse != null && purchaseResponse.code == "SUCCESS" && purchaseResponse.data != null)
			{
				return (true, purchaseResponse.data.item_type_id, purchaseResponse.data.item_name, purchaseResponse.data.quantity, purchaseResponse.data.durability, purchaseResponse.data.durability_loss, null);
			}
			string friendlyErrorMessage = statusCode switch
			{
				404 => "商品已被其他人购买", 
				410 => "商品不存在", 
				400 => GetFriendlyPurchaseBadRequestMessage(errorBody), 
				402 => "余额不足", 
				429 => !string.IsNullOrEmpty(errorBody) ? errorBody : "购买频率过高", 
				_ => errorBody ?? LocalizationManager.GetText("purchase.failed_notification"), 
			};
			Logger.Error(string.Format("Purchase failed: {0} - {1}", statusCode, friendlyErrorMessage));
			return (false, 0, null, 0, null, null, friendlyErrorMessage);
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("Purchase error: " + ex.Message);
			return (false, 0, null, 0, null, null, "错误: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<(bool success, int itemTypeId, string? itemName, int quantity, float? durability, float? durabilityLoss, string? errorMessage)> FulfillPurchaseOrderAsync(int orderId, int quantity)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ApiClient] Not initialized");
				return (false, 0, null, 0, null, null, "API未初始化");
			}
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(AuthToken))
			{
				Logger.Error("[ApiClient] No auth token");
				return (false, 0, null, 0, null, null, "未登录");
			}
			int currentSaveSlot = FleaMarketState.CurrentSaveSlot;
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[ApiClient] 🚚 供货求购订单 {0}，数量: {1}，存档槽: {2}", orderId, quantity, currentSaveSlot));
			AuthenticationSigner.SignedSupplyRequest signedSupplyRequest = AuthenticationSigner.CreateSignedSupplyRequest(CurrentUserId.GetValueOrDefault(), orderId, quantity, currentSaveSlot);
			var data = new
			{
				user_id = signedSupplyRequest.UserId,
				order_id = signedSupplyRequest.OrderId,
				quantity = signedSupplyRequest.Quantity,
				save_slot = signedSupplyRequest.SaveSlot,
				items = new[]
				{
					new
					{
						item_type_id = 0,
						quantity = signedSupplyRequest.Quantity,
						durability = 100f
					}
				},
				timestamp = signedSupplyRequest.Timestamp,
				nonce = signedSupplyRequest.Nonce,
				signature = signedSupplyRequest.Signature
			};
			Logger.Info("[ApiClient] 🔍 Supply request data:");
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[ApiClient]   user_id: {0}", signedSupplyRequest.UserId));
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[ApiClient]   order_id: {0}", signedSupplyRequest.OrderId));
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[ApiClient]   quantity: {0}", signedSupplyRequest.Quantity));
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[ApiClient]   save_slot: {0}", signedSupplyRequest.SaveSlot));
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[ApiClient]   timestamp: {0}", signedSupplyRequest.Timestamp));
			Logger.Info("[ApiClient]   nonce: " + signedSupplyRequest.Nonce);
			Logger.Info("[ApiClient]   signature: " + signedSupplyRequest.Signature.Substring(0, 8) + "...");
			var (supplyResponse, statusCode, errorBody) = await HttpClientWrapper.PostAsyncWithStatus<SupplyResponse>(string.Format("{0}/purchase-orders/{1}/fulfill", BaseUrl, orderId), data, AuthToken);
			if (supplyResponse?.data != null)
			{
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[ApiClient] ✅ 供货成功: {0} x{1}", supplyResponse.data.item_name, supplyResponse.data.quantity));
				return (true, supplyResponse.data.item_type_id, supplyResponse.data.item_name, supplyResponse.data.quantity, supplyResponse.data.durability, supplyResponse.data.durability_loss, null);
			}
			string friendlyErrorMessage = (supplyResponse != null && supplyResponse.message != null) ? GetFriendlyErrorMessage(supplyResponse.message) : (string.IsNullOrEmpty(errorBody) ? string.Format("供货失败 (HTTP {0})", statusCode) : GetFriendlyErrorMessage(errorBody));
			Logger.Error("[ApiClient] ❌ 供货失败: " + friendlyErrorMessage);
			return (false, 0, null, 0, null, null, friendlyErrorMessage);
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ApiClient] ❌ 供货异常: {0}", arg));
			return (false, 0, null, 0, null, null, "网络异常");
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<PurchaseLimitInfo?> GetPurchaseLimitInfoAsync()
	{
		try
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Logger.Error("API Client not initialized");
				return null;
			}
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(AuthToken))
			{
				Logger.Error("Not authenticated");
				return null;
			}
			PurchaseLimitInfoResponse purchaseLimitInfoResponse = await GetAsync<PurchaseLimitInfoResponse>("/purchases/limit-info");
			if (purchaseLimitInfoResponse != null && purchaseLimitInfoResponse.code == "SUCCESS" && purchaseLimitInfoResponse.data != null)
			{
				return purchaseLimitInfoResponse.data;
			}
			return null;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("Get purchase limit info error: " + ex.Message);
			return null;
		}
	}

	private static string GetFriendlyPurchaseBadRequestMessage(string errorBody)
	{
		if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(errorBody))
		{
			return "请求无效";
		}
		if (errorBody.Contains("Purchase limit exceeded"))
		{
			return errorBody.Replace("Purchase limit exceeded", "购买限制已超出");
		}
		return errorBody;
	}

	private static string ResolveSignedLoginErrorMessage(int statusCode, string? serverMessage)
	{
		if (statusCode == 401)
		{
			if (serverMessage != null && serverMessage.Contains("SIGNATURE_MISMATCH"))
			{
				return "签名验证失败（客户端版本可能不匹配）";
			}
			if (serverMessage != null && serverMessage.Contains("TIMESTAMP_EXPIRED"))
			{
				return "登录请求已过期（请检查系统时间）";
			}
			if (serverMessage != null && serverMessage.Contains("NONCE_ALREADY_USED"))
			{
				return LocalizationManager.GetText("error.login_nonce_used");
			}
			return "认证失败";
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(serverMessage))
		{
			return serverMessage;
		}
		return "登录失败";
	}

	private static string ResolveSteamTicketLoginErrorMessage(int statusCode, string? serverMessage)
	{
		if (statusCode == 401)
		{
			if (serverMessage != null && serverMessage.Contains("INVALID_TICKET"))
			{
				return "Steam 票据无效";
			}
			if (serverMessage != null && serverMessage.Contains("TICKET_EXPIRED"))
			{
				return "Steam 票据已过期";
			}
			if (serverMessage != null && serverMessage.Contains("STEAM_ID_MISMATCH"))
			{
				return "Steam ID 不匹配";
			}
			return "Steam 验证失败";
		}
		if (statusCode == 503)
		{
			if (serverMessage != null && serverMessage.Contains("STEAM_WEB_API_NOT_CONFIGURED"))
			{
				return "服务端未配置 Steam Web API";
			}
			if (serverMessage != null && serverMessage.Contains("STEAM_AUTH_UNAVAILABLE"))
			{
				return "Steam 验证服务暂时不可用";
			}
			return "Steam 验证服务不可用";
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(serverMessage))
		{
			return serverMessage;
		}
		return "Steam 票据登录失败";
	}

	private static string ResolveCreateListingBadRequestMessage(string serverMessage)
	{
		string parsedValidationMessage = ParsePydanticValidationError(serverMessage);
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(parsedValidationMessage))
		{
			return parsedValidationMessage;
		}
		if (serverMessage.Contains("Duplicate listing detected"))
		{
			return "检测到重复提交，请稍后重试";
		}
		if (serverMessage.Contains("Listing limit exceeded"))
		{
			return LocalizationManager.GetText("listing.limit_exceeded");
		}
		if (serverMessage.Contains("Insufficient balance"))
		{
			return "余额不足，无法支付税费";
		}
		if (serverMessage.Contains("Price must be greater than 0"))
		{
			return "价格必须大于0";
		}
		if (serverMessage.Contains("Quantity must be greater than 0"))
		{
			return "数量必须大于0";
		}
		if (serverMessage.Contains("Cannot list container items"))
		{
			return "无法上架容器物品";
		}
		if (serverMessage.Contains("Invalid item"))
		{
			return "无效的物品";
		}
		if (serverMessage.Contains("Invalid save slot"))
		{
			return "无效的存档槽";
		}
		return serverMessage;
	}

	private static string ResolveCreateListingErrorMessage(int statusCode, string? serverMessage)
	{
		switch (statusCode)
		{
		case 401:
			if (serverMessage != null && serverMessage.Contains("SIGNATURE_MISMATCH"))
			{
				return "签名验证失败（客户端版本可能不匹配）";
			}
			if (serverMessage != null && serverMessage.Contains("TIMESTAMP_EXPIRED"))
			{
				return "请求已过期（请检查系统时间）";
			}
			if (serverMessage != null && serverMessage.Contains("NONCE_ALREADY_USED"))
			{
				return LocalizationManager.GetText("listing.nonce_already_used");
			}
			return "未登录或登录已过期";
		case 429:
			return LocalizationManager.GetText("listing.limit_exceeded");
		case 400:
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(serverMessage))
			{
				return "请求无效，请检查数据";
			}
			return ResolveCreateListingBadRequestMessage(serverMessage);
		case 500:
			return string.IsNullOrEmpty(serverMessage) ? "服务器错误，请稍后重试" : GetFriendlyErrorMessage(serverMessage);
		default:
			return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(serverMessage) ? serverMessage : LocalizationManager.GetText("listing.failed_generic");
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<(bool success, string? errorMessage)> CreateListingAsync(int itemTypeId, string itemName, int quantity, decimal pricePerUnit, decimal originalValue, int saveSlot, decimal taxFee, float? durability = null, float? maxDurability = null, float? durabilityLoss = null)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Logger.Error("API Client not initialized");
				return (false, "API 未初始化");
			}
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(AuthToken))
			{
				Logger.Error("Not authenticated");
				return (false, "未登录");
			}
			if (!CurrentUserId.HasValue)
			{
				Logger.Error("User ID not available");
				return (false, "用户信息异常");
			}
			AuthenticationSigner.SignedListingRequest signedListingRequest = AuthenticationSigner.CreateSignedListingRequest(CurrentUserId.Value, itemTypeId, itemName, quantity, (int)pricePerUnit, (int)originalValue, (int)taxFee, saveSlot, durability, maxDurability, durabilityLoss);
			var data = new
			{
				item_type_id = signedListingRequest.ItemTypeId,
				item_name = signedListingRequest.ItemName,
				quantity = signedListingRequest.Quantity,
				price_per_unit = signedListingRequest.PricePerUnit,
				original_value = signedListingRequest.OriginalValue,
				tax_fee = signedListingRequest.TaxFee,
				save_slot = signedListingRequest.SaveSlot,
				durability = signedListingRequest.Durability,
				max_durability = signedListingRequest.MaxDurability,
				durability_loss = signedListingRequest.DurabilityLoss,
				timestamp = signedListingRequest.Timestamp,
				nonce = signedListingRequest.Nonce,
				signature = signedListingRequest.Signature
			};
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[SignedListing] Creating signed listing with timestamp={0}, nonce={1}...", signedListingRequest.Timestamp, signedListingRequest.Nonce.Substring(0, 8)));
			var (response, statusCode, serverMessage) = await HttpClientWrapper.PostAsyncWithStatus<CreateListingResponse>(BaseUrl + "/listings/signed", data, AuthToken);
			bool isSuccessfulHttpStatus = statusCode >= 200 && statusCode < 300;
			bool isSuccessfulApiCode = response == null || string.IsNullOrEmpty(response.code) || response.code.Equals("SUCCESS", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) || response.code.Equals("CREATED", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) || response.code.Equals("OK", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
			if (isSuccessfulHttpStatus && isSuccessfulApiCode)
			{
				Logger.Info("Signed listing created successfully");
				return (true, null);
			}
			string friendlyMessage = ResolveCreateListingErrorMessage(statusCode, serverMessage);
			Logger.Error(string.Format("Create signed listing failed: {0} - {1}", statusCode, friendlyMessage));
			return (false, friendlyMessage);
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("Create signed listing error: " + ex.Message);
			Logger.Error("Stack trace: " + ex.StackTrace);
			return (false, "上架失败: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<(bool success, string? errorMessage, CancelListingData? itemInfo)> CancelListingAsync(int listingId)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Logger.Error("API Client not initialized");
				return (false, "API 未初始化", null);
			}
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(AuthToken))
			{
				Logger.Error("Not authenticated");
				return (false, "未登录", null);
			}
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[ApiClient] Cancelling listing {0}...", listingId));
			CancelListingResponse cancelListingResponse = await PostAsync<CancelListingResponse>(string.Format("/listings/{0}/cancel", listingId), null);
			if (cancelListingResponse != null)
			{
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[ApiClient] Cancel response: code={0}, message={1}, data={2}", cancelListingResponse.code, cancelListingResponse.message, cancelListingResponse.data));
				if (cancelListingResponse.code == "SUCCESS" && cancelListingResponse.data != null)
				{
					Logger.Info(string.Format("[ApiClient] Cancel successful: item_type_id={0}, item_name={1}, quantity={2}", cancelListingResponse.data.item_type_id, cancelListingResponse.data.item_name, cancelListingResponse.data.quantity));
					return (true, null, cancelListingResponse.data);
				}
				if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(cancelListingResponse.message))
				{
					return (false, cancelListingResponse.message, null);
				}
			}
			return (false, LocalizationManager.GetText("delist.failed"), null);
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("Cancel listing error: " + ex.Message);
			Logger.Error("Stack trace: " + ex.StackTrace);
			return (false, "错误: " + ex.Message, null);
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<(bool success, string? errorMessage, int refundedAmount)> CancelPurchaseOrderAsync(int orderId)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Logger.Error("API Client not initialized");
				return (false, "API 未初始化", 0);
			}
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(AuthToken))
			{
				Logger.Error("Not authenticated");
				return (false, "未登录", 0);
			}
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[ApiClient] Cancelling purchase order {0}...", orderId));
			CancelPurchaseOrderResponse cancelPurchaseOrderResponse = await HttpClientWrapper.DeleteAsync<CancelPurchaseOrderResponse>(string.Format("{0}/purchase-orders/{1}", BaseUrl, orderId), AuthToken);
			if (cancelPurchaseOrderResponse != null)
			{
				Logger.Info("[ApiClient] Cancel purchase order response: code=" + cancelPurchaseOrderResponse.code + ", message=" + cancelPurchaseOrderResponse.message);
				if (cancelPurchaseOrderResponse.code == "SUCCESS" && cancelPurchaseOrderResponse.data != null)
				{
					int refunded_amount = cancelPurchaseOrderResponse.data.refunded_amount;
					Logger.Info(string.Format("[ApiClient] Cancel purchase order successful for order {0}, refunded: {1}", orderId, refunded_amount));
					return (true, null, refunded_amount);
				}
				return (false, cancelPurchaseOrderResponse.message ?? "取消失败", 0);
			}
			return (false, "无响应", 0);
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("Cancel purchase order error: " + ex.Message);
			Logger.Error("Stack trace: " + ex.StackTrace);
			return (false, "错误: " + ex.Message, 0);
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<(bool success, string? errorMessage)> CreatePurchaseOrderAsync(int itemTypeId, string itemName, int quantity, int pricePerUnit, float durabilityRequirement, int taxFee)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Logger.Error("API Client not initialized");
				return (false, "API 未初始化");
			}
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(AuthToken))
			{
				Logger.Error("Not authenticated");
				return (false, "未登录");
			}
			if (!CurrentUserId.HasValue)
			{
				Logger.Error("CurrentUserId is null");
				return (false, "用户ID无效");
			}
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[ApiClient] Creating purchase order: {0} x{1} @ {2}, tax={3}", itemName, quantity, pricePerUnit, taxFee));
			int currentSlot = SavesSystem.CurrentSlot;
			AuthenticationSigner.SignedPurchaseOrderRequest data = AuthenticationSigner.CreateSignedPurchaseOrderRequest(CurrentUserId.Value, itemTypeId, itemName, quantity, pricePerUnit, durabilityRequirement, taxFee, currentSlot);
			var (createPurchaseOrderResponse, num, text) = await HttpClientWrapper.PostAsyncWithStatus<CreatePurchaseOrderResponse>(BaseUrl + "/purchase-orders/signed", data, AuthToken);
			if (createPurchaseOrderResponse != null)
			{
				Logger.Info("[ApiClient] Create purchase order response: code=" + createPurchaseOrderResponse.code + ", message=" + createPurchaseOrderResponse.message);
				if (createPurchaseOrderResponse.code == "SUCCESS")
				{
					Logger.Info(string.Format("[ApiClient] Purchase order created successfully: {0} x{1}", itemName, quantity));
					return (true, null);
				}
				return (false, createPurchaseOrderResponse.message ?? "创建失败");
			}
			if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(text))
			{
				string friendlyErrorMessage = GetFriendlyErrorMessage(text);
				Logger.Error("[ApiClient] Create purchase order failed: " + friendlyErrorMessage);
				return (false, friendlyErrorMessage);
			}
			return (false, string.Format("请求失败 (HTTP {0})", num));
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("Create purchase order error: " + ex.Message);
			Logger.Error("Stack trace: " + ex.StackTrace);
			return (false, "错误: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	private static string GetFriendlyErrorMessage(string errorMessage)
	{
		if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(errorMessage))
		{
			return LocalizationStrings.GetUnknownError();
		}
		try
		{
			if (errorMessage.Contains("\"detail\":"))
			{
				string detail = ExtractJsonDetail(errorMessage);
				if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail))
				{
					return TranslateErrorDetail(detail);
				}
			}
			return TranslateErrorDetail(errorMessage);
		}
		catch
		{
			return errorMessage;
		}
	}

	private static string ExtractJsonDetail(string jsonError)
	{
		try
		{
			const string detailPrefix = "\"detail\":\"";
			int detailStartIndex = jsonError.IndexOf(detailPrefix, StringComparison.Ordinal);
			if (detailStartIndex < 0)
			{
				return null;
			}
			detailStartIndex += detailPrefix.Length;
			int detailEndIndex = jsonError.IndexOf("\"", detailStartIndex, StringComparison.Ordinal);
			if (detailEndIndex > detailStartIndex)
			{
				return jsonError.Substring(detailStartIndex, detailEndIndex - detailStartIndex);
			}
		}
		catch
		{
		}
		return null;
	}

	private static string TranslateErrorDetail(string detail)
	{
		if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(detail))
		{
			return LocalizationStrings.GetUnknownError();
		}
		if (detail.Contains("Listing limit exceeded"))
		{
			Match match = Regex.Match(detail, "max:\\s*(\\d+)");
			if (match.Success && int.TryParse(match.Groups[1].Value, out var result))
			{
				return LocalizationStrings.GetOrderLimitExceededError(result);
			}
			return LocalizationStrings.GetOrderLimitExceededErrorGeneric();
		}
		if (detail.Contains("cancelled"))
		{
			return LocalizationStrings.GetOrderCancelledError();
		}
		if (detail.Contains("completed"))
		{
			return LocalizationStrings.GetOrderCompletedError();
		}
		if (detail.Contains("expired"))
		{
			return LocalizationStrings.GetOrderExpiredError();
		}
		if (detail.Contains("订单状态不可供货"))
		{
			return LocalizationStrings.GetOrderInvalidStateError();
		}
		if (detail.Contains("重复的求购订单"))
		{
			return LocalizationStrings.GetDuplicatePurchaseOrderError();
		}
		if (detail.Contains("Duplicate listing detected") || detail.Contains("duplicate"))
		{
			return LocalizationStrings.GetDuplicateOrderError();
		}
		if (detail.Contains("Insufficient balance"))
		{
			return LocalizationStrings.GetInsufficientBalanceForPurchaseOrderError();
		}
		if (detail.Contains("Invalid price"))
		{
			return LocalizationStrings.GetInvalidPriceError();
		}
		if (detail.Contains("Invalid quantity"))
		{
			return LocalizationStrings.GetInvalidQuantityError();
		}
		if (detail.Contains("Not authenticated") || detail.Contains("Unauthorized"))
		{
			return LocalizationStrings.GetNotAuthenticatedError();
		}
		if (detail.Contains("Item not found"))
		{
			return LocalizationStrings.GetItemNotFoundError();
		}
		if (detail.Contains("Order not found"))
		{
			return LocalizationStrings.GetOrderNotFoundError();
		}
		if (detail.Length <= 50)
		{
			return detail;
		}
		return LocalizationStrings.GetOperationFailedError();
	}

	private static async UniTask<T?> GetAsync<T>(string endpoint)
	{
		return await HttpClientWrapper.GetAsync<T>(BaseUrl + endpoint, AuthToken);
	}

	private static async UniTask<T?> PostAsync<T>(string endpoint, object data)
	{
		string url = BaseUrl + endpoint;
		try
		{
			T obj = await HttpClientWrapper.PostAsync<T>(url, data, AuthToken);
			if (obj != null)
			{
				Logger.Info("[PostAsync] Response received successfully");
			}
			return obj;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("POST request error: " + ex.Message);
			Logger.Error("Exception type: " + ex.GetType().Name);
			Logger.Error("Stack trace: " + ex.StackTrace);
			return default(T);
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<bool> AckNotificationAsync(int notificationId, int saveSlot)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ApiClient] Not initialized");
				return false;
			}
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(AuthToken))
			{
				Logger.Error("[ApiClient] Not authenticated");
				return false;
			}
			var data = new
			{
				notification_id = notificationId
			};
			AckResponse ackResponse = await PostAsync<AckResponse>(string.Format("/notifications/ack?save_slot={0}", saveSlot), data);
			if (ackResponse != null && ackResponse.code == "SUCCESS")
			{
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[ApiClient] ACK notification {0}", notificationId));
				return true;
			}
			Logger.Warning(string.Format("[ApiClient] Failed to ACK notification {0}", notificationId));
			return false;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ApiClient] Error acknowledging notification {0}: {1}", notificationId, ex.Message));
			return false;
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<bool> BulkAckNotificationsAsync(List<int> notificationIds, int saveSlot)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ApiClient] Not initialized");
				return false;
			}
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(AuthToken))
			{
				Logger.Error("[ApiClient] Not authenticated");
				return false;
			}
			if (notificationIds == null || notificationIds.Count == 0)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[ApiClient] No notification IDs to acknowledge");
				return false;
			}
			var data = new
			{
				notification_ids = notificationIds
			};
			BulkAckResponse bulkAckResponse = await PostAsync<BulkAckResponse>(string.Format("/notifications/ack/bulk?save_slot={0}", saveSlot), data);
			if (bulkAckResponse != null && bulkAckResponse.code == "SUCCESS" && bulkAckResponse.data != null)
			{
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[ApiClient] Bulk ACK {0}/{1} notifications", bulkAckResponse.data.acknowledged_count, notificationIds.Count));
				return true;
			}
			Logger.Warning(string.Format("[ApiClient] Failed to bulk ACK {0} notifications", notificationIds.Count));
			return false;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[ApiClient] Error bulk acknowledging notifications: " + ex.Message);
			return false;
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<List<PendingNotification>> GetPendingNotificationsAsync(int saveSlot)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ApiClient] Not initialized");
				return new List<PendingNotification>();
			}
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(AuthToken))
			{
				Logger.Error("[ApiClient] Not authenticated");
				return new List<PendingNotification>();
			}
			PendingNotificationsResponse pendingNotificationsResponse = await GetAsync<PendingNotificationsResponse>(string.Format("/notifications/pending?save_slot={0}", saveSlot));
			if (pendingNotificationsResponse != null && pendingNotificationsResponse.code == "SUCCESS" && pendingNotificationsResponse.data != null)
			{
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[ApiClient] Retrieved {0} pending notifications", pendingNotificationsResponse.data.notifications?.Count ?? 0));
				return pendingNotificationsResponse.data.notifications ?? new List<PendingNotification>();
			}
			return new List<PendingNotification>();
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[ApiClient] Error getting pending notifications: " + ex.Message);
			return new List<PendingNotification>();
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<List<PendingReturnItem>> GetPendingReturnsAsync(int saveSlot)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Logger.Error("API Client not initialized");
				return new List<PendingReturnItem>();
			}
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(AuthToken))
			{
				Logger.Error("Not authenticated");
				return new List<PendingReturnItem>();
			}
			PendingReturnsResponse pendingReturnsResponse = await GetAsync<PendingReturnsResponse>(string.Format("/listings/pending-returns?save_slot={0}", saveSlot));
			if (pendingReturnsResponse != null && pendingReturnsResponse.code == "SUCCESS" && pendingReturnsResponse.data != null)
			{
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[ApiClient] Retrieved {0} pending return items", pendingReturnsResponse.data.items?.Count ?? 0));
				return pendingReturnsResponse.data.items ?? new List<PendingReturnItem>();
			}
			return new List<PendingReturnItem>();
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ApiClient] Error getting pending returns: {0}", arg));
			return new List<PendingReturnItem>();
		}
	}

	private static string ParsePydanticValidationError(string errorMessage)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!errorMessage.Contains("\"loc\"") || !errorMessage.Contains("\"msg\""))
			{
				return null;
			}
			List<PydanticValidationError> errors = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<List<PydanticValidationError>>(errorMessage);
			if (errors == null || errors.Count == 0)
			{
				return null;
			}
			PydanticValidationError firstError = errors[0];
			string fieldPath = (firstError.loc != null && firstError.loc.Count > 0) ? string.Join(".", firstError.loc.Skip(1)) : "未知字段";
			string message = firstError.msg ?? "验证失败";
			if (message.Contains("less than or equal to"))
			{
				Dictionary<string, object> context = firstError.ctx;
				object maxValue;
				string threshold = (context != null && context.TryGetValue("le", out maxValue)) ? maxValue.ToString() : "未知";
				return fieldPath + " 必须小于或等于 " + threshold;
			}
			if (message.Contains("greater than or equal to"))
			{
				Dictionary<string, object> context2 = firstError.ctx;
				object minValue;
				string threshold2 = (context2 != null && context2.TryGetValue("ge", out minValue)) ? minValue.ToString() : "未知";
				return fieldPath + " 必须大于或等于 " + threshold2;
			}
			if (message.Contains("Field required"))
			{
				return "缺少必需字段: " + fieldPath;
			}
			if (message.Contains("Input should be"))
			{
				return fieldPath + " 格式不正确";
			}
			return fieldPath + ": " + message;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Verbose("[ApiClient] 解析Pydantic错误失败: " + ex.Message);
			return null;
		}
	}
}



```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Network/AuthenticationSigner.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Security.Cryptography;
using System.Text;
using System.Text.RegularExpressions;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace DuckMarket.Network;

public static class AuthenticationSigner
{
	public class SignedLoginRequest
	{
		public string SteamId { get; set; }

		public string Username { get; set; }

		public long Timestamp { get; set; }

		public string Nonce { get; set; }

		public string Signature { get; set; }
	}

	public class SignedListingRequest
	{
		public int UserId { get; set; }

		public int ItemTypeId { get; set; }

		public string ItemName { get; set; }

		public int Quantity { get; set; }

		public int PricePerUnit { get; set; }

		public int OriginalValue { get; set; }

		public int TaxFee { get; set; }

		public int SaveSlot { get; set; }

		public float? Durability { get; set; }

		public float? MaxDurability { get; set; }

		public float? DurabilityLoss { get; set; }

		public long Timestamp { get; set; }

		public string Nonce { get; set; }

		public string Signature { get; set; }
	}

	public class SignedSupplyRequest
	{
		public int UserId { get; set; }

		public int OrderId { get; set; }

		public int Quantity { get; set; }

		public int SaveSlot { get; set; }

		public long Timestamp { get; set; }

		public string Nonce { get; set; }

		public string Signature { get; set; }
	}

	public class SignedPurchaseOrderRequest
	{
		[JsonProperty("user_id")]
		public int UserId { get; set; }

		[JsonProperty("item_type_id")]
		public int ItemTypeId { get; set; }

		[JsonProperty("item_name")]
		public string ItemName { get; set; }

		[JsonProperty("quantity")]
		public int Quantity { get; set; }

		[JsonProperty("price_per_unit")]
		public int PricePerUnit { get; set; }

		[JsonProperty("durability_requirement")]
		public float DurabilityRequirement { get; set; }

		[JsonProperty("tax_fee")]
		public int TaxFee { get; set; }

		[JsonProperty("save_slot")]
		public int SaveSlot { get; set; }

		[JsonProperty("timestamp")]
		public long Timestamp { get; set; }

		[JsonProperty("nonce")]
		public string Nonce { get; set; }

		[JsonProperty("signature")]
		public string Signature { get; set; }
	}

	private static readonly string _authSalt = "mqeo8o5-MtH_77OeVsTwhL8yUuf5gdOBrzREc2uUWpU";

	private static string GenerateHmacSha256(string payload)
	{
		try
		{
			byte[] bytes = Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(_authSalt);
			byte[] bytes2 = Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(payload);
			using HMACSHA256 hMACSHA = new HMACSHA256(bytes);
			byte[] array = hMACSHA.ComputeHash(bytes2);
			StringBuilder stringBuilder = new StringBuilder(array.Length * 2);
			byte[] array2 = array;
			foreach (byte b in array2)
			{
				stringBuilder.AppendFormat("{0:x2}", b);
			}
			return stringBuilder.ToString();
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[AuthSigner] Signature generation failed: " + ex.Message);
			throw;
		}
	}

	public static long GetCurrentTimestamp()
	{
		try
		{
			string raw = HttpClientWrapper.GetRaw("https://acs.m.taobao.com/gw/mtop.common.getTimestamp/");
			if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(raw))
			{
				Match match = Regex.Match(raw, "\"t\"\\s*:\\s*\"?(\\d+)\"?");
				if (match.Success && long.TryParse(match.Groups[1].Value, out var result))
				{
					if (result > 1000000000000L)
					{
						return result / 1000;
					}
					Logger.Info(string.Format("[AuthSigner] Remote timestamp obtained: {0}", result));
					return result;
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[AuthSigner] Remote timestamp request error: " + ex.Message);
		}
		Logger.Warning("[AuthSigner] Using local UTC timestamp as fallback.");
		return DateTimeOffset.UtcNow.ToUnixTimeSeconds();
	}

	public static string GenerateNonce()
	{
		return Guid.NewGuid().ToString("N");
	}

	public static SignedLoginRequest CreateSignedLoginRequest(string steamId, string username)
	{
		long currentTimestamp = GetCurrentTimestamp();
		string nonce = GenerateNonce();
		string signature = GenerateHmacSha256(string.Format("{0}|{1}|{2}|{3}", steamId, username, currentTimestamp, nonce));
		Logger.Info("[AuthSigner] Login signature generated for " + steamId);
		return new SignedLoginRequest
		{
			SteamId = steamId,
			Username = username,
			Timestamp = currentTimestamp,
			Nonce = nonce,
			Signature = signature
		};
	}

	public static string GenerateListingSignature(int userId, int itemTypeId, int quantity, int pricePerUnit, long timestamp, string nonce)
	{
		try
		{
			string result = GenerateHmacSha256(string.Format("{0}|{1}|{2}|{3}|{4}|{5}", userId, itemTypeId, quantity, pricePerUnit, timestamp, nonce));
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[AuthSigner] Listing signature generated for item {0}", itemTypeId));
			return result;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[AuthSigner] Listing signature generation failed: " + ex.Message);
			throw;
		}
	}

	public static SignedListingRequest CreateSignedListingRequest(int userId, int itemTypeId, string itemName, int quantity, int pricePerUnit, int originalValue, int taxFee, int saveSlot, float? durability = null, float? maxDurability = null, float? durabilityLoss = null)
	{
		long currentTimestamp = GetCurrentTimestamp();
		string nonce = GenerateNonce();
		string signature = GenerateListingSignature(userId, itemTypeId, quantity, pricePerUnit, currentTimestamp, nonce);
		return new SignedListingRequest
		{
			UserId = userId,
			ItemTypeId = itemTypeId,
			ItemName = itemName,
			Quantity = quantity,
			PricePerUnit = pricePerUnit,
			OriginalValue = originalValue,
			TaxFee = taxFee,
			SaveSlot = saveSlot,
			Durability = durability,
			MaxDurability = maxDurability,
			DurabilityLoss = durabilityLoss,
			Timestamp = currentTimestamp,
			Nonce = nonce,
			Signature = signature
		};
	}

	public static string GenerateSupplySignature(int userId, int orderId, int quantity, int saveSlot, long timestamp, string nonce)
	{
		try
		{
			string signaturePayload = string.Format("{0}|{1}|{2}|{3}|{4}", userId, orderId, quantity, timestamp, nonce);
			string signature = GenerateHmacSha256(signaturePayload);
			Logger.Info("[AuthSigner] Supply signature payload: " + signaturePayload);
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[AuthSigner] Supply signature generated: {0}... for order {1}", signature.Substring(0, 8), orderId));
			return signature;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[AuthSigner] Supply signature generation failed: " + ex.Message);
			throw;
		}
	}

	public static SignedSupplyRequest CreateSignedSupplyRequest(int userId, int orderId, int quantity, int saveSlot)
	{
		long currentTimestamp = GetCurrentTimestamp();
		string nonce = GenerateNonce();
		string signature = GenerateSupplySignature(userId, orderId, quantity, saveSlot, currentTimestamp, nonce);
		return new SignedSupplyRequest
		{
			UserId = userId,
			OrderId = orderId,
			Quantity = quantity,
			SaveSlot = saveSlot,
			Timestamp = currentTimestamp,
			Nonce = nonce,
			Signature = signature
		};
	}

	public static string GeneratePurchaseOrderSignature(int userId, int itemTypeId, int quantity, int pricePerUnit, float durabilityRequirement, int taxFee, int saveSlot, long timestamp, string nonce)
	{
		try
		{
			string result = GenerateHmacSha256(string.Format("{0}|{1}|{2}|{3}|{4:F2}|{5}|{6}|{7}|{8}", userId, itemTypeId, quantity, pricePerUnit, durabilityRequirement, taxFee, saveSlot, timestamp, nonce));
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[AuthSigner] Purchase order signature generated for item {0}", itemTypeId));
			return result;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[AuthSigner] Purchase order signature generation failed: " + ex.Message);
			throw;
		}
	}

	public static SignedPurchaseOrderRequest CreateSignedPurchaseOrderRequest(int userId, int itemTypeId, string itemName, int quantity, int pricePerUnit, float durabilityRequirement, int taxFee, int saveSlot)
	{
		long currentTimestamp = GetCurrentTimestamp();
		string nonce = GenerateNonce();
		string signature = GeneratePurchaseOrderSignature(userId, itemTypeId, quantity, pricePerUnit, durabilityRequirement, taxFee, saveSlot, currentTimestamp, nonce);
		return new SignedPurchaseOrderRequest
		{
			UserId = userId,
			ItemTypeId = itemTypeId,
			ItemName = itemName,
			Quantity = quantity,
			PricePerUnit = pricePerUnit,
			DurabilityRequirement = durabilityRequirement,
			TaxFee = taxFee,
			SaveSlot = saveSlot,
			Timestamp = currentTimestamp,
			Nonce = nonce,
			Signature = signature
		};
	}
}
```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Network/HttpClientWrapper.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Net;
using System.Net.Http;
using System.Net.Http.Headers;
using System.Net.Security;
using System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates;
using System.Text;
using Cysharp.Threading.Tasks;
using DuckMarket.Core;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace DuckMarket.Network;

public static class HttpClientWrapper
{
	private class ErrorResponse
	{
		public string? detail { get; set; }
	}

	private static readonly HttpClient _httpClient = CreateHttpClient();

	private static HttpClient CreateHttpClient()
	{
		HttpClient result = new HttpClient(new HttpClientHandler
		{
			AutomaticDecompression = (DecompressionMethods.GZip | DecompressionMethods.Deflate),
			ServerCertificateCustomValidationCallback = (HttpRequestMessage message, X509Certificate2 cert, X509Chain chain, SslPolicyErrors errors) => true
		})
		{
			Timeout = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(10.0),
			DefaultRequestHeaders = 
			{
				{
					"User-Agent",
					ModVersion.UserAgent
				},
				{
					"Accept-Encoding",
					"gzip, deflate"
				}
			}
		};
		Logger.Info("✅ HttpClient initialized with connection pooling");
		Logger.Info("  - User-Agent: " + ModVersion.UserAgent);
		Logger.Info("  - Protocol: HTTP/1.1 with Keep-Alive");
		Logger.Info("  - Connection pooling: Enabled");
		Logger.Info("  - Compression: gzip, deflate");
		Logger.Info("  - Note: HTTP/2 requires .NET 5.0+ or SocketsHttpHandler");
		return result;
	}

	public static async UniTask<(T? result, int statusCode, string? errorMessage)> GetAsyncWithStatus<T>(string url, string? authToken = null)
	{

		try
		{
			HttpRequestMessage httpRequestMessage = new HttpRequestMessage(HttpMethod.Get, url);
			if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(authToken))
			{
				httpRequestMessage.Headers.Authorization = new AuthenticationHeaderValue("Bearer", authToken);
			}
			HttpResponseMessage response = await _httpClient.SendAsync(httpRequestMessage);
			int statusCode = (int)response.StatusCode;
			if (response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
			{
				T item = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<T>(await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync());
				return (item, statusCode, null);
			}
			string errorMessage = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
			Logger.Error(string.Format("GET request failed: {0} - {1}", statusCode, response.ReasonPhrase));
			Logger.Error("Error message: " + errorMessage);
			return (default(T), statusCode, errorMessage);
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("GET request error: " + ex.Message);
			return (default(T), 0, ex.Message);
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<T?> GetAsync<T>(string url, string? authToken = null)
	{

		try
		{
			HttpRequestMessage httpRequestMessage = new HttpRequestMessage(HttpMethod.Get, url);
			if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(authToken))
			{
				httpRequestMessage.Headers.Authorization = new AuthenticationHeaderValue("Bearer", authToken);
			}
			HttpResponseMessage httpResponseMessage = await _httpClient.SendAsync(httpRequestMessage);
			if (httpResponseMessage.IsSuccessStatusCode)
			{
				return JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<T>(await httpResponseMessage.Content.ReadAsStringAsync());
			}
			Logger.Error(string.Format("GET request failed: {0} - {1}", httpResponseMessage.StatusCode, httpResponseMessage.ReasonPhrase));
			return default(T);
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("GET request error: " + ex.Message);
			return default(T);
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<T?> PostAsync<T>(string url, object? data, string? authToken = null)
	{

		try
		{
			StringContent content = new StringContent((data != null) ? JsonConvert.SerializeObject(data) : "{}", Encoding.UTF8, "application/json");
			HttpRequestMessage httpRequestMessage = new HttpRequestMessage(HttpMethod.Post, url)
			{
				Content = content
			};
			if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(authToken))
			{
				httpRequestMessage.Headers.Authorization = new AuthenticationHeaderValue("Bearer", authToken);
			}
			HttpResponseMessage response = await _httpClient.SendAsync(httpRequestMessage);
			if (response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
			{
				return JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<T>(await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync());
			}
			string errorDetails = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
			Logger.Error(string.Format("POST request failed: {0} - {1}", response.StatusCode, response.ReasonPhrase));
			Logger.Error("Error details: " + errorDetails);
			return default(T);
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("POST request error: " + ex.Message);
			return default(T);
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<(T? result, int statusCode, string? errorMessage)> PostFormAsyncWithStatus<T>(string url, Dictionary<string, string> formData, string? authToken = null)
	{

		try
		{
			FormUrlEncodedContent content = new FormUrlEncodedContent(formData);
			HttpRequestMessage httpRequestMessage = new HttpRequestMessage(HttpMethod.Post, url)
			{
				Content = content
			};
			if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(authToken))
			{
				httpRequestMessage.Headers.Authorization = new AuthenticationHeaderValue("Bearer", authToken);
			}
			HttpResponseMessage response = await _httpClient.SendAsync(httpRequestMessage);
			int statusCode = (int)response.StatusCode;
			if (response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
			{
				T item = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<T>(await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync());
				return (item, statusCode, null);
			}
			string errorMessage = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
			Logger.Error(string.Format("POST Form request failed: {0} - {1}", statusCode, response.ReasonPhrase));
			Logger.Error("Error message: " + errorMessage);
			return (default(T), statusCode, errorMessage);
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("POST Form request error: " + ex.Message);
			return (default(T), 0, ex.Message);
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<(T? result, int statusCode, string? errorMessage)> PostAsyncWithStatus<T>(string url, object? data, string? authToken = null)
	{

		try
		{
			StringContent content = new StringContent((data != null) ? JsonConvert.SerializeObject(data) : "{}", Encoding.UTF8, "application/json");
			HttpRequestMessage httpRequestMessage = new HttpRequestMessage(HttpMethod.Post, url)
			{
				Content = content
			};
			if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(authToken))
			{
				httpRequestMessage.Headers.Authorization = new AuthenticationHeaderValue("Bearer", authToken);
			}
			HttpResponseMessage response = await _httpClient.SendAsync(httpRequestMessage);
			int statusCode = (int)response.StatusCode;
			if (response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
			{
				T item = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<T>(await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync());
				return (item, statusCode, null);
			}
			string rawErrorBody = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
			string errorMessage;
			try
			{
				errorMessage = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<ErrorResponse>(rawErrorBody)?.detail ?? rawErrorBody;
			}
			catch
			{
				errorMessage = rawErrorBody;
			}
			Logger.Error(string.Format("POST request failed: {0} - {1}", statusCode, response.ReasonPhrase));
			Logger.Error("Error message: " + errorMessage);
			return (default(T), statusCode, errorMessage);
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("POST request error: " + ex.Message);
			return (default(T), 0, ex.Message);
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<T?> PutAsync<T>(string url, object? data, string? authToken = null)
	{

		try
		{
			StringContent content = new StringContent((data != null) ? JsonConvert.SerializeObject(data) : "{}", Encoding.UTF8, "application/json");
			HttpRequestMessage httpRequestMessage = new HttpRequestMessage(HttpMethod.Put, url)
			{
				Content = content
			};
			if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(authToken))
			{
				httpRequestMessage.Headers.Authorization = new AuthenticationHeaderValue("Bearer", authToken);
			}
			HttpResponseMessage httpResponseMessage = await _httpClient.SendAsync(httpRequestMessage);
			if (httpResponseMessage.IsSuccessStatusCode)
			{
				return JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<T>(await httpResponseMessage.Content.ReadAsStringAsync());
			}
			Logger.Error(string.Format("PUT request failed: {0} - {1}", httpResponseMessage.StatusCode, httpResponseMessage.ReasonPhrase));
			return default(T);
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("PUT request error: " + ex.Message);
			return default(T);
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<T?> DeleteAsync<T>(string url, string? authToken = null)
	{

		try
		{
			HttpRequestMessage httpRequestMessage = new HttpRequestMessage(HttpMethod.Delete, url);
			if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(authToken))
			{
				httpRequestMessage.Headers.Authorization = new AuthenticationHeaderValue("Bearer", authToken);
			}
			HttpResponseMessage httpResponseMessage = await _httpClient.SendAsync(httpRequestMessage);
			if (httpResponseMessage.IsSuccessStatusCode)
			{
				return JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<T>(await httpResponseMessage.Content.ReadAsStringAsync());
			}
			Logger.Error(string.Format("DELETE request failed: {0} - {1}", httpResponseMessage.StatusCode, httpResponseMessage.ReasonPhrase));
			return default(T);
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("DELETE request error: " + ex.Message);
			return default(T);
		}
	}

	public static string GetConnectionStats()
	{
		return "HttpClient configured for HTTP/2 with connection pooling enabled";
	}

	public static string GetRaw(string url, string? authToken = null)
	{
		try
		{
			HttpRequestMessage httpRequestMessage = new HttpRequestMessage(HttpMethod.Get, url);
			if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(authToken))
			{
				httpRequestMessage.Headers.Authorization = new AuthenticationHeaderValue("Bearer", authToken);
			}
			HttpResponseMessage result = _httpClient.SendAsync(httpRequestMessage).GetAwaiter().GetResult();
			if (result.IsSuccessStatusCode)
			{
				return result.Content.ReadAsStringAsync().GetAwaiter().GetResult();
			}
			Logger.Error(string.Format("GET raw request failed: {0} - {1}", (int)result.StatusCode, result.ReasonPhrase));
			Logger.Error("Response body: " + result.Content.ReadAsStringAsync().GetAwaiter().GetResult());
			return null;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("GET raw request error: " + ex.Message);
			return null;
		}
	}
}
```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Network/ItemStatistics.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace DuckMarket.Network;

[Serializable]
public class ItemStatistics
{
	[JsonProperty("item_type_id")]
	public int item_type_id { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("active_listings")]
	public int active_listings { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("min_price")]
	public decimal? min_price { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("max_price")]
	public decimal? max_price { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("avg_price")]
	public decimal? avg_price { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("durability")]
	public float durability { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("base_market_price")]
	public decimal? base_market_price { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("market_price")]
	public decimal? market_price { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("is_dynamic_pricing_active")]
	public bool is_dynamic_pricing_active { get; set; }

	public long? highest_price
	{
		get
		{
			if (!max_price.HasValue)
			{
				return null;
			}
			return (long)max_price.Value;
		}
	}

	public long? lowest_price
	{
		get
		{
			if (!min_price.HasValue)
			{
				return null;
			}
			return (long)min_price.Value;
		}
	}

	public long? average_price
	{
		get
		{
			if (!avg_price.HasValue)
			{
				return null;
			}
			return (long)avg_price.Value;
		}
	}

	public int listing_count => active_listings;
}
```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Network/Listing.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Globalization;
using DuckMarket.Core;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace DuckMarket.Network;

[Serializable]
public class Listing
{
	[JsonProperty("listing_id")]
	public int id { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("user_id")]
	public int user_id { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("item_type_id")]
	public int item_type_id { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("item_name")]
	public string? item_name { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("quantity")]
	public int quantity { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("price_per_unit")]
	public long price { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("durability")]
	public float? durability { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("durability_loss")]
	public float? durability_loss { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("seller_username")]
	public string? seller_name { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("seller_steam_id")]
	public string? seller_steam_id { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("created_at")]
	public string? created_at { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("expires_at")]
	public string? expires_at { get; set; }

	public int remaining_seconds
	{
		get
		{
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(expires_at))
			{
				return 0;
			}
			try
			{
				if (DateTime.TryParse(expires_at, null, DateTimeStyles.AdjustToUniversal | DateTimeStyles.AssumeUniversal, out var result))
				{
					return Math.Max(0, (int)(result - DateTime.UtcNow).TotalSeconds);
				}
				if (DateTime.TryParse(expires_at.TrimEnd('Z'), out result))
				{
					result = DateTime.SpecifyKind(result, DateTimeKind.Utc);
					return Math.Max(0, (int)(result - DateTime.UtcNow).TotalSeconds);
				}
			}
			catch (Exception ex)
			{
				Logger.Error("[Listing] Failed to parse expires_at: " + expires_at + ", Error: " + ex.Message);
			}
			return 0;
		}
	}

	public string GetFormattedRemainingTime()
	{
		int remainingSeconds = remaining_seconds;
		if (remainingSeconds <= 0)
		{
			return LocalizationStrings.GetExpiredText();
		}
		if (remainingSeconds < 60)
		{
			return LocalizationStrings.GetSecondsText(remainingSeconds);
		}
		if (remainingSeconds < 3600)
		{
			return LocalizationStrings.GetMinutesText(remainingSeconds / 60);
		}
		int hours = remainingSeconds / 3600;
		int minutes = remainingSeconds % 3600 / 60;
		if (minutes > 0)
		{
			return LocalizationStrings.GetHoursAndMinutesText(hours, minutes);
		}
		return LocalizationStrings.GetHoursText(hours);
	}
}

```
