`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Network/SteamTicketAuth.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using Cysharp.Threading.Tasks;
using Steamworks;

namespace DuckMarket.Network;

public static class SteamTicketAuth
{
	private static HAuthTicket _currentTicketHandle = HAuthTicket.Invalid;

	private static byte[] _currentTicketData = null;

	private static TaskCompletionSource<bool> _sessionTicketResponseTcs = null;

	private static TaskCompletionSource<(bool success, byte[] ticketData, EResult result)> _webApiTicketResponseTcs = null;

	private static Callback<GetAuthSessionTicketResponse_t> _authTicketCallback;

	private static Callback<GetTicketForWebApiResponse_t> _webApiTicketCallback;

	private static Callback<ValidateAuthTicketResponse_t> _validateTicketCallback;

	private static bool _isInitialized = false;

	private static TaskCompletionSource<(bool isValid, string errorCode)> _peerValidationTcs = null;

	public static void Initialize()
	{
		if (_isInitialized)
		{
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			_authTicketCallback = Callback<GetAuthSessionTicketResponse_t>.Create(OnAuthTicketResponse);
			_webApiTicketCallback = Callback<GetTicketForWebApiResponse_t>.Create(OnWebApiTicketResponse);
			_validateTicketCallback = Callback<ValidateAuthTicketResponse_t>.Create(OnValidateTicketResponse);
			_isInitialized = true;
			Logger.Info("[SteamTicketAuth] Initialized successfully");
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[SteamTicketAuth] Failed to initialize: " + ex.Message);
			throw;
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<string> GetAuthTicketAsync(bool cancelPrevious = true)
	{
		return await GetAuthSessionTicketAsync(cancelPrevious);
	}

	public static async UniTask<string> GetAuthSessionTicketAsync(bool cancelPrevious = true)
	{
		if (!_isInitialized)
		{
			Logger.Error("[SteamTicketAuth] Not initialized! Call Initialize() first.");
			return null;
		}
		if (!SteamManager.Initialized)
		{
			Logger.Error("[SteamTicketAuth] Steam is not initialized!");
			return null;
		}
		try
		{
			if (cancelPrevious)
			{
				CancelCurrentTicket();
			}
			byte[] ticketBuffer = new byte[1024];
			uint ticketSize = 0u;
			SteamNetworkingIdentity pSteamNetworkingIdentity = default(SteamNetworkingIdentity);
			_currentTicketHandle = SteamUser.GetAuthSessionTicket(ticketBuffer, ticketBuffer.Length, out ticketSize, ref pSteamNetworkingIdentity);
			if (_currentTicketHandle == HAuthTicket.Invalid)
			{
				Logger.Error("[SteamTicketAuth] Failed to get auth session ticket");
				return null;
			}
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[SteamTicketAuth] Ticket requested, handle: {0}, size: {1}", _currentTicketHandle, ticketSize));
			_sessionTicketResponseTcs = new TaskCompletionSource<bool>();
			UniTask rightTask = UniTask.Delay(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(10.0));
			(bool, bool) tuple = await UniTask.WhenAny(UniTask.Create<bool>(async () => await _sessionTicketResponseTcs.Task), rightTask);
			if (!tuple.Item1)
			{
				Logger.Error("[SteamTicketAuth] Ticket response timeout");
				CancelCurrentTicket();
				return null;
			}
			if (!tuple.Item2)
			{
				Logger.Error("[SteamTicketAuth] Ticket validation failed");
				CancelCurrentTicket();
				return null;
			}
			_currentTicketData = new byte[ticketSize];
			Array.Copy(ticketBuffer, _currentTicketData, ticketSize);
			string ticketHex = BitConverter.ToString(_currentTicketData).Replace("-", "");
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[SteamTicketAuth] Ticket generated successfully, hex length: {0}", ticketHex.Length));
			return ticketHex;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[SteamTicketAuth] Exception in GetAuthTicketAsync: " + ex.Message);
			CancelCurrentTicket();
			return null;
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<string> GetWebApiAuthTicketAsync(string identity = "duckmarket", bool cancelPrevious = true)
	{
		if (!_isInitialized)
		{
			Logger.Error("[SteamTicketAuth] Not initialized! Call Initialize() first.");
			return null;
		}
		if (!SteamManager.Initialized)
		{
			Logger.Error("[SteamTicketAuth] Steam is not initialized!");
			return null;
		}
		try
		{
			if (cancelPrevious)
			{
				CancelCurrentTicket();
			}
			string identityValue = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(identity) ? "duckmarket" : identity.Trim();
			_currentTicketHandle = SteamUser.GetAuthTicketForWebApi(identityValue);
			if (_currentTicketHandle == HAuthTicket.Invalid)
			{
				Logger.Error("[SteamTicketAuth] Failed to get WebApi auth ticket");
				return null;
			}
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[SteamTicketAuth] WebApi ticket requested, handle: {0}, identity: {1}", _currentTicketHandle, identityValue));
			_webApiTicketResponseTcs = new TaskCompletionSource<(bool success, byte[] ticketData, EResult result)>();
			UniTask rightTask = UniTask.Delay(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(10.0));
			(bool, (bool success, byte[] ticketData, EResult result)) tuple = await UniTask.WhenAny(UniTask.Create<(bool success, byte[] ticketData, EResult result)>(async () => await _webApiTicketResponseTcs.Task), rightTask);
			if (!tuple.Item1)
			{
				Logger.Error("[SteamTicketAuth] WebApi ticket response timeout");
				CancelCurrentTicket();
				return null;
			}
			if (!tuple.Item2.success || tuple.Item2.ticketData == null || tuple.Item2.ticketData.Length == 0)
			{
				Logger.Error(string.Format("[SteamTicketAuth] WebApi ticket generation failed: {0}", tuple.Item2.result));
				CancelCurrentTicket();
				return null;
			}
			_currentTicketData = tuple.Item2.ticketData;
			string ticketHex = BitConverter.ToString(_currentTicketData).Replace("-", "");
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[SteamTicketAuth] WebApi ticket generated successfully, hex length: {0}", ticketHex.Length));
			return ticketHex;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[SteamTicketAuth] Exception in GetWebApiAuthTicketAsync: " + ex.Message);
			CancelCurrentTicket();
			return null;
		}
	}

	private static void OnAuthTicketResponse(GetAuthSessionTicketResponse_t callback)
	{
		Logger.Info(string.Format("[SteamTicketAuth] Ticket response received: Result={0}, Handle={1}", callback.m_eResult, callback.m_hAuthTicket));
		if (callback.m_hAuthTicket != _currentTicketHandle)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[SteamTicketAuth] Received response for different ticket handle");
			return;
		}
		bool isTicketResponseSuccess = callback.m_eResult == EResult.k_EResultOK;
		_sessionTicketResponseTcs?.TrySetResult(isTicketResponseSuccess);
		if (!isTicketResponseSuccess)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[SteamTicketAuth] Ticket generation failed: {0}", callback.m_eResult));
		}
	}

	private static void OnWebApiTicketResponse(GetTicketForWebApiResponse_t callback)
	{
		Logger.Info(string.Format("[SteamTicketAuth] WebApi ticket response received: Result={0}, Handle={1}, Size={2}", callback.m_eResult, callback.m_hAuthTicket, callback.m_cubTicket));
		if (callback.m_hAuthTicket != _currentTicketHandle)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[SteamTicketAuth] Received WebApi response for different ticket handle");
			return;
		}
		bool isSuccess = callback.m_eResult == EResult.k_EResultOK && callback.m_cubTicket > 0 && callback.m_rgubTicket != null;
		byte[] ticketData = null;
		if (isSuccess)
		{
			ticketData = new byte[callback.m_cubTicket];
			Array.Copy(callback.m_rgubTicket, ticketData, callback.m_cubTicket);
		}
		_webApiTicketResponseTcs?.TrySetResult((isSuccess, ticketData, callback.m_eResult));
	}

	public static void CancelCurrentTicket()
	{
		if (_currentTicketHandle != HAuthTicket.Invalid)
		{
			SteamUser.CancelAuthTicket(_currentTicketHandle);
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[SteamTicketAuth] Cancelled ticket: {0}", _currentTicketHandle));
			_currentTicketHandle = HAuthTicket.Invalid;
		}
		_currentTicketData = null;
		_sessionTicketResponseTcs = null;
		_webApiTicketResponseTcs = null;
	}

	public static async UniTask<(bool isValid, string errorCode)> ValidateTicketForPeerAsync(byte[] ticketBytes, string steamId)
	{
		if (!_isInitialized)
		{
			Logger.Error("[SteamTicketAuth] Not initialized");
			return (false, "NOT_INITIALIZED");
		}
		try
		{
			Logger.Info("[SteamTicketAuth] Validating peer ticket for Steam ID: " + steamId);
			if (!ulong.TryParse(steamId, out var result))
			{
				Logger.Error("[SteamTicketAuth] Invalid Steam ID format: " + steamId);
				return (false, "INVALID_STEAM_ID");
			}
			CSteamID steamIdObj = new CSteamID(result);
			_peerValidationTcs = new TaskCompletionSource<(bool, string)>();
			EBeginAuthSessionResult eBeginAuthSessionResult = SteamUser.BeginAuthSession(ticketBytes, ticketBytes.Length, steamIdObj);
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[SteamTicketAuth] BeginAuthSession result: {0}", eBeginAuthSessionResult));
			if (eBeginAuthSessionResult != EBeginAuthSessionResult.k_EBeginAuthSessionResultOK)
			{
				Logger.Error(string.Format("[SteamTicketAuth] BeginAuthSession failed: {0}", eBeginAuthSessionResult));
				_peerValidationTcs = null;
				return (false, eBeginAuthSessionResult.ToString());
			}
			UniTask<(bool, string)> leftTask = UniTask.RunOnThreadPool<(bool, string)>(async () => await _peerValidationTcs.Task);
			UniTask rightTask = UniTask.Delay(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(10.0));
			var (isValidationCompleted, validationResult) = await UniTask.WhenAny(leftTask, rightTask);
			if (!isValidationCompleted)
			{
				Logger.Error("[SteamTicketAuth] Peer validation timeout");
				SteamUser.EndAuthSession(steamIdObj);
				_peerValidationTcs = null;
				return (false, "TIMEOUT");
			}
			SteamUser.EndAuthSession(steamIdObj);
			_peerValidationTcs = null;
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[SteamTicketAuth] Peer validation result: isValid={0}, errorCode={1}", validationResult.Item1, validationResult.Item2));
			return validationResult;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[SteamTicketAuth] Error validating peer ticket: " + ex.Message);
			_peerValidationTcs = null;
			return (false, "EXCEPTION");
		}
	}

	private static void OnValidateTicketResponse(ValidateAuthTicketResponse_t response)
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[SteamTicketAuth] Validate ticket response: SteamID={0}, AuthResponse={1}", response.m_SteamID, response.m_eAuthSessionResponse));
			if (_peerValidationTcs == null)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[SteamTicketAuth] Received validate response but no pending validation");
				return;
			}
			bool isPeerAuthSuccess = response.m_eAuthSessionResponse == EAuthSessionResponse.k_EAuthSessionResponseOK;
			string errorCode = (isPeerAuthSuccess ? "" : response.m_eAuthSessionResponse.ToString());
			_peerValidationTcs.TrySetResult((isPeerAuthSuccess, errorCode));
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[SteamTicketAuth] Error in OnValidateTicketResponse: " + ex.Message);
			_peerValidationTcs?.TrySetResult((false, "CALLBACK_ERROR"));
		}
	}

	public static void Cleanup()
	{
		CancelCurrentTicket();
		_authTicketCallback?.Dispose();
		_authTicketCallback = null;
		_webApiTicketCallback?.Dispose();
		_webApiTicketCallback = null;
		_validateTicketCallback?.Dispose();
		_validateTicketCallback = null;
		_isInitialized = false;
		Logger.Info("[SteamTicketAuth] Cleaned up");
	}
}
```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Network/WebSocketClient.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Net.WebSockets;
using System.Text;
using System.Threading;
using Cysharp.Threading.Tasks;
using DuckMarket.Core;
using DuckMarket.Services;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace DuckMarket.Network;

public static class WebSocketClient
{
	private const int MAX_RECONNECT_ATTEMPTS = 10;

	private const int BASE_RECONNECT_DELAY_SECONDS = 4;

	private static ClientWebSocket? _webSocket;

	private static CancellationTokenSource? _cancellationTokenSource;

	private static string? _wsUrl;

	private static string _lastToken = "";

	private static int _lastSaveSlot;

	private static int _reconnectAttempts;

	private static readonly Random _random = new Random();

	private static bool _authenticationFailed;

	private static bool _isReconnecting;

	public static bool IsConnected { get; private set; }

	public static event Action<WebSocketMessage>? OnMessageReceived;

	public static event Action<bool>? OnConnectionStateChanged;

	public static async UniTask<bool> ConnectAsync(string token, int saveSlot)
	{

		try
		{
			if (IsConnected)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[WebSocketClient] Already connected");
				return true;
			}
			_lastToken = token;
			_lastSaveSlot = saveSlot;
			string webSocketBaseUrl = ApiClient.GetWebSocketBaseUrl();
			_wsUrl = string.Format("{0}/ws?token={1}&save_slot={2}", webSocketBaseUrl, token, saveSlot);
			Logger.Verbose("[WebSocketClient] WebSocket URL: " + _wsUrl);
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[WebSocketClient] Connecting to WebSocket (save_slot={0})", saveSlot));
			_webSocket = new ClientWebSocket();
			_webSocket.Options.SetRequestHeader("User-Agent", ModVersion.UserAgent ?? "");
			_cancellationTokenSource = new CancellationTokenSource();
			await _webSocket.ConnectAsync(new Uri(_wsUrl), _cancellationTokenSource.Token);
			Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[WebSocketClient] ConnectAsync completed, State: {0}", _webSocket.State));
			IsConnected = true;
			_reconnectAttempts = 0;
			WebSocketClient.OnConnectionStateChanged?.Invoke(obj: true);
			Logger.Info("[WebSocketClient] Connected successfully");
			await UniTask.Delay(100);
			Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[WebSocketClient] After delay, State: {0}", _webSocket.State));
			Logger.Verbose("[WebSocketClient] Starting ReceiveMessagesAsync...");
			ReceiveMessagesAsync().Forget();
			Logger.Verbose("[WebSocketClient] Starting SendPingAsync...");
			SendPingAsync().Forget();
			Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[WebSocketClient] All tasks started, State: {0}", _webSocket.State));
			return true;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[WebSocketClient] Connection error: " + ex.Message);
			IsConnected = false;
			WebSocketClient.OnConnectionStateChanged?.Invoke(obj: false);
			return false;
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask DisconnectAsync(bool isIntentional = true)
	{
		try
		{
			if (IsConnected && _webSocket != null)
			{
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[WebSocketClient] Disconnecting... (Intentional: {0})", isIntentional));
				_cancellationTokenSource?.Cancel();
				if (_webSocket.State == WebSocketState.Open)
				{
					await _webSocket.CloseAsync(WebSocketCloseStatus.NormalClosure, "Client disconnecting", CancellationToken.None);
				}
				_webSocket?.Dispose();
				_webSocket = null;
				_cancellationTokenSource?.Dispose();
				_cancellationTokenSource = null;
				IsConnected = false;
				WebSocketClient.OnConnectionStateChanged?.Invoke(obj: false);
				if (!isIntentional)
				{
					Logger.Warning("[WebSocketClient] ⚠️ 非主动断开连接，播放错误音效并显示通知");
					_isReconnecting = true;
					SoundManager.PlayErrorSound();
					NotificationService.ShowNotification(LocalizationManager.GetText("websocket.disconnected", "市场连接已断开"), playSound: false, NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Error);
				}
				else
				{
					_isReconnecting = false;
				}
				Logger.Info("[WebSocketClient] Disconnected");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[WebSocketClient] Disconnect error: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	private static async UniTaskVoid ReceiveMessagesAsync()
	{
		byte[] buffer = new byte[4096];
		List<byte> messageBuffer = new List<byte>();
		Logger.Verbose("[WebSocketClient] ReceiveMessagesAsync started");
		try
		{
			while (IsConnected && _webSocket != null && _webSocket.State == WebSocketState.Open)
			{
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[WebSocketClient] Waiting for message... (State: {0})", _webSocket.State));
				WebSocketReceiveResult webSocketReceiveResult = await _webSocket.ReceiveAsync(new ArraySegment<byte>(buffer), _cancellationTokenSource.Token);
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[WebSocketClient] ReceiveAsync returned: MessageType={0}, Count={1}, EndOfMessage={2}", webSocketReceiveResult.MessageType, webSocketReceiveResult.Count, webSocketReceiveResult.EndOfMessage));
				if (webSocketReceiveResult.MessageType == WebSocketMessageType.Close)
				{
					Logger.Info("[WebSocketClient] Server closed connection");
					await DisconnectAsync(isIntentional: false);
					break;
				}
				if (webSocketReceiveResult.MessageType != WebSocketMessageType.Text)
				{
					continue;
				}
				messageBuffer.AddRange(new ArraySegment<byte>(buffer, 0, webSocketReceiveResult.Count));
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[WebSocketClient] Received fragment: {0} bytes, EndOfMessage: {1}", webSocketReceiveResult.Count, webSocketReceiveResult.EndOfMessage));
				if (webSocketReceiveResult.EndOfMessage)
				{
					string message = Encoding.UTF8.GetString(messageBuffer.ToArray());
					messageBuffer.Clear();
					Logger.Verbose("[WebSocketClient] Received complete message: " + message);
					try
					{
						WebSocketMessage webSocketMessage = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<WebSocketMessage>(message);
						if (webSocketMessage != null)
						{
							if (webSocketMessage.type != "pong")
							{
								Logger.Info("[WebSocketClient] 📨 Received message type: " + webSocketMessage.type);
							}
							else
							{
								Logger.Verbose("[WebSocketClient] Parsed message type: " + webSocketMessage.type);
							}
							if (webSocketMessage.type == "error" && webSocketMessage.message != null && (webSocketMessage.message.Contains("authentication") || webSocketMessage.message.Contains("unauthorized") || webSocketMessage.message.Contains("token") || webSocketMessage.message.Contains("鉴权") || webSocketMessage.message.Contains("认证")))
							{
								Logger.Error("[WebSocketClient] 🔐 Authentication failed: " + webSocketMessage.message);
								_authenticationFailed = true;
								await DisconnectAsync(isIntentional: false);
								TriggerReauthenticationAsync().Forget();
								break;
							}
							WebSocketClient.OnMessageReceived?.Invoke(webSocketMessage);
						}
					}
					catch (Exception ex)
					{
						Logger.Error("[WebSocketClient] Error parsing message: " + ex.Message);
						Logger.Error("[WebSocketClient] Message content: " + message);
					}
				}
				else
				{
					Logger.Verbose("[WebSocketClient] Waiting for more fragments...");
				}
			}
		}
		catch (OperationCanceledException)
		{
			Logger.Info("[WebSocketClient] Receive operation cancelled");
		}
		catch (Exception ex3)
		{
			Logger.Error("[WebSocketClient] Receive error: " + ex3.Message);
			await DisconnectAsync(isIntentional: false);
			TryReconnectAsync().Forget();
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask SendMessageAsync(object message)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!IsConnected || _webSocket == null || _webSocket.State != WebSocketState.Open)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[WebSocketClient] Cannot send message: not connected");
				return;
			}
			string json = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(message);
			byte[] bytes = Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(json);
			await _webSocket.SendAsync(new ArraySegment<byte>(bytes), WebSocketMessageType.Text, endOfMessage: true, _cancellationTokenSource.Token);
			Logger.Verbose("[WebSocketClient] Sent message: " + json);
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[WebSocketClient] Error sending message: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	private static async UniTaskVoid SendPingAsync()
	{

		try
		{
			while (IsConnected && _webSocket != null && _webSocket.State == WebSocketState.Open)
			{
				await UniTask.Delay(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(30.0));
				if (IsConnected && _webSocket != null && _webSocket.State == WebSocketState.Open)
				{
					string s = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(new
					{
						type = "ping"
					});
					byte[] bytes = Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(s);
					await _webSocket.SendAsync(new ArraySegment<byte>(bytes), WebSocketMessageType.Text, endOfMessage: true, _cancellationTokenSource.Token);
					continue;
				}
				break;
			}
		}
		catch (OperationCanceledException)
		{
		}
		catch (Exception ex2)
		{
			Logger.Error("[WebSocketClient] Ping error: " + ex2.Message);
		}
	}

	private static async UniTaskVoid TryReconnectAsync()
	{
		if (_authenticationFailed)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[WebSocketClient] 🔐 Authentication failed, stopping reconnection attempts");
			Logger.Verbose("[WebSocketClient] Waiting for re-authentication...");
			return;
		}
		if (_reconnectAttempts >= 10)
		{
			Logger.Warning(string.Format("[WebSocketClient] Max reconnection attempts ({0}) reached. Will retry after longer delay...", 10));
			await UniTask.Delay(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(60.0));
			_reconnectAttempts = 0;
			Logger.Info("[WebSocketClient] Resetting reconnection attempts, trying again...");
		}
		_reconnectAttempts++;
		int baseDelaySeconds = 4 * (int)Math.Pow(2.0, Math.Min(_reconnectAttempts - 1, 4));
		int jitterSeconds = _random.Next(0, baseDelaySeconds + 1);
		int totalDelaySeconds = baseDelaySeconds + jitterSeconds;
		Logger.Info(string.Format("[WebSocketClient] Attempting to reconnect ({0}/{1})...", _reconnectAttempts, 10));
		Logger.Info(string.Format("[WebSocketClient] Reconnect delay: {0}s (base) + {1}s (jitter) = {2}s (total)", baseDelaySeconds, jitterSeconds, totalDelaySeconds));
		await UniTask.Delay(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(totalDelaySeconds));
		if (await ConnectAsync(_lastToken, _lastSaveSlot))
		{
			Logger.Info("[WebSocketClient] Reconnection successful!");
			if (_isReconnecting)
			{
				_isReconnecting = false;
				SoundManager.PlaySuccessSound();
				NotificationService.ShowNotification(LocalizationManager.GetText("websocket.reconnected", "市场连接已恢复"), playSound: false);
				Logger.Info("[WebSocketClient] ✅ Reconnection notification sent");
			}
		}
		else
		{
			Logger.Warning(string.Format("[WebSocketClient] Reconnection attempt {0} failed", _reconnectAttempts));
			TryReconnectAsync().Forget();
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask EnsureConnectionAsync()
	{
		if (IsConnected)
		{
			Logger.Info("[WebSocketClient] Already connected");
			return;
		}
		if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(_lastToken))
		{
			Logger.Warning("[WebSocketClient] No saved token for reconnection");
			return;
		}
		Logger.Info("[WebSocketClient] Attempting to restore connection...");
		await ConnectAsync(_lastToken, _lastSaveSlot);
	}

	private static async UniTaskVoid TriggerReauthenticationAsync()
	{

		try
		{
			Logger.Info("[WebSocketClient] 🔐 Triggering re-authentication...");
			await UniTask.Delay(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(1.0));
			if (await AutoLoginManager.TryAutoLoginAsync(forceRelogin: true))
			{
				Logger.Info("[WebSocketClient] ✅ Re-authentication successful!");
				_authenticationFailed = false;
				_reconnectAttempts = 0;
				Logger.Info("[WebSocketClient] Attempting to reconnect with new token...");
				await ConnectAsync(ApiClient.AuthToken, _lastSaveSlot);
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Error("[WebSocketClient] ❌ Re-authentication failed");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[WebSocketClient] Error during re-authentication: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	public static void ResetAuthenticationFailure()
	{
		_authenticationFailed = false;
		_reconnectAttempts = 0;
		Logger.Info("[WebSocketClient] Authentication failure flag reset");
	}

	private static async UniTaskVoid FetchPendingNotificationsAsync(int saveSlot)
	{

		try
		{
			await UniTask.Delay(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(2.0));
			Logger.Info("[WebSocketClient] Fetching pending notifications...");
			List<ApiClient.PendingNotification> list = await ApiClient.GetPendingNotificationsAsync(saveSlot);
			if (list == null || list.Count == 0)
			{
				Logger.Info("[WebSocketClient] No pending notifications");
				return;
			}
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[WebSocketClient] Found {0} pending notifications, processing...", list.Count));
			foreach (ApiClient.PendingNotification item in list)
			{
				try
				{
					if (item.notification_data == null)
					{
						Logger.Warning(string.Format("[WebSocketClient] Notification {0} has no data", item.notification_id));
						continue;
					}
					string notification_type = item.notification_type;
					WebSocketMessage webSocketMessage;
					if (!(notification_type == "item_sold"))
					{
						if (!(notification_type == "purchase_order_fulfilled"))
						{
							if (!(notification_type == "fulfillment_success"))
							{
								if (notification_type == "listing_expired")
								{
									webSocketMessage = new WebSocketMessage
									{
										type = "listing_expired",
										notification_id = item.notification_id,
										item_type_id = GetIntFromDict(item.notification_data, "item_type_id"),
										item_name = GetStringFromDict(item.notification_data, "item_name"),
										quantity = GetIntFromDict(item.notification_data, "quantity"),
										durability = GetFloatFromDict(item.notification_data, "durability"),
										durability_loss = GetFloatFromDict(item.notification_data, "durability_loss")
									};
									goto IL_0519;
								}
								Logger.Warning("[WebSocketClient] Unknown notification type: " + item.notification_type);
								continue;
							}
							webSocketMessage = new WebSocketMessage
							{
								type = "fulfillment_success",
								notification_id = item.notification_id,
								order_id = GetIntFromDict(item.notification_data, "order_id"),
								item_name = GetStringFromDict(item.notification_data, "item_name"),
								quantity = GetIntFromDict(item.notification_data, "quantity"),
								revenue = GetLongFromDict(item.notification_data, "revenue"),
								tax_paid = GetLongFromDict(item.notification_data, "tax_paid")
							};
							goto IL_0519;
						}
						webSocketMessage = new WebSocketMessage
						{
							type = "purchase_order_fulfilled",
							notification_id = item.notification_id,
							order_id = GetIntFromDict(item.notification_data, "order_id"),
							item_type_id = GetIntFromDict(item.notification_data, "item_type_id"),
							item_name = GetStringFromDict(item.notification_data, "item_name"),
							quantity_fulfilled = GetIntFromDict(item.notification_data, "quantity_fulfilled"),
							order_status = GetStringFromDict(item.notification_data, "order_status"),
							remaining_quantity = GetIntFromDict(item.notification_data, "remaining_quantity"),
							seller_id = GetIntFromDict(item.notification_data, "seller_id"),
							seller_name = GetStringFromDict(item.notification_data, "seller_name"),
							durability = GetFloatFromDict(item.notification_data, "durability"),
							max_durability = GetFloatFromDict(item.notification_data, "max_durability"),
							durability_loss = GetFloatFromDict(item.notification_data, "durability_loss")
						};
						goto IL_0519;
					}
					webSocketMessage = new WebSocketMessage
					{
						type = "item_sold",
						notification_id = item.notification_id,
						purchase_id = GetIntFromDict(item.notification_data, "purchase_id"),
						item_name = GetStringFromDict(item.notification_data, "item_name"),
						item_type_id = GetIntFromDict(item.notification_data, "item_type_id"),
						quantity = GetIntFromDict(item.notification_data, "quantity"),
						price_per_unit = GetLongFromDict(item.notification_data, "price_per_unit"),
						total_price = GetLongFromDict(item.notification_data, "total_price"),
						buyer_id = GetIntFromDict(item.notification_data, "buyer_id"),
						buyer_username = GetStringFromDict(item.notification_data, "buyer_username")
					};
					goto IL_0519;
					IL_0519:
					if (webSocketMessage != null)
					{
						WebSocketClient.OnMessageReceived?.Invoke(webSocketMessage);
						Logger.Info(string.Format("[WebSocketClient] Processed pending {0} notification {1}", item.notification_type, item.notification_id));
					}
				}
				catch (Exception ex)
				{
					Logger.Error(string.Format("[WebSocketClient] Error processing pending notification {0}: {1}", item.notification_id, ex.Message));
				}
			}
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[WebSocketClient] ✅ Processed {0} pending notifications", list.Count));
		}
		catch (Exception ex2)
		{
			Logger.Error("[WebSocketClient] Error fetching pending notifications: " + ex2.Message);
		}
	}

	private static int? GetIntFromDict(Dictionary<string, object> dict, string key)
	{
		if (dict.TryGetValue(key, out object value))
		{
			if (value is long longValue)
			{
				return (int)longValue;
			}
			if (value is int)
			{
				return (int)value;
			}
			if (value is double doubleValue)
			{
				return (int)doubleValue;
			}
			if (int.TryParse(value.ToString(), out var result))
			{
				return result;
			}
		}
		return null;
	}

	private static long? GetLongFromDict(Dictionary<string, object> dict, string key)
	{
		if (dict.TryGetValue(key, out object value))
		{
			if (value is long)
			{
				return (long)value;
			}
			if (value is int intValue)
			{
				return intValue;
			}
			if (value is double doubleValue)
			{
				return (long)doubleValue;
			}
			if (long.TryParse(value.ToString(), out var result))
			{
				return result;
			}
		}
		return null;
	}

	private static string? GetStringFromDict(Dictionary<string, object> dict, string key)
	{
		if (dict.TryGetValue(key, out object value))
		{
			return value?.ToString();
		}
		return null;
	}

	private static float? GetFloatFromDict(Dictionary<string, object> dict, string key)
	{
		if (dict.TryGetValue(key, out object value))
		{
			if (value is float)
			{
				return (float)value;
			}
			if (value is double doubleValue)
			{
				return (float)doubleValue;
			}
			if (value is int intValue)
			{
				return intValue;
			}
			if (value is long longValue)
			{
				return longValue;
			}
			if (float.TryParse(value.ToString(), out var result))
			{
				return result;
			}
		}
		return null;
	}
}
```

```cs
using System;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace DuckMarket.Network;

[Serializable]
public class WebSocketMessage
{
	[JsonProperty("type")]
	public string? type { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("message")]
	public string? message { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("timestamp")]
	public string? timestamp { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("notification_id")]
	public int? notification_id { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("purchase_id")]
	public int? purchase_id { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("item_name")]
	public string? item_name { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("item_type_id")]
	public int? item_type_id { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("quantity")]
	public int? quantity { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("price_per_unit")]
	public long? price_per_unit { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("total_price")]
	public long? total_price { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("buyer_id")]
	public int? buyer_id { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("buyer_username")]
	public string? buyer_username { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("durability")]
	public float? durability { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("max_durability")]
	public float? max_durability { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("durability_loss")]
	public float? durability_loss { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("order_id")]
	public int? order_id { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("quantity_fulfilled")]
	public int? quantity_fulfilled { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("order_status")]
	public string? order_status { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("remaining_quantity")]
	public int? remaining_quantity { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("seller_id")]
	public int? seller_id { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("seller_name")]
	public string? seller_name { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("revenue")]
	public long? revenue { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("tax_paid")]
	public long? tax_paid { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("request_id")]
	public string? request_id { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("steam_id")]
	public string? steam_id { get; set; }

	[JsonProperty("ticket")]
	public string? ticket { get; set; }
}
```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Patches/BuildingPatch.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Reflection;
using DuckMarket.Interactables;
using HarmonyLib;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;

namespace DuckMarket.Patches;

public class BuildingPatch
{
	private static readonly HashSet<int> _processedBuildings = new HashSet<int>();

	public static MethodBase TargetMethod()
	{
		try
		{
			Type type = Type.GetType("Building, Assembly-CSharp");
			if (type == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[BuildingPatch] Could not find Building type");
				return null;
			}
			MethodInfo method = type.GetMethod("Awake", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (method == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[BuildingPatch] Could not find Building.Awake method");
				return null;
			}
			Logger.Info("[BuildingPatch] Building.Awake method found successfully");
			return method;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[BuildingPatch] Error in TargetMethod: {0}", arg));
			return null;
		}
	}

	[HarmonyPostfix]
	public static void Building_Awake_Postfix(object __instance)
	{
		try
		{
			if (__instance == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			if (!(__instance is MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour))
			{
				return;
			}
			GameObject val = monoBehaviour.gameObject;
			int instanceID = ((Object)val).GetInstanceID();
			if (_processedBuildings.Contains(instanceID))
			{
				return;
			}
			string name = ((Object)val).name;
			if (name.Contains("BlackMarket"))
			{
				Logger.Info("[BuildingPatch] Black Market Building detected: " + name);
				_processedBuildings.Add(instanceID);
				Transform val2 = val.transform.Find("Interact");
				if (val2 != null)
				{
					Logger.Info("[BuildingPatch] Found Interact container");
					AddFleaMarketOption(val2);
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[BuildingPatch] Error in Building_Awake_Postfix: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static void AddFleaMarketOption(Transform interactContainer)
	{
		try
		{
			foreach (Transform item in interactContainer)
			{
				if (((Object)item).name == "FleaMarketInteractable")
				{
					Logger.Info("[BuildingPatch] Flea Market option already exists");
					return;
				}
			}
			GameObject val = new GameObject("FleaMarketInteractable");
			val.transform.SetParent(interactContainer);
			val.transform.localPosition = Vector3.zero;
			val.AddComponent<FleaMarketInteractable>();
			Logger.Info("[BuildingPatch] Flea Market interactable added successfully");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[BuildingPatch] Error adding Flea Market interactable: {0}", arg));
		}
	}
}



```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Patches/GameVersionDisplayPatch.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Linq;
using System.Reflection;
using Cysharp.Threading.Tasks;
using DuckMarket.Core;
using DuckMarket.Network;
using DuckMarket.Services;
using Duckov;
using HarmonyLib;
using Steamworks;
using TMPro;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;
using UnityEngine.UI;

namespace DuckMarket.Patches;

[HarmonyPatch(typeof(GameVersionDisplay), "Start")]
public static class GameVersionDisplayPatch
{
	private static TextMeshProUGUI statusText;

	private static GameObject statusTextObject;

	private static string currentStatusKey = "";

	private static Color currentStatusColor = Color.white;

	private static TextMeshProUGUI qqGroupText;

	private static GameObject qqGroupTextObject;

	private static TextMeshProUGUI discordText;

	private static GameObject discordTextObject;

	private static bool languageEventSubscribed;

	private static bool isPollingLoginSession = false;

	private static string currentSessionId = null;

	private static GameObject webLoginDialog = null;

	private static string currentLoginUrl = null;

	private static string MOD_VERSION => ModVersion.Version;

	private static void Postfix(GameVersionDisplay __instance)
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Info("[Patch] GameVersionDisplay.Start called, adding status text...");
			SyncGameLanguage();
			if (!languageEventSubscribed)
			{
				LocalizationManager.OnLanguageChanged += OnLanguageChanged;
				languageEventSubscribed = true;
				Logger.Info("[Patch] Subscribed to language change event");
			}
			TextMeshProUGUI value = Traverse.Create(__instance).Field("text").GetValue<TextMeshProUGUI>();
			if (value == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[Patch] Failed to get original text component");
				return;
			}
			statusTextObject = new GameObject("DuckMarketStatusText");
			statusTextObject.transform.SetParent(value.transform.parent, worldPositionStays: false);
			statusText = statusTextObject.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
			statusText.font = value.font;
			statusText.fontSize = value.fontSize;
			statusText.fontStyle = value.fontStyle;
			statusText.alignment = value.alignment;
			statusText.color = value.color;
			statusText.enableAutoSizing = value.enableAutoSizing;
			statusText.fontSizeMin = value.fontSizeMin;
			statusText.fontSizeMax = value.fontSizeMax;
			statusText.fontMaterial = value.fontMaterial;
			statusText.raycastTarget = true;
			currentStatusKey = "checking_server";
			currentStatusColor = value.color;
			statusText.text = LocalizationStrings.GetServerStatusCheckText() + " MOD v" + MOD_VERSION;
			RectTransform component = value.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			RectTransform component2 = statusTextObject.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			component2.anchorMin = component.anchorMin;
			component2.anchorMax = component.anchorMax;
			component2.pivot = component.pivot;
			component2.sizeDelta = new Vector2(component.sizeDelta.x, component.sizeDelta.y * 3f);
			component2.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(component.anchoredPosition.x, component.anchoredPosition.y + 75f);
			Button button = statusTextObject.AddComponent<Button>();
			button.transition = Selectable.Transition.ColorTint;
			ColorBlock colors = button.colors;
			colors.normalColor = Color.white;
			colors.highlightedColor = new Color(0.8f, 0.8f, 1f);
			colors.pressedColor = new Color(0.6f, 0.6f, 1f);
			button.colors = colors;
			button.onClick.AddListener(delegate
			{
				OnStatusTextClicked();
			});
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[Patch] Status text created successfully at position {0}", component2.anchoredPosition));
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[Patch] Using font: {0}, size: {1}", statusText.font?.name, statusText.fontSize));
			CreateCommunityLinkText(value, component);
			CheckServerStatusAsync().Forget();
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[Patch] Error in GameVersionDisplay patch: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static async UniTaskVoid CheckServerStatusAsync()
	{

		try
		{
			await UniTask.Delay(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(0.5));
			SyncGameLanguage();
			if (statusText == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			UpdateStatusText("checking_server", LocalizationStrings.GetServerStatusCheckText(), Color.white);
			if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(ApiClient.AuthToken))
			{
				UpdateStatusText("server_online", LocalizationStrings.GetServerOnlineText(), new Color(0.3f, 1f, 0.3f));
				return;
			}
			if (AutoLoginManager.IsLoginInProgress)
			{
				Logger.Info("[Patch] Login already in progress, waiting for completion...");
			}
			UpdateStatusText("logging_in", LocalizationStrings.GetLoggingInText(), new Color(1f, 1f, 0.3f));
			try
			{
				DateTime utcNow = DateTime.UtcNow.AddSeconds(20.0);
				while (DateTime.UtcNow < utcNow)
				{
					bool loginOk = await AutoLoginManager.TryAutoLoginAsync();
					if (loginOk || !string.IsNullOrEmpty(ApiClient.AuthToken))
					{
						UpdateStatusText("server_online", LocalizationStrings.GetServerOnlineText(), new Color(0.3f, 1f, 0.3f));
						return;
					}
					if (statusText == null)
					{
						return;
					}
					UpdateStatusText("logging_in", LocalizationStrings.GetLoggingInText(), new Color(1f, 1f, 0.3f));
					await UniTask.Delay(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(2.0));
				}
				UpdateStatusText("click_to_login", LocalizationStrings.GetClickToLoginText(), new Color(1f, 0.8f, 0.3f));
			}
			catch (Exception ex)
			{
				Logger.Error("[Patch] Auto-login exception: " + ex.Message);
				UpdateStatusText("click_to_login", LocalizationStrings.GetClickToLoginText(), new Color(1f, 0.8f, 0.3f));
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex2)
		{
			UpdateStatusText("click_to_login", LocalizationStrings.GetClickToLoginText(), new Color(1f, 0.8f, 0.3f));
			Logger.Error("[Patch] Error checking server status: " + ex2.Message);
		}
	}

	private static void OnStatusTextClicked()
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Info("[Patch] ===== Status text clicked! Current status: '" + currentStatusKey + "' =====");
			if (AutoLoginManager.IsLoginInProgress)
			{
				Logger.Info("[Patch] Auto-login is still in progress, ignore manual web-login click");
				UpdateStatusText("logging_in", LocalizationStrings.GetLoggingInText(), new Color(1f, 1f, 0.3f));
				return;
			}
			if (statusText != null)
			{
				Logger.Info("[Patch] Status text content: '" + statusText.text + "'");
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[Patch] Status text color: {0}", currentStatusColor));
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[Patch] Status text interactable: {0}", statusText.raycastTarget));
			}
			if (currentStatusKey == "click_to_login" || currentStatusKey == "checking_server" || currentStatusKey == "logging_in")
			{
				Logger.Info("[Patch] Valid click detected for status: '" + currentStatusKey + "', proceeding with login...");
				if (webLoginDialog != null)
				{
					Logger.Warning("[Patch] Login dialog already exists, ignoring click");
					return;
				}
				Logger.Info("[Patch] Creating web login confirm dialog...");
				CreateWebLoginDialogAsync().Forget();
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Warning("[Patch] Click ignored - current status is '" + currentStatusKey + "', expected 'click_to_login'");
				Logger.Info("[Patch] User wants to login, forcing clickable state...");
				UpdateStatusText("click_to_login", LocalizationStrings.GetClickToLoginText(), new Color(1f, 0.8f, 0.3f));
				if (webLoginDialog != null)
				{
					Logger.Warning("[Patch] Login dialog already exists, ignoring click");
					return;
				}
				CreateWebLoginDialogAsync().Forget();
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[Patch] Error in OnStatusTextClicked: " + ex.Message);
			Logger.Error("[Patch] Stack trace: " + ex.StackTrace);
		}
	}

	private static void AnalyzeConfirmPanelStructure()
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Info("[UI-Analysis] ========== 开始分析ConfirmPanel结构 ==========");
			string confirmPanelPath = "Canvas/MainMenuContainer/SaveFileSelection/RestorePanel/ConfirmPanel";
			GameObject gameObject = GameObject.Find(confirmPanelPath);
			if (gameObject == null)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[UI-Analysis] ❌ 未找到ConfirmPanel: " + confirmPanelPath);
				Logger.Info("[UI-Analysis] 🔍 搜索所有ConfirmPanel...");
				GameObject[] array = (from go in Resources.FindObjectsOfTypeAll<GameObject>()
					where go.name.Contains("ConfirmPanel") || go.name.Contains("Confirm")
					select go).ToArray();
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[UI-Analysis] 找到 {0} 个可能的确认面板:", array.Length));
				GameObject[] array2 = array;
				foreach (GameObject gameObject2 in array2)
				{
					string gameObjectPath = GetGameObjectPath(gameObject2);
					Logger.Info(string.Format("[UI-Analysis]   - {0} (active: {1}) @ {2}", gameObject2.name, gameObject2.activeInHierarchy, gameObjectPath));
				}
				Logger.Info("[UI-Analysis] 🔍 搜索MainMenuContainer...");
				GameObject[] array3 = (from go in Resources.FindObjectsOfTypeAll<GameObject>()
					where go.name.Contains("MainMenu")
					select go).ToArray();
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[UI-Analysis] 找到 {0} 个MainMenu相关对象:", array3.Length));
				array2 = array3;
				foreach (GameObject gameObject3 in array2)
				{
					string gameObjectPath2 = GetGameObjectPath(gameObject3);
					Logger.Info(string.Format("[UI-Analysis]   - {0} (active: {1}) @ {2}", gameObject3.name, gameObject3.activeInHierarchy, gameObjectPath2));
				}
				return;
			}
			Logger.Info("[UI-Analysis] ✅ 找到ConfirmPanel: " + confirmPanelPath);
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[UI-Analysis] Active: {0}, GameObject: {1}", gameObject.activeInHierarchy, gameObject.activeSelf));
			Logger.Info("[UI-Analysis] 📋 组件分析:");
			Component[] components = gameObject.GetComponents<Component>();
			foreach (Component component in components)
			{
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[UI-Analysis]   - {0}: {1}", component.GetType().Name, component));
				if (component is RectTransform rectTransform)
				{
					Logger.Info(string.Format("[UI-Analysis]     * Position: {0}", rectTransform.anchoredPosition));
					Logger.Info(string.Format("[UI-Analysis]     * Size: {0}", rectTransform.sizeDelta));
					Logger.Info(string.Format("[UI-Analysis]     * Anchors: min={0}, max={1}", rectTransform.anchorMin, rectTransform.anchorMax));
				}
				else if (component is Button button)
				{
					Logger.Info(string.Format("[UI-Analysis]     * Interactable: {0}", button.interactable));
					Logger.Info(string.Format("[UI-Analysis]     * OnClick listeners: {0}", button.onClick.GetPersistentEventCount()));
				}
			}
			Logger.Info("[UI-Analysis] 🌳 子对象结构:");
			AnalyzeGameObjectHierarchy(gameObject, 0, 3);
			Logger.Info("[UI-Analysis] ========== ConfirmPanel结构分析完成 ==========");
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[UI-Analysis] ❌ 分析ConfirmPanel结构失败: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	private static void AnalyzeGameObjectHierarchy(GameObject obj, int depth, int maxDepth)
	{
		if (depth > maxDepth)
		{
			return;
		}
		string indent = new string(' ', depth * 2);
		Logger.Info(string.Format("[UI-Analysis] {0}├─ {1} (active: {2})", indent, obj.name, obj.activeSelf));
		foreach (Component item in from c in obj.GetComponents<Component>()
			where IsImportantUIComponent(c)
			select c)
		{
			Logger.Info("[UI-Analysis] " + indent + "│  └─ " + item.GetType().Name);
			if (item is Text text2)
			{
					Logger.Info("[UI-Analysis] " + indent + "│     Text: \"" + text2.text + "\"");
			}
			else if (item is TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI)
			{
					Logger.Info("[UI-Analysis] " + indent + "│     TMP Text: \"" + textMeshProUGUI.text + "\"");
			}
			else if (item is Button button)
			{
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[UI-Analysis] {0}│     Button: interactable={1}", indent, button.interactable));
			}
		}
		for (int childIndex = 0; childIndex < obj.transform.childCount; childIndex++)
		{
			AnalyzeGameObjectHierarchy(obj.transform.GetChild(childIndex).gameObject, depth + 1, maxDepth);
		}
	}

	private static bool IsImportantUIComponent(Component component)
	{
		if (!(component is Button) && !(component is Text) && !(component is TextMeshProUGUI) && !(component is Image) && !(component is RectTransform) && !component.GetType().Name.Contains("CanvasGroup"))
		{
			return component.GetType().Name.Contains("FadeGroup");
		}
		return true;
	}

	private static string GetGameObjectPath(GameObject obj)
	{
		string path = obj.name;
		Transform parent = obj.transform.parent;
		while (parent != null)
		{
			path = parent.name + "/" + path;
			parent = parent.parent;
		}
		return path;
	}

	private static void CheckAndFixChildComponents(Transform parent, int depth)
	{
		if (!parent.gameObject.activeSelf && parent.name != "SlotLine" && parent.parent?.name != "SlotLine")
		{
			parent.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
		}
		Component[] components = parent.GetComponents<Component>();
		foreach (Component component in components)
		{
			if (component.GetType().Name == "Image")
			{
				PropertyInfo property = component.GetType().GetProperty("color");
				if (property != null)
				{
					Color color = (Color)property.GetValue(component);
					if (color.a == 0f)
					{
						Color color2 = new Color(color.r, color.g, color.b, 1f);
						property.SetValue(component, color2);
					}
				}
			}
			else if (component.GetType().Name == "TextMeshProUGUI" || component.GetType().Name.Contains("Text"))
			{
				PropertyInfo property2 = component.GetType().GetProperty("color");
				if (property2 != null && ((Color)property2.GetValue(component)).a == 0f)
				{
					Color color3 = new Color(1f, 1f, 1f, 1f);
					property2.SetValue(component, color3);
				}
			}
		}
		if (depth < 5)
		{
			for (int j = 0; j < parent.childCount; j++)
			{
				CheckAndFixChildComponents(parent.GetChild(j), depth + 1);
			}
		}
	}

	private static void ShowWebLoginConfirmDialog()
	{
		try
		{
			if (webLoginDialog != null)
			{
				Logger.Info("[Patch] Web login dialog already exists, skipping creation");
				return;
			}
			Logger.Info("[Patch] Creating web login confirm dialog...");
			CreateWebLoginDialogAsync().Forget();
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[Patch] Error in ShowWebLoginConfirmDialog: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	private static async UniTaskVoid CreateWebLoginDialogAsync()
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Info("[Patch] ===== Starting CreateWebLoginDialogAsync =====");
			if (!ApiClient.IsInitialized)
			{
				Logger.Error("[Patch] ApiClient not initialized! Cannot create login session.");
				UpdateStatusText("click_to_login", "API未初始化，请重启游戏", Color.red);
				return;
			}
			Logger.Info("[Patch] Creating login session for dialog...");
			UpdateStatusText("logging_in", "正在创建登录会话...", new Color(1f, 1f, 0.3f));
			UniTask rightTask = UniTask.Delay(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(10.0));
			var (flag, loginSessionResponse) = await UniTask.WhenAny(ApiClient.CreateLoginSessionAsync(), rightTask);
			if (!flag)
			{
				Logger.Error("[Patch] Create login session timeout after 10 seconds");
				UpdateStatusText("click_to_login", "创建会话超时，请重试", Color.red);
				return;
			}
			LoginSessionResponse loginSessionResponse2 = loginSessionResponse;
			if (loginSessionResponse2 == null || string.IsNullOrEmpty(loginSessionResponse2.session_id))
			{
				Logger.Error("[Patch] Failed to create login session for dialog");
				Logger.Error("[Patch] Session response is null or session_id is empty");
				UpdateStatusText("click_to_login", "创建登录会话失败", Color.red);
				return;
			}
			currentLoginUrl = loginSessionResponse2.login_url;
			Logger.Info("[Patch] Login session created successfully!");
			Logger.Info("[Patch] Session ID: " + loginSessionResponse2.session_id);
			Logger.Info("[Patch] Login URL: " + currentLoginUrl);
			UpdateStatusText("logging_in", "正在打开浏览器...", new Color(1f, 1f, 0.3f));
			try
			{
				if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(currentLoginUrl))
				{
					Application.OpenURL(currentLoginUrl);
					Logger.Info("[Patch] Successfully opened web login URL in browser");
				}
				else
				{
					Logger.Error("[Patch] Login URL is empty, cannot open browser");
				}
			}
			catch (Exception ex)
			{
				Logger.Error("[Patch] Failed to auto-open web login URL: " + ex.Message);
			}
			Logger.Info("[Patch] Creating login dialog UI...");
			CreateWebLoginDialogUI();
			Logger.Info("[Patch] Starting login status polling...");
			UpdateStatusText("logging_in", "等待浏览器登录完成...", new Color(1f, 1f, 0.3f));
			PollWebLoginStatus(loginSessionResponse2.session_id).Forget();
			Logger.Info("[Patch] ===== CreateWebLoginDialogAsync completed successfully =====");
		}
		catch (Exception ex2)
		{
			Logger.Error("[Patch] Exception in CreateWebLoginDialogAsync: " + ex2.Message);
			Logger.Error("[Patch] Stack trace: " + ex2.StackTrace);
			UpdateStatusText("click_to_login", "登录过程出错，请重试", Color.red);
		}
	}

	private static void CreateWebLoginDialogUI()
	{
		try
		{
			GameObject gameObject = GameObject.Find("Canvas/MainMenuContainer/SaveFileSelection/RestorePanel/ConfirmPanel");
			if (gameObject == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[Patch] Could not find original ConfirmPanel");
				return;
			}
			Logger.Info("[Patch] Found original ConfirmPanel: " + gameObject.name);
			Logger.Info("[Patch] Original parent: " + gameObject.transform.parent.name);
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[Patch] Original parent active: {0}", gameObject.transform.parent.gameObject.activeInHierarchy));
			GameObject gameObject2 = GameObject.Find("Canvas");
			if (gameObject2 == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[Patch] Could not find Canvas");
				return;
			}
			webLoginDialog = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(gameObject, gameObject2.transform);
			webLoginDialog.name = "WebLoginConfirmPanel";
			Logger.Info("[Patch] Cloned ConfirmPanel for web login dialog under Canvas");
			webLoginDialog.transform.SetAsLastSibling();
			Transform transform = webLoginDialog.transform;
			while (transform != null)
			{
				if (!transform.gameObject.activeSelf)
				{
					Logger.Info("[Patch] Activating parent: " + transform.name);
					transform.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
				}
				transform = transform.parent;
			}
			ModifyWebLoginDialogContent();
			Logger.Info("[Patch] Attempting to show dialog...");
			Canvas componentInParent = webLoginDialog.GetComponentInParent<Canvas>();
			if (componentInParent != null)
			{
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[Patch] Dialog is under Canvas: {0}, sortingOrder: {1}", componentInParent.name, componentInParent.sortingOrder));
			}
			webLoginDialog.SetActive(value: true);
			Logger.Info("[Patch] Dialog SetActive(true) called");
			Component component = webLoginDialog.GetComponent<Component>();
			Type type = component?.GetType();
			if (component != null && type.Name == "CanvasGroup")
			{
				Logger.Info("[Patch] CanvasGroup found of type: " + type.Name);
				PropertyInfo property = type.GetProperty("alpha");
				PropertyInfo property2 = type.GetProperty("interactable");
				PropertyInfo property3 = type.GetProperty("blocksRaycasts");
				if (property != null)
				{
					object value = property.GetValue(component);
					Logger.Info(string.Format("[Patch] Current alpha: {0}", value));
					property.SetValue(component, 1f);
				}
				if (property2 != null)
				{
					property2.SetValue(component, true);
				}
				if (property3 != null)
				{
					property3.SetValue(component, true);
				}
				Logger.Info("[Patch] CanvasGroup properties set to visible");
			}
			Component[] components = webLoginDialog.GetComponents<Component>();
			Component component2 = null;
			Component component3 = null;
			Component[] array = components;
			foreach (Component component4 in array)
			{
				string name = component4.GetType().Name;
				if (name == "FadeGroup")
				{
					component2 = component4;
				}
				else if (name == "CanvasGroup")
				{
					component3 = component4;
				}
			}
			if (component3 != null)
			{
				Type type2 = component3.GetType();
				PropertyInfo property4 = type2.GetProperty("alpha");
				PropertyInfo property5 = type2.GetProperty("interactable");
				PropertyInfo property6 = type2.GetProperty("blocksRaycasts");
				if (property4 != null)
				{
					property4.SetValue(component3, 1f);
				}
				if (property5 != null)
				{
					property5.SetValue(component3, true);
				}
				if (property6 != null)
				{
					property6.SetValue(component3, true);
				}
			}
			if (component2 != null)
			{
				MethodInfo method = component2.GetType().GetMethod("Show");
				if (method != null)
				{
					method.Invoke(component2, null);
					Logger.Info("[Patch] Dialog shown with fade animation");
				}
				else
				{
					MethodInfo method2 = component2.GetType().GetMethod("FadeIn");
					if (method2 != null)
					{
						method2.Invoke(component2, null);
						Logger.Info("[Patch] Dialog shown with fade animation");
					}
				}
			}
			CheckAndFixChildComponents(webLoginDialog.transform, 0);
			Logger.Info("[Patch] Web login dialog created and shown successfully");
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[Patch] Exception in CreateWebLoginDialogUI: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	private static void ModifyWebLoginDialogContent()
	{
		try
		{
			TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = webLoginDialog.transform.Find("Layout/Title")?.GetComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
			if (textMeshProUGUI != null)
			{
				textMeshProUGUI.text = LocalizationStrings.GetWebLoginDialogTitle();
				Logger.Info("[Patch] Updated dialog title");
			}
			Transform transform = webLoginDialog.transform.Find("Layout/SlotLine");
			if (transform != null)
			{
				transform.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				Logger.Info("[Patch] Hidden slot line");
				for (int i = 0; i < transform.childCount; i++)
				{
					transform.GetChild(i).gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				}
			}
			TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI2 = webLoginDialog.transform.Find("Layout/Warning/Text (TMP)_1")?.GetComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
			if (textMeshProUGUI2 != null)
			{
				textMeshProUGUI2.text = LocalizationStrings.GetWebLoginDialogMessage();
				Logger.Info("[Patch] Updated warning text");
			}
			ModifyDialogButtons();
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[Patch] Exception in ModifyWebLoginDialogContent: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	private static void ModifyDialogButtons()
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Info("[Patch] Analyzing button structure...");
			Transform transform = webLoginDialog.transform.Find("Layout/Bttons");
			if (transform != null)
			{
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[Patch] Found buttons container with {0} children", transform.childCount));
				for (int i = 0; i < transform.childCount; i++)
				{
					Transform child = transform.GetChild(i);
					Logger.Info(string.Format("[Patch] Button child {0}: {1}", i, child.name));
					for (int j = 0; j < child.childCount; j++)
					{
						Transform child2 = child.GetChild(j);
						Logger.Info(string.Format("[Patch]   - SubChild {0}: {1} (type: {2})", j, child2.name, child2.GetComponent<Component>()?.GetType().Name));
					}
				}
			}
			Button button = webLoginDialog.transform.Find("Layout/Bttons/BtnConfirm")?.GetComponent<Button>();
			if (button != null)
			{
				Logger.Info("[Patch] Found confirm button, searching for text component...");
				TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = null;
				textMeshProUGUI = button.transform.Find("Text (TMP)")?.GetComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
				if (textMeshProUGUI == null)
				{
					textMeshProUGUI = button.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
				}
				if (textMeshProUGUI != null)
				{
					textMeshProUGUI.text = LocalizationStrings.GetCopyLinkButtonText();
					Logger.Info("[Patch] Updated confirm button text");
				}
				else
				{
					Logger.Warning("[Patch] Could not find confirm button text component");
				}
				button.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
				button.onClick.AddListener(delegate
				{
					OnCopyLinkClicked();
				});
				Logger.Info("[Patch] Updated confirm button event");
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Error("[Patch] Could not find confirm button");
			}
			Button button2 = webLoginDialog.transform.Find("Layout/Bttons/BtnCancel")?.GetComponent<Button>();
			if (button2 != null)
			{
				Logger.Info("[Patch] Found cancel button, searching for text component...");
				TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI2 = null;
				textMeshProUGUI2 = button2.transform.Find("Text (TMP)")?.GetComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
				if (textMeshProUGUI2 == null)
				{
					textMeshProUGUI2 = button2.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
				}
				if (textMeshProUGUI2 != null)
				{
					textMeshProUGUI2.text = LocalizationStrings.GetCancelButtonText();
					Logger.Info("[Patch] Updated cancel button text");
				}
				else
				{
					Logger.Warning("[Patch] Could not find cancel button text component");
				}
				button2.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
				button2.onClick.AddListener(delegate
				{
					OnCancelLoginClicked();
				});
				Logger.Info("[Patch] Updated cancel button event");
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Error("[Patch] Could not find cancel button");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[Patch] Exception in ModifyDialogButtons: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	private static void OnCopyLinkClicked()
	{
		try
		{
			if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(currentLoginUrl))
			{
				GUIUtility.systemCopyBuffer = currentLoginUrl;
				Logger.Info("[Patch] Login URL copied to clipboard: " + currentLoginUrl);
				try
				{
					Application.OpenURL(currentLoginUrl);
					Logger.Info("[Patch] Attempted to open login URL: " + currentLoginUrl);
					return;
				}
				catch (Exception ex)
				{
					Logger.Error("[Patch] Failed to open login URL: " + ex.Message);
					return;
				}
			}
			Logger.Error("[Patch] No login URL available to copy");
		}
		catch (Exception ex2)
		{
			Logger.Error("[Patch] Exception in OnCopyLinkClicked: " + ex2.Message);
		}
	}

	private static void OnCancelLoginClicked()
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Info("[Patch] User cancelled web login");
			CloseWebLoginDialog();
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[Patch] Exception in OnCancelLoginClicked: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	private static void CloseWebLoginDialog()
	{
		try
		{
			if (webLoginDialog != null)
			{
				webLoginDialog.SetActive(value: false);
				Logger.Info("[Patch] Web login dialog closed immediately");
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(webLoginDialog);
				webLoginDialog = null;
				currentLoginUrl = null;
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[Patch] Exception in CloseWebLoginDialog: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	private static async UniTaskVoid PollWebLoginStatus(string sessionId)
	{

		try
		{
			for (int i = 0; i < 100; i++)
			{
				if (webLoginDialog == null)
				{
					Logger.Info("[Patch] Dialog closed, stopping login polling");
					return;
				}
				await UniTask.Delay(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(3.0));
				if (webLoginDialog == null)
				{
					Logger.Info("[Patch] Dialog closed during wait, stopping login polling");
					return;
				}
				LoginSessionStatusResponse loginSessionStatusResponse = await ApiClient.GetLoginSessionStatusAsync(sessionId);
				if (loginSessionStatusResponse == null)
				{
					continue;
				}
				Logger.Info("[Patch] Login status: " + loginSessionStatusResponse.status);
				if (loginSessionStatusResponse.status == "success")
				{
					if (webLoginDialog == null)
					{
						Logger.Info("[Patch] Login succeeded but dialog already closed, ignoring session result");
						return;
					}
					Logger.Info("[Patch] Web login successful!");
					if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(loginSessionStatusResponse.access_token) && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(loginSessionStatusResponse.refresh_token))
					{
						DateTime expiresAt = DateTime.UtcNow.AddDays(7.0);
						DuckMarketSettings.SaveAuthToken(loginSessionStatusResponse.refresh_token, expiresAt, loginSessionStatusResponse.user.steam_id, loginSessionStatusResponse.user.user_id);
						ApiClient.AuthToken = loginSessionStatusResponse.access_token;
						ApiClient.CurrentUserId = loginSessionStatusResponse.user.user_id;
						Logger.Info("[Patch] Login tokens saved for user: " + loginSessionStatusResponse.user.username);
					}
					UpdateStatusText("server_online", LocalizationStrings.GetServerOnlineText(), new Color(0.3f, 1f, 0.3f));
					CloseWebLoginDialog();
					return;
				}
				if (loginSessionStatusResponse.status == "failed" || loginSessionStatusResponse.status == "expired")
				{
					Logger.Error("[Patch] Login failed: " + loginSessionStatusResponse.status);
					CloseWebLoginDialog();
					return;
				}
			}
			Logger.Warning("[Patch] Login polling timeout");
			CloseWebLoginDialog();
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[Patch] Exception in PollWebLoginStatus: " + ex.Message);
			CloseWebLoginDialog();
		}
	}

	private static async UniTaskVoid StartWebLoginFlow()
	{

		try
		{
			if (isPollingLoginSession)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[Patch] Login flow already in progress");
				return;
			}
			isPollingLoginSession = true;
			Logger.Info("[Patch] Creating login session...");
			LoginSessionResponse loginSessionResponse = await ApiClient.CreateLoginSessionAsync();
			if (loginSessionResponse == null || string.IsNullOrEmpty(loginSessionResponse.session_id))
			{
				Logger.Error("[Patch] Failed to create login session");
				UpdateStatusText("click_to_login", LocalizationStrings.GetClickToLoginText(), new Color(1f, 0.8f, 0.3f));
				isPollingLoginSession = false;
				return;
			}
			currentSessionId = loginSessionResponse.session_id;
			Logger.Info("[Patch] Login session created: " + currentSessionId);
			Logger.Info("[Patch] Login URL: " + loginSessionResponse.login_url);
			Application.OpenURL(loginSessionResponse.login_url);
			Logger.Info("[Patch] Opened web login page in browser");
			UpdateStatusText("waiting_browser_login", LocalizationStrings.GetWaitingBrowserLoginText(), new Color(1f, 1f, 0.3f));
			Logger.Info("[Patch] Starting login session polling...");
			if (await PollLoginSessionStatus(currentSessionId))
			{
				Logger.Info("[Patch] ✅ Web login successful!");
				UpdateStatusText("server_online", LocalizationStrings.GetServerOnlineText(), new Color(0.3f, 1f, 0.3f));
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Warning("[Patch] ⚠️ Web login failed or timed out");
				UpdateStatusText("click_to_login", LocalizationStrings.GetClickToLoginText(), new Color(1f, 0.8f, 0.3f));
			}
			isPollingLoginSession = false;
			currentSessionId = null;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[Patch] Exception in StartWebLoginFlow: " + ex.Message);
			UpdateStatusText("click_to_login", LocalizationStrings.GetClickToLoginText(), new Color(1f, 0.8f, 0.3f));
			isPollingLoginSession = false;
			currentSessionId = null;
		}
	}

	private static async UniTask<bool> PollLoginSessionStatus(string sessionId)
	{
		for (int i = 0; i < 75; i++)
		{
			try
			{
				await UniTask.Delay(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(2.0));
				LoginSessionStatusResponse loginSessionStatusResponse = await ApiClient.GetLoginSessionStatusAsync(sessionId);
				if (loginSessionStatusResponse == null)
				{
					Logger.Warning(string.Format("[Patch] Failed to get session status (attempt {0}/{1})", i + 1, 75));
					continue;
				}
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[Patch] Session status: {0} (attempt {1}/{2})", loginSessionStatusResponse.status, i + 1, 75));
				if (loginSessionStatusResponse.status == "success")
				{
					Logger.Info("[Patch] Login session successful, saving tokens...");
					if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(loginSessionStatusResponse.access_token) && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(loginSessionStatusResponse.refresh_token))
					{
						DateTime expiresAt = DateTime.UtcNow.AddDays(7.0);
						DuckMarketSettings.SaveAuthToken(loginSessionStatusResponse.refresh_token, expiresAt, loginSessionStatusResponse.user.steam_id, loginSessionStatusResponse.user.user_id);
						ApiClient.AuthToken = loginSessionStatusResponse.access_token;
						ApiClient.CurrentUserId = loginSessionStatusResponse.user.user_id;
						Logger.Info(string.Format("[Patch] Tokens saved for user: {0} (Steam ID: {1}, User ID: {2})", loginSessionStatusResponse.user.username, loginSessionStatusResponse.user.steam_id, loginSessionStatusResponse.user.user_id));
						Logger.Info("[Patch] ✅ AuthToken and CurrentUserId set in ApiClient");
						return true;
					}
					Logger.Error("[Patch] Session success but tokens are missing");
					return false;
				}
				if (loginSessionStatusResponse.status == "failed")
				{
					Logger.Error("[Patch] Login session failed: " + loginSessionStatusResponse.error);
					return false;
				}
				if (loginSessionStatusResponse.status == "expired")
				{
					Logger.Warning("[Patch] Login session expired");
					return false;
				}
			}
			catch (Exception ex)
			{
				Logger.Error("[Patch] Exception in PollLoginSessionStatus: " + ex.Message);
			}
		}
		Logger.Warning(string.Format("[Patch] Login session polling timed out after {0} seconds", 150));
		return false;
	}

	private static void UpdateStatusText(string statusKey, string status, Color color)
	{
		if (statusText != null)
		{
			currentStatusKey = statusKey;
			currentStatusColor = color;
			statusText.text = status + " MOD v" + MOD_VERSION;
			statusText.color = color;
		}
	}

	private static string GetSteamId()
	{
		try
		{
			return SteamUser.GetSteamID().ToString();
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[Patch] Error getting Steam ID: " + ex.Message);
			return null;
		}
	}

	private static void SyncGameLanguage()
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Info("[Patch] 尝试同步游戏语言...");
			Type type = Type.GetType("SodaCraft.Localizations.LocalizationManager, SodaLocalization");
			if (type == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[Patch] ❌ 无法找到游戏的 LocalizationManager 类型");
				return;
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[Patch] ✅ 找到游戏的 LocalizationManager 类型");
			PropertyInfo property = type.GetProperty("CurrentLanguage", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
			if (property == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[Patch] ❌ 无法找到 CurrentLanguage 属性");
				return;
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[Patch] ✅ 找到 CurrentLanguage 属性");
			object value = property.GetValue(null);
			if (value == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[Patch] ❌ CurrentLanguage 值为 null");
				return;
			}
			string currentLanguageName = value.ToString();
			Logger.Verbose("[Patch] 🌐 检测到游戏语言: " + currentLanguageName);
			LocalizationManager.Language language = currentLanguageName switch
			{
				"ChineseSimplified" => LocalizationManager.Language.ChineseSimplified,
				"ChineseTraditional" => LocalizationManager.Language.ChineseTraditional,
				"English" => LocalizationManager.Language.English,
				"Japanese" => LocalizationManager.Language.Japanese,
				"Korean" => LocalizationManager.Language.Korean,
				_ => LocalizationManager.Language.English,
			};
			LocalizationManager.Language language2 = language;
			Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[Patch] 🔄 设置 MOD LocalizationManager 语言为: {0}", language2));
			LocalizationManager.SetLanguage(language2);
			Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[Patch] ✅ LocalizationManager语言已同步: {0}", language2));
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[Patch] ❌ 同步游戏语言失败: " + ex.Message);
			Logger.Error("[Patch] ❌ 堆栈跟踪: " + ex.StackTrace);
		}
	}

	private static void OnLanguageChanged(LocalizationManager.Language newLanguage)
	{
		try
		{
			if (statusText != null && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(currentStatusKey))
			{
				string statusKey = currentStatusKey;
				string localizedStatusText = statusKey switch
				{
					"server_online" => LocalizationStrings.GetServerOnlineText(),
					"server_offline" => LocalizationStrings.GetServerOfflineText(),
					"click_to_login" => LocalizationStrings.GetClickToLoginText(),
					"steam_id_not_found" => LocalizationStrings.GetSteamIdNotFoundText(),
					"checking_server" => LocalizationStrings.GetServerStatusCheckText(),
					"logging_in" => LocalizationStrings.GetLoggingInText(),
					_ => statusText.text,
				};
				statusText.text = localizedStatusText + " MOD v" + MOD_VERSION;
				Logger.Verbose("[Patch] ✅ Status text updated to: " + localizedStatusText);
			}
			if (qqGroupText != null)
			{
				qqGroupText.text = LocalizationStrings.GetQQGroupText();
				Logger.Verbose("[Patch] ✅ QQ group text updated to: " + qqGroupText.text);
			}
			if (discordText != null)
			{
				discordText.text = LocalizationStrings.GetDiscordText();
				Logger.Verbose("[Patch] ✅ Discord text updated to: " + discordText.text);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[Patch] ❌ Error updating status text on language change: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	private static void CreateCommunityLinkText(TextMeshProUGUI originalText, RectTransform originalRect)
	{
		try
		{
			CreateSingleCommunityLink(originalText, originalRect, "DuckMarketQQGroupText", LocalizationStrings.GetQQGroupText(), new Color(0.7f, 0.9f, 1f, 0.9f), 40, delegate
			{
				OnQQGroupClicked();
			}, ref qqGroupTextObject, ref qqGroupText);
			CreateSingleCommunityLink(originalText, originalRect, "DuckMarketDiscordText", LocalizationStrings.GetDiscordText(), new Color(0.7f, 0.9f, 1f, 0.9f), 70, delegate
			{
				OnDiscordClicked();
			}, ref discordTextObject, ref discordText);
			Logger.Info("[Patch] ✅ Both community links created successfully");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[Patch] ❌ Error creating community links: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static void CreateSingleCommunityLink(TextMeshProUGUI originalText, RectTransform originalRect, string objectName, string linkText, Color color, int yOffset, Action clickAction, ref GameObject textObject, ref TextMeshProUGUI textComponent)
	{
		textObject = new GameObject(objectName);
		textObject.transform.SetParent(originalText.transform.parent, worldPositionStays: false);
		textComponent = textObject.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
		textComponent.font = originalText.font;
		textComponent.fontSize = originalText.fontSize * 0.8f;
		textComponent.fontStyle = originalText.fontStyle;
		textComponent.alignment = originalText.alignment;
		textComponent.color = color;
		textComponent.enableAutoSizing = originalText.enableAutoSizing;
		textComponent.fontSizeMin = originalText.fontSizeMin;
		textComponent.fontSizeMax = originalText.fontSizeMax;
		textComponent.fontMaterial = originalText.fontMaterial;
		textComponent.raycastTarget = true;
		textComponent.text = linkText;
		RectTransform component = textObject.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
		component.anchorMin = originalRect.anchorMin;
		component.anchorMax = originalRect.anchorMax;
		component.pivot = originalRect.pivot;
		component.sizeDelta = new Vector2(originalRect.sizeDelta.x, 25f);
		component.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(originalRect.anchoredPosition.x, originalRect.anchoredPosition.y + (float)yOffset);
		Button button = textObject.AddComponent<Button>();
		button.transition = Selectable.Transition.ColorTint;
		ColorBlock colors = button.colors;
		colors.normalColor = color;
		colors.highlightedColor = new Color(1f, 1f, 0.8f, 1f);
		colors.pressedColor = new Color(1f, 0.8f, 0.6f, 1f);
		button.colors = colors;
		button.onClick.AddListener(delegate
		{
			clickAction();
		});
		Logger.Info(string.Format("[Patch] ✅ {0} created at position {1}", objectName, component.anchoredPosition));
	}

	private static void OnQQGroupClicked()
	{
		try
		{
			string qQGroupUrl = LocalizationStrings.GetQQGroupUrl();
			Application.OpenURL(qQGroupUrl);
			Logger.Info("[Patch] 🐧 QQ Group link clicked, opening: " + qQGroupUrl);
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[Patch] ❌ Error opening QQ group link: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	private static void OnDiscordClicked()
	{
		try
		{
			string discordUrl = LocalizationStrings.GetDiscordUrl();
			Application.OpenURL(discordUrl);
			Logger.Info("[Patch] 🎮 Discord link clicked, opening: " + discordUrl);
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[Patch] ❌ Error opening Discord link: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	public static void EnsureUIComponentsCreated()
	{
		try
		{
			if (statusText != null && (bool)statusText && qqGroupText != null && (bool)qqGroupText && discordText != null && (bool)discordText)
			{
				Logger.Verbose("[Fallback] UI components already exist, no compensation needed");
				return;
			}
			GameVersionDisplay gameVersionDisplay = UnityEngine.Object.FindObjectOfType<GameVersionDisplay>();
			if (gameVersionDisplay == null)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[Fallback] GameVersionDisplay not found in scene");
				return;
			}
			Logger.Info("[Fallback] 🔧 Found GameVersionDisplay, attempting UI compensation...");
			TextMeshProUGUI value = Traverse.Create(gameVersionDisplay).Field("text").GetValue<TextMeshProUGUI>();
			if (value == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[Fallback] Failed to get original text component from GameVersionDisplay");
				return;
			}
			RectTransform component = value.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			SyncGameLanguage();
			if (!languageEventSubscribed)
			{
				LocalizationManager.OnLanguageChanged += OnLanguageChanged;
				languageEventSubscribed = true;
				Logger.Info("[Fallback] Subscribed to language change event");
			}
			if (statusText == null || !statusText)
			{
				CreateStatusText(value, component);
				CheckServerStatusAsync().Forget();
			}
			if (qqGroupText == null || !qqGroupText || discordText == null || !discordText)
			{
				CreateCommunityLinkText(value, component);
			}
			Logger.Info("[Fallback] ✅ UI compensation completed successfully");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[Fallback] ❌ Error during UI compensation: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static void CreateStatusText(TextMeshProUGUI originalText, RectTransform originalRect)
	{
		statusTextObject = new GameObject("DuckMarketStatusText");
		statusTextObject.transform.SetParent(originalText.transform.parent, worldPositionStays: false);
		statusText = statusTextObject.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
		statusText.font = originalText.font;
		statusText.fontSize = originalText.fontSize;
		statusText.fontStyle = originalText.fontStyle;
		statusText.alignment = originalText.alignment;
		statusText.color = originalText.color;
		statusText.enableAutoSizing = originalText.enableAutoSizing;
		statusText.fontSizeMin = originalText.fontSizeMin;
		statusText.fontSizeMax = originalText.fontSizeMax;
		statusText.fontMaterial = originalText.fontMaterial;
		statusText.raycastTarget = true;
		currentStatusKey = "checking_server";
		currentStatusColor = originalText.color;
		statusText.text = LocalizationStrings.GetServerStatusCheckText() + " MOD v" + MOD_VERSION;
		RectTransform component = statusTextObject.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
		component.anchorMin = originalRect.anchorMin;
		component.anchorMax = originalRect.anchorMax;
		component.pivot = originalRect.pivot;
		component.sizeDelta = new Vector2(originalRect.sizeDelta.x, originalRect.sizeDelta.y * 3f);
		component.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(originalRect.anchoredPosition.x, originalRect.anchoredPosition.y + 75f);
		Button button = statusTextObject.AddComponent<Button>();
		button.transition = Selectable.Transition.ColorTint;
		ColorBlock colors = button.colors;
		colors.normalColor = Color.white;
		colors.highlightedColor = new Color(0.8f, 0.8f, 1f);
		colors.pressedColor = new Color(0.6f, 0.6f, 1f);
		button.colors = colors;
		button.onClick.AddListener(delegate
		{
			OnStatusTextClicked();
		});
		Logger.Info(string.Format("[Fallback] Status text created at position {0}", component.anchoredPosition));
	}
}
```
