`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Patches/GameplayUIManagerPatch.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Reflection;
using DuckMarket.UI;
using Duckov.UI;
using FleaMarket.UI;
using HarmonyLib;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;

namespace DuckMarket.Patches;

[HarmonyPatch(typeof(GameplayUIManager))]
public static class GameplayUIManagerPatch
{
	private static readonly HashSet<int> _patchedInstances = new HashSet<int>();

	[HarmonyPostfix]
	[HarmonyPatch("Awake")]
	public static void Awake_Postfix(GameplayUIManager __instance)
	{
		int instanceID = ((Object)__instance).GetInstanceID();
		if (_patchedInstances.Contains(instanceID))
		{
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			Logger.Info("Patching GameplayUIManager to add DuckMarketView_NoteClone...");
			FieldInfo field = typeof(GameplayUIManager).GetField("views", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("Failed to find 'views' field in GameplayUIManager");
				return;
			}
			if (!(field.GetValue(__instance) is List<View> list))
			{
				Logger.Error("Failed to get views list from GameplayUIManager");
				return;
			}
			GameObject val = new GameObject("ListingCreationView");
			val.transform.SetParent(__instance.transform, false);
			RectTransform obj = val.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
			obj.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
			obj.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
			obj.sizeDelta = Vector2.zero;
			obj.anchoredPosition = Vector2.zero;
			ListingCreationView item = val.AddComponent<ListingCreationView>();
			list.Add((View)(object)item);
			GameObject val2 = new GameObject("DuckMarketView_NoteClone");
			val2.transform.SetParent(__instance.transform, false);
			RectTransform obj2 = val2.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
			obj2.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
			obj2.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
			obj2.sizeDelta = Vector2.zero;
			obj2.anchoredPosition = Vector2.zero;
			DuckMarketView_NoteClone item2 = val2.AddComponent<DuckMarketView_NoteClone>();
			list.Add((View)(object)item2);
			Logger.Info("ListingCreationView and DuckMarketView_NoteClone successfully added to GameplayUIManager");
			GameObject val3 = new GameObject("HoverAveragePriceDisplay");
			val3.transform.SetParent(__instance.transform, false);
			val3.AddComponent<HoverAveragePriceDisplay>();
			_patchedInstances.Add(instanceID);
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("Error patching GameplayUIManager: {0}", arg));
		}
	}
}



```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Patches/InteractableBaseAwakePatch.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Reflection;
using DuckMarket.Interactables;
using Duckov.BlackMarkets;
using Duckov.Buildings;
using HarmonyLib;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;

namespace DuckMarket.Patches;

[HarmonyPatch(typeof(InteractableBase), "Awake")]
public class InteractableBaseAwakePatch
{
	private const string CoexistInteractableObjectName = "FleaMarketInteractable.DuckNewMarket";

	private static readonly HashSet<int> _processedBlackMarketFacilities = new HashSet<int>();

	[HarmonyPostfix]
	public static void Awake_Postfix(InteractableBase __instance)
	{
		try
		{
			if (__instance != null && IsBlackMarketInteraction(__instance))
			{
				Transform parentTransform = __instance.transform.parent;
				int parentInstanceId = 0;
				if (parentTransform != null)
				{
					parentInstanceId = parentTransform.GetInstanceID();
				}
				if (parentInstanceId != 0 && !_processedBlackMarketFacilities.Contains(parentInstanceId))
				{
					Logger.Info("[InteractableBaseAwakePatch] Black Market Facility detected (Interaction: " + __instance.InteractName + "), adding Flea Market option...");
					_processedBlackMarketFacilities.Add(parentInstanceId);
					AddFleaMarketToBlackMarket(__instance);
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[InteractableBaseAwakePatch] Error in Awake_Postfix: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static bool IsBlackMarketInteraction(InteractableBase interactable)
	{
		try
		{
			Transform currentTransform = interactable.transform;
			int maxDepth = 10;
			int depth = 0;
			while (currentTransform != null && depth < maxDepth)
			{
				if (currentTransform.GetComponent<BlackMarket>() != null)
				{
					Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[InteractableBaseAwakePatch] ✅ Found BlackMarket component at depth {0}: {1}", depth, currentTransform.name));
					return true;
				}
				Building component = currentTransform.GetComponent<Building>();
				if (component != null && component.ID == "BlackMarket")
				{
					Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[InteractableBaseAwakePatch] ✅ Found Building component with ID=BlackMarket at depth {0}: {1}", depth, currentTransform.name));
					return true;
				}
				currentTransform = currentTransform.parent;
				depth++;
			}
			return false;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[InteractableBaseAwakePatch] Error in IsBlackMarketInteraction: {0}", arg));
			return false;
		}
	}

	private static void AddFleaMarketToBlackMarket(InteractableBase browseOrdersOption)
	{
		try
		{
			Transform parentTransform = browseOrdersOption.transform.parent;
			if (parentTransform == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			List<Transform> list = new List<Transform>();
			foreach (Transform item2 in parentTransform)
			{
				if (item2.name == CoexistInteractableObjectName)
				{
					list.Add(item2);
				}
			}
			foreach (Transform item3 in list)
			{
				Logger.Info("[InteractableBaseAwakePatch] Removing old FleaMarketInteractable instance");
				Object.Destroy(item3.gameObject);
			}
			GameObject val2 = new GameObject(CoexistInteractableObjectName);
			val2.transform.SetParent(parentTransform);
			val2.transform.localPosition = Vector3.zero;
			FleaMarketInteractable item = val2.AddComponent<FleaMarketInteractable>();
			Logger.Info("[InteractableBaseAwakePatch] Flea Market interactable created");
			FieldInfo field = typeof(InteractableBase).GetField("otherInterablesInGroup", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field == null || !(field.GetValue(browseOrdersOption) is List<InteractableBase> list2))
			{
				return;
			}
			List<InteractableBase> list3 = new List<InteractableBase>();
			foreach (InteractableBase item4 in list2)
			{
				if (item4 is FleaMarketInteractable && item4 != null && item4.gameObject != null && item4.gameObject.name == CoexistInteractableObjectName)
				{
					list3.Add(item4);
				}
			}
			foreach (InteractableBase item5 in list3)
			{
				list2.Remove(item5);
				Logger.Info("[InteractableBaseAwakePatch] Removed old FleaMarketInteractable from group");
			}
			list2.Add(item);
			Logger.Info("[InteractableBaseAwakePatch] Flea Market added to interactable group successfully");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[InteractableBaseAwakePatch] Error adding Flea Market: {0}", arg));
		}
	}
}



```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Patches/InteractableBasePatch.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using DuckMarket.Interactables;
using Duckov.BlackMarkets;
using Duckov.Buildings;
using HarmonyLib;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;

namespace DuckMarket.Patches;

[HarmonyPatch(typeof(InteractableBase), "OnInteractStart")]
public class InteractableBasePatch
{
	private static readonly HashSet<string> _processedBlackMarketContainers = new HashSet<string>();

	[HarmonyPostfix]
	public static void OnInteractStart_Postfix(InteractableBase __instance)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!IsBlackMarketInteraction(__instance))
			{
				return;
			}
			Logger.Info("[InteractableBasePatch] Black Market interaction detected: " + __instance.InteractName);
			Transform parentTransform = __instance.transform.parent;
			if (parentTransform != null)
			{
				string containerId = parentTransform.GetInstanceID().ToString();
				if (!_processedBlackMarketContainers.Contains(containerId))
				{
					Logger.Info("[InteractableBasePatch] Adding Flea Market option to Black Market container");
					AddFleaMarketOption(parentTransform);
					_processedBlackMarketContainers.Add(containerId);
				}
				else
				{
					Logger.Info("[InteractableBasePatch] Flea Market option already added to this container");
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[InteractableBasePatch] Error in OnInteractStart_Postfix: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static bool IsBlackMarketInteraction(InteractableBase interactable)
	{
		try
		{
			Transform currentTransform = interactable.transform;
			int maxDepth = 10;
			int depth = 0;
			while (currentTransform != null && depth < maxDepth)
			{
				if (currentTransform.GetComponent<BlackMarket>() != null)
				{
					Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[InteractableBasePatch] ✅ Found BlackMarket component at depth {0}: {1}", depth, currentTransform.name));
					return true;
				}
				Building component = currentTransform.GetComponent<Building>();
				if (component != null && component.ID == "BlackMarket")
				{
					Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[InteractableBasePatch] ✅ Found Building component with ID=BlackMarket at depth {0}: {1}", depth, currentTransform.name));
					return true;
				}
				currentTransform = currentTransform.parent;
				depth++;
			}
			return false;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[InteractableBasePatch] Error in IsBlackMarketInteraction: {0}", arg));
			return false;
		}
	}

	private static void AddFleaMarketOption(Transform parentTransform)
	{
		try
		{
			foreach (Transform item in parentTransform)
			{
				if (item.name == "FleaMarketInteractable")
				{
					Logger.Info("[InteractableBasePatch] Flea Market option already exists");
					return;
				}
			}
			GameObject val = new GameObject("FleaMarketInteractable");
			val.transform.SetParent(parentTransform);
			val.transform.localPosition = Vector3.zero;
			val.AddComponent<FleaMarketInteractable>();
			Logger.Info("[InteractableBasePatch] Flea Market interactable added successfully");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[InteractableBasePatch] Error adding Flea Market interactable: {0}", arg));
		}
	}
}



```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Patches/InteractionMenuPatch.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Reflection;
using HarmonyLib;

namespace DuckMarket.Patches;

public class InteractionMenuPatch
{
	private static readonly HashSet<int> _processedMenus = new HashSet<int>();

	public static MethodBase TargetMethod()
	{
		try
		{
			Type type = Type.GetType("InteractionMenu, Assembly-CSharp");
			if (type == null)
			{
				Logger.Info("[InteractionMenuPatch] InteractionMenu type not found, trying alternative names...");
				string[] array = new string[3]
				{
					"InteractMenu",
					"InteractionUIMenu",
					"InteractableMenu"
				};
				foreach (string candidateTypeName in array)
				{
					type = Type.GetType(candidateTypeName + ", Assembly-CSharp");
					if (type != null)
					{
						Logger.Info("[InteractionMenuPatch] Found type: " + candidateTypeName);
						break;
					}
				}
			}
			if (type == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[InteractionMenuPatch] Could not find any interaction menu type");
				return null;
			}
			MethodInfo method = type.GetMethod("Show", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (method == null)
			{
				method = type.GetMethod("Display", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			}
			if (method == null)
			{
				Logger.Info("[InteractionMenuPatch] Available methods in " + type.Name + ":");
				MethodInfo[] methods = type.GetMethods(BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				foreach (MethodInfo methodInfo in methods)
				{
					if (!methodInfo.Name.StartsWith("get_") && !methodInfo.Name.StartsWith("set_"))
					{
						Logger.Info("[InteractionMenuPatch]   - " + methodInfo.Name);
					}
				}
				return null;
			}
			Logger.Info("[InteractionMenuPatch] Found " + type.Name + "." + method.Name + " method");
			return method;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[InteractionMenuPatch] Error in TargetMethod: {0}", arg));
			return null;
		}
	}

	[HarmonyPostfix]
	public static void Menu_Display_Postfix(object __instance)
	{
		try
		{
			if (__instance == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			int hashCode = __instance.GetHashCode();
			if (!_processedMenus.Contains(hashCode))
			{
				Logger.Info("[InteractionMenuPatch] Menu displayed: " + __instance.GetType().Name);
				_processedMenus.Add(hashCode);
				FieldInfo field = __instance.GetType().GetField("items", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				if (field != null)
				{
					object value = field.GetValue(__instance);
					Logger.Info("[InteractionMenuPatch] Found items field: " + value?.GetType().Name);
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[InteractionMenuPatch] Error in Menu_Display_Postfix: {0}", arg));
		}
	}
}

```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Patches/InventoryEntryIsEditablePatch.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Reflection;
using Duckov.UI;
using FleaMarket.UI;
using HarmonyLib;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;

namespace DuckMarket.Patches;

[HarmonyPatch]
public class InventoryEntryIsEditablePatch
{
	[HarmonyTargetMethod]
	private static MethodBase TargetMethod()
	{
		Type type = Type.GetType("Duckov.UI.InventoryEntry, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
		if (type == null)
		{
			Logger.Error("[InventoryEntryIsEditablePatch] ❌ 未找到 Duckov.UI.InventoryEntry");
			return null;
		}
		MethodInfo method = type.GetMethod("IsEditable", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
		if (method == null)
		{
			Logger.Error("[InventoryEntryIsEditablePatch] ❌ 未找到 IsEditable 方法");
			return null;
		}
		Logger.Verbose("[InventoryEntryIsEditablePatch] ✅ 找到目标方法: InventoryEntry.IsEditable");
		return method;
	}

	[HarmonyPostfix]
	private static void IsEditablePostfix(object __instance, ref bool __result)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!__result)
			{
				return;
			}
			PropertyInfo property = __instance.GetType().GetProperty("Master", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
			if (property == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			object value = property.GetValue(__instance);
			if (value != null)
			{
				InventoryDisplay marketInventoryDisplay = DuckMarketView_NoteClone.MarketInventoryDisplay;
				if (marketInventoryDisplay != null && ReferenceEquals(value, marketInventoryDisplay))
				{
					__result = false;
					Logger.Verbose("[InventoryEntryIsEditablePatch] ✅ 市场物品IsEditable()返回false，阻止拖动");
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[InventoryEntryIsEditablePatch] ❌ IsEditablePostfix失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}
}



```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Patches/ItemDetailsPanelPatch.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Reflection;
using DuckMarket.UI;
using Duckov.UI;
using HarmonyLib;
using ItemStatsSystem;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;

namespace DuckMarket.Patches;

[HarmonyPatch]
public class ItemDetailsPanelPatch
{
	[HarmonyTargetMethod]
	private static MethodBase TargetMethod()
	{
		Type type = typeof(ItemDetailsDisplay).Assembly.GetType("Duckov.UI.ItemDetailsPanel");
		if (type == null)
		{
			Logger.Error("[ItemDetailsPanelPatch] Cannot find ItemDetailsPanel type");
			return null;
		}
		MethodInfo method = type.GetMethod("Show", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public, null, new Type[2]
		{
			typeof(Item),
			typeof(ManagedUIElement)
		}, null);
		if (method == null)
		{
			Logger.Error("[ItemDetailsPanelPatch] Cannot find ItemDetailsPanel.Show method");
			return null;
		}
		Logger.Info("[ItemDetailsPanelPatch] ✅ Target method found: ItemDetailsPanel.Show");
		return method;
	}

	[HarmonyPrefix]
	private static void Prefix()
	{
		try
		{
			if (ListingCreationPanel.Instance != null && ListingCreationPanel.Instance.open)
			{
				Logger.Info("[ItemDetailsPanelPatch] ItemDetailsPanel.Show called, closing ListingCreationPanel");
				ListingCreationPanel.Instance.Close();
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemDetailsPanelPatch] Prefix failed: {0}", arg));
		}
	}
}
```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Patches/ItemDisplayClickPatch.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using Cysharp.Threading.Tasks;
using DuckMarket.Core;
using Duckov.UI;
using FleaMarket.UI;
using HarmonyLib;
using ItemStatsSystem;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.EventSystems;

namespace DuckMarket.Patches;

[HarmonyPatch(typeof(ItemDisplay))]
public class ItemDisplayClickPatch
{
	[HarmonyPatch("OnPointerClick")]
	[HarmonyPrefix]
	private static bool OnPointerClickPrefix(ItemDisplay __instance, PointerEventData eventData)
	{
		try
		{
			if (eventData.button != PointerEventData.InputButton.Right)
			{
				return true;
			}
			InventoryDisplay marketInventoryDisplay = DuckMarketView_NoteClone.MarketInventoryDisplay;
			if (marketInventoryDisplay == null)
			{
				return true;
			}
			if (!IsItemDisplayInInventory(__instance, marketInventoryDisplay))
			{
				return true;
			}
			Item target = __instance.Target;
			if (target == null)
			{
				return true;
			}
			Logger.Info("[ItemDisplayClickPatch] 🎯 市场物品右键点击: " + target.DisplayName);
			if (FleaMarketState.CurrentState != GameState.InBase)
			{
				Logger.Info("[ItemDisplayClickPatch] ⚠️ 不在基地，无法进行操作");
				return false;
			}
			DuckMarketView_NoteClone instance = DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Instance;
			bool isPurchaseOrderMode = instance != null && instance.IsPurchaseOrderMode;
			UniTask.Void(async delegate
			{
				await UniTask.DelayFrame(1);
				if (isPurchaseOrderMode)
				{
					Logger.Info("[ItemDisplayClickPatch] 🔍 执行发布求购逻辑");
					ItemOperationMenuPatch.ExecutePurchaseOrderLogic(__instance);
				}
				else
				{
					Logger.Info("[ItemDisplayClickPatch] 📦 执行商品上架逻辑");
					ItemOperationMenuPatch.ExecuteListingLogic(__instance);
				}
			});
			return false;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemDisplayClickPatch] ❌ OnPointerClickPrefix失败: {0}", arg));
			return true;
		}
	}

	private static bool IsItemDisplayInInventory(ItemDisplay itemDisplay, InventoryDisplay inventory)
	{
		try
		{
			Transform transform = itemDisplay.transform;
			while (transform != null)
			{
				if (transform.gameObject == inventory.gameObject)
				{
					return true;
				}
				transform = transform.parent;
			}
			return false;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemDisplayClickPatch] ❌ IsItemDisplayInInventory检查失败: {0}", arg));
			return false;
		}
	}
}



```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Patches/ItemDisplayDropPatch.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using Duckov.UI;
using FleaMarket.UI;
using HarmonyLib;
using ItemStatsSystem;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;
using UnityEngine.EventSystems;

namespace DuckMarket.Patches;

[HarmonyPatch(typeof(ItemDisplay))]
public class ItemDisplayDropPatch
{
	[HarmonyPatch("OnDrop")]
	[HarmonyPrefix]
	private static bool OnDropPrefix(ItemDisplay __instance, PointerEventData eventData)
	{
		try
		{
			InventoryDisplay marketInventoryDisplay = DuckMarketView_NoteClone.MarketInventoryDisplay;
			if (marketInventoryDisplay == null)
			{
				return true;
			}
			if (!IsItemDisplayInMarketInventory(__instance, marketInventoryDisplay))
			{
				return true;
			}
			string blockedDropLogPrefix = "[ItemDisplayDropPatch] 🚫 阻止拖放到市场展示物品栏: ";
			Item target = __instance.Target;
			Logger.Verbose(blockedDropLogPrefix + (((target != null) ? target.DisplayName : null) ?? "空格子"));
			eventData.Use();
			return false;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemDisplayDropPatch] ❌ OnDropPrefix失败: {0}", arg));
			return true;
		}
	}

	private static bool IsItemDisplayInMarketInventory(ItemDisplay itemDisplay, InventoryDisplay marketInventoryDisplay)
	{
		try
		{
			Transform currentTransform = itemDisplay.transform;
			while (currentTransform != null)
			{
				if (currentTransform.gameObject == marketInventoryDisplay.gameObject)
				{
					return true;
				}
				currentTransform = currentTransform.parent;
			}
			return false;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemDisplayDropPatch] ❌ IsItemDisplayInMarketInventory检查失败: {0}", arg));
			return false;
		}
	}
}



```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Patches/ItemDisplayPatch.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Reflection;
using Cysharp.Threading.Tasks;
using DuckMarket.Models;
using DuckMarket.Network;
using Duckov.UI;
using FleaMarket.UI;
using HarmonyLib;
using ItemStatsSystem;
using TMPro;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.EventSystems;

namespace DuckMarket.Patches;

[HarmonyPatch(typeof(ItemDisplay))]
public class ItemDisplayPatch
{
	private static readonly BindingFlags PrivateInstance = BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic;

	private static readonly Color GrayColor = new Color(0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f, 1f);

	private static readonly Color GoldColor = new Color(1f, 0.84f, 0f, 1f);

	private static readonly Dictionary<int, int> _storageItemCountCache = new Dictionary<int, int>();

	private static DateTime _lastFilterTime = DateTime.MinValue;

	private static readonly TimeSpan FilterCooldown = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(1.0);

	[HarmonyPatch("Refresh")]
	[HarmonyPostfix]
	private static void RefreshPostfix(ItemDisplay __instance)
	{
		try
		{
			InventoryDisplay marketInventoryDisplay = DuckMarketView_NoteClone.MarketInventoryDisplay;
			if (marketInventoryDisplay == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			if (IsItemDisplayInMarketEntry(__instance))
			{
				ForceKeepEntryItemDisplayQuantity(__instance);
			}
			else if (IsItemDisplayInInventory(__instance, marketInventoryDisplay))
			{
				Item target = __instance.Target;
				if (!(target == null))
				{
					int value;
					int count = (_storageItemCountCache.TryGetValue(target.TypeID, out value) ? value : 0);
					UpdateItemCountDisplay(__instance, count);
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemDisplayPatch] ❌ RefreshPostfix失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static void DisableItemInteraction(ItemDisplay itemDisplay)
	{
		try
		{
			itemDisplay.Movable = false;
			itemDisplay.CanDrop = false;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemDisplayPatch] ❌ DisableItemInteraction失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	[HarmonyPatch("OnPointerDown")]
	[HarmonyPrefix]
	private static bool OnPointerDownPrefix(ItemDisplay __instance, PointerEventData eventData)
	{
		try
		{
			InventoryDisplay marketInventoryDisplay = DuckMarketView_NoteClone.MarketInventoryDisplay;
			if (marketInventoryDisplay == null)
			{
				return true;
			}
			if (!IsItemDisplayInInventory(__instance, marketInventoryDisplay))
			{
				return true;
			}
			Item target = __instance.Target;
			if (target == null)
			{
				return true;
			}
			if (eventData.button == PointerEventData.InputButton.Left)
			{
				DateTime now = DateTime.Now;
				TimeSpan timeSpan = now - _lastFilterTime;
				if (timeSpan < FilterCooldown)
				{
					double totalSeconds = (FilterCooldown - timeSpan).TotalSeconds;
					Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ItemDisplayPatch] ⏱️ 筛选冷却中，剩余 {0:F1} 秒", totalSeconds));
					eventData.Use();
					return false;
				}
				_lastFilterTime = now;
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[ItemDisplayPatch] 左键点击市场物品: {0} (TypeID={1})", target.DisplayName, target.TypeID));
				FilterMarketByItemType(target.TypeID, target.DisplayName).Forget();
				eventData.Use();
				return false;
			}
			return true;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemDisplayPatch] ❌ OnPointerDownPrefix失败: {0}", arg));
			return true;
		}
	}

	private static async UniTaskVoid FilterMarketByItemType(int itemTypeId, string itemName)
	{

		try
		{
			if (DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Instance == null)
			{
				FleaMarketUIManager.OpenFleaMarket();
				await UniTask.Delay(500);
			}
			if (DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Instance?.IsPurchaseOrderMode ?? false)
			{
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[ItemDisplayPatch] 正在筛选求购订单: {0} (TypeID={1})", itemName, itemTypeId));
				var (list, num) = await ApiClient.GetPurchaseOrdersAsync(null, itemTypeId);
				if (DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Instance != null)
				{
					DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Instance.UpdatePurchaseOrders(list, num, itemTypeId, itemName);
					Logger.Info(string.Format("[ItemDisplayPatch] ✅ 求购订单筛选成功，找到 {0} 个订单（显示第1页，共{1}个）", num, list?.Count ?? 0));
				}
				else
				{
					Logger.Warning("[ItemDisplayPatch] DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Instance is null");
				}
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[ItemDisplayPatch] 正在筛选市场: {0} (TypeID={1})", itemName, itemTypeId));
				var (list2, num2) = await ApiClient.GetListingsAsync(null, itemTypeId, "price_asc");
				if (DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Instance != null)
				{
					DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Instance.UpdateListings(list2, num2, itemTypeId, "price_asc", itemName);
					Logger.Info(string.Format("[ItemDisplayPatch] ✅ 筛选成功，找到 {0} 个商品（显示第1页，共{1}个）", num2, list2.Count));
				}
				else
				{
					Logger.Warning("[ItemDisplayPatch] DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Instance is null");
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemDisplayPatch] ❌ FilterMarketByItemType失败: {0}", arg));
			if (DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Instance?.IsPurchaseOrderMode ?? false)
			{
				DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Instance?.UpdatePurchaseOrders(new List<PurchaseOrder>(), 0, itemTypeId, itemName);
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Instance?.UpdateListings(new List<Listing>(), 0, itemTypeId, "price_asc", itemName);
			}
		}
	}

	public static void RefreshStorageCache()
	{
		_storageItemCountCache.Clear();
		try
		{
			Inventory inventory = PlayerStorage.Inventory;
			if (inventory == null || inventory.Content == null)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[ItemDisplayPatch] 玩家仓库未找到");
				return;
			}
			foreach (Item item in inventory.Content)
			{
				if (!(item == null))
				{
					int typeID = item.TypeID;
					int stackCount = item.StackCount;
					if (_storageItemCountCache.ContainsKey(typeID))
					{
						_storageItemCountCache[typeID] += stackCount;
					}
					else
					{
						_storageItemCountCache[typeID] = stackCount;
					}
				}
			}
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[ItemDisplayPatch] ✅ 仓库缓存已刷新，共 {0} 种物品", _storageItemCountCache.Count));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemDisplayPatch] ❌ 刷新仓库缓存失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	public static void ClearCache()
	{
		_storageItemCountCache.Clear();
	}

	private static bool IsItemDisplayInMarketEntry(ItemDisplay itemDisplay)
	{
		try
		{
			Transform transform = itemDisplay.transform;
			while (transform != null)
			{
				if (transform.GetComponent<NoteIndexView_Entry>() != null)
				{
					return true;
				}
				transform = transform.parent;
			}
			return false;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemDisplayPatch] ❌ IsItemDisplayInMarketEntry检查失败: {0}", arg));
			return false;
		}
	}

	private static void ForceKeepEntryItemDisplayQuantity(ItemDisplay itemDisplay)
	{
		try
		{
			if (itemDisplay.Target == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			FieldInfo field = typeof(ItemDisplay).GetField("countGameObject", PrivateInstance);
			FieldInfo field2 = typeof(ItemDisplay).GetField("countText", PrivateInstance);
			if (field == null || field2 == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			GameObject gameObject = field.GetValue(itemDisplay) as GameObject;
			TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = field2.GetValue(itemDisplay) as TextMeshProUGUI;
			if (gameObject == null || textMeshProUGUI == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			if (!gameObject.activeSelf)
			{
				gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
			}
			if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(textMeshProUGUI.text) && !(textMeshProUGUI.text == "1"))
			{
				return;
			}
			NoteIndexView_Entry componentInParent = itemDisplay.GetComponentInParent<NoteIndexView_Entry>();
			if (componentInParent != null)
			{
				Listing listing = DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Instance?.GetListingForEntry(componentInParent);
				if (listing != null)
				{
					textMeshProUGUI.text = listing.quantity.ToString();
					Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ItemDisplayPatch] ✅ 恢复Entry数量显示: {0} x{1}", listing.item_name, listing.quantity));
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemDisplayPatch] ❌ ForceKeepEntryItemDisplayQuantity失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static bool IsItemDisplayInInventory(ItemDisplay itemDisplay, InventoryDisplay targetInventory)
	{
		try
		{
			Transform transform = itemDisplay.transform;
			while (transform != null)
			{
				if (transform.gameObject == targetInventory.gameObject)
				{
					return true;
				}
				transform = transform.parent;
			}
			return false;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemDisplayPatch] ❌ IsItemDisplayInInventory检查失败: {0}", arg));
			return false;
		}
	}

	private static void UpdateItemCountDisplay(ItemDisplay itemDisplay, int count)
	{
		try
		{
			FieldInfo field = typeof(ItemDisplay).GetField("countGameObject", PrivateInstance);
			FieldInfo field2 = typeof(ItemDisplay).GetField("countText", PrivateInstance);
			FieldInfo field3 = typeof(ItemDisplay).GetField("durabilityGameObject", PrivateInstance);
			if (field == null || field2 == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			GameObject gameObject = field.GetValue(itemDisplay) as GameObject;
			TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = field2.GetValue(itemDisplay) as TextMeshProUGUI;
			if (gameObject == null || textMeshProUGUI == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
			RectTransform component = gameObject.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (component != null)
			{
				Vector2 sizeDelta = component.sizeDelta;
				component.sizeDelta = new Vector2(Mathf.Max(sizeDelta.x * 1.5f, 45f), Mathf.Max(sizeDelta.y * 1.5f, 30f));
			}
			if (count == 0)
			{
				textMeshProUGUI.text = "0";
				textMeshProUGUI.color = GrayColor;
			}
			else
			{
				textMeshProUGUI.text = count.ToString();
				textMeshProUGUI.color = GoldColor;
			}
			textMeshProUGUI.fontSize = 24f;
			textMeshProUGUI.fontStyle = FontStyles.Bold;
			textMeshProUGUI.enableAutoSizing = false;
			RectTransform component2 = textMeshProUGUI.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (component2 != null)
			{
				Vector2 sizeDelta2 = component2.sizeDelta;
				component2.sizeDelta = new Vector2(Mathf.Max(sizeDelta2.x * 1.5f, 45f), Mathf.Max(sizeDelta2.y * 1.5f, 30f));
			}
			textMeshProUGUI.ForceMeshUpdate(ignoreActiveState: true, forceTextReparsing: true);
			if (field3 != null)
			{
				GameObject gameObject2 = field3.GetValue(itemDisplay) as GameObject;
				if (gameObject2 != null)
				{
					gameObject2.SetActive(value: false);
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemDisplayPatch] ❌ UpdateItemCountDisplay失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}
}




```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Patches/ItemDropPatch.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using Duckov.UI;
using FleaMarket.UI;
using HarmonyLib;
using ItemStatsSystem;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;

namespace DuckMarket.Patches;

[HarmonyPatch(typeof(Item))]
public class ItemDropPatch
{
	[HarmonyPatch("get_CanDrop")]
	[HarmonyPostfix]
	private static void CanDropPostfix(Item __instance, ref bool __result)
	{
		try
		{
			InventoryDisplay marketInventoryDisplay = DuckMarketView_NoteClone.MarketInventoryDisplay;
			if (marketInventoryDisplay != null)
			{
				Inventory target = marketInventoryDisplay.Target;
				if (target != null && target.Content != null && target.Content.Contains(__instance))
				{
					__result = false;
					Logger.Info("[ItemDropPatch] 阻止丢弃市场物品");
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemDropPatch] ❌ CanDropPostfix失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}
}
```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Patches/ItemOperationMenuPatch.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Reflection;
using Cysharp.Threading.Tasks;
using DuckMarket.Core;
using DuckMarket.Network;
using DuckMarket.Services;
using DuckMarket.UI;
using Duckov.UI;
using FleaMarket.UI;
using HarmonyLib;
using ItemStatsSystem;
using ItemStatsSystem.Items;
using TMPro;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;
using UnityEngine.UI;

namespace DuckMarket.Patches;

[HarmonyPatch(typeof(ItemOperationMenu))]
public class ItemOperationMenuPatch
{
	private static Button _listForSaleButton;

	private static Button _purchaseOrderButton;

	private static Button _filterButton;

	private static ItemOperationMenu _currentMenuInstance;

	private static ItemDisplay _currentItemDisplay;

	[HarmonyPatch("Initialize")]
	[HarmonyPostfix]
	private static void InitializePostfix(ItemOperationMenu __instance, Button ___btn_Use)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!(_listForSaleButton != null) || !_listForSaleButton || !(_purchaseOrderButton != null) || !_purchaseOrderButton)
			{
				_listForSaleButton = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(___btn_Use, ___btn_Use.transform.parent);
				_listForSaleButton.name = "btn_ListForSale";
				SetButtonText(_listForSaleButton, LocalizationStrings.GetListButtonLabel());
				_listForSaleButton.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
				_listForSaleButton.onClick.AddListener(OnListForSaleClicked);
				_purchaseOrderButton = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(___btn_Use, ___btn_Use.transform.parent);
				_purchaseOrderButton.name = "btn_PurchaseOrder";
				SetButtonText(_purchaseOrderButton, LocalizationStrings.GetPurchaseOrderButtonLabel());
				_purchaseOrderButton.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
				_purchaseOrderButton.onClick.AddListener(OnPurchaseOrderClicked);
				_filterButton = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(___btn_Use, ___btn_Use.transform.parent);
				_filterButton.name = "btn_Filter";
				SetButtonText(_filterButton, LocalizationManager.GetText("menu.filter", "筛选"));
				_filterButton.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
				_filterButton.onClick.AddListener(OnFilterClicked);
				UniTask.Void(async delegate
				{
					await UniTask.DelayFrame(1);
					SetButtonText(_listForSaleButton, LocalizationStrings.GetListButtonLabel());
					SetButtonText(_purchaseOrderButton, LocalizationStrings.GetPurchaseOrderButtonLabel());
					SetButtonText(_filterButton, LocalizationManager.GetText("menu.filter", "筛选"));
				});
				Logger.Info("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] ✅ 上架、求购和筛选按钮已创建");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] ❌ InitializePostfix失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	[HarmonyPatch("Setup")]
	[HarmonyPrefix]
	private static void SetupPrefix(ItemOperationMenu __instance, ItemDisplay ___TargetDisplay, Button ___btn_Use, Button ___btn_Split, Button ___btn_Dump, Button ___btn_Equip, Button ___btn_Modify, Button ___btn_Unload, Button ___btn_Wishlist)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!(___TargetDisplay == null) && !IsMarketInventoryItem(___TargetDisplay))
			{
				if (___btn_Use != null)
				{
					___btn_Use.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
				}
				if (___btn_Split != null)
				{
					___btn_Split.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
				}
				if (___btn_Dump != null)
				{
					___btn_Dump.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
				}
				if (___btn_Equip != null)
				{
					___btn_Equip.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
				}
				if (___btn_Modify != null)
				{
					___btn_Modify.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
				}
				if (___btn_Unload != null)
				{
					___btn_Unload.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
				}
				if (___btn_Wishlist != null)
				{
					___btn_Wishlist.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
				}
				Logger.Verbose("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] ✅ Prefix: 已恢复原生按钮，让Setup重新控制");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] ❌ SetupPrefix失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	[HarmonyPatch("Setup")]
	[HarmonyPostfix]
	private static void SetupPostfix(ItemOperationMenu __instance, ItemDisplay ___TargetDisplay, Button ___btn_Use, Button ___btn_Split, Button ___btn_Dump, Button ___btn_Equip, Button ___btn_Modify, Button ___btn_Unload, Button ___btn_Wishlist)
	{
		try
		{
			_currentMenuInstance = __instance;
			_currentItemDisplay = ___TargetDisplay;
			if (!(_listForSaleButton == null) && (bool)_listForSaleButton && !(_purchaseOrderButton == null) && (bool)_purchaseOrderButton && !(___TargetDisplay == null))
			{
				bool isMarketItem = IsMarketInventoryItem(___TargetDisplay);
				bool isInBase = FleaMarketState.CurrentState == GameState.InBase;
				bool isFromAllowedInventory = IsFromAllowedInventory(___TargetDisplay);
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] SetupPostfix: isMarketItem={0}, isInBase={1}, isFromAllowedInventory={2}, CurrentState={3}", isMarketItem, isInBase, isFromAllowedInventory, FleaMarketState.CurrentState));
				if (isMarketItem)
				{
					Logger.Warning("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] ⚠️ 市场物品触发了 Setup（不应该发生）");
					__instance.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
					return;
				}
				bool canShowDuckMarketActions = isInBase && isFromAllowedInventory;
				_listForSaleButton.gameObject.SetActive(canShowDuckMarketActions);
				_purchaseOrderButton.gameObject.SetActive(canShowDuckMarketActions);
				_filterButton.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				Logger.Verbose("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] ✅ 玩家物品：" + (canShowDuckMarketActions ? "显示上架和求购按钮 + " : "") + "原生菜单");
				SetButtonText(_listForSaleButton, LocalizationStrings.GetListButtonLabel());
				SetButtonText(_purchaseOrderButton, LocalizationStrings.GetPurchaseOrderButtonLabel());
				SetButtonText(_filterButton, LocalizationManager.GetText("menu.filter", "筛选"));
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] ❌ SetupPostfix失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	[HarmonyPatch("OnOpen")]
	[HarmonyPostfix]
	private static void OnOpenPostfix(ItemOperationMenu __instance)
	{
		try
		{
			if (_listForSaleButton == null || !_listForSaleButton)
			{
				return;
			}
			if (_listForSaleButton.gameObject.activeSelf)
			{
				SetButtonText(_listForSaleButton, LocalizationStrings.GetListButtonLabel());
			}
			if (_purchaseOrderButton != null && _purchaseOrderButton.gameObject.activeSelf)
			{
				SetButtonText(_purchaseOrderButton, LocalizationStrings.GetPurchaseOrderButtonLabel());
			}
			if (_filterButton != null && _filterButton.gameObject.activeSelf)
			{
				SetButtonText(_filterButton, LocalizationManager.GetText("menu.filter", "筛选"));
			}
			UniTask.Void(async delegate
			{
				await UniTask.DelayFrame(1);
				if (_listForSaleButton != null && _listForSaleButton.gameObject.activeSelf)
				{
					SetButtonText(_listForSaleButton, LocalizationStrings.GetListButtonLabel());
				}
				if (_purchaseOrderButton != null && _purchaseOrderButton.gameObject.activeSelf)
				{
					SetButtonText(_purchaseOrderButton, LocalizationStrings.GetPurchaseOrderButtonLabel());
				}
				if (_filterButton != null && _filterButton.gameObject.activeSelf)
				{
					SetButtonText(_filterButton, LocalizationManager.GetText("menu.filter", "筛选"));
				}
			});
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] ❌ OnOpenPostfix失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	public static void ExecuteListingLogic(ItemDisplay itemDisplay)
	{
		try
		{
			if (itemDisplay == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] itemDisplay is null");
				return;
			}
			Item target = itemDisplay.Target;
			if (target == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] Target item is null");
			}
			else
			{
				ExecuteListingLogicInternal(target, itemDisplay);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] ❌ ExecuteListingLogic失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	public static void ExecutePurchaseOrderLogic(ItemDisplay itemDisplay)
	{
		try
		{
			if (itemDisplay == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] itemDisplay is null");
				return;
			}
			Item target = itemDisplay.Target;
			if (target == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] Target item is null");
			}
			else
			{
				ExecutePurchaseOrderLogicInternal(target, itemDisplay);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] ❌ ExecutePurchaseOrderLogic失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static void OnListForSaleClicked()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_currentMenuInstance == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] _currentMenuInstance is null");
				return;
			}
			PropertyInfo property = typeof(ItemOperationMenu).GetProperty("TargetItem", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (property == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] Cannot find TargetItem property");
				return;
			}
			Item item = property.GetValue(_currentMenuInstance) as Item;
			if (item == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] TargetItem is null");
			}
			else
			{
				ExecuteListingLogicInternal(item, _currentItemDisplay);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] ❌ OnListForSaleClicked失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static void ExecuteListingLogicInternal(Item targetItem, ItemDisplay itemDisplay)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!HasBlackMarketBuilding())
			{
				Logger.Info("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 玩家未建立黑市建筑，显示提示");
				NotificationService.ShowNotification(LocalizationManager.GetText("listing.need_black_market", "需要建立黑市建筑才能上架物品"), playSound: false, NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Warning);
				return;
			}
			bool isMarketInventoryItem = IsMarketInventoryItem(itemDisplay);
			Item item = targetItem;
			if (isMarketInventoryItem)
			{
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 从主仓库查找真实物品 (TypeID={0})", targetItem.TypeID));
				item = FindFirstItemInStorage(targetItem.TypeID);
				if (item == null)
				{
					Logger.Warning(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 主仓库中未找到物品 (TypeID={0})", targetItem.TypeID));
					NotificationService.ShowNotification(LocalizationManager.GetText("item.not_found_in_storage", "主仓库中未找到该物品"), playSound: false, NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Warning);
					return;
				}
				Logger.Verbose("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 找到真实物品: " + item.DisplayName);
			}
			if (!ValidateItemForListing(item))
			{
				return;
			}
			if (_currentMenuInstance != null)
			{
				_currentMenuInstance.Close();
			}
			DuckMarketView_NoteClone instance = DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Instance;
			bool wasOpenedFromMarket = instance != null && instance.open;
			if (wasOpenedFromMarket)
			{
				Logger.Info("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 从市场界面打开上架，先关闭市场");
				instance.Close();
			}
			if (PurchaseOrderCreationPanel.Instance != null && PurchaseOrderCreationPanel.Instance.open)
			{
				Logger.Info("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 打开上架前，先关闭求购界面");
				PurchaseOrderCreationPanel.Instance.Close();
			}
			ManagedUIElement source = null;
			try
			{
				LootView instance2 = LootView.Instance;
				if (instance2 != null)
				{
					source = instance2;
					Logger.Info("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 找到LootView作为sourceElement");
				}
			}
			catch (Exception ex)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 无法获取LootView: " + ex.Message);
			}
			Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 打开上架面板: {0} (从市场打开: {1})", item.DisplayName, wasOpenedFromMarket));
			ListingCreationPanel.Show(item, source, wasOpenedFromMarket);
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] ❌ ExecuteListingLogicInternal失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static bool ValidateItemForListing(Item item)
	{
		try
		{
			if (item.TypeID == 451)
			{
				NotificationService.ShowNotification(LocalizationManager.GetText("listing.error_cash", "无法上架现金物品"), playSound: false);
				Logger.Info("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 拒绝上架：现金物品");
				return false;
			}
			if (item.Inventory != null && !item.Inventory.IsEmpty())
			{
				NotificationService.ShowNotification(LocalizationManager.GetText("listing.error_container", "请先清空容器内的物品再上架"), playSound: false, NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Warning);
				Logger.Info("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 拒绝上架：容器不为空");
				return false;
			}
			if (item.Slots != null && item.Slots.list != null)
			{
				bool hasAttachments = false;
				foreach (Slot item2 in item.Slots.list)
				{
					if (item2 != null && item2.Content != null)
					{
						hasAttachments = true;
						break;
					}
				}
				if (hasAttachments)
				{
					NotificationService.ShowNotification(LocalizationManager.GetText("listing.error_attachments", "请先卸下配件再上架"), playSound: false, NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Warning);
					Logger.Info("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 拒绝上架：物品有配件");
					return false;
				}
			}
			return true;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 验证物品失败: {0}", arg));
			return false;
		}
	}

	private static void OnFilterClicked()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_currentMenuInstance == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] _currentMenuInstance is null");
				return;
			}
			Item currentItem = GetCurrentItem();
			if (currentItem == null)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] No item selected for filtering");
				NotificationService.ShowNotification(LocalizationManager.GetText("menu.no_item_selected", "未选中物品"), playSound: false);
				_currentMenuInstance.Close();
			}
			else
			{
				int typeID = currentItem.TypeID;
				string displayName = currentItem.DisplayName;
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 筛选按钮已点击: TypeID={0}, Name={1}", typeID, displayName));
				_currentMenuInstance.Close();
				FilterMarketByItemType(typeID, displayName).Forget();
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] ❌ OnFilterClicked失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static async UniTaskVoid FilterMarketByItemType(int itemTypeId, string itemName)
	{

		try
		{
			if (DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Instance == null)
			{
				FleaMarketUIManager.OpenFleaMarket();
				await UniTask.Delay(500);
			}
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 正在筛选市场: TypeID={0}", itemTypeId));
			var (list, num) = await ApiClient.GetListingsAsync(null, itemTypeId, "price_asc");
			if (list != null)
			{
				DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Instance?.UpdateListings(list, num, itemTypeId, "price_asc", itemName);
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] ✅ 筛选成功: 找到 {0} 个商品（显示第1页，共{1}个）", num, list.Count));
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Instance?.UpdateListings(new List<Listing>(), 0, itemTypeId, "price_asc", itemName);
				Logger.Info("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 筛选结果为空");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] ❌ FilterMarketByItemType失败: {0}", arg));
			DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Instance?.UpdateListings(new List<Listing>(), 0, itemTypeId, "price_asc", itemName);
		}
	}

	private static Item? GetCurrentItem()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_currentMenuInstance == null)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] _currentMenuInstance is null");
				return null;
			}
			PropertyInfo property = typeof(ItemOperationMenu).GetProperty("TargetItem", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (property == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] Cannot find TargetItem property");
				return null;
			}
			return property.GetValue(_currentMenuInstance) as Item;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] GetCurrentItem失败: {0}", arg));
			return null;
		}
	}

	private static bool IsMarketInventoryItem(ItemDisplay itemDisplay)
	{
		try
		{
			if (itemDisplay == null)
			{
				return false;
			}
			InventoryDisplay marketInventoryDisplay = DuckMarketView_NoteClone.MarketInventoryDisplay;
			if (marketInventoryDisplay == null)
			{
				return false;
			}
			Transform transform = itemDisplay.transform;
			InventoryEntry inventoryEntry = null;
			for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++)
			{
				if (!(transform != null))
				{
					break;
				}
				inventoryEntry = transform.GetComponent<InventoryEntry>();
				if (inventoryEntry != null)
				{
					break;
				}
				transform = transform.parent;
			}
			if (inventoryEntry == null)
			{
				return false;
			}
			PropertyInfo property = typeof(InventoryEntry).GetProperty("Master", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
			if (property == null)
			{
				return false;
			}
			return ReferenceEquals(property.GetValue(inventoryEntry), marketInventoryDisplay);
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] ❌ IsMarketInventoryItem失败: {0}", arg));
			return false;
		}
	}

	private static bool IsFromAllowedInventory(ItemDisplay itemDisplay)
	{
		try
		{
			if (itemDisplay == null)
			{
				return false;
			}
			Transform transform = itemDisplay.transform;
			InventoryDisplay inventoryDisplay = null;
			for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++)
			{
				if (!(transform != null))
				{
					break;
				}
				inventoryDisplay = transform.GetComponent<InventoryDisplay>();
				if (inventoryDisplay != null)
				{
					break;
				}
				transform = transform.parent;
			}
			if (inventoryDisplay == null)
			{
				Logger.Verbose("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 未找到InventoryDisplay组件");
				return false;
			}
			string gameObjectPath = GetGameObjectPath(inventoryDisplay.gameObject);
			Logger.Verbose("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] InventoryDisplay路径: " + gameObjectPath);
			bool isPlayerInventory = gameObjectPath.Contains("EquipmentAndInventory") && gameObjectPath.Contains("Content/Scroll View/Viewport/Content") && gameObjectPath.EndsWith("InventoryDisplay");
			bool isLootInventory = gameObjectPath.Contains("LootTarget") && gameObjectPath.Contains("Content/Scroll View/Viewport") && gameObjectPath.EndsWith("InventoryDisplay");
			bool isAllowedInventory = isPlayerInventory || isLootInventory;
			Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 上架权限检查: isPlayerInventory={0}, isLootInventory={1}, isAllowed={2}", isPlayerInventory, isLootInventory, isAllowedInventory));
			return isAllowedInventory;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] ❌ IsFromAllowedInventory失败: {0}", arg));
			return false;
		}
	}

	private static string GetGameObjectPath(GameObject obj)
	{
		if (obj == null)
		{
			return "";
		}
		string path = obj.name;
		Transform parent = obj.transform.parent;
		while (parent != null)
		{
			path = parent.name + "/" + path;
			parent = parent.parent;
		}
		return path;
	}

	private static bool IsItemValidForListing(Item item)
	{
		if (item == null)
		{
			return false;
		}
		if (item.Inventory != null && !item.Inventory.IsEmpty())
		{
			return false;
		}
		if (item.Slots != null && item.Slots.list != null)
		{
			foreach (Slot item2 in item.Slots.list)
			{
				if (item2 != null && item2.Content != null)
				{
					return false;
				}
			}
		}
		return true;
	}

	private static Item FindFirstItemInStorage(int typeId)
	{
		try
		{
			List<Item> list = new List<Item>();
			int skippedInvalidCount = 0;
			Type type = Type.GetType("PlayerStorage, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
			if (type != null)
			{
				PropertyInfo property = type.GetProperty("Inventory", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
				if (property != null)
				{
					Inventory inventory = property.GetValue(null) as Inventory;
					if (inventory != null)
					{
						PropertyInfo property2 = typeof(Inventory).GetProperty("Content", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
						if (property2 != null && property2.GetValue(inventory) is List<Item> list2)
						{
							foreach (Item item2 in list2)
							{
								if (item2 != null && item2.TypeID == typeId)
								{
									if (IsItemValidForListing(item2))
									{
										list.Add(item2);
									}
									else
									{
										skippedInvalidCount++;
									}
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			if (skippedInvalidCount > 0)
			{
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 跳过 {0} 个物品（容器不为空或有配件）", skippedInvalidCount));
			}
			if (list.Count == 0)
			{
				Logger.Warning(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] ⚠️ 未在主仓库中找到可上架物品 (TypeID={0})", typeId));
				return null;
			}
			foreach (Item item3 in list)
			{
				if (item3.MaxDurability > 0f && Math.Abs(item3.Durability - item3.MaxDurability) < 0.01f)
				{
					Logger.Verbose("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 优先选择满耐久物品: " + item3.DisplayName);
					return item3;
				}
			}
			Item item = list[0];
			Logger.Verbose("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 返回主仓库物品: " + item.DisplayName);
			return item;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] ❌ FindFirstItemInStorage失败: {0}", arg));
			return null;
		}
	}

	private static bool HasBlackMarketBuilding()
	{
		try
		{
			Type type = Type.GetType("Duckov.Buildings.BuildingManager, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
			if (type == null)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] ⚠️ 无法找到BuildingManager类型");
				return false;
			}
			MethodInfo method = type.GetMethod("Any", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public, null, new Type[2]
			{
				typeof(string),
				typeof(bool)
			}, null);
			if (method == null)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] ⚠️ 无法找到BuildingManager.Any方法");
				return false;
			}
			object obj = method.Invoke(null, new object[2]
			{
				"BlackMarket",
				false
			});
			bool hasBlackMarketBuilding = obj != null && (bool)obj;
			Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 黑市建筑检查结果: {0}", hasBlackMarketBuilding));
			return hasBlackMarketBuilding;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] ❌ HasBlackMarketBuilding失败: {0}", arg));
			return false;
		}
	}

	private static void SetButtonText(Button button, string labelText)
	{
		try
		{
			bool hasTextComponent = false;
			TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren = button.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
			foreach (TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI in componentsInChildren)
			{
				if (textMeshProUGUI != null)
				{
					textMeshProUGUI.text = labelText;
					hasTextComponent = true;
					Logger.Verbose("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] ✅ 设置TextMeshPro文本: " + labelText);
				}
			}
			Text[] componentsInChildren2 = button.GetComponentsInChildren<Text>(includeInactive: true);
			foreach (Text text2 in componentsInChildren2)
			{
				if (text2 != null)
				{
					text2.text = labelText;
					hasTextComponent = true;
					Logger.Verbose("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] ✅ 设置Unity Text文本: " + labelText);
				}
			}
			if (!hasTextComponent)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] ⚠️ 未找到文本组件，无法设置文本: " + labelText);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] ❌ SetButtonText失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static void ExecutePurchaseOrderLogicInternal(Item targetItem, ItemDisplay itemDisplay)
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Info("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 🔍 开始发布求购逻辑: " + targetItem.DisplayName);
			if (!ValidateItemForPurchaseOrder(targetItem))
			{
				return;
			}
			if (_currentMenuInstance != null)
			{
				_currentMenuInstance.Close();
			}
			DuckMarketView_NoteClone instance = DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Instance;
			bool wasOpenedFromMarket = instance != null && instance.open;
			if (wasOpenedFromMarket)
			{
				Logger.Info("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 从市场界面打开求购发布，先关闭市场");
				instance.Close();
			}
			ManagedUIElement sourceElement = null;
			try
			{
				LootView instance2 = LootView.Instance;
				if (instance2 != null)
				{
					sourceElement = instance2;
					Logger.Info("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 找到LootView作为sourceElement");
				}
			}
			catch (Exception ex)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 无法获取LootView: " + ex.Message);
			}
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 打开求购发布面板: {0} (从市场打开: {1})", targetItem.DisplayName, wasOpenedFromMarket));
			PurchaseOrderCreationPanel.Show(targetItem, sourceElement, wasOpenedFromMarket);
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] ❌ ExecutePurchaseOrderLogicInternal失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static bool ValidateItemForPurchaseOrder(Item item)
	{
		try
		{
			if (item.TypeID == 451)
			{
				NotificationService.ShowNotification(LocalizationManager.GetText("purchase_order.error_cash", "无法求购现金物品"), playSound: false);
				Logger.Info("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 拒绝求购：现金物品");
				return false;
			}
			return true;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 验证求购物品失败: {0}", arg));
			return false;
		}
	}

	private static void OnPurchaseOrderClicked()
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Info("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 求购按钮被点击");
			if (_currentMenuInstance == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] _currentMenuInstance is null");
				return;
			}
			PropertyInfo property = typeof(ItemOperationMenu).GetProperty("TargetItem", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (property == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] TargetItem property not found");
				return;
			}
			Item item = property.GetValue(_currentMenuInstance) as Item;
			if (item == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] targetItem is null");
				return;
			}
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 尝试发布求购订单: {0} (TypeID: {1})", item.DisplayName, item.TypeID));
			if (!ValidateItemForPurchaseOrder(item))
			{
				return;
			}
			if (_currentMenuInstance != null)
			{
				_currentMenuInstance.Close();
			}
			DuckMarketView_NoteClone instance = DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Instance;
			bool wasOpenedFromMarket = instance != null && instance.open;
			if (wasOpenedFromMarket)
			{
				Logger.Info("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 从市场界面打开求购，先关闭市场");
				instance.Close();
			}
			if (ListingCreationPanel.Instance != null && ListingCreationPanel.Instance.open)
			{
				Logger.Info("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 打开求购前，先关闭上架界面");
				ListingCreationPanel.Instance.Close();
			}
			ManagedUIElement sourceElement = null;
			try
			{
				LootView instance2 = LootView.Instance;
				if (instance2 != null)
				{
					sourceElement = instance2;
					Logger.Verbose("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 找到LootView作为sourceElement");
				}
			}
			catch (Exception ex)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 无法获取LootView: " + ex.Message);
			}
			PurchaseOrderCreationPanel.Show(item, sourceElement, wasOpenedFromMarket);
			Logger.Info("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] ✅ 求购发布面板已打开: " + item.DisplayName);
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemOperationMenuPatch] 求购按钮点击处理失败: {0}", arg));
			NotificationService.ShowNotification("求购功能出错", playSound: false, NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Error);
		}
	}
}
```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Patches/ItemShortcutPatch.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using Duckov;
using Duckov.UI;
using FleaMarket.UI;
using HarmonyLib;
using ItemStatsSystem;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;

namespace DuckMarket.Patches;

[HarmonyPatch]
public class ItemShortcutPatch
{
	private static bool IsItemInMarketDisplay(Item item)
	{
		try
		{
			InventoryDisplay marketInventoryDisplay = DuckMarketView_NoteClone.MarketInventoryDisplay;
			if (marketInventoryDisplay == null)
			{
				return false;
			}
			Inventory target = marketInventoryDisplay.Target;
			if (target == null)
			{
				return false;
			}
			return target.Content?.Contains(item) ?? false;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemShortcutPatch] ❌ IsItemInMarketDisplay失败: {0}", arg));
			return false;
		}
	}

	[HarmonyPatch(typeof(ItemShortcut), "IsItemValid")]
	[HarmonyPostfix]
	private static void IsItemValidPostfix(Item item, ref bool __result)
	{
		try
		{
			if (__result && IsItemInMarketDisplay(item))
			{
				__result = false;
				Logger.Verbose("[ItemShortcutPatch] ✅ 拦截快捷键(1-4)使用物品: " + item.DisplayName);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemShortcutPatch] ❌ IsItemValidPostfix失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	[HarmonyPatch(typeof(CharacterMainControl), "UseItem")]
	[HarmonyPrefix]
	private static bool UseItemPrefix(Item item)
	{
		try
		{
			if (IsItemInMarketDisplay(item))
			{
				Logger.Info("[ItemShortcutPatch] ✅ 拦截使用物品: " + item.DisplayName + "（物品在市场展示栏中）");
				return false;
			}
			return true;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ItemShortcutPatch] ❌ UseItemPrefix失败: {0}", arg));
			return true;
		}
	}
}
```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Patches/LootViewPatch.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Reflection;
using DuckMarket.UI;
using Duckov.UI;
using HarmonyLib;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;

namespace DuckMarket.Patches;

[HarmonyPatch]
public class LootViewPatch
{
	[HarmonyTargetMethod]
	private static MethodBase TargetMethod()
	{
		MethodInfo method = typeof(LootView).GetMethod("OnClose", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
		if (method == null)
		{
			Logger.Error("[LootViewPatch] Cannot find LootView.OnClose method");
			return null;
		}
		Logger.Info("[LootViewPatch] ✅ Target method found: LootView.OnClose");
		return method;
	}

	[HarmonyPrefix]
	private static void Prefix()
	{
		try
		{
			if (ListingCreationPanel.Instance != null && ListingCreationPanel.Instance.open)
			{
				Logger.Info("[LootViewPatch] LootView closing, closing ListingCreationPanel");
				ListingCreationPanel.Instance.Close();
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[LootViewPatch] Prefix failed: {0}", arg));
		}
	}
}
```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Patches/LootViewRefreshDetailsPatch.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Reflection;
using DuckMarket.UI;
using Duckov.UI;
using HarmonyLib;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;

namespace DuckMarket.Patches;

[HarmonyPatch]
public class LootViewRefreshDetailsPatch
{
	[HarmonyTargetMethod]
	private static MethodBase TargetMethod()
	{
		MethodInfo method = typeof(LootView).GetMethod("RefreshDetails", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
		if (method == null)
		{
			Logger.Error("[LootViewRefreshDetailsPatch] Cannot find LootView.RefreshDetails method");
			return null;
		}
		Logger.Info("[LootViewRefreshDetailsPatch] ✅ Target method found: LootView.RefreshDetails");
		return method;
	}

	[HarmonyPrefix]
	private static void Prefix()
	{
		try
		{
			if (ListingCreationPanel.IsInitializing)
			{
				Logger.Verbose("[LootViewRefreshDetailsPatch] ListingCreationPanel is initializing, skipping close");
				return;
			}
			if (PurchaseOrderCreationPanel.IsInitializing)
			{
				Logger.Verbose("[LootViewRefreshDetailsPatch] PurchaseOrderCreationPanel is initializing, skipping close");
				return;
			}
			if (ListingCreationPanel.Instance != null && ListingCreationPanel.Instance.open)
			{
				Logger.Info("[LootViewRefreshDetailsPatch] LootView.RefreshDetails called, closing ListingCreationPanel");
				ListingCreationPanel.Instance.Close();
			}
			if (PurchaseOrderCreationPanel.Instance != null && PurchaseOrderCreationPanel.Instance.open)
			{
				Logger.Info("[LootViewRefreshDetailsPatch] LootView.RefreshDetails called, closing PurchaseOrderCreationPanel");
				PurchaseOrderCreationPanel.Instance.Close();
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[LootViewRefreshDetailsPatch] Prefix failed: {0}", arg));
		}
	}
}
```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Patches/MultiInteractionPatch.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Reflection;
using DuckMarket.Core;
using DuckMarket.Interactables;
using Duckov.Buildings;
using HarmonyLib;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;

namespace DuckMarket.Patches;

[HarmonyPatch(typeof(MultiInteractionMenu), "SetupAndShow")]
public static class MultiInteractionPatch
{
	private static readonly HashSet<MultiInteraction> _processedInteractions = new HashSet<MultiInteraction>();

	private static void Postfix(MultiInteractionMenu __instance, MultiInteraction target)
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[MultiInteractionPatch] ⚡ Postfix called! MultiInteraction has {0} options", target.Interactables.Count));
			Logger.Info("[MultiInteractionPatch] Target GameObject: " + target.gameObject.name);
			if (_processedInteractions.Contains(target))
			{
				Logger.Verbose("[MultiInteractionPatch] ⚠️ Already processed this interaction, skipping");
				return;
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[MultiInteractionPatch] ✅ New interaction, proceeding...");
			Building component = target.GetComponent<Building>();
			if (component == null)
			{
				Logger.Info("[MultiInteractionPatch] Skipping - not a building (no Building component)");
				return;
			}
			string iD = component.ID;
			Logger.Info("[MultiInteractionPatch] Building detected: ID='" + iD + "'");
			if (iD != "BlackMarket")
			{
				Logger.Info("[MultiInteractionPatch] Skipping - not a Black Market Facility (ID='" + iD + "')");
				return;
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[MultiInteractionPatch] ✅ Black Market Facility detected (Building ID=BlackMarket)! Adding Duck Market option...");
			_processedInteractions.Add(target);
			AddFleaMarketInteractable(target);
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[MultiInteractionPatch] Error in Setup_Postfix: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static void AddFleaMarketInteractable(MultiInteraction multiInteraction)
	{
		try
		{
			FieldInfo field = typeof(MultiInteraction).GetField("interactables", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("Could not find 'interactables' field in MultiInteraction");
				return;
			}
			if (!(field.GetValue(multiInteraction) is List<InteractableBase> list))
			{
				Logger.Error("Could not get interactables list from MultiInteraction");
				return;
			}
			foreach (InteractableBase item in list)
			{
				if (item is FleaMarketInteractable)
				{
					Logger.Info("Flea Market interactable already exists in Black Market Facility");
					return;
				}
			}
			FleaMarketInteractable fleaMarketInteractable = multiInteraction.gameObject.AddComponent<FleaMarketInteractable>();
			fleaMarketInteractable.overrideInteractName = true;
			fleaMarketInteractable._overrideInteractNameKey = LocalizationStrings.GetOpenDuckMarketInteractionKey();
			FieldInfo field2 = typeof(InteractableBase).GetField("interactTime", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field2 != null)
			{
				field2.SetValue(fleaMarketInteractable, 0f);
			}
			list.Add(fleaMarketInteractable);
			Logger.Info("Flea Market interactable added to Black Market Facility");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("Error adding Flea Market interactable: {0}", arg));
		}
	}
}



```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Patches/NotificationTextPatch.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Reflection;
using DuckMarket.Services;
using Duckov.UI;
using HarmonyLib;

namespace DuckMarket.Patches;

[HarmonyPatch(typeof(NotificationText))]
public class NotificationTextPatch
{
	private static FieldInfo _pendingTextsField;

	private static FieldInfo _textField;

	private static bool _isCurrentNotificationMod;

	public const string SUCCESS_PREFIX = "[DM:SUCCESS]";

	public const string ERROR_PREFIX = "[DM:ERROR]";

	public const string INFO_PREFIX = "[DM:INFO]";

	public const string WARNING_PREFIX = "[DM:WARNING]";

	static NotificationTextPatch()
	{
		try
		{
			Type typeFromHandle = typeof(NotificationText);
			_pendingTextsField = typeFromHandle.GetField("pendingTexts", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			_textField = typeFromHandle.GetField("text", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (_pendingTextsField == null || _textField == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[NotificationTextPatch] Failed to find required fields via reflection");
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Info("[NotificationTextPatch] ✅ Reflection cache initialized successfully");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[NotificationTextPatch] Error initializing reflection cache: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	[HarmonyPatch("ShowNext")]
	[HarmonyPrefix]
	private static void ShowNextPrefix(NotificationText __instance)
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Info("[NotificationTextPatch] 🔍 ShowNextPrefix called");
			if (!(_pendingTextsField?.GetValue(null) is Queue<string> queue))
			{
				Logger.Error("[NotificationTextPatch] ❌ Failed to get queue via reflection");
				return;
			}
			if (queue.Count == 0)
			{
				Logger.Info("[NotificationTextPatch] Queue is empty, skipping");
				return;
			}
			string nextMessage = queue.Peek();
			Logger.Info("[NotificationTextPatch] 📨 Next message in queue: " + nextMessage);
			if (nextMessage.StartsWith("[DM:SUCCESS]"))
			{
				Logger.Info("[NotificationTextPatch] 🟢 Detected MOD success message");
				NotificationStyleCustomizer.EnableCustomStyle(NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Success);
				RemovePrefixFromQueue(queue, "[DM:SUCCESS]");
				_isCurrentNotificationMod = true;
			}
			else if (nextMessage.StartsWith("[DM:ERROR]"))
			{
				Logger.Info("[NotificationTextPatch] 🔴 Detected MOD error message");
				NotificationStyleCustomizer.EnableCustomStyle(NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Error);
				RemovePrefixFromQueue(queue, "[DM:ERROR]");
				_isCurrentNotificationMod = true;
			}
			else if (nextMessage.StartsWith("[DM:INFO]"))
			{
				Logger.Info("[NotificationTextPatch] 🔵 Detected MOD info message");
				NotificationStyleCustomizer.EnableCustomStyle(NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Info);
				RemovePrefixFromQueue(queue, "[DM:INFO]");
				_isCurrentNotificationMod = true;
			}
			else if (nextMessage.StartsWith("[DM:WARNING]"))
			{
				Logger.Info("[NotificationTextPatch] 🟡 Detected MOD warning message");
				NotificationStyleCustomizer.EnableCustomStyle(NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Warning);
				RemovePrefixFromQueue(queue, "[DM:WARNING]");
				_isCurrentNotificationMod = true;
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Info("[NotificationTextPatch] ⚪ Detected game message, using original style: " + nextMessage);
				NotificationStyleCustomizer.RestoreOriginalStyle();
				_isCurrentNotificationMod = false;
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[NotificationTextPatch] Error in ShowNextPrefix: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	[HarmonyPatch("ShowNext")]
	[HarmonyPostfix]
	private static void ShowNextPostfix()
	{
		try
		{
			if (!_isCurrentNotificationMod)
			{
				Logger.Verbose("[NotificationTextPatch] Scheduling style restoration for game notification");
				NotificationStyleCustomizer.ScheduleStyleRestoration();
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Verbose("[NotificationTextPatch] Skipping style restoration for MOD notification");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[NotificationTextPatch] Error in ShowNextPostfix: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static void RemovePrefixFromQueue(Queue<string> queue, string prefix)
	{
		try
		{
			string item = queue.Dequeue().Replace(prefix, "");
			Queue<string> queue2 = new Queue<string>();
			queue2.Enqueue(item);
			while (queue.Count > 0)
			{
				queue2.Enqueue(queue.Dequeue());
			}
			while (queue2.Count > 0)
			{
				queue.Enqueue(queue2.Dequeue());
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[NotificationTextPatch] ✅ Removed prefix '" + prefix + "' from message");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[NotificationTextPatch] Error removing prefix from queue: {0}", arg));
		}
	}
}

```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Patches/PauseMenuPatch.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using Cysharp.Threading.Tasks;
using DuckMarket.UI.Options;
using Duckov.Options.UI;
using HarmonyLib;

namespace DuckMarket.Patches;

[HarmonyPatch(typeof(OptionsPanel))]
public static class PauseMenuPatch
{
	private static bool _optionsTabInitialized;

	[HarmonyPostfix]
	[HarmonyPatch("OnOpen")]
	private static void OnOpen_Postfix(OptionsPanel __instance)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!_optionsTabInitialized)
			{
				Logger.Info("[OptionsPanelPatch] OptionsPanel opened, initializing DuckMarket options tab...");
				InitializeOptionsTabAsync(__instance).Forget();
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[OptionsPanelPatch] Error in OnOpen_Postfix: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static async UniTaskVoid InitializeOptionsTabAsync(OptionsPanel optionsPanel)
	{

		try
		{
			await UniTask.DelayFrame(1);
			await DuckMarketOptionsTab.InitializeAsync(optionsPanel);
			_optionsTabInitialized = true;
			Logger.Info("[OptionsPanelPatch] ✅ DuckMarket options tab initialized successfully");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[OptionsPanelPatch] Error initializing options tab: {0}", arg));
		}
	}
}
```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Patches/PlayerStoragePatch.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Reflection;
using System.Threading;
using Duckov.UI;
using HarmonyLib;

namespace DuckMarket.Patches;

[HarmonyPatch]
public class PlayerStoragePatch
{
	private static readonly ThreadLocal<bool> _isModCall = new ThreadLocal<bool>(() => false);

	private static FieldInfo _pendingTextsField;

	private static bool _reflectionInitialized;

	public static void BeginModPush()
	{
		_isModCall.Value = true;
		Logger.Verbose("[PlayerStoragePatch] 🏷️ MOD Push flag set");
	}

	public static void EndModPush()
	{
		_isModCall.Value = false;
		Logger.Verbose("[PlayerStoragePatch] 🏷️ MOD Push flag cleared");
	}

	[HarmonyTargetMethod]
	private static MethodBase TargetMethod()
	{
		try
		{
			Type type = Type.GetType("PlayerStorage, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
			if (type == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[PlayerStoragePatch] ❌ PlayerStorage type not found");
				return null;
			}
			MethodInfo method = type.GetMethod("Push", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
			if (method == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[PlayerStoragePatch] ❌ PlayerStorage.Push method not found");
				return null;
			}
			Logger.Info("[PlayerStoragePatch] ✅ Found PlayerStorage.Push method");
			return method;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PlayerStoragePatch] ❌ Error finding target method: {0}", arg));
			return null;
		}
	}

	private static void InitializeReflection()
	{
		if (_reflectionInitialized)
		{
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			_pendingTextsField = typeof(NotificationText).GetField("pendingTexts", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (_pendingTextsField == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[PlayerStoragePatch] ❌ Failed to find pendingTexts field");
				return;
			}
			_reflectionInitialized = true;
			Logger.Info("[PlayerStoragePatch] ✅ Reflection cache initialized");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PlayerStoragePatch] ❌ Error initializing reflection: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	[HarmonyPrefix]
	private static void PushPrefix()
	{
		InitializeReflection();
		if (!_isModCall.Value)
		{
			Logger.Verbose("[PlayerStoragePatch] ⚪ Game call detected, notification will be shown");
		}
		else
		{
			Logger.Info("[PlayerStoragePatch] 🟢 MOD call detected, will suppress game notification");
		}
	}

	[HarmonyPostfix]
	private static void PushPostfix()
	{
		if (!_isModCall.Value)
		{
			Logger.Verbose("[PlayerStoragePatch] ⚪ Game call, keeping notification");
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			if (_pendingTextsField?.GetValue(null) is Queue<string> { Count: not 0 } queue)
			{
				List<string> list = new List<string>(queue);
				string latestMessage = list[list.Count - 1];
				if (!latestMessage.Contains("已存入") && !latestMessage.Contains("已添加") && !latestMessage.Contains("added to") && !latestMessage.Contains("sent to"))
				{
					return;
				}
				list.RemoveAt(list.Count - 1);
				queue.Clear();
				foreach (string item in list)
				{
					queue.Enqueue(item);
				}
				Logger.Info("[PlayerStoragePatch] ✅ Suppressed game notification: " + latestMessage);
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Warning("[PlayerStoragePatch] ⚠️ Queue is empty or null");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PlayerStoragePatch] ❌ Error suppressing notification: {0}", arg));
		}
	}
}

```

```cs
using System;
using Cysharp.Threading.Tasks;
using FleaMarket.UI;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;

namespace DuckMarket.Patches;

public class TestUIKeyListener : MonoBehaviour
{
	private const float DEBOUNCE_TIME = 0.5f;

	private static TestUIKeyListener _instance;

	private void Update()
	{
	}

	public static void Initialize()
	{
		if (_instance == null)
		{
			GameObject obj = new GameObject("DuckMarket_TestUIKeyListener");
			UnityEngine.Object.DontDestroyOnLoad(obj);
			_instance = obj.AddComponent<TestUIKeyListener>();
			Logger.Verbose("[TestUIKeyListener] ✅ Initialized");
			Logger.Verbose("[TestUIKeyListener]   - F8 快捷键已禁用");
			Logger.Info("[TestUIKeyListener]   - 请通过黑市设施的'打开鸭鸭市场'选项打开新市场");
		}
	}

	private async UniTaskVoid OpenNoteCloneAsync()
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Info("[TestUIKeyListener] ⌨️ F8 pressed - Toggle Duck Market");
			await UniTask.Yield();
			DuckMarketView_NoteClone instance = DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Instance;
			if (instance != null)
			{
				if (instance.open)
				{
					instance.Close();
					Logger.Verbose("[TestUIKeyListener] 🔒 Note Clone View closed");
				}
				else
				{
					instance.Open();
				}
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Warning("[TestUIKeyListener] ❌ Note Clone View not found!");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[TestUIKeyListener] ❌ Failed to open Note Clone: {0}", arg));
		}
	}
}
```
