`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Services/AutoLoginManager.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using Cysharp.Threading.Tasks;
using DuckMarket.Core;
using DuckMarket.Network;
using Steamworks;

namespace DuckMarket.Services;

public static class AutoLoginManager
{
	private static bool _hasAttemptedLogin;

	private static bool _isLoginInProgress;

	private static DateTime _lastAttemptAtUtc = DateTime.MinValue;

	private static readonly TimeSpan RetryCooldown = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(3.0);

	public static bool IsLoginInProgress => _isLoginInProgress;

	public static async UniTask<bool> TryAutoLoginAsync(bool forceRelogin = false)
	{
		if (_isLoginInProgress && !forceRelogin)
		{
			Logger.Info("[AutoLogin] Login already in progress, waiting...");
			for (int i = 0; i < 300; i++)
			{
				if (!_isLoginInProgress)
				{
					Logger.Info("[AutoLogin] Login completed, returning result");
					return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(ApiClient.AuthToken);
				}
				await UniTask.Delay(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100.0));
			}
			Logger.Warning("[AutoLogin] Login timeout after 30 seconds");
			return false;
		}
		if (_hasAttemptedLogin && !forceRelogin)
		{
			if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(ApiClient.AuthToken))
			{
				Logger.Info("[AutoLogin] Already attempted login and token exists, skipping");
				return true;
			}
			TimeSpan timeSpan = DateTime.UtcNow - _lastAttemptAtUtc;
			if (timeSpan < RetryCooldown)
			{
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[AutoLogin] Previous attempt failed recently ({0:F1}s ago), cooldown active", timeSpan.TotalSeconds));
				return false;
			}
			Logger.Info("[AutoLogin] Previous attempt failed, retrying auto-login");
		}
		_hasAttemptedLogin = true;
		_lastAttemptAtUtc = DateTime.UtcNow;
		_isLoginInProgress = true;
		try
		{
			string steamIdStr = SteamUser.GetSteamID().ToString();
			string steamUsername = null;
			try
			{
				steamUsername = SteamFriends.GetPersonaName();
				if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(steamUsername))
				{
					Logger.Info("[AutoLogin] Retrieved Steam username: " + steamUsername);
				}
				else
				{
					Logger.Warning("[AutoLogin] Steam username is empty, will use default");
				}
			}
			catch (Exception ex)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[AutoLogin] Failed to get Steam username: " + ex.Message);
			}
			Logger.Info("[AutoLogin] Checking login status for Steam ID: " + steamIdStr);
			bool success = false;
			string refreshToken = DuckMarketSettings.GetRefreshToken();
			if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(refreshToken) && DuckMarketSettings.IsTokenValid())
			{
				Logger.Info("[AutoLogin] Found cached refresh token, attempting to refresh...");
				success = await ApiClient.RefreshTokenAsync(refreshToken);
				if (success)
				{
					Logger.Info("[AutoLogin] ✅ Token refreshed successfully");
				}
				else
				{
					Logger.Warning("[AutoLogin] Token refresh failed, clearing cache...");
					DuckMarketSettings.ClearAuthToken();
				}
			}
			if (!success)
			{
				Logger.Info("[AutoLogin] No valid token found, attempting Steam ticket authentication...");
				try
				{
					success = await ApiClient.LoginWithSteamTicketAsync(steamIdStr, steamUsername);
					if (success)
					{
						Logger.Info("[AutoLogin] ✅ Steam ticket authentication successful!");
					}
					else
					{
						Logger.Warning("[AutoLogin] Steam ticket authentication failed");
					}
				}
				catch (Exception ex2)
				{
					Logger.Error("[AutoLogin] Steam ticket authentication error: " + ex2.Message);
				}
			}
			if (!success)
			{
				Logger.Info("[AutoLogin] Steam ticket authentication unavailable, fallback to P2P...");
				try
				{
					success = await ApiClient.LoginWithP2PTicketAsync(steamIdStr, steamUsername);
					if (success)
					{
						Logger.Info("[AutoLogin] ✅ P2P ticket authentication successful!");
					}
					else
					{
						Logger.Warning("[AutoLogin] P2P ticket authentication failed");
					}
				}
				catch (Exception ex3)
				{
					Logger.Error("[AutoLogin] P2P authentication error: " + ex3.Message);
				}
			}
			if (!success)
			{
				Logger.Info("[AutoLogin] P2P authentication not available or failed");
				Logger.Info("[AutoLogin] Please click the status text in main menu to login via web");
			}
			if (success)
			{
				Logger.Info("[AutoLogin] ✅ Login successful: " + steamIdStr);
				Logger.Info("[AutoLogin] WebSocket will connect when player enters game");
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Warning("[AutoLogin] ⚠️ Not logged in: " + steamIdStr);
				Logger.Warning("[AutoLogin] Please click the status text in main menu to login via web");
			}
			return success;
		}
		catch (Exception ex4)
		{
			Logger.Error("[AutoLogin] Exception during login: " + ex4.Message);
			return false;
		}
		finally
		{
			_isLoginInProgress = false;
			Logger.Info("[AutoLogin] Login process completed");
		}
	}

	public static void Reset()
	{
		_hasAttemptedLogin = false;
		_isLoginInProgress = false;
		_lastAttemptAtUtc = DateTime.MinValue;
		Logger.Info("[AutoLogin] Reset login state");
	}
}



```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Services/NotificationService.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Reflection;
using Cysharp.Threading.Tasks;
using DuckMarket.Core;
using DuckMarket.Models;
using DuckMarket.Network;
using DuckMarket.Patches;
using Duckov.Economy;
using Duckov.UI;
using ItemStatsSystem;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;

namespace DuckMarket.Services;

public static class NotificationService
{
	private static bool _durationExtended;

	private static void ExtendNotificationDuration()
	{
		if (_durationExtended)
		{
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			NotificationText notificationText = UnityEngine.Object.FindObjectOfType<NotificationText>();
			if (notificationText != null)
			{
				Type typeFromHandle = typeof(NotificationText);
				FieldInfo field = typeFromHandle.GetField("duration", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				if (field != null)
				{
					field.SetValue(notificationText, 3f);
					Logger.Info("[NotificationService] Extended notification duration to 3.0s");
				}
				FieldInfo field2 = typeFromHandle.GetField("durationIfPending", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				if (field2 != null)
				{
					field2.SetValue(notificationText, 2f);
					Logger.Info("[NotificationService] Extended durationIfPending to 2.0s");
				}
				_durationExtended = true;
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[NotificationService] Failed to extend notification duration: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	public static void ShowNotification(string message, bool playSound = true, NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType type = NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Success)
	{
		if (!DuckMarketSettings.EnableNotifications)
		{
			Logger.Verbose("[NotificationService] Notifications disabled in settings, skipping notification");
			return;
		}
		ExtendNotificationDuration();
		if (playSound && DuckMarketSettings.NotificationSound)
		{
			SoundManager.PlaySoldSound();
		}
		NotificationStyleCustomizer.ShowNotification(message, type);
	}

	[Obsolete("Use ShowNotification(string, bool, NotificationType) instead")]
	public static void ShowNotification(string message, bool playSound, bool isSuccess)
	{
		ShowNotification(message, playSound, (!isSuccess) ? NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Error : NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Success);
	}

	public static void HandleItemSoldNotification(WebSocketMessage message)
	{
		ItemSoldNotification itemSoldNotification = new ItemSoldNotification
		{
			NotificationId = message.notification_id.GetValueOrDefault(),
			PurchaseId = message.purchase_id.GetValueOrDefault(),
			ItemTypeId = message.item_type_id.GetValueOrDefault(),
			ItemName = (message.item_name ?? "Unknown Item"),
			Quantity = message.quantity.GetValueOrDefault(),
			PricePerUnit = message.price_per_unit.GetValueOrDefault(),
			TotalPrice = message.total_price.GetValueOrDefault(),
			BuyerUsername = (message.buyer_username ?? "Unknown Buyer")
		};
		string gameItemName = GetGameItemName(itemSoldNotification.ItemTypeId);
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(gameItemName))
		{
			itemSoldNotification.ItemName = gameItemName;
		}
		Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationService] Received notification: ID={0}, {1} (TypeID:{2}) x{3} = {4} RUB", itemSoldNotification.NotificationId, itemSoldNotification.ItemName, itemSoldNotification.ItemTypeId, itemSoldNotification.Quantity, itemSoldNotification.TotalPrice));
		if (FleaMarketState.CurrentState == GameState.InBase)
		{
			ProcessImmediately(itemSoldNotification);
			return;
		}
		NotificationQueue.Enqueue(itemSoldNotification);
		ShowRaidNotification(itemSoldNotification);
	}

	private static string GetGameItemName(int itemTypeId)
	{
		try
		{
			if (itemTypeId <= 0)
			{
				return null;
			}
			ItemMetaData metaData = ItemAssetsCollection.GetMetaData(itemTypeId);
			if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(metaData.DisplayName))
			{
				return metaData.DisplayName;
			}
			Logger.Warning(string.Format("[NotificationService] Item not found for TypeID: {0}", itemTypeId));
			return null;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[NotificationService] Error getting item name for TypeID {0}: {1}", itemTypeId, ex.Message));
			return null;
		}
	}

	private static void ProcessImmediately(ItemSoldNotification notification)
	{
		ProcessWithAckAsync(notification).Forget();
	}

	private static async UniTaskVoid ProcessWithAckAsync(ItemSoldNotification notification)
	{

		try
		{
			int currentSaveSlot = FleaMarketState.CurrentSaveSlot;
			if (currentSaveSlot <= 0)
			{
				Logger.Warning(string.Format("[NotificationService] Invalid save slot: {0}", currentSaveSlot));
				return;
			}
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationService] 🔄 ACKing notification {0} before delivery...", notification.NotificationId));
			if (!(await ApiClient.AckNotificationAsync(notification.NotificationId, currentSaveSlot)))
			{
				Logger.Error(string.Format("[NotificationService] ❌ ACK failed for notification {0}, skipping delivery to prevent duplication", notification.NotificationId));
				return;
			}
			Logger.Info("[NotificationService] ✅ ACK success, now delivering items...");
			await SendCashItemAsync(notification.TotalPrice, notification);
			ShowBaseNotification(notification);
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationService] ✅ Processed with ACK-first: {0} x{1} = {2} RUB", notification.ItemName, notification.Quantity, notification.TotalPrice));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[NotificationService] Error in ProcessWithAckAsync: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static void ShowBaseNotification(ItemSoldNotification notification)
	{
		ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetItemSoldInBaseNotification(notification.ItemName, notification.Quantity, notification.TotalPrice, notification.BuyerUsername));
		Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationService] 商品已售出：{0} x{1} = {2} 金币", notification.ItemName, notification.Quantity, notification.TotalPrice));
	}

	private static void ShowRaidNotification(ItemSoldNotification notification)
	{
		ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetItemSoldInRaidNotification(notification.ItemName, notification.Quantity, notification.TotalPrice));
		Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationService] Queued for later: {0} x{1}", notification.ItemName, notification.Quantity));
		Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationService] Player will receive {0:N0} 金币 when returning to base", notification.TotalPrice));
	}

	private static async UniTask SendCashItemAsync(long amount, ItemSoldNotification notification)
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationService] Creating cash items: 总计 {0} 金币 (TypeID: {1})...", amount, 451));
			int remainingAmount = (int)amount;
			int itemCount = 0;
			while (remainingAmount > 0)
			{
				Item item = await ItemAssetsCollection.InstantiateAsync(451);
				if (item == null)
				{
					Logger.Error(string.Format("[NotificationService] Failed to create cash item (TypeID: {0}), adding remaining money directly: {1}", 451, remainingAmount));
					EconomyManager.Add(remainingAmount);
					break;
				}
				item.Initialize();
				int b = ((!item.Stackable) ? 1 : item.MaxStackCount);
				int stackAmount = (item.StackCount = Mathf.Min(remainingAmount, b));
				remainingAmount -= stackAmount;
				itemCount++;
				PlayerStoragePatch.BeginModPush();
				PlayerStorage.Push(item, toBufferDirectly: true);
				PlayerStoragePatch.EndModPush();
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationService] 📦 Cash item #{0} sent: {1} 金币 (剩余: {2})", itemCount, stackAmount, remainingAmount));
			}
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationService] ✅ All cash items sent to pickup locker: 总计 {0} 金币 (分{1}个包裹)", amount, itemCount));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[NotificationService] Error creating cash item: {0}", arg));
			EconomyManager.Add(amount);
		}
	}

	public static void HandleListingExpiredNotification(WebSocketMessage message)
	{
		try
		{
			int valueOrDefault = message.notification_id.GetValueOrDefault();
			int valueOrDefault2 = message.item_type_id.GetValueOrDefault();
			string itemName = message.item_name ?? "Unknown Item";
			int valueOrDefault3 = message.quantity.GetValueOrDefault();
			float? durability = message.durability;
			float? durability_loss = message.durability_loss;
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationService] Listing expired: notification_id={0}, {1} x{2}", valueOrDefault, itemName, valueOrDefault3));
			ProcessExpiredWithAckAsync(valueOrDefault, valueOrDefault2, itemName, valueOrDefault3, durability, durability_loss).Forget();
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[NotificationService] Error handling listing expired notification: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static async UniTaskVoid ProcessExpiredWithAckAsync(int notificationId, int itemTypeId, string itemName, int quantity, float? durability, float? durabilityLoss)
	{

		try
		{
			int currentSaveSlot = FleaMarketState.CurrentSaveSlot;
			if (currentSaveSlot <= 0)
			{
				Logger.Warning(string.Format("[NotificationService] Invalid save slot: {0}", currentSaveSlot));
				return;
			}
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationService] 🔄 ACKing expired notification {0} before returning item...", notificationId));
			if (!(await ApiClient.AckNotificationAsync(notificationId, currentSaveSlot)))
			{
				Logger.Error(string.Format("[NotificationService] ❌ ACK failed for expired notification {0}, skipping item return to prevent duplication", notificationId));
				return;
			}
			Logger.Info("[NotificationService] ✅ ACK success, now returning expired item...");
			await ReturnExpiredItemAsync(itemTypeId, itemName, quantity, durability, durabilityLoss);
			ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetItemExpiredNotification(itemName, quantity), playSound: false, NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Warning);
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationService] ✅ Processed expired with ACK-first: {0} x{1}", itemName, quantity));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[NotificationService] Error in ProcessExpiredWithAckAsync: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static async UniTask ReturnExpiredItemAsync(int itemTypeId, string itemName, int quantity, float? durability, float? durabilityLoss)
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationService] Returning expired item: {0} x{1} (TypeID: {2})...", itemName, quantity, itemTypeId));
			int remainingQuantity = quantity;
			int createdItemsCount = 0;
			while (remainingQuantity > 0)
			{
				Item item = await ItemAssetsCollection.InstantiateAsync(itemTypeId);
				if (item == null)
				{
					Logger.Error(string.Format("[NotificationService] Failed to create item (TypeID: {0})", itemTypeId));
					break;
				}
				item.Initialize();
				int stackAmount = (item.StackCount = Math.Min(remainingQuantity, item.MaxStackCount));
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[NotificationService] Created item: {0} x{1} (MaxStackCount: {2})", itemName, stackAmount, item.MaxStackCount));
				if (item.UseDurability)
				{
					if (durability.HasValue)
					{
						item.Durability = durability.Value;
						Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationService] Set item durability to {0}", durability.Value));
					}
					if (durabilityLoss.HasValue)
					{
						item.DurabilityLoss = durabilityLoss.Value;
						Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationService] Set item durability loss to {0}", durabilityLoss.Value));
					}
				}
				PlayerStoragePatch.BeginModPush();
				PlayerStorage.Push(item, toBufferDirectly: true);
				PlayerStoragePatch.EndModPush();
				remainingQuantity -= stackAmount;
				createdItemsCount++;
			}
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationService] ✅ Expired item returned to pickup locker: {0} x{1} ({2} stacks)", itemName, quantity, createdItemsCount));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[NotificationService] Error returning expired item: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	public static void HandlePurchaseOrderFulfilledNotification(WebSocketMessage message)
	{
		try
		{
			int valueOrDefault = message.notification_id.GetValueOrDefault();
			int valueOrDefault2 = message.order_id.GetValueOrDefault();
			int valueOrDefault3 = message.item_type_id.GetValueOrDefault();
			string itemName = message.item_name ?? "Unknown Item";
			int valueOrDefault4 = message.quantity_fulfilled.GetValueOrDefault();
			string orderStatus = message.order_status ?? "unknown";
			int valueOrDefault5 = message.remaining_quantity.GetValueOrDefault();
			string sellerName = message.seller_name ?? "Unknown Seller";
			float? durability = message.durability;
			float? max_durability = message.max_durability;
			float? durability_loss = message.durability_loss;
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationService] Purchase order fulfilled: notification_id={0}, ", valueOrDefault) + string.Format("order_id={0}, {1} x{2}, status={3}, ", valueOrDefault2, itemName, valueOrDefault4, orderStatus) + string.Format("remaining={0}, seller={1}", valueOrDefault5, sellerName));
			ProcessPurchaseOrderFulfilledWithAckAsync(valueOrDefault, valueOrDefault3, itemName, valueOrDefault4, orderStatus, valueOrDefault5, sellerName, durability, max_durability, durability_loss).Forget();
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[NotificationService] Error handling purchase order fulfilled notification: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static async UniTaskVoid ProcessPurchaseOrderFulfilledWithAckAsync(int notificationId, int itemTypeId, string itemName, int quantity, string orderStatus, int remainingQuantity, string sellerName, float? durability, float? maxDurability, float? durabilityLoss)
	{

		try
		{
			int currentSaveSlot = FleaMarketState.CurrentSaveSlot;
			if (currentSaveSlot <= 0)
			{
				Logger.Warning(string.Format("[NotificationService] Invalid save slot: {0}", currentSaveSlot));
				return;
			}
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationService] 🔄 ACKing purchase order fulfilled notification {0}...", notificationId));
			if (!(await ApiClient.AckNotificationAsync(notificationId, currentSaveSlot)))
			{
				Logger.Error(string.Format("[NotificationService] ❌ ACK failed for notification {0}, ", notificationId) + "skipping item delivery to prevent duplication");
				return;
			}
			Logger.Info("[NotificationService] ✅ ACK success, now delivering items to buyer...");
			await CreateAndSendItemsToBuyerAsync(itemTypeId, itemName, quantity, durability, maxDurability, durabilityLoss);
			string itemDisplayName = GetItemDisplayName(itemTypeId, itemName);
			string status = ((orderStatus == "completed") ? LocalizationStrings.GetCompletedStatusLabel() : LocalizationStrings.GetRemainingQuantityFormat(remainingQuantity));
			ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetPurchaseOrderFulfilledNotification(itemDisplayName, quantity, sellerName, status));
			Logger.Info("[NotificationService] ✅ Processed purchase order fulfilled with ACK-first: " + string.Format("{0} x{1} from {2}", itemName, quantity, sellerName));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[NotificationService] Error in ProcessPurchaseOrderFulfilledWithAckAsync: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static async UniTask CreateAndSendItemsToBuyerAsync(int itemTypeId, string itemName, int quantity, float? durability, float? maxDurability, float? durabilityLoss)
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationService] Creating items for buyer: {0} (TypeID:{1}) x{2}...", itemName, itemTypeId, quantity));
			int remainingQuantity = quantity;
			int createdItemsCount = 0;
			while (remainingQuantity > 0)
			{
				Item item = await ItemAssetsCollection.InstantiateAsync(itemTypeId);
				if (item == null)
				{
					Logger.Error(string.Format("[NotificationService] Failed to create item (TypeID: {0})", itemTypeId));
					break;
				}
				item.Initialize();
				int b = ((!item.Stackable) ? 1 : item.MaxStackCount);
				int stackAmount = Mathf.Min(remainingQuantity, b);
				if (item.Stackable)
				{
					item.StackCount = stackAmount;
				}
				if (durability.HasValue || maxDurability.HasValue || durabilityLoss.HasValue)
				{
					if (maxDurability.HasValue && maxDurability.Value > 0f)
					{
						item.MaxDurability = maxDurability.Value;
						Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[NotificationService] 设置MaxDurability: {0}", maxDurability.Value));
					}
					if (durability.HasValue && durability.Value > 0f)
					{
						item.Durability = durability.Value;
						Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[NotificationService] 设置Durability: {0}", durability.Value));
					}
					else if (maxDurability.HasValue && maxDurability.Value > 0f)
					{
						item.Durability = maxDurability.Value;
						Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[NotificationService] 未提供耐久度，设置为满耐久: {0}", maxDurability.Value));
					}
					if (durabilityLoss.HasValue && durabilityLoss.Value > 0f)
					{
						item.DurabilityLoss = durabilityLoss.Value;
						Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[NotificationService] 设置DurabilityLoss: {0}", durabilityLoss.Value));
					}
					Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationService] 物品耐久度设置完成: {0} 耐久={1}/{2}", item.DisplayName, item.Durability, item.MaxDurability));
				}
				else
				{
					Logger.Verbose("[NotificationService] 未提供耐久度信息，使用物品默认耐久度: " + item.DisplayName);
				}
				PlayerStoragePatch.BeginModPush();
				PlayerStorage.Push(item, toBufferDirectly: true);
				PlayerStoragePatch.EndModPush();
				remainingQuantity -= stackAmount;
				createdItemsCount++;
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationService] 📦 Item #{0} sent: {1} ", createdItemsCount, stackAmount) + string.Format("(remaining: {0})", remainingQuantity));
			}
			Logger.Info("[NotificationService] ✅ All items sent to buyer's pickup locker: " + string.Format("{0} x{1} ({2} stacks)", itemName, quantity, createdItemsCount));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[NotificationService] Error creating and sending items to buyer: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static string GetGameItemName(int itemTypeId, string fallbackName)
	{
		try
		{
			Type type = Type.GetType("ItemStatsSystem.ItemData, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
			if (type != null)
			{
				MethodInfo method = type.GetMethod("GetById", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
				if (method != null)
				{
					object obj = method.Invoke(null, new object[1] { itemTypeId });
					if (obj != null)
					{
						PropertyInfo property = type.GetProperty("Name", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
						if (property != null)
						{
							string resolvedName = property.GetValue(obj) as string;
							if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(resolvedName))
							{
								return resolvedName;
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Warning(string.Format("[NotificationService] 获取游戏内物品名失败 (TypeID: {0}): {1}", itemTypeId, ex.Message));
		}
		return fallbackName ?? "未知物品";
	}

	private static string GetItemDisplayName(int itemTypeId, string fallbackName)
	{
		try
		{
			Type type = Type.GetType("ItemStatsSystem.ItemAssetsCollection, ItemStatsSystem");
			if (type != null)
			{
				MethodInfo method = type.GetMethod("GetMetaData", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
				if (method != null)
				{
					object obj = method.Invoke(null, new object[1] { itemTypeId });
					if (obj != null)
					{
						PropertyInfo property = obj.GetType().GetProperty("DisplayName");
						if (property != null)
						{
							string displayName = property.GetValue(obj) as string;
							if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(displayName))
							{
								Logger.Info("[NotificationService] 📦 使用游戏内物品名字: " + displayName);
								return displayName;
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Warning(string.Format("[NotificationService] ⚠️ 获取游戏内物品名字失败 (ID={0}): {1}", itemTypeId, ex.Message));
		}
		string fallbackDisplayName = fallbackName ?? "未知物品";
		Logger.Info("[NotificationService] 📦 使用接口物品名字: " + fallbackDisplayName);
		return fallbackDisplayName;
	}
}






```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Services/NotificationStyleCustomizer.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Collections;
using System.Reflection;
using Duckov.UI;
using Duckov.UI.Animations;
using TMPro;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;
using UnityEngine.UI;

namespace DuckMarket.Services;

public static class NotificationStyleCustomizer
{
	public enum NotificationType
	{
		Success,
		Error,
		Info,
		Warning
	}

	private static bool _initialized;

	private static Image _backgroundImage;

	private static TextMeshProUGUI _textComponent;

	private static Image _originalBackground;

	private static Coroutine? _activeRestorationCoroutine;

	private static NotificationText? _notificationTextInstance;

	private static readonly Color SuccessColor = new Color(0.2509804f, 43f / 51f, 0.40392157f, 0.7f);

	private static readonly Color ErrorColor = new Color(1f, 19f / 51f, 19f / 51f, 0.7f);

	private static readonly Color InfoColor = new Color(0.3019608f, 0.6509804f, 1f, 0.7f);

	private static readonly Color WarningColor = new Color(1f, 72f / 85f, 0.3019608f, 0.7f);

	private static readonly Color TextColor = Color.white;

	private static Color _originalBackgroundColor;

	private static Color _originalTextColor;

	public static void Initialize()
	{
		if (_initialized)
		{
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			Logger.Info("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] 🎨 Initializing notification style customization...");
			NotificationText notificationText = Object.FindObjectOfType<NotificationText>();
			if (notificationText == null)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] NotificationText not found in scene");
				return;
			}
			_notificationTextInstance = notificationText;
			Type typeFromHandle = typeof(NotificationText);
			FieldInfo field = typeFromHandle.GetField("fadeGroup", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] fadeGroup field not found");
				return;
			}
			FadeGroup fadeGroup = field.GetValue(notificationText) as FadeGroup;
			if (fadeGroup == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] fadeGroup is null");
				return;
			}
			FieldInfo field2 = typeFromHandle.GetField("text", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field2 == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] text field not found");
				return;
			}
			_textComponent = field2.GetValue(notificationText) as TextMeshProUGUI;
			if (_textComponent == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] text component is null");
				return;
			}
			_originalTextColor = _textComponent.color;
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] 📝 Stored original text color: {0}", _originalTextColor));
			Image originalBackgroundImage = FindOriginalBackgroundImage(fadeGroup);
			if (originalBackgroundImage == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] Failed to find original background image");
				return;
			}
			Logger.Info("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] Found original background GameObject: " + originalBackgroundImage.gameObject.name);
			Component[] components = originalBackgroundImage.gameObject.GetComponents<Component>();
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] Original background has {0} components:", components.Length));
			Component[] array = components;
			foreach (Component componentEntry in array)
			{
				Logger.Info("[NotificationStyleCustomizer]   - " + componentEntry.GetType().Name);
				if (componentEntry is Image imageComponent)
				{
					string format = "[NotificationStyleCustomizer]     Image: color={0}, sprite={1}, material={2}, type={3}";
					object[] obj = new object[4]
					{
						imageComponent.color,
						null,
						null,
						imageComponent.type
					};
					Sprite sprite = imageComponent.sprite;
					obj[1] = ((sprite != null) ? sprite.name : null);
					Material material = imageComponent.material;
					obj[2] = ((material != null) ? material.name : null);
					Logger.Info(string.Format(format, obj));
				}
			}
			CanvasGroup canvasGroup = fadeGroup.GetComponent<CanvasGroup>();
			if (canvasGroup != null)
			{
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] FadeGroup has CanvasGroup: alpha={0}, interactable={1}, blocksRaycasts={2}", canvasGroup.alpha, canvasGroup.interactable, canvasGroup.blocksRaycasts));
			}
			_originalBackground = originalBackgroundImage;
			_originalBackgroundColor = originalBackgroundImage.color;
			_backgroundImage = originalBackgroundImage;
			Logger.Info("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] Will modify original background directly instead of cloning");
			_initialized = true;
			Logger.Info("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] ✅ Initialization complete (using original background)");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] Initialization failed: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	public static void EnableCustomStyle(NotificationType type)
	{
		Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] 🎨 EnableCustomStyle called, type={0}", type));
		if (!_initialized)
		{
			Logger.Info("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] Not initialized, calling Initialize()...");
			Initialize();
		}
		if (_backgroundImage == null || _textComponent == null)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] Components are null (scene changed?), re-initializing...");
			_initialized = false;
			Initialize();
		}
		if (_activeRestorationCoroutine != null && _notificationTextInstance != null)
		{
			_notificationTextInstance.StopCoroutine(_activeRestorationCoroutine);
			_activeRestorationCoroutine = null;
			Logger.Verbose("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] Cancelled pending restoration coroutine for MOD notification");
		}
		if (_backgroundImage != null)
		{
			Color val = type switch
			{
				NotificationType.Success => SuccessColor, 
				NotificationType.Error => ErrorColor, 
				NotificationType.Info => InfoColor, 
				NotificationType.Warning => WarningColor, 
				_ => SuccessColor, 
			};
			string typeIcon = type switch
			{
				NotificationType.Success => "🟢", 
				NotificationType.Error => "🔴", 
				NotificationType.Info => "🔵", 
				NotificationType.Warning => "🟡", 
				_ => "⚪", 
			};
			_backgroundImage.color = val;
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] {0} Set background color: {1}", typeIcon, val));
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] Background Image - enabled: {0}, sprite: {1}, color: {2}", _backgroundImage.enabled, (_backgroundImage.sprite != null) ? "✅" : "❌", _backgroundImage.color));
		}
		else
		{
			Logger.Warning("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] ⚠️ _backgroundImage is null!");
		}
		if (_textComponent != null)
		{
			_textComponent.color = TextColor;
			Logger.Info("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] ✅ Set text color to white");
		}
		else
		{
			Logger.Warning("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] ⚠️ _textComponent is null!");
		}
	}

	[Obsolete("Use EnableCustomStyle(NotificationType) instead")]
	public static void EnableCustomStyle(bool isSuccess)
	{
		EnableCustomStyle((!isSuccess) ? NotificationType.Error : NotificationType.Success);
	}

	public static void RestoreOriginalStyle()
	{
		if (_initialized)
		{
			if (_backgroundImage != null)
			{
				_backgroundImage.color = _originalBackgroundColor;
			}
			if (_textComponent != null)
			{
				_textComponent.color = _originalTextColor;
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] ⚪ Restored original style");
		}
	}

	public static void ShowNotification(string message, NotificationType type = NotificationType.Success)
	{
		if (!_initialized)
		{
			Initialize();
		}
		string prefixedMessage = type switch
		{
			NotificationType.Success => "[DM:SUCCESS]", 
			NotificationType.Error => "[DM:ERROR]", 
			NotificationType.Info => "[DM:INFO]", 
			NotificationType.Warning => "[DM:WARNING]", 
			_ => "[DM:SUCCESS]", 
		} + message;
		Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] 📤 Pushing {0} notification with prefix: {1}", type, prefixedMessage));
		NotificationText.Push(prefixedMessage);
		Logger.Info("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] ✅ Notification pushed to queue");
	}

	[Obsolete("Use ShowNotification(string, NotificationType) instead")]
	public static void ShowNotification(string message, bool isSuccess)
	{
		ShowNotification(message, (!isSuccess) ? NotificationType.Error : NotificationType.Success);
	}

	public static void ScheduleStyleRestoration()
	{
		if (_activeRestorationCoroutine != null && _notificationTextInstance != null)
		{
			_notificationTextInstance.StopCoroutine(_activeRestorationCoroutine);
			Logger.Verbose("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] Cancelled previous restoration coroutine");
		}
		NotificationText notificationText = _notificationTextInstance ?? Object.FindObjectOfType<NotificationText>();
		if (notificationText != null)
		{
			_activeRestorationCoroutine = notificationText.StartCoroutine(RestoreStyleAfterDelay());
		}
	}

	private static IEnumerator RestoreStyleAfterDelay()
	{
		yield return (object)new WaitForSeconds(3.5f);
		RestoreOriginalStyle();
		_activeRestorationCoroutine = null;
		Logger.Verbose("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] Style restoration completed");
	}

	private static Image FindOriginalBackgroundImage(FadeGroup fadeGroup)
	{
		try
		{
			Image[] images = fadeGroup.GetComponentsInChildren<Image>(true);
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] Found {0} Image components in fadeGroup", images.Length));
			foreach (Image image in images)
			{
				if (image.color.r < 0.3f && image.color.g < 0.3f && image.color.b < 0.3f)
				{
					Logger.Info(string.Format("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] Found original background: {0}, color: {1}", image.gameObject.name, image.color));
					return image;
				}
			}
			Logger.Warning("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] ⚠️ Could not find original background");
			return null;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[NotificationStyleCustomizer] Error finding original background: {0}", arg));
			return null;
		}
	}
}



```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Services/SoundManager.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.IO;
using System.Reflection;
using FMOD;
using FMOD.Studio;
using FMODUnity;

namespace DuckMarket.Services;

public static class SoundManager
{
	private static Sound? _soldSound;

	private static Sound? _errorSound;

	private static Sound? _successSound;

	private static bool _initialized;

	private static string _errorMessage = "";

	public static void Initialize()
	{
		Logger.Info("[SoundManager] ========== Initialize() called ==========");
		if (_initialized)
		{
			Logger.Info("[SoundManager] Already initialized");
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			Logger.Info("[SoundManager] Starting initialization...");
			string location = Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly().Location;
			string directoryName = Path.GetDirectoryName(location);
			Logger.Info("[SoundManager] Assembly location: " + location);
			Logger.Info("[SoundManager] Mod directory: " + directoryName);
			string soldSoundPath = null;
			string[] array = new string[2]
			{
				Path.Combine(directoryName, "resources", "sold.wav"),
				Path.Combine(directoryName, "sold.wav")
			};
			foreach (string candidatePath in array)
			{
				Logger.Info("[SoundManager] Checking path: " + candidatePath);
				if (File.Exists(candidatePath))
				{
					soldSoundPath = candidatePath;
					Logger.Info("[SoundManager] ✅ Found sold.wav at: " + candidatePath);
					break;
				}
				Logger.Warning("[SoundManager] ❌ Not found at: " + candidatePath);
			}
			FMOD.System coreSystem;
			if (soldSoundPath != null)
			{
				Logger.Info("[SoundManager] Loading sold sound from: " + soldSoundPath);
				coreSystem = RuntimeManager.CoreSystem;
				Sound value = default(Sound);
				RESULT val = coreSystem.createSound(soldSoundPath, (MODE)9, out value);
				if ((int)val == 0)
				{
					_soldSound = value;
					Logger.Info("[SoundManager] ✅ Loaded sold.wav successfully");
				}
				else
				{
					Logger.Error(string.Format("[SoundManager] FMOD failed to create sold sound: {0}", val));
				}
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Warning("[SoundManager] sold.wav not found, sold sound will be unavailable");
			}
			string errorSoundPath = null;
			array = new string[2]
			{
				Path.Combine(directoryName, "resources", "error.wav"),
				Path.Combine(directoryName, "error.wav")
			};
			foreach (string candidatePath in array)
			{
				Logger.Info("[SoundManager] Checking path: " + candidatePath);
				if (File.Exists(candidatePath))
				{
					errorSoundPath = candidatePath;
					Logger.Info("[SoundManager] ✅ Found error.wav at: " + candidatePath);
					break;
				}
				Logger.Warning("[SoundManager] ❌ Not found at: " + candidatePath);
			}
			if (errorSoundPath != null)
			{
				Logger.Info("[SoundManager] Loading error sound from: " + errorSoundPath);
				coreSystem = RuntimeManager.CoreSystem;
				Sound value2 = default(Sound);
				RESULT val2 = coreSystem.createSound(errorSoundPath, (MODE)9, out value2);
				if ((int)val2 == 0)
				{
					_errorSound = value2;
					Logger.Info("[SoundManager] ✅ Loaded error.wav successfully");
				}
				else
				{
					Logger.Error(string.Format("[SoundManager] FMOD failed to create error sound: {0}", val2));
				}
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Warning("[SoundManager] error.wav not found, error sound will be unavailable");
			}
			string successSoundPath = null;
			array = new string[2]
			{
				Path.Combine(directoryName, "resources", "success.wav"),
				Path.Combine(directoryName, "success.wav")
			};
			foreach (string candidatePath in array)
			{
				Logger.Info("[SoundManager] Checking path: " + candidatePath);
				if (File.Exists(candidatePath))
				{
					successSoundPath = candidatePath;
					Logger.Info("[SoundManager] ✅ Found success.wav at: " + candidatePath);
					break;
				}
				Logger.Warning("[SoundManager] ❌ Not found at: " + candidatePath);
			}
			if (successSoundPath != null)
			{
				Logger.Info("[SoundManager] Loading success sound from: " + successSoundPath);
				coreSystem = RuntimeManager.CoreSystem;
				Sound value3 = default(Sound);
				RESULT val3 = coreSystem.createSound(successSoundPath, (MODE)9, out value3);
				if ((int)val3 == 0)
				{
					_successSound = value3;
					Logger.Info("[SoundManager] ✅ Loaded success.wav successfully");
				}
				else
				{
					Logger.Error(string.Format("[SoundManager] FMOD failed to create success sound: {0}", val3));
				}
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Warning("[SoundManager] success.wav not found, success sound will be unavailable");
			}
			_initialized = true;
			Logger.Info("[SoundManager] ✅ Initialized successfully");
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			_errorMessage = "Exception during initialization: " + ex.Message + " " + ex.StackTrace;
			Logger.Error("[SoundManager] " + _errorMessage);
			_initialized = true;
		}
	}

	public static void PlaySoldSound()
	{
		if (!_initialized)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[SoundManager] Not initialized, initializing now...");
			Initialize();
		}
		if (!_soldSound.HasValue)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[SoundManager] Sold sound not loaded, cannot play");
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			Bus bus = RuntimeManager.GetBus("bus:/Master/SFX");
			ChannelGroup val = default(ChannelGroup);
			bus.getChannelGroup(out val);
			FMOD.System coreSystem = RuntimeManager.CoreSystem;
			Channel val3 = default(Channel);
			RESULT val2 = coreSystem.playSound(_soldSound.Value, val, false, out val3);
			if ((int)val2 != 0)
			{
				Logger.Error(string.Format("[SoundManager] FMOD failed to play sold sound: {0}", val2));
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Info("[SoundManager] 🔊 Played sold sound");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[SoundManager] Error playing sold sound: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	public static void PlayErrorSound()
	{
		if (!_initialized)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[SoundManager] Not initialized, initializing now...");
			Initialize();
		}
		if (!_errorSound.HasValue)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[SoundManager] Error sound not loaded, cannot play");
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			Bus bus = RuntimeManager.GetBus("bus:/Master/SFX");
			ChannelGroup val = default(ChannelGroup);
			bus.getChannelGroup(out val);
			FMOD.System coreSystem = RuntimeManager.CoreSystem;
			Channel val3 = default(Channel);
			RESULT val2 = coreSystem.playSound(_errorSound.Value, val, false, out val3);
			if ((int)val2 != 0)
			{
				Logger.Error(string.Format("[SoundManager] FMOD failed to play error sound: {0}", val2));
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Info("[SoundManager] 🔊 Played error sound");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[SoundManager] Error playing error sound: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	public static void PlaySuccessSound()
	{
		if (!_initialized)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[SoundManager] Not initialized, initializing now...");
			Initialize();
		}
		if (!_successSound.HasValue)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[SoundManager] Success sound not loaded, cannot play");
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			Bus bus = RuntimeManager.GetBus("bus:/Master/SFX");
			ChannelGroup val = default(ChannelGroup);
			bus.getChannelGroup(out val);
			FMOD.System coreSystem = RuntimeManager.CoreSystem;
			Channel val3 = default(Channel);
			RESULT val2 = coreSystem.playSound(_successSound.Value, val, false, out val3);
			if ((int)val2 != 0)
			{
				Logger.Error(string.Format("[SoundManager] FMOD failed to play success sound: {0}", val2));
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Info("[SoundManager] 🔊 Played success sound");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[SoundManager] Error playing success sound: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	public static void Cleanup()
	{
		try
		{
			Sound value;
			if (_soldSound.HasValue)
			{
				value = _soldSound.Value;
				value.release();
				_soldSound = null;
				Logger.Info("[SoundManager] Released sold sound");
			}
			if (_errorSound.HasValue)
			{
				value = _errorSound.Value;
				value.release();
				_errorSound = null;
				Logger.Info("[SoundManager] Released error sound");
			}
			_initialized = false;
			Logger.Info("[SoundManager] Cleanup completed");
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[SoundManager] Error during cleanup: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	public static string GetErrorMessage()
	{
		return _errorMessage;
	}

	public static bool IsReady()
	{
		if (_initialized)
		{
			return _soldSound.HasValue;
		}
		return false;
	}
}



```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.UI.Components/PurchaseOrderEntryUI.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using DuckMarket.Models;
using TMPro;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UI;

namespace DuckMarket.UI.Components;

public class PurchaseOrderEntryUI : MonoBehaviour
{
	private readonly Color _pendingColor = new Color(0.2f, 0.8f, 0.2f);

	private readonly Color _partialColor = new Color(0.8f, 0.8f, 0.2f);

	private readonly Color _expiredColor = new Color(0.8f, 0.2f, 0.2f);

	private readonly Color _completedColor = new Color(0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f);

	private PurchaseOrder _order;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _mainText;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _subText;

	private Image _progressBar;

	private Image _statusIndicator;

	private Button _actionButton;

	public void Initialize(PurchaseOrder order, Action<PurchaseOrder> onActionClick)
	{
		_order = order;
		SetupUiComponents();
		UpdateDisplay();

		if (_actionButton == null || onActionClick == null)
		{
			return;
		}

		_actionButton.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
		_actionButton.onClick.AddListener(() => onActionClick(order));
	}

	private void SetupUiComponents()
	{
		_mainText = GetOrCreateText("MainText");
		_subText = GetOrCreateText("SubText");
		_progressBar = GetOrCreateProgressBar("ProgressBar");
		_statusIndicator = GetOrCreateStatusIndicator("StatusIndicator");
		_actionButton = GetComponent<Button>();
	}

	private TextMeshProUGUI GetOrCreateText(string name)
	{
		Transform child = transform.Find(name);
		if (child == null)
		{
			child = new GameObject(name).transform;
			child.SetParent(transform, false);
		}

		return child.GetComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>() ?? child.gameObject.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
	}

	private Image GetOrCreateProgressBar(string name)
	{
		Transform child = transform.Find(name);
		if (child == null)
		{
			child = new GameObject(name).transform;
			child.SetParent(transform, false);

			RectTransform rect = child.gameObject.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
			rect.anchorMin = new Vector2(0f, 0.5f);
			rect.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
			rect.offsetMin = new Vector2(10f, -5f);
			rect.offsetMax = new Vector2(-10f, 5f);
		}

		return child.GetComponent<Image>() ?? child.gameObject.AddComponent<Image>();
	}

	private Image GetOrCreateStatusIndicator(string name)
	{
		Transform child = transform.Find(name);
		if (child == null)
		{
			child = new GameObject(name).transform;
			child.SetParent(transform, false);

			RectTransform rect = child.gameObject.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
			rect.anchorMin = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
			rect.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
			rect.pivot = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
			rect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(10f, 10f);
			rect.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(-5f, 0f);
		}

		return child.GetComponent<Image>() ?? child.gameObject.AddComponent<Image>();
	}

	private void UpdateDisplay()
	{
		if (_order == null)
		{
			return;
		}

		if (_mainText != null)
		{
			_mainText.text = FormatMainText();
			_mainText.fontSize = 16f;
			_mainText.fontStyle = FontStyles.Bold;
		}

		if (_subText != null)
		{
			_subText.text = FormatSubText();
			_subText.fontSize = 12f;
			_subText.color = new Color(0.8f, 0.8f, 0.8f);
		}

		if (_progressBar != null)
		{
			float progress = 0f;
			if (_order.Quantity > 0)
			{
				progress = (float)_order.FulfilledQuantity / _order.Quantity;
			}
			_progressBar.fillAmount = progress;
			_progressBar.type = Image.Type.Filled;
			_progressBar.fillMethod = Image.FillMethod.Horizontal;
			_progressBar.color = GetProgressColor(progress);
		}

		if (_statusIndicator != null)
		{
			_statusIndicator.color = GetStatusColor();
		}
	}

	private string FormatMainText()
	{
		string quantityText = _order.Quantity > 0 ? string.Format(" ({0}/{1})", _order.FulfilledQuantity, _order.Quantity) : string.Empty;
		return string.Format("[求购] {0}{1} - ${2:N0}/个", _order.ItemName, quantityText, _order.PricePerUnit);
	}

	private string FormatSubText()
	{
		List<string> sections = new List<string> { "买家: " + _order.BuyerName };

		if (_order.MinDurability.HasValue)
		{
			sections.Add(string.Format("耐久≥{0:F0}%", _order.MinDurability.Value));
		}

		if (_order.RemainingSeconds > 0)
		{
			sections.Add("剩余: " + _order.GetFormattedRemainingTime());
		}
		else
		{
			sections.Add("已过期");
		}

		long remainingValue = _order.RemainingQuantity * _order.PricePerUnit;
		if (remainingValue > 0)
		{
			sections.Add(string.Format("总值: ${0:N0}", remainingValue));
		}

		return string.Join(" | ", sections);
	}

	private Color GetProgressColor(float progress)
	{
		if (progress >= 1f)
		{
			return _completedColor;
		}

		if (progress >= 0.5f)
		{
			return _partialColor;
		}

		if (progress > 0f)
		{
			return Color.Lerp(_pendingColor, _partialColor, progress * 2f);
		}

		return _pendingColor;
	}

	private Color GetStatusColor()
	{
		switch (_order.Status?.ToLower())
		{
		case "pending":
			return _pendingColor;
		case "partial":
			return _partialColor;
		case "completed":
			return _completedColor;
		case "expired":
		case "cancelled":
			return _expiredColor;
		default:
			return Color.white;
		}
	}

	public void UpdateTimeDisplay()
	{
		if (_subText != null && _order != null)
		{
			_subText.text = FormatSubText();
		}
	}
}

```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.UI.Options/DuckMarketBoolProvider.cs`:

```cs
using DuckMarket.Core;

namespace DuckMarket.UI.Options;

public class DuckMarketBoolProvider : OptionsProviderBase
{
	private string _key = "";

	private bool _defaultValue;

	private readonly string[] _options = new string[2]
	{
		"False",
		"True"
	};

	public override string Key => _key;

	public void Initialize(string key, bool defaultValue)
	{
		_key = key;
		_defaultValue = defaultValue;
		Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarketBoolProvider] Initialized: key={0}, defaultValue={1}", key, defaultValue));
	}

	public override string GetCurrentOption()
	{
		if (!DuckMarketSettings.GetBoolSetting(_key, _defaultValue))
		{
			return "False";
		}
		return "True";
	}

	public override string[] GetOptions()
	{
		return _options;
	}

	public override void Set(int index)
	{
		if (index >= 0 && index < _options.Length)
		{
			bool isEnabled = index == 1;
			DuckMarketSettings.SetBoolSetting(_key, isEnabled);
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarketBoolProvider] Set {0} = {1}", _key, isEnabled));
		}
	}
}

```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.UI.Options/DuckMarketOptionsTab.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Collections;
using System.Linq;
using System.Reflection;
using Cysharp.Threading.Tasks;
using DuckMarket.Core;
using Duckov.Options.UI;
using TMPro;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;
using UnityEngine.UI;

namespace DuckMarket.UI.Options;

public static class DuckMarketOptionsTab
{
	private static GameObject _tabButton;

	private static GameObject _tabContent;

	private static GameObject _dropdownTemplate;

	private static GameObject _sliderTemplate;

	private static bool _isInitialized;

	public static async UniTask InitializeAsync(OptionsPanel optionsPanelComponent)
	{
		if (_isInitialized)
		{
			Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Already initialized, skipping");
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			Logger.Info("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Initializing DuckMarket options tab...");
			if (optionsPanelComponent == null)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] OptionsPanel component is null");
				return;
			}
			GameObject gameObject = optionsPanelComponent.gameObject;
			Logger.Info("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Found OptionsPanel: " + gameObject.name);
			OptionsPanel_TabButton[] componentsInChildren = gameObject.GetComponentsInChildren<OptionsPanel_TabButton>(includeInactive: true);
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Found {0} tab buttons:", componentsInChildren.Length));
			OptionsPanel_TabButton[] array = componentsInChildren;
			foreach (OptionsPanel_TabButton optionsPanel_TabButton in array)
			{
				Logger.Info("[DuckMarketOptionsTab]   - " + optionsPanel_TabButton.name);
			}
			OptionsPanel_TabButton optionsPanel_TabButton2 = componentsInChildren.FirstOrDefault((OptionsPanel_TabButton b) => b.name == "Common");
			if (optionsPanel_TabButton2 == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Template button not found");
				return;
			}
			Logger.Info("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Using template: " + optionsPanel_TabButton2.name);
			_tabButton = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(optionsPanel_TabButton2.gameObject, optionsPanel_TabButton2.transform.parent);
			_tabButton.name = "DuckMarketTab";
			TextMeshProUGUI componentInChildren = _tabButton.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
			if (componentInChildren != null)
			{
				MonoBehaviour[] components = componentInChildren.GetComponents<MonoBehaviour>();
				foreach (MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour in components)
				{
					if (monoBehaviour.GetType().Name == "TextLocalizor")
					{
						UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(monoBehaviour);
						Logger.Info("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Destroyed original TextLocalizor");
					}
				}
				Type type = Type.GetType("SodaCraft.Localizations.TextLocalizor, Assembly-CSharp");
				if (type != null)
				{
					MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour2 = componentInChildren.gameObject.AddComponent(type) as MonoBehaviour;
					if (monoBehaviour2 != null)
					{
						FieldInfo field = type.GetField("key", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
						if (field != null)
						{
							field.SetValue(monoBehaviour2, "options.tab.duckmarket");
							Logger.Info("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Set new TextLocalizor key to 'options.tab.duckmarket'");
						}
						MethodInfo method = type.GetMethod("RefreshText", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
						if (method != null)
						{
							method.Invoke(monoBehaviour2, null);
							Logger.Info("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Refreshed tab button text");
						}
					}
				}
				else
				{
					componentInChildren.text = LocalizationManager.GetText("options.tab.duckmarket", "鸭鸭市场");
					Logger.Warning("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Could not find TextLocalizor type, using manual text");
				}
			}
			OptionsPanel_TabButton component = _tabButton.GetComponent<OptionsPanel_TabButton>();
			FieldInfo field2 = typeof(OptionsPanel_TabButton).GetField("tab", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			FieldInfo field3 = typeof(OptionsPanel_TabButton).GetField("selectedIndicator", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field2 == null || field3 == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Failed to get tab or selectedIndicator field");
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(_tabButton);
				return;
			}
			Logger.Info("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] tabField: " + ((field2 != null) ? "found" : "null"));
			Logger.Info("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] selectedIndicatorField: " + ((field3 != null) ? "found" : "null"));
			GameObject gameObject2 = field2.GetValue(optionsPanel_TabButton2) as GameObject;
			if (gameObject2 == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Template tab is null");
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(_tabButton);
				return;
			}
			GameObject gameObject3 = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(gameObject2, gameObject2.transform.parent);
			gameObject3.name = "DuckMarketTabContent";
			gameObject3.SetActive(value: false);
			foreach (Transform item in gameObject3.transform)
			{
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(item.gameObject);
			}
			field2.SetValue(component, gameObject3);
			_tabContent = gameObject3;
			Logger.Info("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] New tab content created and cleared");
			await UniTask.Yield();
			await FindTemplatesAsync();
			await CreateSettingsUIAsync();
			RegisterToOptionsPanel(optionsPanelComponent);
			_isInitialized = true;
			Logger.Info("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] ✅ DuckMarket options tab initialized successfully");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Error initializing options tab: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static async UniTask FindTemplatesAsync()
	{
		await UniTask.Yield();
		Logger.Info("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Finding templates...");
		_dropdownTemplate = UnityEngine.Object.FindObjectsOfType<OptionsUIEntry_Dropdown>(includeInactive: true).FirstOrDefault((OptionsUIEntry_Dropdown d) => d.name == "UI_Resolution")?.gameObject;
		if (_dropdownTemplate != null)
		{
			Logger.Info("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Found Dropdown template: " + _dropdownTemplate.name);
		}
		else
		{
			Logger.Error("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Dropdown template not found!");
		}
		_sliderTemplate = UnityEngine.Object.FindObjectsOfType<OptionsUIEntry_Slider>(includeInactive: true).FirstOrDefault((OptionsUIEntry_Slider s) => s.name == "UI_MouseSensitivity")?.gameObject;
		if (_sliderTemplate != null)
		{
			Logger.Info("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Found Slider template: " + _sliderTemplate.name);
		}
		else
		{
			Logger.Error("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Slider template not found!");
		}
	}

	private static async UniTask CreateSettingsUIAsync()
	{
		await UniTask.Yield();
		if (_dropdownTemplate == null || _sliderTemplate == null)
		{
			Logger.Error("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Templates not found, cannot create settings UI");
			return;
		}
		Logger.Info("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Creating settings UI...");
		CreateSteamIdDisplay();
		CreateToggleSetting("DuckMarket_EnableNotifications", "options.enable_notifications", "启用售出通知", DuckMarketSettings.EnableNotifications);
		CreateToggleSetting("DuckMarket_NotificationSound", "options.notification_sound", "通知声音", DuckMarketSettings.NotificationSound);
		CreateSliderSetting("DuckMarket_NotificationDuration", "options.notification_duration", "通知显示时长", DuckMarketSettings.NotificationDuration, 1f, 10f);
		CreateToggleSetting("DuckMarket_ShowRecommendedPrice", "options.show_recommended_price", "显示推荐价格", DuckMarketSettings.ShowRecommendedPrice);
		CreateToggleSetting("DuckMarket_EnableDebugLog", "options.enable_debug_log", "启用调试日志", DuckMarketSettings.EnableDebugLog);
		Logger.Info("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Settings UI created successfully");
	}

	private static void CreateToggleSetting(string key, string localizationKey, string defaultText, bool defaultValue)
	{
		GameObject gameObject = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(_dropdownTemplate, _tabContent.transform);
		gameObject.name = key;
		gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
		OptionsUIEntry_Dropdown component = gameObject.GetComponent<OptionsUIEntry_Dropdown>();
		if (component == null)
		{
			Logger.Error("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Failed to find OptionsUIEntry_Dropdown component on " + gameObject.name);
			return;
		}
		FieldInfo field = component.GetType().GetField("provider", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
		if (field != null)
		{
			DuckMarketBoolProvider duckMarketBoolProvider = gameObject.AddComponent<DuckMarketBoolProvider>();
			duckMarketBoolProvider.Initialize(key, defaultValue);
			field.SetValue(component, duckMarketBoolProvider);
			Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Set custom provider for " + key);
		}
		TextMeshProUGUI componentInChildren = gameObject.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
		if (componentInChildren != null)
		{
			Type type = Type.GetType("SodaCraft.Localizations.TextLocalizor, Assembly-CSharp");
			if (type != null)
			{
				Component component2 = componentInChildren.GetComponent(type);
				if (component2 != null)
				{
					FieldInfo field2 = type.GetField("key", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
					if (field2 != null)
					{
						field2.SetValue(component2, key);
						MethodInfo method = type.GetMethod("RefreshText", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
						if (method != null)
						{
							method.Invoke(component2, null);
						}
						Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Updated TextLocalizor key to '" + key + "' for setting");
					}
				}
				else
				{
					MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour = componentInChildren.gameObject.AddComponent(type) as MonoBehaviour;
					if (monoBehaviour != null)
					{
						FieldInfo field3 = type.GetField("key", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
						if (field3 != null)
						{
							field3.SetValue(monoBehaviour, key);
							MethodInfo method2 = type.GetMethod("RefreshText", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
							if (method2 != null)
							{
								method2.Invoke(monoBehaviour, null);
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			else
			{
				componentInChildren.text = defaultText;
				Logger.Warning("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Could not find TextLocalizor type, using manual text: " + defaultText);
			}
		}
		Logger.Info("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Created Toggle setting: " + key);
	}

	private static void CreateSliderSetting(string key, string localizationKey, string defaultText, float defaultValue, float minValue, float maxValue)
	{
		GameObject gameObject = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(_sliderTemplate, _tabContent.transform);
		gameObject.name = key;
		gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
		OptionsUIEntry_Slider component = gameObject.GetComponent<OptionsUIEntry_Slider>();
		if (component == null)
		{
			Logger.Error("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Failed to find OptionsUIEntry_Slider component on " + gameObject.name);
			return;
		}
		Type type = component.GetType();
		FieldInfo field = type.GetField("key", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
		FieldInfo field2 = type.GetField("defaultValue", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
		FieldInfo field3 = type.GetField("slider", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
		if (field != null)
		{
			field.SetValue(component, key);
		}
		if (field2 != null)
		{
			field2.SetValue(component, defaultValue);
		}
		if (field3 != null)
		{
			Slider slider = field3.GetValue(component) as Slider;
			if (slider != null)
			{
				slider.minValue = minValue;
				slider.maxValue = maxValue;
				slider.value = DuckMarketSettings.GetFloatSetting(key, defaultValue);
			}
		}
		Logger.Info("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Created Slider setting: " + key);
	}

	private static void CreateSteamIdDisplay()
	{
		GameObject gameObject = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(_dropdownTemplate, _tabContent.transform);
		gameObject.name = "DuckMarket_SteamIdDisplay";
		gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
		OptionsUIEntry_Dropdown component = gameObject.GetComponent<OptionsUIEntry_Dropdown>();
		if (component == null)
		{
			Logger.Error("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Failed to find OptionsUIEntry_Dropdown component for SteamIdDisplay");
			return;
		}
		FieldInfo field = component.GetType().GetField("provider", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
		if (field != null)
		{
			DuckMarketSteamIdProvider duckMarketSteamIdProvider = gameObject.AddComponent<DuckMarketSteamIdProvider>();
			duckMarketSteamIdProvider.Initialize();
			field.SetValue(component, duckMarketSteamIdProvider);
			Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Set custom provider for SteamIdDisplay");
		}
		TMP_Dropdown componentInChildren = gameObject.GetComponentInChildren<TMP_Dropdown>(includeInactive: true);
		if (componentInChildren != null)
		{
			componentInChildren.interactable = false;
		}
		Logger.Info("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Created Steam ID display");
	}

	private static void RegisterToOptionsPanel(OptionsPanel optionsPanel)
	{
		try
		{
			Type typeFromHandle = typeof(OptionsPanel);
			FieldInfo field = typeFromHandle.GetField("tabButtons", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Failed to get tabButtons field");
				return;
			}
			if (!(field.GetValue(optionsPanel) is IList list))
			{
				Logger.Error("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] tabButtons is null");
				return;
			}
			OptionsPanel_TabButton component = _tabButton.GetComponent<OptionsPanel_TabButton>();
			if (component != null)
			{
				list.Add(component);
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] ✅ Registered to OptionsPanel, total tabs: {0}", list.Count));
				MethodInfo method = typeFromHandle.GetMethod("Setup", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				if (method != null)
				{
					method.Invoke(optionsPanel, null);
					Logger.Info("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] ✅ Called OptionsPanel.Setup() to register click events");
				}
				else
				{
					Logger.Error("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Failed to find Setup method");
				}
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Error("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Failed to get OptionsPanel_TabButton component");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarketOptionsTab] Error registering to OptionsPanel: {0}", arg));
		}
	}
}
```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.UI.Options/DuckMarketSliderProvider.cs`:

```cs
using DuckMarket.Core;

namespace DuckMarket.UI.Options;

public class DuckMarketSliderProvider : OptionsProviderBase
{
	private string _key = "";

	private float _defaultValue;

	public override string Key => _key;

	public void Initialize(string key, float defaultValue)
	{
		_key = key;
		_defaultValue = defaultValue;
		Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarketSliderProvider] Initialized: key={0}, defaultValue={1}", key, defaultValue));
	}

	public override string GetCurrentOption()
	{
		return DuckMarketSettings.GetFloatSetting(_key, _defaultValue).ToString("F1");
	}

	public override string[] GetOptions()
	{
		return new string[0];
	}

	public override void Set(int index)
	{
	}
}
```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.UI.Options/DuckMarketSteamIdProvider.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using Steamworks;

namespace DuckMarket.UI.Options;

public class DuckMarketSteamIdProvider : OptionsProviderBase
{
	private string _displayText = "N/A";

	public override string Key => "DuckMarket_SteamId";

	public void Initialize()
	{
		try
		{
			string personaName = SteamFriends.GetPersonaName();
			string steamIdText = ((object)SteamUser.GetSteamID()/*cast due to .constrained prefix*/).ToString();
			_displayText = personaName + " (" + steamIdText + ")";
			Logger.Info("[DuckMarketSteamIdProvider] Display Text: " + _displayText);
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[DuckMarketSteamIdProvider] Failed to get Steam info: " + ex.Message);
			_displayText = "N/A";
		}
	}

	public override string[] GetOptions()
	{
		return new string[1] { _displayText };
	}

	public override string GetCurrentOption()
	{
		return _displayText;
	}

	public override void Set(int index)
	{
		Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarketSteamIdProvider] Steam ID is read-only, ignoring Set() call");
	}
}
```
