`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.UI/GameStyleSearchBar.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Linq;
using DuckMarket.Core;
using TMPro;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.Events;
using UnityEngine.UI;

namespace DuckMarket.UI;

public class GameStyleSearchBar : MonoBehaviour
{
	public Button _searchButton;

	public Button _refreshButton;

	private TMP_InputField _searchInput;

	public GameObject SearchBarContainer { get; private set; }

	public string SearchText => _searchInput != null ? _searchInput.text : string.Empty;

	public event Action<string> OnSearchTextChanged;

	public event Action OnSearchButtonClicked;

	public event Action OnRefreshButtonClicked;

	private void Update()
	{
		if (_searchInput == null || !_searchInput.isFocused || !Input.GetMouseButtonDown(0))
		{
			return;
		}

		if (SearchBarContainer == null)
		{
			return;
		}

		RectTransform containerRect = SearchBarContainer.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
		if (containerRect != null && !RectTransformUtility.RectangleContainsScreenPoint(containerRect, Input.mousePosition, null))
		{
			_searchInput.DeactivateInputField(false);
		}
	}

	private void OnDestroy()
	{
		if (_searchInput == null)
		{
			return;
		}

		_searchInput.onValueChanged.RemoveListener(OnInputValueChanged);
		_searchInput.onSelect.RemoveListener(OnInputFieldFocused);
		_searchInput.onDeselect.RemoveListener(OnInputFieldUnfocused);
	}

	public void SetSearchText(string queryText)
	{
		if (_searchInput != null)
		{
			_searchInput.SetTextWithoutNotify(queryText);
		}
	}

	public void UpdatePlaceholder(string newPlaceholder)
	{
		try
		{
			if (_searchInput?.placeholder is TextMeshProUGUI placeholderText)
			{
				placeholderText.text = newPlaceholder;
				Logger.Verbose("[GameStyleSearchBar] ✅ 更新占位符: " + newPlaceholder);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception exception)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[GameStyleSearchBar] ❌ 更新占位符失败: {0}", exception));
		}
	}

	public static GameStyleSearchBar Create(Transform parent, TextMeshProUGUI templateText, Button templateButton = null, string placeholder = null, float height = 50f, float yOffset = 0f, bool includeButtons = true)
	{
		try
		{
			GameObject container = new GameObject("DuckMarketSearchBarContainer");
			container.transform.SetParent(parent, false);

			GameStyleSearchBar searchBar = container.AddComponent<GameStyleSearchBar>();
			searchBar.SearchBarContainer = container;

			RectTransform containerRect = container.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
			containerRect.anchorMin = new Vector2(0f, 1f);
			containerRect.anchorMax = new Vector2(0f, 1f);
			containerRect.pivot = new Vector2(0f, 1f);
			containerRect.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(0f, yOffset);
			containerRect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0f, height);

			HorizontalLayoutGroup layoutGroup = container.AddComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
			layoutGroup.childControlWidth = false;
			layoutGroup.childControlHeight = false;
			layoutGroup.childForceExpandWidth = false;
			layoutGroup.childForceExpandHeight = false;
			layoutGroup.spacing = 10f;
			layoutGroup.padding = new RectOffset(0, 0, 0, 0);

			ContentSizeFitter sizeFitter = container.AddComponent<ContentSizeFitter>();
			sizeFitter.horizontalFit = ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
			sizeFitter.verticalFit = ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
			container.AddComponent<LayoutElement>().preferredHeight = height;

			BuildInputArea(searchBar, container.transform, templateText, placeholder, height);
			RegisterInputEvents(searchBar);

			if (includeButtons)
			{
				searchBar._searchButton = CreateSearchButton(container.transform, templateButton, templateText, height, LocalizationStrings.GetSearchButtonLabel());
				if (searchBar._searchButton != null)
				{
					searchBar._searchButton.onClick.AddListener(() => searchBar.OnSearchButtonClicked?.Invoke());
				}

				searchBar._refreshButton = CreateSearchButton(container.transform, templateButton, templateText, height, LocalizationStrings.GetRefreshButtonLabel());
				if (searchBar._refreshButton != null)
				{
					searchBar._refreshButton.onClick.AddListener(() => searchBar.OnRefreshButtonClicked?.Invoke());
				}
			}

			Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[GameStyleSearchBar] ✅ 搜索框创建成功 (高度: {0}px, Y偏移: {1}px, 字符限制: 24)", height, yOffset));
			return searchBar;
		}
		catch (Exception exception)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[GameStyleSearchBar] ❌ 创建搜索框失败: {0}", exception));
			return null;
		}
	}

	private static void BuildInputArea(GameStyleSearchBar searchBar, Transform parent, TextMeshProUGUI templateText, string placeholder, float height)
	{
		GameObject searchBarObject = new GameObject("SearchBar");
		searchBarObject.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
		searchBarObject.AddComponent<RectTransform>().sizeDelta = new Vector2(350f, height);

		Image searchBarBackground = searchBarObject.AddComponent<Image>();
		searchBarBackground.color = new Color(0f, 0f, 0f, 0.537f);
		searchBarBackground.type = Image.Type.Sliced;

		Sprite rect16Sprite = Resources.FindObjectsOfTypeAll<Sprite>().FirstOrDefault(sprite => sprite.name == "Rect16");
		if (rect16Sprite != null)
		{
			searchBarBackground.sprite = rect16Sprite;
			Logger.Verbose("[GameStyleSearchBar] ✅ 找到Rect16 Sprite");
		}
		else
		{
			Logger.Warning("[GameStyleSearchBar] ⚠️ 未找到Rect16 Sprite，使用纯色背景");
		}

		LayoutElement inputLayout = searchBarObject.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
		inputLayout.preferredWidth = 350f;
		inputLayout.preferredHeight = height;

		searchBar._searchInput = searchBarObject.AddComponent<TMP_InputField>();
		searchBar._searchInput.characterLimit = 24;

		GameObject textArea = new GameObject("Text Area");
		textArea.transform.SetParent(searchBarObject.transform, false);

		RectTransform textViewport = textArea.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
		textViewport.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
		textViewport.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
		textViewport.offsetMin = new Vector2(16f, 8f);
		textViewport.offsetMax = new Vector2(-16f, -8f);
		textArea.AddComponent<RectMask2D>();

		TextMeshProUGUI inputText = CreateTextComponent(textArea.transform, "Text", string.Empty, templateText);
		TextMeshProUGUI placeholderText = CreateTextComponent(textArea.transform, "Placeholder", placeholder ?? LocalizationStrings.GetSearchPlaceholder(), templateText);
		placeholderText.color = new Color(1f, 1f, 1f, 0.3f);

		searchBar._searchInput.textViewport = textViewport;
		searchBar._searchInput.textComponent = inputText;
		searchBar._searchInput.placeholder = placeholderText;
		searchBar._searchInput.caretWidth = 2;
		searchBar._searchInput.caretColor = Color.white;
		searchBar._searchInput.customCaretColor = true;
		searchBar._searchInput.caretBlinkRate = 0.85f;

		Logger.Verbose("[GameStyleSearchBar]   - ✅ 配置输入框光标");
	}

	private static void RegisterInputEvents(GameStyleSearchBar searchBar)
	{
		searchBar._searchInput.onValueChanged.AddListener(searchBar.OnInputValueChanged);
		searchBar._searchInput.onSelect.AddListener(searchBar.OnInputFieldFocused);
		searchBar._searchInput.onDeselect.AddListener(searchBar.OnInputFieldUnfocused);
	}

	private static GameObject CloneFormulaRegisterButton()
	{
		try
		{
			GameObject formulaRegisterView = UnityEngine.Object.FindObjectsOfType<GameObject>(true).FirstOrDefault(go => go.name == "FormulaRegisterView");
			if (formulaRegisterView == null)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[GameStyleSearchBar] ⚠️ 未找到FormulaRegisterView，使用默认按钮样式");
				return null;
			}

			Transform buttonTemplate = formulaRegisterView.transform.Find("Content/BtnContainer_1/btn open formula index");
			if (buttonTemplate == null)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[GameStyleSearchBar] ⚠️ FormulaRegisterView 按钮模板缺失");
				return null;
			}

			Logger.Verbose("[GameStyleSearchBar] ✅ 成功克隆FormulaRegisterView按钮");
			return Instantiate(buttonTemplate.gameObject);
		}
		catch (Exception exception)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[GameStyleSearchBar] ❌ 克隆FormulaRegisterView按钮失败: {0}", exception));
			return null;
		}
	}

	private static Button CreateSearchButton(Transform parent, Button templateButton, TextMeshProUGUI templateText, float height, string buttonText)
	{
		try
		{
			GameObject buttonObject = CloneFormulaRegisterButton();
			if (buttonObject == null && templateButton != null)
			{
				buttonObject = Instantiate(templateButton.gameObject);
			}
			if (buttonObject == null)
			{
				buttonObject = CreateDefaultButton(buttonText, templateText);
			}

			buttonObject.name = buttonText + "Button";
			buttonObject.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
			buttonObject.SetActive(false);

			Button button = buttonObject.GetComponent<Button>() ?? buttonObject.AddComponent<Button>();
			button.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
			StripConflictingComponents(buttonObject);
			UpdateAllButtonTexts(buttonObject, buttonText);
			EnsureLayout(buttonObject, height);
			buttonObject.SetActive(true);

			Logger.Verbose("[GameStyleSearchBar] ✅ 创建按钮: " + buttonText);
			return button;
		}
		catch (Exception exception)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[GameStyleSearchBar] ❌ 创建搜索按钮失败: {0}", exception));
			return null;
		}
	}

	private static GameObject CreateDefaultButton(string buttonText, TextMeshProUGUI templateText)
	{
		GameObject buttonObject = new GameObject("SearchButton");
		Image image = buttonObject.AddComponent<Image>();
		image.color = new Color(0.2f, 0.2f, 0.2f, 0.8f);
		image.type = Image.Type.Sliced;
		image.sprite = Resources.FindObjectsOfTypeAll<Sprite>().FirstOrDefault(sprite => sprite.name == "Rect16");

		GameObject textObject = new GameObject("Text");
		textObject.transform.SetParent(buttonObject.transform, false);
		TextMeshProUGUI textMesh = textObject.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
		textMesh.text = buttonText;
		textMesh.fontSize = 24f;
		textMesh.color = Color.white;
		textMesh.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
		textMesh.fontStyle = FontStyles.Bold;
		if (templateText != null && templateText.font != null)
		{
			textMesh.font = templateText.font;
		}

		RectTransform textRect = textObject.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
		textRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
		textRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
		textRect.sizeDelta = Vector2.zero;
		return buttonObject;
	}

	private static void StripConflictingComponents(GameObject buttonObject)
	{
		foreach (MonoBehaviour behaviour in buttonObject.GetComponentsInChildren<MonoBehaviour>(true))
		{
			if (behaviour == null)
			{
				continue;
			}

			string typeName = behaviour.GetType().Name;
			if (typeName == "ViewsProxy" || typeName == "PointerDownUpEvents" || typeName == "SizeDeltaToggle" || typeName == "TextLocalizor")
			{
				Destroy(behaviour);
			}
		}
	}

	private static void UpdateAllButtonTexts(GameObject buttonObject, string buttonText)
	{
		foreach (TextMeshProUGUI textMesh in buttonObject.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(true))
		{
			textMesh.text = buttonText;
		}
	}

	private static void EnsureLayout(GameObject buttonObject, float height)
	{
		RectTransform rect = buttonObject.GetComponent<RectTransform>() ?? buttonObject.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
		rect.anchorMin = new Vector2(0f, 0.5f);
		rect.anchorMax = new Vector2(0f, 0.5f);
		rect.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 0.5f);
		rect.anchoredPosition = Vector2.zero;
		rect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(120f, height);

		LayoutElement layout = buttonObject.GetComponent<LayoutElement>() ?? buttonObject.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
		layout.preferredWidth = 120f;
		layout.preferredHeight = height;
		layout.flexibleWidth = 0f;
		layout.flexibleHeight = 0f;
	}

	private static TextMeshProUGUI CreateTextComponent(Transform parent, string name, string initialText, TextMeshProUGUI template)
	{
		GameObject textObject = new GameObject(name);
		textObject.transform.SetParent(parent, false);

		TextMeshProUGUI textMesh = textObject.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
		textMesh.text = initialText;
		textMesh.fontSize = 24f;
		textMesh.color = new Color(1f, 1f, 1f, 0.502f);
		textMesh.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Left;
		textMesh.fontStyle = FontStyles.Bold;

		if (template != null && template.font != null)
		{
			textMesh.font = template.font;
		}
		else
		{
			TMP_FontAsset fallbackFont = Resources.FindObjectsOfTypeAll<TMP_FontAsset>().FirstOrDefault(font => font.name.Contains("ResourceHanRoundedCN-Medium"));
			if (fallbackFont != null)
			{
				textMesh.font = fallbackFont;
			}
		}

		RectTransform textRect = textObject.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
		textRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
		textRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
		textRect.sizeDelta = Vector2.zero;
		return textMesh;
	}

	private void OnInputValueChanged(string value)
	{
		OnSearchTextChanged?.Invoke(value);
	}

	private void OnInputFieldFocused(string value)
	{
		Logger.Info("[GameStyleSearchBar] 输入框获得焦点");
	}

	private void OnInputFieldUnfocused(string value)
	{
		Logger.Info("[GameStyleSearchBar] 输入框失去焦点");
		if (_searchInput != null && _searchInput.isFocused)
		{
			_searchInput.DeactivateInputField(false);
		}
	}

	public void ClearSearch()
	{
		if (_searchInput != null)
		{
			_searchInput.text = string.Empty;
		}
	}

	public void SetInteractable(bool interactable)
	{
		if (_searchInput != null)
		{
			_searchInput.interactable = interactable;
		}
	}
}

```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.UI/HoverAveragePriceDisplay.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Threading;
using Cysharp.Threading.Tasks;
using DuckMarket.Core;
using DuckMarket.Network;
using Duckov.UI;
using Duckov.Utilities;
using ItemStatsSystem;
using Saves;
using TMPro;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;

namespace DuckMarket.UI;

public class HoverAveragePriceDisplay : MonoBehaviour
{
	private class CacheEntry
	{
		public decimal? Price { get; set; }

		public DateTime Timestamp { get; set; }
	}

	private const float FontSize = 20f;

	private static readonly Color TextColor = new Color(0.6f, 0.8f, 1f, 1f);

	private static readonly TimeSpan CacheDuration = TimeSpan.FromMinutes(10.0);

	private readonly Dictionary<int, CacheEntry> _priceCache = new Dictionary<int, CacheEntry>();

	private CancellationTokenSource _loadCts;

	private int? _activeItemTypeId;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _text;

	private TextMeshProUGUI Text
	{
		get
		{
			if (_text == null)
			{
				_text = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(GameplayDataSettings.UIStyle.TemplateTextUGUI);
				_text.fontSize = 20f;
				_text.color = TextColor;
				_text.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Left;
				_text.enableWordWrapping = false;
				_text.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
			}
			return _text;
		}
	}

	private void Awake()
	{
		Logger.Info("[HoverAveragePriceDisplay] Initialized");
	}

	private void OnEnable()
	{
		ItemHoveringUI.onSetupItem += OnSetupItem;
		ItemHoveringUI.onSetupMeta += OnSetupMeta;
	}

	private void OnDisable()
	{
		ItemHoveringUI.onSetupItem -= OnSetupItem;
		ItemHoveringUI.onSetupMeta -= OnSetupMeta;
		CancelPendingRequest();
	}

	private void OnDestroy()
	{
		if (_text != null)
		{
			UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(_text.gameObject);
		}
	}

	private void OnSetupMeta(ItemHoveringUI ui, ItemMetaData data)
	{
		HideText();
		CancelPendingRequest();
	}

	private void OnSetupItem(ItemHoveringUI ui, Item item)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!DuckMarketSettings.ShowRecommendedPrice)
			{
				HideText();
				CancelPendingRequest();
				return;
			}
			if (!FleaMarketState.IsAuthenticated || item == null)
			{
				HideText();
				CancelPendingRequest();
				return;
			}
			_activeItemTypeId = item.TypeID;
			AttachText(ui);
			if (!TryUseCachedValue(item.TypeID))
			{
				CancelPendingRequest();
				_loadCts = new CancellationTokenSource();
				LoadAveragePriceAsync(item, _loadCts.Token).Forget();
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[HoverAveragePriceDisplay] Failed to handle hover setup: {0}", arg));
			HideText();
		}
	}

	private void AttachText(ItemHoveringUI ui)
	{
		TextMeshProUGUI priceText = Text;
		priceText.transform.SetParent(ui.LayoutParent, worldPositionStays: false);
		priceText.transform.localScale = Vector3.one;
		priceText.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
		priceText.text = GetPricePrefix() + " …";
	}

	private bool TryUseCachedValue(int itemTypeId)
	{
		if (_priceCache.TryGetValue(itemTypeId, out CacheEntry value))
		{
			if (DateTime.UtcNow - value.Timestamp < CacheDuration)
			{
				DisplayPrice(value.Price);
				return true;
			}
			_priceCache.Remove(itemTypeId);
		}
		return false;
	}

	private async UniTaskVoid LoadAveragePriceAsync(Item item, CancellationToken token)
	{
		try
		{
			float durabilityPercent = GetDurabilityPercent(item);
			int currentSlot = SavesSystem.CurrentSlot;
			ItemStatistics itemStatistics = await ApiClient.GetItemStatisticsAsync(item.TypeID, durabilityPercent, currentSlot);
			if (!token.IsCancellationRequested && _activeItemTypeId == item.TypeID)
			{
				decimal? price = itemStatistics?.market_price ?? itemStatistics?.base_market_price;
				_priceCache[item.TypeID] = new CacheEntry
				{
					Price = price,
					Timestamp = DateTime.UtcNow
				};
				DisplayPrice(price);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			if (!token.IsCancellationRequested)
			{
				Logger.Error(string.Format("[HoverAveragePriceDisplay] Failed to load average price: {0}", arg));
				DisplayPrice(null);
			}
		}
	}

	private void DisplayPrice(decimal? price)
	{
		if (!(_text == null))
		{
			string pricePrefix = GetPricePrefix();
			string priceText = ((!price.HasValue) ? GetNoDataText() : ("$" + FormatPrice(price.Value)));
			_text.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
			_text.text = pricePrefix + " " + priceText;
		}
	}

	private void HideText()
	{
		if (_text != null)
		{
			_text.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
		}
	}

	private void CancelPendingRequest()
	{
		if (_loadCts != null)
		{
			_loadCts.Cancel();
			_loadCts.Dispose();
			_loadCts = null;
		}
	}

	private static float GetDurabilityPercent(Item item)
	{
		if (item == null || !item.UseDurability || item.MaxDurability <= 0f)
		{
			return 100f;
		}
		return Mathf.Clamp(item.Durability / item.MaxDurability * 100f, 0f, 100f);
	}

	private static string FormatPrice(decimal value)
	{
		return ((long)value).ToString("N0");
	}

	private static string GetPricePrefix()
	{
		string marketTitle = LocalizationManager.GetText("market.title", "鸭鸭市场");
		string recommendedPriceLabel = LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.recommended_price", "推荐价格");
		return marketTitle + recommendedPriceLabel;
	}

	private static string GetNoDataText()
	{
		return LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.no_data", "暂无数据");
	}
}





```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.UI/ListingCreationPanel.cs`:

using System;
using System.Collections;

using Cysharp.Threading.Tasks;
using DuckMarket.Core;

using Object = UnityEngine.Object;
using UnityEngine.EventSystems;
using UnityEngine.UI;

namespace DuckMarket.UI;

public class ListingCreationPanel : ManagedUIElement
{
	private GameObject _averagePriceDisplay;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _averagePriceNameText;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _averagePriceValueText;

	private Color _buttonColorInteractable;

	private Color _buttonColorNotInteractable;

	private Button _closeButton;

	private static Type _characterMainControlType;

	private static PropertyInfo _characterMainProperty;

	private static PropertyInfo _characterItemProperty;

	private static PropertyInfo _inventoryContentProperty;

	private GameObject _highestPriceDisplay;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _highestPriceNameText;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _highestPriceValueText;

	private bool _isSubmitting;

	private Button _listingButton;

	private GameObject _listingButtonContainer;

	private Image _listingButtonImage;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _listingButtonText;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _originalPriceNameText;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _originalPriceValueText;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _quantityInputNameText;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _storageQuantityNameText;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _storageQuantityValueText;

	private Item _targetItem;


	public static bool IsInitializing { get; private set; }

	public static ListingCreationPanel Instance { get; private set; }

	protected override void Awake()
	{
		base.Awake();
		if (Instance == null)
		{
			Instance = this;
		}
		Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ========== 🚀 ListingCreationPanel Awake ==========");
		try
		{
			FindItemDetailsDisplayComponents();
			CreateListingUIComponents();
			if (_closeButton != null)
			{
				_closeButton.onClick.AddListener(OnCloseButtonClicked);
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel]   - ✅ 关闭按钮事件已设置");
			}
			LocalizationManager.OnLanguageChanged += OnLanguageChanged;
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel]   - ✅ 已订阅语言切换事件");
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ========== ✅ 初始化完成 ==========");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] ❌ 初始化失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	protected override void OnDestroy()
	{
		base.OnDestroy();
		LocalizationManager.OnLanguageChanged -= OnLanguageChanged;
		if (Instance == this)
		{
			Instance = null;
		}
		Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] Destroyed");
	}

	public static void Show(Item item, ManagedUIElement source = null, bool isFromMarket = false)
	{
		if (Instance == null)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[ListingCreationPanel] Instance is null, attempting to create...");
			if (!TryCreateInstance())
			{
				Logger.Error("[ListingCreationPanel] Failed to create instance");
				return;
			}
		}
		CloseItemDetailsPanel();
		Instance.OpenPanel(item, source, isFromMarket);
	}

	private static bool TryCreateInstance()
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] Attempting to create instance by cloning ItemDetails from LootView...");
			LootView instance = LootView.Instance;
			if (instance == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ListingCreationPanel] LootView.Instance is null");
				return false;
			}
			if (!instance.open)
			{
				Logger.Info("[ListingCreationPanel] LootView is closed, opening it first...");
				instance.Open();
				Logger.Info("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ LootView opened");
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] Found LootView, searching for ItemDetailsDisplay...");
			Type typeFromHandle = typeof(LootView);
			FieldInfo field = typeFromHandle.GetField("detailsDisplay", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ListingCreationPanel] Cannot find detailsDisplay field in LootView");
				return false;
			}
			ItemDetailsDisplay itemDetailsDisplay = field.GetValue(instance) as ItemDetailsDisplay;
			if (itemDetailsDisplay == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ListingCreationPanel] detailsDisplay is null");
				return false;
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] Found ItemDetailsDisplay at: " + itemDetailsDisplay.gameObject.name);
			FieldInfo field2 = typeFromHandle.GetField("detailsFadeGroup", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			GameObject gameObject = null;
			if (field2 != null)
			{
				FadeGroup fadeGroup = field2.GetValue(instance) as FadeGroup;
				if (fadeGroup != null)
				{
					gameObject = fadeGroup.gameObject;
					Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] Using detailsFadeGroup as source: " + gameObject.name);
				}
			}
			if (gameObject == null)
			{
				gameObject = itemDetailsDisplay.gameObject;
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] Using ItemDetailsDisplay GameObject as source: " + gameObject.name);
			}
			GameObject gameObject2 = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(gameObject, gameObject.transform.parent);
			gameObject2.name = "ListingCreationPanel";
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] Cloned GameObject: " + gameObject2.name + ", parent: " + gameObject2.transform.parent.name);
			gameObject2.SetActive(value: false);
			ListingCreationPanel listingCreationPanel = (Instance = gameObject2.AddComponent<ListingCreationPanel>());
			if (Instance == null || listingCreationPanel == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ListingCreationPanel] Failed to create panel component");
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(gameObject2);
				return false;
			}
			gameObject2.SetActive(value: true);
			gameObject2.SetActive(value: false);
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ Instance created successfully (LootView kept open: {0})", instance.open));
			return true;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] Failed to create instance: {0}", arg));
			return false;
		}
	}

	private static void CloseItemDetailsPanel()
	{
		try
		{
			Type type = typeof(ItemDetailsDisplay).Assembly.GetType("Duckov.UI.ItemDetailsPanel");
			if (type != null)
			{
				FieldInfo field = type.GetField("instance", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				if (field != null)
				{
					ManagedUIElement managedUIElement = field.GetValue(null) as ManagedUIElement;
					if (managedUIElement != null && managedUIElement.open)
					{
						Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] Closing ItemDetailsPanel");
						managedUIElement.Close();
					}
				}
			}
			LootView instance = LootView.Instance;
			if (!(instance != null))
			{
				return;
			}
			FieldInfo field2 = typeof(LootView).GetField("detailsFadeGroup", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field2 != null)
			{
				FadeGroup fadeGroup = field2.GetValue(instance) as FadeGroup;
				if (fadeGroup != null && fadeGroup.IsShown)
				{
					Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] Hiding LootView ItemDetails");
					fadeGroup.Hide();
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] Failed to close ItemDetails: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void FindItemDetailsDisplayComponents()
	{
		try
		{
			_fadeGroup = GetComponentInChildren<FadeGroup>(includeInactive: true);
			if (_fadeGroup == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ListingCreationPanel]   - ❌ 找不到FadeGroup组件");
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel]   - ✅ 找到FadeGroup组件");
			}
			_detailsDisplay = GetComponentInChildren<ItemDetailsDisplay>(includeInactive: true);
			if (_detailsDisplay == null)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[ListingCreationPanel]   - ⚠️ 找不到ItemDetailsDisplay组件");
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel]   - ✅ 找到ItemDetailsDisplay组件");
				HideUnnecessaryElements();
			}
			Button[] componentsInChildren = GetComponentsInChildren<Button>(includeInactive: true);
			foreach (Button button in componentsInChildren)
			{
				if (button.name.Contains("Close") || button.name.Contains("close"))
				{
					_closeButton = button;
					Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel]   - ✅ 找到关闭按钮: " + button.name);
					break;
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 查找组件失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void HideUnnecessaryElements()
	{
		if (_detailsDisplay == null)
		{
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			Type typeFromHandle = typeof(ItemDetailsDisplay);
			FieldInfo field = typeFromHandle.GetField("propertiesParent", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field != null)
			{
				RectTransform rectTransform = field.GetValue(_detailsDisplay) as RectTransform;
				if (rectTransform != null)
				{
					rectTransform.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
					Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel]   - ✅ 已隐藏propertiesParent（包含效果、属性等）");
				}
			}
			FieldInfo field2 = typeFromHandle.GetField("usageUtilitiesDisplay", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field2 != null)
			{
				MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour = field2.GetValue(_detailsDisplay) as MonoBehaviour;
				if (monoBehaviour != null)
				{
					monoBehaviour.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
					Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel]   - ✅ 已隐藏usageUtilitiesDisplay");
				}
			}
			FieldInfo field3 = typeFromHandle.GetField("usableIndicator", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field3 != null)
			{
				GameObject gameObject = field3.GetValue(_detailsDisplay) as GameObject;
				if (gameObject != null)
				{
					gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
					Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel]   - ✅ 已隐藏usableIndicator");
				}
			}
			FieldInfo field4 = typeFromHandle.GetField("bulletTypeDisplay", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field4 != null)
			{
				MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour2 = field4.GetValue(_detailsDisplay) as MonoBehaviour;
				if (monoBehaviour2 != null)
				{
					monoBehaviour2.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
					Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel]   - ✅ 已隐藏bulletTypeDisplay");
				}
			}
			FieldInfo field5 = typeFromHandle.GetField("slotCollectionDisplay", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field5 != null)
			{
				MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour3 = field5.GetValue(_detailsDisplay) as MonoBehaviour;
				if (monoBehaviour3 != null)
				{
					monoBehaviour3.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
					Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel]   - ✅ 已隐藏slotCollectionDisplay");
				}
			}
			FieldInfo field6 = typeFromHandle.GetField("registeredIndicator", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field6 != null)
			{
				GameObject gameObject2 = field6.GetValue(_detailsDisplay) as GameObject;
				if (gameObject2 != null)
				{
					gameObject2.SetActive(value: false);
					Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel]   - ✅ 已隐藏registeredIndicator");
				}
			}
			Transform transform = null;
			transform = _detailsDisplay.transform.Find("Stats And Effects (Scroll View)");
			if (transform == null)
			{
				Transform transform2 = _detailsDisplay.transform.Find("ItemDisplayCore");
				if (transform2 != null)
				{
					transform = transform2.Find("Stats And Effects (Scroll View)");
				}
			}
			if (transform == null)
			{
				transform = FindChildRecursive(_detailsDisplay.transform, "Stats And Effects (Scroll View)");
			}
			if (transform != null)
			{
				transform.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel]   - ✅ 已隐藏Stats And Effects (Scroll View) (路径: " + GetFullPath(transform) + ")");
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Warning("[ListingCreationPanel]   - ⚠️ 未找到Stats And Effects (Scroll View)");
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 所有不需要的UI元素已隐藏");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 隐藏UI元素失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void CreateListingUIComponents()
	{
		Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] UI 组件将在首次打开时创建");
	}

	private void EnsureUIComponentsCreated()
	{
		if (_originalPriceDisplay != null && _priceChangeDisplay != null && _durabilityAdjustmentDisplay != null && _listingCountDisplay != null && _highestPriceDisplay != null && _lowestPriceDisplay != null && _averagePriceDisplay != null && _storageQuantityDisplay != null && _quantityInputDisplay != null && _quantityInputField != null && _priceInputDisplay != null && _priceInputField != null)
		{
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ========== 开始创建上架UI组件 ==========");
			Transform transform = FindChildRecursive(_detailsDisplay.transform, "Tags");
			if (transform == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ListingCreationPanel] ❌ 无法找到 Tags GameObject");
				return;
			}
			Transform transform2 = transform.parent;
			if (transform2 == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ListingCreationPanel] ❌ 无法找到 ItemDisplayCore");
				return;
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 找到 ItemDisplayCore: " + transform2.name);
			VerticalLayoutGroup component = transform2.GetComponent<VerticalLayoutGroup>();
			if (component != null)
			{
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel]   - 发现 VerticalLayoutGroup:");
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel]     - 原spacing: {0}px", component.spacing));
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel]     - padding: top={0}, bottom={1}", component.padding.top, component.padding.bottom));
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel]     - childControlSize: height={0}, width={1}", component.childControlHeight, component.childControlWidth));
				component.spacing = 5f;
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel]   - ✅ 已设置 VerticalLayoutGroup spacing = 5px");
			}
			GameObject gameObject = FindStatDisplayTemplate();
			if (gameObject == null)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[ListingCreationPanel] ⚠️ 无法找到 PlayerStatsView StatDisplay 模板");
				return;
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 找到 StatDisplay 模板: " + gameObject.name);
			int siblingIndex = transform.GetSiblingIndex();
			_originalPriceDisplay = CreateBarDisplay(gameObject, transform2, "OriginalPriceDisplay", siblingIndex + 1, 0f, ref _originalPriceNameText, ref _originalPriceValueText, LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.market_price"), LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.market_price_loading"));
			_priceChangeDisplay = CreateBarDisplay(gameObject, transform2, "PriceChangeDisplay", siblingIndex + 2, -80f, ref _priceChangeNameText, ref _priceChangeValueText, LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.price_change"), LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.computing"));
			_durabilityAdjustmentDisplay = CreateBarDisplay(gameObject, transform2, "PriceAdjustmentDisplay", siblingIndex + 3, -150f, ref _durabilityAdjustmentNameText, ref _durabilityAdjustmentValueText, LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.price_adjustment"), LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.computing"));
			_listingCountDisplay = CreateBarDisplay(gameObject, transform2, "ListingCountDisplay", siblingIndex + 4, -220f, ref _listingCountNameText, ref _listingCountValueText, LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.listing_count"), LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.market_price_loading"));
			_highestPriceDisplay = CreateBarDisplay(gameObject, transform2, "HighestPriceDisplay", siblingIndex + 5, -290f, ref _highestPriceNameText, ref _highestPriceValueText, LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.highest_price"), LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.market_price_loading"));
			_lowestPriceDisplay = CreateBarDisplay(gameObject, transform2, "LowestPriceDisplay", siblingIndex + 6, -360f, ref _lowestPriceNameText, ref _lowestPriceValueText, LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.lowest_price"), LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.market_price_loading"));
			_averagePriceDisplay = CreateBarDisplay(gameObject, transform2, "AveragePriceDisplay", siblingIndex + 7, -430f, ref _averagePriceNameText, ref _averagePriceValueText, LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.average_price"), LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.market_price_loading"));
			_storageQuantityDisplay = CreateBarDisplay(gameObject, transform2, "StorageQuantityDisplay", siblingIndex + 8, -500f, ref _storageQuantityNameText, ref _storageQuantityValueText, LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.storage_quantity"), LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.computing"));
			if (_storageQuantityDisplay != null)
			{
				LayoutElement layoutElement = _storageQuantityDisplay.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
				if (layoutElement == null)
				{
					layoutElement = _storageQuantityDisplay.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
				}
				if (_storageQuantityDisplay.GetComponent<RectTransform>() != null)
				{
					layoutElement.ignoreLayout = false;
					GameObject obj = new GameObject("Spacer_AfterStorage");
					obj.transform.SetParent(transform2, worldPositionStays: false);
					obj.transform.SetSiblingIndex(siblingIndex + 9);
					RectTransform rectTransform = obj.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
					rectTransform.anchorMin = new Vector2(0f, 1f);
					rectTransform.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 1f);
					rectTransform.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1f);
					rectTransform.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0f, 15f);
					LayoutElement layoutElement2 = obj.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
					layoutElement2.minHeight = 15f;
					layoutElement2.preferredHeight = 15f;
					Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel]   - ✅ 在仓库数量**后**添加15px间距");
				}
			}
			_quantityInputDisplay = CreateEditableBarDisplay(gameObject, transform2, "QuantityInputDisplay", siblingIndex + 10, ref _quantityInputNameText, ref _quantityInputField, LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.sell_quantity"), "1");
			if (_quantityInputDisplay == null || _quantityInputField == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ListingCreationPanel] ❌❌❌ 出售数量输入框创建失败！这是严重问题！");
				Logger.Error("[ListingCreationPanel]   - _quantityInputDisplay: " + ((_quantityInputDisplay == null) ? "NULL" : "OK"));
				Logger.Error("[ListingCreationPanel]   - _quantityInputField: " + ((_quantityInputField == null) ? "NULL" : "OK"));
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 出售数量输入框创建成功");
			}
			_priceInputDisplay = CreateEditableBarDisplay(gameObject, transform2, "PriceInputDisplay", siblingIndex + 11, ref _priceInputNameText, ref _priceInputField, LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.sell_price"), "0", 50f);
			if (_priceInputDisplay == null || _priceInputField == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ListingCreationPanel] ❌❌❌ 出售单价输入框创建失败！这是严重问题！");
				Logger.Error("[ListingCreationPanel]   - _priceInputDisplay: " + ((_priceInputDisplay == null) ? "NULL" : "OK"));
				Logger.Error("[ListingCreationPanel]   - _priceInputField: " + ((_priceInputField == null) ? "NULL" : "OK"));
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 出售单价输入框创建成功");
			}
			CreateQuickFillButton();
			CreateListingButton();
			if (_quantityInputField != null)
			{
				_quantityInputField.onValueChanged.AddListener(OnInputFieldChanged);
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 绑定出售数量输入框变化事件");
			}
			if (_priceInputField != null)
			{
				_priceInputField.onValueChanged.AddListener(OnInputFieldChanged);
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 绑定出售单价输入框变化事件");
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ========== ✅ 上架UI组件创建完成 ==========");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 创建上架UI组件失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void CreateQuickFillButton()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_priceInputDisplay == null)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[ListingCreationPanel] 无法创建快速填入按钮：出售单价显示组件为空");
				return;
			}
			GameObject gameObject = null;
			GameObject gameObject2 = GameObject.Find("LevelConfig/LevelManager(Clone)/GameplayUICanvas/BlackMarketView/ExitButton");
			if (gameObject2 != null)
			{
				gameObject = gameObject2;
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 找到ExitButton模板: " + gameObject2.name);
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Warning("[ListingCreationPanel] ⚠️ 未找到BlackMarketView/ExitButton");
			}
			if (gameObject == null)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[ListingCreationPanel] ⚠️ 未找到分页按钮，快速填入按钮将不会创建");
				return;
			}
			GameObject gameObject3 = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(gameObject);
			gameObject3.name = "QuickFillButton";
			gameObject3.SetActive(value: false);
			string[] array = new string[6]
			{
				"ViewsProxy",
				"PointerDownUpEvents",
				"SizeDeltaToggle",
				"TextLocalizor",
				"PagesControl",
				"Duckov"
			};
			MonoBehaviour[] components = gameObject3.GetComponents<MonoBehaviour>();
			foreach (MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour in components)
			{
				if (monoBehaviour == null)
				{
					continue;
				}
				string componentTypeName = monoBehaviour.GetType().Name;
				string fullName = monoBehaviour.GetType().FullName;
				string[] array2 = array;
				foreach (string value in array2)
				{
					if (componentTypeName.Contains(value) || fullName.Contains(value))
					{
						UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(monoBehaviour);
						break;
					}
				}
			}
			components = (from c in gameObject3.GetComponentsInChildren<MonoBehaviour>(includeInactive: true)
				where c != null && c.GetType().Name == "TextLocalizor"
				select c).ToArray();
			for (int i = 0; i < components.Length; i++)
			{
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(components[i]);
			}
			gameObject3.transform.SetParent(_priceInputDisplay.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
			_quickFillButton = gameObject3.GetComponent<Button>();
			if (_quickFillButton != null)
			{
				_quickFillButton.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
				_quickFillButton.onClick.AddListener(OnQuickFillButtonClicked);
			}
			RectTransform component = gameObject3.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (component != null)
			{
				Vector2 sizeDelta = component.sizeDelta;
				float buttonScale = 0.6f;
				component.anchorMin = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
				component.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
				component.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 0.5f);
				float scaledWidth = sizeDelta.x * buttonScale;
				component.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(0f - (scaledWidth / 2f + 5f), 0f);
				component.localScale = Vector3.one * buttonScale;
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 按钮缩放设置为: {0}, 原始大小: {1}, 缩放后宽度: {2}", component.localScale, sizeDelta, scaledWidth));
			}
			AddButtonClickAnimation(gameObject3);
			LayoutElement layoutElement = gameObject3.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
			if (layoutElement == null)
			{
				layoutElement = gameObject3.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
			}
			layoutElement.ignoreLayout = true;
			gameObject3.SetActive(value: true);
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 快速填入按钮创建成功（使用ExitButton样式）");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 创建快速填入按钮失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void CreateListingButton()
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ========== 开始创建上架按钮 ==========");
			GameObject gameObject = GameObject.Find("LevelConfig/LevelManager(Clone)/GameplayUICanvas/StockShopView");
			if (gameObject == null)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[ListingCreationPanel] 未找到StockShopView，无法克隆ButtonContainer");
				return;
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 找到StockShopView: " + gameObject.name);
			string buttonContainerPath = "ItemDetails/Panel/ButtonContainer";
			Transform transform = gameObject.transform.Find(buttonContainerPath);
			if (transform == null)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[ListingCreationPanel] 未找到ButtonContainer（路径: " + buttonContainerPath + "）");
				return;
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 找到ButtonContainer: " + transform.name);
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ButtonContainer原始完整子对象结构（克隆前）:");
			Transform[] componentsInChildren = transform.GetComponentsInChildren<Transform>(includeInactive: true);
			foreach (Transform transform2 in componentsInChildren)
			{
				string transformPath = transform2.name;
				Transform transform3 = transform2.parent;
				while (transform3 != null && transform3 != transform)
				{
					transformPath = transform3.name + "/" + transformPath;
					transform3 = transform3.parent;
				}
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel]   - {0} (active={1}, components={2})", transformPath, transform2.gameObject.activeSelf, transform2.GetComponents<Component>().Length));
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] 激活所有子对象...");
			componentsInChildren = transform.GetComponentsInChildren<Transform>(includeInactive: true);
			for (int i = 0; i < componentsInChildren.Length; i++)
			{
				componentsInChildren[i].gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
			}
			_listingButtonContainer = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(transform.gameObject);
			_listingButtonContainer.name = "ListingButtonContainer";
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ButtonContainer克隆完成，打印克隆后的结构:");
			componentsInChildren = _listingButtonContainer.GetComponentsInChildren<Transform>(includeInactive: true);
			foreach (Transform transform4 in componentsInChildren)
			{
				string transformPath = transform4.name;
				Transform transform5 = transform4.parent;
				while (transform5 != null && transform5 != _listingButtonContainer.transform)
				{
					transformPath = transform5.name + "/" + transformPath;
					transform5 = transform5.parent;
				}
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel]   - {0} (active={1})", transformPath, transform4.gameObject.activeSelf));
			}
			Transform transform6 = base.gameObject.transform.Find("Panel");
			if (transform6 == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ListingCreationPanel] 未找到Panel");
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(_listingButtonContainer);
				return;
			}
			Transform transform7 = transform6.Find("ItemDisplayCore");
			if (transform7 == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ListingCreationPanel] 未找到ItemDisplayCore（路径: Panel/ItemDisplayCore）");
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(_listingButtonContainer);
				return;
			}
			_listingButtonContainer.transform.SetParent(transform6, worldPositionStays: false);
			_listingButtonContainer.transform.SetSiblingIndex(transform7.GetSiblingIndex() + 1);
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ ButtonContainer已放置在ItemDisplayCore下方");
			_listingButton = _listingButtonContainer.GetComponentInChildren<Button>(includeInactive: true);
			Transform transform8 = _listingButton?.transform.Find("BG");
			_listingButtonImage = transform8?.GetComponent<Image>();
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] _listingButton GameObject name: " + _listingButton?.gameObject.name);
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] _listingButtonContainer GameObject name: " + _listingButtonContainer.name);
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] _listingButtonImage (BG/Image): " + ((_listingButtonImage != null) ? "找到" : "未找到"));
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ButtonContainer的直接子对象:");
			foreach (Transform item in _listingButtonContainer.transform)
			{
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel]   - {0} (childCount={1})", item.name, item.childCount));
			}
			if (_listingButton != null)
			{
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] Button的直接子对象 (共{0}个):", _listingButton.transform.childCount));
				foreach (Transform item2 in _listingButton.transform)
				{
					Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel]   - " + item2.name);
				}
			}
			if (transform8 == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ListingCreationPanel] ❌ 未找到BG");
				return;
			}
			Transform transform11 = transform8.Find("Line1/Lock");
			if (transform11 != null)
			{
				transform11.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 隐藏Lock图标");
			}
			Transform transform12 = transform8.Find("Line1/CannotBeSoldIndicator");
			if (transform12 != null)
			{
				transform12.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 隐藏CannotBeSoldIndicator");
			}
			Transform transform13 = transform8.Find("Line2/CashIndicator");
			if (transform13 != null)
			{
				transform13.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 隐藏CashIndicator（现金图标）");
			}
			Transform transform14 = transform8.Find("Line2/Price");
			if (transform14 != null)
			{
				_listingPriceDisplay = transform14.gameObject;
				_listingPriceDisplay.SetActive(value: true);
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 激活Price");
				_listingPriceText = transform14.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
				if (_listingPriceText != null)
				{
					Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 找到Price文字: " + _listingPriceText.gameObject.name);
				}
				else
				{
					Logger.Error("[ListingCreationPanel] ❌ 未找到Price的TextMeshProUGUI");
				}
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Error("[ListingCreationPanel] ❌ 未找到BG/Line2/Price");
			}
			Transform transform15 = transform8.Find("Line1/Text (TMP)");
			if (transform15 != null)
			{
				_listingButtonText = transform15.GetComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
				if (_listingButtonText != null)
				{
					_listingButtonText.text = LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.button_text");
					_listingButtonText.richText = true;
					Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 设置按钮主文字: " + _listingButtonText.gameObject.name + " = " + _listingButtonText.text);
				}
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Error("[ListingCreationPanel] ❌ 未找到BG/Line1/Text (TMP)");
			}
			Transform transform16 = transform8.Find("Line1/InputIndicator");
			if (transform16 != null)
			{
				transform16.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 隐藏快捷键提示");
			}
			try
			{
				Component component = gameObject.GetComponent(Type.GetType("Duckov.Economy.UI.StockShopView, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core"));
				if (component != null)
				{
					Type type = component.GetType();
					BindingFlags bindingAttr = BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic;
					FieldInfo field = type.GetField("buttonColor_Interactable", bindingAttr);
					if (field != null)
					{
						_buttonColorInteractable = (Color)field.GetValue(component);
						Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 读取游戏原生可交互按钮颜色: {0}", _buttonColorInteractable));
					}
					FieldInfo field2 = type.GetField("buttonColor_NotInteractable", bindingAttr);
					if (field2 != null)
					{
						_buttonColorNotInteractable = (Color)field2.GetValue(component);
						Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 读取游戏原生不可交互按钮颜色: {0}", _buttonColorNotInteractable));
					}
				}
			}
			catch (Exception ex)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[ListingCreationPanel] ⚠️ 读取游戏原生按钮颜色失败，使用默认颜色: " + ex.Message);
				_buttonColorInteractable = new Color(0.2f, 0.5f, 1f, 1f);
				_buttonColorNotInteractable = new Color(0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f, 1f);
			}
			if (_listingButtonImage != null)
			{
				_listingButtonImage.color = _buttonColorInteractable;
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 设置按钮初始颜色为可交互状态");
			}
			if (_listingButton != null)
			{
				_listingButton.transition = Selectable.Transition.None;
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 禁用Button的ColorTint过渡");
			}
			if (_listingButton != null)
			{
				_listingButton.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
				_listingButton.onClick.AddListener(OnListingButtonClicked);
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 绑定按钮点击事件");
			}
			_listingButtonContainer.SetActive(value: true);
			if (_listingPriceText != null)
			{
				_listingPriceText.text = LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.tax_fee") + " 0";
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 初始化税费显示: " + _listingPriceText.text);
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ========== ✅ 上架按钮创建完成 ==========");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 创建上架按钮失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private async void OnListingButtonClicked()
	{
		if (_isSubmitting)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[ListingCreationPanel] 已在提交中，忽略点击");
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			_isSubmitting = true;
			UpdateListingButtonState();
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] 上架按钮被点击");
			ValidationResult validationResult = ListingCreationValidator.Validate(_listingData);
			if (!validationResult.IsValid)
			{
				NotificationService.ShowNotification(validationResult.Message, playSound: false);
				Logger.Warning("[ListingCreationPanel] 验证失败: " + validationResult.Message);
				_isSubmitting = false;
				UpdateListingButtonState();
				return;
			}
			long money = EconomyManager.Money;
			long taxFeeAmount = (long)_listingData.TaxFee;
			if (money < taxFeeAmount)
			{
				NotificationService.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetInsufficientTaxBalanceNotification(taxFeeAmount, money), playSound: false);
				Logger.Warning(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 余额不足: 需要 {0}, 当前 {1}", taxFeeAmount, money));
				_isSubmitting = false;
				UpdateListingButtonState();
				return;
			}
			int storageItemQuantity = GetStorageItemQuantity(_listingData.ItemTypeId);
			if (_listingData.Quantity > storageItemQuantity)
			{
				NotificationService.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetInsufficientStorageQuantityNotification(_listingData.Quantity, storageItemQuantity), playSound: false);
				Logger.Warning(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 仓库数量不足: 需要 {0}, 仓库只有 {1}", _listingData.Quantity, storageItemQuantity));
				_isSubmitting = false;
				UpdateListingButtonState();
				return;
			}
			decimal originalValue = _listingData.DurabilityAdjustedOriginalValue;
			if (originalValue < 10m)
			{
				Logger.Warning(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 耐久修正原价过小 ({0}), 使用标价作为参考", originalValue));
				originalValue = _listingData.Price;
			}
			int saveSlot = SavesSystem.CurrentSlot;
			float? durability = null;
			float? maxDurability = null;
			float? durabilityLoss = null;
			if (_listingData.Item.UseDurability)
			{
				durability = _listingData.Item.Durability;
				maxDurability = _listingData.Item.MaxDurability;
				durabilityLoss = _listingData.Item.DurabilityLoss;
			}
			Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 开始上架: {0} x{1} @ {2}, 税费: {3}", _listingData.ItemDisplayName, _listingData.Quantity, _listingData.Price, taxFeeAmount));
			bool createSucceeded = false;
			string createErrorMessage = null;
			for (int retryCount = 0; retryCount <= 0; retryCount++)
			{
				if (createSucceeded)
				{
					break;
				}
				if (retryCount > 0)
				{
					Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 重试 {0}/{1}", retryCount, 0));
					await UniTask.Delay(1000);
				}
				(createSucceeded, createErrorMessage) = await ApiClient.CreateListingAsync(_listingData.ItemTypeId, _listingData.ItemDisplayName, _listingData.Quantity, _listingData.Price, originalValue, saveSlot, _listingData.TaxFee, durability, maxDurability, durabilityLoss);
			}
			if (createSucceeded)
			{
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] API上架成功");
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 扣除税费: {0}", taxFeeAmount));
				EconomyManager.Add(-taxFeeAmount);
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 从仓库移除物品: {0} x{1}", _listingData.ItemDisplayName, _listingData.Quantity));
				bool requireFullDurability = _targetItem.MaxDurability > 0f && Math.Abs(_targetItem.Durability - _targetItem.MaxDurability) < 0.01f;
				RemoveItemsFromStorage(_listingData.ItemTypeId, _listingData.Quantity, requireFullDurability);
				DuckMarketView_NoteClone instance = DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Instance;
				if (instance != null && instance.open)
				{
					Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] 市场界面已打开，刷新物品栏缓存");
					ItemDisplayPatch.RefreshStorageCache();
					InventoryDisplay marketInventoryDisplay = DuckMarketView_NoteClone.MarketInventoryDisplay;
					if (marketInventoryDisplay != null)
					{
						try
						{
							int selectedPage = marketInventoryDisplay.SelectedPage;
							marketInventoryDisplay.SetPage(selectedPage);
							Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 物品栏已刷新（当前页: {0}）", selectedPage));
						}
						catch (Exception ex)
						{
							Logger.Warning("[ListingCreationPanel] ⚠️ 刷新物品栏失败: " + ex.Message);
						}
					}
				}
				else
				{
					Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] 市场界面未打开，跳过物品栏刷新");
				}
				string listingSuccessNotification = LocalizationStrings.GetListingSuccessNotification(_listingData.ItemDisplayName, _listingData.Quantity);
				NotificationService.ShowNotification(listingSuccessNotification, playSound: false, NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Info);
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] " + listingSuccessNotification);
				_isSubmitting = false;
				ClosePanel();
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Warning("[ListingCreationPanel] API上架失败: " + createErrorMessage);
				NotificationService.ShowNotification(createErrorMessage ?? LocalizationManager.GetText("listing.failed_generic"), playSound: false, NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Error);
				_isSubmitting = false;
				UpdateListingButtonState();
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 上架按钮点击处理失败: {0}", arg));
			NotificationService.ShowNotification(LocalizationManager.GetText("error.generic"), playSound: false, NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Error);
			_isSubmitting = false;
			UpdateListingButtonState();
		}
	}

	private void OnInputFieldChanged(string value)
	{
		try
		{
			if (_listingData != null && _quantityInputField != null && _priceInputField != null)
			{
				if (int.TryParse(_quantityInputField.text, out var result) && result > 0)
				{
					_listingData.Quantity = result;
				}
				if (decimal.TryParse(_priceInputField.text, out var result2) && result2 > 0m)
				{
					_listingData.Price = result2;
				}
				UpdateListingButtonTaxFee();
				UpdateListingButtonState();
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[ListingCreationPanel] 输入框变化处理失败: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	private void UpdateListingButtonTaxFee()
	{
		try
		{
			if (!(_listingPriceText == null) && _listingData != null)
			{
				decimal taxFee = _listingData.TaxFee;
				_listingPriceText.text = LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.tax_fee") + " " + FormatNumber(taxFee);
				if (_listingButtonText != null && _listingData != null)
				{
					decimal totalAmount = (decimal)_listingData.Quantity * _listingData.Price;
					string buttonLabel = LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.button_text", "上架商品");
					string totalAmountLabel = LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.total_amount", "总共");
					_listingButtonText.text = buttonLabel + " <size=70%><color=#000000>(" + totalAmountLabel + " " + FormatNumber(totalAmount) + ")</color></size>";
					Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 更新上架按钮显示: 税费={0}, 总价={1}", taxFee, totalAmount));
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[ListingCreationPanel] 更新上架按钮显示失败: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	private void AddButtonClickAnimation(GameObject buttonGO)
	{
		try
		{
			if (buttonGO.GetComponent<Button>() == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			RectTransform rectTransform = buttonGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (!(rectTransform == null))
			{
				EventTrigger eventTrigger = buttonGO.GetComponent<EventTrigger>();
				if (eventTrigger == null)
				{
					eventTrigger = buttonGO.AddComponent<EventTrigger>();
				}
				float initialScale = 0.6f;
				EventTrigger.Entry entry = new EventTrigger.Entry
				{
					eventID = EventTriggerType.PointerDown
				};
				entry.callback.AddListener(delegate
				{
					StopAllCoroutines();
					rectTransform.localScale = Vector3.one * (initialScale * 0.85f);
				});
				eventTrigger.triggers.Add(entry);
				EventTrigger.Entry entry2 = new EventTrigger.Entry
				{
					eventID = EventTriggerType.PointerUp
				};
				entry2.callback.AddListener(delegate
				{
					StartCoroutine(ScaleAnimation(rectTransform, initialScale, 0.3f, elastic: true));
				});
				eventTrigger.triggers.Add(entry2);
				EventTrigger.Entry entry3 = new EventTrigger.Entry
				{
					eventID = EventTriggerType.PointerExit
				};
				entry3.callback.AddListener(delegate
				{
					StartCoroutine(ScaleAnimation(rectTransform, initialScale, 0.2f, elastic: false));
				});
				eventTrigger.triggers.Add(entry3);
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 添加按钮点击动画");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[ListingCreationPanel] 添加按钮动画失败: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	private IEnumerator ScaleAnimation(RectTransform target, float targetScale, float duration, bool elastic)
	{
		Vector3 startScale = target.localScale;
		Vector3 endScale = Vector3.one * targetScale;
		float elapsed = 0f;
		while (elapsed < duration)
		{
			elapsed += Time.deltaTime;
			float progress = elapsed / duration;
			if (!elastic)
			{
				progress = 1f - (1f - progress) * (1f - progress);
			}
			else
			{
				float offsetProgress = progress - 1f;
				progress = 1f + 2.70158f * Mathf.Pow(offsetProgress, 3f) + 1.70158f * Mathf.Pow(offsetProgress, 2f);
			}
			target.localScale = Vector3.Lerp(startScale, endScale, progress);
			yield return null;
		}
		target.localScale = endScale;
	}

	private void OnQuickFillButtonClicked()
	{
		try
		{
			if (!(_priceInputField == null) && _listingData != null)
			{
				decimal quickFillPrice = (!_listingData.UseDynamicPricing || !_listingData.MarketPrice.HasValue) ? _listingData.OriginalValue : _listingData.MarketPrice.Value;
				int quickFillPriceInt = (int)quickFillPrice;
				_listingData.Price = quickFillPriceInt;
				_priceInputField.text = quickFillPriceInt.ToString();
				UpdateListingButtonTaxFee();
				UpdateListingButtonState();
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 快速填入价格: {0}", quickFillPriceInt));
			}
		}
		catch (Exception exception)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 快速填入失败: {0}", exception));
		}
	}

	private GameObject FindStatDisplayTemplate()
	{
		try
		{
			GameObject gameObject = GameObject.Find("LevelConfig/LevelManager(Clone)/GameplayUICanvas/Tabs/ViewArea/PlayerStatsView/Content/TreeMapPanel/Stats/Scroll View/Viewport/Content");
			if (gameObject != null)
			{
				for (int i = 0; i < gameObject.transform.childCount; i++)
				{
					Transform child = gameObject.transform.GetChild(i);
					if (child.name == "StatDisplay_WalkSpeed" || child.name.StartsWith("StatDisplay_"))
					{
						Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 找到 StatDisplay 模板: " + child.name);
						return child.gameObject;
					}
				}
				for (int j = 0; j < gameObject.transform.childCount; j++)
				{
					Transform child2 = gameObject.transform.GetChild(j);
					if (child2.name.StartsWith("BarDisplay_"))
					{
						Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ⚠️ 使用备用 BarDisplay 模板: " + child2.name);
						return child2.gameObject;
					}
				}
			}
			string[] array = new string[3]
			{
				"MainCharacterStatValueDisplay",
				"BarDisplay",
				"StatDisplay"
			};
			foreach (string componentName in array)
			{
				MonoBehaviour[] array2 = (from obj in UnityEngine.Object.FindObjectsOfType(typeof(MonoBehaviour))
					where obj.GetType().Name.Contains(componentName)
					select obj).Cast<MonoBehaviour>().ToArray();
				if (array2.Length != 0)
				{
					Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 找到 {0} 个 {1} 组件", array2.Length, componentName));
					return array2[0].gameObject;
				}
			}
			Logger.Warning("[ListingCreationPanel] 未找到任何 Display 组件");
			return null;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 查找 StatDisplay 模板失败: {0}", arg));
			return null;
		}
	}

	private GameObject CreateStatDisplay(GameObject template, Transform parent, string name, int siblingIndex)
	{
		try
		{
			GameObject gameObject = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(template, parent);
			gameObject.name = name;
			gameObject.transform.SetSiblingIndex(siblingIndex);
			string[] source = new string[2]
			{
				"MainCharacterStatValueDisplay",
				"StatDisplay"
			};
			MonoBehaviour[] components = gameObject.GetComponents<MonoBehaviour>();
			foreach (MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour in components)
			{
				if (monoBehaviour != null)
				{
					string typeName = monoBehaviour.GetType().Name;
					if (source.Any((string value) => typeName.Contains(value)))
					{
						UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(monoBehaviour);
						Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel]       - 移除组件: " + typeName);
					}
				}
			}
			Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel]     - 克隆 StatDisplay: {0} (索引: {1})", name, siblingIndex));
			return gameObject;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 克隆 StatDisplay 失败 ({0}): {1}", name, arg));
			return null;
		}
	}

	private GameObject CreateBarDisplay(GameObject template, Transform parent, string name, int siblingIndex, float yOffset, ref TextMeshProUGUI nameText, ref TextMeshProUGUI valueText, string labelText, string defaultValue)
	{
		try
		{
			GameObject gameObject = CreateStatDisplay(template, parent, name, siblingIndex);
			if (gameObject == null)
			{
				return null;
			}
			Type typeFromHandle = typeof(MainCharacterStatValueDisplay);
			Component component = gameObject.GetComponent(typeFromHandle);
			if (component != null)
			{
				FieldInfo field = typeFromHandle.GetField("displayNameText", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				FieldInfo field2 = typeFromHandle.GetField("valueText", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				nameText = field?.GetValue(component) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				valueText = field2?.GetValue(component) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				if (nameText != null)
				{
					nameText.text = labelText;
				}
				if (valueText != null)
				{
					valueText.text = defaultValue;
				}
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(component as MonoBehaviour);
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel]   - ✅ 创建 " + name + "（使用 StatDisplay）");
			}
			else
			{
				Type typeFromHandle2 = typeof(BarDisplay);
				Component component2 = gameObject.GetComponent(typeFromHandle2);
				if (component2 != null)
				{
					FieldInfo field3 = typeFromHandle2.GetField("text_Label", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
					FieldInfo field4 = typeFromHandle2.GetField("text_Current", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
					nameText = field3?.GetValue(component2) as TextMeshProUGUI;
					valueText = field4?.GetValue(component2) as TextMeshProUGUI;
					if (nameText != null)
					{
						nameText.text = labelText;
					}
					if (valueText != null)
					{
						valueText.text = defaultValue;
					}
					FieldInfo field5 = typeFromHandle2.GetField("fill", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
					FieldInfo field6 = typeFromHandle2.GetField("text_Max", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
					Image image = field5?.GetValue(component2) as Image;
					TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = field6?.GetValue(component2) as TextMeshProUGUI;
					if (image != null)
					{
						image.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
					}
					if (textMeshProUGUI != null)
					{
						textMeshProUGUI.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
					}
					Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel]   - ✅ 创建 " + name + "（使用 BarDisplay）");
				}
			}
			TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren = gameObject.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
			foreach (TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI2 in componentsInChildren)
			{
				if (textMeshProUGUI2 != null && textMeshProUGUI2.text != null && textMeshProUGUI2.text.Trim() == "/")
				{
					textMeshProUGUI2.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				}
			}
			return gameObject;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 创建 {0} 失败: {1}", name, arg));
			return null;
		}
	}

	private GameObject CreateEditableBarDisplay(GameObject template, Transform parent, string name, int siblingIndex, ref TextMeshProUGUI nameText, ref TMP_InputField inputField, string labelText, string defaultValue, float reserveRightSpace = 0f)
	{
		try
		{
			GameObject gameObject = CreateStatDisplay(template, parent, name, siblingIndex);
			if (gameObject == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ListingCreationPanel] 创建可编辑bar失败: " + name);
				return null;
			}
			TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = null;
			Type typeFromHandle = typeof(MainCharacterStatValueDisplay);
			Component component = gameObject.GetComponent(typeFromHandle);
			if (component != null)
			{
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel]   - 使用 MainCharacterStatValueDisplay 模板");
				FieldInfo field = typeFromHandle.GetField("displayNameText", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				FieldInfo field2 = typeFromHandle.GetField("valueText", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				nameText = field?.GetValue(component) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				textMeshProUGUI = field2?.GetValue(component) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(component as MonoBehaviour);
			}
			else
			{
				Type typeFromHandle2 = typeof(BarDisplay);
				Component component2 = gameObject.GetComponent(typeFromHandle2);
				if (component2 != null)
				{
					Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel]   - 使用 BarDisplay 模板（备用）");
					FieldInfo field3 = typeFromHandle2.GetField("text_Label", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
					FieldInfo field4 = typeFromHandle2.GetField("text_Current", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
					nameText = field3?.GetValue(component2) as TextMeshProUGUI;
					textMeshProUGUI = field4?.GetValue(component2) as TextMeshProUGUI;
					FieldInfo field5 = typeFromHandle2.GetField("fill", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
					FieldInfo field6 = typeFromHandle2.GetField("text_Max", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
					Image image = field5?.GetValue(component2) as Image;
					TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI2 = field6?.GetValue(component2) as TextMeshProUGUI;
					if (image != null)
					{
						image.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
					}
					if (textMeshProUGUI2 != null)
					{
						textMeshProUGUI2.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
					}
				}
			}
			if (nameText != null)
			{
				nameText.text = labelText;
			}
			TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren = gameObject.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
			foreach (TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI3 in componentsInChildren)
			{
				if (textMeshProUGUI3 != null && textMeshProUGUI3.text != null && textMeshProUGUI3.text.Trim() == "/")
				{
					textMeshProUGUI3.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				}
			}
			if (textMeshProUGUI != null)
			{
				textMeshProUGUI.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				GameObject gameObject2 = new GameObject("InputField");
				gameObject2.transform.SetParent(textMeshProUGUI.transform.parent, worldPositionStays: false);
				RectTransform rectTransform = gameObject2.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
				rectTransform.anchorMin = new Vector2(0.5f, 0f);
				rectTransform.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 1f);
				rectTransform.anchoredPosition = Vector2.zero;
				rectTransform.offsetMin = new Vector2(10f, 5f);
				float rightOffset = -10f;
				if (reserveRightSpace > 0f)
				{
					rightOffset = -(10f + reserveRightSpace);
				}
				rectTransform.offsetMax = new Vector2(rightOffset, -5f);
				rectTransform.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 0.5f);
				Image image2 = gameObject2.AddComponent<Image>();
				image2.color = new Color(0f, 0f, 0f, 0.537f);
				image2.type = Image.Type.Sliced;
				Sprite sprite = Resources.FindObjectsOfTypeAll<Sprite>().FirstOrDefault((Sprite s) => s.name == "Rect16");
				if (sprite != null)
				{
					image2.sprite = sprite;
				}
				inputField = gameObject2.AddComponent<TMP_InputField>();
				inputField.characterLimit = 10;
				inputField.contentType = TMP_InputField.ContentType.IntegerNumber;
				GameObject gameObject3 = new GameObject("Text Area");
				gameObject3.transform.SetParent(gameObject2.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
				RectTransform rectTransform2 = gameObject3.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
				rectTransform2.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
				rectTransform2.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
				rectTransform2.offsetMin = new Vector2(8f, 4f);
				rectTransform2.offsetMax = new Vector2(-8f, -4f);
				gameObject3.AddComponent<RectMask2D>();
				GameObject obj = new GameObject("Text");
				obj.transform.SetParent(gameObject3.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
				RectTransform rectTransform3 = obj.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
				rectTransform3.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
				rectTransform3.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
				rectTransform3.sizeDelta = Vector2.zero;
				TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI4 = obj.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
				textMeshProUGUI4.text = defaultValue;
				textMeshProUGUI4.fontSize = textMeshProUGUI.fontSize;
				textMeshProUGUI4.font = textMeshProUGUI.font;
				textMeshProUGUI4.color = textMeshProUGUI.color;
				textMeshProUGUI4.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
				inputField.textViewport = rectTransform2;
				inputField.textComponent = textMeshProUGUI4;
				inputField.targetGraphic = image2;
				inputField.text = defaultValue;
				inputField.caretWidth = 2;
				inputField.caretColor = new Color(1f, 1f, 1f, 1f);
				inputField.customCaretColor = true;
				inputField.caretBlinkRate = 0.85f;
				inputField.ForceLabelUpdate();
				inputField.enabled = false;
				inputField.enabled = true;
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel]   - ✅ 创建可编辑bar: " + name + "（已强制刷新InputField）");
			}
			return gameObject;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 创建可编辑bar失败 ({0}): {1}", name, arg));
			return null;
		}
	}

	private void OpenPanel(Item item, ManagedUIElement source, bool isFromMarket)
	{
		if (item == null)
		{
			Logger.Error("[ListingCreationPanel] Cannot open panel: item is null");
			return;
		}
		_targetItem = item;
		_sourceElement = source;
		_isOpenedFromMarket = isFromMarket;
		Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 从市场界面打开: {0}", _isOpenedFromMarket));
		Open(source);
		Logger.Info("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 上架面板已打开: " + item.DisplayName);
	}

	protected override void OnOpen()
	{
		if (_targetItem == null)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[ListingCreationPanel] OnOpen called but target item is null");
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			IsInitializing = true;
			Logger.Info("[ListingCreationPanel] OnOpen called for: " + _targetItem.DisplayName);
			LootView instance = LootView.Instance;
			if (instance != null && !instance.open)
			{
				Logger.Info("[ListingCreationPanel] LootView is closed, opening it...");
				instance.Open();
			}
			if (!base.gameObject.activeSelf)
			{
				base.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] GameObject activated");
			}
			EnsureUIComponentsCreated();
			if (_detailsDisplay != null)
			{
				MethodInfo method = typeof(ItemDetailsDisplay).GetMethod("Setup", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				if (method != null)
				{
					method.Invoke(_detailsDisplay, new object[1] { _targetItem });
					Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ItemDetailsDisplay.Setup called for: " + _targetItem.DisplayName);
				}
			}
			_listingData = ListingCreationData.FromItem(_targetItem);
			if (_listingData == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ListingCreationPanel] Failed to create ListingCreationData");
				return;
			}
			bool hasDurability = _targetItem.MaxDurability > 0f;
			bool isFullDurabilityItem = hasDurability && Math.Abs(_targetItem.Durability - _targetItem.MaxDurability) < 0.01f;
			int availableQuantity;
			if (hasDurability && !isFullDurabilityItem)
			{
				availableQuantity = 1;
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] 非满耐久物品：固定出售数量为1");
			}
			else if (isFullDurabilityItem)
			{
				availableQuantity = GetFullDurabilityItemCount(_targetItem.TypeID);
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 满耐久物品：仓库满耐久数量 = {0}", availableQuantity));
			}
			else
			{
				availableQuantity = GetStorageItemQuantity(_targetItem.TypeID);
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 无耐久物品：仓库数量 = {0}", availableQuantity));
			}
			_listingData.MaxQuantity = Mathf.Min(availableQuantity, 999);
			_listingData.Quantity = 1;
			if (availableQuantity > 999)
			{
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 仓库数量 {0} 超过系统限制，MaxQuantity限制为: {1}", availableQuantity, 999));
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] MaxQuantity设置为仓库数量: {0}, Quantity默认为: 1", availableQuantity));
			}
			if (_quantityInputField != null)
			{
				_quantityInputField.text = "1";
				_quantityInputField.interactable = true;
				if (_quantityInputDisplay != null && !_quantityInputDisplay.activeSelf)
				{
					_quantityInputDisplay.SetActive(value: true);
					Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 激活出售数量输入框GameObject");
				}
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] 出售数量输入框初始化为: 1");
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Error("[ListingCreationPanel] ❌ 出售数量输入框为null，无法初始化！");
			}
			if (_priceInputField != null)
			{
				_priceInputField.text = "0";
				_priceInputField.interactable = true;
				if (_priceInputDisplay != null && !_priceInputDisplay.activeSelf)
				{
					_priceInputDisplay.SetActive(value: true);
					Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 激活出售单价输入框GameObject");
				}
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] 出售单价输入框初始化为: 0");
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Error("[ListingCreationPanel] ❌ 出售单价输入框为null，无法初始化！");
			}
			if (_listingPriceText != null)
			{
				_listingPriceText.text = LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.tax_fee") + " 0";
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 重置税费显示: " + _listingPriceText.text);
			}
			UpdatePriceDisplay(isInitialLoad: true);
			LoadMarketStatisticsAsync().Forget();
			if (_fadeGroup != null)
			{
				_fadeGroup.Show();
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] FadeGroup.Show() called");
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ OnOpen completed");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] OnOpen failed: {0}", arg));
		}
		finally
		{
			IsInitializing = false;
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] IsInitializing reset to false");
		}
	}

	protected override void OnClose()
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] OnClose called");
			bool isOpenedFromMarket = _isOpenedFromMarket;
			_targetItem = null;
			_listingData = null;
			_sourceElement = null;
			_isOpenedFromMarket = false;
			if (_fadeGroup != null)
			{
				_fadeGroup.Hide();
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] FadeGroup.Hide() called");
			}
			if (isOpenedFromMarket)
			{
				Logger.Info("[ListingCreationPanel] 用户取消上架，返回市场界面");
				LootView instance = LootView.Instance;
				if (instance != null && instance.open)
				{
					Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] 关闭 LootView");
					instance.Close();
				}
				UniTask.Delay(200).ContinueWith(delegate
				{
					try
					{
						Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] 重新打开新市场界面");
						DuckMarketView_NoteClone instance2 = DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Instance;
						if (instance2 != null)
						{
							instance2.Open();
							Logger.Info("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 新市场界面已打开");
						}
						else
						{
							Logger.Warning("[ListingCreationPanel] ⚠️ 新市场界面实例为空");
						}
					}
					catch (Exception arg2)
					{
						Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 打开市场界面失败: {0}", arg2));
					}
				}).Forget();
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] 销毁克隆的GameObject");
			UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(base.gameObject);
			Instance = null;
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ OnClose completed");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] OnClose failed: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void OnCloseButtonClicked()
	{
		Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] Close button clicked");
		Close();
	}

	private void UpdatePriceDisplay(bool isInitialLoad = false)
	{
		if (_listingData == null || _originalPriceValueText == null)
		{
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			string recommendedPriceLabel = LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.recommended_price");
			string recommendedPriceText;
			if (isInitialLoad)
			{
				recommendedPriceText = LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.market_price_loading");
				if (_originalPriceValueText != null)
				{
					_originalPriceValueText.color = new Color(0.6f, 0.6f, 0.6f, 1f);
				}
			}
			else if (_listingData.UseDynamicPricing && _listingData.MarketPrice.HasValue)
			{
				recommendedPriceText = FormatNumber(_listingData.MarketPrice.Value);
				if (_originalPriceValueText != null)
				{
					_originalPriceValueText.color = new Color(0.478f, 0.898f, 0.561f, 1f);
				}
			}
			else
			{
				recommendedPriceText = FormatNumber(_listingData.DurabilityAdjustedOriginalValue);
				if (_originalPriceValueText != null)
				{
					_originalPriceValueText.color = new Color(0.8f, 0.8f, 0.8f, 1f);
				}
			}
			if (_originalPriceNameText != null)
			{
				_originalPriceNameText.text = recommendedPriceLabel;
			}
			if (_originalPriceValueText != null)
			{
				_originalPriceValueText.text = recommendedPriceText;
			}
			if (_priceChangeDisplay != null)
			{
				_priceChangeDisplay.SetActive(value: false);
			}
			UpdatePriceAdjustmentDisplay();
			UpdateStorageQuantityDisplay();
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] 推荐价格显示已更新: " + recommendedPriceLabel + " = " + recommendedPriceText);
		}
		catch (Exception exception)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 更新推荐价格显示失败: {0}", exception));
		}
	}

	private void UpdatePriceChangeDisplay()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_priceChangeDisplay == null || _priceChangeValueText == null || _listingData == null || _targetItem == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			if (!_listingData.UseDynamicPricing || !_listingData.BaseMarketPrice.HasValue)
			{
				_priceChangeDisplay.SetActive(value: false);
				return;
			}
			decimal marketBasePrice = _listingData.BaseMarketPrice.Value;
			decimal gameOriginalValue = _listingData.GameOriginalValue;
			if (gameOriginalValue > 0m)
			{
