```cs
				decimal priceChangePercent = (marketBasePrice - gameOriginalValue) / gameOriginalValue * 100m;
				if (priceChangePercent > 0.5m)
				{
					_priceChangeDisplay.SetActive(value: true);
					_priceChangeValueText.text = string.Format("<color=#FF6666>↑ {0:F1}%</color>", priceChangePercent);
					Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 价格涨幅已更新: 上涨 {0:F1}%", priceChangePercent));
				}
				else if (priceChangePercent < -0.5m)
				{
					_priceChangeDisplay.SetActive(value: true);
					_priceChangeValueText.text = string.Format("<color=#66FF66>↓ {0:F1}%</color>", Math.Abs(priceChangePercent));
					Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 价格涨幅已更新: 下降 {0:F1}%", Math.Abs(priceChangePercent)));
				}
				else
				{
					_priceChangeDisplay.SetActive(value: false);
				}
			}
			else
			{
				_priceChangeDisplay.SetActive(value: false);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception exception)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 更新价格涨幅显示失败: {0}", exception));
		}
	}

	private void UpdatePriceAdjustmentDisplay()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_durabilityAdjustmentDisplay == null || _durabilityAdjustmentValueText == null || _listingData == null || _targetItem == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			if (_durabilityAdjustmentNameText != null)
			{
				_durabilityAdjustmentNameText.text = LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.price_adjustment");
			}
			bool hasDurability = _targetItem.MaxDurability > 0f;
			float durabilityPercent = _listingData.DurabilityPercent;
			if (!hasDurability || durabilityPercent >= 100f)
			{
				_durabilityAdjustmentDisplay.SetActive(value: false);
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] 价格修正已隐藏（无耐久度或满耐久）");
				return;
			}
			_durabilityAdjustmentDisplay.SetActive(value: true);
			string adjustmentText;
			if (_listingData.UseDynamicPricing && _listingData.BaseMarketPrice.HasValue)
			{
				decimal marketBasePrice = _listingData.BaseMarketPrice.Value;
				decimal gameOriginalValue = _listingData.GameOriginalValue;
				string dynamicPriceDeltaText = "";
				if (gameOriginalValue > 0m)
				{
					decimal dynamicPriceDeltaPercent = (marketBasePrice - gameOriginalValue) / gameOriginalValue * 100m;
					if (dynamicPriceDeltaPercent > 0.5m)
					{
						dynamicPriceDeltaText = string.Format(" <color=#FF6666>(↑{0:F0}%)</color>", dynamicPriceDeltaPercent);
					}
					else if (dynamicPriceDeltaPercent < -0.5m)
					{
						dynamicPriceDeltaText = string.Format(" <color=#66FF66>(↓{0:F0}%)</color>", Math.Abs(dynamicPriceDeltaPercent));
					}
				}
				adjustmentText = string.Format("{0}{1} × {2:F0}%", FormatNumber(marketBasePrice), dynamicPriceDeltaText, durabilityPercent);
			}
			else
			{
				decimal gameOriginalValue = _listingData.GameOriginalValue;
				adjustmentText = string.Format("{0} × {1:F0}%", FormatNumber(gameOriginalValue), durabilityPercent);
			}
			Color adjustmentColor = GetDurabilityAdjustmentColor(durabilityPercent);
			_durabilityAdjustmentValueText.text = adjustmentText;
			_durabilityAdjustmentValueText.color = adjustmentColor;
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] 价格修正显示已更新: " + adjustmentText);
			UpdateListingButtonTaxFee();
		}
		catch (Exception exception)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 更新价格修正显示失败: {0}", exception));
		}
	}

	private static Color GetDurabilityAdjustmentColor(float durabilityPercent)
	{
		if (durabilityPercent >= 80f)
		{
			return new Color(0.6f, 0.8f, 0.4f, 1f);
		}

		if (durabilityPercent >= 50f)
		{
			return new Color(0.9f, 0.7f, 0.3f, 1f);
		}

		return new Color(0.9f, 0.4f, 0.3f, 1f);
	}

	private void UpdateStorageQuantityDisplay()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_listingData == null || _targetItem == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			bool hasDurability = _targetItem.MaxDurability > 0f;
			bool isFullDurabilityItem = hasDurability && Math.Abs(_targetItem.Durability - _targetItem.MaxDurability) < 0.01f;
			if (hasDurability && !isFullDurabilityItem)
			{
				if (_storageQuantityDisplay != null)
				{
					_storageQuantityDisplay.SetActive(value: false);
				}
				if (_quantityInputDisplay != null)
				{
					_quantityInputDisplay.SetActive(value: false);
				}
				if (_quantityInputField != null)
				{
					_quantityInputField.text = "1";
				}
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] 非满耐久物品：隐藏仓库数量和出售数量bar，固定出售1件");
				return;
			}
			if (_storageQuantityDisplay != null && _storageQuantityValueText != null)
			{
				_storageQuantityDisplay.SetActive(value: true);
				int availableCount;
				int unavailableCount;
				if (isFullDurabilityItem)
				{
					(availableCount, unavailableCount) = GetFullDurabilityItemCountWithUnavailable(_targetItem.TypeID);
					Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 满耐久物品仓库数量: 可上架={0}, 不可上架={1}", availableCount, unavailableCount));
				}
				else
				{
					(availableCount, unavailableCount) = GetStorageItemQuantityWithUnavailable(_targetItem.TypeID);
					Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 无耐久物品仓库数量: 可上架={0}, 不可上架={1}", availableCount, unavailableCount));
				}

				string storageLabel = availableCount.ToString();
				if (unavailableCount > 0)
				{
					string unavailableTemplate = LocalizationManager.GetText("item.quantity_unavailable", "({0}个不可上架)");
					storageLabel = storageLabel + " " + string.Format(unavailableTemplate, unavailableCount);
				}

				if (availableCount > 0)
				{
					_storageQuantityValueText.text = storageLabel;
					_storageQuantityValueText.color = new Color(1f, 0.85f, 0.4f, 1f);
				}
				else
				{
					_storageQuantityValueText.text = storageLabel;
					_storageQuantityValueText.color = new Color(0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f, 1f);
				}
			}
			if (_quantityInputDisplay != null)
			{
				_quantityInputDisplay.SetActive(value: true);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception exception)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 更新仓库数量显示失败: {0}", exception));
		}
	}

	private (int available, int unavailable) GetFullDurabilityItemCountWithUnavailable(int typeId)
	{
		int availableCount = 0;
		int unavailableCount = 0;
		try
		{
			Type type = Type.GetType("PlayerStorage, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
			if (type != null)
			{
				PropertyInfo property = type.GetProperty("Inventory", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
				if (property != null)
				{
					Inventory inventory = property.GetValue(null) as Inventory;
					if (inventory != null)
					{
						PropertyInfo property2 = typeof(Inventory).GetProperty("Content", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
						if (property2 != null && property2.GetValue(inventory) is List<Item> list)
						{
							foreach (Item item in list)
							{
								if (item != null && item.TypeID == typeId && item.MaxDurability > 0f && Math.Abs(item.Durability - item.MaxDurability) < 0.01f)
								{
									if (IsItemValidForListing(item))
									{
										availableCount += item.StackCount;
									}
									else
									{
										unavailableCount += item.StackCount;
									}
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] TypeID={0}: 满耐久可上架={1}, 满耐久不可上架={2}", typeId, availableCount, unavailableCount));
		}
		catch (Exception exception)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] ❌ GetFullDurabilityItemCountWithUnavailable失败: {0}", exception));
		}
		return (available: availableCount, unavailable: unavailableCount);
	}

	private (int available, int unavailable) GetStorageItemQuantityWithUnavailable(int typeId)
	{
		int availableCount = 0;
		int unavailableCount = 0;
		try
		{
			Type type = Type.GetType("PlayerStorage, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
			if (type != null)
			{
				PropertyInfo property = type.GetProperty("Inventory", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
				if (property != null)
				{
					Inventory inventory = property.GetValue(null) as Inventory;
					if (inventory != null)
					{
						PropertyInfo property2 = typeof(Inventory).GetProperty("Content", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
						if (property2 != null && property2.GetValue(inventory) is List<Item> list)
						{
							foreach (Item item in list)
							{
								if (item != null && item.TypeID == typeId)
								{
									if (IsItemValidForListing(item))
									{
										availableCount += item.StackCount;
									}
									else
									{
										unavailableCount += item.StackCount;
									}
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] TypeID={0}: 可上架={1}, 不可上架={2}", typeId, availableCount, unavailableCount));
		}
		catch (Exception exception)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] ❌ GetStorageItemQuantityWithUnavailable失败: {0}", exception));
		}
		return (available: availableCount, unavailable: unavailableCount);
	}

	private int GetFullDurabilityItemCount(int typeId)
	{
		int availableItemCount = 0;
		int skippedItemCount = 0;
		try
		{
			Type type = Type.GetType("PlayerStorage, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
			if (type != null)
			{
				PropertyInfo property = type.GetProperty("Inventory", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
				if (property != null)
				{
					Inventory inventory = property.GetValue(null) as Inventory;
					if (inventory != null)
					{
						PropertyInfo property2 = typeof(Inventory).GetProperty("Content", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
						if (property2 != null && property2.GetValue(inventory) is List<Item> list)
						{
							foreach (Item item in list)
							{
								if (item != null && item.TypeID == typeId && item.MaxDurability > 0f && Math.Abs(item.Durability - item.MaxDurability) < 0.01f)
								{
									if (IsItemValidForListing(item))
									{
										availableItemCount++;
									}
									else
									{
										skippedItemCount++;
									}
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			Type type2 = Type.GetType("CharacterMainControl, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
			if (type2 != null)
			{
				PropertyInfo property3 = type2.GetProperty("Main", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
				if (property3 != null)
				{
					object value = property3.GetValue(null);
					if (value != null)
					{
						PropertyInfo property4 = type2.GetProperty("CharacterItem", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
						if (property4 != null)
						{
							object value2 = property4.GetValue(value);
							if (value2 != null)
							{
								PropertyInfo property5 = value2.GetType().GetProperty("Inventory", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
								if (property5 != null)
								{
									Inventory inventory2 = property5.GetValue(value2) as Inventory;
									if (inventory2 != null)
									{
										PropertyInfo property6 = typeof(Inventory).GetProperty("Content", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
										if (property6 != null && property6.GetValue(inventory2) is List<Item> list2)
										{
											foreach (Item item2 in list2)
											{
												if (item2 != null && item2.TypeID == typeId && item2.MaxDurability > 0f && Math.Abs(item2.Durability - item2.MaxDurability) < 0.01f)
												{
													if (IsItemValidForListing(item2))
													{
														availableItemCount++;
													}
													else
													{
														skippedItemCount++;
													}
												}
											}
										}
									}
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			if (skippedItemCount > 0)
			{
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] TypeID={0}: 可上架满耐久数量={1}, 跳过数量={2}（容器不为空或有配件）", typeId, availableItemCount, skippedItemCount));
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 满耐久物品数量 (TypeID={0}): {1}", typeId, availableItemCount));
			}
		}
		catch (Exception exception)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 获取满耐久物品数量失败: {0}", exception));
		}
		return availableItemCount;
	}

	private bool IsItemValidForListing(Item item)
	{
		if (item == null)
		{
			return false;
		}
		if (item.Inventory != null && !item.Inventory.IsEmpty())
		{
			return false;
		}
		if (item.Slots != null && item.Slots.list != null)
		{
			foreach (Slot item2 in item.Slots.list)
			{
				if (item2 != null && item2.Content != null)
				{
					return false;
				}
			}
		}
		return true;
	}

	private int GetStorageItemQuantity(int typeId)
	{
		int availableItemCount = 0;
		int skippedItemCount = 0;
		try
		{
			Type type = Type.GetType("PlayerStorage, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
			if (type != null)
			{
				PropertyInfo property = type.GetProperty("Inventory", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
				if (property != null)
				{
					Inventory inventory = property.GetValue(null) as Inventory;
					if (inventory != null)
					{
						PropertyInfo property2 = typeof(Inventory).GetProperty("Content", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
						if (property2 != null && property2.GetValue(inventory) is List<Item> list)
						{
							for (int i = 0; i < list.Count; i++)
							{
								Item item = list[i];
								if (item != null && item.TypeID == typeId)
								{
									if (IsItemValidForListing(item))
									{
										availableItemCount += item.StackCount;
									}
									else
									{
										skippedItemCount += item.StackCount;
									}
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			Type type2 = Type.GetType("CharacterMainControl, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
			if (type2 != null)
			{
				PropertyInfo property3 = type2.GetProperty("Main", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
				if (property3 != null)
				{
					object value = property3.GetValue(null);
					if (value != null)
					{
						PropertyInfo property4 = type2.GetProperty("CharacterItem", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
						if (property4 != null)
						{
							Item item2 = property4.GetValue(value) as Item;
							if (item2 != null && item2.Inventory != null)
							{
								Inventory inventory2 = item2.Inventory;
								PropertyInfo property5 = typeof(Inventory).GetProperty("Content", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
								if (property5 != null && property5.GetValue(inventory2) is List<Item> list2)
								{
									for (int j = 0; j < list2.Count; j++)
									{
										Item item3 = list2[j];
										if (item3 != null && item3.TypeID == typeId)
										{
											if (IsItemValidForListing(item3))
											{
												availableItemCount += item3.StackCount;
											}
											else
											{
												skippedItemCount += item3.StackCount;
											}
										}
									}
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			if (skippedItemCount > 0)
			{
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] TypeID={0}: 可上架数量={1}, 跳过数量={2}（容器不为空或有配件）", typeId, availableItemCount, skippedItemCount));
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] TypeID={0}的可上架物品数量（主仓库+背包）: {1}", typeId, availableItemCount));
			}
			return availableItemCount;
		}
		catch (Exception exception)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 获取物品数量失败: {0}", exception));
			return availableItemCount;
		}
	}

	private string FormatNumber(decimal value)
	{
		return ((long)value).ToString("N0");
	}

	private async UniTaskVoid LoadMarketStatisticsAsync()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_listingData != null && !(_targetItem == null))
			{
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] Loading market statistics for TypeID: {0}", _targetItem.TypeID));
				int currentSlot = SavesSystem.CurrentSlot;
				float durabilityPercent = _listingData.DurabilityPercent;
				ItemStatistics itemStatistics = await ApiClient.GetItemStatisticsAsync(_targetItem.TypeID, durabilityPercent, currentSlot);
				if (itemStatistics != null)
				{
					_listingData.UpdateDynamicPricing(itemStatistics);
					Logger.Info("[ListingCreationPanel] Market statistics loaded successfully");
					UpdatePriceDisplay();
					UpdateMarketStatsDisplay(itemStatistics);
				}
				else
				{
					Logger.Warning("[ListingCreationPanel] Failed to load market statistics");
					UpdateMarketStatsDisplay(null);
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] Error loading market statistics: {0}", arg));
			UpdateMarketStatsDisplay(null);
		}
	}

	private void UpdateMarketStatsDisplay(ItemStatistics statistics)
	{
		try
		{
			if (statistics == null || statistics.active_listings == 0)
			{
				if (_listingCountValueText != null)
				{
					_listingCountValueText.text = "0";
					_listingCountValueText.color = new Color(0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f, 1f);
				}
				if (_highestPriceValueText != null)
				{
					_highestPriceValueText.text = LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.no_data");
					_highestPriceValueText.color = new Color(0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f, 1f);
				}
				if (_lowestPriceValueText != null)
				{
					_lowestPriceValueText.text = LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.no_data");
					_lowestPriceValueText.color = new Color(0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f, 1f);
				}
				if (_averagePriceValueText != null)
				{
					_averagePriceValueText.text = LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.no_data");
					_averagePriceValueText.color = new Color(0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f, 1f);
				}
				return;
			}
			if (_listingCountValueText != null)
			{
				_listingCountValueText.text = statistics.active_listings.ToString();
				_listingCountValueText.color = new Color(0.6f, 0.8f, 1f, 1f);
			}
			if (_highestPriceValueText != null)
			{
				if (statistics.max_price.HasValue)
				{
					_highestPriceValueText.text = FormatNumber(statistics.max_price.Value);
					_highestPriceValueText.color = new Color(0.6f, 0.8f, 1f, 1f);
				}
				else
				{
					_highestPriceValueText.text = LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.no_data");
					_highestPriceValueText.color = new Color(0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f, 1f);
				}
			}
			if (_lowestPriceValueText != null)
			{
				if (statistics.min_price.HasValue)
				{
					_lowestPriceValueText.text = FormatNumber(statistics.min_price.Value);
					_lowestPriceValueText.color = new Color(0.6f, 0.8f, 1f, 1f);
				}
				else
				{
					_lowestPriceValueText.text = LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.no_data");
					_lowestPriceValueText.color = new Color(0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f, 1f);
				}
			}
			if (_averagePriceValueText != null)
			{
				if (statistics.avg_price.HasValue)
				{
					_averagePriceValueText.text = FormatNumber(statistics.avg_price.Value);
					_averagePriceValueText.color = new Color(0.6f, 0.8f, 1f, 1f);
				}
				else
				{
					_averagePriceValueText.text = LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.no_data");
					_averagePriceValueText.color = new Color(0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f, 1f);
				}
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] 市场统计信息已更新");
			UpdateListingButtonState();
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 更新市场统计信息失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void OnLanguageChanged(LocalizationManager.Language newLanguage)
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 语言已切换至: {0}, 更新UI文本...", newLanguage));
			if (_originalPriceNameText != null)
			{
				if (_listingData != null && _listingData.UseDynamicPricing && _listingData.MarketPrice.HasValue)
				{
					_originalPriceNameText.text = LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.market_price");
				}
				else
				{
					_originalPriceNameText.text = LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.original_price");
				}
			}
			if (_priceChangeNameText != null)
			{
				_priceChangeNameText.text = LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.price_change");
			}
			if (_durabilityAdjustmentNameText != null)
			{
				_durabilityAdjustmentNameText.text = LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.price_adjustment");
			}
			if (_listingCountNameText != null)
			{
				_listingCountNameText.text = LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.listing_count");
			}
			if (_highestPriceNameText != null)
			{
				_highestPriceNameText.text = LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.highest_price");
			}
			if (_lowestPriceNameText != null)
			{
				_lowestPriceNameText.text = LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.lowest_price");
			}
			if (_averagePriceNameText != null)
			{
				_averagePriceNameText.text = LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.average_price");
			}
			if (_storageQuantityNameText != null)
			{
				_storageQuantityNameText.text = LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.storage_quantity");
			}
			if (_quantityInputNameText != null)
			{
				_quantityInputNameText.text = LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.sell_quantity");
			}
			if (_priceInputNameText != null)
			{
				_priceInputNameText.text = LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.sell_price");
			}
			if (_listingButtonText != null)
			{
				_listingButtonText.text = LocalizationManager.GetText("listing_panel.button_text");
			}
			if (_listingData != null)
			{
				UpdateListingButtonTaxFee();
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ UI文本已更新");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 更新语言文本失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static Transform FindChildRecursive(Transform parent, string name)
	{
		Transform transform = parent.Find(name);
		if (transform != null)
		{
			return transform;
		}
		for (int i = 0; i < parent.childCount; i++)
		{
			Transform transform2 = FindChildRecursive(parent.GetChild(i), name);
			if (transform2 != null)
			{
				return transform2;
			}
		}
		return null;
	}

	private static string GetFullPath(Transform transform)
	{
		if (transform == null)
		{
			return "";
		}
		string fullPath = transform.name;
		Transform currentParent = transform.parent;
		while (currentParent != null)
		{
			fullPath = currentParent.name + "/" + fullPath;
			currentParent = currentParent.parent;
		}
		return fullPath;
	}

	private static void InitializeReflectionCache()
	{
		if (!(_characterMainControlType != null))
		{
			_characterMainControlType = Type.GetType("CharacterMainControl, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
			if (_characterMainControlType != null)
			{
				_characterMainProperty = _characterMainControlType.GetProperty("Main", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
				_characterItemProperty = _characterMainControlType.GetProperty("CharacterItem", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
			}
			_playerStorageType = Type.GetType("PlayerStorage, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
			if (_playerStorageType != null)
			{
				_playerStorageInventoryProperty = _playerStorageType.GetProperty("Inventory", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
			}
			_inventoryContentProperty = typeof(Inventory).GetProperty("Content", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
		}
	}

	private void RemoveItemsFromStorage(int typeId, int quantityToRemove, bool requireFullDurability = false)
	{
		try
		{
			InitializeReflectionCache();
			int remainingQuantity = quantityToRemove;
			HashSet<Item> hashSet = new HashSet<Item>();
			Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 开始移除物品: TypeID={0}, 数量={1}, 仅满耐久={2}", typeId, quantityToRemove, requireFullDurability));
			if (_targetItem != null && _targetItem.TypeID == typeId && remainingQuantity > 0)
			{
				if (!IsItemInBackpack(_targetItem) && !IsItemInMainStorage(_targetItem))
				{
					Logger.Warning("[ListingCreationPanel] ⚠️ _targetItem不在真实仓库中，跳过移除");
				}
				else
				{
					Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 优先处理被右键点击的物品: " + _targetItem.DisplayName);
					if (!IsItemValidForListing(_targetItem))
					{
						Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] _targetItem容器不为空或有配件，跳过: " + _targetItem.DisplayName);
					}
					else if (requireFullDurability && (!(_targetItem.MaxDurability > 0f) || !(Math.Abs(_targetItem.Durability - _targetItem.MaxDurability) < 0.01f)))
					{
						Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] _targetItem耐久度不满，跳过: {0}/{1}", _targetItem.Durability, _targetItem.MaxDurability));
					}
					else if (_targetItem.Stackable)
					{
						int stackCount = _targetItem.StackCount;
						if (stackCount <= remainingQuantity)
						{
							hashSet.Add(_targetItem);
							remainingQuantity -= stackCount;
							Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 标记移除整堆（优先）: {0} x{1}", _targetItem.DisplayName, stackCount));
						}
						else
						{
							_targetItem.StackCount -= remainingQuantity;
							Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 减少堆叠数量（优先）: {0}, 移除 {1}, 剩余 {2}", _targetItem.DisplayName, remainingQuantity, _targetItem.StackCount));
							remainingQuantity = 0;
						}
					}
					else
					{
						hashSet.Add(_targetItem);
						remainingQuantity--;
						Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] 标记移除非堆叠物品（优先）: " + _targetItem.DisplayName);
					}
				}
			}
			if (remainingQuantity > 0 && _characterMainProperty != null && _characterItemProperty != null && _inventoryContentProperty != null)
			{
				object value = _characterMainProperty.GetValue(null);
				if (value != null)
				{
					Item item = _characterItemProperty.GetValue(value) as Item;
					if (item != null && item.Inventory != null)
					{
						Inventory inventory = item.Inventory;
						if (_inventoryContentProperty.GetValue(inventory) is List<Item> list)
						{
							Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 从背包中移除剩余 {0} 个物品", remainingQuantity));
							foreach (Item item2 in list)
							{
								if (item2 == null || item2.TypeID != typeId || hashSet.Contains(item2) || item2 == _targetItem || !IsItemValidForListing(item2) || (requireFullDurability && (!(item2.MaxDurability > 0f) || !(Math.Abs(item2.Durability - item2.MaxDurability) < 0.01f))))
								{
									continue;
								}
								if (item2.Stackable)
								{
									int stackCount2 = item2.StackCount;
									if (stackCount2 <= remainingQuantity)
									{
										hashSet.Add(item2);
										remainingQuantity -= stackCount2;
									}
									else
									{
										item2.StackCount -= remainingQuantity;
										remainingQuantity = 0;
									}
								}
								else
								{
									hashSet.Add(item2);
									remainingQuantity--;
								}
								if (remainingQuantity <= 0)
								{
									break;
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			if (remainingQuantity > 0 && _playerStorageInventoryProperty != null && _inventoryContentProperty != null)
			{
				Inventory inventory2 = _playerStorageInventoryProperty.GetValue(null) as Inventory;
				if (inventory2 != null && _inventoryContentProperty.GetValue(inventory2) is List<Item> list2)
				{
					Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 从主仓库中移除剩余 {0} 个物品", remainingQuantity));
					foreach (Item item3 in list2)
					{
						if (item3 == null || item3.TypeID != typeId || hashSet.Contains(item3) || item3 == _targetItem || !IsItemValidForListing(item3) || (requireFullDurability && (!(item3.MaxDurability > 0f) || !(Math.Abs(item3.Durability - item3.MaxDurability) < 0.01f))))
						{
							continue;
						}
						if (item3.Stackable)
						{
							int stackCount3 = item3.StackCount;
							if (stackCount3 <= remainingQuantity)
							{
								hashSet.Add(item3);
								remainingQuantity -= stackCount3;
							}
							else
							{
								item3.StackCount -= remainingQuantity;
								remainingQuantity = 0;
							}
						}
						else
						{
							hashSet.Add(item3);
							remainingQuantity--;
						}
						if (remainingQuantity <= 0)
						{
							break;
						}
					}
				}
			}
			foreach (Item item4 in hashSet)
			{
				if (item4.Stackable)
				{
					item4.StackCount = 0;
					continue;
				}
				item4.Detach();
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(item4.gameObject);
			}
			Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 成功移除 {0} 个物品 (TypeID: {1})", quantityToRemove, typeId));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 从仓库移除物品失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void UpdateListingButtonState()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_listingButton == null || _listingButtonImage == null)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[ListingCreationPanel] UpdateListingButtonState: 按钮或按钮图片为null");
				return;
			}

			bool shouldDisableButton = false;
			string disableReason = string.Empty;

			if (_isSubmitting)
			{
				shouldDisableButton = true;
				disableReason = "正在提交中";
			}

			if (_quantityInputField != null && _priceInputField != null)
			{
				bool quantityInputValid = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_quantityInputField.text) && int.TryParse(_quantityInputField.text, out int parsedQuantity) && parsedQuantity > 0;
				bool priceInputValid = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_priceInputField.text) && decimal.TryParse(_priceInputField.text, out decimal parsedPrice) && parsedPrice > 0m;
				if (!quantityInputValid || !priceInputValid)
				{
					shouldDisableButton = true;
					disableReason = "输入框为空或无效 (数量输入=" + _quantityInputField.text + ", 价格输入=" + _priceInputField.text + ")";
				}
			}

			if (_listingData == null)
			{
				shouldDisableButton = true;
				disableReason = "ListingData为null";
			}
			else
			{
				if (_listingData.Quantity <= 0 || _listingData.Price <= 0m)
				{
					shouldDisableButton = true;
					disableReason = string.Format("数量或价格无效 (数量={0}, 价格={1})", _listingData.Quantity, _listingData.Price);
				}

				long currentMoney = EconomyManager.Money;
				long taxFeeAmount = (long)_listingData.TaxFee;
				if (currentMoney < taxFeeAmount)
				{
					shouldDisableButton = true;
					disableReason = string.Format("余额不足 (当前={0}, 税费={1})", currentMoney, taxFeeAmount);
				}

				int storageItemQuantity = GetStorageItemQuantity(_listingData.ItemTypeId);
				if (_listingData.Quantity > storageItemQuantity)
				{
					shouldDisableButton = true;
					disableReason = string.Format("仓库数量不足 (需要={0}, 仓库={1})", _listingData.Quantity, storageItemQuantity);
				}
			}

			_listingButton.interactable = !shouldDisableButton;
			if (shouldDisableButton)
			{
				_listingButtonImage.color = _buttonColorNotInteractable;
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 按钮已禁用: {0}, 颜色={1}", disableReason, _buttonColorNotInteractable));
			}
			else
			{
				_listingButtonImage.color = _buttonColorInteractable;
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 按钮已启用, 颜色={0}", _buttonColorInteractable));
			}
		}
		catch (Exception exception)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 更新按钮状态失败: {0}", exception));
		}
	}

	private bool IsItemInBackpack(Item item)
	{
		if (item == null)
		{
			return false;
		}
		try
		{
			Type type = Type.GetType("CharacterMainControl, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
			if (type != null)
			{
				PropertyInfo property = type.GetProperty("Main", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
				if (property != null)
				{
					object value = property.GetValue(null);
					if (value != null)
					{
						PropertyInfo property2 = type.GetProperty("CharacterItem", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
						if (property2 != null)
						{
							Item item2 = property2.GetValue(value) as Item;
							if (item2 != null && item2.Inventory != null)
							{
								Inventory inventory = item2.Inventory;
								PropertyInfo property3 = typeof(Inventory).GetProperty("Content", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
								if (property3 != null && property3.GetValue(inventory) is List<Item> list)
								{
									return list.Contains(item);
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 检查物品是否在背包中失败: {0}", arg));
		}
		return false;
	}

	private bool IsItemInMainStorage(Item item)
	{
		if (item == null)
		{
			return false;
		}
		try
		{
			Type type = Type.GetType("PlayerStorage, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
			if (type != null)
			{
				PropertyInfo property = type.GetProperty("Inventory", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
				if (property != null)
				{
					Inventory inventory = property.GetValue(null) as Inventory;
					if (inventory != null)
					{
						PropertyInfo property2 = typeof(Inventory).GetProperty("Content", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
						if (property2 != null && property2.GetValue(inventory) is List<Item> list && list.Contains(item))
						{
							Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 物品在主仓库中: " + item.DisplayName);
							return true;
						}
					}
				}
			}
			LootView instance = LootView.Instance;
			if (instance != null && instance.open)
			{
				PropertyInfo property3 = typeof(LootView).GetProperty("TargetInventory", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
				if (property3 != null)
				{
					Inventory inventory2 = property3.GetValue(instance) as Inventory;
					if (inventory2 != null)
					{
						PropertyInfo property4 = typeof(Inventory).GetProperty("Content", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
						if (property4 != null && property4.GetValue(inventory2) is List<Item> list2 && list2.Contains(item))
						{
							Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 物品在保险箱中: " + item.DisplayName);
							return true;
						}
					}
				}
			}
			Type type2 = Type.GetType("PetProxy, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
			if (type2 != null)
			{
				PropertyInfo property5 = type2.GetProperty("PetInventory", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
				if (property5 != null)
				{
					Inventory inventory3 = property5.GetValue(null) as Inventory;
					if (inventory3 != null)
					{
						PropertyInfo property6 = typeof(Inventory).GetProperty("Content", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
						if (property6 != null && property6.GetValue(inventory3) is List<Item> list3 && list3.Contains(item))
						{
							Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 物品在宠物背包中: " + item.DisplayName);
							return true;
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 检查物品是否在真实仓库中失败: {0}", arg));
		}
		return false;
	}

	private void ClosePanel()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_fadeGroup != null)
			{
				_fadeGroup.Hide();
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 上架面板已关闭");
			}
			if (!_isOpenedFromMarket)
			{
				return;
			}
			Logger.Info("[ListingCreationPanel] 从市场界面打开，准备返回市场");
			LootView instance = LootView.Instance;
			if (instance != null && instance.open)
			{
				Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] 关闭 LootView");
				instance.Close();
			}
			UniTask.Delay(200).ContinueWith(delegate
			{
				try
				{
					Logger.Verbose("[ListingCreationPanel] 重新打开新市场界面");
					DuckMarketView_NoteClone instance2 = DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Instance;
					if (instance2 != null)
					{
						instance2.Open();
						Logger.Info("[ListingCreationPanel] ✅ 新市场界面已打开");
					}
					else
					{
						Logger.Warning("[ListingCreationPanel] ⚠️ 新市场界面实例为空");
					}
				}
				catch (Exception arg2)
				{
					Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 打开市场界面失败: {0}", arg2));
				}
			}).Forget();
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationPanel] 关闭面板失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}
}





```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.UI/ListingCreationView.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using Cysharp.Threading.Tasks;
using DuckMarket.Core;
using DuckMarket.Models;
using DuckMarket.Network;
using DuckMarket.Services;
using DuckMarket.Validators;
using Duckov.Economy;
using Duckov.UI;
using ItemStatsSystem;
using ItemStatsSystem.Items;
using Saves;
using UnityEngine;

namespace DuckMarket.UI;

public class ListingCreationView : View
{
	private const float ModalWidth = 800f;

	private const float ModalHeight = 850f;

	private string _errorMessage = string.Empty;

	private Texture2D _inputFieldBackgroundTex;

	private bool _isOpen;

	private bool _isSubmitting;

	private ItemStatistics? _itemStatistics;

	private ListingCreationData _listingData;

	private string _priceInputStr = "0";

	private string _quantityInputStr = "1";

	private Texture2D _sectionBackgroundTex;

	public static ListingCreationView Instance => View.GetViewInstance<ListingCreationView>();

	protected override void Awake()
	{
		base.Awake();
		Logger.Info("[ListingCreationView] Awake called - using pure IMGUI");
		_sectionBackgroundTex = MakeTex(2, 2, new Color(0.2f, 0.2f, 0.2f, 0.5f));
		_inputFieldBackgroundTex = MakeTex(2, 2, new Color(0.3f, 0.3f, 0.3f, 1f));
		Logger.Info("[ListingCreationView] Cached textures initialized");
	}

	private new void OnDestroy()
	{
		if (_sectionBackgroundTex != null)
		{
			UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(_sectionBackgroundTex);
		}
		if (_inputFieldBackgroundTex != null)
		{
			UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(_inputFieldBackgroundTex);
		}
		Logger.Info("[ListingCreationView] Cached textures destroyed");
	}

	private void OnGUI()
	{
		if (!_isOpen || _listingData == null)
		{
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			RenderIMGUI();
		}
		catch (Exception exception)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationView] Error in OnGUI: {0}", exception));
		}
	}

	private void RenderIMGUI()
	{
		ListingCreationData listingData = _listingData;
		if (listingData == null)
		{
			return;
		}
		float panelX = ((float)Screen.width - ModalWidth) / 2f;
		float panelY = ((float)Screen.height - ModalHeight) / 2f;
		Rect panelRect = new Rect(panelX, panelY, ModalWidth, ModalHeight);
		GUI.color = new Color(0f, 0f, 0f, 0.3f);
		GUI.DrawTexture(new Rect(0f, 0f, Screen.width, Screen.height), Texture2D.whiteTexture);
		GUI.color = new Color(0.15f, 0.15f, 0.15f, 0.95f);
		GUI.Box(panelRect, string.Empty);
		GUI.color = new Color(1f, 0.85f, 0.2f, 1f);
		GUI.Box(new Rect(panelRect.x - 2f, panelRect.y - 2f, panelRect.width + 4f, panelRect.height + 4f), string.Empty);
		GUI.color = Color.white;
		GUILayout.BeginArea(new Rect(panelRect.x + 30f, panelRect.y + 20f, panelRect.width - 60f, panelRect.height - 40f));
		GUILayout.Space(10f);
		GUIStyle titleStyle = new GUIStyle(GUI.skin.label) { fontSize = 36, fontStyle = FontStyle.Bold, alignment = TextAnchor.MiddleCenter };
		titleStyle.normal.textColor = new Color(1f, 0.85f, 0.2f, 1f);
		GUILayout.Label("上架物品", titleStyle);
		GUILayout.Space(30f);
		GUILayout.BeginVertical(new GUIStyle(GUI.skin.box) { padding = new RectOffset(15, 15, 15, 15) });
		if (listingData.Item?.Icon != null)
		{
			GUILayout.BeginHorizontal();
			GUILayout.Box(listingData.Item.Icon.texture, GUILayout.Width(80f), GUILayout.Height(80f));
			GUILayout.Space(8f);
			GUILayout.BeginVertical();
		}
		GUIStyle itemNameStyle = new GUIStyle(GUI.skin.label) { fontSize = 20, fontStyle = FontStyle.Bold };
		itemNameStyle.normal.textColor = new Color(0.3f, 0.8f, 1f, 1f);
		GUILayout.Label("物品名称: " + listingData.ItemDisplayName, itemNameStyle);
		GUILayout.Label(string.Format("物品类型: {0}", listingData.ItemTypeId));
		if (listingData.Item?.Icon != null)
		{
			GUILayout.EndVertical();
			GUILayout.EndHorizontal();
		}
		if (listingData.Item?.UseDurability == true)
		{
			DrawDurabilityBar(listingData.Item.Durability, listingData.Item.MaxDurability, listingData.Item.DurabilityLoss);
		}
		GUILayout.EndVertical();
		GUILayout.Space(20f);
		DrawInputSection(listingData);
		DrawSummarySection(listingData);
		DrawActionButtons();
		GUILayout.EndArea();
	}

	private void DrawInputSection(ListingCreationData listingData)
	{
		GUIStyle labelStyle = new GUIStyle(GUI.skin.label) { fontSize = 18, fontStyle = FontStyle.Bold };
		GUIStyle inputStyle = new GUIStyle(GUI.skin.textField) { fontSize = 18, padding = new RectOffset(10, 10, 8, 8) };
		inputStyle.normal.background = _inputFieldBackgroundTex;
		GUILayout.BeginHorizontal();
		GUILayout.Label("上架数量:", labelStyle, GUILayout.Width(120f));
		_quantityInputStr = GUILayout.TextField(_quantityInputStr, inputStyle, GUILayout.Width(250f), GUILayout.Height(35f));
		if (int.TryParse(_quantityInputStr, out int quantity))
		{
			listingData.Quantity = quantity;
		}
		else if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(_quantityInputStr))
		{
			listingData.Quantity = 0;
		}
		GUILayout.EndHorizontal();
		GUILayout.Space(10f);
		GUILayout.Label(BuildOriginalValueText(listingData), new GUIStyle(GUI.skin.label) { richText = true });
		if (_itemStatistics != null)
		{
			GUILayout.Label("市场最高价: " + FormatNullableValue(_itemStatistics.highest_price));
			GUILayout.Label("最低价: " + FormatNullableValue(_itemStatistics.lowest_price));
			GUILayout.Label("均价: " + FormatNullableValue(_itemStatistics.average_price));
			GUILayout.Label(string.Format("在售数量: {0}", _itemStatistics.listing_count));
		}
		else
		{
			GUILayout.Label("加载市场统计信息中...");
		}
		GUILayout.Space(10f);
		GUILayout.BeginHorizontal();
		GUILayout.Label("单价:", labelStyle, GUILayout.Width(120f));
		_priceInputStr = GUILayout.TextField(_priceInputStr, inputStyle, GUILayout.Width(250f), GUILayout.Height(35f));
		if (decimal.TryParse(_priceInputStr, out decimal price))
		{
			listingData.Price = price;
		}
		else if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(_priceInputStr))
		{
			listingData.Price = 0m;
		}
		GUILayout.EndHorizontal();
	}

	private void DrawSummarySection(ListingCreationData listingData)
	{
		GUILayout.Space(15f);
		GUILayout.Label(string.Format("总价: {0:N0} 金币", listingData.TotalPrice));
		GUILayout.Label(string.Format("税费: {0:N0} 金币", listingData.TaxFee));
		GUILayout.Label(listingData.Item.UseDurability ? "(上架时立即扣除，基于修正后原价计算)" : "(上架时立即扣除)");
		long currentMoney = EconomyManager.Money;
		long taxFeeAmount = (long)listingData.TaxFee;
		bool hasEnoughBalance = currentMoney >= taxFeeAmount;
		GUILayout.Label(string.Format("当前余额: {0:N0} 金币", currentMoney));
		if (!hasEnoughBalance)
		{
			GUILayout.Label(string.Format("(余额不足，还需 {0:N0} 金币)", taxFeeAmount - currentMoney));
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(_errorMessage))
		{
			GUILayout.Label(_errorMessage);
		}
	}

	private void DrawActionButtons()
	{
		GUILayout.FlexibleSpace();
		GUILayout.BeginHorizontal();
		GUILayout.FlexibleSpace();
		GUI.enabled = !_isSubmitting;
		if (GUILayout.Button(_isSubmitting ? "上架中..." : "确认上架", GUILayout.Width(180f), GUILayout.Height(50f)))
		{
			OnConfirmClicked();
		}
		GUI.enabled = true;
		GUILayout.Space(20f);
		if (GUILayout.Button("取消", GUILayout.Width(180f), GUILayout.Height(50f)))
		{
			Close();
		}
		GUILayout.FlexibleSpace();
		GUILayout.EndHorizontal();
	}

	private static void DrawDurabilityBar(float durability, float maxDurability, float durabilityLoss)
	{
		float durabilityRatio = maxDurability > 0f ? durability / maxDurability : 0f;
		float durabilityLossRatio = Mathf.Clamp01(durabilityLoss);
		GUILayout.Space(5f);
		Rect lastRect = GUILayoutUtility.GetLastRect();
		Rect barRect = new Rect(lastRect.x + 10f, lastRect.y + lastRect.height + 5f, 80f, 8f);
		GUI.color = new Color(0.2f, 0.2f, 0.2f, 0.8f);
		GUI.DrawTexture(barRect, Texture2D.whiteTexture);
		GUI.color = GetDurabilityColor(durabilityRatio);
		GUI.DrawTexture(new Rect(barRect.x, barRect.y, barRect.width * durabilityRatio, barRect.height), Texture2D.whiteTexture);
		if (durabilityLossRatio > 0f)
		{
			GUI.color = new Color(0.6f, 0.1f, 0.1f, 1f);
			GUI.DrawTexture(new Rect(barRect.x + barRect.width * (1f - durabilityLossRatio), barRect.y, barRect.width * durabilityLossRatio, barRect.height), Texture2D.whiteTexture);
		}
		GUI.color = Color.white;
	}

	private static Color GetDurabilityColor(float durabilityRatio)
	{
		if (durabilityRatio > 0.6f)
		{
			return new Color(0.2f, 0.8f, 0.2f, 1f);
		}
		if (durabilityRatio > 0.3f)
		{
			return new Color(0.9f, 0.7f, 0.2f, 1f);
		}
		return new Color(0.9f, 0.2f, 0.2f, 1f);
	}

	private static string BuildOriginalValueText(ListingCreationData listingData)
	{
		string valueColor = listingData.UseDynamicPricing ? "#90EE90" : "#CCCCCC";
		string deltaText = BuildDynamicPriceDeltaText(listingData);
		if (listingData.Item.UseDurability && listingData.DurabilityPenalty > 0m)
		{
			return string.Format("<color={0}>{1}: {2:N0} 金币</color>{3} <color=#FF8040>(耐久修正: -{4:N0})</color>", valueColor, listingData.OriginalValueLabel, listingData.DurabilityAdjustedOriginalValue, deltaText, listingData.DurabilityPenalty);
		}
		return string.Format("<color={0}>{1}: {2:N0} 金币</color>{3}", valueColor, listingData.OriginalValueLabel, listingData.OriginalValue, deltaText);
	}

	private static string BuildDynamicPriceDeltaText(ListingCreationData listingData)
	{
		if (!listingData.UseDynamicPricing || !listingData.BaseMarketPrice.HasValue || listingData.GameOriginalValue <= 0m)
		{
			return string.Empty;
		}
		decimal priceDeltaPercent = (listingData.BaseMarketPrice.Value - listingData.GameOriginalValue) / listingData.GameOriginalValue * 100m;
		if (priceDeltaPercent > 0.5m)
		{
			return string.Format(" <color=#FF6B6B>↑ +{0:F1}%</color>", priceDeltaPercent);
		}
		if (priceDeltaPercent < -0.5m)
		{
			return string.Format(" <color=#51CF66>↓ {0:F1}%</color>", priceDeltaPercent);
		}
		return string.Empty;
	}

	private static string FormatNullableValue(decimal? value)
	{
		return value.HasValue ? string.Format("{0:N0}", value.Value) : "-";
	}

	private Texture2D MakeTex(int width, int height, Color color)
	{
		Color[] pixels = new Color[width * height];
		for (int index = 0; index < pixels.Length; index++)
		{
			pixels[index] = color;
		}
		Texture2D texture = new Texture2D(width, height);
		texture.SetPixels(pixels);
		texture.Apply();
		return texture;
	}

	protected override void OnOpen()
	{
		base.OnOpen();
		_isOpen = true;
		Logger.Info("[ListingCreationView] OnOpen called - pure IMGUI mode");
	}

	protected override void OnClose()
	{
		base.OnClose();
		_isOpen = false;
		_isSubmitting = false;
		_errorMessage = string.Empty;
		Logger.Info("[ListingCreationView] OnClose called - pure IMGUI mode");
	}

	public void ShowForItem(Item item)
	{
		try
		{
			if (item == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ListingCreationView] ShowForItem failed: item is null");
				return;
			}
			Logger.Info("[ListingCreationView] ShowForItem called for: " + item.DisplayName);
			if (item.TypeID == 451)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[ListingCreationView] Cannot list cash items for sale");
				NotificationText.Push("无法上架现金物品");
				return;
			}
			if (item.Inventory != null && !item.Inventory.IsEmpty())
			{
				Logger.Warning("[ListingCreationView] Cannot list items with non-empty containers");
				NotificationText.Push("请先清空容器内的物品再上架");
				return;
			}
			if (item.Slots != null && item.Slots.Count > 0)
			{
				foreach (Slot slot in item.Slots)
				{
					if (slot?.Content != null)
					{
						Logger.Warning("[ListingCreationView] Cannot list items with attachments");
						NotificationText.Push("请先清空容器内的物品再上架");
						return;
					}
				}
			}
			_listingData = ListingCreationData.FromItem(item);
			if (_listingData == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ListingCreationView] Failed to create listing data from item");
				return;
			}
			_quantityInputStr = _listingData.Quantity.ToString();
			_priceInputStr = _listingData.Price.ToString();
			LoadMarketStatisticsAsync(item.TypeID).Forget();
			UpdateUI();
			Open();
		}
		catch (Exception exception)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationView] Error showing view: {0}", exception));
		}
	}

	private async UniTaskVoid LoadMarketStatisticsAsync(int itemTypeId)
	{
		try
		{
			int currentSlot = SavesSystem.CurrentSlot;
			_itemStatistics = await ApiClient.GetItemStatisticsAsync(itemTypeId, _listingData.DurabilityPercent, currentSlot);
			if (_itemStatistics != null)
			{
				_listingData.UpdateDynamicPricing(_itemStatistics);
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Warning("[ListingCreationView] Failed to load market statistics");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception exception)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationView] Error loading market statistics: {0}", exception));
			_itemStatistics = null;
		}
	}

	private void UpdateUI()
	{
	}

	private async void OnConfirmClicked()
	{
		if (_isSubmitting)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[ListingCreationView] Already submitting, ignoring click");
			return;
		}
		ListingCreationData listingData = _listingData;
		if (listingData == null)
		{
			_errorMessage = LocalizationManager.GetText("listing.failed_generic");
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			_isSubmitting = true;
			ValidationResult validationResult = ListingCreationValidator.Validate(listingData);
			if (!validationResult.IsValid)
			{
				_errorMessage = validationResult.Message;
				return;
			}
			_errorMessage = string.Empty;
			decimal originalValue = listingData.DurabilityAdjustedOriginalValue;
			if (originalValue < 10m)
			{
				originalValue = listingData.Price;
			}
			int currentSaveSlot = SavesSystem.CurrentSlot;
			float? durability = null;
			float? maxDurability = null;
			float? durabilityLoss = null;
			if (listingData.Item.UseDurability)
			{
				durability = listingData.Item.Durability;
				maxDurability = listingData.Item.MaxDurability;
				durabilityLoss = listingData.Item.DurabilityLoss;
			}
			decimal taxFee = listingData.TaxFee;
			long currentMoney = EconomyManager.Money;
			long taxFeeAmount = (long)taxFee;
			if (currentMoney < taxFeeAmount)
			{
				_errorMessage = string.Format("余额不足！需要 {0:N0} 金币支付税费，当前余额 {1:N0} 金币", taxFeeAmount, currentMoney);
				return;
			}
			(bool isCreated, string errorMessage) = await ApiClient.CreateListingAsync(listingData.ItemTypeId, listingData.ItemDisplayName, listingData.Quantity, listingData.Price, originalValue, currentSaveSlot, taxFee, durability, maxDurability, durabilityLoss);
			if (isCreated)
			{
				EconomyManager.Add(-taxFeeAmount);
				RemoveItemFromInventory();
				string successMessage = LocalizationStrings.GetListingSuccessNotification(listingData.ItemDisplayName, listingData.Quantity);
				NotificationService.ShowNotification(successMessage, playSound: false, NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Info);
				Close();
			}
			else
			{
				_errorMessage = errorMessage ?? LocalizationManager.GetText("listing.failed_generic");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception exception)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationView] Error confirming: {0}", exception));
			_errorMessage = LocalizationManager.GetText("error.generic");
		}
		finally
		{
			_isSubmitting = false;
		}
	}

	private void RemoveItemFromInventory()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_listingData?.Item == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[ListingCreationView] Cannot remove item: item is null");
				return;
			}
			Item item = _listingData.Item;
			int quantityToRemove = _listingData.Quantity;
			if (item.Stackable && item.StackCount > quantityToRemove)
			{
				item.StackCount -= quantityToRemove;
				return;
			}
			if (item.Stackable)
			{
				item.StackCount = 0;
				return;
			}
			item.Detach();
			UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(item.gameObject);
		}
		catch (Exception exception)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[ListingCreationView] Error removing item: {0}", exception));
		}
	}

	private void OnCancelClicked()
	{
		Close();
	}
}
```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.UI/ListingItemUI.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using DuckMarket.Network;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UI;

namespace DuckMarket.UI;

public class ListingItemUI : MonoBehaviour
{
	private Button _buyButton;

	private Listing? _listing;

	public event Action<Listing>? OnBuyClicked;

	private void Awake()
	{
		_buyButton = GetComponentInChildren<Button>();
		if (_buyButton != null)
		{
			_buyButton.onClick.AddListener(OnBuyButtonClicked);
		}
	}

	public void SetListing(Listing listing)
	{
		_listing = listing;
		UpdateDisplay();
	}

	private void UpdateDisplay()
	{
		// Listing visuals are currently managed by the parent list container.
	}

	private void OnBuyButtonClicked()
	{
		if (_listing != null)
		{
			Logger.Info("Buy button clicked for: " + _listing.item_name);
			OnBuyClicked?.Invoke(_listing);
		}
	}
}
```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.UI/MainMenuStatusPanel.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Reflection;
using Cysharp.Threading.Tasks;
using DuckMarket.Core;
using DuckMarket.Network;
using Steamworks;
using TMPro;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;
using UnityEngine.UI;

namespace DuckMarket.UI;

public class MainMenuStatusPanel : MonoBehaviour
{
	private static MainMenuStatusPanel instance;

	private Color currentStatusColor = Color.white;

	private string currentStatusKey = "";

	private TextMeshProUGUI statusText;

	private GameObject textObject;

	private void Awake()
	{
		if (instance != null)
		{
			Object.Destroy(gameObject);
			return;
		}
		instance = this;
		Object.DontDestroyOnLoad(gameObject);
		MainMenu.OnMainMenuAwake += OnMainMenuShow;
		MainMenu.OnMainMenuDestroy += OnMainMenuHide;
		LocalizationManager.OnLanguageChanged += OnLanguageChanged;
		Logger.Info("[UI] MainMenuStatusPanel initialized with MainMenu events and language change listener");
	}

	private void OnDestroy()
	{
		MainMenu.OnMainMenuAwake -= OnMainMenuShow;
		MainMenu.OnMainMenuDestroy -= OnMainMenuHide;
		LocalizationManager.OnLanguageChanged -= OnLanguageChanged;
		if (instance == this)
		{
			instance = null;
		}
	}

	private void OnLanguageChanged(LocalizationManager.Language newLanguage)
	{
		try
		{
			if (statusText == null || string.IsNullOrEmpty(currentStatusKey))
			{
				return;
			}
			string localizedStatus = GetLocalizedStatusText(currentStatusKey, statusText.text);
			statusText.text = localizedStatus;
			Logger.Info("[UI] Status text updated to: " + localizedStatus);
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[UI] Error updating status text on language change: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	private static string GetLocalizedStatusText(string statusKey, string fallbackText)
	{
		return statusKey switch
		{
			"server_online" => LocalizationStrings.GetServerOnlineText(),
			"server_offline" => LocalizationStrings.GetServerOfflineText(),
			"steam_id_not_found" => LocalizationStrings.GetSteamIdNotFoundText(),
			"checking_server" => LocalizationStrings.GetServerStatusCheckText(),
			"logging_in" => LocalizationStrings.GetLoggingInText(),
			_ => fallbackText,
		};
	}

	private async void OnMainMenuShow()
	{
		Logger.Info("[UI] MainMenu shown, creating status panel...");
		SyncGameLanguage();
		CreateStatusText();
		await UniTask.Delay(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(0.5));
		await CheckServerStatus();
	}

	private void SyncGameLanguage()
	{
		try
		{
			Type type = Type.GetType("SodaCraft.Localizations.LocalizationManager, Assembly-CSharp");
			if (!(type != null))
			{
				return;
			}
			PropertyInfo property = type.GetProperty("CurrentLanguage", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
			if (property != null)
			{
				object value = property.GetValue(null);
				if (value != null)
				{
					string gameLanguageName = value.ToString();
					Logger.Info("[UI] 检测到游戏语言: " + gameLanguageName);
					LocalizationManager.Language language = MapSodaLanguage(gameLanguageName);
					LocalizationManager.SetLanguage(language);
					Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[UI] ✅ LocalizationManager语言已同步: {0}", language));
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[UI] ❌ 同步游戏语言失败: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	private static LocalizationManager.Language MapSodaLanguage(string languageName)
	{
		return languageName switch
		{
			"ChineseSimplified" => LocalizationManager.Language.ChineseSimplified,
			"ChineseTraditional" => LocalizationManager.Language.ChineseTraditional,
			"Japanese" => LocalizationManager.Language.Japanese,
			"Korean" => LocalizationManager.Language.Korean,
			_ => LocalizationManager.Language.English,
		};
	}

	private void OnMainMenuHide()
	{
		Logger.Info("[UI] MainMenu hidden, destroying status panel...");
		if (textObject != null)
		{
			Object.Destroy(textObject);
			textObject = null;
			statusText = null;
		}
	}

	private void CreateStatusText()
	{
		try
		{
			Canvas canvas = gameObject.AddComponent<Canvas>();
			canvas.renderMode = RenderMode.ScreenSpaceOverlay;
			canvas.sortingOrder = 1000;
			CanvasScaler canvasScaler = gameObject.AddComponent<CanvasScaler>();
			canvasScaler.uiScaleMode = CanvasScaler.ScaleMode.ScaleWithScreenSize;
			canvasScaler.referenceResolution = new Vector2(1920f, 1080f);
			gameObject.AddComponent<GraphicRaycaster>();
			textObject = new GameObject("DuckMarketStatusText");
			textObject.transform.SetParent(transform, worldPositionStays: false);
			statusText = textObject.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
			statusText.fontSize = 16f;
			statusText.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.BottomRight;
			statusText.color = new Color(1f, 1f, 1f, 0.8f);
			statusText.text = LocalizationStrings.GetServerStatusCheckText();
			statusText.fontStyle = FontStyles.Normal;
			currentStatusKey = "checking_server";
			currentStatusColor = new Color(1f, 1f, 1f, 0.8f);
			RectTransform component = textObject.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			component.anchorMin = new Vector2(1f, 0f);
			component.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 0f);
			component.pivot = new Vector2(1f, 0f);
			component.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(-20f, 80f);
			component.sizeDelta = new Vector2(400f, 70f);
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[UI] Status text created at position {0} (above game version)", component.anchoredPosition));
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[UI] Error creating status text: " + ex.Message + " " + ex.StackTrace);
		}
	}

	private async UniTask CheckServerStatus()
	{
		try
		{
			await UniTask.Delay(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(0.5));
			if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(ApiClient.AuthToken))
			{
				UpdateStatusText("server_online", LocalizationStrings.GetServerOnlineText(), new Color(0.3f, 1f, 0.3f, 1f));
				Logger.Info("[UI] Already logged in, server online");
				return;
			}
			UpdateStatusText("logging_in", LocalizationStrings.GetLoggingInText(), new Color(1f, 1f, 0.3f, 1f));
			Logger.Info("[UI] Login in progress, waiting...");
			for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++)
			{
				await UniTask.Delay(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(0.5));
				if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(ApiClient.AuthToken))
				{
					UpdateStatusText("server_online", LocalizationStrings.GetServerOnlineText(), new Color(0.3f, 1f, 0.3f, 1f));
					Logger.Info("[UI] Server online, login successful");
					return;
				}
			}
			UpdateStatusText("server_offline", LocalizationStrings.GetServerOfflineText(), new Color(1f, 0.3f, 0.3f, 1f));
			Logger.Warning("[UI] Server offline or login failed (timeout)");
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			UpdateStatusText("server_offline", LocalizationStrings.GetServerOfflineText(), new Color(1f, 0.3f, 0.3f, 1f));
			Logger.Error("[UI] Error checking server status: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	private void UpdateStatusText(string statusKey, string statusMessage, Color color)
	{
		if (statusText != null)
		{
			statusText.text = statusMessage;
			statusText.color = color;
			currentStatusKey = statusKey;
			currentStatusColor = color;
		}
	}

	private string GetSteamId()
	{
		try
		{
			return SteamUser.GetSteamID().ToString();
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[UI] Error getting Steam ID: " + ex.Message);
			return null;
		}
	}
}





```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.UI/MarketItemOperationMenu.cs`:

```cs
using DuckMarket.Core;
using DuckMarket.Services;
using Duckov.UI;
using Duckov.UI.Animations;
using ItemStatsSystem;
using TMPro;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UI;

namespace DuckMarket.UI;

public class MarketItemOperationMenu : MonoBehaviour
{
	private static MarketItemOperationMenu _instance;

	private RectTransform _rectTransform;

	private RectTransform _contentRectTransform;

	private FadeGroup _fadeGroup;

	private ItemDisplay _targetDisplay;

	private Item _displayingItem;

	private Image _icon;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _nameText;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _weightText;

	private Button _listForSaleButton;

	private Button _filterButton;

	public static MarketItemOperationMenu Instance
	{
		get
		{
			if (_instance == null && ItemOperationMenu.Instance != null)
			{
				_instance = CreateFrom(ItemOperationMenu.Instance);
			}
			return _instance;
		}
	}

	private void Update()
	{
		if (Input.GetKeyDown(KeyCode.Escape) || Input.GetMouseButtonDown(1))
		{
			Hide();
		}
	}

	private void OnDestroy()
	{
		if (_instance == this)
		{
			_instance = null;
		}
	}

	public static MarketItemOperationMenu CreateFrom(ItemOperationMenu originalMenu)
	{
		if (originalMenu == null)
		{
			Logger.Error("[MarketItemOperationMenu] ❌ 原始菜单为空，无法克隆");
			return null;
		}

		GameObject clonedMenu = Instantiate(originalMenu.gameObject, originalMenu.transform.parent);
		clonedMenu.name = "MarketItemOperationMenu";
		Destroy(clonedMenu.GetComponent<ItemOperationMenu>());

		MarketItemOperationMenu marketMenu = clonedMenu.AddComponent<MarketItemOperationMenu>();
		marketMenu.Initialize();
		Logger.Info("[MarketItemOperationMenu] ✅ 成功克隆市场专用菜单");
		return marketMenu;
	}

	private void Initialize()
	{
		_instance = this;
		_fadeGroup = GetComponent<FadeGroup>();
		_rectTransform = GetComponent<RectTransform>();
		_icon = transform.Find("Icon")?.GetComponent<Image>();
		_nameText = transform.Find("Name")?.GetComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
		_weightText = transform.Find("Weight")?.GetComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
		_contentRectTransform = transform.Find("Content")?.GetComponent<RectTransform>();

		Button useButton = FindButton("Content/btn_Use");
		Button splitButton = FindButton("Content/btn_Split");
		Button dumpButton = FindButton("Content/btn_Dump");
		Button equipButton = FindButton("Content/btn_Equip");
		Button modifyButton = FindButton("Content/btn_Modify");
		Button unloadButton = FindButton("Content/btn_Unload");
		Button wishlistButton = FindButton("Content/btn_Wishlist");

		Logger.Info(string.Format("[MarketItemOperationMenu] 找到按钮: Use={0}, Split={1}, Dump={2}", useButton != null, splitButton != null, dumpButton != null));
		HideButton(useButton);
		HideButton(splitButton);
		HideButton(dumpButton);
		HideButton(equipButton);
		HideButton(modifyButton);
		HideButton(unloadButton);
		HideButton(wishlistButton);

		Button templateButton = useButton ?? wishlistButton ?? dumpButton;
		if (templateButton == null || _contentRectTransform == null)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[MarketItemOperationMenu] ⚠️ 无法找到按钮模板或Content容器");
			return;
		}

		_listForSaleButton = Instantiate(templateButton, _contentRectTransform);
		_listForSaleButton.name = "btn_MarketListForSale";
		_listForSaleButton.gameObject.SetActive(true);
		SetButtonText(_listForSaleButton, LocalizationStrings.GetListButtonLabel());
		_listForSaleButton.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
		_listForSaleButton.onClick.AddListener(OnListForSaleClicked);

		_filterButton = Instantiate(templateButton, _contentRectTransform);
		_filterButton.name = "btn_MarketFilter";
		_filterButton.gameObject.SetActive(true);
		SetButtonText(_filterButton, LocalizationManager.GetText("menu.filter", "筛选"));
		_filterButton.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
		_filterButton.onClick.AddListener(OnFilterClicked);

		Logger.Info("[MarketItemOperationMenu] ✅ 初始化完成");
	}

	private Button FindButton(string path)
	{
		return transform.Find(path)?.GetComponent<Button>();
	}

	private static void HideButton(Button button)
	{
		if (button != null)
		{
			button.gameObject.SetActive(false);
		}
	}

	public void Show(ItemDisplay targetDisplay)
	{
		if (targetDisplay == null)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[MarketItemOperationMenu] ⚠️ targetDisplay is null");
			return;
		}

		_targetDisplay = targetDisplay;
		_displayingItem = targetDisplay.Target;
		if (_displayingItem == null)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[MarketItemOperationMenu] ⚠️ displayingItem is null");
			return;
		}

		if (_icon != null && _displayingItem.Icon != null)
		{
			_icon.sprite = _displayingItem.Icon;
			_icon.enabled = true;
		}
		if (_nameText != null)
		{
			_nameText.text = _displayingItem.DisplayName;
		}
		if (_weightText != null)
		{
			_weightText.text = string.Empty;
		}
		if (_listForSaleButton != null)
		{
			int itemCount = _displayingItem.Stackable ? _displayingItem.StackCount : 1;
			bool canList = itemCount > 0;
			_listForSaleButton.gameObject.SetActive(canList);
			Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[MarketItemOperationMenu] 物品数量: {0}, 显示上架按钮: {1}", itemCount, canList));
		}

		RefreshPosition();
		if (_fadeGroup != null)
		{
			_fadeGroup.Show();
		}
		else
		{
			gameObject.SetActive(true);
		}

		Logger.Verbose("[MarketItemOperationMenu] 显示菜单: " + _displayingItem.DisplayName);
	}

	public void Hide()
	{
		if (_fadeGroup != null)
		{
			_fadeGroup.Hide();
		}
		else
		{
			gameObject.SetActive(false);
		}
	}

	private void RefreshPosition()
	{
		if (_rectTransform == null)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[MarketItemOperationMenu] ⚠️ RectTransform is null");
			return;
		}

		Canvas canvas = GetComponentInParent<Canvas>();
		if (canvas == null || _rectTransform.parent is not RectTransform parentRect)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[MarketItemOperationMenu] ⚠️ Cannot find Canvas or parent rect");
			return;
		}

		Camera eventCamera = canvas.renderMode == RenderMode.ScreenSpaceOverlay ? null : canvas.worldCamera;
		RectTransformUtility.ScreenPointToLocalPointInRectangle(parentRect, Input.mousePosition, eventCamera, out Vector2 localPoint);
		_rectTransform.anchoredPosition = localPoint;
		Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[MarketItemOperationMenu] 位置: {0}, 鼠标: {1}", localPoint, Input.mousePosition));
	}

	private void OnListForSaleClicked()
	{
		Hide();
		if (_displayingItem == null)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[MarketItemOperationMenu] ⚠️ displayingItem is null");
			return;
		}

		LootView source = FindObjectOfType<LootView>();
		ListingCreationPanel.Show(_displayingItem, source);
		Logger.Info("[MarketItemOperationMenu] 打开上架面板: " + _displayingItem.DisplayName);
	}

	private void OnFilterClicked()
	{
		Hide();
		NotificationService.ShowNotification(LocalizationManager.GetText("menu.filter_coming_soon", "筛选功能即将上线"), playSound: false, NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Info);
	}

	private static void SetButtonText(Button button, string buttonLabel)
	{
		if (button == null)
		{
			return;
		}

		TextMeshProUGUI textMesh = button.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
		if (textMesh != null)
		{
			textMesh.text = buttonLabel;
			return;
		}

		Text legacyText = button.GetComponentInChildren<Text>();
		if (legacyText != null)
		{
			legacyText.text = buttonLabel;
		}
	}
}

```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.UI/PurchaseOrderCreationData.cs`:

```cs
using ItemStatsSystem;

namespace DuckMarket.UI;

public class PurchaseOrderCreationData
{
	public Item Item { get; set; }

	public int ItemTypeId { get; set; }

	public string ItemName { get; set; }

	public int Quantity { get; set; }

	public int PricePerUnit { get; set; }

	public float DurabilityRequirement { get; set; }

	public int TotalCost { get; set; }

	public int TaxFee { get; set; }

	public int FrozenAmount { get; set; }
}
```
