`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.UI/PurchaseOrderCreationPanel.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Linq;
using System.Reflection;
using Cysharp.Threading.Tasks;
using DuckMarket.Core;
using DuckMarket.Network;
using DuckMarket.Services;
using Duckov.Economy;
using Duckov.UI;
using Duckov.UI.Animations;
using Duckov.UI.PlayerStats;
using FleaMarket.UI;
using ItemStatsSystem;
using Saves;
using TMPro;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;
using UnityEngine.UI;

namespace DuckMarket.UI;

public class PurchaseOrderCreationPanel : ManagedUIElement
{
	private static PurchaseOrderCreationPanel _instance;

	private GameObject _averagePriceDisplay;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _averagePriceNameText;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _averagePriceValueText;

	private GameObject _highestPriceDisplay;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _highestPriceNameText;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _highestPriceValueText;

	private GameObject _lowestPriceDisplay;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _lowestPriceNameText;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _lowestPriceValueText;

	private GameObject _originalPriceDisplay;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _originalPriceNameText;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _originalPriceValueText;


	private GameObject _listingCountDisplay;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _listingCountNameText;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _listingCountValueText;


	private ItemDetailsDisplay _detailsDisplay;

	private FadeGroup _fadeGroup;

	private Button _closeButton;

	private bool _isSubmitting;

	private GameObject _quantityInputDisplay;

	private TMP_InputField _quantityInputField;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _quantityInputNameText;

	private GameObject _priceInputDisplay;

	private TMP_InputField _priceInputField;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _priceInputNameText;

	private GameObject _purchaseOrderButtonContainer;

	private Button _purchaseOrderButton;

	private Image _purchaseOrderButtonImage;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _purchaseOrderButtonText;

	private GameObject _purchaseOrderPriceDisplay;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _purchaseOrderPriceText;

	private Button _quickFillButton;

	private PurchaseOrderCreationData _purchaseOrderData;

	private Item _targetItem;

	private ManagedUIElement _sourceElement;

	private bool _isFromMarket;

	private decimal _recommendedPrice;

	public static PurchaseOrderCreationPanel Instance
	{
		get
		{
			if (_instance == null || !_instance)
			{
				_instance = UnityEngine.Object.FindObjectOfType<PurchaseOrderCreationPanel>();
			}
			return _instance;
		}
		private set
		{
			_instance = value;
		}
	}

	public static bool IsInitializing { get; private set; }

	protected override void Awake()
	{
		base.Awake();
		if (Instance == null)
		{
			Instance = this;
		}
		Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ========== 🚀 PurchaseOrderCreationPanel Awake ==========");
		try
		{
			FindItemDetailsDisplayComponents();
			if (_closeButton != null)
			{
				_closeButton.onClick.AddListener(OnCloseButtonClicked);
				Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel]   - ✅ 关闭按钮事件已设置");
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Warning("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel]   - ⚠️ 未找到关闭按钮");
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ========== ✅ 初始化完成 ==========");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] Awake失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	protected override void OnDestroy()
	{
		base.OnDestroy();
		if (Instance == this)
		{
			Instance = null;
		}
		Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] Destroyed");
	}

	private async UniTask<Item> CreateFullDurabilityItemForDisplayAsync(Item originalItem)
	{
		try
		{
			Item item = await ItemAssetsCollection.InstantiateAsync(originalItem.TypeID);
			if (item != null)
			{
				item.Initialize();
				if (item.MaxDurability > 0f)
				{
					item.Durability = item.MaxDurability;
					Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 创建满耐久副本: {0} 耐久度={1}/{2}", item.DisplayName, item.Durability, item.MaxDurability));
				}
				return item;
			}
			Logger.Warning("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 物品实例化失败，使用原物品");
			return originalItem;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 创建满耐久副本失败: {0}", arg));
			return originalItem;
		}
	}

	public static void Show(Item item, ManagedUIElement sourceElement = null, bool isFromMarket = false)
	{
		if (Instance == null)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] Instance is null, attempting to create...");
			if (!TryCreateInstance())
			{
				Logger.Error("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] Failed to create instance");
				return;
			}
		}
		CloseItemDetailsPanel();
		Instance.OpenPanel(item, sourceElement, isFromMarket);
	}

	private static bool TryCreateInstance()
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] Attempting to create instance by cloning ItemDetails from LootView...");
			LootView instance = LootView.Instance;
			if (instance == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] LootView.Instance is null");
				return false;
			}
			if (!instance.open)
			{
				Logger.Info("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] LootView is closed, opening it first...");
				instance.Open();
				Logger.Info("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ LootView opened");
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] Found LootView, searching for ItemDetailsDisplay...");
			Type typeFromHandle = typeof(LootView);
			FieldInfo field = typeFromHandle.GetField("detailsDisplay", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] Cannot find detailsDisplay field in LootView");
				return false;
			}
			ItemDetailsDisplay itemDetailsDisplay = field.GetValue(instance) as ItemDetailsDisplay;
			if (itemDetailsDisplay == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] detailsDisplay is null");
				return false;
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] Found ItemDetailsDisplay at: " + itemDetailsDisplay.gameObject.name);
			FieldInfo field2 = typeFromHandle.GetField("detailsFadeGroup", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			GameObject gameObject = null;
			if (field2 != null)
			{
				FadeGroup fadeGroup = field2.GetValue(instance) as FadeGroup;
				if (fadeGroup != null)
				{
					gameObject = fadeGroup.gameObject;
					Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] Using detailsFadeGroup as source: " + gameObject.name);
				}
			}
			if (gameObject == null)
			{
				gameObject = itemDetailsDisplay.gameObject;
				Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] Using ItemDetailsDisplay GameObject as source: " + gameObject.name);
			}
			GameObject gameObject2 = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(gameObject, gameObject.transform.parent);
			gameObject2.name = "PurchaseOrderCreationPanel";
			Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] Cloned GameObject: " + gameObject2.name + ", parent: " + gameObject2.transform.parent.name);
			gameObject2.SetActive(value: false);
			PurchaseOrderCreationPanel purchaseOrderCreationPanel = (Instance = gameObject2.AddComponent<PurchaseOrderCreationPanel>());
			if (Instance == null || purchaseOrderCreationPanel == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] Failed to create panel component");
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(gameObject2);
				return false;
			}
			gameObject2.SetActive(value: true);
			gameObject2.SetActive(value: false);
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] Instance created successfully (LootView kept open: {0})", instance.open));
			return true;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] Failed to create instance: {0}", arg));
			return false;
		}
	}

	private static void CloseItemDetailsPanel()
	{
		try
		{
			Type type = typeof(ItemDetailsDisplay).Assembly.GetType("Duckov.UI.ItemDetailsPanel");
			if (type != null)
			{
				FieldInfo field = type.GetField("instance", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				if (field != null)
				{
					ManagedUIElement managedUIElement = field.GetValue(null) as ManagedUIElement;
					if (managedUIElement != null && managedUIElement.open)
					{
						Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] Closing ItemDetailsPanel");
						managedUIElement.Close();
					}
				}
			}
			LootView instance = LootView.Instance;
			if (!(instance != null))
			{
				return;
			}
			FieldInfo field2 = typeof(LootView).GetField("detailsFadeGroup", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field2 != null)
			{
				FadeGroup fadeGroup = field2.GetValue(instance) as FadeGroup;
				if (fadeGroup != null)
				{
					Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] Hiding LootView ItemDetails");
					fadeGroup.Hide();
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] Failed to close ItemDetails: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void FindItemDetailsDisplayComponents()
	{
		try
		{
			_fadeGroup = GetComponentInChildren<FadeGroup>(includeInactive: true);
			if (_fadeGroup == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel]   - ❌ 找不到FadeGroup组件");
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel]   - ✅ 找到FadeGroup组件");
			}
			_detailsDisplay = GetComponentInChildren<ItemDetailsDisplay>(includeInactive: true);
			if (_detailsDisplay == null)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel]   - ⚠️ 找不到ItemDetailsDisplay组件");
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel]   - ✅ 找到ItemDetailsDisplay组件");
				HideUnnecessaryElements();
			}
			Button[] componentsInChildren = GetComponentsInChildren<Button>(includeInactive: true);
			foreach (Button button in componentsInChildren)
			{
				if (button.name.Contains("Close") || button.name.Contains("close"))
				{
					_closeButton = button;
					Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel]   - ✅ 找到关闭按钮: " + button.name);
					break;
				}
			}
			if (_closeButton == null)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel]   - ⚠️ 未找到关闭按钮");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 查找组件失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void HideUnnecessaryElements()
	{
		if (_detailsDisplay == null)
		{
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			Type typeFromHandle = typeof(ItemDetailsDisplay);
			FieldInfo field = typeFromHandle.GetField("propertiesParent", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field != null)
			{
				RectTransform rectTransform = field.GetValue(_detailsDisplay) as RectTransform;
				if (rectTransform != null)
				{
					rectTransform.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
					Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel]   - ✅ 已隐藏propertiesParent（包含效果、属性等）");
				}
			}
			FieldInfo field2 = typeFromHandle.GetField("usageUtilitiesDisplay", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field2 != null)
			{
				MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour = field2.GetValue(_detailsDisplay) as MonoBehaviour;
				if (monoBehaviour != null)
				{
					monoBehaviour.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
					Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel]   - ✅ 已隐藏usageUtilitiesDisplay");
				}
			}
			FieldInfo field3 = typeFromHandle.GetField("usableIndicator", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field3 != null)
			{
				GameObject gameObject = field3.GetValue(_detailsDisplay) as GameObject;
				if (gameObject != null)
				{
					gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
					Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel]   - ✅ 已隐藏usableIndicator");
				}
			}
			FieldInfo field4 = typeFromHandle.GetField("bulletTypeDisplay", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field4 != null)
			{
				MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour2 = field4.GetValue(_detailsDisplay) as MonoBehaviour;
				if (monoBehaviour2 != null)
				{
					monoBehaviour2.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
					Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel]   - ✅ 已隐藏bulletTypeDisplay");
				}
			}
			FieldInfo field5 = typeFromHandle.GetField("slotCollectionDisplay", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field5 != null)
			{
				MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour3 = field5.GetValue(_detailsDisplay) as MonoBehaviour;
				if (monoBehaviour3 != null)
				{
					monoBehaviour3.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
					Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel]   - ✅ 已隐藏slotCollectionDisplay");
				}
			}
			FieldInfo field6 = typeFromHandle.GetField("registeredIndicator", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field6 != null)
			{
				GameObject gameObject2 = field6.GetValue(_detailsDisplay) as GameObject;
				if (gameObject2 != null)
				{
					gameObject2.SetActive(value: false);
					Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel]   - ✅ 已隐藏registeredIndicator");
				}
			}
			Transform transform = null;
			transform = _detailsDisplay.transform.Find("Stats And Effects (Scroll View)");
			if (transform == null)
			{
				Transform transform2 = _detailsDisplay.transform.Find("ItemDisplayCore");
				if (transform2 != null)
				{
					transform = transform2.Find("Stats And Effects (Scroll View)");
				}
			}
			if (transform == null)
			{
				transform = FindChildRecursive(_detailsDisplay.transform, "Stats And Effects (Scroll View)");
			}
			if (transform != null)
			{
				transform.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel]   - ✅ 已隐藏Stats And Effects (Scroll View)");
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Warning("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel]   - ⚠️ 未找到Stats And Effects (Scroll View)");
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 所有不需要的UI元素已隐藏");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 隐藏UI元素失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private Transform FindChildRecursive(Transform parent, string name)
	{
		foreach (Transform item in parent)
		{
			if (item.name == name)
			{
				return item;
			}
			Transform transform2 = FindChildRecursive(item, name);
			if (transform2 != null)
			{
				return transform2;
			}
		}
		return null;
	}

	private void OnCloseButtonClicked()
	{
		Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] Close button clicked");
		Close();
	}

	private void OpenPanel(Item item, ManagedUIElement source, bool isFromMarket)
	{
		try
		{
			IsInitializing = true;
			Logger.Info("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 开始打开求购面板: " + item.DisplayName);
			_targetItem = item;
			_sourceElement = source;
			_isFromMarket = isFromMarket;
			_isSubmitting = false;
			_purchaseOrderData = new PurchaseOrderCreationData
			{
				Item = item,
				ItemTypeId = item.TypeID,
				ItemName = item.DisplayName,
				Quantity = 1,
				PricePerUnit = 0,
				DurabilityRequirement = 100f
			};
			_recommendedPrice = item.Value;
			EnsureUIComponentsCreated();
			UpdateAllDisplays();
			Open(source);
			Logger.Info("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 求购发布面板已打开: " + item.DisplayName);
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 打开面板失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	protected override void OnOpen()
	{
		if (_purchaseOrderData?.Item == null)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] OnOpen called but target item is null");
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			Logger.Info("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] OnOpen called for: " + _purchaseOrderData.Item.DisplayName);
			if (!base.gameObject.activeSelf)
			{
				base.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
				Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] GameObject activated");
			}
			EnsureUIComponentsCreated();
			if (_detailsDisplay != null)
			{
				MethodInfo setupMethod = typeof(ItemDetailsDisplay).GetMethod("Setup", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				if (setupMethod != null)
				{
					CreateFullDurabilityItemForDisplayAsync(_purchaseOrderData.Item).ContinueWith<Item>(delegate(Item displayItem)
					{
						if (displayItem != null && _detailsDisplay != null)
						{
							setupMethod.Invoke(_detailsDisplay, new object[1] { displayItem });
							Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ItemDetailsDisplay.Setup called for: " + displayItem.DisplayName + " (满耐久显示)");
						}
					}).Forget();
				}
			}
			if (_quantityInputField != null)
			{
				_quantityInputField.text = _purchaseOrderData.Quantity.ToString();
				_quantityInputField.interactable = true;
				if (_quantityInputField.transform.parent != null)
				{
					GameObject gameObject = _quantityInputField.transform.parent.gameObject;
					if (!gameObject.activeSelf)
					{
						gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
						Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 激活数量输入框GameObject");
					}
				}
			}
			if (_priceInputField != null)
			{
				_priceInputField.text = _purchaseOrderData.PricePerUnit.ToString();
				_priceInputField.interactable = true;
				if (_priceInputField.transform.parent != null)
				{
					GameObject gameObject2 = _priceInputField.transform.parent.gameObject;
					if (!gameObject2.activeSelf)
					{
						gameObject2.SetActive(value: true);
						Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 激活单价输入框GameObject");
					}
				}
			}
			if (_purchaseOrderButton != null && !_purchaseOrderButton.gameObject.activeSelf)
			{
				_purchaseOrderButton.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
				Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 激活发布求购按钮");
			}
			UpdateAllDisplays();
			LoadMarketStatisticsAsync().Forget();
			if (_fadeGroup != null)
			{
				_fadeGroup.Show();
				Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] FadeGroup.Show() called");
			}
			IsInitializing = false;
			Logger.Info("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ OnOpen completed - 面板已完全显示");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] OnOpen failed: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	protected override void OnClose()
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] OnClose called");
			IsInitializing = false;
			bool isFromMarket = _isFromMarket;
			_purchaseOrderData = null;
			_targetItem = null;
			_sourceElement = null;
			_isFromMarket = false;
			_recommendedPrice = default(decimal);
			if (_fadeGroup != null)
			{
				_fadeGroup.Hide();
				Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] FadeGroup.Hide() called");
			}
			if (isFromMarket)
			{
				Logger.Info("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 用户取消求购，返回市场界面");
				LootView instance = LootView.Instance;
				if (instance != null && instance.open)
				{
					Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 关闭 LootView");
					instance.Close();
				}
				UniTask.Delay(200).ContinueWith(delegate
				{
					try
					{
						Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 重新打开新市场界面");
						DuckMarketView_NoteClone instance2 = DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Instance;
						if (instance2 != null)
						{
							instance2.Open();
							Logger.Info("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 新市场界面已打开");
						}
						else
						{
							Logger.Warning("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ⚠️ 新市场界面实例为空");
						}
					}
					catch (Exception arg2)
					{
						Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 打开市场界面失败: {0}", arg2));
					}
				}).Forget();
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 销毁克隆的GameObject");
			UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(base.gameObject);
			Instance = null;
			Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ OnClose completed");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] OnClose failed: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void EnsureUIComponentsCreated()
	{
		if (_quantityInputField != null && _priceInputField != null && _purchaseOrderButton != null)
		{
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ========== 开始创建求购UI组件 ==========");
			_detailsDisplay = GetComponent<ItemDetailsDisplay>();
			if (_detailsDisplay == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ❌ 无法找到 ItemDetailsDisplay 组件");
				return;
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 找到 ItemDetailsDisplay: " + _detailsDisplay.name);
			CreateInputComponents();
			CreateButtonComponents();
			Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ========== 求购UI组件创建完成 ==========");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] UI组件创建失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void CreateInputComponents()
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 创建输入组件...");
			Transform transform = FindChildRecursive(_detailsDisplay.transform, "Tags");
			if (transform == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 无法找到Tags GameObject");
				return;
			}
			Transform transform2 = transform.parent;
			if (transform2 == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 无法找到ItemDisplayCore");
				return;
			}
			int siblingIndex = transform.GetSiblingIndex();
			GameObject gameObject = FindStatDisplayTemplate();
			if (gameObject == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 无法找到StatDisplay模板");
				return;
			}
			Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 找到Tags索引: {0}, 模板: {1}", siblingIndex, gameObject.name));
			_originalPriceDisplay = CreateBarDisplay(gameObject, transform2, "OriginalPriceDisplay", siblingIndex + 1, 0f, ref _originalPriceNameText, ref _originalPriceValueText, "推荐价格", "数据加载中...");
			_listingCountDisplay = CreateBarDisplay(gameObject, transform2, "ListingCountDisplay", siblingIndex + 2, 0f, ref _listingCountNameText, ref _listingCountValueText, "在售数量", "数据加载中...");
			_highestPriceDisplay = CreateBarDisplay(gameObject, transform2, "HighestPriceDisplay", siblingIndex + 3, 0f, ref _highestPriceNameText, ref _highestPriceValueText, "最高售价", "数据加载中...");
			_lowestPriceDisplay = CreateBarDisplay(gameObject, transform2, "LowestPriceDisplay", siblingIndex + 4, 0f, ref _lowestPriceNameText, ref _lowestPriceValueText, "最低售价", "数据加载中...");
			_averagePriceDisplay = CreateBarDisplay(gameObject, transform2, "AveragePriceDisplay", siblingIndex + 5, 0f, ref _averagePriceNameText, ref _averagePriceValueText, "平均售价", "数据加载中...");
			GameObject obj = new GameObject("Spacer_AfterAveragePrice");
			obj.transform.SetParent(transform2, worldPositionStays: false);
			obj.transform.SetSiblingIndex(siblingIndex + 6);
			RectTransform rectTransform = obj.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
			rectTransform.anchorMin = new Vector2(0f, 1f);
			rectTransform.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 1f);
			rectTransform.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1f);
			rectTransform.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0f, 15f);
			LayoutElement layoutElement = obj.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
			layoutElement.minHeight = 15f;
			layoutElement.preferredHeight = 15f;
			Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 在平均售价后添加15px间距");
			_quantityInputDisplay = CreateEditableBarDisplay(gameObject, transform2, "QuantityInputDisplay", siblingIndex + 7, ref _quantityInputNameText, ref _quantityInputField, LocalizationStrings.GetPurchaseQuantityInputLabel(), "1");
			if (_quantityInputDisplay == null || _quantityInputField == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ❌❌❌ 求购数量输入框创建失败！这是严重问题！");
				Logger.Error("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel]   - _quantityInputDisplay: " + ((_quantityInputDisplay == null) ? "NULL" : "OK"));
				Logger.Error("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel]   - _quantityInputField: " + ((_quantityInputField == null) ? "NULL" : "OK"));
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 求购数量输入框创建成功");
			}
			_priceInputDisplay = CreateEditableBarDisplay(gameObject, transform2, "PriceInputDisplay", siblingIndex + 8, ref _priceInputNameText, ref _priceInputField, LocalizationStrings.GetPurchasePriceInputLabel(), "0", 50f);
			if (_priceInputDisplay == null || _priceInputField == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ❌❌❌ 求购单价输入框创建失败！这是严重问题！");
				Logger.Error("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel]   - _priceInputDisplay: " + ((_priceInputDisplay == null) ? "NULL" : "OK"));
				Logger.Error("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel]   - _priceInputField: " + ((_priceInputField == null) ? "NULL" : "OK"));
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 求购单价输入框创建成功");
			}
			CreateQuickFillButton();
			CreatePurchaseOrderButton();
			BindInputFieldEvents();
			Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 输入组件创建完成");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 创建输入组件失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void CreateButtonComponents()
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 创建按钮组件...");
			Transform transform = FindChildRecursive(_detailsDisplay.transform, "Tags");
			if (transform == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 无法找到Tags GameObject");
				return;
			}
			if (transform.parent == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 无法找到ItemDisplayCore");
				return;
			}
			transform.GetSiblingIndex();
			if (FindStatDisplayTemplate() == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 无法找到StatDisplay模板");
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 按钮组件创建完成");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 创建按钮组件失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void HideUnnecessaryUIElements()
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 不需要的UI元素已隐藏");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 隐藏UI元素失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void UpdateAllDisplays()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_purchaseOrderData == null)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] _purchaseOrderData is null, cannot update displays");
				return;
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 更新显示: " + _purchaseOrderData.ItemName);
			int totalCost = _purchaseOrderData.Quantity * _purchaseOrderData.PricePerUnit;
			int taxFee = CalculatePurchaseOrderTax(_purchaseOrderData.Quantity, _purchaseOrderData.PricePerUnit, _recommendedPrice);
			int frozenAmount = totalCost + taxFee;
			_purchaseOrderData.TotalCost = totalCost;
			_purchaseOrderData.TaxFee = taxFee;
			_purchaseOrderData.FrozenAmount = frozenAmount;
			Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 更新显示: 总费用={0}, 手续费={1}, 冻结金额={2}", totalCost, taxFee, frozenAmount));
			UpdatePurchaseOrderButtonDisplay();
			UpdatePurchaseOrderButtonState();
			Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 显示更新完成");
		}
		catch (Exception exception)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 更新显示失败: {0}", exception));
		}
	}

	private void UpdatePurchaseOrderButtonDisplay()
	{
		try
		{
			if (!(_purchaseOrderPriceText == null) && _purchaseOrderData != null)
			{
				int totalCost = _purchaseOrderData.TotalCost;
				int taxFee = _purchaseOrderData.TaxFee;
				int frozenAmount = _purchaseOrderData.FrozenAmount;
				_purchaseOrderPriceText.text = LocalizationStrings.GetPriceWithTaxFormat(frozenAmount, taxFee);
				if (_purchaseOrderButtonText != null)
				{
					_purchaseOrderButtonText.text = LocalizationStrings.GetCreatePurchaseOrderButtonLabel();
					Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 更新求购按钮显示: 总费用={0}, 手续费={1}, 冻结金额={2}", totalCost, taxFee, frozenAmount));
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 更新求购按钮显示失败: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	private void UpdatePurchaseOrderButtonState()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_purchaseOrderButton == null || _purchaseOrderButtonImage == null || _purchaseOrderData == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			int frozenAmount = _purchaseOrderData.FrozenAmount;
			long currentMoney = EconomyManager.Money;
			bool hasEnoughMoney = currentMoney >= frozenAmount;
			bool passesPriceFloor = true;
			if (_recommendedPrice > 0m)
			{
				int pricePerUnit = _purchaseOrderData.PricePerUnit;
				decimal minimumAllowedPrice = _recommendedPrice * 0.5m;
				passesPriceFloor = (decimal)pricePerUnit >= minimumAllowedPrice;
				if (!passesPriceFloor)
				{
					Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 价格过低限制: 当前={0}, 推荐={1}, 最低允许={2:F0}", pricePerUnit, _recommendedPrice, minimumAllowedPrice));
				}
			}
			bool canSubmitOrder = hasEnoughMoney && passesPriceFloor;
			_purchaseOrderButton.interactable = canSubmitOrder;
			if (canSubmitOrder)
			{
				_purchaseOrderButtonImage.color = new Color(0.4f, 0.7f, 1f, 1f);
			}
			else
			{
				_purchaseOrderButtonImage.color = new Color(0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f, 1f);
			}
			Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 按钮状态更新: 需要金额={0:N0}, 当前金额={1:N0}, 金额足够={2}, 价格有效={3}, 按钮启用={4}", frozenAmount, currentMoney, hasEnoughMoney, passesPriceFloor, canSubmitOrder));
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 更新按钮状态失败: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	private async UniTaskVoid LoadMarketStatisticsAsync()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_purchaseOrderData != null && !(_targetItem == null))
			{
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] Loading market statistics for TypeID: {0}", _targetItem.TypeID));
				int currentSlot = SavesSystem.CurrentSlot;
				float durabilityPercent = 100f;
				ItemStatistics itemStatistics = await ApiClient.GetItemStatisticsAsync(_targetItem.TypeID, durabilityPercent, currentSlot);
				if (itemStatistics != null)
				{
					Logger.Info("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] Market statistics loaded successfully");
					UpdateMarketStatsDisplay(itemStatistics);
				}
				else
				{
					Logger.Warning("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] Failed to load market statistics");
					UpdateMarketStatsDisplay(null);
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception exception)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] Error loading market statistics: {0}", exception));
			UpdateMarketStatsDisplay(null);
		}
	}

	private void UpdateMarketStatsDisplay(ItemStatistics statistics)
	{
		try
		{
			if (_originalPriceValueText != null && statistics != null)
			{
				decimal recommendedPriceValue;
				if (statistics.market_price.HasValue)
				{
					recommendedPriceValue = statistics.market_price.Value;
					_originalPriceValueText.color = new Color(0.478f, 0.898f, 0.561f, 1f);
					Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 推荐价格: {0:N0} (使用API market_price)", recommendedPriceValue));
				}
				else if (statistics.base_market_price.HasValue)
				{
					recommendedPriceValue = statistics.base_market_price.Value;
					_originalPriceValueText.color = new Color(0.8f, 0.8f, 0.8f, 1f);
					Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 推荐价格: {0:N0} (使用API base_market_price)", recommendedPriceValue));
				}
				else
				{
					recommendedPriceValue = _purchaseOrderData.Item.Value;
					_originalPriceValueText.color = new Color(0.8f, 0.8f, 0.8f, 1f);
					Logger.Warning(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 推荐价格: {0:N0} (API无数据，回退使用item.Value)", recommendedPriceValue));
				}
				_originalPriceValueText.text = FormatNumber(recommendedPriceValue);
				_recommendedPrice = recommendedPriceValue;
			}
			else if (_originalPriceValueText != null && _purchaseOrderData?.Item != null)
			{
				decimal fallbackRecommendedPrice = _purchaseOrderData.Item.Value;
				_originalPriceValueText.text = FormatNumber(fallbackRecommendedPrice);
				_originalPriceValueText.color = new Color(0.8f, 0.8f, 0.8f, 1f);
				_recommendedPrice = fallbackRecommendedPrice;
				Logger.Warning(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 推荐价格: {0:N0} (无API数据，使用item.Value)", fallbackRecommendedPrice));
			}
			if (statistics == null || statistics.active_listings == 0)
			{
				if (_listingCountValueText != null)
				{
					_listingCountValueText.text = "0";
					_listingCountValueText.color = new Color(0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f, 1f);
				}
				if (_highestPriceValueText != null)
				{
					_highestPriceValueText.text = LocalizationStrings.GetNoDataLabel();
					_highestPriceValueText.color = new Color(0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f, 1f);
				}
				if (_lowestPriceValueText != null)
				{
					_lowestPriceValueText.text = LocalizationStrings.GetNoDataLabel();
					_lowestPriceValueText.color = new Color(0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f, 1f);
				}
				if (_averagePriceValueText != null)
				{
					_averagePriceValueText.text = LocalizationStrings.GetNoDataLabel();
					_averagePriceValueText.color = new Color(0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f, 1f);
				}
				return;
			}
			if (_listingCountValueText != null)
			{
				_listingCountValueText.text = statistics.active_listings.ToString();
				_listingCountValueText.color = new Color(0.6f, 0.8f, 1f, 1f);
			}
			if (_highestPriceValueText != null)
			{
				if (statistics.max_price.HasValue)
				{
					_highestPriceValueText.text = string.Format("{0:N0}", statistics.max_price.Value);
					_highestPriceValueText.color = new Color(0.6f, 0.8f, 1f, 1f);
				}
				else
				{
					_highestPriceValueText.text = LocalizationStrings.GetNoDataLabel();
					_highestPriceValueText.color = new Color(0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f, 1f);
				}
			}
			if (_lowestPriceValueText != null)
			{
				if (statistics.min_price.HasValue)
				{
					_lowestPriceValueText.text = string.Format("{0:N0}", statistics.min_price.Value);
					_lowestPriceValueText.color = new Color(0.6f, 0.8f, 1f, 1f);
				}
				else
				{
					_lowestPriceValueText.text = LocalizationStrings.GetNoDataLabel();
					_lowestPriceValueText.color = new Color(0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f, 1f);
				}
			}
			if (_averagePriceValueText != null)
			{
				if (statistics.avg_price.HasValue)
				{
					_averagePriceValueText.text = string.Format("{0:N0}", statistics.avg_price.Value);
					_averagePriceValueText.color = new Color(0.6f, 0.8f, 1f, 1f);
				}
				else
				{
					_averagePriceValueText.text = LocalizationStrings.GetNoDataLabel();
					_averagePriceValueText.color = new Color(0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f, 1f);
				}
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 市场统计信息显示更新完成");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 更新市场统计信息显示失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private async void OnPurchaseOrderButtonClicked()
	{
		if (_isSubmitting)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 已在提交中，忽略点击");
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			_isSubmitting = true;
			Logger.Info("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 求购发布按钮被点击");
			if (!ValidatePurchaseOrderData())
			{
				return;
			}
			var (flag, text) = await ApiClient.CreatePurchaseOrderAsync(_purchaseOrderData.ItemTypeId, _purchaseOrderData.ItemName, _purchaseOrderData.Quantity, _purchaseOrderData.PricePerUnit, _purchaseOrderData.DurabilityRequirement, _purchaseOrderData.TaxFee);
			if (flag)
			{
				Logger.Info("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 求购订单发布成功: " + _purchaseOrderData.ItemName);
				int frozenAmount = _purchaseOrderData.FrozenAmount;
				long money = EconomyManager.Money;
				EconomyManager.Add(-frozenAmount);
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 💰 扣除冻结资金: {0:N0}, 余额: {1:N0} → {2:N0}", frozenAmount, money, EconomyManager.Money));
				NotificationService.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetPurchaseOrderPublishSuccessNotification(_purchaseOrderData.ItemName, _purchaseOrderData.Quantity, frozenAmount), playSound: false);
				Close();
				if (_isFromMarket)
				{
					DuckMarketView_NoteClone marketView = DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Instance;
					if (marketView != null)
					{
						marketView.Open();
						await UniTask.DelayFrame(2);
						marketView.RefreshPurchaseOrders();
					}
				}
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Error("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ❌ 求购订单发布失败: " + text);
				NotificationService.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetPurchaseOrderPublishFailedNotification(text), playSound: false, NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Error);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 求购发布失败: {0}", arg));
			NotificationService.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetPurchaseOrderPublishFailedGenericNotification(), playSound: false, NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Error);
		}
		finally
		{
			_isSubmitting = false;
		}
	}

	private bool ValidatePurchaseOrderData()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_purchaseOrderData.Quantity <= 0)
			{
				NotificationService.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetQuantityMustBePositiveError(), playSound: false);
				return false;
			}
			if (_purchaseOrderData.Quantity > 999)
			{
				NotificationService.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetQuantityExceedsMaxError(999), playSound: false);
				return false;
			}
			if (_purchaseOrderData.PricePerUnit < 0)
			{
				NotificationService.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetPriceCannotBeNegativeError(), playSound: false);
				return false;
			}
			if (_recommendedPrice > 0m)
			{
				decimal minimumAllowedPrice = _recommendedPrice * 0.5m;
				if (_purchaseOrderData.PricePerUnit < (int)minimumAllowedPrice)
				{
					NotificationService.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetPriceBelowMinimumError((int)minimumAllowedPrice), playSound: false);
					return false;
				}
			}
			int frozenAmount = _purchaseOrderData.FrozenAmount;
			if (!HasEnoughMoney(frozenAmount))
			{
				NotificationService.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetInsufficientFundsWithTaxNotification(frozenAmount), playSound: false);
				return false;
			}
			if (_purchaseOrderData.TaxFee < 0)
			{
				NotificationService.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetTaxCalculationErrorNotification(), playSound: false);
				Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] Invalid tax fee: {0}", _purchaseOrderData.TaxFee));
				return false;
			}
			Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 验证通过: {0} x{1} @ {2}, 税费={3}, 冻结={4}", _purchaseOrderData.ItemName, _purchaseOrderData.Quantity, _purchaseOrderData.PricePerUnit, _purchaseOrderData.TaxFee, _purchaseOrderData.FrozenAmount));
			return true;
		}
		catch (Exception exception)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 验证数据失败: {0}", exception));
			return false;
		}
	}

	private bool HasEnoughMoney(int amount)
	{
		try
		{
			return EconomyManager.Money >= amount;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 检查资金失败: {0}", arg));
			return false;
		}
	}

	private GameObject FindStatDisplayTemplate()
	{
		try
		{
			GameObject gameObject = GameObject.Find("LevelConfig/LevelManager(Clone)/GameplayUICanvas/Tabs/ViewArea/PlayerStatsView/Content/TreeMapPanel/Stats/Scroll View/Viewport/Content");
			if (gameObject != null)
			{
				for (int i = 0; i < gameObject.transform.childCount; i++)
				{
					Transform child = gameObject.transform.GetChild(i);
					if (child.name == "StatDisplay_WalkSpeed" || child.name.StartsWith("StatDisplay_"))
					{
						Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 找到StatDisplay模板: " + child.name);
						return child.gameObject;
					}
				}
				for (int j = 0; j < gameObject.transform.childCount; j++)
				{
					Transform child2 = gameObject.transform.GetChild(j);
					if (child2.name.StartsWith("BarDisplay_"))
					{
						Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ⚠️ 使用备用BarDisplay模板: " + child2.name);
						return child2.gameObject;
					}
				}
			}
			Logger.Warning("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 无法找到StatDisplay模板");
			return null;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 查找StatDisplay模板失败: {0}", arg));
			return null;
		}
	}

	private static object GetItemProperty(object item, string propertyName)
	{
		try
		{
			if (item == null)
			{
				return null;
			}
			PropertyInfo property = item.GetType().GetProperty(propertyName);
			if (property != null)
			{
				return property.GetValue(item);
			}
			return null;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 获取Item属性失败: " + propertyName + ", " + ex.Message);
			return null;
		}
	}

	private void CreatePurchaseOrderButton()
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ========== 开始创建求购按钮 ==========");
			GameObject gameObject = GameObject.Find("LevelConfig/LevelManager(Clone)/GameplayUICanvas/StockShopView");
			if (gameObject == null)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 未找到StockShopView，无法克隆ButtonContainer");
				return;
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 找到StockShopView: " + gameObject.name);
			string buttonContainerPath = "ItemDetails/Panel/ButtonContainer";
			Transform transform = gameObject.transform.Find(buttonContainerPath);
			if (transform == null)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 未找到ButtonContainer（路径: " + buttonContainerPath + "）");
				return;
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 找到ButtonContainer: " + transform.name);
			Transform[] componentsInChildren = transform.GetComponentsInChildren<Transform>(includeInactive: true);
			for (int i = 0; i < componentsInChildren.Length; i++)
			{
				componentsInChildren[i].gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
			}
			_purchaseOrderButtonContainer = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(transform.gameObject);
			_purchaseOrderButtonContainer.name = "PurchaseOrderButtonContainer";
			Transform transform2 = base.gameObject.transform.Find("Panel");
			if (transform2 == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 未找到Panel");
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(_purchaseOrderButtonContainer);
				return;
			}
			Transform transform3 = transform2.Find("ItemDisplayCore");
			if (transform3 == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 未找到ItemDisplayCore");
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(_purchaseOrderButtonContainer);
				return;
			}
			_purchaseOrderButtonContainer.transform.SetParent(transform2, worldPositionStays: false);
			_purchaseOrderButtonContainer.transform.SetSiblingIndex(transform3.GetSiblingIndex() + 1);
			Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ ButtonContainer已放置在ItemDisplayCore下方");
			_purchaseOrderButton = _purchaseOrderButtonContainer.GetComponentInChildren<Button>(includeInactive: true);
			Transform transform4 = _purchaseOrderButton?.transform.Find("BG");
			_purchaseOrderButtonImage = transform4?.GetComponent<Image>();
			if (transform4 == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ❌ 未找到BG");
				return;
			}
			Transform transform5 = transform4.Find("Line1/Lock");
			if (transform5 != null)
			{
				transform5.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
			}
			Transform transform6 = transform4.Find("Line1/CannotBeSoldIndicator");
			if (transform6 != null)
			{
				transform6.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
			}
			Transform transform7 = transform4.Find("Line2/CashIndicator");
			if (transform7 != null)
			{
				transform7.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
			}
			Transform transform8 = transform4.Find("Line1/InputIndicator");
			if (transform8 != null)
			{
				transform8.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
			}
			Transform transform9 = transform4.Find("Line2/Price");
			if (transform9 != null)
			{
				_purchaseOrderPriceDisplay = transform9.gameObject;
				_purchaseOrderPriceDisplay.SetActive(value: true);
				_purchaseOrderPriceText = transform9.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
				Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 找到Price组件");
			}
			Transform transform10 = transform4.Find("Line1/Text (TMP)");
			if (transform10 != null)
			{
				_purchaseOrderButtonText = transform10.GetComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
				if (_purchaseOrderButtonText != null)
				{
					_purchaseOrderButtonText.text = LocalizationStrings.GetCreatePurchaseOrderButtonLabel();
					_purchaseOrderButtonText.richText = true;
					Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 设置按钮文字: " + _purchaseOrderButtonText.text);
				}
			}
			Color color;
			try
			{
				Component component = gameObject.GetComponent(Type.GetType("Duckov.Economy.UI.StockShopView, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core"));
				if (component != null)
				{
					Type type = component.GetType();
					BindingFlags bindingAttr = BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic;
					FieldInfo field = type.GetField("buttonColor_Interactable", bindingAttr);
					if (field != null)
					{
						color = (Color)field.GetValue(component);
						Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 读取游戏原生按钮颜色: {0}", color));
					}
					else
					{
						color = new Color(0.2f, 0.5f, 1f, 1f);
					}
				}
				else
				{
					color = new Color(0.2f, 0.5f, 1f, 1f);
				}
			}
			catch (Exception ex)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ⚠️ 读取游戏原生按钮颜色失败: " + ex.Message);
				color = new Color(0.2f, 0.5f, 1f, 1f);
			}
			if (_purchaseOrderButtonImage != null)
			{
				_purchaseOrderButtonImage.color = color;
				Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 设置按钮颜色为游戏原生颜色");
			}
			if (_purchaseOrderButton != null)
			{
				_purchaseOrderButton.transition = Selectable.Transition.None;
				Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 禁用Button的ColorTint过渡");
			}
			if (_purchaseOrderButton != null)
			{
				_purchaseOrderButton.onClick.AddListener(OnPurchaseOrderButtonClicked);
				Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 绑定按钮点击事件");
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ========== ✅ 求购按钮创建完成 ==========");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 创建求购按钮失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void BindInputFieldEvents()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_quantityInputField != null)
			{
				_quantityInputField.onValueChanged.AddListener(OnInputFieldChanged);
				Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 绑定数量输入框变化事件");
			}
			if (_priceInputField != null)
			{
				_priceInputField.onValueChanged.AddListener(OnInputFieldChanged);
				Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 绑定单价输入框变化事件");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 绑定输入字段事件失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void OnInputFieldChanged(string value)
	{
		try
		{
			if (_purchaseOrderData == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 输入框变化: " + value);
			if (_quantityInputField != null)
			{
				string quantityInputText = _quantityInputField.text?.Trim() ?? "";
				int result;
				if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(quantityInputText))
				{
					_purchaseOrderData.Quantity = 1;
					Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 数量为空，默认设为1");
				}
				else if (int.TryParse(quantityInputText, out result) && result > 0)
				{
					_purchaseOrderData.Quantity = result;
					Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 更新数量: {0}", result));
				}
				else
				{
					_purchaseOrderData.Quantity = 1;
					Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 数量无效，默认设为1");
				}
			}
			if (_priceInputField != null)
			{
				string priceInputText = _priceInputField.text?.Trim() ?? "";
				int result2;
				if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(priceInputText))
				{
					_purchaseOrderData.PricePerUnit = 0;
					Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 单价为空，默认设为0");
				}
				else if (int.TryParse(priceInputText, out result2) && result2 >= 0)
				{
					_purchaseOrderData.PricePerUnit = result2;
					Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 更新单价: {0}", result2));
				}
				else
				{
					_purchaseOrderData.PricePerUnit = 0;
					Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 单价无效，默认设为0");
				}
			}
			UpdateAllDisplays();
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 处理输入变化失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void UpdateBarDisplayValue(GameObject barDisplay, string value)
	{
		try
		{
			if (barDisplay == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren = barDisplay.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
			if (componentsInChildren.Length >= 2)
			{
				componentsInChildren[1].text = value;
			}
			else if (componentsInChildren.Length == 1)
			{
				string currentLabelText = componentsInChildren[0].text;
				int colonIndex = currentLabelText.IndexOf(':');
				if (colonIndex >= 0)
				{
					string labelPrefix = currentLabelText.Substring(0, colonIndex + 1);
					componentsInChildren[0].text = labelPrefix + " " + value;
				}
				else
				{
					componentsInChildren[0].text = value;
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception exception)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 更新BarDisplay值失败: {0}", exception));
		}
	}

	private GameObject CreateBarDisplay(GameObject template, Transform parent, string name, int siblingIndex, float yOffset, ref TextMeshProUGUI nameText, ref TextMeshProUGUI valueText, string labelText, string defaultValue)
	{
		try
		{
			GameObject gameObject = CreateStatDisplay(template, parent, name, siblingIndex);
			if (gameObject == null)
			{
				return null;
			}
			Type typeFromHandle = typeof(MainCharacterStatValueDisplay);
			Component component = gameObject.GetComponent(typeFromHandle);
			if (component != null)
			{
				FieldInfo field = typeFromHandle.GetField("displayNameText", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				FieldInfo field2 = typeFromHandle.GetField("valueText", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				nameText = field?.GetValue(component) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				valueText = field2?.GetValue(component) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				if (nameText != null)
				{
					nameText.text = labelText;
				}
				if (valueText != null)
				{
					valueText.text = defaultValue;
				}
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(component as MonoBehaviour);
				Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel]   - ✅ 创建 " + name + "（使用 StatDisplay）");
			}
			else
			{
				Type typeFromHandle2 = typeof(BarDisplay);
				Component component2 = gameObject.GetComponent(typeFromHandle2);
				if (component2 != null)
				{
					FieldInfo field3 = typeFromHandle2.GetField("text_Label", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
					FieldInfo field4 = typeFromHandle2.GetField("text_Current", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
					nameText = field3?.GetValue(component2) as TextMeshProUGUI;
					valueText = field4?.GetValue(component2) as TextMeshProUGUI;
					if (nameText != null)
					{
						nameText.text = labelText;
					}
					if (valueText != null)
					{
						valueText.text = defaultValue;
					}
					FieldInfo field5 = typeFromHandle2.GetField("fill", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
					FieldInfo field6 = typeFromHandle2.GetField("text_Max", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
					Image image = field5?.GetValue(component2) as Image;
					TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = field6?.GetValue(component2) as TextMeshProUGUI;
					if (image != null)
					{
						image.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
					}
					if (textMeshProUGUI != null)
					{
						textMeshProUGUI.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
					}
					Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel]   - ✅ 创建 " + name + "（使用 BarDisplay）");
				}
			}
			TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren = gameObject.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
			foreach (TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI2 in componentsInChildren)
			{
				if (textMeshProUGUI2 != null && textMeshProUGUI2.text != null && textMeshProUGUI2.text.Trim() == "/")
				{
					textMeshProUGUI2.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				}
			}
			return gameObject;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 创建 BarDisplay 失败 ({0}): {1}", name, arg));
			return null;
		}
	}

	private GameObject CreateStatDisplay(GameObject template, Transform parent, string name, int siblingIndex)
	{
		try
		{
			GameObject gameObject = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(template, parent);
			gameObject.name = name;
			gameObject.transform.SetSiblingIndex(siblingIndex);
			string[] source = new string[2]
			{
				"MainCharacterStatValueDisplay",
				"StatDisplay"
			};
			MonoBehaviour[] components = gameObject.GetComponents<MonoBehaviour>();
			foreach (MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour in components)
			{
				if (monoBehaviour != null)
				{
					string typeName = monoBehaviour.GetType().Name;
					if (source.Any((string value) => typeName.Contains(value)))
					{
						UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(monoBehaviour);
						Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel]       - 移除组件: " + typeName);
					}
				}
			}
			Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel]     - 克隆 StatDisplay: {0} (索引: {1})", name, siblingIndex));
			return gameObject;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 克隆 StatDisplay 失败 ({0}): {1}", name, arg));
			return null;
		}
	}

	private GameObject CreateEditableBarDisplay(GameObject template, Transform parent, string name, int siblingIndex, ref TextMeshProUGUI nameText, ref TMP_InputField inputField, string labelText, string defaultValue, float reserveRightSpace = 0f)
	{
		try
		{
			GameObject gameObject = CreateStatDisplay(template, parent, name, siblingIndex);
			if (gameObject == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 创建可编辑bar失败: " + name);
				return null;
			}
			TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = null;
			Type typeFromHandle = typeof(MainCharacterStatValueDisplay);
			Component component = gameObject.GetComponent(typeFromHandle);
			if (component != null)
			{
				Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel]   - 使用 MainCharacterStatValueDisplay 模板");
				FieldInfo field = typeFromHandle.GetField("displayNameText", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				FieldInfo field2 = typeFromHandle.GetField("valueText", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				nameText = field?.GetValue(component) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				textMeshProUGUI = field2?.GetValue(component) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(component as MonoBehaviour);
			}
			else
			{
				Type typeFromHandle2 = typeof(BarDisplay);
				Component component2 = gameObject.GetComponent(typeFromHandle2);
				if (component2 != null)
				{
					Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel]   - 使用 BarDisplay 模板（备用）");
					FieldInfo field3 = typeFromHandle2.GetField("text_Label", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
					FieldInfo field4 = typeFromHandle2.GetField("text_Current", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
					nameText = field3?.GetValue(component2) as TextMeshProUGUI;
					textMeshProUGUI = field4?.GetValue(component2) as TextMeshProUGUI;
					FieldInfo field5 = typeFromHandle2.GetField("fill", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
					FieldInfo field6 = typeFromHandle2.GetField("text_Max", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
					Image image = field5?.GetValue(component2) as Image;
					TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI2 = field6?.GetValue(component2) as TextMeshProUGUI;
					if (image != null)
					{
						image.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
					}
					if (textMeshProUGUI2 != null)
					{
						textMeshProUGUI2.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
					}
				}
			}
			if (nameText != null)
			{
				nameText.text = labelText;
			}
			TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren = gameObject.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
			foreach (TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI3 in componentsInChildren)
			{
				if (textMeshProUGUI3 != null && textMeshProUGUI3.text != null && textMeshProUGUI3.text.Trim() == "/")
				{
					textMeshProUGUI3.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				}
			}
			if (textMeshProUGUI != null)
			{
				textMeshProUGUI.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				GameObject gameObject2 = new GameObject("InputField");
				gameObject2.transform.SetParent(textMeshProUGUI.transform.parent, worldPositionStays: false);
				RectTransform rectTransform = gameObject2.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
				rectTransform.anchorMin = new Vector2(0.5f, 0f);
				rectTransform.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 1f);
				rectTransform.anchoredPosition = Vector2.zero;
				rectTransform.offsetMin = new Vector2(10f, 5f);
				float rightOffset = -10f;
				if (reserveRightSpace > 0f)
				{
					rightOffset = -(10f + reserveRightSpace);
				}
				rectTransform.offsetMax = new Vector2(rightOffset, -5f);
				rectTransform.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 0.5f);
				Image image2 = gameObject2.AddComponent<Image>();
				image2.color = new Color(0f, 0f, 0f, 0.537f);
				image2.type = Image.Type.Sliced;
				Sprite sprite = Resources.FindObjectsOfTypeAll<Sprite>().FirstOrDefault((Sprite s) => s.name == "Rect16");
				if (sprite != null)
				{
					image2.sprite = sprite;
				}
				inputField = gameObject2.AddComponent<TMP_InputField>();
				inputField.characterLimit = 10;
				inputField.contentType = TMP_InputField.ContentType.IntegerNumber;
				GameObject gameObject3 = new GameObject("Text Area");
				gameObject3.transform.SetParent(gameObject2.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
				RectTransform rectTransform2 = gameObject3.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
				rectTransform2.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
				rectTransform2.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
				rectTransform2.offsetMin = new Vector2(8f, 4f);
				rectTransform2.offsetMax = new Vector2(-8f, -4f);
				gameObject3.AddComponent<RectMask2D>();
				GameObject obj = new GameObject("Text");
				obj.transform.SetParent(gameObject3.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
				RectTransform rectTransform3 = obj.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
				rectTransform3.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
				rectTransform3.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
				rectTransform3.sizeDelta = Vector2.zero;
				TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI4 = obj.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
				textMeshProUGUI4.text = defaultValue;
				textMeshProUGUI4.fontSize = textMeshProUGUI.fontSize;
				textMeshProUGUI4.font = textMeshProUGUI.font;
				textMeshProUGUI4.color = textMeshProUGUI.color;
				textMeshProUGUI4.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
				inputField.textViewport = rectTransform2;
				inputField.textComponent = textMeshProUGUI4;
				inputField.targetGraphic = image2;
				inputField.text = defaultValue;
				inputField.caretWidth = 2;
				inputField.caretColor = new Color(1f, 1f, 1f, 1f);
				inputField.customCaretColor = true;
				inputField.caretBlinkRate = 0.85f;
				inputField.ForceLabelUpdate();
				inputField.enabled = false;
				inputField.enabled = true;
				Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel]   - ✅ 创建可编辑bar: " + name + "（已强制刷新InputField）");
			}
			return gameObject;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 创建可编辑bar失败 ({0}): {1}", name, arg));
			return null;
		}
	}

	private void CreateQuickFillButton()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_priceInputDisplay == null)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 无法创建快速填入按钮：求购单价显示组件为空");
				return;
			}
			GameObject gameObject = null;
			GameObject gameObject2 = GameObject.Find("LevelConfig/LevelManager(Clone)/GameplayUICanvas/BlackMarketView/ExitButton");
			if (gameObject2 != null)
			{
				gameObject = gameObject2;
				Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 找到ExitButton模板: " + gameObject2.name);
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Warning("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ⚠️ 未找到BlackMarketView/ExitButton");
			}
			if (gameObject == null)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ⚠️ 未找到分页按钮，快速填入按钮将不会创建");
				return;
			}
			GameObject gameObject3 = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(gameObject);
			gameObject3.name = "QuickFillButton";
			gameObject3.SetActive(value: false);
			string[] array = new string[6]
			{
				"ViewsProxy",
				"PointerDownUpEvents",
				"SizeDeltaToggle",
				"TextLocalizor",
				"PagesControl",
				"Duckov"
			};
			MonoBehaviour[] components = gameObject3.GetComponents<MonoBehaviour>();
			foreach (MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour in components)
			{
				if (monoBehaviour == null)
				{
					continue;
				}
				string componentTypeName = monoBehaviour.GetType().Name;
				string fullName = monoBehaviour.GetType().FullName;
				string[] array2 = array;
				foreach (string value in array2)
				{
					if (componentTypeName.Contains(value) || fullName.Contains(value))
					{
						UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(monoBehaviour);
						break;
					}
				}
			}
			components = (from c in gameObject3.GetComponentsInChildren<MonoBehaviour>(includeInactive: true)
				where c != null && c.GetType().Name == "TextLocalizor"
				select c).ToArray();
			for (int i = 0; i < components.Length; i++)
			{
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(components[i]);
			}
			gameObject3.transform.SetParent(_priceInputDisplay.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
			_quickFillButton = gameObject3.GetComponent<Button>();
			if (_quickFillButton != null)
			{
				_quickFillButton.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
				_quickFillButton.onClick.AddListener(OnQuickFillButtonClicked);
			}
			RectTransform component = gameObject3.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (component != null)
			{
				Vector2 sizeDelta = component.sizeDelta;
				float buttonScale = 0.6f;
				component.anchorMin = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
				component.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
				component.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 0.5f);
				float scaledWidth = sizeDelta.x * buttonScale;
				component.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(0f - (scaledWidth / 2f + 5f), 0f);
				component.localScale = Vector3.one * buttonScale;
				Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 快速填入按钮位置设置完成");
			}
			gameObject3.SetActive(value: true);
			Logger.Verbose("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] ✅ 快速填入按钮创建完成");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 创建快速填入按钮失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void OnQuickFillButtonClicked()
	{
		try
		{
			decimal result;
			if (_priceInputField == null || _purchaseOrderData == null)
			{
				Logger.Warning("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 快速填入失败：输入框或数据为空");
			}
			else if (_originalPriceValueText != null && _originalPriceValueText.text != "数据加载中..." && decimal.TryParse(_originalPriceValueText.text, out result) && result > 0m)
			{
				_priceInputField.text = ((int)result).ToString();
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 快速填入推荐价格: {0}", result));
				OnInputFieldChanged(_priceInputField.text);
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Warning("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 无法快速填入：推荐价格数据无效");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PurchaseOrderCreationPanel] 快速填入按钮点击失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private int CalculatePurchaseOrderTax(int quantity, int pricePerUnit, decimal originalValue)
	{
		if (quantity <= 0 || pricePerUnit <= 0 || originalValue <= 0m)
		{
			return 0;
		}
		double originalTotalValue = (double)(originalValue * (decimal)quantity);
		double orderTotalValue = pricePerUnit * quantity;
		double minimumTax = orderTotalValue * 0.05;
		double calculatedTax;
		if (orderTotalValue < originalTotalValue)
		{
			double priceGapFactor = Math.Log10(originalTotalValue / orderTotalValue);
			priceGapFactor = Math.Pow(priceGapFactor, 1.08);
			calculatedTax = originalTotalValue * 0.2 * 4.0 * priceGapFactor * 1.0;
		}
		else
		{
			double premiumFactor = Math.Log10(orderTotalValue / originalTotalValue);
			if (orderTotalValue > originalTotalValue)
			{
				premiumFactor = Math.Pow(premiumFactor, 1.08);
			}
			calculatedTax = orderTotalValue * 0.2 * 4.0 * premiumFactor * 1.0;
		}
		if (calculatedTax < minimumTax)
		{
			calculatedTax = minimumTax;
		}
		if (calculatedTax < 0.0)
		{
			calculatedTax = 0.0;
		}
		return (int)Math.Round(calculatedTax, 0);
	}

	private string FormatNumber(decimal value)
	{
		return ((long)value).ToString("N0");
	}
}
```

```cs
using TMPro;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UI;

namespace DuckMarket.UI;

public static class UIBuilder
{
	public static Canvas CreateCanvas(Transform parent)
	{
		GameObject canvasObject = new GameObject("FleaMarketCanvas");
		canvasObject.transform.SetParent(parent, false);

		Canvas canvas = canvasObject.AddComponent<Canvas>();
		canvas.renderMode = RenderMode.ScreenSpaceOverlay;

		CanvasScaler scaler = canvasObject.AddComponent<CanvasScaler>();
		scaler.uiScaleMode = CanvasScaler.ScaleMode.ScaleWithScreenSize;
		scaler.referenceResolution = new Vector2(1920f, 1080f);

		canvasObject.AddComponent<GraphicRaycaster>();
		return canvas;
	}

	public static Image CreatePanel(Transform parent, string name, Color color)
	{
		GameObject panelObject = new GameObject(name);
		panelObject.transform.SetParent(parent, false);

		RectTransform panelRect = panelObject.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
		panelRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
		panelRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
		panelRect.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
		panelRect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;

		Image panelImage = panelObject.AddComponent<Image>();
		panelImage.color = color;
		return panelImage;
	}

	public static Button CreateButton(Transform parent, string name, string buttonText, Color color)
	{
		GameObject buttonObject = new GameObject(name);
		buttonObject.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
		buttonObject.AddComponent<RectTransform>().sizeDelta = new Vector2(100f, 40f);

		Image background = buttonObject.AddComponent<Image>();
		background.color = color;

		Button button = buttonObject.AddComponent<Button>();
		button.targetGraphic = background;

		GameObject textObject = new GameObject("Text");
		textObject.transform.SetParent(buttonObject.transform, false);

		RectTransform textRect = textObject.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
		textRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
		textRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
		textRect.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
		textRect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;

		TextMeshProUGUI textMesh = textObject.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
		textMesh.text = buttonText;
		textMesh.fontSize = 28f;
		textMesh.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
		textMesh.color = Color.white;

		return button;
	}

	public static Button CreateButton(Transform parent, string name, string buttonText)
	{
		return CreateButton(parent, name, buttonText, new Color(0.2f, 0.2f, 0.2f, 1f));
	}

	public static TextMeshProUGUI CreateText(Transform parent, string name, string content, Color color, int fontSize, TextAlignmentOptions alignment)
	{
		GameObject textObject = new GameObject(name);
		textObject.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
		textObject.AddComponent<RectTransform>().sizeDelta = new Vector2(400f, 100f);

		TextMeshProUGUI textMesh = textObject.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
		textMesh.text = content;
		textMesh.fontSize = fontSize;
		textMesh.alignment = alignment;
		textMesh.color = color;
		return textMesh;
	}

	public static Text CreateText(Transform parent, string name, string content)
	{
		GameObject textObject = new GameObject(name);
		textObject.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
		textObject.AddComponent<RectTransform>().sizeDelta = new Vector2(400f, 100f);

		Text legacyText = textObject.AddComponent<Text>();
		legacyText.text = content;
		legacyText.font = Resources.GetBuiltinResource<Font>("Arial.ttf");
		legacyText.fontSize = 16;
		legacyText.alignment = TextAnchor.UpperLeft;
		legacyText.color = Color.white;
		return legacyText;
	}

	public static Image CreateImage(Transform parent, string name, Color color)
	{
		GameObject imageObject = new GameObject(name);
		imageObject.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
		imageObject.AddComponent<RectTransform>().sizeDelta = new Vector2(100f, 100f);

		Image image = imageObject.AddComponent<Image>();
		image.color = color;
		return image;
	}

	public static GameObject CreateInputField(Transform parent, string name, string placeholder)
	{
		GameObject inputObject = new GameObject(name);
		inputObject.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
		inputObject.AddComponent<RectTransform>().sizeDelta = new Vector2(200f, 40f);
		inputObject.AddComponent<Image>().color = new Color(0.2f, 0.2f, 0.2f, 1f);

		InputField inputField = inputObject.AddComponent<InputField>();
		Text inputText = CreateLegacyInputText(inputObject.transform, "Text", string.Empty, Color.white);
		inputField.textComponent = inputText;

		Text placeholderText = CreateLegacyInputText(inputObject.transform, "Placeholder", placeholder, new Color(1f, 1f, 1f, 0.5f));
		inputField.placeholder = placeholderText;
		return inputObject;
	}

	public static GameObject CreateDropdown(Transform parent, string name)
	{
		GameObject dropdownObject = new GameObject(name);
		dropdownObject.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
		dropdownObject.AddComponent<RectTransform>().sizeDelta = new Vector2(200f, 40f);
		dropdownObject.AddComponent<Image>().color = new Color(0.2f, 0.2f, 0.2f, 1f);

		Dropdown dropdown = dropdownObject.AddComponent<Dropdown>();
		Text captionText = CreateLegacyInputText(dropdownObject.transform, "Label", string.Empty, Color.white);
		dropdown.captionText = captionText;
		dropdown.itemText = captionText;

		GameObject arrowObject = new GameObject("Arrow");
		arrowObject.transform.SetParent(dropdownObject.transform, false);
		RectTransform arrowRect = arrowObject.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
		arrowRect.anchorMin = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
		arrowRect.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
		arrowRect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(20f, 20f);
		arrowRect.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(-15f, 0f);
		arrowObject.AddComponent<Image>().color = Color.white;
		return dropdownObject;
	}

	public static ScrollRect CreateScrollRect(Transform parent, string name)
	{
		GameObject scrollObject = new GameObject(name);
		scrollObject.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
		scrollObject.AddComponent<RectTransform>().sizeDelta = new Vector2(400f, 300f);
		scrollObject.AddComponent<Image>().color = new Color(0.1f, 0.1f, 0.1f, 0.8f);

		ScrollRect scrollRect = scrollObject.AddComponent<ScrollRect>();
		GameObject viewportObject = new GameObject("Viewport");
		viewportObject.transform.SetParent(scrollObject.transform, false);

		RectTransform viewportRect = viewportObject.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
		viewportRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
		viewportRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
		viewportRect.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
		viewportRect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
		viewportObject.AddComponent<Image>().color = new Color(0.1f, 0.1f, 0.1f, 0.8f);
		viewportObject.AddComponent<Mask>().showMaskGraphic = false;

		GameObject contentObject = new GameObject("Content");
		contentObject.transform.SetParent(viewportObject.transform, false);
		RectTransform contentRect = contentObject.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
		contentRect.anchorMin = new Vector2(0f, 1f);
		contentRect.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 1f);
		contentRect.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1f);
		contentRect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0f, 0f);

		VerticalLayoutGroup layout = contentObject.AddComponent<VerticalLayoutGroup>();
		layout.childForceExpandWidth = true;
		layout.childForceExpandHeight = false;

		scrollRect.content = contentRect;
		scrollRect.viewport = viewportRect;
		scrollRect.vertical = true;
		scrollRect.horizontal = false;
		return scrollRect;
	}

	private static Text CreateLegacyInputText(Transform parent, string name, string content, Color color)
	{
		GameObject textObject = new GameObject(name);
		textObject.transform.SetParent(parent, false);

		RectTransform textRect = textObject.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
		textRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
		textRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
		textRect.offsetMin = new Vector2(5f, 0f);
		textRect.offsetMax = new Vector2(-5f, 0f);

		Text legacyText = textObject.AddComponent<Text>();
		legacyText.text = content;
		legacyText.font = Resources.GetBuiltinResource<Font>("Arial.ttf");
		legacyText.fontSize = 14;
		legacyText.alignment = TextAnchor.MiddleLeft;
		legacyText.color = color;
		return legacyText;
	}
}
```
