`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket.Validators/ListingCreationValidator.cs`:

```cs
using DuckMarket.Core;
using DuckMarket.Models;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;

namespace DuckMarket.Validators;

public class ListingCreationValidator
{
	public static ValidationResult Validate(ListingCreationData data)
	{
		if (data == null)
		{
			return ValidationResult.Error(LocalizationStrings.GetListingDataNullError());
		}
		ValidationResult validationResult = ValidateItem(data);
		if (!validationResult.IsValid)
		{
			return validationResult;
		}
		ValidationResult validationResult2 = ValidateQuantity(data);
		if (!validationResult2.IsValid)
		{
			return validationResult2;
		}
		ValidationResult validationResult3 = ValidatePrice(data);
		if (!validationResult3.IsValid)
		{
			return validationResult3;
		}
		ValidationResult validationResult4 = ValidateMarket(data);
		if (!validationResult4.IsValid)
		{
			return validationResult4;
		}
		return ValidationResult.Success();
	}

	private static ValidationResult ValidateItem(ListingCreationData data)
	{
		if (data.Item == null)
		{
			return ValidationResult.Error(LocalizationStrings.GetItemNullError());
		}
		if (data.ItemTypeId <= 0)
		{
			return ValidationResult.Error(LocalizationStrings.GetInvalidItemTypeIdError());
		}
		if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(data.ItemDisplayName))
		{
			return ValidationResult.Error(LocalizationStrings.GetItemNameEmptyError());
		}
		return ValidationResult.Success();
	}

	private static ValidationResult ValidateQuantity(ListingCreationData data)
	{
		if (data.Quantity <= 0)
		{
			return ValidationResult.Error(LocalizationStrings.GetQuantityMustBePositiveValidationError());
		}
		if (data.Quantity > 999)
		{
			return ValidationResult.Error(LocalizationStrings.GetQuantityExceedsAbsoluteMaxError(999));
		}
		if (data.Quantity > data.MaxQuantity)
		{
			return ValidationResult.Error(LocalizationStrings.GetQuantityExceedsStorageError(data.MaxQuantity));
		}
		return ValidationResult.Success();
	}

	private static ValidationResult ValidatePrice(ListingCreationData data)
	{
		if (data.Price <= 0m)
		{
			return ValidationResult.Error(LocalizationStrings.GetPriceMustBePositiveError());
		}
		if (data.Price > 10000000m)
		{
			return ValidationResult.Error(LocalizationStrings.GetPriceExceedsMaxError());
		}
		if (data.TotalPrice > 100000000m)
		{
			return ValidationResult.Error(LocalizationStrings.GetTotalPriceExceedsMaxError());
		}
		return ValidationResult.Success();
	}

	private static ValidationResult ValidateMarket(ListingCreationData data)
	{
		if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(data.MarketId))
		{
			return ValidationResult.Error(LocalizationStrings.GetMarketNotSelectedError());
		}
		return ValidationResult.Success();
	}

	public static ValidationResult ValidateDurability(ListingCreationData data)
	{
		if (data.DurabilityPercent < 0f || data.DurabilityPercent > 100f)
		{
			return ValidationResult.Error(LocalizationStrings.GetDurabilityOutOfRangeError());
		}
		return ValidationResult.Success();
	}

	public static ValidationResult ValidateCondition(ListingCreationData data)
	{
		if (data.Condition < ItemCondition.New || data.Condition > ItemCondition.Poor)
		{
			return ValidationResult.Error(LocalizationStrings.GetInvalidConditionError());
		}
		return ValidationResult.Success();
	}
}



```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket/FleaMarketManager.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using Cysharp.Threading.Tasks;
using DuckMarket.Network;
using Duckov.Economy;
using ItemStatsSystem;
using Steamworks;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;

namespace DuckMarket;

public static class FleaMarketManager
{
	private static bool _initialized;

	public static List<Listing> CachedListings { get; private set; } = new List<Listing>();

	public static string? PlayerSteamId { get; private set; }

	public static void Initialize()
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Info("Initializing Flea Market Manager...");
			PlayerSteamId = GetPlayerSteamId();
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(PlayerSteamId))
			{
				Logger.Error("Failed to get player Steam ID");
				return;
			}

			Logger.Info("Player Steam ID: " + PlayerSteamId);
			FleaMarketUIManager.Initialize();
			_initialized = true;
			Logger.Info("Flea Market Manager initialized successfully");
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error($"Failed to initialize Flea Market Manager: {ex}");
		}
	}

	public static void Cleanup()
	{
		FleaMarketUIManager.Cleanup();
		_initialized = false;
		CachedListings.Clear();
		PlayerSteamId = null;
		Logger.Info("Flea Market Manager cleaned up");
	}

	private static string? GetPlayerSteamId()
	{
		try
		{
			if (!SteamManager.Initialized)
			{
				Logger.Error("Steam not initialized");
				return null;
			}

			return SteamUser.GetSteamID().ToString();
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error($"Failed to get Steam ID: {ex}");
			return null;
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<bool> AuthenticateAsync(string username, string password)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!_initialized || string.IsNullOrEmpty(PlayerSteamId))
			{
				Logger.Error("Flea Market Manager not properly initialized");
				return false;
			}

			Logger.Info("Authenticating player: " + username);
			bool isAuthenticated = await ApiClient.AuthenticateAsync(PlayerSteamId, username, password);
			if (isAuthenticated)
			{
				Logger.Info("Authentication successful");
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Error("Authentication failed");
			}

			return isAuthenticated;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error($"Authentication error: {ex}");
			return false;
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<bool> RefreshListingsAsync()
	{
		try
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Logger.Error("Flea Market Manager not initialized");
				return false;
			}

			Logger.Info("Refreshing market listings...");
			var (listings, total) = await ApiClient.GetListingsAsync(null, null, "created_at");
			if (listings == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("Failed to load listings");
				return false;
			}

			CachedListings = listings;
			Logger.Info($"Loaded {listings.Count} listings (total: {total})");
			return true;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error($"Error refreshing listings: {ex}");
			return false;
		}
	}

	public static async UniTask<bool> PurchaseItemAsync(int listingId, int quantity)
	{
		try
		{
			if (!_initialized)
			{
				Logger.Error("Flea Market Manager not initialized");
				return false;
			}

			Listing? listing = CachedListings.Find(l => l.id == listingId);
			if (listing == null)
			{
				Logger.Error($"Listing not found: {listingId}");
				return false;
			}

			long totalCost = listing.price * quantity;
			long currentMoney = EconomyManager.Money;
			if (currentMoney < totalCost)
			{
				Logger.Error($"Insufficient funds. Required: {totalCost}, Available: {currentMoney}");
				return false;
			}

			Logger.Info($"Purchasing item {listing.item_name} x{quantity} for {totalCost}");
			if (EconomyManager.Money < totalCost)
			{
				Logger.Error("Insufficient funds");
				return false;
			}

			EconomyManager.Add(-totalCost);
			var (success, itemTypeId, _, purchasedQuantity, durability, durabilityLoss, errorMessage) = await ApiClient.PurchaseItemAsync(listingId, quantity);
			if (!success)
			{
				EconomyManager.Add(totalCost);
				Logger.Error("Purchase failed: " + (errorMessage ?? "Unknown error") + ", money refunded");
				return false;
			}

			await SendItemToPlayerAsync(itemTypeId, purchasedQuantity, durability, durabilityLoss);
			Logger.Info("Purchase successful");
			return true;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error($"Purchase error: {ex}");
			return false;
		}
	}

	private static async UniTask SendItemToPlayerAsync(int typeId, int quantity, float? durability = null, float? durabilityLoss = null)
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Info($"Sending item {typeId} x{quantity} to player (durability: {durability}, durability_loss: {durabilityLoss})...");

			int remainingQuantity = quantity;
			int createdStacks = 0;
			while (remainingQuantity > 0)
			{
				Item item = await ItemAssetsCollection.InstantiateAsync(typeId);
				if ((UnityEngine.Object)item == null)
				{
					Logger.Error($"Failed to create item: {typeId}");
					break;
				}

				item.Initialize();
				int stackCount = Math.Min(remainingQuantity, item.MaxStackCount);
				item.StackCount = stackCount;
				Logger.Verbose($"Created item x{stackCount} (MaxStackCount: {item.MaxStackCount})");

				if (item.UseDurability)
				{
					if (durability.HasValue)
					{
						item.Durability = durability.Value;
						Logger.Verbose($"Set item durability to {durability.Value}");
					}

					if (durabilityLoss.HasValue)
					{
						item.DurabilityLoss = durabilityLoss.Value;
						Logger.Verbose($"Set item durability loss to {durabilityLoss.Value}");
					}
				}

				PlayerStorage.Push(item, true);
				remainingQuantity -= stackCount;
				createdStacks++;
			}

			Logger.Info($"Item sent to player mail system: x{quantity} ({createdStacks} stacks)");
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error($"Error sending item to player: {ex}");
		}
	}
}



```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket/FleaMarketUIManager.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using DuckMarket.UI;
using Duckov.UI;
using FleaMarket.UI;
using ItemStatsSystem;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;

namespace DuckMarket;

public static class FleaMarketUIManager
{
	private static bool _isInitialized;

	private static FleaMarketUIManager_Behaviour _behaviour;

	public static bool IsInSafeHouse { get; private set; }

	public static void Initialize()
	{
		if (_isInitialized)
		{
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			Logger.Info("Initializing Flea Market UI Manager...");
			GameObject val = new GameObject("FleaMarketUIManager");
			_behaviour = val.AddComponent<FleaMarketUIManager_Behaviour>();
			Object.DontDestroyOnLoad((Object)val);
			_isInitialized = true;
			Logger.Info("Flea Market UI Manager initialized successfully");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("Failed to initialize UI Manager: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	public static void OpenFleaMarket()
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarketView_NoteClone viewInstance = GameplayUIManager.GetViewInstance<DuckMarketView_NoteClone>();
			if (viewInstance != null)
			{
				viewInstance.Open((ManagedUIElement)null);
				Logger.Info("Duck Market UI opened");
				return;
			}
			Logger.Info("DuckMarketView instance not found, attempting to recreate...");
			if (_behaviour != null)
			{
				_behaviour.EnsureDuckMarketViewExists();
				viewInstance = GameplayUIManager.GetViewInstance<DuckMarketView_NoteClone>();
				if (viewInstance != null)
				{
					viewInstance.Open((ManagedUIElement)null);
					Logger.Info("Duck Market UI opened after recreation");
				}
				else
				{
					Logger.Error("Failed to recreate DuckMarketView");
				}
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Error("FleaMarketUIManager_Behaviour not found");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("Failed to open Duck Market UI: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	public static void OpenFleaMarketForListing(Item item)
	{
		try
		{
			if (item == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("Cannot open Flea Market for listing: item is null");
				return;
			}
			ListingCreationView viewInstance = GameplayUIManager.GetViewInstance<ListingCreationView>();
			if (viewInstance != null)
			{
				viewInstance.ShowForItem(item);
				Logger.Info("Listing creation view opened for item: " + item.DisplayName);
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Error("ListingCreationView instance not found");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("Failed to open Flea Market UI for listing: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	public static void CloseFleaMarket()
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarketView_NoteClone viewInstance = GameplayUIManager.GetViewInstance<DuckMarketView_NoteClone>();
			if (viewInstance != null)
			{
				viewInstance.Close();
				Logger.Info("Duck Market UI closed");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("Failed to close Duck Market UI: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	public static void SetInSafeHouse(bool inSafeHouse)
	{
		if (IsInSafeHouse == inSafeHouse)
		{
			return;
		}
		IsInSafeHouse = inSafeHouse;
		Logger.Info(string.Format("Safe house status changed: {0}", inSafeHouse));
		if (!inSafeHouse)
		{
			GameplayUIManager instance = GameplayUIManager.Instance;
			if (((instance != null) ? instance.ActiveView : null) is DuckMarketView_NoteClone)
			{
				CloseFleaMarket();
			}
		}
	}

	public static void Cleanup()
	{
		if (_behaviour != null)
		{
			Object.Destroy(_behaviour.gameObject);
			_behaviour = null;
		}
		_isInitialized = false;
	}
}



```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket/FleaMarketUIManager_Behaviour.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Reflection;
using Duckov.UI;
using FleaMarket.UI;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;

namespace DuckMarket;

public class FleaMarketUIManager_Behaviour : MonoBehaviour
{
	private void Update()
	{
		CheckSafeHouseStatus();
		CheckInput();
		CheckAndPatchBlackMarket();
	}

	private void CheckSafeHouseStatus()
	{
	}

	private void CheckInput()
	{
		if (Input.GetKeyDown((KeyCode)27))
		{
			DuckMarketView_NoteClone viewInstance = GameplayUIManager.GetViewInstance<DuckMarketView_NoteClone>();
			if (viewInstance != null && viewInstance.gameObject.activeSelf)
			{
				FleaMarketUIManager.CloseFleaMarket();
			}
		}
	}

	private void CheckAndPatchBlackMarket()
	{
	}

	public void EnsureDuckMarketViewExists()
	{
		try
		{
			GameplayUIManager instance = GameplayUIManager.Instance;
			if (instance == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[FleaMarketUIManager] GameplayUIManager instance not found");
				return;
			}
			if (GameplayUIManager.GetViewInstance<DuckMarketView_NoteClone>() != null)
			{
				Logger.Info("[FleaMarketUIManager] DuckMarketView_NoteClone already exists");
				return;
			}
			Logger.Info("[FleaMarketUIManager] Creating new DuckMarketView_NoteClone...");
			FieldInfo field = typeof(GameplayUIManager).GetField("views", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[FleaMarketUIManager] Failed to find 'views' field in GameplayUIManager");
				return;
			}
			if (!(field.GetValue(instance) is List<View> list))
			{
				Logger.Error("[FleaMarketUIManager] Failed to get views list from GameplayUIManager");
				return;
			}
			GameObject val = new GameObject("DuckMarketView_NoteClone");
			val.transform.SetParent(instance.transform, false);
			DuckMarketView_NoteClone item = val.AddComponent<DuckMarketView_NoteClone>();
			list.Add((View)(object)item);
			Logger.Info("[FleaMarketUIManager] DuckMarketView_NoteClone created successfully");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[FleaMarketUIManager] Error ensuring DuckMarketView exists: {0}", arg));
		}
	}
}
```

```cs
namespace DuckMarket;

public enum LogLevel
{
	Error,
	Warning,
	Info,
	Verbose,
	Debug
}
```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket/Logger.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;

namespace DuckMarket;

public static class Logger
{
	private const string ModPrefix = "[鸭鸭市场]";

	public static LogLevel CurrentLevel { get; set; } = LogLevel.Info;

	public static void Info(string message)
	{
		if (CurrentLevel >= LogLevel.Info)
		{
			Debug.Log((object)("[鸭鸭市场] " + message));
		}
	}

	public static void Verbose(string message)
	{
		if (CurrentLevel >= LogLevel.Verbose)
		{
			Debug.Log((object)("[鸭鸭市场] [VERBOSE] " + message));
		}
	}

	public static void Warning(string message)
	{
		if (CurrentLevel >= LogLevel.Warning)
		{
			Debug.LogWarning((object)("[鸭鸭市场] " + message));
		}
	}

	public static void Error(string message)
	{
		Debug.LogError((object)("[鸭鸭市场] " + message));
	}

	public static void Exception(Exception ex)
	{
		Debug.LogException(ex);
	}

	public static void DebugLog(string message)
	{
	}
}



```

`duckmarket_core/DuckMarket/ModBehaviour.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using System.Reflection;
using Cysharp.Threading.Tasks;
using DuckMarket.Core;
using DuckMarket.Interactables;
using DuckMarket.Network;
using DuckMarket.Patches;
using DuckMarket.Services;
using Duckov.Modding;
using FleaMarket.UI;
using HarmonyLib;
using ItemStatsSystem;
using Saves;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;
using UnityEngine.SceneManagement;

namespace DuckMarket;

public class ModBehaviour : Duckov.Modding.ModBehaviour
{
	private const string HarmonyId = "com.ducknewmarket.mod";

	private static Harmony? _harmonyInstance;

	public static ModBehaviour? Instance { get; private set; }

	static ModBehaviour()
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Info("⚡ ========== ModBehaviour static constructor called ==========");
			Logger.Info("📍 Assembly: " + typeof(ModBehaviour).Assembly.FullName);
			Logger.Info("📍 Location: " + typeof(ModBehaviour).Assembly.Location);
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Debug.LogError(string.Format("[DuckMarket] Error in static constructor: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void Awake()
	{
		Instance = this;
		Logger.Info("🚀 ========== Duck Market Mod Awake() called ==========");
		Logger.Info("🆔 MOD Name: DuckMarket");
		Logger.Info(string.Format("📍 Instance ID: {0}", GetInstanceID()));
		Logger.Info("📍 GameObject: " + base.gameObject.name);
	}

	private void OnEnable()
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Info("🔧 ========== Initializing Duck Market Mod ==========");
			Logger.Info("📝 Step 0: Initialize settings system...");
			DuckMarketSettings.Initialize();
			Logger.Info("✅ Step 0 complete");
			Logger.Info("📝 Step 1: Clean up old FleaMarketInteractable instances...");
			CleanupOldFleaMarketInteractables();
			Logger.Info("✅ Step 1 complete");
			Logger.Info("📝 Step 2: Inject localization overrides into game's LocalizationManager...");
			InjectLocalizationOverrides();
			Logger.Info("✅ Step 2 complete");
			Logger.Info("📝 Step 3: Apply Harmony patches...");
			ApplyHarmonyPatches();
			Logger.Info("✅ Step 3 complete");
			Logger.Info("📝 Step 4: Initialize core systems...");
			ApiClient.Initialize();
			SteamTicketAuth.Initialize();
			FleaMarketManager.Initialize();
			NotificationQueue.Initialize();
			SoundManager.Initialize();
			NotificationStyleCustomizer.Initialize();
			Logger.Info("✅ Step 4 complete");
			Logger.Info("📝 Step 5: Setup WebSocket message handlers...");
			SetupWebSocketHandlers();
			Logger.Info("✅ Step 5 complete");
			Logger.Info("📝 Step 6: Subscribe to game events...");
			SubscribeToGameEvents();
			Logger.Info("✅ Step 6 complete");
			Logger.Info("📝 Step 7: Auto-login on game startup...");
			AutoLoginManager.TryAutoLoginAsync().Forget();
			Logger.Info("✅ Step 7 complete");
			Logger.Info("📝 Step 8: Initialize test UI key listener...");
			TestUIKeyListener.Initialize();
			Logger.Info("✅ Step 8 complete");
			Logger.Info("📝 Step 9: Setup fallback UI initialization...");
			StartCoroutine(DelayedUIFallbackCheck());
			Logger.Info("✅ Step 9 complete");
			Logger.Info("🎉 ========== Duck Market Mod initialized successfully! ==========");
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("❌ Failed to initialize Duck Market Mod: {0}", ex));
			Logger.Error("Stack trace: " + ex.StackTrace);
		}
	}

	private void OnDisable()
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Info("⚠️ Duck Market Mod is being disabled...");
			UnsubscribeFromGameEvents();
			WebSocketClient.DisconnectAsync().Forget();
			FleaMarketManager.Cleanup();
			ApiClient.Cleanup();
			SteamTicketAuth.Cleanup();
			FleaMarketState.Reset();
			SoundManager.Cleanup();
			UnpatchHarmony();
			Logger.Info("✅ Duck Market Mod disabled successfully!");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("❌ Error during OnDisable: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void OnDestroy()
	{
		try
		{
			UnpatchHarmony();
			Instance = null;
			Logger.Info("🗑️ Duck Market Mod destroyed");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("❌ Error during OnDestroy: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static void SetupWebSocketHandlers()
	{
		WebSocketClient.OnMessageReceived += HandleWebSocketMessage;
		WebSocketClient.OnConnectionStateChanged += HandleConnectionStateChanged;
		Logger.Info("WebSocket handlers setup complete");
	}

	private static void HandleWebSocketMessage(WebSocketMessage message)
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Info("[WebSocket] Received message type: " + message.type);
			string type = message.type;
			if (type != null)
			{
				switch (type.Length)
				{
				case 9:
					switch (type[0])
					{
					case 'c':
						if (!(type == "connected"))
						{
							break;
						}
						Logger.Info("[WebSocket] " + message.message);
						return;
					case 'i':
						if (!(type == "item_sold"))
						{
							break;
						}
						HandleItemSoldNotification(message);
						return;
					}
					break;
				case 24:
					switch (type[15])
					{
					case 'f':
						if (!(type == "purchase_order_fulfilled"))
						{
							break;
						}
						HandlePurchaseOrderFulfilledNotification(message);
						return;
					case 'c':
						if (!(type == "purchase_order_cancelled"))
						{
							break;
						}
						HandlePurchaseOrderCancelledNotification(message);
						return;
					}
					break;
				case 15:
					if (!(type == "listing_expired"))
					{
						break;
					}
					HandleListingExpiredNotification(message);
					return;
				case 23:
					if (!(type == "validate_ticket_request"))
					{
						break;
					}
					HandleValidateTicketRequest(message);
					return;
				case 4:
					if (!(type == "pong"))
					{
						break;
					}
					return;
				}
			}
			Logger.Warning("[WebSocket] Unknown message type: " + message.type);
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[WebSocket] Error handling message: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static void HandleItemSoldNotification(WebSocketMessage message)
	{
		try
		{
			NotificationService.HandleItemSoldNotification(message);
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[WebSocket] Error handling item sold notification: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static void HandleListingExpiredNotification(WebSocketMessage message)
	{
		try
		{
			NotificationService.HandleListingExpiredNotification(message);
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[WebSocket] Error handling listing expired notification: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static void HandlePurchaseOrderFulfilledNotification(WebSocketMessage message)
	{
		try
		{
			NotificationService.HandlePurchaseOrderFulfilledNotification(message);
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[WebSocket] Error handling purchase order fulfilled notification: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static void HandleValidateTicketRequest(WebSocketMessage message)
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Info("[P2P] Received ticket validation request");
			string request_id = message.request_id;
			string steam_id = message.steam_id;
			string ticket = message.ticket;
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(request_id) || string.IsNullOrEmpty(steam_id) || string.IsNullOrEmpty(ticket))
			{
				Logger.Error("[P2P] Invalid validation request: missing required fields");
			}
			else
			{
				ValidateTicketForPeerAsync(request_id, steam_id, ticket).Forget();
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[P2P] Error handling validation request: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static async UniTaskVoid ValidateTicketForPeerAsync(string requestId, string steamId, string ticket)
	{

		try
		{
			Logger.Info("[P2P] Validating ticket for steam_id=" + steamId + ", request_id=" + requestId);
			byte[] array = new byte[ticket.Length / 2];
			for (int i = 0; i < array.Length; i++)
			{
				array[i] = Convert.ToByte(ticket.Substring(i * 2, 2), 16);
			}
			bool isValid = false;
			string errorCode;
			try
			{
				(isValid, errorCode) = await SteamTicketAuth.ValidateTicketForPeerAsync(array, steamId);
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[P2P] Validation result: isValid={0}, errorCode={1}", isValid, errorCode));
			}
			catch (Exception ex)
			{
				Logger.Error("[P2P] Validation error: " + ex.Message);
				errorCode = "VALIDATION_ERROR";
			}
			await WebSocketClient.SendMessageAsync(new
			{
				type = "validate_ticket_response",
				request_id = requestId,
				success = isValid,
				steam_id = steamId,
				error_code = errorCode
			});
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[P2P] Sent validation response: success={0}", isValid));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[P2P] Error in ValidateTicketForPeerAsync: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static void HandleConnectionStateChanged(bool isConnected)
	{
		if (isConnected)
		{
			Logger.Info("[WebSocket] Connection established");
		}
		else
		{
			Logger.Warning("[WebSocket] Connection lost");
		}
	}

	private static void CleanupOldFleaMarketInteractables()
	{
		try
		{
			FleaMarketInteractable[] array = UnityEngine.Object.FindObjectsOfType<FleaMarketInteractable>();
			if (array.Length != 0)
			{
				Logger.Info(string.Format("Found {0} old FleaMarketInteractable instances, cleaning up...", array.Length));
				FleaMarketInteractable[] array2 = array;
				foreach (FleaMarketInteractable fleaMarketInteractable in array2)
				{
					Logger.Info("Destroying old FleaMarketInteractable at " + fleaMarketInteractable.transform.parent?.name);
					UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(fleaMarketInteractable.gameObject);
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("Error cleaning up old FleaMarketInteractable instances: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static void InjectLocalizationOverrides()
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Info("[LocalizationOverride] 🌐 Syncing game language before injecting overrides...");
			SyncGameLanguageFromGameLocalizationManager();
			Type type = Type.GetType("SodaCraft.Localizations.LocalizationManager, SodaLocalization");
			if (type == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[LocalizationOverride] ❌ Could not find game's LocalizationManager type");
				return;
			}
			MethodInfo setOverrideTextMethod = type.GetMethod("SetOverrideText", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
			if (setOverrideTextMethod == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[LocalizationOverride] ❌ Could not find SetOverrideText method");
				return;
			}
			UpdateLocalizationOverride(setOverrideTextMethod);
			try
			{
				FieldInfo field = type.GetField("OnSetLanguage", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				if (field != null)
				{
					Action<SystemLanguage> b = delegate(SystemLanguage newLang)
					{
						Logger.Info(string.Format("[LocalizationOverride] 🌐 Game language changed to: {0}, syncing and updating overrides...", newLang));
						SyncGameLanguageFromGameLocalizationManager();
						UpdateLocalizationOverride(setOverrideTextMethod);
					};
					Delegate value = Delegate.Combine(field.GetValue(null) as Delegate, b);
					field.SetValue(null, value);
					Logger.Info("[LocalizationOverride] ✅ Subscribed to language change events");
				}
				else
				{
					Logger.Warning("[LocalizationOverride] ⚠️ Could not find OnSetLanguage event, translation won't update on language change");
				}
			}
			catch (Exception arg)
			{
				Logger.Error(string.Format("[LocalizationOverride] ❌ Error subscribing to language change events: {0}", arg));
			}
			Logger.Info("[LocalizationOverride] ✅ Localization override system initialized");
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[LocalizationOverride] ❌ Error injecting localization overrides: {0}", ex));
			Logger.Error("Stack trace: " + ex.StackTrace);
		}
	}

	private static void SyncGameLanguageFromGameLocalizationManager()
	{
		try
		{
			Type type = Type.GetType("SodaCraft.Localizations.LocalizationManager, SodaLocalization");
			if (type == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[LocalizationOverride] ❌ Could not find game's LocalizationManager type for language sync");
				return;
			}
			PropertyInfo property = type.GetProperty("CurrentLanguage", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
			if (property == null)
			{
				Logger.Error("[LocalizationOverride] ❌ Could not find CurrentLanguage property");
				return;
			}
			SystemLanguage systemLanguage = (SystemLanguage)property.GetValue(null);
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[LocalizationOverride] 🌐 Detected game language: {0}", systemLanguage));
			LocalizationManager.Language language = ConvertSystemLanguageToModLanguage(systemLanguage);
			LocalizationManager.SetLanguage(language);
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[LocalizationOverride] ✅ Synced mod language to: {0}", language));
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[LocalizationOverride] ❌ Error syncing game language: {0}", ex));
			Logger.Error("Stack trace: " + ex.StackTrace);
		}
	}

	private static LocalizationManager.Language ConvertSystemLanguageToModLanguage(SystemLanguage systemLanguage)
	{
		switch (systemLanguage)
		{
		case SystemLanguage.ChineseSimplified:
			return LocalizationManager.Language.ChineseSimplified;
		case SystemLanguage.ChineseTraditional:
			return LocalizationManager.Language.ChineseTraditional;
		case SystemLanguage.English:
			return LocalizationManager.Language.English;
		case SystemLanguage.Japanese:
			return LocalizationManager.Language.Japanese;
		case SystemLanguage.Korean:
			return LocalizationManager.Language.Korean;
		default:
			Logger.Warning(string.Format("[LocalizationOverride] ⚠️ Unsupported system language {0}, defaulting to English", systemLanguage));
			return LocalizationManager.Language.English;
		}
	}

	private static void UpdateLocalizationOverride(MethodInfo setOverrideTextMethod)
	{
		try
		{
			string openDuckMarketInteractionKey = LocalizationStrings.GetOpenDuckMarketInteractionKey();
			string openDuckMarketInteractionName = LocalizationStrings.GetOpenDuckMarketInteractionName();
			setOverrideTextMethod.Invoke(null, new object[2]
			{
				openDuckMarketInteractionKey,
				openDuckMarketInteractionName
			});
			Logger.Info("[LocalizationOverride] ✅ Updated override: " + openDuckMarketInteractionKey + " = " + openDuckMarketInteractionName);
			foreach (KeyValuePair<string, string> item in new Dictionary<string, string>
			{
				{
					"options.tab.duckmarket",
					LocalizationManager.GetText("options.tab.duckmarket", "Duck Market")
				},
				{
					"Options_DuckMarket_SteamId",
					LocalizationManager.GetText("Options_DuckMarket_SteamId", "Steam ID")
				},
				{
					"Options_DuckMarket_EnableNotifications",
					LocalizationManager.GetText("Options_DuckMarket_EnableNotifications", "Enable Sale Notifications")
				},
				{
					"Options_DuckMarket_NotificationSound",
					LocalizationManager.GetText("Options_DuckMarket_NotificationSound", "Notification Sound")
				},
				{
					"Options_DuckMarket_NotificationDuration",
					LocalizationManager.GetText("Options_DuckMarket_NotificationDuration", "Notification Duration")
				},
				{
					"Options_DuckMarket_ShowRecommendedPrice",
					LocalizationManager.GetText("Options_DuckMarket_ShowRecommendedPrice", "Show Recommended Price")
				},
				{
					"Options_DuckMarket_EnableDebugLog",
					LocalizationManager.GetText("Options_DuckMarket_EnableDebugLog", "Enable Debug Log")
				}
			})
			{
				setOverrideTextMethod.Invoke(null, new object[2] { item.Key, item.Value });
				Logger.Info("[LocalizationOverride] ✅ Updated override: " + item.Key + " = " + item.Value);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[LocalizationOverride] ❌ Error updating localization override: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static void ApplyHarmonyPatches()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_harmonyInstance != null)
			{
				Logger.Info("⚠️ Harmony instance already exists, skipping patch application");
				return;
			}
			Logger.Info("🔧 Starting Harmony patch application...");
			_harmonyInstance = new Harmony(HarmonyId);
			Assembly assembly = typeof(GameplayUIManagerPatch).Assembly;
			Logger.Info("📦 Applying Harmony patches from assembly: " + assembly.FullName);
			IEnumerable<Type> enumerable = from t in assembly.GetTypes()
				where t.Namespace == "DuckMarket.Patches"
				select t;
			Logger.Info(string.Format("🔍 Found {0} patch classes:", enumerable.Count()));
			foreach (Type item in enumerable)
			{
				Logger.Info("   - " + item.Name);
			}
			_harmonyInstance.PatchAll(assembly);
			Logger.Info("✅ Harmony patches applied successfully");
			IEnumerable<MethodBase> patchedMethods = _harmonyInstance.GetPatchedMethods();
			Logger.Info(string.Format("📊 Total patched methods: {0}", patchedMethods.Count()));
			foreach (MethodBase item2 in patchedMethods)
			{
				Logger.Info("   ✓ Patched: " + item2.DeclaringType?.FullName + "." + item2.Name);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("❌ Failed to apply Harmony patches: {0}", ex));
			Logger.Error("Stack trace: " + ex.StackTrace);
		}
	}

	private static void UnpatchHarmony()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_harmonyInstance != null)
			{
				_harmonyInstance.UnpatchAll(HarmonyId);
				_harmonyInstance = null;
				Logger.Info("Harmony patches removed successfully");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("Failed to unpatch Harmony: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static void SubscribeToGameEvents()
	{
		try
		{
			SceneManager.sceneLoaded += OnSceneLoaded;
			SceneManager.activeSceneChanged += OnActiveSceneChanged;
			LevelManager.OnLevelInitialized += OnLevelInitialized;
			SavesSystem.OnSetFile += OnSaveSlotChanged;
			Logger.Info("Subscribed to game events for state management");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("Failed to subscribe to game events: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static void UnsubscribeFromGameEvents()
	{
		try
		{
			SceneManager.sceneLoaded -= OnSceneLoaded;
			SceneManager.activeSceneChanged -= OnActiveSceneChanged;
			LevelManager.OnLevelInitialized -= OnLevelInitialized;
			SavesSystem.OnSetFile -= OnSaveSlotChanged;
			Logger.Info("Unsubscribed from game events");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("Failed to unsubscribe from game events: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static void OnActiveSceneChanged(Scene oldScene, Scene newScene)
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Info("[Scene] Active scene changing: " + oldScene.name + " -> " + newScene.name);
			if (FleaMarketState.CurrentState == GameState.InBase)
			{
				Logger.Info("[State] Leaving base, setting state to Menu to prevent notification processing during scene transition");
				FleaMarketState.SetState(GameState.Menu);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[Scene] Error in OnActiveSceneChanged: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static async void OnSceneLoaded(Scene scene, LoadSceneMode mode)
	{

		try
		{
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[Scene] Scene loaded: {0} (mode: {1})", scene.name, mode));
			if (scene.name.Contains("Menu") || scene.name.Contains("menu"))
			{
				Logger.Info("[State] Returning to main menu, disconnecting WebSocket...");
				FleaMarketState.SetState(GameState.Menu);
				if (WebSocketClient.IsConnected)
				{
					await WebSocketClient.DisconnectAsync();
					Logger.Info("[WebSocket] Disconnected successfully");
				}
			}
			else if (scene.name.Contains("Base"))
			{
				Logger.Info("[Scene] Base scene detected: " + scene.name + ", checking level state...");
				await UniTask.DelayFrame(5);
				if (LevelManager.Instance != null && LevelManager.Instance.IsBaseLevel)
				{
					Logger.Info("[State] Manual check: Player is in base, updating state");
					FleaMarketState.SetState(GameState.InBase);
					Logger.Info("[State] WebSocket connection will be handled by OnLevelInitialized");
				}
				else
				{
					Logger.Info("[State] Manual check: Player not in base");
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[Scene] Error in OnSceneLoaded: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static async void OnLevelInitialized()
	{

		try
		{
			if (LevelManager.Instance != null && LevelManager.Instance.IsBaseLevel)
			{
				Logger.Info("[State] Player entered base");
				FleaMarketState.SetState(GameState.InBase);
				if (!WebSocketClient.IsConnected)
				{
					Logger.Info("[WebSocket] Not connected, attempting to connect...");
					await ConnectWebSocketIfAuthenticated();
				}
				else
				{
					Logger.Info("[WebSocket] Already connected");
				}
				await UniTask.WaitForSeconds(2f);
				await NotificationQueue.ProcessAllAsync();
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Info("[State] Player entered raid");
				FleaMarketState.SetState(GameState.InRaid);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[State] Error in OnLevelInitialized: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static async void OnSaveSlotChanged()
	{

		try
		{
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[WebSocket] Save slot changed to {0}", SavesSystem.CurrentSlot));
			await CheckPendingReturnsAsync();
			if (WebSocketClient.IsConnected)
			{
				Logger.Info("[WebSocket] Reconnecting WebSocket for new save slot...");
				await WebSocketClient.DisconnectAsync();
				if (LevelManager.Instance != null && LevelManager.Instance.IsBaseLevel)
				{
					await ConnectWebSocketIfAuthenticated();
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[WebSocket] Error in OnSaveSlotChanged: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static async UniTask CheckPendingReturnsAsync()
	{

		try
		{
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(ApiClient.AuthToken))
			{
				return;
			}
			int currentSlot = SavesSystem.CurrentSlot;
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[PendingReturns] Checking for pending returns in save slot {0}...", currentSlot));
			List<PendingReturnItem> items = await ApiClient.GetPendingReturnsAsync(currentSlot);
			if (items == null || items.Count == 0)
			{
				Logger.Info("[PendingReturns] No pending returns found");
				return;
			}
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[PendingReturns] Found {0} items to return", items.Count));
			foreach (PendingReturnItem item in items)
			{
				await ReturnItemToLockerAsync(item);
			}
			NotificationStyleCustomizer.ShowNotification(string.Format("已返还 {0} 件从网页下架的物品到自提柜", items.Count), NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Info);
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PendingReturns] Error checking pending returns: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static async UniTask ReturnItemToLockerAsync(PendingReturnItem itemInfo)
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[PendingReturns] Returning item: {0} (TypeID: {1}) x{2}", itemInfo.item_name, itemInfo.item_type_id, itemInfo.quantity));
			int remainingQuantity = itemInfo.quantity;
			int createdItemsCount = 0;
			while (remainingQuantity > 0)
			{
				Item item = await ItemAssetsCollection.InstantiateAsync(itemInfo.item_type_id);
				if (item == null)
				{
					Logger.Error(string.Format("[PendingReturns] Failed to create item: TypeID {0}", itemInfo.item_type_id));
					break;
				}
				item.Initialize();
				int stackCountToCreate = (item.StackCount = Math.Min(remainingQuantity, item.MaxStackCount));
				Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[PendingReturns] Created item: {0} x{1} (MaxStackCount: {2})", itemInfo.item_name, stackCountToCreate, item.MaxStackCount));
				if (item.UseDurability)
				{
					if (itemInfo.durability.HasValue)
					{
						item.Durability = itemInfo.durability.Value;
						Logger.Info(string.Format("[PendingReturns] Set durability to {0}", itemInfo.durability.Value));
					}
					if (itemInfo.max_durability.HasValue)
					{
						item.MaxDurability = itemInfo.max_durability.Value;
						Logger.Info(string.Format("[PendingReturns] Set max durability to {0}", itemInfo.max_durability.Value));
					}
					if (itemInfo.durability_loss.HasValue)
					{
						item.DurabilityLoss = itemInfo.durability_loss.Value;
						Logger.Info(string.Format("[PendingReturns] Set durability loss to {0}", itemInfo.durability_loss.Value));
					}
				}
				PlayerStoragePatch.BeginModPush();
				PlayerStorage.Push(item, toBufferDirectly: true);
				PlayerStoragePatch.EndModPush();
				remainingQuantity -= stackCountToCreate;
				createdItemsCount++;
			}
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[PendingReturns] ✅ Item returned successfully: {0} x{1} ({2} stacks)", itemInfo.item_name, itemInfo.quantity, createdItemsCount));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[PendingReturns] Error returning item: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static void HandlePurchaseOrderCancelledNotification(WebSocketMessage message)
	{
		try
		{
			Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 🗑️ 收到求购订单取消通知: " + message.message);
			if (message.order_id.HasValue)
			{
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 📋 订单详情: OrderId={0}", message.order_id));
				if (DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Instance != null)
				{
					Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 🔄 触发求购订单列表刷新");
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 处理求购订单取消通知失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private static async UniTask ConnectWebSocketIfAuthenticated()
	{
		try
		{
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(ApiClient.AuthToken))
			{
				Logger.Info("[WebSocket] Not authenticated, skipping WebSocket connection");
				return;
			}
			int saveSlot = SavesSystem.CurrentSlot;
			Logger.Info(string.Format("[WebSocket] Connecting for save slot {0}...", saveSlot));
			if (await WebSocketClient.ConnectAsync(ApiClient.AuthToken, saveSlot))
			{
				Logger.Info(string.Format("[WebSocket] Connected successfully for save slot {0}", saveSlot));
			}
			else
			{
				Logger.Warning("[WebSocket] Connection failed");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[WebSocket] Connection error: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private IEnumerator DelayedUIFallbackCheck()
	{
		yield return new WaitForSeconds(2f);
		try
		{
			Logger.Info("[Fallback] Checking if GameVersionDisplay UI needs compensation...");
			GameVersionDisplayPatch.EnsureUIComponentsCreated();
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[Fallback] Error during UI compensation: {0}", arg));
		}
	}
}






```

`duckmarket_core/FleaMarket.UI/DuckMarketEntry.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using DuckMarket;
using DuckMarket.Core;
using DuckMarket.Network;
using Logger = DuckMarket.Logger;
using TMPro;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;
using UnityEngine.Events;
using UnityEngine.UI;

namespace FleaMarket.UI;

public class DuckMarketEntry : MonoBehaviour
{
	private Image _background;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _buttonText;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _durabilityText;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _itemNameText;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _priceText;

	private Button _purchaseButton;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _quantityText;

	private TextMeshProUGUI _sellerText;

	public Listing Listing { get; private set; }

	public event Action<DuckMarketEntry> OnPurchaseClicked;

	public static DuckMarketEntry Create(Transform parent)
	{
		GameObject val = new GameObject("DuckMarketEntry");
		val.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
		val.layer = parent.gameObject.layer;
		DuckMarketEntry duckMarketEntry = val.AddComponent<DuckMarketEntry>();
		duckMarketEntry.BuildUI();
		return duckMarketEntry;
	}

	private void BuildUI()
	{
		RectTransform obj = gameObject.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
		obj.anchorMin = new Vector2(0f, 1f);
		obj.anchorMax = new Vector2(0f, 1f);
		obj.pivot = new Vector2(0f, 1f);
		obj.sizeDelta = new Vector2(280f, 120f);
		_background = gameObject.AddComponent<Image>();
		_background.color = new Color(0.15f, 0.15f, 0.15f, 0.95f);
		LayoutElement obj2 = gameObject.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
		obj2.preferredWidth = 280f;
		obj2.preferredHeight = 120f;
		CreateContent();
	}

	private void CreateContent()
	{
		GameObject val = new GameObject("MainContainer");
		val.transform.SetParent(transform, false);
		val.layer = gameObject.layer;
		RectTransform obj = val.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
		obj.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
		obj.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
		obj.sizeDelta = Vector2.zero;
		obj.anchoredPosition = Vector2.zero;
		VerticalLayoutGroup obj2 = val.AddComponent<VerticalLayoutGroup>();
		((LayoutGroup)obj2).padding = new RectOffset(10, 10, 8, 8);
		((HorizontalOrVerticalLayoutGroup)obj2).spacing = 4f;
		((LayoutGroup)obj2).childAlignment = (TextAnchor)0;
		((HorizontalOrVerticalLayoutGroup)obj2).childControlWidth = true;
		((HorizontalOrVerticalLayoutGroup)obj2).childControlHeight = false;
		((HorizontalOrVerticalLayoutGroup)obj2).childForceExpandWidth = true;
		((HorizontalOrVerticalLayoutGroup)obj2).childForceExpandHeight = false;
		CreateItemNameText(val.transform);
		CreateInfoArea(val.transform);
		CreateSellerText(val.transform);
		CreatePurchaseButton(val.transform);
	}

	private void CreateItemNameText(Transform parent)
	{
		GameObject val = new GameObject("ItemName");
		val.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
		val.layer = parent.gameObject.layer;
		val.AddComponent<RectTransform>().sizeDelta = new Vector2(0f, 24f);
		_itemNameText = val.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
		_itemNameText.fontSize = 18f;
		_itemNameText.fontStyle = (FontStyles)1;
		_itemNameText.color = new Color(1f, 0.9f, 0.6f);
		_itemNameText.alignment = (TextAlignmentOptions)513;
		_itemNameText.text = "物品名称";
		val.AddComponent<LayoutElement>().preferredHeight = 24f;
	}

	private void CreateInfoArea(Transform parent)
	{
		GameObject val = new GameObject("InfoArea");
		val.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
		val.layer = parent.gameObject.layer;
		val.AddComponent<RectTransform>().sizeDelta = new Vector2(0f, 20f);
		HorizontalLayoutGroup obj = val.AddComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
		((HorizontalOrVerticalLayoutGroup)obj).spacing = 8f;
		((LayoutGroup)obj).childAlignment = (TextAnchor)3;
		((HorizontalOrVerticalLayoutGroup)obj).childControlWidth = false;
		((HorizontalOrVerticalLayoutGroup)obj).childControlHeight = true;
		((HorizontalOrVerticalLayoutGroup)obj).childForceExpandWidth = false;
		((HorizontalOrVerticalLayoutGroup)obj).childForceExpandHeight = true;
		val.AddComponent<LayoutElement>().preferredHeight = 20f;
		_priceText = CreateInfoText(val.transform, "Price", "价格: 0");
		_priceText.color = new Color(0.4f, 1f, 0.4f);
		_quantityText = CreateInfoText(val.transform, "Quantity", "数量: x1");
		_quantityText.color = Color.white;
		_durabilityText = CreateInfoText(val.transform, "Durability", "耐久: 100%");
		_durabilityText.color = new Color(0.7f, 0.7f, 1f);
	}

	private TextMeshProUGUI CreateInfoText(Transform parent, string name, string defaultText)
	{
		GameObject val = new GameObject(name);
		val.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
		val.layer = parent.gameObject.layer;
		TextMeshProUGUI obj = val.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
		obj.fontSize = 14f;
		obj.color = Color.white;
		obj.alignment = (TextAlignmentOptions)513;
		obj.text = defaultText;
		obj.enableAutoSizing = false;
		return obj;
	}

	private void CreateSellerText(Transform parent)
	{
		GameObject val = new GameObject("Seller");
		val.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
		val.layer = parent.gameObject.layer;
		val.AddComponent<RectTransform>().sizeDelta = new Vector2(0f, 16f);
		_sellerText = val.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
		_sellerText.fontSize = 12f;
		_sellerText.color = new Color(0.7f, 0.7f, 0.7f);
		_sellerText.alignment = (TextAlignmentOptions)513;
		_sellerText.text = "卖家: 未知";
		val.AddComponent<LayoutElement>().preferredHeight = 16f;
	}

	private void CreatePurchaseButton(Transform parent)
	{
		GameObject val = new GameObject("PurchaseButton");
		val.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
		val.layer = parent.gameObject.layer;
		val.AddComponent<RectTransform>().sizeDelta = new Vector2(0f, 28f);
		Image val2 = val.AddComponent<Image>();
		val2.color = new Color(0.2f, 0.6f, 0.8f, 1f);
		_purchaseButton = val.AddComponent<Button>();
		_purchaseButton.targetGraphic = val2;
		_purchaseButton.onClick.AddListener(new UnityAction(OnPurchaseButtonClicked));
		val.AddComponent<LayoutElement>().preferredHeight = 28f;
		GameObject val3 = new GameObject("Text");
		val3.transform.SetParent(val.transform, false);
		val3.layer = val.layer;
		RectTransform obj = val3.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
		obj.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
		obj.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
		obj.sizeDelta = Vector2.zero;
		obj.anchoredPosition = Vector2.zero;
		_buttonText = val3.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
		_buttonText.text = LocalizationStrings.GetBuyButtonLabel();
		_buttonText.fontSize = 16f;
		_buttonText.fontStyle = (FontStyles)1;
		_buttonText.color = Color.white;
		_buttonText.alignment = (TextAlignmentOptions)514;
	}

	public void Setup(Listing listing)
	{
		Listing = listing;
		RefreshDisplay();
	}

	private void RefreshDisplay()
	{
		if (Listing == null)
		{
			Logger.Warning("[DuckMarketEntry] Listing is null, cannot refresh");
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			_itemNameText.text = Listing.item_name ?? "未知物品";
			_priceText.text = string.Format("价格: {0:N0}", Listing.price);
			_quantityText.text = string.Format("数量: x{0}", Listing.quantity);
			if (Listing.durability.HasValue && Listing.durability.Value < 1f)
			{
				_durabilityText.text = string.Format("耐久: {0:F0}%", Listing.durability.Value * 100f);
				_durabilityText.gameObject.SetActive(true);
			}
			else
			{
				_durabilityText.gameObject.SetActive(false);
			}
			_sellerText.text = "卖家: " + (Listing.seller_name ?? "未知");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarketEntry] Failed to refresh display: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void OnPurchaseButtonClicked()
	{
		Logger.Info("[DuckMarketEntry] Purchase button clicked for: " + Listing?.item_name);
		this.OnPurchaseClicked?.Invoke(this);
	}

	public void SetInteractable(bool interactable)
	{
		if (_purchaseButton != null)
		{
			_purchaseButton.interactable = interactable;
		}
	}

	public void Clear()
	{
		Listing = null;
		this.OnPurchaseClicked = null;
		if (_itemNameText != null)
		{
			_itemNameText.text = "";
		}
		if (_priceText != null)
		{
			_priceText.text = "";
		}
		if (_quantityText != null)
		{
			_quantityText.text = "";
		}
		if (_sellerText != null)
		{
			_sellerText.text = "";
		}
	}
}
```
