`duckmarket_core/FleaMarket.UI/DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Core.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using System.Reflection;
using System.Text;
using System.Text.RegularExpressions;
using Cysharp.Threading.Tasks;
using DuckMarket;
using DuckMarket.Core;
using DuckMarket.Models;
using DuckMarket.Network;
using DuckMarket.Patches;
using DuckMarket.Services;
using DuckMarket.UI;
using Duckov.BlackMarkets.UI;
using Duckov.Economy;
using Duckov.NoteIndexs;
using Duckov.UI;
using Duckov.UI.Animations;
using Duckov.UI.Inventories;
using Duckov.Utilities;
using ItemStatsSystem;
using TMPro;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;
using UnityEngine.EventSystems;
using UnityEngine.UI;

namespace FleaMarket.UI;

public partial class DuckMarketView_NoteClone
{
	protected override void Awake()
	{
		base.Awake();
		Instance = this;
		DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ========== 开始初始化鸭鸭市场UI ==========");
		try
		{
			LocalizationManager.Initialize();
			SyncGameLanguageOnStartup();
			SubscribeToLanguageChanges();
			FindOriginalNoteIndexView();
			CloneNoteIndexView();
			GetComponentReferences();
			CustomizeUI();
			InitializeEntryPool();
			InitializeItemDisplay();
			InitializeDealButton();
			WrapInspectorInScrollView();
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ========== ✅ 初始化完成 ==========");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 初始化失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void CleanupAllClonedPanels()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_currentPurchasePanel != null)
			{
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(_currentPurchasePanel);
				_currentPurchasePanel = null;
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🧹 已销毁当前购买详情面板");
			}
			Type type = Type.GetType("Duckov.StrongNotification, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
			if (type == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			PropertyInfo property = type.GetProperty("Instance", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
			if (property == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			object value = property.GetValue(null);
			if (value == null || value as MonoBehaviour == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			FieldInfo field = type.GetField("mainFadeGroup", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour = field.GetValue(value) as MonoBehaviour;
			if (monoBehaviour == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			int removedPanelCount = 0;
			for (int childIndex = monoBehaviour.transform.childCount - 1; childIndex >= 0; childIndex--)
			{
				Transform child = monoBehaviour.transform.GetChild(childIndex);
				if (child.name == "CustomPurchasePanel" || child.name == "ClonedItemDetailsPanel" || child.name == "DedicatedPurchasePanel")
				{
					UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(child.gameObject);
					removedPanelCount++;
				}
			}
			if (removedPanelCount > 0)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🧹 清理了 {0} 个克隆面板", removedPanelCount));
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 清理克隆面板失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void RemoveDOTweenComponents(GameObject panel)
	{
		try
		{
			Type type = Type.GetType("DG.Tweening.DOTweenAnimation, DOTween");
			if (type == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ℹ️ 未找到DOTweenAnimation类型，可能游戏未使用DOTween");
				return;
			}
			Component[] componentsInChildren = panel.GetComponentsInChildren(type, includeInactive: true);
			if (componentsInChildren.Length == 0)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ℹ️ 面板中没有DOTween组件");
				return;
			}
			int removedTweenCount = 0;
			Component[] array = componentsInChildren;
			for (int i = 0; i < array.Length; i++)
			{
				MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour = array[i] as MonoBehaviour;
				if (monoBehaviour != null)
				{
					monoBehaviour.enabled = false;
					UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(monoBehaviour);
					removedTweenCount++;
				}
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🧹 已移除 {0} 个DOTween组件，避免引用错误", removedTweenCount));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 移除DOTween组件失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void AddMoneyDisplayToTopRight()
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 💰 添加资产显示到右上角...");
			InventoryView inventoryView = UnityEngine.Object.FindObjectOfType<InventoryView>(includeInactive: true);
			if (inventoryView == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到InventoryView，尝试通过GameplayUIManager获取...");
				inventoryView = GameplayUIManager.GetViewInstance<InventoryView>();
			}
			if (inventoryView == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket]   - ❌ 找不到InventoryView，无法克隆MoneyDisplay");
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 找到InventoryView: " + inventoryView.gameObject.name);
			MoneyDisplay[] componentsInChildren = inventoryView.GetComponentsInChildren<MoneyDisplay>(includeInactive: true);
			if (componentsInChildren == null || componentsInChildren.Length == 0)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket]   - ❌ InventoryView中找不到MoneyDisplay组件");
				return;
			}
			MoneyDisplay moneyDisplay = componentsInChildren[0];
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 找到MoneyDisplay: " + moneyDisplay.gameObject.name);
			if (_fadeGroup == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket]   - ❌ 找不到FadeGroup");
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 找到FadeGroup: " + _fadeGroup.name);
			Transform transform = moneyDisplay.transform.parent;
			if (transform == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket]   - ❌ MoneyDisplay没有父容器");
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 找到MoneyDisplay父容器: " + transform.name);
			GameObject gameObject = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(transform.gameObject);
			gameObject.name = "MoneyDisplayContainer_Cloned";
			Button[] componentsInChildren2 = gameObject.GetComponentsInChildren<Button>(includeInactive: true);
			foreach (Button button in componentsInChildren2)
			{
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(button.gameObject);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 删除不需要的按钮: " + button.gameObject.name);
			}
			Transform transform2 = gameObject.transform.Find("CashIcon");
			if (transform2 != null)
			{
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(transform2.gameObject);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - 删除现金图标: CashIcon");
			}
			Transform transform3 = gameObject.transform.Find("CashText");
			if (transform3 != null)
			{
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(transform3.gameObject);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - 删除现金文本: CashText");
			}
			Transform transform4 = _fadeGroup?.transform.Find("Content/LeftLayout");
			if (transform4 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket]   - ❌ 找不到LeftLayout");
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(gameObject);
				return;
			}
			gameObject.transform.SetParent(transform4, worldPositionStays: false);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ MoneyDisplay添加到LeftLayout");
			RectTransform component = gameObject.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (component != null)
			{
				component.anchorMin = new Vector2(1f, 1f);
				component.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 1f);
				component.pivot = new Vector2(1f, 1f);
				component.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(0f, 0f);
				component.sizeDelta = new Vector2(420f, 50f);
				LayoutElement layoutElement = gameObject.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
				if (layoutElement == null)
				{
					layoutElement = gameObject.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
				}
				layoutElement.ignoreLayout = true;
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ MoneyDisplay使用绝对定位在右上角: anchoredPosition=(-10, -10)");
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket]   - ❌ 克隆的MoneyDisplay容器没有RectTransform");
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(gameObject);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 添加MoneyDisplay失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	protected override void OnOpen()
	{
		base.OnOpen();
		ItemDisplayPatch.RefreshStorageCache();
		EnsurePlaceHolderHidden();
		if (_isPurchaseOrderMode)
		{
			LoadPurchaseOrdersAsync().Forget();
		}
		else
		{
			LoadListingsAsync().Forget();
		}
		try
		{
			if (_searchBar != null)
			{
				TMP_InputField componentInChildren = _searchBar.GetComponentInChildren<TMP_InputField>();
				if (componentInChildren != null)
				{
					componentInChildren.SetTextWithoutNotify("");
					componentInChildren.interactable = true;
					componentInChildren.readOnly = false;
					componentInChildren.caretPosition = 0;
					componentInChildren.selectionAnchorPosition = 0;
					componentInChildren.selectionFocusPosition = 0;
				}
			}
			_currentSearchText = "";
			if (_fadeGroup != null)
			{
				_fadeGroup.Show();
			}
			Transform transform = _fadeGroup.transform.Find("Content");
			if (transform != null)
			{
				Transform transform2 = transform.Find("LeftLayout");
				if (transform2 != null)
				{
					Canvas.ForceUpdateCanvases();
					LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(transform2.GetComponent<RectTransform>());
					RectTransform component = transform2.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
					float width = component.rect.width;
					RectTransform component2 = transform.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
					transform.Find("Inspector");
					float width2 = component2.rect.width;
					float inspectorPanelWidth = 936f;
					float leftPadding = 16f;
					float rightSpacing = 20f;
					float availableListWidth = width2 - inspectorPanelWidth - leftPadding - rightSpacing;
					component.offsetMin = new Vector2(leftPadding, component.offsetMin.y);
					component.offsetMax = new Vector2(leftPadding + availableListWidth, component.offsetMax.y);
					Canvas.ForceUpdateCanvases();
					LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(component);
					width = component.rect.width;
					Transform transform3 = transform2.Find("Entries Scroll View");
					if (transform3 != null)
					{
						RectTransform component3 = transform3.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
						if (component3 != null && component3.rect.width < width - 10f)
						{
							component3.sizeDelta = new Vector2(width, component3.sizeDelta.y);
							Canvas.ForceUpdateCanvases();
							LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(component);
						}
					}
				}
			}
			if (!_hasPopulatedItems && _inspectorInventoryDisplay != null && _itemDisplayPool != null)
			{
				PopulateGameItems();
				_hasPopulatedItems = true;
			}
			RefreshEntries();
			UpdateDynamicUILanguage();
			if (_inspectorInventoryDisplay != null && _hasPopulatedItems)
			{
				RefreshMarketItemDisplays();
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ OnOpen失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void RefreshMarketItemDisplays()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_inspectorInventoryDisplay == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			PropertyInfo property = typeof(InventoryDisplay).GetProperty("SelectedPage", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
			if (property != null && property.CanRead)
			{
				int selectedPage = (int)property.GetValue(_inspectorInventoryDisplay);
				MethodInfo method = typeof(InventoryDisplay).GetMethod("SetPage", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
				if (method != null)
				{
					method.Invoke(_inspectorInventoryDisplay, new object[1] { selectedPage });
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ 已刷新物品栏显示（当前第 {0} 页）", selectedPage));
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ RefreshMarketItemDisplays失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	protected override void OnClose()
	{
		base.OnClose();
		ItemDisplayPatch.ClearCache();
		DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] OnClose - 隐藏UI");
		try
		{
			if (_searchBar != null)
			{
				TMP_InputField componentInChildren = _searchBar.GetComponentInChildren<TMP_InputField>();
				if (componentInChildren != null)
				{
					componentInChildren.DeactivateInputField();
					componentInChildren.SetTextWithoutNotify("");
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 左侧搜索框已清空");
				}
			}
			if (_inspectorSearchBar != null)
			{
				TMP_InputField componentInChildren2 = _inspectorSearchBar.GetComponentInChildren<TMP_InputField>();
				if (componentInChildren2 != null)
				{
					componentInChildren2.DeactivateInputField();
					componentInChildren2.SetTextWithoutNotify("");
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ Inspector搜索框已清空");
				}
			}
			_currentSearchText = "";
			CleanupAllClonedPanels();
			if (_fadeGroup != null)
			{
				_fadeGroup.Hide();
			}
			ClearAllEntries();
			_listings.Clear();
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ UI已隐藏");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ OnClose失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void EnsurePlaceHolderHidden()
	{
		if (_inspector == null)
		{
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			Transform transform = _inspector.transform.Find("PlaceHolder");
			if (transform != null && transform.gameObject.activeSelf)
			{
				transform.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ OnOpen时强制禁用PlaceHolder");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ EnsurePlaceHolderHidden失败: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	private void FindOriginalNoteIndexView()
	{
		DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🔍 寻找原始NoteIndexView...");
		if (GameplayUIManager.Instance != null)
		{
			_originalView = GameplayUIManager.GetViewInstance<NoteIndexView>();
			if (_originalView != null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 通过GameplayUIManager找到: " + _originalView.gameObject.name);
				return;
			}
		}
		DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ GameplayUIManager获取失败，尝试场景查找...");
		_originalView = UnityEngine.Object.FindObjectOfType<NoteIndexView>(includeInactive: true);
		if (_originalView == null)
		{
			throw new Exception("找不到原始的NoteIndexView！请确保在GameplayUIManager初始化后调用。");
		}
		DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 通过场景查找找到: " + _originalView.gameObject.name);
	}

	private void CloneNoteIndexView()
	{
		DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 📋 克隆GameObject结构...");
		_clonedViewRoot = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(_originalView.gameObject, base.transform);
		_clonedViewRoot.name = "DuckMarket_NoteClone";
		RectTransform component = _clonedViewRoot.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
		if (component != null)
		{
			component.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
			component.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
			component.sizeDelta = Vector2.zero;
			component.anchoredPosition = Vector2.zero;
		}
		Canvas canvas = _clonedViewRoot.GetComponent<Canvas>();
		if (canvas == null)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 在克隆的GameObject上添加新Canvas组件");
			canvas = _clonedViewRoot.AddComponent<Canvas>();
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 已添加新Canvas组件");
		}
		else
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 克隆的GameObject上已有Canvas组件");
		}
		canvas.overrideSorting = true;
		canvas.sortingOrder = -1;
		DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ Canvas设置完成: sortingOrder={0}, overrideSorting={1}", canvas.sortingOrder, canvas.overrideSorting));
		DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - Canvas GameObject: " + canvas.gameObject.name);
		if (_clonedViewRoot.GetComponent<GraphicRaycaster>() == null)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 添加GraphicRaycaster组件以支持UI交互");
			_clonedViewRoot.AddComponent<GraphicRaycaster>();
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ GraphicRaycaster已添加");
		}
		else
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - GraphicRaycaster组件已存在");
		}
		NoteIndexView component2 = _clonedViewRoot.GetComponent<NoteIndexView>();
		if (component2 != null)
		{
			UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(component2);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 已移除原始NoteIndexView脚本");
		}
		DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ GameObject克隆完成，子对象数量: {0}", _clonedViewRoot.transform.childCount));
	}

	private void GetComponentReferences()
	{
		DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🔗 获取组件引用...");
		_fadeGroup = _clonedViewRoot.GetComponentInChildren<FadeGroup>();
		DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - FadeGroup: " + ((_fadeGroup != null) ? "✅" : "❌"));
		ScrollRect[] componentsInChildren = _clonedViewRoot.GetComponentsInChildren<ScrollRect>(includeInactive: true);
		_scrollView = ((componentsInChildren.Length != 0) ? componentsInChildren[0] : null);
		DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - ScrollRect: " + ((_scrollView != null) ? string.Format("✅ ({0}个)", componentsInChildren.Length) : "❌"));
		NoteIndexView_Entry[] componentsInChildren2 = _clonedViewRoot.GetComponentsInChildren<NoteIndexView_Entry>(includeInactive: true);
		_entryTemplate = ((componentsInChildren2.Length != 0) ? componentsInChildren2[0] : null);
		DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - EntryTemplate: " + ((_entryTemplate != null) ? string.Format("✅ (找到{0}个)", componentsInChildren2.Length) : "❌"));
		if (_scrollView != null && _scrollView.content != null)
		{
			Transform transform = _scrollView.content.Find("Entry");
			if (transform != null)
			{
				_entryTemplate = transform.GetComponent<NoteIndexView_Entry>();
				_entryTemplate.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - 使用Content下的Entry作为模板");
			}
		}
		Transform transform2 = _clonedViewRoot.transform.Find("Content/LeftLayout/Entries Scroll View/PlaceHolder");
		if (transform2 == null)
		{
			transform2 = _clonedViewRoot.transform.Find("FadeGroup/Content/LeftLayout/Entries Scroll View/PlaceHolder");
		}
		if (transform2 == null)
		{
			transform2 = _clonedViewRoot.transform.Find("FadeGroup/Content/LeftLayout/NoEntryIndicator");
		}
		if (transform2 == null)
		{
			transform2 = _clonedViewRoot.transform.Find("FadeGroup/NoEntryIndicator");
		}
		if (transform2 == null)
		{
			transform2 = _clonedViewRoot.transform.Find("NoEntryIndicator");
		}
		if (transform2 == null)
		{
			Transform transform3 = _clonedViewRoot.transform.Find("FadeGroup/Content/LeftLayout");
			if (transform3 == null)
			{
				transform3 = _clonedViewRoot.transform.Find("Content/LeftLayout");
			}
			if (transform3 != null)
			{
				Transform transform4 = transform3.Find("Entries Scroll View");
				if (transform4 != null)
				{
					Transform transform5 = transform4.Find("PlaceHolder");
					if (transform5 != null)
					{
						transform2 = transform5;
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 在Entries Scroll View下找到PlaceHolder");
					}
				}
				if (transform2 == null)
				{
					Transform[] componentsInChildren3 = transform3.GetComponentsInChildren<Transform>(includeInactive: true);
					foreach (Transform transform6 in componentsInChildren3)
					{
						if (transform6.name.Contains("NoEntry") || transform6.name.Contains("Indicator") || transform6.name.Contains("Empty") || transform6.name.Contains("PlaceHolder") || transform6.name.Contains("Placeholder"))
						{
							transform2 = transform6;
							DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 递归找到可能的指示器: " + transform6.name);
							break;
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		_noEntryIndicator = ((transform2 != null) ? transform2.gameObject : null);
		string noEntryIndicatorStatus = "⚠️ 未找到";
		if (_noEntryIndicator != null)
		{
			noEntryIndicatorStatus = "✅ (" + _noEntryIndicator.name + ")";
		}
		DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - NoEntryIndicator: " + noEntryIndicatorStatus);
		TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren4 = _clonedViewRoot.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
		foreach (TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI in componentsInChildren4)
		{
			if (textMeshProUGUI.gameObject.name.Contains("Count") || textMeshProUGUI.gameObject.name.Contains("count"))
			{
				_noteCountText = textMeshProUGUI;
				if (_noteCountText != null && _noteCountText.gameObject != null)
				{
					_noteCountText.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - NoteCountText: ✅ 已找到并隐藏");
				}
				break;
			}
		}
		if (_noteCountText == null)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - NoteCountText: ⚠️ 未找到");
		}
		try
		{
			Transform transform7 = _clonedViewRoot.transform.Find("Content");
			if (transform7 != null)
			{
				Transform transform8 = transform7.Find("Inspector");
				if (transform8 != null)
				{
					Component component = transform8.GetComponent("NoteIndexView_Inspector");
					_inspector = ((component != null) ? component : transform8);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - Inspector: ✅ (从克隆的Content中找到: " + transform8.gameObject.name + ")");
				}
				else
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - Inspector: ⚠️ 在克隆的Content中找不到Inspector");
				}
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket]   - Inspector: ❌ 找不到克隆的Content");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket]   - Inspector: ❌ 获取失败: " + ex.Message);
		}
		DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 组件引用获取完成");
	}

	private void CustomizeUI()
	{
		DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🎨 定制UI...");
		try
		{
			LogGameObjectHierarchy(_clonedViewRoot.transform, 0);
			SetupLocalizationOverrides();
			string currentLanguageKey = GetCurrentLanguageKey();
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🌐 当前游戏语言Key: " + currentLanguageKey);
			foreach (Component item in (from c in _clonedViewRoot.GetComponentsInChildren<Component>(includeInactive: true)
				where c.GetType().Name == "TextLocalizor"
				select c).ToList())
			{
				PropertyInfo property = item.GetType().GetProperty("Key");
				if (property != null && property.GetValue(item) is string localizationKey && (localizationKey.Contains("Note") || localizationKey.Contains("笔记") || localizationKey.Contains("筆記")))
				{
					property.SetValue(item, currentLanguageKey);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 设置TextLocalizor Key为: " + currentLanguageKey);
				}
			}
			ViewTabs viewTabs = base.transform.parent?.parent?.GetComponent<ViewTabs>();
			if (viewTabs != null)
			{
				foreach (Component item2 in (from c in viewTabs.GetComponentsInChildren<Component>(includeInactive: true)
					where c.GetType().Name == "TextLocalizor"
					select c).ToList())
				{
					PropertyInfo property2 = item2.GetType().GetProperty("Key");
					if (property2 != null && property2.GetValue(item2) is string localizationKey && (localizationKey.Contains("Note") || localizationKey.Contains("笔记") || localizationKey.Contains("筆記")))
					{
						property2.SetValue(item2, currentLanguageKey);
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 设置ViewTabs中的TextLocalizor Key为: " + currentLanguageKey);
					}
				}
			}
			if (_fadeGroup != null)
			{
				GameObject gameObject = _fadeGroup.gameObject;
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - FadeGroup GameObject: " + gameObject.name);
				Transform transform = gameObject.transform.Find("Content");
				if (transform != null)
				{
					RectTransform component = transform.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
					if (component != null)
					{
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - Content当前: anchorMin={0}, anchorMax={1}, sizeDelta={2}", component.anchorMin, component.anchorMax, component.sizeDelta));
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - Content当前offsetMin: {0}, offsetMax: {1}", component.offsetMin, component.offsetMax));
						component.sizeDelta = new Vector2(-200f, -100f);
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 调整Content sizeDelta: {0}", component.sizeDelta));
						component.offsetMin = new Vector2(component.offsetMin.x, component.offsetMin.y + 50f);
						component.offsetMax = new Vector2(component.offsetMax.x, component.offsetMax.y - 50f);
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 调整Content垂直位置：offsetMin={0}, offsetMax={1}", component.offsetMin, component.offsetMax));
						LayoutElement component2 = transform.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
						if (component2 != null)
						{
							DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - Content LayoutElement当前状态:");
							DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - preferredWidth: {0}", component2.preferredWidth));
							DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - minWidth: {0}", component2.minWidth));
							component2.preferredWidth = -1f;
							component2.minWidth = -1f;
							DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 移除Content LayoutElement宽度限制");
						}
						HorizontalLayoutGroup component3 = transform.GetComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
						if (component3 != null)
						{
							DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - Content HorizontalLayoutGroup当前设置:");
							DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - padding: L={0}, R={1}", component3.padding.left, component3.padding.right));
							DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - spacing: {0}", component3.spacing));
							DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - childControlWidth: {0}", component3.childControlWidth));
							DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - childForceExpandWidth: {0}", component3.childForceExpandWidth));
							component3.padding.left = 16;
							component3.padding.right = 16;
							component3.spacing = 20f;
							component3.childControlWidth = false;
							component3.childForceExpandWidth = false;
							DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 调整HorizontalLayoutGroup: padding(L=16,R=16), spacing=20, childControlWidth=false");
						}
						Transform transform2 = transform.Find("LeftLayout");
						if (transform2 != null)
						{
							RectTransform component4 = transform2.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
							if (component4 != null)
							{
								LayoutElement component5 = transform2.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
								if (component5 != null)
								{
									DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - LeftLayout当前宽度: {0}", component5.preferredWidth));
									component5.preferredWidth = 700f;
									DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 调整LeftLayout宽度: {0}", component5.preferredWidth));
								}
								else
								{
									DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - LeftLayout当前宽度: {0}", component4.sizeDelta.x));
									component4.sizeDelta = new Vector2(700f, component4.sizeDelta.y);
									DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 调整LeftLayout宽度: {0}", component4.sizeDelta.x));
								}
								Transform transform3 = transform2.Find("Entries Scroll View");
								if (transform3 != null)
								{
									RectTransform component6 = transform3.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
									LayoutElement component7 = transform3.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
									if (component7 != null)
									{
										DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - Entries Scroll View当前状态:");
										DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - RectTransform: anchorMin={0}, anchorMax={1}, sizeDelta={2}", component6.anchorMin, component6.anchorMax, component6.sizeDelta));
										DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - LayoutElement: preferredWidth={0}, minWidth={1}, flexibleWidth={2}", component7.preferredWidth, component7.minWidth, component7.flexibleWidth));
										component7.preferredWidth = -1f;
										component7.minWidth = -1f;
										component7.flexibleWidth = 1f;
										component6.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0f, component6.sizeDelta.y);
										DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 调整Entries Scroll View: flexibleWidth=1, sizeDelta.x=0");
									}
									else
									{
										DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ Entries Scroll View 没有 LayoutElement 组件");
									}
								}
								VerticalLayoutGroup component8 = transform2.GetComponent<VerticalLayoutGroup>();
								if (component8 != null)
								{
									DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - VerticalLayoutGroup当前设置:");
									DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - padding: L={0}, R={1}, T={2}, B={3}", component8.padding.left, component8.padding.right, component8.padding.top, component8.padding.bottom));
									DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - spacing: {0}", component8.spacing));
									DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - childControlWidth: {0}", component8.childControlWidth));
									DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - childForceExpandWidth: {0}", component8.childForceExpandWidth));
									component8.padding.left = 0;
									component8.padding.right = 0;
									component8.childControlWidth = true;
									component8.childForceExpandWidth = true;
									DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 调整VerticalLayoutGroup: padding(L=0,R=0), childControlWidth=true, childForceExpandWidth=true");
									Canvas.ForceUpdateCanvases();
									LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(component4);
									DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 验证设置: childControlWidth={0}, childForceExpandWidth={1}", component8.childControlWidth, component8.childForceExpandWidth));
								}
							}
						}
						Transform transform4 = transform.Find("Inspector");
						if (transform4 != null)
						{
							RectTransform component9 = transform4.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
							if (component9 != null)
							{
								LayoutElement component10 = transform4.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
								if (component10 != null)
								{
									DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - Inspector（详情面板）当前宽度: {0}", component10.preferredWidth));
									component10.preferredWidth = 936f;
									DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 保持Inspector宽度: {0}", component10.preferredWidth));
								}
								else
								{
									DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - Inspector（详情面板）当前宽度: {0}", component9.sizeDelta.x));
									component9.sizeDelta = new Vector2(936f, component9.sizeDelta.y);
									DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 保持Inspector宽度: {0}", component9.sizeDelta.x));
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
				else
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到Content GameObject！");
				}
			}
			InitializeSearchBar();
			InitializeMyListingsButton();
			InitializeInspectorSearchBar();
			InitializeInspectorInventoryDisplay();
			InitializePaginationButtons();
			AddMoneyDisplayToTopRight();
			AddFilterDisplayToInspector();
			AddFilterButtonsToSearchBar();
			AnalyzeFormulaRegisterButton();
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ UI定制完成");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 定制UI失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void InitializeEntryPool()
	{
		DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🏊 初始化对象池...");
		if (_entryTemplate == null)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ EntryTemplate为空，无法初始化对象池");
			return;
		}
		if (_scrollView == null || _scrollView.content == null)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ ScrollView或Content为空，无法初始化对象池");
			return;
		}
		_entryPool = new PrefabPool<NoteIndexView_Entry>(_entryTemplate, _scrollView.content);
		for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++)
		{
			NoteIndexView_Entry item = _entryPool.Get();
			_entryPool.Release(item);
		}
		DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ 对象池初始化完成（预加载{0}个Entry）", 10));
	}

	private void InitializeItemDisplay()
	{
		DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🎨 初始化物品显示组件...");
		try
		{
			InventoryView inventoryView = GameplayUIManager.GetViewInstance<InventoryView>();
			if (inventoryView == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 找不到InventoryView，尝试场景查找...");
				inventoryView = UnityEngine.Object.FindObjectOfType<InventoryView>(includeInactive: true);
			}
			if (inventoryView == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到InventoryView，无法获取ItemDisplay prefab");
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 找到InventoryView: " + inventoryView.gameObject.name);
			InventoryDisplay[] componentsInChildren = inventoryView.GetComponentsInChildren<InventoryDisplay>(includeInactive: true);
			if (componentsInChildren == null || componentsInChildren.Length == 0)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ InventoryView中找不到InventoryDisplay组件");
				return;
			}
			InventoryDisplay inventoryDisplay = componentsInChildren[0];
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 找到InventoryDisplay: " + inventoryDisplay.gameObject.name);
			FieldInfo field = typeof(InventoryDisplay).GetField("entryPrefab", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到InventoryDisplay.entryPrefab字段");
				return;
			}
			InventoryEntry inventoryEntry = field.GetValue(inventoryDisplay) as InventoryEntry;
			if (inventoryEntry == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ InventoryEntry prefab为空");
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 找到InventoryEntry prefab: " + inventoryEntry.gameObject.name);
			FieldInfo field2 = typeof(InventoryEntry).GetField("itemDisplay", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field2 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到InventoryEntry.itemDisplay字段");
				return;
			}
			ItemDisplay itemDisplay = field2.GetValue(inventoryEntry) as ItemDisplay;
			if (itemDisplay == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ ItemDisplay为空");
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 找到ItemDisplay: " + itemDisplay.gameObject.name);
			_itemDisplayPrefab = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(itemDisplay.gameObject, base.transform).GetComponent<ItemDisplay>();
			_itemDisplayPrefab.gameObject.name = "ItemDisplay_Prefab";
			_itemDisplayPrefab.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
			_itemDisplayPool = new PrefabPool<ItemDisplay>(_itemDisplayPrefab, _clonedViewRoot.transform);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ ItemDisplay初始化完成");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 初始化ItemDisplay失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void InitializeDealButton()
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🔘 初始化购买按钮...");
			DemandPanel demandPanel = UnityEngine.Object.FindObjectOfType<DemandPanel>(includeInactive: true);
			if (demandPanel == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 找不到DemandPanel，尝试使用SupplyPanel");
				InitializeDealButtonFromSupplyPanel();
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 找到DemandPanel: " + demandPanel.gameObject.name);
			FieldInfo field = typeof(DemandPanel).GetField("entryTemplate", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 找不到DemandPanel.entryTemplate字段");
				InitializeDealButtonFromSupplyPanel();
				return;
			}
			DemandPanel_Entry demandPanel_Entry = field.GetValue(demandPanel) as DemandPanel_Entry;
			if (demandPanel_Entry == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ DemandPanel_Entry prefab为空");
				InitializeDealButtonFromSupplyPanel();
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 找到DemandPanel_Entry prefab: " + demandPanel_Entry.gameObject.name);
			FieldInfo field2 = typeof(DemandPanel_Entry).GetField("dealButton", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field2 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 找不到DemandPanel_Entry.dealButton字段");
				InitializeDealButtonFromSupplyPanel();
				return;
			}
			Button button = field2.GetValue(demandPanel_Entry) as Button;
			if (button == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ dealButton为空");
				InitializeDealButtonFromSupplyPanel();
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 找到dealButton: " + button.gameObject.name);
			_dealButtonPrefab = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(button.gameObject, base.transform).GetComponent<Button>();
			_dealButtonPrefab.gameObject.name = "DealButton_Prefab";
			_dealButtonPrefab.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 购买按钮初始化完成（使用DemandPanel按钮）");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 初始化购买按钮失败: {0}", arg));
			InitializeDealButtonFromSupplyPanel();
		}
	}

	private void InitializeDealButtonFromSupplyPanel()
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🔘 从SupplyPanel初始化购买按钮...");
			SupplyPanel supplyPanel = UnityEngine.Object.FindObjectOfType<SupplyPanel>(includeInactive: true);
			if (supplyPanel == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 找不到SupplyPanel，使用默认按钮样式");
				CreateDefaultDealButton();
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 找到SupplyPanel: " + supplyPanel.gameObject.name);
			FieldInfo field = typeof(SupplyPanel).GetField("entryTemplate", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 找不到SupplyPanel.entryTemplate字段");
				CreateDefaultDealButton();
				return;
			}
			SupplyPanel_Entry supplyPanel_Entry = field.GetValue(supplyPanel) as SupplyPanel_Entry;
			if (supplyPanel_Entry == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ SupplyPanel_Entry prefab为空");
				CreateDefaultDealButton();
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 找到SupplyPanel_Entry prefab: " + supplyPanel_Entry.gameObject.name);
			FieldInfo field2 = typeof(SupplyPanel_Entry).GetField("dealButton", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field2 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 找不到SupplyPanel_Entry.dealButton字段");
				CreateDefaultDealButton();
				return;
			}
			Button button = field2.GetValue(supplyPanel_Entry) as Button;
			if (button == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ dealButton为空");
				CreateDefaultDealButton();
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 找到dealButton: " + button.gameObject.name);
			_dealButtonPrefab = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(button.gameObject, base.transform).GetComponent<Button>();
			_dealButtonPrefab.gameObject.name = "DealButton_Prefab";
			_dealButtonPrefab.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 购买按钮初始化完成（使用SupplyPanel按钮）");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 从SupplyPanel初始化购买按钮失败: {0}", arg));
			CreateDefaultDealButton();
		}
	}

	private void CreateDefaultDealButton()
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🔘 创建默认购买按钮...");
			GameObject gameObject = new GameObject("DealButton_Default");
			gameObject.transform.SetParent(base.transform);
			gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
			RectTransform rectTransform = gameObject.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
			rectTransform.sizeDelta = new Vector2(100f, 60f);
			gameObject.AddComponent<Image>().color = new Color(0.2f, 0.7f, 0.2f, 1f);
			_dealButtonPrefab = gameObject.AddComponent<Button>();
			GameObject obj = new GameObject("Text");
			obj.transform.SetParent(rectTransform);
			RectTransform rectTransform2 = obj.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
			rectTransform2.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
			rectTransform2.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
			rectTransform2.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
			rectTransform2.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
			TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = obj.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
			textMeshProUGUI.text = LocalizationStrings.GetBuyButtonLabel();
			textMeshProUGUI.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
			textMeshProUGUI.fontSize = 24f;
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 默认购买按钮创建完成");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 创建默认购买按钮失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}
}

using System;
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;

using System.Text;

using Cysharp.Threading.Tasks;
using DuckMarket;
using DuckMarket.Core;
using DuckMarket.Models;
using DuckMarket.Network;
using DuckMarket.Patches;
using DuckMarket.Services;
using DuckMarket.UI;
using Duckov.BlackMarkets.UI;

namespace FleaMarket.UI;

public partial class DuckMarketView_NoteClone
{
	private void AddDecomposeTestButton()
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🔘 添加测试按钮...");
			Transform transform = _clonedViewRoot.transform.Find("Content");
			if (transform == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ Content为空，无法创建测试按钮");
				return;
			}
			Transform transform2 = transform.Find("Inspector");
			if (transform2 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ Inspector为空，无法创建测试按钮");
				return;
			}
			Button button = null;
			if (_searchBar != null && _searchBar._searchButton != null)
			{
				button = _searchBar._searchButton;
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 使用搜索按钮作为模板");
			}
			if (button == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到模板按钮，无法创建测试按钮");
				return;
			}
			GameObject gameObject = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(button.gameObject);
			gameObject.name = "DecomposeTestButton";
			gameObject.transform.SetParent(transform2, worldPositionStays: false);
			RectTransform component = gameObject.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (component != null)
			{
				component.anchorMin = new Vector2(0f, 1f);
				component.anchorMax = new Vector2(0f, 1f);
				component.pivot = new Vector2(0f, 1f);
				component.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(10f, -10f);
				component.sizeDelta = new Vector2(120f, 35f);
				LayoutElement layoutElement = gameObject.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
				if (layoutElement == null)
				{
					layoutElement = gameObject.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
				}
				layoutElement.ignoreLayout = true;
			}
			Button component2 = gameObject.GetComponent<Button>();
			if (component2 != null)
			{
				component2.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
				component2.onClick.AddListener(OnDecomposeTestButtonClicked);
			}
			TextMeshProUGUI componentInChildren = gameObject.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
			if (componentInChildren != null)
			{
				componentInChildren.text = "测试分解";
				componentInChildren.fontSize = 16f;
			}
			gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 测试分解按钮已添加");
			GameObject gameObject2 = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(button.gameObject);
			gameObject2.name = "NotificationTestButton";
			gameObject2.transform.SetParent(transform2, worldPositionStays: false);
			RectTransform component3 = gameObject2.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (component3 != null)
			{
				component3.anchorMin = new Vector2(0f, 1f);
				component3.anchorMax = new Vector2(0f, 1f);
				component3.pivot = new Vector2(0f, 1f);
				component3.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(140f, -10f);
				component3.sizeDelta = new Vector2(120f, 35f);
				LayoutElement layoutElement2 = gameObject2.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
				if (layoutElement2 == null)
				{
					layoutElement2 = gameObject2.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
				}
				layoutElement2.ignoreLayout = true;
			}
			Button component4 = gameObject2.GetComponent<Button>();
			if (component4 != null)
			{
				component4.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
				component4.onClick.AddListener(OnNotificationTestButtonClicked);
			}
			TextMeshProUGUI componentInChildren2 = gameObject2.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
			if (componentInChildren2 != null)
			{
				componentInChildren2.text = "测试通知";
				componentInChildren2.fontSize = 16f;
			}
			gameObject2.SetActive(value: true);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 测试通知按钮已添加");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 添加测试按钮失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void OnDecomposeTestButtonClicked()
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🔘 测试分解按钮被点击，准备在StrongNotification中显示分解面板...");
			Type type = Type.GetType("Duckov.StrongNotification, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");

				return;
			}
			object value = property.GetValue(null);
			if (value == null)

				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ StrongNotification.Instance为null");

				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ StrongNotification不是MonoBehaviour");
				return;

			if (field == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到contentFadeGroup字段");
				return;
			}
			object value2 = field.GetValue(value);

			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ contentFadeGroup为null");
				return;

			if (monoBehaviour == null)

				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ contentFadeGroup不是MonoBehaviour");
				return;

				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(transform.gameObject);
			}
			Transform transform2 = monoBehaviour.transform.Find("CustomBackground");
			if (transform2 != null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 🧹 清理之前的背景...");
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(transform2.gameObject);
			}
			GameObject obj = new GameObject("CustomBackground");
			obj.transform.SetParent(monoBehaviour.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
			RectTransform rectTransform = obj.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
			rectTransform.anchorMin = new Vector2(0f, 0f);
			rectTransform.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 1f);
			rectTransform.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
			rectTransform.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
			rectTransform.SetAsFirstSibling();
			obj.AddComponent<Image>().color = new Color(0.1f, 0.1f, 0.1f, 0.95f);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 已添加背景到contentFadeGroup");
			Type type2 = Type.GetType("Duckov.UI.ItemDecomposeView, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
			if (type2 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到ItemDecomposeView类型");
				return;
			}
			PropertyInfo property2 = type2.GetProperty("Instance", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
			if (property2 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到ItemDecomposeView.Instance属性");
				return;
			}
			object value3 = property2.GetValue(null);
			if (value3 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ ItemDecomposeView.Instance为null");
				return;

			MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour2 = value3 as MonoBehaviour;

			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ ItemDecomposeView不是MonoBehaviour");
				return;

				return;

				if (transform4 != null && (transform4.name.Contains("Slider") || transform4.name.Contains("Count")))
				{
					transform4 = transform4.parent;
				}
			}
			if (transform4 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到右侧分解面板");
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 找到分解面板: " + transform4.name);
			GameObject obj2 = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(transform4.gameObject);
			obj2.name = "ClonedDecomposePanel";

			{

				component.color = new Color(0f, 0f, 0f, 0f);
			}
			obj2.transform.SetParent(monoBehaviour.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
			RectTransform component2 = obj2.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (component2 != null)
			{
				component2.anchorMin = new Vector2(0f, 0f);
				component2.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 1f);
				component2.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
				component2.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
			}
			obj2.SetActive(value: true);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 分解面板已嵌入到StrongNotification");
			FieldInfo field2 = type.GetField("textMain", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			FieldInfo field3 = type.GetField("textSub", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field2 != null)
			{
				TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = field2.GetValue(value) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				if (textMeshProUGUI != null)
				{
					textMeshProUGUI.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				}
			}
			if (field3 != null)
			{

				if (textMeshProUGUI2 != null)
				{
					textMeshProUGUI2.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				}
			}

			if (field4 != null)
			{
				field4.SetValue(value, 0f);
			}
			MethodInfo method = type.GetMethod("Push", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public, null, new Type[2]
			{
				typeof(string),
				typeof(string)
			}, null);

			{
				method.Invoke(null, new object[2]
				{
					"",
					""
				});
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ StrongNotification已显示，分解面板应该可见");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 在StrongNotification中显示分解面板失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void OnNotificationTestButtonClicked()
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🔘 测试通知按钮被点击，调用StrongNotification.Push...");
			Type type = Type.GetType("Duckov.StrongNotification, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
			if (type == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到StrongNotification类型");
				return;
			}
			PropertyInfo property = type.GetProperty("Instance", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
			if (property == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到StrongNotification.Instance属性");
				return;
			}
			object value = property.GetValue(null);
			if (value == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ StrongNotification.Instance为null");
				return;
			}
			if (value as MonoBehaviour == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ StrongNotification不是MonoBehaviour");
				return;
			}
			FieldInfo field = type.GetField("contentFadeGroup", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field != null)
			{
				MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour = field.GetValue(value) as MonoBehaviour;
				if (monoBehaviour != null)
				{
					Transform transform = monoBehaviour.transform.Find("ClonedDecomposePanel");
					if (transform != null)
					{
						DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 🧹 清理之前的克隆面板...");
						UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(transform.gameObject);
					}
					Transform transform2 = monoBehaviour.transform.Find("CustomBackground");
					if (transform2 != null)
					{
						DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 🧹 清理之前的背景...");
						UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(transform2.gameObject);
					}
				}
			}
			FieldInfo field2 = type.GetField("textMain", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			FieldInfo field3 = type.GetField("textSub", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field2 != null)
			{
				TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = field2.GetValue(value) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				if (textMeshProUGUI != null)
				{
					textMeshProUGUI.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
				}
			}
			if (field3 != null)
			{
				TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI2 = field3.GetValue(value) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				if (textMeshProUGUI2 != null)
				{
					textMeshProUGUI2.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
				}
			}
			FieldInfo field4 = type.GetField("contentDelay", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field4 != null)
			{
				object value2 = field4.GetValue(value);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 📊 原始contentDelay值: {0}", value2));
				field4.SetValue(value, 0f);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 已将contentDelay设置为0（无延迟）");
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 找不到contentDelay字段，将使用默认延迟");
			}
			MethodInfo method = type.GetMethod("Push", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public, null, new Type[2]
			{
				typeof(string),
				typeof(string)
			}, null);
			if (method == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到StrongNotification.Push(string, string)方法");
				return;
			}
			method.Invoke(null, new object[2]
			{
				"测试主标题",
				"这是一个测试副标题，来自Duck Market MOD"
			});
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ StrongNotification.Push调用成功");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 调用StrongNotification.Push失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private string GetGameObjectPath(GameObject obj)
	{
		string path = obj.name;
		Transform transform = obj.transform.parent;
		while (transform != null)
		{
			path = transform.name + "/" + path;
			transform = transform.parent;
		}
		return path;
	}

	private void AnalyzeFormulaRegisterButton()
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🔍 开始分析FormulaRegisterView按钮...");
			GameObject[] array = UnityEngine.Object.FindObjectsOfType<GameObject>(includeInactive: true);
			GameObject gameObject = null;
			GameObject[] array2 = array;
			foreach (GameObject gameObject2 in array2)
			{
				if (gameObject2.name == "FormulaRegisterView")
				{
					gameObject = gameObject2;
					break;
				}
			}
			if (gameObject == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 未找到FormulaRegisterView");
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 找到FormulaRegisterView: " + GetGameObjectPath(gameObject));
			Transform transform = gameObject.transform.Find("Content/BtnContainer_1");
			if (transform == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 未找到BtnContainer_1");
				return;
			}
			Transform transform2 = transform.Find("btn open formula index");
			if (transform2 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 未找到btn open formula index");
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 找到按钮: " + transform2.name);
			Component[] components = transform2.GetComponents<Component>();
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 📊 按钮包含 {0} 个组件：", components.Length));
			Component[] array3 = components;
			foreach (Component component in array3)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]       - " + component.GetType().Name);
				if (component is Image image)
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]         - Color: {0}", image.color));
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]         - Sprite: " + image.sprite?.name);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]         - Type: {0}", image.type));
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]         - RaycastTarget: {0}", image.raycastTarget));
				}
				if (component is Button button)
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]         - Interactable: {0}", button.interactable));
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]         - Transition: {0}", button.transition));
					if (button.transition == Selectable.Transition.ColorTint)
					{
						ColorBlock colors = button.colors;
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]         - NormalColor: {0}", colors.normalColor));
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]         - HighlightedColor: {0}", colors.highlightedColor));
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]         - PressedColor: {0}", colors.pressedColor));
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]         - DisabledColor: {0}", colors.disabledColor));
					}
				}
				if (component is RectTransform rectTransform)
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]         - AnchorMin: {0}", rectTransform.anchorMin));
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]         - AnchorMax: {0}", rectTransform.anchorMax));
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]         - AnchoredPosition: {0}", rectTransform.anchoredPosition));
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]         - SizeDelta: {0}", rectTransform.sizeDelta));
				}
				if (component is LayoutElement layoutElement)
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]         - PreferredWidth: {0}", layoutElement.preferredWidth));
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]         - PreferredHeight: {0}", layoutElement.preferredHeight));
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]         - FlexibleWidth: {0}", layoutElement.flexibleWidth));
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]         - FlexibleHeight: {0}", layoutElement.flexibleHeight));
				}
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 📊 按钮子对象：");
			foreach (Transform item in transform2)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]       - " + item.name);
				TextMeshProUGUI component2 = item.GetComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
				if (component2 != null)
				{
						DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]         - Text: \"" + component2.text + "\"");
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]         - FontSize: {0}", component2.fontSize));
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]         - Color: {0}", component2.color));
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]         - Alignment: {0}", component2.alignment));
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]         - FontStyle: {0}", component2.fontStyle));
				}
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 按钮分析完成");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 分析按钮失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void LogGameObjectHierarchy(Transform parent, int level)
	{
		string indent = new string(' ', level * 2);
		string activeMarker = parent.gameObject.activeSelf ? "✓" : "✗";
		Component[] components = parent.GetComponents<Component>();
		string componentNames = string.Join(", ", components.Select((Component c) => c.GetType().Name));
		DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[Hierarchy] " + indent + "[" + activeMarker + "] " + parent.name + " (" + componentNames + ")");
		RectTransform component = parent.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
		if (component != null)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[Hierarchy] {0}  → Anchors: {1} ~ {2}, Size: {3}", indent, component.anchorMin, component.anchorMax, component.sizeDelta));
		}
		if (level < 5)
		{
			for (int childIndex = 0; childIndex < parent.childCount; childIndex++)
			{
				LogGameObjectHierarchy(parent.GetChild(childIndex), level + 1);
			}
		}
		else if (parent.childCount > 0)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[Hierarchy] {0}  ... ({1} children, depth限制)", indent, parent.childCount));
		}
	}
}


```

using System;
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using System.Reflection;
using System.Text;
using System.Text.RegularExpressions;
using Cysharp.Threading.Tasks;
using DuckMarket;
using DuckMarket.Core;
using DuckMarket.Models;
using DuckMarket.Network;
using DuckMarket.Patches;
using DuckMarket.Services;
using DuckMarket.UI;
using Duckov.BlackMarkets.UI;
using Duckov.Economy;
using Duckov.NoteIndexs;
using Duckov.UI;

namespace FleaMarket.UI;

public partial class DuckMarketView_NoteClone
{
	private void InitializePaginationButtons()
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 📄 初始化分页按钮...");
			Transform transform = _clonedViewRoot.transform.Find("Content");
			if (transform == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ Content为空，无法创建分页按钮");
				return;
			}
			Transform transform2 = transform.Find("LeftLayout");
			if (transform2 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ LeftLayout为空，无法创建分页按钮");
				return;
			}
			_paginationContainer = new GameObject("PaginationContainer");
			_paginationContainer.transform.SetParent(transform2, worldPositionStays: false);
			RectTransform rectTransform = _paginationContainer.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
			rectTransform.anchorMin = new Vector2(0f, 0f);
			rectTransform.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 0f);
			rectTransform.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 0f);
			rectTransform.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(0f, 10f);
			rectTransform.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0f, 40f);
			HorizontalLayoutGroup horizontalLayoutGroup = _paginationContainer.AddComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
			horizontalLayoutGroup.childAlignment = TextAnchor.MiddleCenter;
			horizontalLayoutGroup.spacing = 10f;
			horizontalLayoutGroup.childControlWidth = false;
			horizontalLayoutGroup.childControlHeight = false;
			horizontalLayoutGroup.childForceExpandWidth = false;
			horizontalLayoutGroup.childForceExpandHeight = false;
			Button button = null;
			try
			{
				InventoryView inventoryView = UnityEngine.Object.FindObjectOfType<InventoryView>(includeInactive: true);
				if (inventoryView != null)
				{
					FieldInfo field = inventoryView.GetType().BaseType.GetField("exitButton", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
					if (field != null)
					{
						button = field.GetValue(inventoryView) as Button;
						if (button != null)
						{
							DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 从View获取到exitButton（左箭头按钮）");
						}
					}
				}
			}
			catch (Exception ex)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket]   - ❌ 获取exitButton失败: " + ex.Message);
			}
			_prevPageButton = CreatePaginationButton("PrevPageButton", "", button);
			_prevPageButton.transform.SetParent(_paginationContainer.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
			_prevPageButton.onClick.AddListener(OnPrevPageClicked);
			GameObject gameObject = new GameObject("PageInfo");
			gameObject.transform.SetParent(_paginationContainer.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
			gameObject.AddComponent<RectTransform>().sizeDelta = new Vector2(250f, 40f);
			_pageInfoText = gameObject.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
			_pageInfoText.text = LocalizationStrings.GetPaginationText(1, 0);
			_pageInfoText.fontSize = 18f;
			_pageInfoText.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
			_pageInfoText.color = Color.white;
			TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren = _clonedViewRoot.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
			if (componentsInChildren.Length != 0 && componentsInChildren[0].font != null)
			{
				_pageInfoText.font = componentsInChildren[0].font;
			}
			_nextPageButton = CreatePaginationButton("NextPageButton", "", button, 180f);
			_nextPageButton.transform.SetParent(_paginationContainer.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
			_nextPageButton.onClick.AddListener(OnNextPageClicked);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 分页按钮初始化完成");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 初始化分页按钮失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private Button CreatePaginationButton(string name, string buttonText, Button templateButton, float rotateZ = 0f)
	{
		Button result;
		if (templateButton != null)
		{
			GameObject gameObject = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(templateButton.gameObject);
			gameObject.name = name;
			gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
			Component[] array = (from c in gameObject.GetComponentsInChildren<Component>(includeInactive: true)
				where c.GetType().Name == "TextLocalizor" || c.GetType().Name == "FadeGroup" || c.GetType().Name == "FadeElement" || c.GetType().Name == "TrueShadow"
				select c).ToArray();
			foreach (Component component in array)
			{
				if (component != null && !(component is Transform) && !(component is RectTransform))
				{
					UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(component);
				}
			}
			TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren = gameObject.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(buttonText))
			{
				TextMeshProUGUI[] array2 = componentsInChildren;
				for (int textIndex = 0; textIndex < array2.Length; textIndex++)
				{
					array2[textIndex].gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				}
			}
			else
			{
				TextMeshProUGUI[] array2 = componentsInChildren;
				for (int textIndex = 0; textIndex < array2.Length; textIndex++)
				{
					array2[textIndex].text = buttonText;
				}
			}
			RectTransform component2 = gameObject.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (component2 != null)
			{
				component2.sizeDelta = new Vector2(40f, 40f);
				component2.localScale = new Vector3(0.65f, 0.65f, 1f);
				if (rotateZ != 0f)
				{
					component2.localEulerAngles = new Vector3(0f, 0f, rotateZ);
				}
			}
			gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
			result = gameObject.GetComponent<Button>();
		}
		else
		{
			GameObject gameObject = new GameObject(name);
			gameObject.AddComponent<RectTransform>().sizeDelta = new Vector2(120f, 40f);
			gameObject.AddComponent<Image>().color = new Color(0.3f, 0.3f, 0.3f, 1f);
			result = gameObject.AddComponent<Button>();
			GameObject obj = new GameObject("Text");
			obj.transform.SetParent(gameObject.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
			RectTransform rectTransform = obj.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
			rectTransform.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
			rectTransform.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
			rectTransform.sizeDelta = Vector2.zero;
			TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = obj.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
			textMeshProUGUI.text = buttonText;
			textMeshProUGUI.fontSize = 18f;
			textMeshProUGUI.color = Color.white;
			textMeshProUGUI.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
			TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren2 = _clonedViewRoot.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
			if (componentsInChildren2.Length != 0 && componentsInChildren2[0].font != null)
			{
				textMeshProUGUI.font = componentsInChildren2[0].font;
			}
		}
		return result;
	}

	private void UpdatePaginationButtons()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_pageInfoText != null)
			{
				_pageInfoText.text = LocalizationStrings.GetPaginationText(_currentPage + 1, _totalItems);
			}
			if (!_paginationButtonsTemporarilyDisabled)
			{
				if (_prevPageButton != null)
				{
					_prevPageButton.interactable = _currentPage > 0;
				}
				if (_nextPageButton != null)
				{
					_nextPageButton.interactable = _currentPage < _totalPages - 1;
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 更新分页按钮状态失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private IEnumerator DisableButtonTemporarily(Button button, float duration)
	{
		if (!(button == null))
		{
			button.interactable = false;
			yield return new WaitForSeconds(duration);
			button.interactable = true;
		}
	}

	private IEnumerator DisablePaginationButtonsTemporarily(float duration)
	{
		_paginationButtonsTemporarilyDisabled = true;
		if (_prevPageButton != null)
		{
			_prevPageButton.interactable = false;
		}
		if (_nextPageButton != null)
		{
			_nextPageButton.interactable = false;
		}
		yield return new WaitForSeconds(duration);
		_paginationButtonsTemporarilyDisabled = false;
		UpdatePaginationButtons();
	}

	private void OnPrevPageClicked()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_currentPage > 0 && !_paginationButtonsTemporarilyDisabled)
			{
				StartCoroutine(DisablePaginationButtonsTemporarily(1f));
				_currentPage--;
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ◀ 上一页，当前页: {0}", _currentPage + 1));
				if (_isPurchaseOrderMode)
				{
					LoadPurchaseOrdersAsync().Forget();
				}
				else
				{
					LoadListingsAsync().Forget();
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 上一页失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void OnNextPageClicked()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_currentPage < _totalPages - 1 && !_paginationButtonsTemporarilyDisabled)
			{
				StartCoroutine(DisablePaginationButtonsTemporarily(1f));
				_currentPage++;
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ▶ 下一页，当前页: {0}", _currentPage + 1));
				if (_isPurchaseOrderMode)
				{
					LoadPurchaseOrdersAsync().Forget();
				}
				else
				{
					LoadListingsAsync().Forget();
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 下一页失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void AddFilterButtonsToSearchBar()
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🎨 添加筛选按钮到搜索栏左侧...");
			if (_inspectorFilterDisplay == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ _inspectorFilterDisplay为空，无法复制筛选按钮");
				return;
			}
			if (_searchBar == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ _searchBar为空，无法添加筛选按钮");
				return;
			}
			if (_entriesScrollView == null)
			{
				Transform transform = _fadeGroup.transform.Find("Content/LeftLayout");
				if (transform != null)
				{
					_entriesScrollView = transform.Find("Entries Scroll View")?.gameObject;
					if (_entriesScrollView != null)
					{
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 保存商品列表ScrollView引用");
					}
				}
			}
			Transform transform2 = _searchBar.transform;
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 搜索栏容器: " + transform2.name);
			Transform transform3 = _inspectorFilterDisplay.transform;
			List<Transform> list = new List<Transform>();
			for (int i = 0; i < transform3.childCount; i++)
			{
				if (list.Count >= 2)
				{
					break;
				}
				Transform child = transform3.GetChild(i);
				if (child.gameObject.activeSelf && child.name.Contains("FilterEntry(Clone)"))
				{
					list.Add(child);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 找到源按钮: " + child.name);
				}
			}
			if (list.Count < 2)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 只找到 {0} 个激活的筛选按钮", list.Count));
				return;
			}
			string[] array = new string[2]
			{
				LocalizationStrings.GetMarketFilterLabel(),
				LocalizationStrings.GetPurchaseFilterLabel()
			};
			List<GameObject> list2 = new List<GameObject>();
			for (int j = 0; j < list.Count; j++)
			{
				GameObject gameObject = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(list[j].gameObject, transform2, worldPositionStays: false);
				gameObject.name = "MarketFilterButton_" + array[j];
				list2.Add(gameObject);
				switch (j)
				{
				case 0:
					_marketButton = gameObject;
					break;
				case 1:
					_purchaseButton = gameObject;
					break;
				}
				gameObject.transform.SetSiblingIndex(j);
				gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
				RectTransform component = gameObject.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
				if (component != null)
				{
					component.anchorMin = new Vector2(0f, 0.5f);
					component.anchorMax = new Vector2(0f, 0.5f);
					component.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 0.5f);
					component.anchoredPosition = Vector2.zero;
					component.sizeDelta = new Vector2(100f, 50f);
				}
				LayoutElement layoutElement = gameObject.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
				if (layoutElement == null)
				{
					layoutElement = gameObject.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
				}
				layoutElement.preferredWidth = 100f;
				layoutElement.preferredHeight = 50f;
				layoutElement.minWidth = 120f;
				layoutElement.minHeight = 50f;
				layoutElement.flexibleWidth = 0f;
				layoutElement.flexibleHeight = 0f;
				layoutElement.ignoreLayout = false;
				InventoryFilterDisplayEntry component2 = gameObject.GetComponent<InventoryFilterDisplayEntry>();
				if (component2 != null)
				{
					Type typeFromHandle = typeof(InventoryFilterDisplayEntry);
					FieldInfo field = typeFromHandle.GetField("icon", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
					if (field != null)
					{
						Image image = field.GetValue(component2) as Image;
						if (image != null)
						{
							image.enabled = false;
							DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 禁用icon图标的Image组件");
							GameObject gameObject2 = image.gameObject;
							Transform transform4 = gameObject2.transform.Find("ButtonText");
							if (transform4 == null)
							{
								GameObject obj = new GameObject("ButtonText", typeof(RectTransform));
								obj.transform.SetParent(gameObject2.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
								transform4 = obj.transform;
								DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 创建ButtonText子对象（带RectTransform）");
							}
							TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = transform4.GetComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
							if (textMeshProUGUI == null)
							{
								textMeshProUGUI = transform4.gameObject.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
								DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 添加TextMeshProUGUI组件");
							}
							textMeshProUGUI.text = array[j];
							textMeshProUGUI.fontSize = 24f;
							textMeshProUGUI.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
							textMeshProUGUI.color = Color.white;
							textMeshProUGUI.fontStyle = FontStyles.Bold;
							textMeshProUGUI.enableAutoSizing = false;
							RectTransform component3 = transform4.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
							if (component3 != null)
							{
								component3.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
								component3.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
								component3.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
								component3.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
								component3.sizeDelta = Vector2.zero;
								DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 配置RectTransform填充icon区域");
							}
							transform4.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
							gameObject2.SetActive(value: true);
							DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 在按钮内部添加文字: " + array[j]);
						}
					}
					FieldInfo field2 = typeFromHandle.GetField("nameDisplay", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
					if (field2 != null)
					{
						TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI2 = field2.GetValue(component2) as TextMeshProUGUI;
						if (textMeshProUGUI2 != null)
						{
							textMeshProUGUI2.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
							DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 隐藏tooltip（nameDisplay）");
						}
					}
					component2.enabled = true;
				}
				Transform transform5 = gameObject.transform.Find("ButtonShape");
				if (transform5 != null)
				{
					transform5.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
				}
				CanvasGroup component4 = gameObject.GetComponent<CanvasGroup>();
				if (component4 != null)
				{
					component4.alpha = 1f;
					component4.blocksRaycasts = true;
					component4.interactable = true;
				}
				if (gameObject.GetComponent<Button>() == null)
				{
					gameObject.AddComponent<Button>().transition = Selectable.Transition.None;
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 添加Button组件");
				}
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 创建筛选按钮: " + array[j] + " (80px宽)");
			}
			SetupButtonClickHandlers(list2);
			SetButtonSelected(_marketButton, isSelected: true);
			SetButtonSelected(_purchaseButton, isSelected: false);
			if (_marketButton != null)
			{
				_marketButton.transform.SetSiblingIndex(0);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 市场按钮设置为索引0（最左边）");
			}
			if (_purchaseButton != null)
			{
				_purchaseButton.transform.SetSiblingIndex(1);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 收购按钮设置为索引1");
			}
			Transform transform6 = transform2.Find("SearchBar");
			if (transform6 != null)
			{
				transform6.SetSiblingIndex(2);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 搜索框设置为索引2");
			}
			Transform transform7 = transform2.Find("搜索Button");
			if (transform7 != null)
			{
				transform7.SetSiblingIndex(3);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 搜索按钮设置为索引3");
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 未找到搜索Button");
			}
			Transform transform8 = transform2.Find("刷新Button");
			if (transform8 != null)
			{
				transform8.SetSiblingIndex(4);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 刷新按钮设置为索引4");
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 未找到刷新Button");
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 筛选按钮已添加到搜索栏，顺序：市场 → 收购 → 搜索框 → 搜索 → 刷新 → (余额)");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 添加筛选按钮到搜索栏失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void SetupButtonClickHandlers(List<GameObject> buttons)
	{
		for (int i = 0; i < buttons.Count; i++)
		{
			Button component = buttons[i].GetComponent<Button>();
			if (component != null)
			{
				component.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
				component.interactable = true;
				component.enabled = true;
				int buttonIndex = i;
				component.onClick.AddListener(delegate
				{
					OnMarketFilterButtonClicked(buttonIndex);
				});
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 设置按钮[{0}]({1})的点击事件", i, (i == 0) ? "市场" : "收购"));
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 按钮[{0}]没有Button组件", i));
			}
		}
	}

	private void OnMarketFilterButtonClicked(int buttonIndex)
	{
		DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🔘 筛选按钮点击: {0} ({1})", buttonIndex, (buttonIndex == 0) ? "市场" : "收购"));
		SetButtonSelected(_marketButton, buttonIndex == 0);
		SetButtonSelected(_purchaseButton, buttonIndex == 1);
		switch (buttonIndex)
		{
		case 0:
			ShowMarketListings();
			break;
		case 1:
			ShowPurchaseListings();
			break;
		}
	}

	private void SetButtonSelected(GameObject button, bool isSelected)
	{
		if (button == null)
		{
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			InventoryFilterDisplayEntry component = button.GetComponent<InventoryFilterDisplayEntry>();
			if (!(component != null))
			{
				return;
			}
			FieldInfo field = typeof(InventoryFilterDisplayEntry).GetField("selectedIndicator", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field != null)
			{
				GameObject gameObject = field.GetValue(component) as GameObject;
				if (gameObject != null)
				{
					gameObject.SetActive(isSelected);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 设置按钮选中状态: {0} = {1}", button.name, isSelected));
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 设置按钮选中状态失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void ShowMarketListings()
	{
		DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 📦 切换到：市场商品列表");
		try
		{
			_isPurchaseOrderMode = false;
			if (_entriesScrollView != null)
			{
				_entriesScrollView.SetActive(value: true);
			}
			if (_purchasePlaceholder != null)
			{
				_purchasePlaceholder.SetActive(value: false);
			}
			if (_paginationContainer != null)
			{
				_paginationContainer.SetActive(value: true);
			}
			_currentPage = 0;
			if (_isMyListingsMode)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 🔄 切换到出售tab，加载我的出售挂单");
				LoadListingsAsync().Forget();
			}
			else
			{
				LoadListingsAsync().Forget();
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 正在加载市场商品列表...");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 显示市场列表失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void ShowPurchaseListings()
	{
		DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 📦 切换到：求购订单列表");
		try
		{
			_isPurchaseOrderMode = true;
			if (_entriesScrollView != null)
			{
				_entriesScrollView.SetActive(value: true);
			}
			if (_purchasePlaceholder != null)
			{
				_purchasePlaceholder.SetActive(value: false);
			}
			if (_paginationContainer != null)
			{
				_paginationContainer.SetActive(value: true);
			}
			_currentPage = 0;
			if (_isMyListingsMode)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 🔄 切换到求购tab，加载我的求购挂单");
				LoadPurchaseOrdersAsync().Forget();
			}
			else
			{
				LoadPurchaseOrdersAsync().Forget();
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 正在加载求购订单列表...");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 显示求购订单列表失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void CreatePurchasePlaceholder()
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🎨 创建收购占位符...");
			Transform transform = _fadeGroup.transform.Find("Content/LeftLayout");
			if (transform == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 未找到LeftLayout");
				return;
			}
			_purchasePlaceholder = new GameObject("PurchasePlaceholder", typeof(RectTransform));
			_purchasePlaceholder.transform.SetParent(transform, worldPositionStays: false);
			RectTransform component = _purchasePlaceholder.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			component.anchorMin = new Vector2(0f, 0f);
			component.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 1f);
			component.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
			component.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
			component.sizeDelta = Vector2.zero;
			_purchasePlaceholder.AddComponent<LayoutElement>().flexibleHeight = 1f;
			GameObject obj = new GameObject("Text", typeof(RectTransform));
			obj.transform.SetParent(_purchasePlaceholder.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
			RectTransform component2 = obj.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			component2.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
			component2.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
			component2.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
			component2.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
			TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = obj.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
			textMeshProUGUI.text = LocalizationStrings.GetPurchasePlaceholder();
			textMeshProUGUI.fontSize = 36f;
			textMeshProUGUI.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
			textMeshProUGUI.color = new Color(0.7f, 0.7f, 0.7f);
			textMeshProUGUI.fontStyle = FontStyles.Bold;
			Transform transform2 = transform.Find("Entries Scroll View");
			if (transform2 != null)
			{
				int siblingIndex = transform2.GetSiblingIndex();
