```cs
				_purchasePlaceholder.transform.SetSiblingIndex(siblingIndex);
			}
			_purchasePlaceholder.SetActive(value: false);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 收购占位符创建完成");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 创建收购占位符失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void ApplyFilters()
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 应用筛选: 搜索='{0}', Tags={1}", _currentSearchText, _selectedTags.Count));
			_filteredListings = _listings.Where(delegate(Listing l)
			{
				if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(_currentSearchText) && !l.item_name.ToLower().Contains(_currentSearchText.ToLower()))
				{
					return false;
				}
				if (_selectedTags.Count > 0)
				{
					Item item = CreateItemFromListingAsync(l).GetAwaiter().GetResult();
					if (!(item != null))
					{
						return false;
					}
					bool hasAnySelectedTag = _selectedTags.Any((Tag tag) => item.Tags.Contains(tag));
					UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(item.gameObject);
					if (!hasAnySelectedTag)
					{
						return false;
					}
				}
				return true;
			}).ToList();
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ 筛选完成: {0}/{1} 商品", _filteredListings.Count, _listings.Count));
			RefreshEntriesWithFiltered();
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 应用筛选失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void RefreshEntriesWithFiltered()
	{
		try
		{
			ClearAllEntries();
			if (_filteredListings.Count == 0)
			{
				if (_noEntryIndicator != null)
				{
					_noEntryIndicator.SetActive(value: true);
				}
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - 筛选结果为空");
			}
			else
			{
				if (_noEntryIndicator != null)
				{
					_noEntryIndicator.SetActive(value: false);
				}
				RefreshEntriesAsyncWithFiltered().Forget();
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 刷新筛选结果失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private async UniTaskVoid RefreshEntriesAsyncWithFiltered()
	{
		try
		{
			for (int i = 0; i < _filteredListings.Count; i++)
			{
				Listing listing = _filteredListings[i];
				NoteIndexView_Entry noteIndexView_Entry = _entryPool.Get();
				SetupEntry(noteIndexView_Entry, listing, i + 1);
				_activeEntries.Add(noteIndexView_Entry);
				if ((i + 1) % 3 == 0)
				{
					await UniTask.Yield();
				}
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ 创建了 {0} 个筛选Entry", _activeEntries.Count));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 异步加载筛选Entry失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void OnRefreshButtonClicked()
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🔄 刷新商品按钮被点击");
			if (_searchBar != null)
			{
				StartCoroutine(DisableButtonTemporarily(_searchBar._searchButton, 1f));
				StartCoroutine(DisableButtonTemporarily(_searchBar._refreshButton, 1f));
			}
			if (_myListingsButton != null)
			{
				StartCoroutine(DisableButtonTemporarily(_myListingsButton, 1f));
			}
			_currentPage = 0;
			_currentSearchText = "";
			if (_searchBar != null)
			{
				_searchBar.SetSearchText("");
			}
			_isMyListingsMode = false;
			UpdateMyListingsButtonState();
			_filterItemTypeId = null;
			_filterSortBy = "created_at";
			if (_isPurchaseOrderMode)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🔄 刷新求购订单列表");
				LoadPurchaseOrdersAsync().Forget();
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🔄 刷新商品列表");
				LoadListingsAsync().Forget();
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 刷新商品失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void OnSearchTextChanged(string searchText)
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🔍 搜索文本变化: '" + searchText + "'");
			_currentSearchText = searchText;
			if (_inspectorSearchBar != null && _inspectorSearchBar.SearchText != searchText)
			{
				_inspectorSearchBar.SetSearchText(searchText);
			}
			ApplyFilters();
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 搜索文本变化处理失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void OnSearchButtonClicked()
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🔍 搜索按钮点击，当前搜索文本: '" + _currentSearchText + "'");
			if (_searchBar != null)
			{
				StartCoroutine(DisableButtonTemporarily(_searchBar._searchButton, 1f));
				StartCoroutine(DisableButtonTemporarily(_searchBar._refreshButton, 1f));
			}
			_currentPage = 0;
			if (_isPurchaseOrderMode)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🔍 搜索求购订单");
				LoadPurchaseOrdersAsync().Forget();
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🔍 搜索商品");
				LoadListingsAsync().Forget();
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 搜索按钮点击处理失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void InitializeSearchBar()
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🔍 初始化搜索框...");
			Transform transform = _clonedViewRoot.transform.Find("Content");
			if (transform == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ Content为空，无法创建搜索框");
				return;
			}
			Transform transform2 = transform.Find("LeftLayout");
			if (transform2 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ LeftLayout为空，无法创建搜索框");
				return;
			}
			TextMeshProUGUI templateText = null;
			TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren = _clonedViewRoot.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
			if (componentsInChildren.Length != 0)
			{
				templateText = componentsInChildren[0];
			}
			Button button = null;
			try
			{
				InventoryView inventoryView = UnityEngine.Object.FindObjectOfType<InventoryView>(includeInactive: true);
				if (inventoryView != null)
				{
					FieldInfo field = typeof(InventoryView).GetField("inventoryDisplay", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
					if (field != null)
					{
						InventoryDisplay inventoryDisplay = field.GetValue(inventoryView) as InventoryDisplay;
						if (inventoryDisplay != null)
						{
							FieldInfo field2 = typeof(InventoryDisplay).GetField("sortButton", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
							if (field2 != null)
							{
								button = field2.GetValue(inventoryDisplay) as Button;
								if (button != null)
								{
									DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 找到模板按钮: sortButton");
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			catch (Exception ex)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 获取模板按钮失败: " + ex.Message);
			}
			_searchBar = GameStyleSearchBar.Create(transform2, templateText, button, LocalizationStrings.GetSearchItemNamePlaceholder(), 50f, -60f);
			if (_searchBar != null)
			{
				_searchBar.transform.SetAsFirstSibling();
				LayoutElement layoutElement = _searchBar.gameObject.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
				if (layoutElement == null)
				{
					layoutElement = _searchBar.gameObject.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
				}
				layoutElement.preferredHeight = 50f;
				layoutElement.flexibleWidth = 1f;
				ContentSizeFitter component = _searchBar.gameObject.GetComponent<ContentSizeFitter>();
				if (component != null)
				{
					component.horizontalFit = ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 禁用ContentSizeFitter水平约束，容器宽度填充整个LeftLayout");
				}
				LayoutElement layoutElement2 = layoutElement;
				if (layoutElement2 != null)
				{
					layoutElement2.preferredWidth = -1f;
					layoutElement2.minWidth = -1f;
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 移除Container的preferredWidth/minWidth，使用flexibleWidth填充");
				}
				Transform transform3 = _searchBar.transform.Find("SearchBar");
				if (transform3 != null)
				{
					LayoutElement layoutElement3 = transform3.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
					if (layoutElement3 == null)
					{
						layoutElement3 = transform3.gameObject.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
					}
					layoutElement3.flexibleWidth = 1f;
					layoutElement3.preferredWidth = -1f;
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ SearchBar输入框使用flexibleWidth填充剩余空间");
				}
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 搜索框使用VerticalLayoutGroup布局");
				CanvasGroup canvasGroup = _searchBar.gameObject.GetComponent<CanvasGroup>();
				if (canvasGroup == null)
				{
					canvasGroup = _searchBar.gameObject.AddComponent<CanvasGroup>();
				}
				canvasGroup.alpha = 1f;
				canvasGroup.interactable = true;
				canvasGroup.blocksRaycasts = true;
				_searchBar.OnSearchTextChanged += OnSearchTextChanged;
				_searchBar.OnSearchButtonClicked += OnSearchButtonClicked;
				_searchBar.OnRefreshButtonClicked += OnRefreshButtonClicked;
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 搜索框初始化成功");
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 搜索框位置: {0}", _searchBar.transform.position));
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 搜索框localPosition: {0}", _searchBar.transform.localPosition));
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 搜索框anchoredPosition: {0}", _searchBar.GetComponent<RectTransform>().anchoredPosition));
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 搜索框sizeDelta: {0}", _searchBar.GetComponent<RectTransform>().sizeDelta));
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 搜索框pivot: {0}", _searchBar.GetComponent<RectTransform>().pivot));
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 搜索框父对象: " + _searchBar.transform.parent.name);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 搜索框SiblingIndex: {0}", _searchBar.transform.GetSiblingIndex()));
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - LeftLayout子对象数量: {0}", transform2.childCount));
				VerticalLayoutGroup component2 = transform2.GetComponent<VerticalLayoutGroup>();
				if (component2 != null)
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - LeftLayout有VerticalLayoutGroup:");
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - padding: L={0}, R={1}, T={2}, B={3}", component2.padding.left, component2.padding.right, component2.padding.top, component2.padding.bottom));
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - spacing: {0}", component2.spacing));
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - childControlWidth: {0}", component2.childControlWidth));
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - childControlHeight: {0}", component2.childControlHeight));
				}
				else
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ LeftLayout没有VerticalLayoutGroup！");
				}
				LayoutElement component3 = _searchBar.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
				if (component3 != null)
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - 搜索框有LayoutElement:");
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - preferredHeight: {0}", component3.preferredHeight));
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - flexibleWidth: {0}", component3.flexibleWidth));
				}
				else
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 搜索框没有LayoutElement！");
				}
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - LeftLayout子对象列表:");
				for (int i = 0; i < transform2.childCount; i++)
				{
					Transform child = transform2.GetChild(i);
					RectTransform component4 = child.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     [{0}] {1} - active:{2}, pos:{3}, size:{4}", i, child.name, child.gameObject.activeSelf, component4.anchoredPosition, component4.sizeDelta));
				}
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 搜索框创建失败");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 初始化搜索框失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void InitializeMyListingsButton()
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 📦 初始化'我的商品'按钮...");
			if (_searchBar == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 搜索框为空，无法创建'我的商品'按钮");
				return;
			}
			if (_searchBar._searchButton == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 搜索按钮为空，无法创建'我的商品'按钮");
				return;
			}
			GameObject gameObject = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(_searchBar._searchButton.gameObject, _searchBar.transform);
			gameObject.name = "MyListingsButton";
			gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
			_myListingsButton = gameObject.GetComponent<Button>();
			if (_myListingsButton == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 克隆的'我的商品'按钮没有Button组件");
				return;
			}
			MonoBehaviour[] components = gameObject.GetComponents<MonoBehaviour>();
			foreach (MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour in components)
			{
				if (!(monoBehaviour == null))
				{
					string componentTypeName = monoBehaviour.GetType().Name;
					if (componentTypeName == "ViewsProxy" || componentTypeName == "PointerDownUpEvents" || componentTypeName == "SizeDeltaToggle")
					{
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 删除组件: " + componentTypeName);
						UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(monoBehaviour);
					}
				}
			}
			Component[] array = (from c in gameObject.GetComponentsInChildren<Component>(includeInactive: true)
				where c != null && c.GetType().Name == "TextLocalizor"
				select c).ToArray();
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 🔍 找到 {0} 个TextLocalizor组件", array.Length));
			Component[] array2 = array;
			foreach (Component component in array2)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]     - 删除TextLocalizor: " + component.gameObject.name);
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(component);
			}
			_myListingsButton.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
			_myListingsButton.onClick.AddListener(OnMyListingsButtonClicked);
			TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren = gameObject.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 🔍 按钮包含 {0} 个TextMeshProUGUI组件", componentsInChildren.Length));
			TextMeshProUGUI[] array3 = componentsInChildren;
			foreach (TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI in array3)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]     - 更新前: " + textMeshProUGUI.gameObject.name + " = '" + textMeshProUGUI.text + "'");
				textMeshProUGUI.text = LocalizationStrings.GetMyListingsButtonLabel();
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]     - 更新后: " + textMeshProUGUI.gameObject.name + " = '" + textMeshProUGUI.text + "'");
			}
			RectTransform component2 = gameObject.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (component2 != null)
			{
				component2.sizeDelta = new Vector2(180f, 50f);
			}
			LayoutElement component3 = gameObject.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
			if (component3 != null)
			{
				component3.preferredWidth = 180f;
				component3.flexibleWidth = -1f;
			}
			gameObject.transform.SetAsLastSibling();
			gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
			UpdateMyListingsButtonState();
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ '我的商品'按钮初始化成功");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 初始化'我的商品'按钮失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void OnMyListingsButtonClicked()
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 📦 '我的挂单'按钮点击，当前模式: {0}", _isMyListingsMode));
			_isMyListingsMode = !_isMyListingsMode;
			_filterItemTypeId = null;
			_filterItemName = null;
			UpdateMyListingsButtonState();
			if (_myListingsButton != null)
			{
				StartCoroutine(DisableButtonTemporarily(_myListingsButton, 1f));
			}
			_currentPage = 0;
			if (_isPurchaseOrderMode)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 🔄 重新加载求购挂单，模式: " + (_isMyListingsMode ? "我的挂单" : "所有挂单"));
				LoadPurchaseOrdersAsync().Forget();
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 🔄 重新加载出售挂单，模式: " + (_isMyListingsMode ? "我的挂单" : "所有挂单"));
				LoadListingsAsync().Forget();
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ '我的挂单'按钮点击处理失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void UpdateMyListingsButtonState()
	{
		if (_myListingsButton == null)
		{
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			Image component = _myListingsButton.GetComponent<Image>();
			if (component != null)
			{
				if (_isMyListingsMode)
				{
					component.color = new Color(0.3f, 0.6f, 1f, 1f);
				}
				else
				{
					component.color = Color.white;
				}
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 更新'我的商品'按钮状态: " + (_isMyListingsMode ? "选中" : "未选中"));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 更新'我的商品'按钮状态失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}
}


```

`duckmarket_core/FleaMarket.UI/DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Inspector.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using System.Reflection;
using System.Text;
using System.Text.RegularExpressions;
using Cysharp.Threading.Tasks;
using DuckMarket;
using DuckMarket.Core;
using DuckMarket.Models;
using DuckMarket.Network;
using DuckMarket.Patches;
using DuckMarket.Services;
using DuckMarket.UI;
using Duckov.BlackMarkets.UI;
using Duckov.Economy;
using Duckov.NoteIndexs;
using Duckov.UI;
using Duckov.UI.Animations;
using Duckov.UI.Inventories;
using Duckov.Utilities;
using ItemStatsSystem;
using TMPro;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;
using UnityEngine.EventSystems;
using UnityEngine.UI;

namespace FleaMarket.UI;

public partial class DuckMarketView_NoteClone
{
	private void InitializeInspectorInventoryDisplay()
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🎨 初始化Inspector物品展示区...");
			LootView lootView = UnityEngine.Object.FindObjectOfType<LootView>(includeInactive: true);
			if (lootView == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到LootView，跳过物品展示区初始化");
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 找到LootView: " + lootView.gameObject.name);
			InventoryDisplay componentInChildren = lootView.GetComponentInChildren<InventoryDisplay>(includeInactive: true);
			if (componentInChildren == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到InventoryDisplay组件");
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 找到InventoryDisplay: " + componentInChildren.gameObject.name);
			GameObject gameObject = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(componentInChildren.gameObject);
			gameObject.name = "MarketInventoryDisplay";
			FieldInfo field = typeof(NoteIndexView).GetField("inspector", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field != null)
			{
				Component component = field.GetValue(_originalView) as Component;
				if (component != null)
				{
					Transform transform = component.transform.Find("Scroll View");
					if (transform != null)
					{
						transform.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 禁用Inspector原来的Scroll View");
					}
					Transform transform2 = component.transform.Find("PlaceHolder");
					if (transform2 != null)
					{
						transform2.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 禁用Inspector原来的PlaceHolder");
					}
				}
			}
			Transform transform3 = _clonedViewRoot.transform.Find("Content");
			if (transform3 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到Content");
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(gameObject);
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 找到Content: " + transform3.gameObject.name);
			gameObject.transform.SetParent(transform3, worldPositionStays: false);
			gameObject.transform.SetAsLastSibling();
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 添加到Content下（与FilterDisplay同级）");
			RectTransform component2 = gameObject.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (component2 != null)
			{
				component2.anchorMin = new Vector2(1f, 1f);
				component2.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 1f);
				component2.pivot = new Vector2(1f, 1f);
				component2.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(-8f, -150f);
				component2.sizeDelta = new Vector2(936f, 900f);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 设置InventoryDisplay位置和大小");
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - anchorMin: {0}", component2.anchorMin));
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - anchorMax: {0}", component2.anchorMax));
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - anchoredPosition: {0}", component2.anchoredPosition));
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - sizeDelta: {0}", component2.sizeDelta));
			}
			LayoutElement layoutElement = gameObject.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
			if (layoutElement == null)
			{
				layoutElement = gameObject.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
			}
			layoutElement.ignoreLayout = true;
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 设置InventoryDisplay为绝对定位");
			_inspectorInventoryDisplay = gameObject.GetComponent<InventoryDisplay>();
			MarketInventoryDisplay = _inspectorInventoryDisplay;
			if (_inspectorInventoryDisplay != null)
			{
				_inspectorInventoryDisplay.enabled = false;
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ InventoryDisplay组件已禁用（手动管理）");
				FieldInfo field2 = typeof(InventoryDisplay).GetField("contentLayout", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				if (field2 != null)
				{
					GridLayoutGroup gridLayoutGroup = field2.GetValue(_inspectorInventoryDisplay) as GridLayoutGroup;
					if (gridLayoutGroup != null)
					{
						gridLayoutGroup.constraint = GridLayoutGroup.Constraint.FixedColumnCount;
						gridLayoutGroup.constraintCount = 7;
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 配置GridLayoutGroup：一排7个物品");
					}
				}
			}
			Transform transform4 = gameObject.transform.Find("TitleBar (1)");
			if (transform4 == null)
			{
				transform4 = gameObject.transform.Find("TitleBar");
			}
			if (transform4 != null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 找到TitleBar，遍历子对象禁用按钮");
				RectTransform component3 = transform4.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
				if (component3 != null)
				{
					component3.sizeDelta = new Vector2(component3.sizeDelta.x, 80f);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 增加TitleBar高度到80px");
				}
				LayoutElement component4 = transform4.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
				if (component4 != null)
				{
					component4.preferredHeight = 80f;
					component4.minHeight = 80f;
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 设置TitleBar LayoutElement高度为80px");
				}
				Button button = null;
				foreach (Transform item in transform4)
				{
					Button component5 = item.GetComponent<Button>();
					if (item.name.Contains("Button") || component5 != null)
					{
						if (button == null && component5 != null)
						{
							button = component5;
							DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - 📋 保存按钮作为模板: " + item.name);
						}
						item.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
						DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 禁用TitleBar按钮: " + item.name);
					}
					else
					{
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ⚪ 保留TitleBar子对象: " + item.name);
					}
				}
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到TitleBar");
			}
			PropertyInfo property = typeof(InventoryDisplay).GetProperty("Target");
			if (property != null && property.CanWrite && _inspectorInventoryDisplay != null)
			{
				property.SetValue(_inspectorInventoryDisplay, null);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 清空InventoryDisplay的Target");
			}
			gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ Inspector物品展示区初始化完成");
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - GameObject名称: " + gameObject.name);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 父对象: " + gameObject.transform.parent.name);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 激活状态: {0}", gameObject.activeSelf));
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 层级激活状态: {0}", gameObject.activeInHierarchy));
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - SiblingIndex: {0}", gameObject.transform.GetSiblingIndex()));
			InitializeInspectorPagesControl(lootView.transform);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ⏰ 物品填充将在OnOpen()时执行（等待对象池初始化）");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 初始化Inspector物品展示区失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void InitializeInspectorPagesControl(Transform lootViewTransform)
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🎨 初始化Inspector分页控件...");
			Transform transform = lootViewTransform.Find("Main/LootTarget/Content/PagesControl");
			if (transform == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到原始PagesControl");
				return;
			}
			if (transform.GetComponent<PagesControl>() == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到PagesControl组件");
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 找到原始PagesControl: " + transform.name);
			GameObject gameObject = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(transform.gameObject);
			gameObject.name = "InspectorPagesControl";
			gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
			Transform transform2 = _inspectorInventoryDisplay.transform.parent;
			if (transform2 != null)
			{
				gameObject.transform.SetParent(transform2, worldPositionStays: false);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 设置父对象为: " + transform2.name);
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到父对象，设置父对象为Inspector");
				gameObject.transform.SetParent(_inspector.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
			}
			RectTransform component = gameObject.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (component != null)
			{
				component.anchorMin = new Vector2(1f, 1f);
				component.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 1f);
				component.pivot = new Vector2(1f, 1f);
				component.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(-8f, -1080f);
				component.sizeDelta = new Vector2(920f, 150f);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 配置RectTransform完成（右上角锚点，绝对定位）");
			}
			GridLayoutGroup component2 = gameObject.GetComponent<GridLayoutGroup>();
			if (component2 != null)
			{
				component2.startAxis = GridLayoutGroup.Axis.Horizontal;
				component2.startCorner = GridLayoutGroup.Corner.UpperLeft;
				component2.constraint = GridLayoutGroup.Constraint.Flexible;
				component2.cellSize = new Vector2(60f, 40f);
				component2.spacing = new Vector2(8f, 8f);
				component2.childAlignment = TextAnchor.UpperLeft;
				component2.padding = new RectOffset(10, 10, 10, 10);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 配置GridLayoutGroup：横向排列，从左往右自动换行");
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 📊 GridLayoutGroup配置: cellSize=60x40, spacing=8x8");
			}
			LayoutElement component3 = gameObject.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
			if (component3 != null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 检测到LayoutElement: preferredWidth={0}, minWidth={1}", component3.preferredWidth, component3.minWidth));
				component3.preferredWidth = -1f;
				component3.minWidth = -1f;
				component3.flexibleWidth = -1f;
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 移除LayoutElement的宽度限制");
			}
			ContentSizeFitter component4 = gameObject.GetComponent<ContentSizeFitter>();
			if (component4 != null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 检测到ContentSizeFitter: horizontalFit={0}", component4.horizontalFit));
				component4.horizontalFit = ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 禁用ContentSizeFitter的horizontal约束");
			}
			_inspectorPagesControl = gameObject.GetComponent<PagesControl>();
			if (_inspectorPagesControl != null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 获取PagesControl组件成功");
				FieldInfo field = typeof(PagesControl).GetField("inputIndicators", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				if (field != null)
				{
					GameObject gameObject2 = field.GetValue(_inspectorPagesControl) as GameObject;
					if (gameObject2 != null)
					{
						UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(gameObject2);
						field.SetValue(_inspectorPagesControl, null);
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 销毁inputIndicators（ws快捷键提示）");
					}
				}
			}
			gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ Inspector分页控件初始化完成");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 初始化Inspector分页控件失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void CreateShowOwnedOnlyButton()
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 📦 创建'仅显示拥有的物品'按钮...");
			if (_inspectorSearchBar == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ Inspector搜索框为空，无法创建'仅显示拥有的物品'按钮");
				return;
			}
			if (_searchBar == null || _searchBar._searchButton == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 左侧搜索按钮为空，无法创建'仅显示拥有的物品'按钮");
				return;
			}
			GameObject gameObject = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(_searchBar._searchButton.gameObject, _inspectorSearchBar.transform);
			gameObject.name = "ShowOwnedOnlyButton";
			_showOwnedOnlyButton = gameObject.GetComponent<Button>();
			if (_showOwnedOnlyButton == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 克隆的按钮没有Button组件");
				return;
			}
			MonoBehaviour[] components = gameObject.GetComponents<MonoBehaviour>();
			foreach (MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour in components)
			{
				if (!(monoBehaviour == null))
				{
					string componentTypeName = monoBehaviour.GetType().Name;
					if (componentTypeName == "ViewsProxy" || componentTypeName == "PointerDownUpEvents" || componentTypeName == "SizeDeltaToggle")
					{
						DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - 删除组件: " + componentTypeName);
						UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(monoBehaviour);
					}
				}
			}
			Component[] array = (from c in gameObject.GetComponentsInChildren<Component>(includeInactive: true)
				where c != null && c.GetType().Name == "TextLocalizor"
				select c).ToArray();
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 🔍 找到 {0} 个TextLocalizor组件", array.Length));
			Component[] array2 = array;
			foreach (Component component in array2)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - 删除TextLocalizor: " + component.gameObject.name);
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(component);
			}
			_showOwnedOnlyButton.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
			_showOwnedOnlyButton.onClick.AddListener(OnShowOwnedOnlyButtonClicked);
			TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren = gameObject.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 🔍 按钮包含 {0} 个TextMeshProUGUI组件", componentsInChildren.Length));
			string buttonLabel = LocalizationManager.GetText("market.show_owned_only", "仅拥有");
			TextMeshProUGUI[] array3 = componentsInChildren;
			foreach (TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI in array3)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]     - 更新前: " + textMeshProUGUI.gameObject.name + " = '" + textMeshProUGUI.text + "'");
				textMeshProUGUI.text = buttonLabel;
				textMeshProUGUI.fontSize = 20f;
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - 更新后: {0} = '{1}', fontSize={2}", textMeshProUGUI.gameObject.name, textMeshProUGUI.text, textMeshProUGUI.fontSize));
			}
			RectTransform component2 = gameObject.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (component2 != null)
			{
				component2.sizeDelta = new Vector2(150f, 50f);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 设置按钮RectTransform: sizeDelta={0}", component2.sizeDelta));
			}
			LayoutElement component3 = gameObject.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
			if (component3 != null)
			{
				component3.preferredWidth = 150f;
				component3.minWidth = 150f;
				component3.flexibleWidth = 0f;
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 设置LayoutElement: preferredWidth={0}, minWidth={1}, flexibleWidth={2}", component3.preferredWidth, component3.minWidth, component3.flexibleWidth));
			}
			else
			{
				component3 = gameObject.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
				component3.preferredWidth = 150f;
				component3.minWidth = 150f;
				component3.flexibleWidth = 0f;
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 添加LayoutElement: preferredWidth={0}, minWidth={1}, flexibleWidth={2}", component3.preferredWidth, component3.minWidth, component3.flexibleWidth));
			}
			gameObject.transform.SetAsLastSibling();
			UpdateShowOwnedOnlyButtonState();
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ '仅显示拥有的物品'按钮创建成功");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 创建'仅显示拥有的物品'按钮失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void OnShowOwnedOnlyButtonClicked()
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 📦 '仅显示拥有的物品'按钮点击，当前模式: {0}", _showOwnedOnly));
			_showOwnedOnly = !_showOwnedOnly;
			UpdateShowOwnedOnlyButtonState();
			PopulateGameItems();
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ '仅显示拥有的物品'按钮点击处理失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void UpdateShowOwnedOnlyButtonState()
	{
		if (_showOwnedOnlyButton == null)
		{
			return;
		}
		try
		{
			Image component = _showOwnedOnlyButton.GetComponent<Image>();
			if (component != null)
			{
				if (_showOwnedOnly)
				{
					component.color = new Color(0.3f, 0.6f, 1f, 1f);
				}
				else
				{
					component.color = Color.white;
				}
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 更新'仅显示拥有的物品'按钮状态: " + (_showOwnedOnly ? "选中" : "未选中"));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 更新'仅显示拥有的物品'按钮状态失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void PopulateGameItems()
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🔍 开始填充游戏物品数据...");
			if (_inspectorInventoryDisplay == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ InventoryDisplay为空，无法填充物品");
				return;
			}
			ItemAssetsCollection instance = ItemAssetsCollection.Instance;
			if (instance == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ ItemAssetsCollection.Instance为空");
				return;
			}
			FieldInfo field = typeof(ItemAssetsCollection).GetField("entries", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
			if (field == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到entries字段");
			}
			else if (field.GetValue(instance) is IList { Count: not 0 } list)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 找到 {0} 个游戏原生物品", list.Count));
				FieldInfo field2 = typeof(ItemAssetsCollection).GetField("dynamicDic", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				IDictionary dictionary = null;
				if (field2 != null)
				{
					dictionary = field2.GetValue(null) as IDictionary;
					if (dictionary != null && dictionary.Count > 0)
					{
						DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 找到 {0} 个MOD动态物品", dictionary.Count));
					}
				}
				List<Item> allItems = new List<Item>();
				int nativeItemCount = 0;
				int modItemCount = 0;
				int filteredInvalidItemCount = 0;
				for (int i = 0; i < list.Count; i++)
				{
					object obj = list[i];
					Type type = obj.GetType();
					FieldInfo field3 = type.GetField("typeID", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
					FieldInfo field4 = type.GetField("prefab", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
					if (!(field3 != null) || !(field4 != null))
					{
						continue;
					}
					int typeID = (int)field3.GetValue(obj);
					object value = field4.GetValue(obj);
					if (value != null)
					{
						Type type2 = value.GetType();
						PropertyInfo property = type2.GetProperty("CanBeSold");
						PropertyInfo property2 = type2.GetProperty("Icon");
						if (property != null && property2 != null)
						{
							bool canBeSold = (bool)property.GetValue(value);
							Sprite sprite = property2.GetValue(value) as Sprite;
							if (!canBeSold || sprite == null || sprite.name == "cross")
							{
								filteredInvalidItemCount++;
								continue;
							}
						}
					}
					Item item = ItemAssetsCollection.InstantiateSync(typeID);
					if (item != null)
					{
						item.StackCount = 1;
						allItems.Add(item);
						nativeItemCount++;
					}
				}
				if (dictionary != null && dictionary.Count > 0)
				{
					foreach (DictionaryEntry item4 in dictionary)
					{
						int typeID2 = (int)item4.Key;
						object value2 = item4.Value;
						if (value2 != null)
						{
							FieldInfo field5 = value2.GetType().GetField("prefab", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
							if (field5 != null)
							{
								object value3 = field5.GetValue(value2);
								if (value3 != null)
								{
									Type type3 = value3.GetType();
									PropertyInfo property3 = type3.GetProperty("CanBeSold");
									PropertyInfo property4 = type3.GetProperty("Icon");
									if (property3 != null && property4 != null)
									{
										bool canBeSold = (bool)property3.GetValue(value3);
										Sprite sprite2 = property4.GetValue(value3) as Sprite;
										if (!canBeSold || sprite2 == null || sprite2.name == "cross")
										{
											filteredInvalidItemCount++;
											continue;
										}
									}
								}
							}
						}
						Item item2 = ItemAssetsCollection.InstantiateSync(typeID2);
						if (item2 != null)
						{
							item2.StackCount = 1;
							allItems.Add(item2);
							modItemCount++;
						}
					}
				}
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 成功创建 {0} 个游戏原生物品 + {1} 个MOD物品 = 总计 {2} 个物品", nativeItemCount, modItemCount, allItems.Count));
				if (filteredInvalidItemCount > 0)
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 🚫 已过滤 {0} 个无效商品（不可出售/无效图标）", filteredInvalidItemCount));
				}
				if (_showOwnedOnly)
				{
					List<Item> list2 = new List<Item>();
					Inventory inventory = PlayerStorage.Inventory;
					foreach (Item item3 in allItems)
					{
						if (inventory != null && inventory.Content.Any((Item item4) => item4 != null && item4.TypeID == item3.TypeID))
						{
							list2.Add(item3);
						}
						else
						{
							UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(item3.gameObject);
						}
					}
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 🔍 仅显示拥有的物品: {0}/{1}", list2.Count, allItems.Count));
					allItems = list2;
				}
				GameObject obj2 = new GameObject("MarketInventory");
				obj2.SetActive(value: false);
				Inventory inventory2 = obj2.AddComponent<Inventory>();
				FieldInfo field6 = typeof(Inventory).GetField("defaultCapacity", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				if (field6 != null)
				{
					field6.SetValue(inventory2, allItems.Count);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 设置Inventory.defaultCapacity: {0}", allItems.Count));
				}
				FieldInfo field7 = typeof(Inventory).GetField("content", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				if (field7 != null)
				{
					field7.SetValue(inventory2, allItems);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 直接设置Inventory.content列表: {0}个物品", allItems.Count));
				}
				else
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到content字段");
				}
				obj2.SetActive(value: true);
				FieldInfo field8 = typeof(InventoryDisplay).GetField("usePages", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				if (field8 != null)
				{
					field8.SetValue(_inspectorInventoryDisplay, true);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 启用分页模式");
				}
				FieldInfo field9 = typeof(InventoryDisplay).GetField("itemsEachPage", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				if (field9 != null)
				{
					field9.SetValue(_inspectorInventoryDisplay, 49);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 设置每页显示49个物品（7x7）");
				}
				_inspectorInventoryDisplay.Setup(inventory2);
				PropertyInfo property5 = typeof(InventoryDisplay).GetProperty("Movable");
				if (property5 != null && property5.CanWrite)
				{
					property5.SetValue(_inspectorInventoryDisplay, false);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 设置Movable=false，禁止拖动");
				}
				PropertyInfo property6 = typeof(InventoryDisplay).GetProperty("Editable");
				if (property6 != null && property6.CanWrite)
				{
					property6.SetValue(_inspectorInventoryDisplay, false);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 设置Editable=false，禁止左ALT+点击交换");
				}
				PropertyInfo property7 = typeof(InventoryDisplay).GetProperty("CanDrop");
				if (property7 != null && property7.CanWrite)
				{
					property7.SetValue(_inspectorInventoryDisplay, false);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 设置CanDrop=false，禁止拖放物品");
				}
				PropertyInfo property8 = typeof(InventoryDisplay).GetProperty("CanLockSort");
				if (property8 != null && property8.CanWrite)
				{
					property8.SetValue(_inspectorInventoryDisplay, false);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 设置CanLockSort=false，禁止锁定排序");
				}
				PropertyInfo property9 = typeof(InventoryDisplay).GetProperty("CanSetShortcut");
				if (property9 != null && property9.CanWrite)
				{
					property9.SetValue(_inspectorInventoryDisplay, false);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 设置CanSetShortcut=false，禁止设置快捷键");
				}
				PropertyInfo property10 = typeof(InventoryDisplay).GetProperty("CanSplit");
				if (property10 != null && property10.CanWrite)
				{
					property10.SetValue(_inspectorInventoryDisplay, false);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 设置CanSplit=false，禁止拆分物品");
				}
				PropertyInfo property11 = typeof(InventoryDisplay).GetProperty("CanUse");
				if (property11 != null && property11.CanWrite)
				{
					property11.SetValue(_inspectorInventoryDisplay, false);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 设置CanUse=false，禁止使用物品");
				}
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 调用Setup完成（已禁用所有交互功能）");
				_inspectorInventoryDisplay.enabled = true;
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 重新启用InventoryDisplay组件以显示物品");
				FieldInfo field10 = typeof(InventoryDisplay).GetField("contentFadeGroup", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				if (field10 != null)
				{
					object value4 = field10.GetValue(_inspectorInventoryDisplay);
					if (value4 != null)
					{
						MethodInfo method = value4.GetType().GetMethod("Show", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
						if (method != null)
						{
							method.Invoke(value4, null);
							DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 调用contentFadeGroup.Show()");
						}
						GameObject gameObject = value4.GetType().GetProperty("gameObject")?.GetValue(value4) as GameObject;
						if (gameObject != null)
						{
							gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
							DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ contentFadeGroup GameObject激活: " + gameObject.name);
						}
					}
				}
				FieldInfo field11 = typeof(InventoryDisplay).GetField("loadingIndcator", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				if (field11 != null)
				{
					object value5 = field11.GetValue(_inspectorInventoryDisplay);
					if (value5 != null)
					{
						MethodInfo method2 = value5.GetType().GetMethod("Hide", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
						if (method2 != null)
						{
							method2.Invoke(value5, null);
							DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 调用loadingIndicator.Hide()");
						}
					}
				}
				Transform transform = _inspectorInventoryDisplay.transform.Find("TitleBar (1)");
				if (transform == null)
				{
					transform = _inspectorInventoryDisplay.transform.Find("TitleBar");
				}
				if (transform != null)
				{
					foreach (Transform item5 in transform)
					{
						if (item5.name.Contains("Button") || item5.GetComponent<Button>() != null)
						{
							item5.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
						}
					}
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ Setup后再次禁用TitleBar按钮");
				}
				UniTask.Void(async delegate
				{
					await UniTask.DelayFrame(1);
					Transform transform3 = _inspectorInventoryDisplay.transform.Find("TitleBar (1)");
					if (transform3 == null)
					{
						transform3 = _inspectorInventoryDisplay.transform.Find("TitleBar");
					}
					if (transform3 != null)
					{
						transform3.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
						foreach (Transform item6 in transform3)
						{
							if (item6.name == "ShowOwnedOnlyButton")
							{
								item6.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
								DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 保持ShowOwnedOnlyButton激活");
							}
							else if (!item6.name.Contains("Button") && !(item6.GetComponent<Button>() != null))
							{
								item6.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
								DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 激活TitleBar子对象: " + item6.name);
							}
						}
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 确保TitleBar和子对象可见");
					}
					UpdateInventoryDisplayTitle(allItems.Count);
					LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(_inspectorInventoryDisplay.GetComponent<RectTransform>());
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 强制刷新InventoryDisplay布局");
					if (_inspectorPagesControl != null)
					{
						await UniTask.Delay(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(500.0));
						_inspectorPagesControl.Setup(_inspectorInventoryDisplay);
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 设置分页控件完成（MaxPage: {0}）", _inspectorInventoryDisplay.MaxPage));
						if (_inspectorFilterDisplay != null)
						{
							FieldInfo field12 = typeof(InventoryFilterDisplay).GetField("targetDisplay", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
							if (field12 != null)
							{
								field12.SetValue(_inspectorFilterDisplay, _inspectorInventoryDisplay);
								DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 通过反射设置targetDisplay完成");
							}
							else
							{
								DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到targetDisplay字段");
							}
							FieldInfo field13 = typeof(InventoryFilterDisplay).GetField("entries", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
							if (field13 != null)
							{
								if (field13.GetValue(_inspectorFilterDisplay) is List<InventoryFilterDisplayEntry> { Count: >0 } list3)
								{
									MethodInfo onEntryClickedMethod = typeof(InventoryFilterDisplay).GetMethod("OnEntryClicked", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
									if (onEntryClickedMethod != null)
									{
										Action<InventoryFilterDisplayEntry, PointerEventData> value6 = delegate(InventoryFilterDisplayEntry entry, PointerEventData data)
										{
											onEntryClickedMethod.Invoke(_inspectorFilterDisplay, new object[2] { entry, data });
										};
										FieldInfo field14 = typeof(InventoryFilterDisplayEntry).GetField("onPointerClick", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
										if (field14 != null)
										{
											foreach (InventoryFilterDisplayEntry item7 in list3)
											{
												field14.SetValue(item7, value6);
											}
											DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 重新设置了{0}个筛选按钮的回调", list3.Count));
										}
										else
										{
											DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到onPointerClick字段");
										}
									}
									else
									{
										DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到OnEntryClicked方法");
									}
								}
								else
								{
									DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ FilterDisplay的entries为空或null");
								}
							}
							else
							{
								DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到entries字段");
							}
						}
						else
						{
							DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ FilterDisplay为空，无法设置筛选功能");
						}
						FieldInfo field15 = typeof(PagesControl).GetField("inputIndicators", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
						if (field15 != null)
						{
							GameObject gameObject2 = field15.GetValue(_inspectorPagesControl) as GameObject;
							if (gameObject2 != null)
							{
								UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(gameObject2);
								field15.SetValue(_inspectorPagesControl, null);
								DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ Setup后销毁inputIndicators（ws快捷键提示）");
							}
						}
						RectTransform component = _inspectorPagesControl.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 📊 分页控件状态:");
						DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - GameObject: " + _inspectorPagesControl.gameObject.name);
						DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - Active: {0}", _inspectorPagesControl.gameObject.activeSelf));
						DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ActiveInHierarchy: {0}", _inspectorPagesControl.gameObject.activeInHierarchy));
						StringBuilder stringBuilder = new StringBuilder();
						Transform transform5 = _inspectorPagesControl.transform;
						while (transform5 != null)
						{
							stringBuilder.Insert(0, transform5.name);
							if (transform5.parent != null)
							{
								stringBuilder.Insert(0, "/");
							}
							DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 层级[{0}]: activeSelf={1}, activeInHierarchy={2}", transform5.name, transform5.gameObject.activeSelf, transform5.gameObject.activeInHierarchy));
							transform5 = transform5.parent;
						}
						DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 完整路径: {0}", stringBuilder));
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - SiblingIndex: {0}", _inspectorPagesControl.transform.GetSiblingIndex()));
						if (component != null)
						{
							DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - Position: {0}", component.position));
							DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - AnchoredPosition: {0}", component.anchoredPosition));
							DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - SizeDelta: {0}", component.sizeDelta));
							DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - Rect: {0}", component.rect));
						}
						int childCount = _inspectorPagesControl.transform.childCount;
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 子对象数量（分页按钮）: {0}", childCount));
						for (int childIndex = 0; childIndex < Mathf.Min(childCount, 5); childIndex++)
						{
							Transform child = _inspectorPagesControl.transform.GetChild(childIndex);
							DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     [{0}] {1} - Active: {2}", childIndex, child.name, child.gameObject.activeSelf));
						}
						_inspectorPagesControl.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 强制激活分页控件后: activeInHierarchy={0}", _inspectorPagesControl.gameObject.activeInHierarchy));
					}
				});
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 游戏物品数据填充完成");
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ entries为空或数量为0");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 填充游戏物品数据失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void UpdateInventoryDisplayTitle(int itemCount)
	{
		try
		{
			if (_inspectorInventoryDisplay == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			FieldInfo field = typeof(InventoryDisplay).GetField("displayNameText", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field != null)
			{
				TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = field.GetValue(_inspectorInventoryDisplay) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				if (textMeshProUGUI != null)
				{
					textMeshProUGUI.text = LocalizationStrings.GetItemsLoadedText(itemCount);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 更新displayNameText: " + textMeshProUGUI.text);
				}
			}
			FieldInfo field2 = typeof(InventoryDisplay).GetField("capacityText", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field2 != null)
			{
				TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI2 = field2.GetValue(_inspectorInventoryDisplay) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				if (textMeshProUGUI2 != null)
				{
					textMeshProUGUI2.text = "";
					textMeshProUGUI2.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 隐藏capacityText");
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 更新标题失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void InitializeInspectorInventoryDisplay_Old()
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🎨 初始化Inspector物品展示区...");
			LootView lootView = UnityEngine.Object.FindObjectOfType<LootView>(includeInactive: true);
			if (lootView == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到LootView，跳过物品展示区初始化");
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 找到LootView: " + lootView.gameObject.name);
			Transform transform = lootView.transform.Find("Main");
			if (transform == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到Main");
				return;
			}
			Transform transform2 = transform.Find("LootTarget");
			if (transform2 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到LootTarget");
				return;
			}
			Transform transform3 = transform2.Find("Content");
			if (transform3 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到Content");
				return;
			}
			Transform transform4 = transform3.Find("Scroll View");
			if (transform4 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到Scroll View");
				return;
			}
			Transform transform5 = transform4.Find("Viewport");
			if (transform5 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到Viewport");
				return;
			}
			Transform transform6 = transform5.Find("Content");
			if (transform6 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到Content");
				return;
			}
			InventoryDisplay componentInChildren = transform6.GetComponentInChildren<InventoryDisplay>(includeInactive: true);
			if (componentInChildren == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到InventoryDisplay组件");
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 找到InventoryDisplay: " + componentInChildren.gameObject.name);
			GameObject gameObject = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(componentInChildren.gameObject);
			gameObject.name = "MarketInventoryDisplay";
			FieldInfo field = typeof(NoteIndexView).GetField("inspector", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到NoteIndexView.inspector字段");
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(gameObject);
				return;
			}
			Component component = field.GetValue(_originalView) as Component;
			if (component == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ Inspector为空");
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(gameObject);
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 找到Inspector: " + component.gameObject.name);
			Transform transform7 = component.transform.Find("Scroll View");
			if (transform7 != null)
			{
				transform7.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 禁用Inspector原来的Scroll View");
			}
			Transform transform8 = component.transform.Find("PlaceHolder");
			if (transform8 != null)
			{
				transform8.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 禁用Inspector原来的PlaceHolder");
			}
			FieldInfo field2 = typeof(NoteIndexView).GetField("content", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field2 != null)
			{
				Component component2 = field2.GetValue(_originalView) as Component;
				if (component2 != null)
				{
					gameObject.transform.SetParent(component2.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
					gameObject.transform.SetAsLastSibling();
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 添加到Content下（与FilterDisplay一样）");
				}
				else
				{
					gameObject.transform.SetParent(component.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
					gameObject.transform.SetAsLastSibling();
					DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ Content为空，降级添加到Inspector下");
				}
			}
			else
			{
				gameObject.transform.SetParent(component.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
				gameObject.transform.SetAsLastSibling();
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到content字段，降级添加到Inspector下");
			}
			RectTransform component3 = gameObject.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (component3 != null)
			{
				component3.anchorMin = new Vector2(1f, 1f);
				component3.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 1f);
				component3.pivot = new Vector2(1f, 1f);
				component3.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(-8f, -140f);
				component3.sizeDelta = new Vector2(936f, 834f);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 设置InventoryDisplay位置和大小（右上角锚点）");
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - anchorMin: {0}", component3.anchorMin));
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - anchorMax: {0}", component3.anchorMax));
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - anchoredPosition: {0}", component3.anchoredPosition));
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - sizeDelta: {0}", component3.sizeDelta));
			}
			LayoutElement layoutElement = gameObject.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
			if (layoutElement == null)
			{
				layoutElement = gameObject.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
			}
			layoutElement.ignoreLayout = true;
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 设置InventoryDisplay为绝对定位");
			int childCount = gameObject.transform.childCount;
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - InventoryDisplay原有 {0} 个子对象，准备全部删除", childCount));
			for (int childIndex = childCount - 1; childIndex >= 0; childIndex--)
			{
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(gameObject.transform.GetChild(childIndex).gameObject);
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 已删除所有子对象");
			_inspectorInventoryDisplay = gameObject.GetComponent<InventoryDisplay>();
			if (_inspectorInventoryDisplay != null)
			{
				_inspectorInventoryDisplay.enabled = false;
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 禁用InventoryDisplay组件");
			}
			VerticalLayoutGroup component4 = gameObject.GetComponent<VerticalLayoutGroup>();
			if (component4 != null)
			{
				component4.enabled = false;
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 禁用VerticalLayoutGroup组件");
			}
			CanvasGroup canvasGroup = gameObject.GetComponent<CanvasGroup>();
			if (canvasGroup == null)
			{
				canvasGroup = gameObject.AddComponent<CanvasGroup>();
			}
			canvasGroup.alpha = 1f;
			canvasGroup.interactable = true;
			canvasGroup.blocksRaycasts = true;
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 配置CanvasGroup: alpha=1, interactable=true, blocksRaycasts=true");
			Image image = gameObject.GetComponent<Image>();
			if (image == null)
			{
				image = gameObject.AddComponent<Image>();
			}
			image.color = new Color(1f, 0f, 0f, 0.8f);
			image.raycastTarget = true;
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 添加背景图片: color={0}", image.color));
			PropertyInfo property = typeof(InventoryDisplay).GetProperty("Target");
			if (property != null && property.CanWrite)
			{
				property.SetValue(_inspectorInventoryDisplay, null);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 清空InventoryDisplay的Target");
			}
			gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ Inspector物品展示区初始化完成");
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - GameObject名称: " + gameObject.name);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 父对象: " + gameObject.transform.parent.name);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 激活状态: {0}", gameObject.activeSelf));
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 层级激活状态: {0}", gameObject.activeInHierarchy));
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - SiblingIndex: {0}", gameObject.transform.GetSiblingIndex()));
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 世界坐标: {0}", gameObject.transform.position));
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 锚点位置: {0}", component3.anchoredPosition));
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - Rect大小: {0}", component3.rect.size));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 初始化Inspector物品展示区失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void AddFilterDisplayToInspector()
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🎨 添加筛选按钮组（从LootView克隆）...");
			LootView lootView = UnityEngine.Object.FindObjectOfType<LootView>(includeInactive: true);
			if (lootView == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到LootView，跳过筛选按钮组添加");
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 找到LootView: " + lootView.gameObject.name);
			FieldInfo field = typeof(LootView).GetField("lootTargetFilterDisplay", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到LootView.lootTargetFilterDisplay字段");
				return;
			}
			Component component = field.GetValue(lootView) as Component;
			if (component == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ lootTargetFilterDisplay为空");
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 找到FilterDisplay: " + component.gameObject.name);
			GameObject gameObject = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(component.gameObject);
			gameObject.name = "MarketFilterDisplay";
			GameObject gameObject2 = _fadeGroup?.gameObject;
			if (gameObject2 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ FadeGroup为空");
				return;
			}
			Transform transform = gameObject2.transform.Find("Content");
			if (transform == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到Content/Content");
				return;
			}
			FieldInfo field2 = typeof(NoteIndexView).GetField("inspector", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field2 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到NoteIndexView.inspector字段");
				return;
			}
			Component component2 = field2.GetValue(_originalView) as Component;
			if (component2 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ Inspector为空");
				return;
			}
			RectTransform component3 = component2.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (component3 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ Inspector没有RectTransform");
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 找到Content: " + transform.name);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 找到Inspector: " + component2.gameObject.name);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - Inspector锚点: anchorMin={0}, anchorMax={1}", component3.anchorMin, component3.anchorMax));
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - Inspector位置: offsetMin={0}, offsetMax={1}", component3.offsetMin, component3.offsetMax));
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - Inspector大小: sizeDelta={0}", component3.sizeDelta));
			gameObject.transform.SetParent(transform, worldPositionStays: false);
			gameObject.transform.SetAsLastSibling();
			RectTransform component4 = gameObject.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (component4 != null)
			{
				component4.anchorMin = new Vector2(1f, 1f);
				component4.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 1f);
				component4.pivot = new Vector2(1f, 1f);
				float x = component3.offsetMax.x;
				float y = -10f;
				component4.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(x, y);
				float x2 = component3.sizeDelta.x;
				component4.sizeDelta = new Vector2(x2, 60f);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - FilterDisplay锚点: anchorMin={0}, anchorMax={1}", component4.anchorMin, component4.anchorMax));
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - FilterDisplay位置: anchoredPosition={0}", component4.anchoredPosition));
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - FilterDisplay大小: sizeDelta={0}", component4.sizeDelta));
			}
			HorizontalLayoutGroup component5 = gameObject.GetComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
			if (component5 != null)
			{
				component5.childAlignment = TextAnchor.MiddleLeft;
				component5.childControlWidth = true;
				component5.childControlHeight = true;
				component5.childForceExpandWidth = true;
				component5.childForceExpandHeight = true;
				component5.childScaleWidth = false;
				component5.childScaleHeight = false;
				component5.spacing = 4f;
				component5.padding = new RectOffset(10, 10, 5, 5);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - HorizontalLayoutGroup已配置（自适应宽度）: spacing={0}, alignment={1}", component5.spacing, component5.childAlignment));
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - HorizontalLayoutGroup: childControlWidth={0}, childForceExpandWidth={1}", component5.childControlWidth, component5.childForceExpandWidth));
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - FilterDisplay容器大小: rect.size={0}, rect.width={1}, rect.height={2}", component4.rect.size, component4.rect.width, component4.rect.height));
			gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
			for (int i = 0; i < gameObject.transform.childCount; i++)
			{
				Transform child = gameObject.transform.GetChild(i);
				if (child.name.Contains("FilterEntry"))
				{
					child.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 激活筛选按钮: " + child.name);
				}
			}
			CanvasGroup canvasGroup = gameObject.GetComponent<CanvasGroup>();
			if (canvasGroup == null)
			{
				canvasGroup = gameObject.AddComponent<CanvasGroup>();
			}
			canvasGroup.alpha = 1f;
			canvasGroup.blocksRaycasts = true;
			canvasGroup.interactable = true;
			Image component6 = gameObject.GetComponent<Image>();
			if (component6 != null)
			{
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(component6);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 已移除调试背景");
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ FilterDisplay无背景图片（正常）");
			}
			InventoryFilterDisplay clonedFilterDisplayComponent = gameObject.GetComponent<InventoryFilterDisplay>();
			if (clonedFilterDisplayComponent != null && component != null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 找到InventoryFilterDisplay组件");
				FieldInfo field3 = typeof(InventoryFilterDisplay).GetField("provider", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				PropertyInfo property = typeof(InventoryFilterDisplay).GetProperty("Pool", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				FieldInfo field4 = typeof(InventoryFilterDisplay).GetField("entries", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				typeof(InventoryFilterDisplay).GetMethod("OnEntryClicked", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic, null, new Type[2]
				{
					typeof(InventoryFilterDisplayEntry),
					typeof(PointerEventData)
				}, null);
				if (field3 != null && property != null && field4 != null)
				{
					object obj = field3.GetValue(component);
					if (obj == null)
					{
						DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - provider为空，尝试从场景中查找 InventoryFilterProvider...");
						FieldInfo field5 = typeof(LootView).GetField("lootTargetInventoryDisplay", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
						if (field5 != null)
						{
							InventoryDisplay inventoryDisplay = field5.GetValue(lootView) as InventoryDisplay;
							if (inventoryDisplay != null)
							{
								obj = inventoryDisplay.GetComponentInChildren<InventoryFilterProvider>(includeInactive: true);
								if (obj == null)
								{
									obj = inventoryDisplay.GetComponentInParent<InventoryFilterProvider>();
								}
								if (obj != null)
								{
									DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 从场景中找到InventoryFilterProvider");
								}
							}
						}
						if (obj == null)
						{
							InventoryFilterProvider[] array = UnityEngine.Object.FindObjectsOfType<InventoryFilterProvider>();
							if (array != null && array.Length != 0)
							{
								obj = array[0];
								DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 从场景中找到 {0} 个InventoryFilterProvider，使用第一个", array.Length));
							}
						}
					}
					if (obj != null)
					{
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 获取到原始provider");
						field3.SetValue(clonedFilterDisplayComponent, obj);
						FieldInfo field6 = obj.GetType().GetField("entries");
						if (field6 != null)
						{
							if (field6.GetValue(obj) is Array { Length: >0 } array2)
							{
								DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - provider筛选条目数量: {0}", array2.Length));
								object value = property.GetValue(clonedFilterDisplayComponent);
								IList list = field4.GetValue(clonedFilterDisplayComponent) as IList;
								if (value != null && list != null)
								{
									MethodInfo method = value.GetType().GetMethod("ReleaseAll", Type.EmptyTypes);
									if (method != null)
									{
										method.Invoke(value, null);
									}
									list.Clear();
									Action<InventoryFilterDisplayEntry, PointerEventData> action = delegate(InventoryFilterDisplayEntry clickedEntry, PointerEventData eventData)
									{
										FieldInfo field8 = typeof(InventoryFilterDisplay).GetField("selection", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
										FieldInfo field9 = typeof(InventoryFilterDisplay).GetField("entries", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
										if (field8 != null && field9 != null)
										{
											field8.SetValue(clonedFilterDisplayComponent, clickedEntry);
											if (field9.GetValue(clonedFilterDisplayComponent) is IList list2)
											{
												MethodInfo method5 = typeof(InventoryFilterDisplayEntry).GetMethod("NotifySelectionChanged", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
												if (method5 != null)
												{
													foreach (object item in list2)
													{
														bool isSelectedEntry = ReferenceEquals(item, clickedEntry);
														method5.Invoke(item, new object[1] { isSelectedEntry });
													}
												}
											}
										}
									};
									foreach (object item2 in array2)
									{
										MethodInfo method2 = value.GetType().GetMethod("Get", new Type[1] { typeof(Transform) });
										if (!(method2 != null))
										{
											continue;
										}
										object obj2 = method2.Invoke(value, new object[1]);
										if (obj2 == null)
										{
											continue;
										}
										MethodInfo method3 = obj2.GetType().GetMethod("Setup", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic, null, new Type[2]
										{
											typeof(Action<, >).MakeGenericType(typeof(InventoryFilterDisplayEntry), typeof(PointerEventData)),
											item2.GetType()
										}, null);
										if (!(method3 != null) || action == null)
										{
											continue;
										}
										method3.Invoke(obj2, new object[2] { action, item2 });
										GameObject gameObject3 = (obj2 as Component)?.gameObject;
										if (gameObject3 != null)
										{
											LayoutElement component7 = gameObject3.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
											if (component7 != null)
											{
												component7.preferredWidth = -1f;
												component7.minWidth = -1f;
												component7.flexibleWidth = 1f;
												DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]     - 设置LayoutElement为自适应宽度: flexibleWidth=1");
											}
										}
										list.Add(obj2);
									}
									DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 成功创建 {0} 个筛选按钮", list.Count));
									if (list.Count > 0)
									{
										FieldInfo field7 = typeof(InventoryFilterDisplay).GetField("selection", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
										if (field7 != null)
										{
											InventoryFilterDisplayEntry inventoryFilterDisplayEntry = list[0] as InventoryFilterDisplayEntry;
											if (inventoryFilterDisplayEntry != null)
											{
												field7.SetValue(clonedFilterDisplayComponent, inventoryFilterDisplayEntry);
												MethodInfo method4 = typeof(InventoryFilterDisplayEntry).GetMethod("NotifySelectionChanged", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
												if (method4 != null)
												{
													for (int entryIndex = 0; entryIndex < list.Count; entryIndex++)
													{
														InventoryFilterDisplayEntry inventoryFilterDisplayEntry2 = list[entryIndex] as InventoryFilterDisplayEntry;
														if (inventoryFilterDisplayEntry2 != null)
														{
															method4.Invoke(inventoryFilterDisplayEntry2, new object[1] { entryIndex == 0 });
														}
													}
													DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 默认选中第一个筛选按钮（'全部'）");
												}
											}
										}
									}
									LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(component4);
									DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 强制刷新布局完成");
									for (int previewIndex = 0; previewIndex < list.Count && previewIndex < 3; previewIndex++)
									{
										object obj3 = list[previewIndex];
										if (obj3 == null)
										{
											continue;
										}
										GameObject gameObject4 = (obj3 as Component)?.gameObject;
										if (gameObject4 != null)
										{
											RectTransform component8 = gameObject4.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
											LayoutElement component9 = gameObject4.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
											DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 筛选按钮[{0}]: {1}", previewIndex, gameObject4.name));
											DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - active={0}, parent={1}", gameObject4.activeSelf, gameObject4.transform.parent?.name));
											if (component8 != null)
											{
												DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - RectTransform: anchoredPosition={0}, sizeDelta={1}", component8.anchoredPosition, component8.sizeDelta));
												DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - RectTransform: rect.size={0}", component8.rect.size));
											}
											if (component9 != null)
											{
												DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - LayoutElement: preferredWidth={0}, preferredHeight={1}", component9.preferredWidth, component9.preferredHeight));
												DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - LayoutElement: minWidth={0}, minHeight={1}", component9.minWidth, component9.minHeight));
											}
										}
									}
								}
								else
								{
									DuckMarket.Logger.Warning(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ Pool或entries为空 (pool={0}, entriesList={1})", value != null, list != null));
								}
							}
							else
							{
								DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ provider.entries为空或长度为0");
							}
						}
						else
						{
							DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到provider的entries字段");
						}
					}
					else
					{
						DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 原始provider为空");
					}
				}
				else
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到必要的反射字段");
				}
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 未找到InventoryFilterDisplay组件");
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - FilterDisplay子对象结构:");
			for (int childIndex = 0; childIndex < gameObject.transform.childCount; childIndex++)
			{
				Transform child2 = gameObject.transform.GetChild(childIndex);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]     - 子对象[{0}]: {1}, active={2}", childIndex, child2.name, child2.gameObject.activeSelf));
				for (int grandChildIndex = 0; grandChildIndex < child2.childCount; grandChildIndex++)
				{
					Transform child3 = child2.GetChild(grandChildIndex);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]       - 孙对象[{0}]: {1}, active={2}", grandChildIndex, child3.name, child3.gameObject.activeSelf));
				}
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ===== FilterDisplay 最终状态 =====");
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - FilterDisplay: name={0}, active={1}", gameObject.name, gameObject.activeSelf));
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - Parent: " + gameObject.transform.parent?.name);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - SiblingIndex: {0}", gameObject.transform.GetSiblingIndex()));
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - RectTransform: anchorMin={0}, anchorMax={1}", component4.anchorMin, component4.anchorMax));
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - RectTransform: offsetMin={0}, offsetMax={1}", component4.offsetMin, component4.offsetMax));
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - RectTransform: anchoredPosition={0}, sizeDelta={1}", component4.anchoredPosition, component4.sizeDelta));
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - CanvasGroup: alpha={0}, blocksRaycasts={1}", canvasGroup.alpha, canvasGroup.blocksRaycasts));
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - FilterDisplay层级路径: " + GetGameObjectPath(gameObject));
			_inspectorFilterDisplay = clonedFilterDisplayComponent;
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 保存FilterDisplay引用");
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 成功添加筛选按钮组到Inspector顶部");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 添加筛选按钮组失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void WrapInspectorInScrollView()
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 📜 开始将Inspector右侧内容包装到ScrollView...");
			Transform transform = _clonedViewRoot.transform.Find("Content");
			if (transform == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket]   - ❌ 找不到Content");
				return;
			}
			if (_inspector != null)
			{
				Transform transform2 = _inspector.transform.Find("PlaceHolder");
				if (transform2 != null)
				{
					transform2.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 强制禁用PlaceHolder GameObject");
					FadeGroup component = transform2.GetComponent<FadeGroup>();
					if (component != null)
					{
						try
						{
							FieldInfo field = component.GetType().GetField("manageGameObjectActive", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
							if (field != null)
							{
								field.SetValue(component, true);
							}
							MethodInfo method = component.GetType().GetMethod("SkipHide", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
							if (method != null)
							{
								method.Invoke(component, null);
								DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 调用FadeGroup.SkipHide()");
							}
						}
						catch (Exception ex)
						{
							DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - FadeGroup处理异常（已忽略）: " + ex.Message);
						}
					}
				}
				else
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 未找到Inspector/PlaceHolder，可能路径已改变");
				}
			}
			GameObject gameObject = new GameObject("InspectorScrollView");
			gameObject.transform.SetParent(transform, worldPositionStays: false);
			RectTransform rectTransform = gameObject.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
			float inspectorHeight = 0f;
			if (_inspector != null)
			{
				RectTransform component2 = _inspector.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
				if (component2 != null)
				{
					inspectorHeight = component2.rect.height;
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - Inspector实际高度: {0}px", inspectorHeight));
				}
			}
			if (inspectorHeight <= 0f)
			{
				inspectorHeight = (float)Screen.height - 200f;
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 无法获取Inspector高度，使用屏幕高度: {0}px", inspectorHeight));
			}
			rectTransform.anchorMin = new Vector2(1f, 0f);
			rectTransform.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 1f);
			rectTransform.pivot = new Vector2(1f, 1f);
			rectTransform.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(-8f, 0f);
			rectTransform.sizeDelta = new Vector2(936f, 0f);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ScrollView尺寸: 936x{0} (动态跟随Inspector)", inspectorHeight));
			_inspectorScrollRect = gameObject.AddComponent<ScrollRect>();
			_inspectorScrollRect.horizontal = false;
			_inspectorScrollRect.vertical = true;
			_inspectorScrollRect.movementType = ScrollRect.MovementType.Elastic;
			_inspectorScrollRect.elasticity = 0.1f;
			_inspectorScrollRect.scrollSensitivity = 0.5f;
			_inspectorScrollRect.inertia = true;
			_inspectorScrollRect.decelerationRate = 0.135f;
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 添加ScrollRect组件");
			GameObject gameObject2 = new GameObject("Viewport");
			gameObject2.transform.SetParent(gameObject.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
			RectTransform rectTransform2 = gameObject2.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
```
