```cs
			rectTransform2.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
			rectTransform2.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
			rectTransform2.sizeDelta = Vector2.zero;
			rectTransform2.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 0.5f);
			gameObject2.AddComponent<Image>().color = new Color(1f, 1f, 1f, 0.01f);
			gameObject2.AddComponent<Mask>().showMaskGraphic = false;
			_inspectorScrollRect.viewport = rectTransform2;
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 创建Viewport");
			_inspectorScrollViewContent = new GameObject("ScrollViewContent");
			_inspectorScrollViewContent.transform.SetParent(gameObject2.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
			RectTransform rectTransform3 = _inspectorScrollViewContent.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
			rectTransform3.anchorMin = new Vector2(0f, 1f);
			rectTransform3.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 1f);
			rectTransform3.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1f);
			rectTransform3.anchoredPosition = Vector2.zero;
			_inspectorScrollRect.content = rectTransform3;
			VerticalLayoutGroup verticalLayoutGroup = _inspectorScrollViewContent.AddComponent<VerticalLayoutGroup>();
			verticalLayoutGroup.childAlignment = TextAnchor.UpperCenter;
			verticalLayoutGroup.childControlWidth = true;
			verticalLayoutGroup.childControlHeight = false;
			verticalLayoutGroup.childForceExpandWidth = true;
			verticalLayoutGroup.childForceExpandHeight = false;
			verticalLayoutGroup.spacing = 10f;
			verticalLayoutGroup.padding = new RectOffset(60, 60, 10, 10);
			ContentSizeFitter contentSizeFitter = _inspectorScrollViewContent.AddComponent<ContentSizeFitter>();
			contentSizeFitter.horizontalFit = ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;
			contentSizeFitter.verticalFit = ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 创建ScrollViewContent容器并配置VerticalLayoutGroup");
			if (_inspectorFilterDisplay != null)
			{
				_inspectorFilterDisplay.transform.SetParent(_inspectorScrollViewContent.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
				RectTransform component3 = _inspectorFilterDisplay.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
				if (component3 != null)
				{
					component3.anchorMin = new Vector2(0.5f, 1f);
					component3.anchorMax = new Vector2(0.5f, 1f);
					component3.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1f);
					component3.anchoredPosition = Vector2.zero;
					component3.sizeDelta = new Vector2(816f, component3.sizeDelta.y);
				}
				LayoutElement component4 = _inspectorFilterDisplay.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
				if (component4 != null)
				{
					component4.ignoreLayout = false;
					component4.preferredHeight = 60f;
				}
				else
				{
					component4 = _inspectorFilterDisplay.gameObject.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
					component4.preferredHeight = 60f;
				}
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 移动FilterDisplay到ScrollView（宽度: 816px）");
			}
			if (_inspectorSearchBar != null && _inspectorSearchBar.SearchBarContainer != null)
			{
				_inspectorSearchBar.SearchBarContainer.transform.SetParent(_inspectorScrollViewContent.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
				RectTransform component5 = _inspectorSearchBar.SearchBarContainer.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
				if (component5 != null)
				{
					component5.anchorMin = new Vector2(0.5f, 1f);
					component5.anchorMax = new Vector2(0.5f, 1f);
					component5.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1f);
					component5.anchoredPosition = Vector2.zero;
					component5.sizeDelta = new Vector2(816f, component5.sizeDelta.y);
				}
				LayoutElement component6 = _inspectorSearchBar.SearchBarContainer.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
				if (component6 != null)
				{
					component6.ignoreLayout = false;
					component6.preferredHeight = 50f;
				}
				else
				{
					component6 = _inspectorSearchBar.SearchBarContainer.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
					component6.preferredHeight = 50f;
				}
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 移动InspectorSearchBar到ScrollView（宽度: 816px）");
			}
			if (_inspectorInventoryDisplay != null)
			{
				_inspectorInventoryDisplay.transform.SetParent(_inspectorScrollViewContent.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
				RectTransform component7 = _inspectorInventoryDisplay.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
				if (component7 != null)
				{
					component7.anchorMin = new Vector2(0.5f, 1f);
					component7.anchorMax = new Vector2(0.5f, 1f);
					component7.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1f);
					component7.anchoredPosition = Vector2.zero;
					component7.sizeDelta = new Vector2(816f, component7.sizeDelta.y);
				}
				try
				{
					FieldInfo field2 = typeof(InventoryDisplay).GetField("entriesParent", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
					if (field2 != null)
					{
						Transform transform3 = field2.GetValue(_inspectorInventoryDisplay) as Transform;
						if (transform3 != null)
						{
							RectTransform component8 = transform3.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
							if (component8 != null)
							{
								component8.sizeDelta = new Vector2(816f, component8.sizeDelta.y);
								DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]     - ✅ 调整entriesParent宽度: 816px");
							}
						}
					}
					FieldInfo field3 = typeof(InventoryDisplay).GetField("contentLayout", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
					if (field3 != null)
					{
						GridLayoutGroup gridLayoutGroup = field3.GetValue(_inspectorInventoryDisplay) as GridLayoutGroup;
						if (gridLayoutGroup != null)
						{
							gridLayoutGroup.padding = new RectOffset(10, 10, gridLayoutGroup.padding.top, gridLayoutGroup.padding.bottom);
							DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]     - ✅ 调整GridLayoutGroup padding: 左右各10px");
						}
					}
				}
				catch (Exception ex2)
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]     - ⚠️ 调整InventoryDisplay内部组件失败: " + ex2.Message);
				}
				LayoutElement component9 = _inspectorInventoryDisplay.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
				if (component9 != null)
				{
					component9.ignoreLayout = false;
					component9.preferredHeight = 900f;
				}
				else
				{
					component9 = _inspectorInventoryDisplay.gameObject.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
					component9.preferredHeight = 900f;
				}
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 移动InventoryDisplay到ScrollView（宽度: 816px）");
			}
			GameObject obj = new GameObject("PagesControlSpacer");
			obj.transform.SetParent(_inspectorScrollViewContent.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
			RectTransform rectTransform4 = obj.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
			rectTransform4.anchorMin = new Vector2(0.5f, 1f);
			rectTransform4.anchorMax = new Vector2(0.5f, 1f);
			rectTransform4.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1f);
			rectTransform4.anchoredPosition = Vector2.zero;
			rectTransform4.sizeDelta = new Vector2(816f, 20f);
			LayoutElement layoutElement = obj.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
			layoutElement.preferredHeight = 20f;
			layoutElement.ignoreLayout = false;
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 添加20px Spacer");
			if (_inspectorPagesControl != null)
			{
				_inspectorPagesControl.transform.SetParent(_inspectorScrollViewContent.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
				RectTransform component10 = _inspectorPagesControl.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
				if (component10 != null)
				{
					component10.anchorMin = new Vector2(0.5f, 1f);
					component10.anchorMax = new Vector2(0.5f, 1f);
					component10.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1f);
					component10.anchoredPosition = Vector2.zero;
					component10.sizeDelta = new Vector2(816f, component10.sizeDelta.y);
				}
				LayoutElement component11 = _inspectorPagesControl.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
				if (component11 != null)
				{
					component11.ignoreLayout = false;
					component11.preferredHeight = 150f;
				}
				else
				{
					component11 = _inspectorPagesControl.gameObject.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
					component11.preferredHeight = 150f;
				}
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 移动PagesControl到ScrollView（宽度: 816px）");
			}
			gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ Inspector ScrollView包装完成");
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ScrollView尺寸: {0}", rectTransform.sizeDelta));
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - 滚动模式: Elastic (弹性滚动)");
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - Content左右padding: 60px");
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - 子元素宽度: 816px (936px - 120px padding)");
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - 子元素: FilterDisplay, InspectorSearchBar, InventoryDisplay, Spacer(20px), PagesControl");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 包装Inspector到ScrollView失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void OnInspectorSearchTextChanged(string searchText)
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🔍 Inspector搜索文本变化: '" + searchText + "'");
			if (_inspectorInventoryDisplay != null)
			{
				if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchText))
				{
					_inspectorInventoryDisplay.SetFilter(null);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - 清空搜索，显示所有物品");
					return;
				}
				string lowerSearchText = searchText.ToLower();
				_inspectorInventoryDisplay.SetFilter((Item item) => !(item == null) && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(item.DisplayName) && item.DisplayName.ToLower().Contains(lowerSearchText));
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - 搜索物品: '" + searchText + "'");
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ InventoryDisplay为空，无法搜索");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ Inspector搜索文本变化处理失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void InitializeInspectorSearchBar()
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🔍 初始化Inspector搜索框...");
			Transform transform = _clonedViewRoot.transform.Find("Content");
			if (transform == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ Content为空，无法创建Inspector搜索框");
				return;
			}
			Transform transform2 = transform.Find("Inspector");
			if (transform2 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ Inspector为空，无法创建搜索框");
				return;
			}
			TextMeshProUGUI templateText = null;
			TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren = _clonedViewRoot.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
			if (componentsInChildren.Length != 0)
			{
				templateText = componentsInChildren[0];
			}
			Button button = null;
			try
			{
				InventoryView inventoryView = UnityEngine.Object.FindObjectOfType<InventoryView>(includeInactive: true);
				if (inventoryView != null)
				{
					FieldInfo field = typeof(InventoryView).GetField("inventoryDisplay", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
					if (field != null)
					{
						InventoryDisplay inventoryDisplay = field.GetValue(inventoryView) as InventoryDisplay;
						if (inventoryDisplay != null)
						{
							FieldInfo field2 = typeof(InventoryDisplay).GetField("sortButton", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
							if (field2 != null)
							{
								button = field2.GetValue(inventoryDisplay) as Button;
								if (button != null)
								{
									DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 找到模板按钮: sortButton");
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			catch (Exception ex)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 获取模板按钮失败: " + ex.Message);
			}
			_inspectorSearchBar = GameStyleSearchBar.Create(transform2, templateText, button, LocalizationStrings.GetAdvancedFilterPlaceholder(), 50f, -80f, includeButtons: false);
			if (_inspectorSearchBar != null)
			{
				Image component = transform2.GetComponent<Image>();
				if (component != null)
				{
					component.raycastTarget = false;
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 禁用Inspector背景的raycastTarget，防止拦截点击");
				}
				RectTransform component2 = _inspectorSearchBar.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
				if (component2 != null)
				{
					component2.anchorMin = new Vector2(0f, 1f);
					component2.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 1f);
					component2.pivot = new Vector2(0f, 1f);
					component2.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(10f, -80f);
					component2.offsetMin = new Vector2(10f, component2.offsetMin.y);
					component2.offsetMax = new Vector2(-10f, component2.offsetMax.y);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 调整Inspector搜索框位置");
				}
				ContentSizeFitter component3 = _inspectorSearchBar.GetComponent<ContentSizeFitter>();
				if (component3 != null)
				{
					component3.horizontalFit = ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.Unconstrained;
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 禁用搜索框容器的水平ContentSizeFitter");
				}
				HorizontalLayoutGroup component4 = _inspectorSearchBar.GetComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
				if (component4 != null)
				{
					component4.childControlWidth = true;
					component4.childForceExpandWidth = false;
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 配置搜索框容器的HorizontalLayoutGroup: childControlWidth=true, childForceExpandWidth=false");
				}
				_inspectorSearchBar.transform.SetAsLastSibling();
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 搜索框SiblingIndex设为最后: {0}", _inspectorSearchBar.transform.GetSiblingIndex()));
				LayoutElement layoutElement = _inspectorSearchBar.gameObject.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
				if (layoutElement == null)
				{
					layoutElement = _inspectorSearchBar.gameObject.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
				}
				layoutElement.ignoreLayout = true;
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 设置Inspector搜索框为绝对定位");
				CanvasGroup canvasGroup = _inspectorSearchBar.gameObject.GetComponent<CanvasGroup>();
				if (canvasGroup == null)
				{
					canvasGroup = _inspectorSearchBar.gameObject.AddComponent<CanvasGroup>();
				}
				canvasGroup.alpha = 1f;
				canvasGroup.interactable = true;
				canvasGroup.blocksRaycasts = true;
				_inspectorSearchBar.gameObject.layer = transform2.gameObject.layer;
				Transform transform3 = _inspectorSearchBar.transform.Find("SearchBar");
				if (transform3 != null)
				{
					RectTransform component5 = transform3.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
					if (component5 != null)
					{
						component5.anchorMin = new Vector2(0f, 0.5f);
						component5.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
						component5.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 0.5f);
						component5.anchoredPosition = Vector2.zero;
						component5.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0f, 50f);
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 调整输入框为横向拉伸模式");
					}
					LayoutElement component6 = transform3.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
					if (component6 != null)
					{
						component6.preferredWidth = -1f;
						component6.flexibleWidth = 1f;
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 移除输入框宽度限制");
					}
					Image component7 = transform3.GetComponent<Image>();
					if (component7 != null)
					{
						component7.raycastTarget = true;
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 启用输入框raycastTarget");
					}
					TMP_InputField component8 = transform3.GetComponent<TMP_InputField>();
					if (component8 != null)
					{
						component8.interactable = true;
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 确认InputField可交互");
					}
				}
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 搜索框交互配置完成");
				_inspectorSearchBar.OnSearchTextChanged += OnInspectorSearchTextChanged;
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ Inspector搜索框初始化成功");
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 搜索框位置: {0}", _inspectorSearchBar.transform.position));
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - 搜索框父对象: " + _inspectorSearchBar.transform.parent.name);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 搜索框SiblingIndex: {0}", _inspectorSearchBar.transform.GetSiblingIndex()));
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ Inspector搜索框创建失败");
			}
			CreateShowOwnedOnlyButton();
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 初始化Inspector搜索框失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}
}


```

`duckmarket_core/FleaMarket.UI/DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Listings.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using System.Reflection;
using System.Text;
using System.Text.RegularExpressions;
using Cysharp.Threading.Tasks;
using DuckMarket;
using DuckMarket.Core;
using DuckMarket.Models;
using DuckMarket.Network;
using DuckMarket.Patches;
using DuckMarket.Services;
using DuckMarket.UI;
using Duckov.BlackMarkets.UI;
using Duckov.Economy;
using Duckov.NoteIndexs;
using Duckov.UI;
using Duckov.UI.Animations;
using Duckov.UI.Inventories;
using Duckov.Utilities;
using ItemStatsSystem;
using TMPro;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;
using UnityEngine.EventSystems;
using UnityEngine.UI;

namespace FleaMarket.UI;

public partial class DuckMarketView_NoteClone
{
	private async UniTaskVoid LoadListingsAsync()
	{
		try
		{
			int skip = _currentPage * 10;
			string searchQuery = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_currentSearchText) ? null : _currentSearchText;
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 📝 加载listings数据... (page: {0}, search: '{1}', myListingsOnly: {2}, filterTypeId: {3}, sortBy: {4})", _currentPage, searchQuery, _isMyListingsMode, _filterItemTypeId, _filterSortBy));
			var (list, totalCount) = await ApiClient.GetListingsAsync(searchQuery, _filterItemTypeId, _filterSortBy, _isMyListingsMode, skip);
			if (list != null)
			{
				_listings = list;
				_totalItems = totalCount;
				_totalPages = (int)Math.Ceiling((double)totalCount / 10.0);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ 加载了 {0} 个商品 (总共: {1}, 页码: {2}/{3})", _listings.Count, totalCount, _currentPage + 1, _totalPages));
				UpdatePaginationButtons();
				RefreshEntries();
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 加载listings失败");
				_listings.Clear();
				_totalItems = 0;
				_totalPages = 0;
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 加载listings异常: {0}", arg));
			_listings.Clear();
			_totalItems = 0;
			_totalPages = 0;
		}
		finally
		{
		}
	}

	public Listing GetListingForEntry(NoteIndexView_Entry entry)
	{
		if (!_entryListings.TryGetValue(entry, out Listing value))
		{
			return null;
		}
		return value;
	}

	public void SetItemTypeFilter(int? itemTypeId, string itemName = null)
	{
		_filterItemTypeId = itemTypeId;
		_filterItemName = itemName;
		_currentPage = 0;
	}

	public void UpdateListings(List<Listing> newListings, int total, int? itemTypeId = null, string sortBy = "created_at", string itemName = null)
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] UpdateListings: {0} listings (当前页), total={1}, itemTypeId={2}, sortBy={3}, itemName={4}", newListings.Count, total, itemTypeId, sortBy, itemName));
			_filterItemTypeId = itemTypeId;
			_filterItemName = itemName;
			_filterSortBy = sortBy;
			_listings.Clear();
			_listings.AddRange(newListings);
			_totalItems = total;
			_totalPages = (int)Math.Ceiling((double)total / 10.0);
			_currentPage = 0;
			UpdatePaginationButtons();
			RefreshEntries();
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ Listings已更新 (总共: {0}, 页码: {1}/{2})", total, _currentPage + 1, _totalPages));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ UpdateListings失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void UpdateNoEntryIndicatorText(string itemName = null)
	{
		try
		{
			if (_noEntryIndicator != null)
			{
				TextMeshProUGUI componentInChildren = _noEntryIndicator.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
				if (componentInChildren != null)
				{
					string noEntryText = GetNoEntryIndicatorMessage(itemName);
					componentInChildren.text = noEntryText;
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 更新空提示文本: " + noEntryText);
				}
				else
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ NoEntryIndicator没有TextMeshProUGUI组件");
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ UpdateNoEntryIndicatorText失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private string GetNoEntryIndicatorMessage(string itemName)
	{
		if (_isPurchaseOrderMode)
		{
			if (_isMyListingsMode)
			{
				return LocalizationManager.GetText("market.no_my_purchase_orders", "No purchase orders");
			}
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(itemName))
			{
				return LocalizationManager.GetText("market.no_purchase_orders", "No purchase orders available");
			}
			return LocalizationManager.GetTextFormatted("market.purchase_order_not_found", "No purchase orders for {0}", itemName);
		}
		if (_isMyListingsMode)
		{
			return LocalizationManager.GetText("market.no_my_sell_listings", "No sell listings");
		}
		if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(itemName))
		{
			return LocalizationManager.GetText("market.no_listings", "No listings available");
		}
		return LocalizationManager.GetTextFormatted("market.item_not_found", "No listings found for {0}", itemName);
	}

	private void RefreshEntries()
	{
		try
		{
			ClearAllEntries();
			_modItemEntries.Clear();
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 已清空MOD商品标记");
			_filteredListings = new List<Listing>(_listings);
			if (_listings.Count == 0)
			{
				if (_noEntryIndicator != null)
				{
					_noEntryIndicator.SetActive(value: true);
					if (_filterItemTypeId.HasValue && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(_filterItemName))
					{
						UpdateNoEntryIndicatorText(_filterItemName);
					}
				}
			}
			else
			{
				if (_noEntryIndicator != null)
				{
					_noEntryIndicator.SetActive(value: false);
				}
				RefreshEntriesAsync().Forget();
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ RefreshEntries失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private async UniTaskVoid RefreshEntriesAsync()
	{
		try
		{
			for (int i = 0; i < _listings.Count; i++)
			{
				Listing listing = _listings[i];
				NoteIndexView_Entry noteIndexView_Entry = _entryPool.Get();
				SetupEntry(noteIndexView_Entry, listing, i + 1);
				_activeEntries.Add(noteIndexView_Entry);
				if ((i + 1) % 3 == 0)
				{
					await UniTask.Yield();
				}
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ 创建了 {0} 个Entry", _activeEntries.Count));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ RefreshEntriesAsync失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void SetupEntry(NoteIndexView_Entry entry, Listing listing, int index)
	{
		try
		{
			_entryListings[entry] = listing;
			Type typeFromHandle = typeof(NoteIndexView_Entry);
			BindingFlags bindingAttr = BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic;
			string itemDisplayName = GetItemDisplayName(listing.item_type_id, listing.item_name);
			FieldInfo field = typeFromHandle.GetField("titleText", bindingAttr);
			if (field != null)
			{
				TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = field.GetValue(entry) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				if (textMeshProUGUI != null)
				{
					textMeshProUGUI.text = itemDisplayName;
					int length = itemDisplayName.Length;
					if (length <= 10)
					{
						textMeshProUGUI.fontSize = 32f;
					}
					else if (length <= 15)
					{
						textMeshProUGUI.fontSize = 28f;
					}
					else if (length <= 20)
					{
						textMeshProUGUI.fontSize = 24f;
					}
					else
					{
						textMeshProUGUI.fontSize = 20f;
					}
					textMeshProUGUI.enableWordWrapping = false;
					textMeshProUGUI.overflowMode = TextOverflowModes.Ellipsis;
				}
			}
			FieldInfo field2 = typeFromHandle.GetField("indexText", bindingAttr);
			if (field2 != null)
			{
				TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI2 = field2.GetValue(entry) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				if (textMeshProUGUI2 != null)
				{
					textMeshProUGUI2.text = "";
					textMeshProUGUI2.enabled = false;
				}
			}
			FieldInfo field3 = typeFromHandle.GetField("highlightIndicator", bindingAttr);
			if (field3 != null)
			{
				GameObject gameObject = field3.GetValue(entry) as GameObject;
				if (gameObject != null)
				{
					gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				}
			}
			FieldInfo field4 = typeFromHandle.GetField("notReadIndicator", bindingAttr);
			if (field4 != null)
			{
				GameObject gameObject2 = field4.GetValue(entry) as GameObject;
				if (gameObject2 != null)
				{
					gameObject2.SetActive(value: false);
				}
			}
			Note value = new Note
			{
				key = string.Format("listing_{0}", listing.id)
			};
			FieldInfo field5 = typeFromHandle.GetField("note", bindingAttr);
			if (field5 != null)
			{
				field5.SetValue(entry, value);
			}
			FieldInfo field6 = typeFromHandle.GetField("onClicked", bindingAttr);
			if (field6 != null)
			{
				field6.SetValue(entry, new Action<NoteIndexView_Entry>(OnEntryClicked));
			}
			if (entry.gameObject != null)
			{
				entry.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
				Graphic[] componentsInChildren = entry.GetComponentsInChildren<Graphic>();
				for (int i = 0; i < componentsInChildren.Length; i++)
				{
					componentsInChildren[i].raycastTarget = true;
				}
			}
			AdjustEntryHeight(entry);
			RectTransform component = entry.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			float offsetX = Mathf.Clamp(((component != null) ? component.rect.height : 160f) - 40f, 80f, 120f) + 32f;
			AdjustEntryTextPosition(entry, offsetX);
			AddItemDisplayToEntryAsync(entry, listing, index).Forget();
			AddMoneyDisplayToEntry(entry, listing);
			AddExpirationTimeToEntry(entry, listing);
			AddSellerNameToEntry(entry, listing);
			AddDealButtonToEntry(entry, listing);
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ SetupEntry失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void AdjustEntryHeight(NoteIndexView_Entry entry)
	{
		try
		{
			RectTransform component = entry.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (component == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			if (_entryOriginalHeights.ContainsKey(entry))
			{
				float y = _entryOriginalHeights[entry] * 2f;
				component.sizeDelta = new Vector2(component.sizeDelta.x, y);
				return;
			}
			float originalHeight = component.sizeDelta.y;
			if (originalHeight <= 0f)
			{
				originalHeight = 80f;
			}
			_entryOriginalHeights[entry] = originalHeight;
			float y2 = originalHeight * 2f;
			component.sizeDelta = new Vector2(component.sizeDelta.x, y2);
			LayoutElement component2 = entry.GetComponent<LayoutElement>();
			if (component2 != null && component2.preferredHeight > 0f)
			{
				float preferredHeight = component2.preferredHeight;
				component2.preferredHeight = preferredHeight * 2f;
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ AdjustEntryHeight失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void AdjustEntryTextPosition(NoteIndexView_Entry entry, float offsetX)
	{
		try
		{
			Type typeFromHandle = typeof(NoteIndexView_Entry);
			BindingFlags bindingAttr = BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic;
			FieldInfo field = typeFromHandle.GetField("titleText", bindingAttr);
			if (field != null)
			{
				TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = field.GetValue(entry) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				if (textMeshProUGUI != null)
				{
					RectTransform component = textMeshProUGUI.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
					if (component != null)
					{

						component.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(130f, 10f);
					}
				}
			}
			FieldInfo field2 = typeFromHandle.GetField("indexText", bindingAttr);
			if (!(field2 != null))
			{
				return;
			}
			TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI2 = field2.GetValue(entry) as TextMeshProUGUI;
			if (textMeshProUGUI2 != null)
			{
				RectTransform component2 = textMeshProUGUI2.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
				if (component2 != null)
				{
					component2.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(offsetX, component2.anchoredPosition.y);
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ AdjustEntryTextPosition失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private async UniTaskVoid AddItemDisplayToEntryAsync(NoteIndexView_Entry entry, Listing listing, int index)
	{

		try
		{
			if (_itemDisplayPool == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ ItemDisplay对象池未初始化，跳过物品格子显示");
				return;
			}
			ItemDisplay itemDisplay = _itemDisplayPool.Get(entry.transform);
			if (itemDisplay == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 无法从对象池获取ItemDisplay");
				return;
			}
			_entryItemDisplays[entry] = itemDisplay;
			RectTransform component = itemDisplay.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (component != null)
			{
				component.anchorMin = new Vector2(0f, 0.5f);
				component.anchorMax = new Vector2(0f, 0.5f);
				component.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 0.5f);
				RectTransform component2 = entry.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
				float iconSize = Mathf.Clamp(((component2 != null) ? component2.rect.height : 160f) - 50f, 70f, 100f);
				component.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(iconSize / 2f + 16f, 0f);
				component.sizeDelta = new Vector2(iconSize, iconSize);
			}
			Item item = await CreateItemFromListingAsync(listing);
			if (item == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 无法创建Item (item_type_id={0}), 标记为MOD商品，使用占位图标 (ID:174)", listing.item_type_id));
				_modItemEntries.Add(entry);
				try
				{
					item = await ItemAssetsCollection.InstantiateAsync(174);
					if (item == null)
					{
						DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 无法创建占位物品 (ID:174)");
						return;
					}
					try
					{
						MethodInfo method = typeof(Item).GetMethod("SetInt", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public, null, new Type[3]
						{
							typeof(string),
							typeof(int),
							typeof(bool)
						}, null);
						if (method != null)
						{
							method.Invoke(item, new object[3]
							{
								"Count",
								listing.quantity,
								true
							});
							DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ 使用占位物品 (ID:174) 显示，通过反射设置数量: {0}", listing.quantity));
						}
						else
						{
							DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 未找到SetInt方法，无法设置占位物品数量");
						}
					}
					catch (Exception ex)
					{
						DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 设置占位物品数量失败: " + ex.Message);
					}
				}
				catch (Exception arg)
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 创建占位物品失败: {0}", arg));
					return;
				}
			}
			PreDisableItemDisplayName(itemDisplay);
			itemDisplay.Setup(item);
			HideItemDisplayNameText(itemDisplay);
			ForceShowItemDisplayQuantity(itemDisplay, listing.quantity);
			itemDisplay.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
		}
		catch (Exception arg2)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ AddItemDisplayToEntry失败: {0}", arg2));
		}
	}

	private void PreDisableItemDisplayName(ItemDisplay itemDisplay)
	{
		try
		{
			if (itemDisplay == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			Type typeFromHandle = typeof(ItemDisplay);
			BindingFlags bindingAttr = BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic;
			FieldInfo field = typeFromHandle.GetField("nameText", bindingAttr);
			if (field != null)
			{
				TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = field.GetValue(itemDisplay) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				if (textMeshProUGUI != null)
				{
					textMeshProUGUI.enabled = false;
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ PreDisableItemDisplayName失败: " + ex.Message);
		}
	}

	private void HideItemDisplayNameText(ItemDisplay itemDisplay)
	{
		try
		{
			if (itemDisplay == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			Type typeFromHandle = typeof(ItemDisplay);
			BindingFlags bindingAttr = BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic;
			FieldInfo field = typeFromHandle.GetField("nameContainer", bindingAttr);
			if (field != null)
			{
				GameObject gameObject = field.GetValue(itemDisplay) as GameObject;
				if (gameObject != null)
				{
					gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				}
				return;
			}
			TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren = itemDisplay.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
			foreach (TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI in componentsInChildren)
			{
				if (textMeshProUGUI.gameObject.name.Contains("Name") || textMeshProUGUI.gameObject.name.Contains("name") || textMeshProUGUI.gameObject.name.Contains("Title") || textMeshProUGUI.gameObject.name.Contains("title"))
				{
					textMeshProUGUI.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ HideItemDisplayNameText失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void ForceShowItemDisplayQuantity(ItemDisplay itemDisplay, int quantity)
	{
		try
		{
			if (itemDisplay == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			Type typeFromHandle = typeof(ItemDisplay);
			BindingFlags bindingAttr = BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic;
			FieldInfo field = typeFromHandle.GetField("countGameObject", bindingAttr);
			GameObject gameObject = null;
			if (field != null)
			{
				gameObject = field.GetValue(itemDisplay) as GameObject;
				if (gameObject != null)
				{
					gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
					RectTransform component = gameObject.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
					if (component != null)
					{
						Vector2 sizeDelta = component.sizeDelta;
						component.sizeDelta = new Vector2(Mathf.Max(sizeDelta.x * 1.5f, 45f), Mathf.Max(sizeDelta.y * 1.5f, 30f));
					}
				}
			}
			FieldInfo field2 = typeFromHandle.GetField("countText", bindingAttr);
			if (field2 != null)
			{
				TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = field2.GetValue(itemDisplay) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				if (textMeshProUGUI != null)
				{

					textMeshProUGUI.text = quantity.ToString();
					textMeshProUGUI.color = new Color(1f, 1f, 1f, 1f);
					textMeshProUGUI.fontSize = 24f;
					textMeshProUGUI.fontStyle = FontStyles.Bold;
					textMeshProUGUI.enableAutoSizing = false;
					RectTransform component2 = textMeshProUGUI.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
					if (component2 != null)
					{
						Vector2 sizeDelta2 = component2.sizeDelta;
						component2.sizeDelta = new Vector2(Mathf.Max(sizeDelta2.x * 1.5f, 45f), Mathf.Max(sizeDelta2.y * 1.5f, 30f));
					}
					textMeshProUGUI.ForceMeshUpdate(ignoreActiveState: true, forceTextReparsing: true);
				}
				else
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ countText为null");
				}
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 找不到countText字段");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ ForceShowItemDisplayQuantity失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private string GetItemDisplayName(int itemTypeId, string fallbackName)
	{
		try
		{
			ItemMetaData metaData = ItemAssetsCollection.GetMetaData(itemTypeId);
			if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(metaData.DisplayName))
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 📦 使用游戏内物品名字: " + metaData.DisplayName);
				return metaData.DisplayName;
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Warning(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 获取游戏内物品名字失败 (ID={0}): {1}", itemTypeId, ex.Message));
		}
		string fallbackDisplayName = fallbackName ?? "未知物品";
		DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 📦 使用接口物品名字: " + fallbackDisplayName);
		return fallbackDisplayName;
	}

	private async UniTask<Item> CreateItemFromListingAsync(Listing listing)
	{
		try
		{
			Item item = await ItemAssetsCollection.InstantiateAsync(listing.item_type_id);
			if (item == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ Failed to create item for item_type_id={0}", listing.item_type_id));
				return null;
			}
			try
			{
				MethodInfo method = typeof(Item).GetMethod("SetInt", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public, null, new Type[3]
				{
					typeof(string),
					typeof(int),
					typeof(bool)
				}, null);
				if (method != null)
				{
					method.Invoke(item, new object[3]
					{
						"Count",
						listing.quantity,
						true
					});
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ 使用SetInt绕过限制，设置数量为 {0}", listing.quantity));
				}
				else
				{
					item.StackCount = listing.quantity;
					DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 未找到SetInt方法，使用StackCount setter（可能被限制）");
				}
			}
			catch (Exception ex)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 无法设置物品数量为 {0}: {1}", listing.quantity, ex.Message));
			}
			if (listing.durability.HasValue)
			{
				item.Durability = listing.durability.Value;
			}
			if (item.UseDurability && listing.durability_loss.HasValue)
			{
				item.DurabilityLoss = listing.durability_loss.Value;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ 创建Item: {0} x{1}, durability={2}", item.DisplayName, item.StackCount, item.Durability));
			return item;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ CreateItemFromListingAsync失败: {0}", arg));
			return null;
		}
	}

	private void OnEntryClicked(NoteIndexView_Entry entry)
	{
		try
		{
			string entryKey = typeof(NoteIndexView_Entry).GetProperty("key")?.GetValue(entry) as string;
			int listingId = -1;
			if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(entryKey) && entryKey.StartsWith("listing_"))
			{
				int.TryParse(entryKey.Substring(8), out listingId);
			}
			Listing listing = _listings.FirstOrDefault((Listing l) => l.id == listingId);
			string listingSummary = (listing != null) ? string.Format("{0} x{1} @ {2:N0}", listing.item_name, listing.quantity, listing.price) : "未知";
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🖱️ Entry被点击: {0} (ID: {1})", listingSummary, listingId));
			UpdateAllEntriesHighlight(entry);
			if (listing != null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 📄 商品详情: {0} x{1}, 单价={2:N0}, 卖家={3}", listing.item_name, listing.quantity, listing.price, listing.seller_name ?? "未知"));
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg2)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ OnEntryClicked失败: {0}", arg2));
		}
	}

	private void UpdateAllEntriesHighlight(NoteIndexView_Entry selectedEntry)
	{
		try
		{
			Type typeFromHandle = typeof(NoteIndexView_Entry);
			BindingFlags bindingAttr = BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic;
			FieldInfo field = typeFromHandle.GetField("highlightIndicator", bindingAttr);
			if (field == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 找不到highlightIndicator字段");
				return;
			}
			foreach (NoteIndexView_Entry activeEntry in _activeEntries)
			{
				GameObject gameObject = field.GetValue(activeEntry) as GameObject;
				if (!(gameObject != null))
				{
					continue;
				}
				bool isSelectedEntry = activeEntry == selectedEntry;
				gameObject.SetActive(isSelectedEntry);
				if (isSelectedEntry)
				{
					Image component = gameObject.GetComponent<Image>();
					if (component != null)
					{
						component.color = new Color(0.8f, 0.5f, 0.2f, 0.6f);
					}
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ UpdateAllEntriesHighlight失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void AddMoneyDisplayToEntry(NoteIndexView_Entry entry, Listing listing)
	{
		try
		{
			if (_entryCostDisplays.TryGetValue(entry, out GameObject value))
			{
				if (value != null)
				{
					UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(value);
				}
				_entryCostDisplays.Remove(entry);
			}
			Type typeFromHandle = typeof(NoteIndexView_Entry);
			BindingFlags bindingAttr = BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic;
			FieldInfo field = typeFromHandle.GetField("titleText", bindingAttr);
			if (field == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = field.GetValue(entry) as TextMeshProUGUI;
			if (textMeshProUGUI == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			RectTransform component = textMeshProUGUI.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (component == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			RectTransform rectTransform = component.parent as RectTransform;
			if (rectTransform == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			if (_costDisplayPrefab == null)
			{
				CostDisplay[] array = UnityEngine.Object.FindObjectsOfType<CostDisplay>(includeInactive: true);
				if (array == null || array.Length == 0)
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到CostDisplay，无法添加钱币显示");
					return;
				}
				_costDisplayPrefab = array[0].gameObject;
			}
			GameObject gameObject = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(_costDisplayPrefab, rectTransform, worldPositionStays: false);
			gameObject.name = "CostDisplay_Price";
			CostDisplay component2 = gameObject.GetComponent<CostDisplay>();
			if (component2 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 克隆的CostDisplay没有CostDisplay组件");
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(gameObject);
				return;
			}
			RectTransform component3 = gameObject.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (component3 != null)
			{
				component3.anchorMin = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
				component3.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
				component3.pivot = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
				component3.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(-420f, 0f);
				component3.sizeDelta = new Vector2(180f, 100f);
			}
			Cost cost = new Cost
			{
				money = listing.price,
				items = null
			};
			component2.Setup(cost);
			FieldInfo field2 = component2.GetType().GetField("money", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field2 != null)
			{
				TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI2 = field2.GetValue(component2) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				if (textMeshProUGUI2 != null)
				{
					textMeshProUGUI2.fontSize = 28f;
					textMeshProUGUI2.enableAutoSizing = false;
					textMeshProUGUI2.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.BottomRight;
					textMeshProUGUI2.overflowMode = TextOverflowModes.Truncate;
				}
			}
			if (gameObject.transform.Find("PriceLabel") == null)
			{
				GameObject obj = new GameObject("PriceLabel");
				obj.transform.SetParent(gameObject.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
				TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI3 = obj.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
				textMeshProUGUI3.text = LocalizationStrings.GetPerItemLabel();
				textMeshProUGUI3.fontSize = 12f;
				textMeshProUGUI3.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
				textMeshProUGUI3.color = new Color(0.6f, 0.6f, 0.6f, 0.8f);
				RectTransform component4 = obj.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
				component4.anchorMin = new Vector2(0.5f, 0f);
				component4.anchorMax = new Vector2(0.5f, 0f);
				component4.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1f);
				component4.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(0f, -25f);
				component4.sizeDelta = new Vector2(80f, 16f);
				LayoutElement layoutElement = obj.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
				layoutElement.preferredHeight = 16f;
				layoutElement.preferredWidth = 80f;
				obj.SetActive(value: true);
			}
			_entryCostDisplays[entry] = gameObject;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ AddMoneyDisplayToEntry失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void AddExpirationTimeToEntry(NoteIndexView_Entry entry, Listing listing)
	{
		try
		{
			if (listing == null || string.IsNullOrEmpty(listing.expires_at))
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ Listing或expires_at为null，跳过剩余时间显示");
				return;
			}
			RectTransform component = entry.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (component == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			GameObject gameObject = new GameObject("ExpirationTime");
			gameObject.transform.SetParent(component, worldPositionStays: false);
			RectTransform rectTransform = gameObject.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
			rectTransform.anchorMin = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
			rectTransform.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
			rectTransform.pivot = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
			rectTransform.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(-240f, 0f);
			rectTransform.sizeDelta = new Vector2(100f, 80f);
			TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = gameObject.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
			textMeshProUGUI.fontSize = 26f;
			textMeshProUGUI.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
			int remainingSeconds = listing.remaining_seconds;
			if (remainingSeconds > 0)
			{
				textMeshProUGUI.color = new Color(1f, 0.8f, 0.2f, 1f);
				if (remainingSeconds >= 3600)
				{
					int hours = remainingSeconds / 3600;
					int minutes = remainingSeconds % 3600 / 60;
					textMeshProUGUI.text = string.Format("{0}h {1}m", hours, minutes);
				}
				else if (remainingSeconds >= 60)
				{
					int minutes = remainingSeconds / 60;
					int seconds = remainingSeconds % 60;
					textMeshProUGUI.text = string.Format("{0}m {1}s", minutes, seconds);
				}
				else
				{
					textMeshProUGUI.text = string.Format("{0}s", remainingSeconds);
				}
			}
			else
			{
				textMeshProUGUI.text = LocalizationStrings.GetExpiredLabel();
				textMeshProUGUI.color = new Color(1f, 0.2f, 0.2f, 1f);
			}
			_entryExpirationTimes[entry] = gameObject;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ AddExpirationTimeToEntry失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void AddSellerNameToEntry(NoteIndexView_Entry entry, Listing listing)
	{
		try
		{
			if (listing == null || string.IsNullOrEmpty(listing.seller_name))
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ Listing或seller_name为null，跳过卖家昵称显示");
				return;
			}
			Type typeFromHandle = typeof(NoteIndexView_Entry);
			BindingFlags bindingAttr = BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic;
			FieldInfo field = typeFromHandle.GetField("titleText", bindingAttr);
			if (field == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = field.GetValue(entry) as TextMeshProUGUI;
			if (!(textMeshProUGUI == null))
			{
				RectTransform component = textMeshProUGUI.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
				if (!(component == null))
				{
					GameObject gameObject = new GameObject("SellerName");
					gameObject.transform.SetParent(component.parent, worldPositionStays: false);
					RectTransform rectTransform = gameObject.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
					rectTransform.anchorMin = new Vector2(0f, 0.5f);
					rectTransform.anchorMax = new Vector2(0f, 0.5f);
					rectTransform.pivot = new Vector2(0f, 1f);
					rectTransform.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(172f, -10f);
					rectTransform.sizeDelta = new Vector2(300f, 20f);
					TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI2 = gameObject.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
					string sellerLabel = LocalizationStrings.GetSellerLabel();
					textMeshProUGUI2.text = sellerLabel + ": " + listing.seller_name;
					textMeshProUGUI2.fontSize = 16f;
					textMeshProUGUI2.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.TopLeft;
					textMeshProUGUI2.color = ((ApiClient.CurrentUserId.HasValue && listing.user_id == ApiClient.CurrentUserId.Value) ? new Color(0.3f, 0.6f, 1f, 1f) : new Color(0.7f, 0.7f, 0.7f, 1f));
					_entrySellerNames[entry] = gameObject;
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ AddSellerNameToEntry失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void CleanupEntryComponents(NoteIndexView_Entry entry, int listingId)
	{
		if (entry == null)
		{
			return;
		}
		if (_entryDealButtons.ContainsKey(entry))
		{
			Button button = _entryDealButtons[entry];
			if (button != null)
			{
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(button.gameObject);
			}
			_entryDealButtons.Remove(entry);
		}
		_listingIdToButton.Remove(listingId);
		if (_entryCostDisplays.ContainsKey(entry))
		{
			GameObject gameObject = _entryCostDisplays[entry];
			if (gameObject != null)
			{
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(gameObject);
			}
			_entryCostDisplays.Remove(entry);
		}
		if (_entryExpirationTimes.ContainsKey(entry))
		{
			GameObject gameObject2 = _entryExpirationTimes[entry];
			if (gameObject2 != null)
			{
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(gameObject2);
			}
			_entryExpirationTimes.Remove(entry);
		}
		if (_entrySoldOutTexts.ContainsKey(entry))
		{
			GameObject gameObject3 = _entrySoldOutTexts[entry];
			if (gameObject3 != null)
			{
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(gameObject3);
			}
			_entrySoldOutTexts.Remove(entry);
		}
		DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ 已清理Entry {0} 的所有UI组件", listingId));
	}

	private void ClearAllEntries()
	{
		foreach (GameObject value in _entryCostDisplays.Values)
		{
			if (value != null)
			{
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(value);
			}
		}
		_entryCostDisplays.Clear();
		foreach (GameObject value2 in _entryExpirationTimes.Values)
		{
			if (value2 != null)
			{
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(value2);
			}
		}
		_entryExpirationTimes.Clear();
		foreach (GameObject value3 in _entrySellerNames.Values)
		{
			if (value3 != null)
			{
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(value3);
			}
		}
		_entrySellerNames.Clear();
		foreach (GameObject value4 in _entryDemandQuantities.Values)
		{
			if (value4 != null)
			{
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(value4);
			}
		}
		_entryDemandQuantities.Clear();
		if (_itemDisplayPool != null)
		{
			foreach (ItemDisplay value5 in _entryItemDisplays.Values)
			{
				if (value5 != null)
				{
					_itemDisplayPool.Release(value5);
				}
			}
		}
		_entryItemDisplays.Clear();
		_entryListings.Clear();
		foreach (Button value6 in _entryDealButtons.Values)
		{
			if (value6 != null)
			{
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(value6.gameObject);
			}
		}
		_entryDealButtons.Clear();
		_listingIdToButton.Clear();
		foreach (GameObject value7 in _entrySoldOutTexts.Values)
		{
			if (value7 != null)
			{
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(value7);
			}
		}
		_entrySoldOutTexts.Clear();
		if (_entryPool != null)
		{
			_entryPool.ReleaseAll();
		}
		_activeEntries.Clear();
	}
}



```

`duckmarket_core/FleaMarket.UI/DuckMarketView_NoteClone.Localization.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using System.Reflection;
using System.Text;
using System.Text.RegularExpressions;
using Cysharp.Threading.Tasks;
using DuckMarket;
using DuckMarket.Core;
using DuckMarket.Models;
using DuckMarket.Network;
using DuckMarket.Patches;
using DuckMarket.Services;
using DuckMarket.UI;
using Duckov.BlackMarkets.UI;
using Duckov.Economy;
using Duckov.NoteIndexs;
using Duckov.UI;
using Duckov.UI.Animations;
using Duckov.UI.Inventories;
using Duckov.Utilities;
using ItemStatsSystem;
using TMPro;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;
using UnityEngine.EventSystems;
using UnityEngine.UI;

namespace FleaMarket.UI;

public partial class DuckMarketView_NoteClone
{
	private const string DefaultLanguageTitleKey = "DuckMarket.Title.zh-CN";

	private static string MapSodaLanguageToTitleKey(string languageName)
	{
		return languageName switch
		{
			"ChineseSimplified" => "DuckMarket.Title.zh-CN",
			"ChineseTraditional" => "DuckMarket.Title.zh-TW",
			"English" => "DuckMarket.Title.en-US",
			"Japanese" => "DuckMarket.Title.ja-JP",
			"Korean" => "DuckMarket.Title.ko-KR",
			_ => DefaultLanguageTitleKey,
		};
	}

	private static string BuildLocalizedTextKey(string baseKey, string currentLanguageKey)
	{
		string languageSuffix = currentLanguageKey switch
		{
			"DuckMarket.Title.zh-CN" => ".zh-CN",
			"DuckMarket.Title.zh-TW" => ".zh-TW",
			"DuckMarket.Title.en-US" => ".en-US",
			"DuckMarket.Title.ja-JP" => ".ja-JP",
			"DuckMarket.Title.ko-KR" => ".ko-KR",
			_ => ".zh-CN",
		};
		return baseKey + languageSuffix;
	}

	private string GetCurrentLanguageKey()
	{
		try
		{
			Assembly assembly = AppDomain.CurrentDomain.GetAssemblies().FirstOrDefault((Assembly a) => a.GetName().Name == "SodaLocalization");
			if (assembly == null)
			{
				return DefaultLanguageTitleKey;
			}
			Type type = assembly.GetType("SodaCraft.Localizations.LocalizationManager");
			if (type == null)
			{
				return DefaultLanguageTitleKey;
			}
			PropertyInfo property = type.GetProperty("CurrentLanguage", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
			if (property == null)
			{
				return DefaultLanguageTitleKey;
			}
			object value = property.GetValue(null);
			if (value == null)
			{
				return DefaultLanguageTitleKey;
			}
			string languageName = value.ToString();
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🌐 检测到系统语言: " + languageName);
			return MapSodaLanguageToTitleKey(languageName);
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 获取当前语言失败: {0}", arg));
		}
		return DefaultLanguageTitleKey;
	}

	private LocalizationManager.Language ConvertSystemLanguageToLocalizationLanguage(SystemLanguage systemLanguage)
	{
		return systemLanguage switch
		{
			SystemLanguage.Chinese => LocalizationManager.Language.ChineseSimplified, 
			SystemLanguage.ChineseSimplified => LocalizationManager.Language.ChineseSimplified, 
			SystemLanguage.ChineseTraditional => LocalizationManager.Language.ChineseTraditional, 
			SystemLanguage.Japanese => LocalizationManager.Language.Japanese, 
			SystemLanguage.Korean => LocalizationManager.Language.Korean, 
			_ => LocalizationManager.Language.English, 
		};
	}

	private string GetLocalizedText(string baseKey)
	{
		try
		{
			string currentLanguageKey = GetCurrentLanguageKey();
			string localizedTextKey = BuildLocalizedTextKey(baseKey, currentLanguageKey);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🔍 获取本地化文本: " + localizedTextKey);
			Assembly assembly = AppDomain.CurrentDomain.GetAssemblies().FirstOrDefault((Assembly a) => a.GetName().Name == "SodaLocalization");
			if (assembly == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ SodaLocalization程序集未找到");
				return localizedTextKey;
			}
			Type type = assembly.GetType("SodaCraft.Localizations.LocalizationManager");
			if (type == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ LocalizationManager类型未找到");
				return localizedTextKey;
			}
			MethodInfo method = type.GetMethod("GetText", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public, null, new Type[1] { typeof(string) }, null);
			if (method != null)
			{
				if (method.Invoke(null, new object[1] { localizedTextKey }) is string localizedText && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(localizedText) && localizedText != localizedTextKey)
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 获取本地化文本成功: " + localizedTextKey + " = " + localizedText);
					return localizedText;
				}
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 获取本地化文本返回空或键本身: " + localizedTextKey);
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ GetText方法未找到");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 获取本地化文本异常 (" + baseKey + "): " + ex.Message);
		}
		return baseKey;
	}

	private void SyncGameLanguageOnStartup()
	{
		try
		{
			Assembly assembly = AppDomain.CurrentDomain.GetAssemblies().FirstOrDefault((Assembly a) => a.GetName().Name == "SodaLocalization");
			if (assembly == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 无法获取SodaLocalization程序集，使用默认语言");
				return;
			}
			Type type = assembly.GetType("SodaCraft.Localizations.LocalizationManager");
			if (type == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 无法获取LocalizationManager类型，使用默认语言");
				return;
			}
			PropertyInfo property = type.GetProperty("CurrentLanguage", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
			if (property != null)
			{
				SystemLanguage systemLanguage = (SystemLanguage)property.GetValue(null);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🌐 启动时检测到游戏语言: {0}", systemLanguage));
				LocalizationManager.Language language = ConvertSystemLanguageToLocalizationLanguage(systemLanguage);
				LocalizationManager.SetLanguage(language);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ LocalizationManager语言已同步: {0}", language));
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 无法获取CurrentLanguage属性，使用默认语言");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 同步游戏语言失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void SubscribeToLanguageChanges()
	{
		try
		{
			Assembly assembly = AppDomain.CurrentDomain.GetAssemblies().FirstOrDefault((Assembly a) => a.GetName().Name == "SodaLocalization");
			if (assembly == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			Type type = assembly.GetType("SodaCraft.Localizations.LocalizationManager");
			if (!(type == null))
			{
				MethodInfo method = type.GetMethod("add_OnSetLanguage", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
				if (method != null)
				{
					Delegate obj = Delegate.CreateDelegate(typeof(Action<>).MakeGenericType(typeof(SystemLanguage)), this, typeof(DuckMarketView_NoteClone).GetMethod("OnLanguageChanged", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic));
					method.Invoke(null, new object[1] { obj });
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 已订阅语言切换事件");
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 订阅语言切换事件失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void OnLanguageChanged(SystemLanguage newLanguage)
	{
		DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🌐 游戏语言已切换: {0}", newLanguage));
		LocalizationManager.Language language = ConvertSystemLanguageToLocalizationLanguage(newLanguage);
		LocalizationManager.SetLanguage(language);
		DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ LocalizationManager语言已同步: {0}", language));
		string currentLanguageKey = GetCurrentLanguageKey();
		DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🔄 更新标题本地化键: " + currentLanguageKey);
		try
		{
			List<Component> list = (from c in _clonedViewRoot?.GetComponentsInChildren<Component>(includeInactive: true)
				where c.GetType().Name == "TextLocalizor"
				select c).ToList();
			if (list != null)
			{
				foreach (Component item in list)
				{
					PropertyInfo property = item.GetType().GetProperty("Key");
					if (property != null && property.GetValue(item) is string localizationKey && localizationKey.StartsWith("DuckMarket.Title"))
					{
						property.SetValue(item, currentLanguageKey);
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 已更新TextLocalizor Key为: " + currentLanguageKey);
					}
				}
			}
			ViewTabs viewTabs = base.transform.parent?.parent?.GetComponent<ViewTabs>();
			if (viewTabs != null)
			{
				foreach (Component item2 in (from c in viewTabs.GetComponentsInChildren<Component>(includeInactive: true)
					where c.GetType().Name == "TextLocalizor"
					select c).ToList())
				{
					PropertyInfo property2 = item2.GetType().GetProperty("Key");
					if (property2 != null && property2.GetValue(item2) is string localizationKey && localizationKey.StartsWith("DuckMarket.Title"))
					{
						property2.SetValue(item2, currentLanguageKey);
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 已更新ViewTabs中的TextLocalizor Key为: " + currentLanguageKey);
					}
				}
			}
			UpdateDynamicUILanguage();
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 更新标题本地化键失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void UpdateDynamicUILanguage()
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🔄 开始更新动态UI语言...");
			UpdateFilterButtonsLanguage();
			UpdateSearchBarButtonsLanguage();
			UpdateSearchBarPlaceholders();
			UpdatePaginationLanguage();
			UpdateItemsLoadedTextLanguage();
			UpdatePurchasePlaceholderLanguage();
			UpdateListingEntryBuyButtonsLanguage();
			UpdateInspectorInventoryDisplayLanguage();
			UpdateShowOwnedOnlyButtonLanguage();
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 动态UI语言更新完成");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 更新动态UI语言失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void UpdateFilterButtonsLanguage()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_marketButton != null)
			{
				FieldInfo field = typeof(InventoryFilterDisplayEntry).GetField("icon", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				InventoryFilterDisplayEntry component = _marketButton.GetComponent<InventoryFilterDisplayEntry>();
				if (component != null && field != null)
				{
					Image image = field.GetValue(component) as Image;
					if (image != null)
					{
						Transform transform = image.transform.Find("ButtonText");
						if (transform != null)
						{
							TextMeshProUGUI component2 = transform.GetComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
							if (component2 != null)
							{
								component2.text = LocalizationStrings.GetMarketFilterLabel();
								DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 更新市场按钮文本: " + component2.text);
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			if (!(_purchaseButton != null))
			{
				return;
			}
			FieldInfo field2 = typeof(InventoryFilterDisplayEntry).GetField("icon", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			InventoryFilterDisplayEntry component3 = _purchaseButton.GetComponent<InventoryFilterDisplayEntry>();
			if (!(component3 != null) || !(field2 != null))
			{
				return;
			}
			Image image2 = field2.GetValue(component3) as Image;
			if (!(image2 != null))
			{
				return;
			}
			Transform transform2 = image2.transform.Find("ButtonText");
			if (transform2 != null)
			{
				TextMeshProUGUI component4 = transform2.GetComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
				if (component4 != null)
				{
					component4.text = LocalizationStrings.GetPurchaseFilterLabel();
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 更新收购按钮文本: " + component4.text);
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 更新筛选按钮语言失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void UpdateSearchBarButtonsLanguage()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_searchBar != null)
			{
				if (_searchBar._searchButton != null)
				{
					TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren = _searchBar._searchButton.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
					foreach (TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI in componentsInChildren)
					{
						textMeshProUGUI.text = LocalizationStrings.GetSearchButtonLabel();
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 更新搜索按钮文本: " + textMeshProUGUI.text);
					}
				}
				if (_searchBar._refreshButton != null)
				{
					TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren = _searchBar._refreshButton.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
					foreach (TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI2 in componentsInChildren)
					{
						textMeshProUGUI2.text = LocalizationStrings.GetRefreshButtonLabel();
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 更新刷新按钮文本: " + textMeshProUGUI2.text);
					}
				}
			}
			if (_myListingsButton != null)
			{
				TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren = _myListingsButton.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
				foreach (TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI3 in componentsInChildren)
				{
					textMeshProUGUI3.text = LocalizationStrings.GetMyListingsButtonLabel();
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 更新我的商品按钮文本: " + textMeshProUGUI3.text);
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 更新搜索栏按钮语言失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void UpdateSearchBarPlaceholders()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_searchBar != null)
			{
				string searchItemNamePlaceholder = LocalizationStrings.GetSearchItemNamePlaceholder();
				_searchBar.UpdatePlaceholder(searchItemNamePlaceholder);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 更新搜索框占位符: " + searchItemNamePlaceholder);
			}
			if (_inspectorSearchBar != null)
			{
				string advancedFilterPlaceholder = LocalizationStrings.GetAdvancedFilterPlaceholder();
				_inspectorSearchBar.UpdatePlaceholder(advancedFilterPlaceholder);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 更新高级筛选框占位符: " + advancedFilterPlaceholder);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 更新搜索框占位符语言失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void UpdatePaginationLanguage()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_pageInfoText != null)
			{
				_pageInfoText.text = LocalizationStrings.GetPaginationText(_currentPage + 1, _totalItems);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 更新分页文本: " + _pageInfoText.text);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 更新分页语言失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void UpdateItemsLoadedTextLanguage()
	{
		try
		{
			if (!(_inspectorInventoryDisplay != null))
			{
				return;
			}
			FieldInfo field = typeof(InventoryDisplay).GetField("displayNameText", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (!(field != null))
			{
				return;
			}
			TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = field.GetValue(_inspectorInventoryDisplay) as TextMeshProUGUI;
			if (textMeshProUGUI != null)
			{
				string originalLabel = textMeshProUGUI.text;
				int result = 0;
				Match match = Regex.Match(originalLabel, "\\d+");
				if (match.Success)
				{
					int.TryParse(match.Value, out result);
				}
				textMeshProUGUI.text = LocalizationStrings.GetItemsLoadedText(result);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 更新已加载物品文本: " + textMeshProUGUI.text);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 更新已加载物品文本语言失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void UpdatePurchasePlaceholderLanguage()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_purchasePlaceholder != null)
			{
				TextMeshProUGUI componentInChildren = _purchasePlaceholder.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
				if (componentInChildren != null)
				{
					componentInChildren.text = LocalizationStrings.GetPurchasePlaceholder();
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 更新收购占位符文本: " + componentInChildren.text);
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 更新收购占位符语言失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void SetupLocalizationOverrides()
	{
		try
		{
			Assembly assembly = AppDomain.CurrentDomain.GetAssemblies().FirstOrDefault((Assembly a) => a.GetName().Name == "SodaLocalization");
			if (assembly == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 找不到SodaLocalization程序集");
				return;
			}
			Type type = assembly.GetType("SodaCraft.Localizations.LocalizationManager");
			if (type == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 找不到LocalizationManager类型");
				return;
			}
			MethodInfo method = type.GetMethod("SetOverrideText", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
			if (method == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ SetOverrideText方法未找到");
				return;
			}
			(string, string)[] array = new(string, string)[19]
			{
				("market.title", "鸭鸭市场"),
				("DuckMarket.Title", "鸭鸭市场"),
				("DuckMarket.Title.zh-CN", "鸭鸭市场"),
				("DuckMarket.Title.zh-TW", "鴨鴨市場"),
				("DuckMarket.Title.en-US", "Duck Market"),
				("DuckMarket.Title.ja-JP", "Duck Market"),
				("DuckMarket.Title.ko-KR", "Duck Market"),
				("market.seller", "卖家"),
				("DuckMarket.Seller.zh-CN", "卖家"),
				("DuckMarket.Seller.zh-TW", "賣家"),
				("DuckMarket.Seller.en-US", "Seller"),
				("DuckMarket.Seller.ja-JP", "出品者"),
				("DuckMarket.Seller.ko-KR", "판매자"),
				("market.per_item", "每个物品"),
				("DuckMarket.PerItem.zh-CN", "每个物品"),
				("DuckMarket.PerItem.zh-TW", "每個物品"),
				("DuckMarket.PerItem.en-US", "Per Item"),
				("DuckMarket.PerItem.ja-JP", "個あたり"),
				("DuckMarket.PerItem.ko-KR", "개당")
			};
			for (int entryIndex = 0; entryIndex < array.Length; entryIndex++)
			{
				var (localizationKey, localizedValue) = array[entryIndex];
				method.Invoke(null, new object[2] { localizationKey, localizedValue });
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 注册本地化文本: " + localizationKey + " = " + localizedValue);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 设置本地化覆盖失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void UpdateListingEntryBuyButtonsLanguage()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_scrollView == null || _scrollView.content == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ ScrollView content为null，跳过更新购买按钮");
				return;
			}
			NoteIndexView_Entry[] componentsInChildren = _scrollView.content.GetComponentsInChildren<NoteIndexView_Entry>(includeInactive: true);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 找到 {0} 个Entry", componentsInChildren.Length));
			int updatedBuyButtonCount = 0;
			int updatedStatusTextCount = 0;
			NoteIndexView_Entry[] array = componentsInChildren;
			foreach (NoteIndexView_Entry noteIndexView_Entry in array)
			{
				Button componentInChildren = noteIndexView_Entry.GetComponentInChildren<Button>(includeInactive: true);
				if (componentInChildren != null && componentInChildren.gameObject.name == "Deal")
				{
					TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren2 = componentInChildren.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
					for (int j = 0; j < componentsInChildren2.Length; j++)
					{
						componentsInChildren2[j].text = LocalizationStrings.GetBuyButtonLabel();
					}
					updatedBuyButtonCount++;
				}
				if (!_entrySoldOutTexts.ContainsKey(noteIndexView_Entry))
				{
					continue;
				}
				GameObject gameObject = _entrySoldOutTexts[noteIndexView_Entry];
				if (!(gameObject != null))
				{
					continue;
				}
				TextMeshProUGUI component = gameObject.GetComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
				if (component != null)
				{
					if (gameObject.name == "SoldOutText")
					{
						component.text = LocalizationStrings.GetItemSoldOutLabel();
					}
					else if (gameObject.name == "PurchaseSuccessText")
					{
						component.text = LocalizationStrings.GetPurchaseSuccessLabel();
					}
					updatedStatusTextCount++;
				}
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 更新了 {0} 个购买按钮, {1} 个状态文字", updatedBuyButtonCount, updatedStatusTextCount));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 更新购买按钮语言失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void UpdateInspectorInventoryDisplayLanguage()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_inspectorInventoryDisplay == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ _inspectorInventoryDisplay 为 null，跳过更新");
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🔄 开始更新右侧物品栏语言...");
			MethodInfo method = typeof(InventoryDisplay).GetMethod("Refresh", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
			if (method != null)
			{
				method.Invoke(_inspectorInventoryDisplay, null);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 调用了 InventoryDisplay.Refresh()");
			}
			else
			{
				PropertyInfo property = typeof(InventoryDisplay).GetProperty("Target", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
				if (property != null && property.CanRead && property.CanWrite)
				{
					object value = property.GetValue(_inspectorInventoryDisplay);
					if (value != null)
					{
						property.SetValue(_inspectorInventoryDisplay, null);
						property.SetValue(_inspectorInventoryDisplay, value);
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 重新设置了 InventoryDisplay.Target 以触发刷新");
					}
					else
					{
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ InventoryDisplay.Target 为 null");
					}
				}
				else
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到 InventoryDisplay.Target 属性");
				}
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 右侧物品栏语言更新完成");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 更新右侧物品栏语言失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void UpdateShowOwnedOnlyButtonLanguage()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_showOwnedOnlyButton == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ '仅显示拥有的物品'按钮为空，跳过语言更新");
				return;
			}
			string buttonLabel = LocalizationManager.GetText("market.show_owned_only", "仅拥有");
			TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren = _showOwnedOnlyButton.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
			for (int i = 0; i < componentsInChildren.Length; i++)
			{
				componentsInChildren[i].text = buttonLabel;
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket]   - ✅ 更新'仅显示拥有的物品'按钮文本: " + buttonLabel);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 更新'仅显示拥有的物品'按钮语言失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}
}


```

`duckmarket_core/FleaMarket.UI/DuckMarketView_NoteClone.PurchaseFlow.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using System.Reflection;
using System.Text;
using System.Text.RegularExpressions;
using Cysharp.Threading.Tasks;
using DuckMarket;
using DuckMarket.Core;
using DuckMarket.Models;
using DuckMarket.Network;
using DuckMarket.Patches;
using DuckMarket.Services;
using DuckMarket.UI;
using Duckov.BlackMarkets.UI;
using Duckov.Economy;
using Duckov.NoteIndexs;
using Duckov.UI;
using Duckov.UI.Animations;
using Duckov.UI.Inventories;
using Duckov.Utilities;
using ItemStatsSystem;
using TMPro;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;
using UnityEngine.EventSystems;
using UnityEngine.UI;

namespace FleaMarket.UI;

public partial class DuckMarketView_NoteClone
{
	private void AddDealButtonToEntry(NoteIndexView_Entry entry, Listing listing)
	{
		try
		{
			if (_entryDealButtons.TryGetValue(entry, out Button value))
			{
				if (value != null)
				{
					UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(value.gameObject);
				}
				_entryDealButtons.Remove(entry);
			}
			if (_dealButtonPrefab == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ dealButton prefab未初始化，跳过购买按钮");
				return;
			}
			RectTransform component = entry.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (component == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			Button button = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(_dealButtonPrefab, component, worldPositionStays: false);
			button.gameObject.name = "DealButton";
			button.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
			Component[] localizorComponents = (from c in button.GetComponentsInChildren<Component>(includeInactive: true)
				where c.GetType().Name == "TextLocalizor"
				select c).ToArray();
			for (int componentIndex = 0; componentIndex < localizorComponents.Length; componentIndex++)
			{
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(localizorComponents[componentIndex]);
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 移除了 {0} 个TextLocalizor组件", localizorComponents.Length));
			bool isOwnListing = ApiClient.CurrentUserId.HasValue && listing.user_id == ApiClient.CurrentUserId.Value;
			bool isModItemEntry = _modItemEntries.Contains(entry);
			TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren = button.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
			foreach (TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI in componentsInChildren)
			{
				if (isModItemEntry)
				{
					textMeshProUGUI.text = LocalizationManager.GetText("market.mod_item", "MOD 商品");
				}
				else if (isOwnListing)
				{
					textMeshProUGUI.text = LocalizationStrings.GetDelistButtonLabel();
				}
				else
				{
					textMeshProUGUI.text = LocalizationStrings.GetBuyButtonLabel();
				}
			}
			RectTransform component2 = button.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (component2 != null)
			{
				component2.anchorMin = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
				component2.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
				component2.pivot = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
				component2.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(-15f, 0f);
				component2.sizeDelta = new Vector2(160f, 90f);
			}
			CostDisplay componentInChildren = button.GetComponentInChildren<CostDisplay>(includeInactive: true);
			if (componentInChildren != null)
			{
				componentInChildren.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
			}
			bool canAffordListing = EconomyManager.Money >= listing.price;
			button.interactable = !isModItemEntry && (isOwnListing || canAffordListing);
			Image[] componentsInChildren2 = button.GetComponentsInChildren<Image>(includeInactive: true);
			foreach (Image image in componentsInChildren2)
			{
				if (isModItemEntry)
				{
					if (image.gameObject.name == "Graphics" || image.gameObject.name == "Interactable")
					{
						image.color = new Color(0.4f, 0.4f, 0.4f, 1f);
					}
					else if (image.gameObject.name == "Icon" || image.gameObject.name == "Image")
					{
						image.color = new Color(0.6f, 0.6f, 0.6f, 1f);
					}
				}
				else if (isOwnListing)
				{
					if (image.gameObject.name == "Graphics" || image.gameObject.name == "Interactable")
					{
						image.color = new Color(0.2f, 0.5f, 1f, 1f);
					}
				}
				else if (!canAffordListing)
				{
					if (image.gameObject.name == "Graphics" || image.gameObject.name == "Interactable")
					{
						image.color = new Color(0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f, 1f);
					}
					else if (image.gameObject.name == "Icon" || image.gameObject.name == "Image")
					{
						image.color = new Color(0.8f, 0.8f, 0.8f, 1f);
					}
				}
				else if (image.gameObject.name == "Graphics" || image.gameObject.name == "Interactable")
				{
					image.color = new Color(0.2f, 0.8f, 0.3f, 1f);
				}
				if (image.gameObject.name == "Icon" || image.gameObject.name == "Image")
				{
					RectTransform component3 = image.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
					if (component3 != null)
					{
						component3.localEulerAngles = new Vector3(0f, 0f, 270f);
					}
				}
			}
			componentsInChildren = button.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
			foreach (TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI2 in componentsInChildren)
			{
				if (!canAffordListing)
				{
					textMeshProUGUI2.color = new Color(1f, 1f, 1f, 1f);
				}
			}
			Graphic[] componentsInChildren3 = button.GetComponentsInChildren<Graphic>();
			for (int graphicIndex = 0; graphicIndex < componentsInChildren3.Length; graphicIndex++)
			{
				componentsInChildren3[graphicIndex].raycastTarget = true;
			}
			button.onClick.AddListener(delegate
			{
				OnDealButtonClicked(listing);
			});
			_entryDealButtons[entry] = button;
			_listingIdToButton[listing.id] = (entry, button);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 为Entry添加了购买按钮: " + listing.item_name);
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ AddDealButtonToEntry失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void OnDealButtonClicked(Listing listing)
	{
		try
		{
			if (ApiClient.CurrentUserId.HasValue && listing.user_id == ApiClient.CurrentUserId.Value)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 📦 下架按钮被点击: {0} x{1}", listing.item_name, listing.quantity));
				DelistItemAsync(listing.id).Forget();
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🛒 购买按钮被点击: {0} x{1} @ {2:N0}", listing.item_name, listing.quantity, listing.price));
			if (listing.quantity > 1)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 📊 商品数量>1，弹出购买数量选择器");
				ShowPurchaseQuantitySelector(listing).Forget();
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 📊 商品数量=1，直接购买");
			long money = EconomyManager.Money;
			long totalPrice = listing.price * listing.quantity;
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 玩家余额: {0:N0}", money));
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 商品总价: {0:N0}", totalPrice));
			if (money < totalPrice)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 余额不足！需要 {0:N0}，但只有 {1:N0}", totalPrice, money));
				NotificationStyleCustomizer.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetInsufficientBalanceNotification(totalPrice, money), NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Error);
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 余额充足，可以购买");
				PurchaseListingAsync(listing, listing.quantity).Forget();
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ OnDealButtonClicked失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void SetDealButtonState(Button button, string state, string buttonLabel)
	{
		try
		{
			TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren = button.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
			TextMeshProUGUI[] array = componentsInChildren;
			for (int i = 0; i < array.Length; i++)
			{
				array[i].text = buttonLabel;
			}
			Image[] componentsInChildren2 = button.GetComponentsInChildren<Image>(includeInactive: true);
			Color color = Color.white;
			Color color2 = Color.white;
			if (!(state == "processing"))
			{
				if (!(state == "success"))
				{
					if (!(state == "failed"))
					{
						if (state == "sold_out")
						{
							color = new Color(0.6f, 0.1f, 0.1f, 1f);
							color2 = Color.white;
							button.interactable = false;
						}
					}
					else
					{
						color = new Color(1f, 0.3f, 0.3f, 1f);
						color2 = Color.white;
						button.interactable = false;
					}
				}
				else
				{
					color = new Color(0.2f, 0.8f, 0.2f, 1f);
					color2 = Color.white;
					button.interactable = false;
				}
			}
			else
			{
				color = new Color(1f, 0.8f, 0.2f, 1f);
				color2 = new Color(0.2f, 0.2f, 0.2f, 1f);
				button.interactable = false;
			}
			Image[] array2 = componentsInChildren2;
			foreach (Image image in array2)
			{
				if (image.gameObject.name == "Graphics" || image.gameObject.name == "Interactable")
				{
					image.color = color;
				}
				else if (image.gameObject.name == "Icon" || image.gameObject.name == "Image")
				{
					image.color = Color.white;
				}
			}
			array = componentsInChildren;
```
