```cs
			for (int i = 0; i < array.Length; i++)
			{
				array[i].color = color2;
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ SetDealButtonState失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private async UniTaskVoid PurchaseListingAsync(Listing listing, int purchaseQuantity)
	{
		NoteIndexView_Entry targetEntry = null;
		Button dealButton = null;
		if (_listingIdToButton.TryGetValue(listing.id, out (NoteIndexView_Entry, Button) value))
		{
			(targetEntry, dealButton) = value;
		}
		else
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Warning(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 未找到listing {0} 对应的按钮", listing.id));
		}
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🛒 开始购买: {0} x{1} (总库存: {2})", listing.item_name, purchaseQuantity, listing.quantity));
			if (dealButton != null)
			{
				SetDealButtonState(dealButton, "processing", "处理中...");
			}
			long totalPrice = listing.price * purchaseQuantity;
			long money = EconomyManager.Money;
			if (money < totalPrice)
			{
				NotificationStyleCustomizer.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetInsufficientBalanceNotification(totalPrice, money), NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Error);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 余额不足。需要: {0}, 当前: {1}", totalPrice, money));
				if (dealButton != null)
				{
					SetDealButtonState(dealButton, "failed", "购买失败");
				}
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 调用API购买商品 {0}，数量: {1}...", listing.id, purchaseQuantity));
			var (flag, itemTypeId, text, quantity, durability, durabilityLoss, text2) = await ApiClient.PurchaseItemAsync(listing.id, purchaseQuantity);
			if (flag)
			{
				EconomyManager.Add(-totalPrice);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 扣除 {0}，新余额: {1}", totalPrice, EconomyManager.Money));
				string displayItemName = await GetItemDisplayNameAsync(itemTypeId, text ?? "Unknown");
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 创建物品并发送到自提柜: TypeID={0}, Quantity={1}, Name={2}, Durability={3}, DurabilityLoss={4}", itemTypeId, quantity, displayItemName, durability, durabilityLoss));
				await CreateAndSendItemAsync(itemTypeId, quantity, displayItemName, durability, durabilityLoss);
				if (dealButton != null && targetEntry != null)
				{
					UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(dealButton.gameObject);
					_entryDealButtons.Remove(targetEntry);
					_listingIdToButton.Remove(listing.id);
					GameObject gameObject = new GameObject("PurchaseSuccessText");
					gameObject.transform.SetParent(targetEntry.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
					TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = gameObject.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
					textMeshProUGUI.text = LocalizationStrings.GetPurchaseSuccessLabel();
					textMeshProUGUI.color = new Color(0.2f, 0.8f, 0.2f, 1f);
					textMeshProUGUI.fontSize = 24f;
					textMeshProUGUI.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Right;
					RectTransform component = textMeshProUGUI.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
					component.anchorMin = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
					component.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
					component.pivot = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
					component.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(-30f, 0f);
					component.sizeDelta = new Vector2(180f, 40f);
					_entrySoldOutTexts[targetEntry] = gameObject;
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 显示绿色文字: 购买成功");
				}
				NotificationStyleCustomizer.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetPurchaseSuccessNotification(displayItemName, quantity));
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 购买成功");
				await UniTask.Delay(1500);
				LoadListingsAsync().Forget();
				return;
			}
			if (text2 != null && (text2.Contains("商品不存在") || text2.Contains("商品被他人购买") || text2.Contains("已被购买")))
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 商品已被购买: " + listing.item_name);
				if (dealButton != null && targetEntry != null)
				{
					UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(dealButton.gameObject);
					_entryDealButtons.Remove(targetEntry);
					_listingIdToButton.Remove(listing.id);
					GameObject gameObject2 = new GameObject("SoldOutText");
					gameObject2.transform.SetParent(targetEntry.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
					TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI2 = gameObject2.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
					textMeshProUGUI2.text = LocalizationStrings.GetItemSoldOutLabel();
					textMeshProUGUI2.color = new Color(1f, 0.3f, 0.3f, 1f);
					textMeshProUGUI2.fontSize = 24f;
					textMeshProUGUI2.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Right;
					RectTransform component2 = textMeshProUGUI2.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
					component2.anchorMin = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
					component2.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
					component2.pivot = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
					component2.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(-30f, 0f);
					component2.sizeDelta = new Vector2(180f, 40f);
					_entrySoldOutTexts[targetEntry] = gameObject2;
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 显示红色文字: 商品已被购买");
				}
			}
			else if (dealButton != null)
			{
				SetDealButtonState(dealButton, "failed", LocalizationStrings.GetPurchaseFailedLabel());
			}
			NotificationStyleCustomizer.ShowNotification(text2 ?? LocalizationStrings.GetPurchaseFailedNotification(), NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Error);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] 购买失败: " + text2);
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			if (dealButton != null)
			{
				SetDealButtonState(dealButton, "failed", LocalizationStrings.GetPurchaseFailedLabel());
			}
			NotificationStyleCustomizer.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetPurchaseFailedNotification(), NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Error);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 购买异常: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private async UniTaskVoid ExecutePurchaseAsync(Listing listing, int purchaseQuantity)
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🎯 ExecutePurchaseAsync: {0} x{1}", listing.item_name, purchaseQuantity));
			long money = EconomyManager.Money;
			long totalPrice = listing.price * purchaseQuantity;
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 玩家余额: {0:N0}", money));
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 商品总价: {0:N0}", totalPrice));
			if (money < totalPrice)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ " + LocalizationStrings.GetInsufficientBalanceNotification(totalPrice, money));
				NotificationStyleCustomizer.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetInsufficientBalanceNotification(totalPrice, money), NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Error);
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 余额充足，开始购买");
			Button button = null;
			if (_listingIdToButton.TryGetValue(listing.id, out (NoteIndexView_Entry, Button) value))
			{
				button = value.Item2;
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 找到对应按钮，准备设置状态");
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 未找到listing {0} 对应的按钮，将直接购买", listing.id));
			}
			if (button != null)
			{
				SetDealButtonState(button, "processing", LocalizationStrings.GetProcessingLabel());
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 按钮状态已设置为: 正在处理");
			}
			await UniTask.Yield();
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 🚀 调用PurchaseListingAsync...");
			PurchaseListingAsync(listing, purchaseQuantity).Forget();
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ ExecutePurchaseAsync失败: {0}", arg));
			NotificationStyleCustomizer.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetPurchaseFailedNotification(), NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Error);
		}
	}

	private async UniTask<string> GetItemDisplayNameAsync(int typeId, string fallbackName)
	{
		try
		{
			Item item = await ItemAssetsCollection.InstantiateAsync(typeId);
			if (item != null)
			{
				item.Initialize();
				string displayName = item.DisplayName;
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(item);
				if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(displayName))
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ 根据ID {0} 获取到物品名称: {1}", typeId, displayName));
					return displayName;
				}
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Warning(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 根据ID {0} 获取物品名称失败，使用后备名称: {1}", typeId, fallbackName));
			return fallbackName;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 获取物品名称异常: " + ex.Message + "，使用后备名称: " + fallbackName);
			return fallbackName;
		}
	}

	private async UniTask CreateAndSendItemAsync(int typeId, int quantity, string itemName, float? durability = null, float? durabilityLoss = null)
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 创建物品 {0} (TypeID: {1}) x{2}, durability: {3}, durability_loss: {4}...", itemName, typeId, quantity, durability, durabilityLoss));
			int remainingQuantity = quantity;
			int createdItemsCount = 0;
			while (remainingQuantity > 0)
			{
				Item item = await ItemAssetsCollection.InstantiateAsync(typeId);
				if (item == null)
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 创建物品失败: TypeID {0}", typeId));
					break;
				}
				item.Initialize();
				int stackAmount = (item.StackCount = Math.Min(remainingQuantity, item.MaxStackCount));
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 创建物品: {0} x{1} (MaxStackCount: {2})", itemName, stackAmount, item.MaxStackCount));
				if (item.UseDurability)
				{
					if (durability.HasValue)
					{
						item.Durability = durability.Value;
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 设置物品耐久度为 {0}", durability.Value));
					}
					if (durabilityLoss.HasValue)
					{
						item.DurabilityLoss = durabilityLoss.Value;
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 设置物品耐久度损失为 {0}", durabilityLoss.Value));
					}
				}
				PlayerStoragePatch.BeginModPush();
				PlayerStorage.Push(item, toBufferDirectly: true);
				PlayerStoragePatch.EndModPush();
				remainingQuantity -= stackAmount;
				createdItemsCount++;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ 物品已发送到邮件系统: {0} x{1} (分 {2} 个堆叠)", itemName, quantity, createdItemsCount));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 创建并发送物品失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private async UniTaskVoid DelistItemAsync(int listingId)
	{
		if (!_listingIdToButton.TryGetValue(listingId, out (NoteIndexView_Entry, Button) value))
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Warning(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 未找到listing {0} 对应的按钮", listingId));
			return;
		}
		var (targetEntry, dealButton) = value;
		if (dealButton != null)
		{
			dealButton.interactable = false;
		}
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 📦 开始下架商品: listingId={0}", listingId));
			if (dealButton != null)
			{
				SetDealButtonState(dealButton, "processing", "处理中...");
			}
			var (flag, text, itemInfo) = await ApiClient.CancelListingAsync(listingId);
			if (flag && itemInfo != null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ 下架成功: {0} x{1}, durability: {2}, durability_loss: {3}", itemInfo.item_name, itemInfo.quantity, itemInfo.durability, itemInfo.durability_loss));
				await CreateAndSendItemAsync(itemInfo.item_type_id, itemInfo.quantity, itemInfo.item_name ?? "Unknown", itemInfo.durability, itemInfo.durability_loss);
				if (targetEntry != null)
				{
					Listing listing = _listings.FirstOrDefault((Listing l) => l.id == listingId);
					if (listing != null)
					{
						_listings.Remove(listing);
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 从_listings移除: " + listing.item_name);
					}
					CleanupEntryComponents(targetEntry, listingId);
					if (_entryPool != null)
					{
						_entryPool.Release(targetEntry);
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ Entry已回收到对象池");
					}
					else
					{
						UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(targetEntry.gameObject);
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ Entry已销毁");
					}
				}
				NotificationStyleCustomizer.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetDelistSuccessNotification(itemInfo.item_name, itemInfo.quantity), NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Info);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 下架成功，Entry已从UI中移除");
			}
			else
			{
				if (dealButton != null)
				{
					dealButton.interactable = true;
					SetDealButtonState(dealButton, "failed", "下架失败");
				}
				NotificationStyleCustomizer.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetDelistFailedNotification(), NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Error);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 下架失败: " + text);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			if (dealButton != null)
			{
				dealButton.interactable = true;
				SetDealButtonState(dealButton, "failed", "下架失败");
			}
			NotificationStyleCustomizer.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetDelistFailedNotification(), NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Error);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 下架异常: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private GameObject CreateDedicatedPurchasePanel()
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 🏗️ 创建专用购买详情面板...");
			Type type = Type.GetType("Duckov.Economy.UI.StockShopView, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
			if (type == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到StockShopView类型");
				return null;
			}
			PropertyInfo property = type.GetProperty("Instance", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
			if (property == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到StockShopView.Instance属性");
				return null;
			}
			object value = property.GetValue(null);
			if (value == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ StockShopView.Instance为null");
				return null;
			}
			MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour = value as MonoBehaviour;
			if (monoBehaviour == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ StockShopView不是MonoBehaviour");
				return null;
			}
			Transform transform = monoBehaviour.transform.Find("ItemDetails");
			if (transform == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到ItemDetails面板");
				return null;
			}
			bool activeSelf = transform.gameObject.activeSelf;
			if (!activeSelf)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ℹ️ 原始ItemDetails未激活，临时激活以确保组件初始化");
				transform.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
			}
			GameObject gameObject = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(transform.gameObject);
			gameObject.name = "DedicatedPurchasePanel";
			if (!activeSelf)
			{
				transform.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ℹ️ 已恢复原始ItemDetails状态");
			}
			RemoveDOTweenComponents(gameObject);
			gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 专用购买详情面板创建成功");
			return gameObject;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 创建专用购买详情面板失败: {0}", arg));
			return null;
		}
	}

	private async UniTask ShowPurchaseQuantitySelector(Listing listing)
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🔘 显示购买数量选择器: {0} (库存: {1})", listing.item_name, listing.quantity));
			if (_currentPurchasePanel != null)
			{
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(_currentPurchasePanel);
				_currentPurchasePanel = null;
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🧹 已销毁旧的购买详情面板");
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 📦 创建新的购买详情面板...");
			_currentPurchasePanel = CreateDedicatedPurchasePanel();
			if (_currentPurchasePanel == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 无法创建购买详情面板");
				return;
			}
			Type type = Type.GetType("Duckov.StrongNotification, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
			if (type == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到StrongNotification类型");
				return;
			}
			PropertyInfo property = type.GetProperty("Instance", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
			if (property == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到StrongNotification.Instance属性");
				return;
			}
			object value = property.GetValue(null);
			if (value == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ StrongNotification.Instance为null");
				return;
			}
			if (value as MonoBehaviour == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ StrongNotification不是MonoBehaviour");
				return;
			}
			FieldInfo field = type.GetField("mainFadeGroup", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到mainFadeGroup字段");
				return;
			}
			object value2 = field.GetValue(value);
			MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour = value2 as MonoBehaviour;
			if (monoBehaviour == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ mainFadeGroup不是MonoBehaviour");
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 📌 将面板添加到mainFadeGroup");
			_currentPurchasePanel.transform.SetParent(monoBehaviour.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
			_currentPurchasePanel.name = "DedicatedPurchasePanel";
			Type type2 = Type.GetType("Duckov.Economy.UI.StockShopView, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
			if (type2 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到StockShopView类型");
				return;
			}
			PropertyInfo property2 = type2.GetProperty("Instance", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
			if (property2 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到StockShopView.Instance属性");
				return;
			}
			object value3 = property2.GetValue(null);
			if (value3 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ StockShopView.Instance为null");
				return;
			}
			UpdatePurchasePanelContent(_currentPurchasePanel, listing, type2, value3);
			MethodInfo method = value2.GetType().GetMethod("SkipShow", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (method != null)
			{
				method.Invoke(value2, null);
				FieldInfo field2 = value2.GetType().GetField("isShown", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				if (field2 != null)
				{
					field2.SetValue(value2, true);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 强制显示mainFadeGroup（SkipShow + isShown=true）");
				}
				else
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 找不到isShown字段");
				}
			}
			else
			{
				MethodInfo method2 = value2.GetType().GetMethod("Show", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
				if (method2 != null)
				{
					method2.Invoke(value2, null);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 使用Show()降级方案显示mainFadeGroup");
				}
			}
			FieldInfo field3 = type.GetField("contentFadeGroup", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field3 != null)
			{
				object value4 = field3.GetValue(value);
				if (value4 != null)
				{
					MethodInfo method3 = value4.GetType().GetMethod("SkipShow", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
					if (method3 != null)
					{
						method3.Invoke(value4, null);
						FieldInfo field4 = value4.GetType().GetField("isShown", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
						if (field4 != null)
						{
							field4.SetValue(value4, true);
							DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 强制显示contentFadeGroup（SkipShow + isShown=true）- 这是关键修复！");
						}
						else
						{
							DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 找不到contentFadeGroup的isShown字段");
						}
					}
					else
					{
						MethodInfo method4 = value4.GetType().GetMethod("Show", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
						if (method4 != null)
						{
							method4.Invoke(value4, null);
							DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 使用Show()降级方案显示contentFadeGroup");
						}
					}
				}
			}
			_currentPurchasePanel.SetActive(value: true);
			_currentPurchasePanel.transform.SetAsLastSibling();
			Type type3 = Type.GetType("Duckov.UI.Animations.FadeElement, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
			if (type3 != null)
			{
				Component[] componentsInChildren = _currentPurchasePanel.GetComponentsInChildren(type3, includeInactive: true);
				if (componentsInChildren != null && componentsInChildren.Length != 0)
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🔍 找到 {0} 个FadeElement组件，强制显示...", componentsInChildren.Length));
					Component[] array = componentsInChildren;
					foreach (Component component in array)
					{
						if (!(component != null))
						{
							continue;
						}
						MethodInfo method5 = type3.GetMethod("SkipShow", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
						if (method5 != null)
						{
							method5.Invoke(component, null);
							FieldInfo field5 = type3.GetField("isShown", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
							if (field5 != null)
							{
								field5.SetValue(component, true);
							}
						}
					}
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 所有FadeElement已强制显示");
				}
			}
			CanvasGroup[] componentsInChildren2 = _currentPurchasePanel.GetComponentsInChildren<CanvasGroup>(includeInactive: true);
			if (componentsInChildren2 != null && componentsInChildren2.Length != 0)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🔍 找到 {0} 个CanvasGroup组件，设置alpha=1...", componentsInChildren2.Length));
				CanvasGroup[] array2 = componentsInChildren2;
				foreach (CanvasGroup canvasGroup in array2)
				{
					if (canvasGroup != null)
					{
						canvasGroup.alpha = 1f;
						canvasGroup.blocksRaycasts = true;
						canvasGroup.interactable = true;
					}
				}
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 所有CanvasGroup已设置alpha=1");
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 🔍 调试信息:");
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - 面板名称: " + _currentPurchasePanel.name);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 面板active: {0}", _currentPurchasePanel.activeSelf));
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 面板activeInHierarchy: {0}", _currentPurchasePanel.activeInHierarchy));
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - 面板父级: " + _currentPurchasePanel.transform.parent?.name);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 面板父级active: {0}", _currentPurchasePanel.transform.parent?.gameObject.activeSelf));
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 面板父级activeInHierarchy: {0}", _currentPurchasePanel.transform.parent?.gameObject.activeInHierarchy));
			MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour2 = value2 as MonoBehaviour;
			if (monoBehaviour2 != null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - mainFadeGroup.gameObject.active: {0}", monoBehaviour2.gameObject.activeSelf));
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - mainFadeGroup.gameObject.activeInHierarchy: {0}", monoBehaviour2.gameObject.activeInHierarchy));
				FieldInfo field6 = value2.GetType().GetField("isShown", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				if (field6 != null)
				{
					object value5 = field6.GetValue(value2);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - mainFadeGroup.isShown: {0}", value5));
				}
			}
			FieldInfo field7 = type.GetField("contentFadeGroup", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field7 != null)
			{
				object value6 = field7.GetValue(value);
				if (value6 != null)
				{
					MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour3 = value6 as MonoBehaviour;
					if (monoBehaviour3 != null)
					{
						DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - contentFadeGroup.gameObject.active: {0}", monoBehaviour3.gameObject.activeSelf));
						DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - contentFadeGroup.gameObject.activeInHierarchy: {0}", monoBehaviour3.gameObject.activeInHierarchy));
						FieldInfo field8 = value6.GetType().GetField("isShown", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
						if (field8 != null)
						{
							object value7 = field8.GetValue(value6);
							DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - contentFadeGroup.isShown: {0}", value7));
						}
					}
				}
			}
			HideStrongNotificationTexts(type, value);
			FieldInfo field9 = type.GetField("contentDelay", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field9 != null)
			{
				field9.SetValue(value, 0f);
			}
			AddClickBlocker(_currentPurchasePanel);
			MethodInfo method6 = type.GetMethod("Push", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public, null, new Type[2]
			{
				typeof(string),
				typeof(string)
			}, null);
			if (method6 != null)
			{
				method6.Invoke(null, new object[2]
				{
					"",
					""
				});
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 调用StrongNotification.Push激活供货界面");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 显示购买数量选择器失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void HideStrongNotificationTexts(Type strongNotificationType, object strongNotificationInstance)
	{
		try
		{
			FieldInfo field = strongNotificationType.GetField("textMain", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			FieldInfo field2 = strongNotificationType.GetField("textSub", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			FieldInfo field3 = strongNotificationType.GetField("image", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field != null)
			{
				TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = field.GetValue(strongNotificationInstance) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				if (textMeshProUGUI != null)
				{
					textMeshProUGUI.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				}
			}
			if (field2 != null)
			{
				TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI2 = field2.GetValue(strongNotificationInstance) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				if (textMeshProUGUI2 != null)
				{
					textMeshProUGUI2.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				}
			}
			if (field3 != null)
			{
				Image image = field3.GetValue(strongNotificationInstance) as Image;
				if (image != null)
				{
					image.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 隐藏StrongNotification文本失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void HideStrongNotificationContent(Type strongNotificationType, object strongNotificationInstance)
	{
		try
		{
			MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour = strongNotificationInstance as MonoBehaviour;
			if (monoBehaviour != null)
			{
				Transform transform = monoBehaviour.transform.Find("Content");
				if (transform != null)
				{
					transform.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 隐藏了StrongNotification的Content GameObject");
				}
				else
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] 未找到StrongNotification的Content GameObject");
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 隐藏StrongNotification Content失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void AddSupplyEscapeKeyHandler(Type strongNotificationType, object strongNotificationInstance)
	{
		try
		{
			MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour = strongNotificationInstance as MonoBehaviour;
			if (monoBehaviour != null)
			{
				monoBehaviour.gameObject.AddComponent<SupplyEscapeKeyHandler>().Initialize(strongNotificationType, strongNotificationInstance);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 添加了供货界面ESC键处理器");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 添加ESC键处理器失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void RemoveItemsFromPlayerStorage(int itemTypeId, int quantityToRemove)
	{
		try
		{
			int remainingToRemove = quantityToRemove;
			int removedCount = 0;
			HashSet<Item> itemsToRemove = new HashSet<Item>();
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🗑️ 开始移除玩家库存物品: TypeID={0}, 数量={1}", itemTypeId, quantityToRemove));
			try
			{
				Inventory inventory = PlayerStorage.Inventory;
				if (inventory != null)
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 📦 主仓库物品数量: {0}", inventory.Content.Count));
					foreach (Item item2 in inventory.Content.ToList())
					{
						if (remainingToRemove <= 0)
						{
							break;
						}
						if (item2 == null || item2.TypeID != itemTypeId)
						{
							continue;
						}
						if (item2.MaxDurability > 0f && !(Math.Abs(item2.Durability - item2.MaxDurability) < 0.01f))
						{
							DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ⏭️ 跳过耐久不满的物品: {0}, 耐久: {1}/{2}", item2.DisplayName, item2.Durability, item2.MaxDurability));
							continue;
						}
						DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🔍 找到满耐久物品: {0}, TypeID={1}, Stackable={2}, StackCount={3}, 耐久: {4}/{5}", item2.DisplayName, item2.TypeID, item2.Stackable, item2.StackCount, item2.Durability, item2.MaxDurability));
						if (item2.Stackable && item2.StackCount > 0)
						{
							if (item2.StackCount <= remainingToRemove)
							{
								itemsToRemove.Add(item2);
								remainingToRemove -= item2.StackCount;
								removedCount += item2.StackCount;
								DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 📦 标记移除整堆: {0} x{1}", item2.DisplayName, item2.StackCount));
							}
							else
							{
								item2.StackCount -= remainingToRemove;
								removedCount += remainingToRemove;
								DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 📦 减少堆叠: {0}, 移除{1}, 剩余{2}", item2.DisplayName, remainingToRemove, item2.StackCount));
								remainingToRemove = 0;
							}
						}
						else if (!item2.Stackable)
						{
							itemsToRemove.Add(item2);
							remainingToRemove--;
							removedCount++;
							DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 🗑 标记移除非堆叠物品: " + item2.DisplayName);
						}
					}
					foreach (Item item3 in itemsToRemove)
					{
						if (item3.Stackable)
						{
							item3.StackCount = 0;
							DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 设置StackCount=0: " + item3.DisplayName);
						}
						else
						{
							item3.Detach();
							UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(item3.gameObject);
							DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ Detach+Destroy: " + item3.DisplayName);
						}
					}
				}
				else
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ PlayerStorage.Inventory为null");
				}
			}
			catch (Exception ex)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 从主仓库移除失败: " + ex.Message + " " + ex.StackTrace);
			}
			if (remainingToRemove > 0)
			{
				try
				{
					Type type = Type.GetType("CharacterMain, Duckov-Assembly-CSharp");
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🔍 CharacterMain类型: {0}", type != null));
					if (type != null)
					{
						object obj = type.GetProperty("Instance", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public)?.GetValue(null);
						DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🔍 CharacterMain实例: {0}", obj != null));
						if (obj != null)
						{
							Item item = type.GetProperty("CharacterItem", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public)?.GetValue(obj) as Item;
							DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🔍 CharacterItem: {0}, Inventory: {1}", item != null, item?.Inventory != null));
							if (item?.Inventory != null)
							{
								List<Item> content = item.Inventory.Content;
								DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 📦 背包物品数量: {0}", content?.Count ?? 0));
								if (content != null)
								{
									foreach (Item item4 in content.ToList())
									{
										if (remainingToRemove <= 0)
										{
											break;
										}
										if (item4 == null || item4.TypeID != itemTypeId)
										{
											continue;
										}
										if (item4.MaxDurability > 0f && !(Math.Abs(item4.Durability - item4.MaxDurability) < 0.01f))
										{
											DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ⏭️ 跳过耐久不满的物品（背包）: {0}, 耐久: {1}/{2}", item4.DisplayName, item4.Durability, item4.MaxDurability));
											continue;
										}
										DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🔍 背包找到满耐久物品: {0}, StackCount={1}, 耐久: {2}/{3}", item4.DisplayName, item4.StackCount, item4.Durability, item4.MaxDurability));
										if (item4.Stackable && item4.StackCount > 0)
										{
											if (item4.StackCount <= remainingToRemove)
											{
												itemsToRemove.Add(item4);
												remainingToRemove -= item4.StackCount;
												removedCount += item4.StackCount;
												DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 📦 标记移除整堆（背包）: {0} x{1}", item4.DisplayName, item4.StackCount));
											}
											else
											{
												item4.StackCount -= remainingToRemove;
												removedCount += remainingToRemove;
												DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 📦 减少堆叠（背包）: {0}, 移除{1}, 剩余{2}", item4.DisplayName, remainingToRemove, item4.StackCount));
												remainingToRemove = 0;
											}
										}
										else if (!item4.Stackable)
										{
											itemsToRemove.Add(item4);
											remainingToRemove--;
											removedCount++;
											DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 🗑️ 标记移除非堆叠物品（背包）: " + item4.DisplayName);
										}
									}
									foreach (Item item5 in itemsToRemove)
									{
										if (item5.Stackable)
										{
											item5.StackCount = 0;
											DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 设置StackCount=0（背包）: " + item5.DisplayName);
										}
										else
										{
											item5.Detach();
											UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(item5.gameObject);
											DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ Detach+Destroy（背包）: " + item5.DisplayName);
										}
									}
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
				catch (Exception ex2)
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 从背包移除失败: " + ex2.Message + " " + ex2.StackTrace);
				}
			}
			try
			{
				ItemDisplayPatch.RefreshStorageCache();
				if (MarketInventoryDisplay != null)
				{
					int selectedPage = MarketInventoryDisplay.SelectedPage;
					MarketInventoryDisplay.SetPage(selectedPage);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ 物品栏已刷新（当前页: {0}）", selectedPage));
				}
			}
			catch (Exception ex3)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 刷新物品栏失败: " + ex3.Message);
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ 物品移除完成: 已移除 {0}/{1}", removedCount, quantityToRemove));
			if (remainingToRemove > 0)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 部分物品未找到: 还需移除 {0} 个", remainingToRemove));
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex4)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 移除物品失败: " + ex4.Message);
			throw;
		}
	}

	private void AddClickBlocker(GameObject panel)
	{
		try
		{
			Image component = panel.GetComponent<Image>();
			if (component != null)
			{
				component.raycastTarget = true;
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ Image组件已存在，raycastTarget={0}", component.raycastTarget));
			}
			else
			{
				component = panel.AddComponent<Image>();
				component.color = new Color(0f, 0f, 0f, 0f);
				component.raycastTarget = true;
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 添加了透明Image组件");
			}
			panel.AddComponent<ClickEventBlocker>();
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 已在根GameObject添加点击阻挡器");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 添加点击阻挡层失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void UpdatePurchasePanelContent(GameObject panel, Listing listing, Type stockShopViewType, object stockShopInstance)
	{
		try
		{
			Transform[] componentsInChildren = panel.GetComponentsInChildren<Transform>(includeInactive: true);
			foreach (Transform transform in componentsInChildren)
			{
				if (transform.name.Contains("Output") || transform.name.Contains("Result") || transform.name.Contains("Cost") || transform.name.Contains("Demand"))
				{
					transform.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				}
			}
			Transform transform2 = panel.transform.Find("Panel");
			if (transform2 != null)
			{
				Transform transform3 = transform2.Find("ItemDisplayCore");
				if (transform3 != null)
				{
					Transform transform4 = transform3.Find("ItemSlotsDisplay");
					if (transform4 != null)
					{
						transform4.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
						DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 已隐藏ItemSlotsDisplay（工作台改装提示）");
					}
				}
			}
			ItemDetailsDisplay componentInChildren = panel.GetComponentInChildren<ItemDetailsDisplay>(includeInactive: true);
			if (componentInChildren == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到ItemDetailsDisplay组件");
				return;
			}
			Type type = Type.GetType("ItemStatsSystem.ItemAssetsCollection, ItemStatsSystem");
			if (type == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到ItemAssetsCollection类型");
				return;
			}
			MethodInfo method = type.GetMethod("InstantiateSync", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
			if (method == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到InstantiateSync方法");
				return;
			}
			object obj = method.Invoke(null, new object[1] { listing.item_type_id });
			if (obj == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 无法创建Item实例: {0}", listing.item_type_id));
				return;
			}
			MethodInfo method2 = componentInChildren.GetType().GetMethod("Setup", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (method2 != null)
			{
				method2.Invoke(componentInChildren, new object[1] { obj });
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到Setup方法");
			}
			UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(obj as UnityEngine.Object);
			try
			{
				Transform transform5 = panel.transform.Find("Panel/ItemDisplayCore/Basics/IconContainer");
				if (transform5 != null)
				{
					Transform transform6 = transform5.Find("CountContainer");
					if (transform6 != null)
					{
						transform6.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
						RectTransform component = transform6.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
						if (component != null)
						{
							Vector2 sizeDelta = component.sizeDelta;
							component.sizeDelta = new Vector2(Mathf.Max(sizeDelta.x * 1.5f, 45f), Mathf.Max(sizeDelta.y * 1.5f, 30f));
						}
						TextMeshProUGUI componentInChildren2 = transform6.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
						if (componentInChildren2 != null)
						{
							float fontSize = componentInChildren2.fontSize;
							componentInChildren2.text = listing.quantity.ToString();
							componentInChildren2.fontSize = 24f;
							componentInChildren2.fontStyle = FontStyles.Bold;
							componentInChildren2.enableAutoSizing = false;
							RectTransform component2 = componentInChildren2.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
							if (component2 != null)
							{
								Vector2 sizeDelta2 = component2.sizeDelta;
								component2.sizeDelta = new Vector2(Mathf.Max(sizeDelta2.x * 1.5f, 45f), Mathf.Max(sizeDelta2.y * 1.5f, 30f));
							}
							componentInChildren2.ForceMeshUpdate(ignoreActiveState: true, forceTextReparsing: true);
							DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 💯 购买界面数量显示优化: {0}，字体: {1} -> {2}", listing.quantity, fontSize, componentInChildren2.fontSize));
						}
					}
				}
			}
			catch (Exception arg)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 修改图标数量失败: {0}", arg));
			}
			FieldInfo field = stockShopViewType.GetField("priceText", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field != null)
			{
				TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = field.GetValue(stockShopInstance) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				if (textMeshProUGUI != null)
				{
					TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren2 = panel.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
					foreach (TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI2 in componentsInChildren2)
					{
						if (textMeshProUGUI2.name == textMeshProUGUI.name || textMeshProUGUI2.gameObject.name.Contains("Price"))
						{
							textMeshProUGUI2.text = listing.price.ToString("n0");
							break;
						}
					}
				}
			}
			FieldInfo field2 = stockShopViewType.GetField("stockText", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field2 != null)
			{
				TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI3 = field2.GetValue(stockShopInstance) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				if (textMeshProUGUI3 != null)
				{
					TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren2 = panel.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
					foreach (TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI4 in componentsInChildren2)
					{
						if (textMeshProUGUI4.name == textMeshProUGUI3.name || textMeshProUGUI4.gameObject.name.Contains("Stock"))
						{
							textMeshProUGUI4.text = string.Format("{0}: {1}", LocalizationManager.GetText("purchase.stock_label"), listing.quantity);
							break;
						}
					}
				}
			}
			int selectedQuantity = 1;
			GameObject gameObject = null;
			DecomposeSlider decomposeSliderComponentRef = null;
			try
			{
				Transform transform7 = panel.transform.Find("Panel");
				if (transform7 != null)
				{
					Transform transform8 = transform7.Find("PurchaseCountSlider");
					if (transform8 != null)
					{
						gameObject = transform8.gameObject;
						decomposeSliderComponentRef = gameObject.GetComponent<DecomposeSlider>();
						if (decomposeSliderComponentRef != null)
						{
							decomposeSliderComponentRef.SetMinMax(1, listing.quantity);
							decomposeSliderComponentRef.Value = 1;
							DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ♻️ 复用现有滑块，更新范围: 1-{0}", listing.quantity));
						}
					}
				}
				if (gameObject == null)
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🆕 创建新的购买数量滑块");
					Type type2 = Type.GetType("Duckov.UI.ItemDecomposeView, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
					if (type2 != null)
					{
						PropertyInfo property = type2.GetProperty("Instance", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
						if (property != null)
						{
							object value = property.GetValue(null);
							if (value != null)
							{
								MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour = value as MonoBehaviour;
								if (monoBehaviour != null)
								{
									Transform transform9 = monoBehaviour.transform.Find("Content");
									if (transform9 != null)
									{
										Transform transform10 = transform9.Find("VertLayout");
										if (transform10 != null)
										{
											Transform transform11 = transform10.Find("Operation");
											if (transform11 != null)
											{
												Transform transform12 = transform11.Find("CountSlider");
												if (transform12 != null)
												{
													gameObject = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(transform12.gameObject);
													gameObject.name = "PurchaseCountSlider";
													if (transform7 != null)
													{
														int itemDisplayIndex = -1;
														int buttonContainerIndex = -1;
														for (int j = 0; j < transform7.childCount; j++)
														{
															Transform child = transform7.GetChild(j);
															if (child.name == "ItemDisplayCore")
															{
																itemDisplayIndex = j;
															}
															else if (child.name == "ButtonContainer")
															{
																buttonContainerIndex = j;
															}
														}
														gameObject.transform.SetParent(transform7, worldPositionStays: false);
														if (itemDisplayIndex >= 0 && buttonContainerIndex >= 0)
														{
															gameObject.transform.SetSiblingIndex(itemDisplayIndex + 1);
														}
														else
														{
															DuckMarket.Logger.Warning(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 找不到ItemDisplayCore或ButtonContainer，ItemDisplayCore索引:{0}, ButtonContainer索引:{1}", itemDisplayIndex, buttonContainerIndex));
														}
														RectTransform component3 = gameObject.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
														if (component3 != null)
														{
															if (gameObject.GetComponent<LayoutElement>() == null)
															{
																gameObject.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
															}
															VerticalLayoutGroup component4 = component3.GetComponent<VerticalLayoutGroup>();
															if (component4 != null)
															{
																component4.padding.top += 50;
															}
														}
														gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
														DecomposeSlider component5 = gameObject.GetComponent<DecomposeSlider>();
														if (component5 != null)
														{
															decomposeSliderComponentRef = component5;
															component5.SetMinMax(1, listing.quantity);
															component5.Value = 1;
															if (gameObject.transform.Find("PurchaseTitle") == null)
															{
																GameObject obj2 = new GameObject("PurchaseTitle");
																obj2.transform.SetParent(gameObject.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
																RectTransform rectTransform = obj2.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
																rectTransform.anchorMin = new Vector2(0f, 1f);
																rectTransform.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 1f);
																rectTransform.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1f);
																rectTransform.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(0f, 10f);
																rectTransform.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0f, 40f);
																obj2.transform.SetAsFirstSibling();
																TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI5 = obj2.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
																textMeshProUGUI5.text = LocalizationStrings.GetBuyQuantityTitle();
																textMeshProUGUI5.fontSize = 24f;
																textMeshProUGUI5.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
																textMeshProUGUI5.color = Color.white;
																TextMeshProUGUI componentInChildren3 = gameObject.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
																if (componentInChildren3 != null && componentInChildren3.font != null)
																{
																	textMeshProUGUI5.font = componentInChildren3.font;
																}
															}
															DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ 滑块初始化成功: 范围 1-{0}, 当前值 {1}", listing.quantity, component5.Value));
														}
														else
														{
															DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ DecomposeSlider组件为null");
														}
													}
													else
													{
														DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到Panel对象");
														UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(gameObject);
														gameObject = null;
													}
												}
												else
												{
													DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到CountSlider: Operation/CountSlider");
												}
											}
											else
											{
												DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到Operation: VertLayout/Operation");
											}
										}
										else
										{
											DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到VertLayout: Content/VertLayout");
										}
									}
									else
									{
										DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到Content");
									}
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
				if (decomposeSliderComponentRef != null)
				{
					decomposeSliderComponentRef.OnValueChangedEvent += delegate(float sliderValue)
					{
						selectedQuantity = (int)sliderValue;
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 滑块值变化: {0}, 单价: {1} ({2})", selectedQuantity, listing.price, listing.item_name));
						UpdatePurchaseButtonState(panel, (int)listing.price, selectedQuantity);
					};
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ 订阅滑块事件: {0}, 单价: {1}", listing.item_name, listing.price));
					UpdatePurchaseButtonState(panel, (int)listing.price, 1);
				}
			}
			catch (Exception arg2)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 复制CountSlider失败: {0}", arg2));
				if (gameObject != null)
				{
					UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(gameObject);
					gameObject = null;
				}
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 滑块创建失败，购买时将使用默认数量1");
			}
			Button componentInChildren4 = panel.GetComponentInChildren<Button>(includeInactive: true);
			if (!(componentInChildren4 != null))
			{
				return;
			}
			Transform transform13 = componentInChildren4.transform.Find("BG");
			if (transform13 != null)
			{
				Transform transform14 = transform13.Find("Line1/Text (TMP)");
				if (transform14 != null)
				{
					TextMeshProUGUI component6 = transform14.GetComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
					if (component6 != null)
					{
						component6.text = LocalizationStrings.GetConfirmBuyLabel();
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 设置购买按钮主文字: " + component6.text);
					}
				}
				else
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 未找到购买按钮的BG/Line1/Text (TMP)");
				}
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 未找到购买按钮的BG对象");
			}
			componentInChildren4.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
			componentInChildren4.onClick.AddListener(delegate
			{
				int selectedPurchaseQuantity = 1;
				if (decomposeSliderComponentRef != null)
				{
					selectedPurchaseQuantity = decomposeSliderComponentRef.Value;
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 购买按钮点击 - 从滑块读取数量: {0}", selectedPurchaseQuantity));
				}
				else
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Warning(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 滑块组件为null，使用默认数量: {0}", selectedPurchaseQuantity));
				}
				try
				{
					Type type3 = Type.GetType("Duckov.StrongNotification, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
					if (type3 != null)
					{
						PropertyInfo property2 = type3.GetProperty("Instance", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
						if (property2 != null)
						{
							object value2 = property2.GetValue(null);
							if (value2 != null)
							{
								FieldInfo field3 = type3.GetField("confirmed", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
								if (field3 != null)
								{
									field3.SetValue(value2, true);
									DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 已关闭购买详情界面（设置confirmed=true）");
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
				catch (Exception arg4)
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 关闭购买详情界面失败: {0}", arg4));
				}
				ExecutePurchaseAsync(listing, selectedPurchaseQuantity).Forget();
			});
			if (transform13 != null)
			{
				Transform transform15 = transform13.Find("Line1/Lock");
				if (transform15 != null)
				{
					transform15.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 隐藏购买按钮Lock图标");
				}
				Transform transform16 = transform13.Find("Line1/CannotBeSoldIndicator");
				if (transform16 != null)
				{
					transform16.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 隐藏购买按钮CannotBeSoldIndicator");
				}
				Transform transform17 = transform13.Find("Line2/CashIndicator");
				if (transform17 != null)
				{
					transform17.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 隐藏购买按钮CashIndicator");
				}
				Transform transform18 = transform13.Find("Line1/InputIndicator");
				if (transform18 != null)
				{
					transform18.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 隐藏购买按钮快捷键提示");
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg3)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 自定义ItemDetails面板失败: {0}", arg3));
		}
	}

	private void UpdatePurchaseButtonState(GameObject panel, long unitPrice, int quantity)
	{
		try
		{
			long totalPrice = unitPrice * quantity;
			bool canAffordPurchase = EconomyManager.Money >= totalPrice;
			bool hasUpdatedPriceText = false;
			Transform buttonContainer = panel.transform.Find("Panel/ButtonContainer");
			if (buttonContainer != null)
			{
				Transform buttonTransform = buttonContainer.Find("Button");
				if (buttonTransform != null)
				{
					Transform buttonBackground = buttonTransform.Find("BG");
					if (buttonBackground != null)
					{
						Transform line2 = buttonBackground.Find("Line2");
						if (line2 != null)
						{
							TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren = line2.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
							foreach (TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI in componentsInChildren)
							{
								if (Regex.IsMatch(textMeshProUGUI.text, "[\\d,]+"))
								{
									textMeshProUGUI.text = totalPrice.ToString("n0");
									textMeshProUGUI.color = canAffordPurchase ? Color.white : new Color(0.6f, 0.6f, 0.6f);
									hasUpdatedPriceText = true;
									break;
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			if (!hasUpdatedPriceText)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 未找到价格文本");
			}
			Button[] componentsInChildren2 = panel.GetComponentsInChildren<Button>(includeInactive: true);
			if (componentsInChildren2.Length == 0)
			{
				return;
			}
			Button button = componentsInChildren2[0];
			button.interactable = canAffordPurchase;
			Image[] componentsInChildren3 = button.GetComponentsInChildren<Image>(includeInactive: true);
			foreach (Image image in componentsInChildren3)
			{
				if (image.gameObject.name == "Graphics" || image.gameObject.name == "Interactable" || image.gameObject.name == "BG" || image.gameObject == button.gameObject)
				{
					if (!canAffordPurchase)
					{
						image.color = new Color(0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f, 1f);
					}
					else
					{
						image.color = new Color(0.335f, 0.764f, 0.419f, 1f);
					}
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 更新按钮状态失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}
}


```

`duckmarket_core/FleaMarket.UI/DuckMarketView_NoteClone.SupplyFlow.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using System.Reflection;
using System.Text;

using Cysharp.Threading.Tasks;
using DuckMarket;
using DuckMarket.Core;
using DuckMarket.Models;
using DuckMarket.Network;

using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;

using UnityEngine.UI;

namespace FleaMarket.UI;

public partial class DuckMarketView_NoteClone
{
	private async UniTaskVoid LoadPurchaseOrdersAsync()
	{
		try
		{
			int skip = _currentPage * 10;
			string searchQuery = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_currentSearchText) ? null : _currentSearchText;
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 📝 加载求购订单数据... (page: {0}, search: '{1}', myOrdersOnly: {2})", _currentPage, searchQuery, _isMyListingsMode));
			var (list, totalCount) = await ApiClient.GetPurchaseOrdersAsync(searchQuery, _filterItemTypeId, null, _isMyListingsMode, skip);
			if (list != null)
			{
				_purchaseOrders = list;
				_totalItems = totalCount;
				_totalPages = (int)Math.Ceiling((double)totalCount / 10.0);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ 加载了 {0} 个求购订单 (总共: {1}, 页码: {2}/{3})", _purchaseOrders.Count, totalCount, _currentPage + 1, _totalPages));
				UpdatePaginationButtons();
				RefreshPurchaseOrderEntries();
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 加载求购订单失败");
				_purchaseOrders.Clear();
				_totalItems = 0;
				_totalPages = 0;
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 加载求购订单异常: {0}", arg));
			_purchaseOrders.Clear();
			_totalItems = 0;
			_totalPages = 0;
		}
		finally
		{
		}
	}

	public void RefreshPurchaseOrders()
	{
		if (_isPurchaseOrderMode)
		{
			LoadPurchaseOrdersAsync().Forget();
		}
	}

	public void UpdatePurchaseOrders(List<PurchaseOrder> newOrders, int total, int? itemTypeId = null, string itemName = null)
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] UpdatePurchaseOrders: {0} orders (当前页), total={1}, itemTypeId={2}, itemName={3}", newOrders.Count, total, itemTypeId, itemName));
			_filterItemTypeId = itemTypeId;
			_filterItemName = itemName;
			_purchaseOrders.Clear();
			_purchaseOrders.AddRange(newOrders);
			_totalItems = total;
			_totalPages = (int)Math.Ceiling((double)total / 10.0);
			_currentPage = 0;
			UpdatePaginationButtons();
			RefreshPurchaseOrderEntries();
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ PurchaseOrders已更新 (总共: {0}, 页码: {1}/{2})", total, _currentPage + 1, _totalPages));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ UpdatePurchaseOrders失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void RefreshPurchaseOrderEntries()
	{
		try
		{
			ClearAllEntries();
			_modItemEntries.Clear();
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 已清空MOD商品标记");
			if (_purchaseOrders.Count == 0)
			{
				if (_noEntryIndicator != null)
				{
					_noEntryIndicator.SetActive(value: true);
					if (_filterItemTypeId.HasValue && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(_filterItemName))
					{
						UpdateNoEntryIndicatorText(_filterItemName);
					}
					else
					{
						UpdateNoEntryIndicatorText();
					}
				}
			}
			else
			{
				if (_noEntryIndicator != null)
				{
					_noEntryIndicator.SetActive(value: false);
				}
				RefreshPurchaseOrderEntriesAsync().Forget();
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ RefreshPurchaseOrderEntries失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private async UniTaskVoid RefreshPurchaseOrderEntriesAsync()
	{
		try
		{
			for (int i = 0; i < _purchaseOrders.Count; i++)
			{
				PurchaseOrder order = _purchaseOrders[i];
				NoteIndexView_Entry noteIndexView_Entry = _entryPool.Get();
				SetupPurchaseOrderEntry(noteIndexView_Entry, order, i + 1);
				_activeEntries.Add(noteIndexView_Entry);
				if ((i + 1) % 3 == 0)
				{
					await UniTask.Yield();
				}
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ 创建了 {0} 个求购订单Entry", _activeEntries.Count));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 异步加载求购订单Entry失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void SetupPurchaseOrderEntry(NoteIndexView_Entry entry, PurchaseOrder order, int index)
	{
		try
		{
			_entryPurchaseOrders[entry] = order;
			Type typeFromHandle = typeof(NoteIndexView_Entry);
			BindingFlags bindingAttr = BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic;
			string itemDisplayName = GetItemDisplayName(order.ItemTypeId, order.ItemName);
			FieldInfo field = typeFromHandle.GetField("titleText", bindingAttr);
			if (field != null)
			{
				TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = field.GetValue(entry) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				if (textMeshProUGUI != null)
				{
					textMeshProUGUI.text = itemDisplayName;
					int length = itemDisplayName.Length;
					if (length <= 10)
					{
						textMeshProUGUI.fontSize = 32f;
					}
					else if (length <= 15)
					{
						textMeshProUGUI.fontSize = 28f;
					}
					else if (length <= 20)
					{
						textMeshProUGUI.fontSize = 24f;
					}
					else
					{
						textMeshProUGUI.fontSize = 20f;
					}
					textMeshProUGUI.enableWordWrapping = false;
					textMeshProUGUI.overflowMode = TextOverflowModes.Ellipsis;
				}
			}
			FieldInfo field2 = typeFromHandle.GetField("indexText", bindingAttr);
			if (field2 != null)
			{
				TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI2 = field2.GetValue(entry) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				if (textMeshProUGUI2 != null)
				{
					textMeshProUGUI2.text = "";
					textMeshProUGUI2.enabled = false;
				}
			}
			FieldInfo field3 = typeFromHandle.GetField("highlightIndicator", bindingAttr);
			if (field3 != null)
			{
				GameObject gameObject = field3.GetValue(entry) as GameObject;
				if (gameObject != null)
				{
					gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				}
			}
			FieldInfo field4 = typeFromHandle.GetField("notReadIndicator", bindingAttr);
			if (field4 != null)
			{
				GameObject gameObject2 = field4.GetValue(entry) as GameObject;
				if (gameObject2 != null)
				{
					gameObject2.SetActive(value: false);
				}
			}
			Note value = new Note
			{
				key = string.Format("purchase_order_{0}", order.OrderId)
			};
			FieldInfo field5 = typeFromHandle.GetField("note", bindingAttr);
			if (field5 != null)
			{
				field5.SetValue(entry, value);
			}
			FieldInfo field6 = typeFromHandle.GetField("onClicked", bindingAttr);
			if (field6 != null)
			{
				Action<NoteIndexView_Entry> value2 = delegate(NoteIndexView_Entry clickedEntry)
				{
					OnPurchaseOrderEntryClicked(clickedEntry);
				};
				field6.SetValue(entry, value2);
			}
			if (entry.gameObject != null)
			{
				entry.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
				Graphic[] componentsInChildren = entry.GetComponentsInChildren<Graphic>();
				for (int graphicIndex = 0; graphicIndex < componentsInChildren.Length; graphicIndex++)
				{
					componentsInChildren[graphicIndex].raycastTarget = true;
				}
			}
			AdjustEntryHeight(entry);
			RectTransform component = entry.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			float offsetX = Mathf.Clamp(((component != null) ? component.rect.height : 160f) - 40f, 80f, 120f) + 32f;
			AdjustEntryTextPosition(entry, offsetX);
			AddItemDisplayToPurchaseOrderEntryAsync(entry, order, index).Forget();
			AddPurchaseOrderMoneyDisplay(entry, order);
			AddPurchaseOrderExpirationTime(entry, order);
			AddBuyerNameToEntry(entry, order);
			AddSupplyButtonToEntry(entry, order);
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ SetupPurchaseOrderEntry失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private async UniTaskVoid AddItemDisplayToPurchaseOrderEntryAsync(NoteIndexView_Entry entry, PurchaseOrder order, int index)
	{

		try
		{
			if (_itemDisplayPool == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ ItemDisplay对象池未初始化，跳过物品格子显示");
				return;
			}
			ItemDisplay itemDisplay = _itemDisplayPool.Get(entry.transform);
			if (itemDisplay == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 无法从对象池获取ItemDisplay");
				return;
			}
			_entryItemDisplays[entry] = itemDisplay;
			RectTransform component = itemDisplay.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (component != null)
			{
				component.anchorMin = new Vector2(0f, 0.5f);
				component.anchorMax = new Vector2(0f, 0.5f);
				component.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 0.5f);
				RectTransform entryRectTransform = entry.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
				float iconSize = Mathf.Clamp(((entryRectTransform != null) ? entryRectTransform.rect.height : 160f) - 50f, 70f, 100f);
				component.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(iconSize / 2f + 16f, 0f);
				component.sizeDelta = new Vector2(iconSize, iconSize);
			}
			Item item = null;
			try
			{
				item = await ItemAssetsCollection.InstantiateAsync(order.ItemTypeId);
				if (item != null)
				{
					try
					{
						MethodInfo method = typeof(Item).GetMethod("SetInt", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public, null, new Type[3]
						{
							typeof(string),
							typeof(int),
							typeof(bool)
						}, null);
						if (method != null)
						{
							method.Invoke(item, new object[3]
							{
								"Count",
								order.RemainingQuantity,
								true
							});
						}
						else
						{
							item.SetInt("Count", order.RemainingQuantity);
						}
					}
					catch
					{
					}
				}
			}
			catch (Exception ex)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 无法创建Item (ItemTypeId={0}): {1}", order.ItemTypeId, ex.Message));
			}
			if (item == null)
			{
				_modItemEntries.Add(entry);
				try
				{
					item = await ItemAssetsCollection.InstantiateAsync(174);
					if (item != null)
					{
						MethodInfo method2 = typeof(Item).GetMethod("SetInt", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public, null, new Type[3]
						{
							typeof(string),
							typeof(int),
							typeof(bool)
						}, null);
						if (method2 != null)
						{
							method2.Invoke(item, new object[3]
							{
								"Count",
								order.RemainingQuantity,
								true
							});
						}
					}
				}
				catch
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 无法创建占位物品 (ID:174)");
					return;
				}
			}
			PreDisableItemDisplayName(itemDisplay);
			itemDisplay.Setup(item);
			HideItemDisplayNameText(itemDisplay);
			int playerInventoryCount = GetPlayerInventoryCount(order.ItemTypeId);
			ShowItemDisplayInventoryCount(itemDisplay, playerInventoryCount);
			itemDisplay.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ AddItemDisplayToPurchaseOrderEntryAsync失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void AddPurchaseOrderMoneyDisplay(NoteIndexView_Entry entry, PurchaseOrder order)
	{
		try
		{
			if (_entryCostDisplays.TryGetValue(entry, out GameObject value))
			{
				if (value != null)
				{
					UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(value);
				}
				_entryCostDisplays.Remove(entry);
			}
			Type typeFromHandle = typeof(NoteIndexView_Entry);
			BindingFlags bindingAttr = BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic;
			FieldInfo field = typeFromHandle.GetField("titleText", bindingAttr);
			if (field == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = field.GetValue(entry) as TextMeshProUGUI;
			if (textMeshProUGUI == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			RectTransform component = textMeshProUGUI.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (component == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			RectTransform rectTransform = component.parent as RectTransform;
			if (rectTransform == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			if (_costDisplayPrefab == null)
			{
				CostDisplay[] array = UnityEngine.Object.FindObjectsOfType<CostDisplay>(includeInactive: true);
				if (array == null || array.Length == 0)
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 找不到CostDisplay，无法添加钱币显示");
					return;
				}
				_costDisplayPrefab = array[0].gameObject;
			}
			GameObject gameObject = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(_costDisplayPrefab, rectTransform, worldPositionStays: false);
			gameObject.name = "CostDisplay_PurchasePrice";
			CostDisplay component2 = gameObject.GetComponent<CostDisplay>();
			if (component2 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ 克隆的CostDisplay没有CostDisplay组件");
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(gameObject);
				return;
			}
			RectTransform component3 = gameObject.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (component3 != null)
			{
				component3.anchorMin = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
				component3.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
				component3.pivot = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
				component3.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(-370f, 0f);
				component3.sizeDelta = new Vector2(180f, 100f);
			}
			Cost cost = new Cost
			{
				money = (int)order.PricePerUnit,
				items = null
			};
			component2.Setup(cost);
			FieldInfo field2 = component2.GetType().GetField("money", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field2 != null)
			{
				TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI2 = field2.GetValue(component2) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				if (textMeshProUGUI2 != null)
				{
					textMeshProUGUI2.fontSize = 28f;
					textMeshProUGUI2.enableAutoSizing = false;
					textMeshProUGUI2.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.BottomRight;
					textMeshProUGUI2.overflowMode = TextOverflowModes.Truncate;
				}
			}
			FieldInfo field3 = component2.GetType().GetField("moneyBackground", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field3 != null)
			{
				Image image = field3.GetValue(component2) as Image;
				if (image != null)
				{
					image.color = new Color(0f, 0f, 0f, 0f);
				}
			}
			FieldInfo field4 = component2.GetType().GetField("background", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field4 != null)
			{
				Image image2 = field4.GetValue(component2) as Image;
				if (image2 != null)
				{
					image2.color = new Color(0f, 0f, 0f, 0f);
				}
			}
			if (gameObject.transform.Find("PriceLabel") == null)
			{
				GameObject obj = new GameObject("PriceLabel");
				obj.transform.SetParent(gameObject.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
				TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI3 = obj.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
				textMeshProUGUI3.text = LocalizationStrings.GetPerItemLabel();
				textMeshProUGUI3.fontSize = 12f;
				textMeshProUGUI3.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
				textMeshProUGUI3.color = new Color(0.6f, 0.6f, 0.6f, 0.8f);
				RectTransform component4 = obj.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
				component4.anchorMin = new Vector2(0.5f, 0f);
				component4.anchorMax = new Vector2(0.5f, 0f);
				component4.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1f);
				component4.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(0f, -25f);
				component4.sizeDelta = new Vector2(80f, 16f);
				obj.SetActive(value: true);
			}
			RectTransform component5 = entry.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (!(component5 == null))
			{
				GameObject gameObject2 = new GameObject("DemandQuantity");
				gameObject2.transform.SetParent(component5, worldPositionStays: false);
				RectTransform rectTransform2 = gameObject2.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
				rectTransform2.anchorMin = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
				rectTransform2.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
				rectTransform2.pivot = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
				rectTransform2.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(-620f, 0f);
				rectTransform2.sizeDelta = new Vector2(120f, 40f);
				TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI4 = gameObject2.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
				int remainingDemand = order.Quantity - order.FulfilledQuantity;
				string demandLabel = LocalizationStrings.GetDemandLabel();
				textMeshProUGUI4.text = string.Format("{0}：<size=26><b>{1}</b></size>", demandLabel, remainingDemand);
				textMeshProUGUI4.fontSize = 20f;
				textMeshProUGUI4.fontStyle = FontStyles.Normal;
				textMeshProUGUI4.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
				textMeshProUGUI4.richText = true;
				if (order.FulfilledQuantity >= order.Quantity)
				{
					string fulfilledLabel = LocalizationStrings.GetFulfilledLabel();
					textMeshProUGUI4.text = demandLabel + "：<color=#4FFF4F><b>" + fulfilledLabel + "</b></color>";
					textMeshProUGUI4.color = new Color(0.6f, 1f, 0.6f, 1f);
				}
				else
				{
					textMeshProUGUI4.color = new Color(1f, 1f, 1f, 0.9f);
					textMeshProUGUI4.text = string.Format("{0}：<size=26><b>{1}</b></size>", demandLabel, remainingDemand);
				}
				_entryDemandQuantities[entry] = gameObject2;
				_entryCostDisplays[entry] = gameObject;
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ AddPurchaseOrderMoneyDisplay失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void AddPurchaseOrderExpirationTime(NoteIndexView_Entry entry, PurchaseOrder order)
	{
		try
		{
			RectTransform component = entry.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (component == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			GameObject gameObject = new GameObject("ExpirationTime");
			gameObject.transform.SetParent(component, worldPositionStays: false);
			RectTransform rectTransform = gameObject.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
			rectTransform.anchorMin = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
			rectTransform.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
			rectTransform.pivot = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
			rectTransform.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(-240f, 0f);
			rectTransform.sizeDelta = new Vector2(100f, 80f);
			TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = gameObject.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
			textMeshProUGUI.fontSize = 26f;
			textMeshProUGUI.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
			int remainingSeconds = order.RemainingSeconds;
			if (remainingSeconds > 0)
			{
				textMeshProUGUI.color = new Color(1f, 0.8f, 0.2f, 1f);
				if (remainingSeconds >= 3600)
				{
					int hours = remainingSeconds / 3600;
					int minutes = remainingSeconds % 3600 / 60;
					textMeshProUGUI.text = string.Format("{0}h {1}m", hours, minutes);
				}
				else if (remainingSeconds >= 60)
				{
					int minutes = remainingSeconds / 60;
					int seconds = remainingSeconds % 60;
					textMeshProUGUI.text = string.Format("{0}m {1}s", minutes, seconds);
				}
				else
				{
					textMeshProUGUI.text = string.Format("{0}s", remainingSeconds);
				}
			}
			else
			{
				textMeshProUGUI.text = LocalizationStrings.GetExpiredOrderLabel();
				textMeshProUGUI.color = new Color(1f, 0.3f, 0.3f, 1f);
			}
			_entryExpirationTimes[entry] = gameObject;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ AddPurchaseOrderExpirationTime失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void AddBuyerNameToEntry(NoteIndexView_Entry entry, PurchaseOrder order)
	{
		try
		{
			if (order == null || string.IsNullOrEmpty(order.BuyerName))
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ PurchaseOrder或BuyerName为null，跳过买家昵称显示");
				return;
			}
			Type typeFromHandle = typeof(NoteIndexView_Entry);
			BindingFlags bindingAttr = BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic;
			FieldInfo field = typeFromHandle.GetField("titleText", bindingAttr);
			if (field == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = field.GetValue(entry) as TextMeshProUGUI;
			if (!(textMeshProUGUI == null))
			{
				RectTransform component = textMeshProUGUI.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
				if (!(component == null))
				{
					GameObject gameObject = new GameObject("BuyerName");
					gameObject.transform.SetParent(component.parent, worldPositionStays: false);
					RectTransform rectTransform = gameObject.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
					rectTransform.anchorMin = new Vector2(0f, 0.5f);
					rectTransform.anchorMax = new Vector2(0f, 0.5f);
					rectTransform.pivot = new Vector2(0f, 1f);
					rectTransform.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(172f, -10f);
					rectTransform.sizeDelta = new Vector2(300f, 20f);
					TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI2 = gameObject.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
					string buyerLabel = LocalizationStrings.GetBuyerLabel();
					textMeshProUGUI2.text = buyerLabel + ": " + order.BuyerName;
					textMeshProUGUI2.fontSize = 16f;
					textMeshProUGUI2.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.TopLeft;
					textMeshProUGUI2.color = ((ApiClient.CurrentUserId.HasValue && order.UserId == ApiClient.CurrentUserId.Value) ? new Color(0.3f, 0.6f, 1f, 1f) : new Color(0.7f, 0.7f, 0.7f, 1f));
					_entrySellerNames[entry] = gameObject;
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ AddBuyerNameToEntry失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void AddSupplyButtonToEntry(NoteIndexView_Entry entry, PurchaseOrder order)
	{
		try
		{
			if (_entryDealButtons.TryGetValue(entry, out Button value))
			{
				if (value != null)
				{
					UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(value.gameObject);
				}
				_entryDealButtons.Remove(entry);
			}
			if (_dealButtonPrefab == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket]   - ⚠️ dealButton prefab未初始化，跳过供货按钮");
				return;
			}
			RectTransform component = entry.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (component == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			Button button = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(_dealButtonPrefab, component, worldPositionStays: false);
			button.gameObject.name = "SupplyButton";
			button.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
			Component[] localizorComponents = (from c in button.GetComponentsInChildren<Component>(includeInactive: true)
				where c.GetType().Name == "TextLocalizor"
				select c).ToArray();
			for (int componentIndex = 0; componentIndex < localizorComponents.Length; componentIndex++)
			{
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(localizorComponents[componentIndex]);
			}
			bool isCurrentUserOrder = ApiClient.CurrentUserId.HasValue && order.UserId == ApiClient.CurrentUserId.Value;
			bool isModItemEntry = _modItemEntries.Contains(entry);
			int fullDurabilityItemCount = GetFullDurabilityItemCount(order.ItemTypeId);
			bool hasFullDurabilityStock = fullDurabilityItemCount > 0;
			TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren = button.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
			foreach (TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI in componentsInChildren)
			{
				if (isModItemEntry)
				{
					textMeshProUGUI.text = LocalizationManager.GetText("market.mod_item", "MOD 商品");
				}
				else if (isCurrentUserOrder)
				{
					textMeshProUGUI.text = LocalizationStrings.GetCancelOrderButtonLabel();
				}
				else if (!hasFullDurabilityStock)
				{
					textMeshProUGUI.text = LocalizationStrings.GetNoStockButtonLabel();
				}
				else
				{
					textMeshProUGUI.text = LocalizationStrings.GetSupplyButtonLabel();
				}
			}
			RectTransform component2 = button.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
			if (component2 != null)
			{
				component2.anchorMin = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
				component2.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
				component2.pivot = new Vector2(1f, 0.5f);
				component2.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(-15f, 0f);
				component2.sizeDelta = new Vector2(160f, 90f);
			}
			CostDisplay componentInChildren = button.GetComponentInChildren<CostDisplay>(includeInactive: true);
			if (componentInChildren != null)
			{
				componentInChildren.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Concat(str1: (button.interactable = isCurrentUserOrder || (!isModItemEntry && order.CanFulfill && hasFullDurabilityStock)) ? "✅可点击" : "❌禁用", str0: "[DuckMarket] 🔍 供货按钮状态: "));
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - isModItem: {0}", isModItemEntry));
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - order.CanFulfill: {0}", order.CanFulfill));
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - isOwnOrder: {0} (UserId: {1}, CurrentUserId: {2})", isCurrentUserOrder, order.UserId, ApiClient.CurrentUserId));
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - hasInventory: {0} (库存数量: {1})", hasFullDurabilityStock, fullDurabilityItemCount));
			Image[] componentsInChildren2 = button.GetComponentsInChildren<Image>(includeInactive: true);
			foreach (Image image in componentsInChildren2)
			{
				if (isModItemEntry)
				{
					if (image.gameObject.name == "Graphics" || image.gameObject.name == "Interactable")
					{
						image.color = new Color(0.4f, 0.4f, 0.4f, 1f);
					}
				}
				else if (isCurrentUserOrder)
				{
					if (image.gameObject.name == "Graphics" || image.gameObject.name == "Interactable")
					{
						image.color = new Color(0.2f, 0.5f, 1f, 1f);
					}
				}
				else if (!hasFullDurabilityStock)
				{
					if (image.gameObject.name == "Graphics" || image.gameObject.name == "Interactable")
					{
						image.color = new Color(0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f, 1f);
					}
				}
				else if (!order.CanFulfill)
				{
					if (image.gameObject.name == "Graphics" || image.gameObject.name == "Interactable")
					{
						image.color = new Color(0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f, 1f);
					}
				}
				else if (image.gameObject.name == "Graphics" || image.gameObject.name == "Interactable")
				{
					image.color = new Color(0.2f, 0.8f, 0.3f, 1f);
				}
				if (image.gameObject.name == "Icon" || image.gameObject.name == "Image")
				{
					RectTransform component3 = image.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
					if (component3 != null)
					{
						component3.localEulerAngles = new Vector3(0f, 0f, 90f);
					}
				}
			}
			if (isCurrentUserOrder)
			{
				button.onClick.AddListener(delegate
				{
					OnCancelPurchaseOrderClicked(order);
				});
			}
			else
			{
				button.onClick.AddListener(delegate
				{
					OnSupplyButtonClicked(order);
				});
			}
			_entryDealButtons[entry] = button;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ AddSupplyButtonToEntry失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void OnSupplyButtonClicked(PurchaseOrder order)
	{
		try
		{
			string itemDisplayName = GetItemDisplayName(order.ItemTypeId, order.ItemName);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🚚 供货按钮被点击: {0} (OrderId: {1})", itemDisplayName, order.OrderId));
			if (order.IsMine(ApiClient.CurrentUserId.GetValueOrDefault()))
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 这是你的求购订单，显示取消选项");
				return;
			}
			if (!order.CanFulfill)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 订单状态: {0}，剩余数量: {1}，剩余时间: {2}秒", order.Status, order.RemainingQuantity, order.RemainingSeconds));
				NotificationStyleCustomizer.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetOrderCannotFulfillNotification(), NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Warning);
				return;
			}
			int fullDurabilityItemCount = GetFullDurabilityItemCount(order.ItemTypeId);
			if (fullDurabilityItemCount <= 0)
			{
				string itemDisplayName2 = GetItemDisplayName(order.ItemTypeId, order.ItemName);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 玩家没有满耐久的 " + itemDisplayName2 + "，无法供货");
				NotificationStyleCustomizer.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetNoFullDurabilityItemNotification(itemDisplayName2), NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Error);
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🚚 显示供货界面，玩家拥有满耐久: {0}个，剩余需求: {1}个", fullDurabilityItemCount, order.RemainingQuantity));
				ShowSupplyQuantitySelector(order).Forget();
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ OnSupplyButtonClicked失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private int GetPlayerInventoryCount(int itemTypeId)
	{
		try
		{
			Inventory inventory = PlayerStorage.Inventory;
			if (inventory == null || inventory.Content == null)
			{
				return 0;
			}
			int inventoryCount = 0;
			foreach (Item item in inventory.Content)
			{
				if (item != null && item.TypeID == itemTypeId)
				{
					inventoryCount += item.StackCount;
				}
			}
			return inventoryCount;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
```
