			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ GetPlayerInventoryCount失败: {0}", arg));
			return 0;
		}
	}

	private void ShowItemDisplayInventoryCount(ItemDisplay itemDisplay, int count)
	{
		try
		{
			if (itemDisplay == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			Type typeFromHandle = typeof(ItemDisplay);
			BindingFlags bindingAttr = BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic;
			FieldInfo field = typeFromHandle.GetField("countGameObject", bindingAttr);
			GameObject gameObject = null;
			if (field != null)
			{
				gameObject = field.GetValue(itemDisplay) as GameObject;
				if (gameObject != null)
				{
					gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
					RectTransform component = gameObject.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
					if (component != null)
					{
						Vector2 sizeDelta = component.sizeDelta;
						component.sizeDelta = new Vector2(Mathf.Max(sizeDelta.x * 1.5f, 45f), Mathf.Max(sizeDelta.y * 1.5f, 30f));
					}
				}
			}
			FieldInfo field2 = typeFromHandle.GetField("countText", bindingAttr);
			if (!(field2 != null))
			{
				return;
			}
			TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = field2.GetValue(itemDisplay) as TextMeshProUGUI;
			if (textMeshProUGUI != null)
			{
				textMeshProUGUI.text = count.ToString();
				if (count == 0)
				{
					textMeshProUGUI.color = new Color(0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f, 1f);
				}
				else
				{
					textMeshProUGUI.color = new Color(1f, 0.84f, 0f, 1f);
				}
				textMeshProUGUI.fontSize = 24f;
				textMeshProUGUI.fontStyle = FontStyles.Bold;
				textMeshProUGUI.enableAutoSizing = false;
				RectTransform component2 = textMeshProUGUI.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
				if (component2 != null)
				{
					Vector2 sizeDelta2 = component2.sizeDelta;
					component2.sizeDelta = new Vector2(Mathf.Max(sizeDelta2.x * 1.5f, 45f), Mathf.Max(sizeDelta2.y * 1.5f, 30f));
				}
				textMeshProUGUI.ForceMeshUpdate(ignoreActiveState: true, forceTextReparsing: true);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ ShowItemDisplayInventoryCount失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void RefreshAllPurchaseOrderEntriesInventoryCount(int itemTypeId)
	{
		try
		{
			int fullDurabilityItemCount = GetFullDurabilityItemCount(itemTypeId);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🔄 刷新物品库存数量显示: ItemTypeId={0}, 满耐久库存={1}", itemTypeId, fullDurabilityItemCount));
			int refreshedEntryCount = 0;
			foreach (NoteIndexView_Entry activeEntry in _activeEntries)
			{
				if (_entryPurchaseOrders.TryGetValue(activeEntry, out PurchaseOrder value) && value.ItemTypeId == itemTypeId)
				{
					ItemDisplay componentInChildren = activeEntry.GetComponentInChildren<ItemDisplay>();
					if (componentInChildren != null)
					{
						ShowItemDisplayInventoryCount(componentInChildren, fullDurabilityItemCount);
						refreshedEntryCount++;
					}
				}
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ 已刷新 {0} 个Entry的库存数量显示", refreshedEntryCount));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ RefreshAllPurchaseOrderEntriesInventoryCount失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void OnPurchaseOrderEntryClicked(NoteIndexView_Entry entry)
	{
		try
		{
			if (_entryPurchaseOrders.TryGetValue(entry, out PurchaseOrder value))
			{
				string itemDisplayName = GetItemDisplayName(value.ItemTypeId, value.ItemName);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 点击求购订单列表项: {0} (ID: {1})", itemDisplayName, value.OrderId));
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ OnPurchaseOrderEntryClicked失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private async UniTask ShowSupplyQuantitySelector(PurchaseOrder order)
	{
		try
		{
			string itemDisplayName = GetItemDisplayName(order.ItemTypeId, order.ItemName);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🔘 显示供货数量选择器: {0} (剩余需求: {1})", itemDisplayName, order.RemainingQuantity));
			if (_currentPurchasePanel != null)
			{
				UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(_currentPurchasePanel);
				_currentPurchasePanel = null;
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🧹 已销毁旧的供货详情面板");
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 📦 创建新的供货详情面板...");
			_currentPurchasePanel = CreateDedicatedPurchasePanel();
			if (_currentPurchasePanel == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 无法创建供货详情面板");
				return;
			}
			Type type = Type.GetType("Duckov.StrongNotification, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
			if (type == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到StrongNotification类型");
				return;
			}
			PropertyInfo property = type.GetProperty("Instance", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
			if (property == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到StrongNotification.Instance属性");
				return;
			}
			object value = property.GetValue(null);
			if (value == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ StrongNotification.Instance为null");
				return;
			}
			if (value as MonoBehaviour == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ StrongNotification不是MonoBehaviour");
				return;
			}
			FieldInfo field = type.GetField("mainFadeGroup", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到mainFadeGroup字段");
				return;
			}
			object value2 = field.GetValue(value);
			MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour = value2 as MonoBehaviour;
			if (monoBehaviour == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ mainFadeGroup不是MonoBehaviour");
				return;
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 📌 将面板添加到mainFadeGroup");
			_currentPurchasePanel.transform.SetParent(monoBehaviour.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
			_currentPurchasePanel.name = "DedicatedSupplyPanel";
			Type type2 = Type.GetType("Duckov.Economy.UI.StockShopView, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
			if (type2 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到StockShopView类型");
				return;
			}
			PropertyInfo property2 = type2.GetProperty("Instance", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
			if (property2 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到StockShopView.Instance属性");
				return;
			}
			object value3 = property2.GetValue(null);
			if (value3 == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ StockShopView.Instance为null");
				return;
			}
			UpdateSupplyPanelContent(_currentPurchasePanel, order, type2, value3);
			MethodInfo method = value2.GetType().GetMethod("SkipShow", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (method != null)
			{
				method.Invoke(value2, null);
				FieldInfo field2 = value2.GetType().GetField("isShown", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
				if (field2 != null)
				{
					field2.SetValue(value2, true);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 强制显示mainFadeGroup（SkipShow + isShown=true）");
				}
				else
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 找不到isShown字段");
				}
			}
			else
			{
				MethodInfo method2 = value2.GetType().GetMethod("Show", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
				if (method2 != null)
				{
					method2.Invoke(value2, null);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 使用Show()降级方案显示mainFadeGroup");
				}
			}
			FieldInfo field3 = type.GetField("contentFadeGroup", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field3 != null)
			{
				object value4 = field3.GetValue(value);
				if (value4 != null)
				{
					MethodInfo method3 = value4.GetType().GetMethod("SkipShow", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
					if (method3 != null)
					{
						method3.Invoke(value4, null);
						FieldInfo field4 = value4.GetType().GetField("isShown", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
						if (field4 != null)
						{
							field4.SetValue(value4, true);
							DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 强制显示contentFadeGroup（SkipShow + isShown=true）- 这是关键修复！");
						}
						else
						{
							DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 找不到contentFadeGroup的isShown字段");
						}
					}
					else
					{
						MethodInfo method4 = value4.GetType().GetMethod("Show", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
						if (method4 != null)
						{
							method4.Invoke(value4, null);
							DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 使用Show()降级方案显示contentFadeGroup");
						}
					}
				}
			}
			HideStrongNotificationTexts(type, value);
			HideStrongNotificationContent(type, value);
			FieldInfo field5 = type.GetField("contentDelay", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field5 != null)
			{
				field5.SetValue(value, 0f);
			}
			AddClickBlocker(_currentPurchasePanel);
			_currentPurchasePanel.SetActive(value: true);
			_currentPurchasePanel.transform.SetAsLastSibling();
			Type type3 = Type.GetType("Duckov.UI.Animations.FadeElement, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
			if (type3 != null)
			{
				Component[] componentsInChildren = _currentPurchasePanel.GetComponentsInChildren(type3, includeInactive: true);
				if (componentsInChildren != null && componentsInChildren.Length != 0)
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🔍 找到 {0} 个FadeElement组件，强制显示...", componentsInChildren.Length));
					Component[] array = componentsInChildren;
					foreach (Component component in array)
					{
						if (!(component != null))
						{
							continue;
						}
						MethodInfo method5 = type3.GetMethod("SkipShow", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public);
						if (method5 != null)
						{
							method5.Invoke(component, null);
							FieldInfo field6 = type3.GetField("isShown", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
							if (field6 != null)
							{
								field6.SetValue(component, true);
							}
						}
					}
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 所有FadeElement已强制显示");
				}
			}
			CanvasGroup[] componentsInChildren2 = _currentPurchasePanel.GetComponentsInChildren<CanvasGroup>(includeInactive: true);
			if (componentsInChildren2 != null && componentsInChildren2.Length != 0)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🔍 找到 {0} 个CanvasGroup组件，设置alpha=1...", componentsInChildren2.Length));
				CanvasGroup[] array2 = componentsInChildren2;
				foreach (CanvasGroup canvasGroup in array2)
				{
					if (canvasGroup != null)
					{
						canvasGroup.alpha = 1f;
						canvasGroup.blocksRaycasts = true;
						canvasGroup.interactable = true;
					}
				}
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 所有CanvasGroup已设置alpha=1");
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 🔍 调试信息:");
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - 面板名称: " + _currentPurchasePanel.name);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 面板active: {0}", _currentPurchasePanel.activeSelf));
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 面板activeInHierarchy: {0}", _currentPurchasePanel.activeInHierarchy));
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket]   - 面板父级: " + _currentPurchasePanel.transform.parent?.name);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 面板父级active: {0}", _currentPurchasePanel.transform.parent?.gameObject.activeSelf));
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 面板父级activeInHierarchy: {0}", _currentPurchasePanel.transform.parent?.gameObject.activeInHierarchy));
			MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour2 = value2 as MonoBehaviour;
			if (monoBehaviour2 != null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - mainFadeGroup active: {0}", monoBehaviour2.gameObject.activeSelf));
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - mainFadeGroup activeInHierarchy: {0}", monoBehaviour2.gameObject.activeInHierarchy));
			}
			MethodInfo method6 = type.GetMethod("Push", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public, null, new Type[2]
			{
				typeof(string),
				typeof(string)
			}, null);
			if (method6 != null)
			{
				method6.Invoke(null, new object[2]
				{
					"",
					""
				});
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 调用StrongNotification.Push激活供货界面");
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ 供货界面创建完成: {0}，剩余需求: {1}", itemDisplayName, order.RemainingQuantity));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 显示供货数量选择器失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void UpdateSupplyPanelContent(GameObject panel, PurchaseOrder order, Type stockShopViewType, object stockShopInstance)
	{
		try
		{
			Transform[] componentsInChildren = panel.GetComponentsInChildren<Transform>(includeInactive: true);
			foreach (Transform transform in componentsInChildren)
			{
				if (transform.name.Contains("Output") || transform.name.Contains("Result") || transform.name.Contains("Cost") || transform.name.Contains("Demand"))
				{
					transform.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				}
			}
			Transform transform2 = panel.transform.Find("Panel");
			if (transform2 != null)
			{
				Transform transform3 = transform2.Find("ItemDisplayCore");
				if (transform3 != null)
				{
					Transform transform4 = transform3.Find("ItemSlotsDisplay");
					if (transform4 != null)
					{
						transform4.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
						DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 已隐藏ItemSlotsDisplay（工作台改装提示）");
					}
				}
			}
			ItemDetailsDisplay componentInChildren = panel.GetComponentInChildren<ItemDetailsDisplay>(includeInactive: true);
			if (componentInChildren == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到ItemDetailsDisplay组件");
				return;
			}
			Type type = Type.GetType("ItemStatsSystem.ItemAssetsCollection, ItemStatsSystem");
			if (type != null)
			{
				MethodInfo method = type.GetMethod("InstantiateSync", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
				if (method != null)
				{
					object obj = method.Invoke(null, new object[1] { order.ItemTypeId });
					if (obj != null)
					{
						MethodInfo method2 = componentInChildren.GetType().GetMethod("Setup", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
						if (method2 != null)
						{
							method2.Invoke(componentInChildren, new object[1] { obj });
						}
						UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(obj as UnityEngine.Object);
					}
				}
			}
			try
			{
				Transform transform5 = panel.transform.Find("Panel/ItemDisplayCore/Basics/IconContainer");
				if (transform5 != null)
				{
					Transform transform6 = transform5.Find("CountContainer");
					if (transform6 != null)
					{
						transform6.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
						TextMeshProUGUI componentInChildren2 = transform6.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
						if (componentInChildren2 != null)
						{
							componentInChildren2.text = order.RemainingQuantity.ToString();
							componentInChildren2.fontSize = 24f;
							componentInChildren2.fontStyle = FontStyles.Bold;
							componentInChildren2.ForceMeshUpdate(ignoreActiveState: true, forceTextReparsing: true);
							DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 💯 供货界面数量显示: {0}个", order.RemainingQuantity));
						}
					}
				}
			}
			catch (Exception arg)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 修改图标数量失败: {0}", arg));
			}
			FieldInfo field = stockShopViewType.GetField("priceText", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field != null)
			{
				TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = field.GetValue(stockShopInstance) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				if (textMeshProUGUI != null)
				{
					TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren2 = panel.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
					foreach (TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI2 in componentsInChildren2)
					{
						if (textMeshProUGUI2.name == textMeshProUGUI.name || textMeshProUGUI2.gameObject.name.Contains("Price"))
						{
							textMeshProUGUI2.text = order.PricePerUnit.ToString("n0");
							break;
						}
					}
				}
			}
			int fullDurabilityItemCount = GetFullDurabilityItemCount(order.ItemTypeId);
			FieldInfo field2 = stockShopViewType.GetField("stockText", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field2 != null)
			{
				TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI3 = field2.GetValue(stockShopInstance) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				if (textMeshProUGUI3 != null)
				{
					TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren2 = panel.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
					foreach (TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI4 in componentsInChildren2)
					{
						if (textMeshProUGUI4.name == textMeshProUGUI3.name || textMeshProUGUI4.gameObject.name.Contains("Stock"))
						{
							textMeshProUGUI4.text = LocalizationStrings.GetYouHaveFullDurabilityFormat(fullDurabilityItemCount);
							DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 📊 库存显示更新: 满耐久 {0}个", fullDurabilityItemCount));
							break;
						}
					}
				}
			}
			CreateSupplyCountSlider(panel, order, fullDurabilityItemCount);
			UpdateSupplyButtonState(panel, order, _currentSupplyQuantity);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 供货面板内容更新完成");
		}
		catch (Exception arg2)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 更新供货面板内容失败: {0}", arg2));
		}
	}

	private void BlockStrongNotificationEscapeHandler()
	{
		try
		{
			Type type = Type.GetType("Duckov.StrongNotification, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
			if (!(type != null))
			{
				return;
			}
			PropertyInfo property = type.GetProperty("Instance", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
			if (!(property != null))
			{
				return;
			}
			object value = property.GetValue(null);
			if (value != null)
			{
				MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour = value as MonoBehaviour;
				if (monoBehaviour != null)
				{
					monoBehaviour.enabled = false;
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 已临时禁用StrongNotification的ESC处理");
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 阻止StrongNotification ESC处理失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void AddSupplyEscapeKeyHandler(GameObject panel)
	{
		try
		{
			panel.AddComponent<SupplyEscapeKeyHandler>();
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 已添加供货界面ESC键处理器");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 添加ESC键处理器失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void CreateSupplyCountSlider(GameObject panel, PurchaseOrder order, int playerItemCount)
	{
		try
		{
			int selectedQuantity = 1;
			GameObject sliderGameObject = null;
			DecomposeSlider supplySlider = null;
			Transform panelRoot = panel.transform.Find("Panel");
			if (panelRoot != null)
			{
				Transform existingSlider = panelRoot.Find("SupplyCountSlider");
				if (existingSlider != null)
				{
					sliderGameObject = existingSlider.gameObject;
					supplySlider = sliderGameObject.GetComponent<DecomposeSlider>();
					if (supplySlider != null)
					{
						int maxSupplyQuantity = Mathf.Min(playerItemCount, order.RemainingQuantity);
						supplySlider.SetMinMax(1, maxSupplyQuantity);
						supplySlider.Value = 1;
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ♻️ 复用现有滑块，更新范围: 1-{0}", maxSupplyQuantity));
					}
				}
			}
			if (sliderGameObject == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] 🆕 创建新的供货数量滑块");
				Type type = Type.GetType("Duckov.UI.ItemDecomposeView, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
				if (type != null)
				{
					PropertyInfo property = type.GetProperty("Instance", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
					if (property != null)
					{
						object value = property.GetValue(null);
						if (value != null)
						{
							MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour = value as MonoBehaviour;
							if (monoBehaviour != null)
							{
								Transform transform3 = monoBehaviour.transform.Find("Content");
								if (transform3 != null)
								{
									Transform transform4 = transform3.Find("VertLayout");
									if (transform4 != null)
									{
										Transform transform5 = transform4.Find("Operation");
										if (transform5 != null)
										{
											Transform transform6 = transform5.Find("CountSlider");
											if (transform6 != null)
											{
												sliderGameObject = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(transform6.gameObject);
												sliderGameObject.name = "SupplyCountSlider";
												if (panelRoot != null)
												{
													int itemDisplayIndex = -1;
													int buttonContainerIndex = -1;
													for (int i = 0; i < panelRoot.childCount; i++)
													{
														Transform child = panelRoot.GetChild(i);
														if (child.name == "ItemDisplayCore")
														{
															itemDisplayIndex = i;
														}
														else if (child.name == "ButtonContainer")
														{
															buttonContainerIndex = i;
														}
													}
													sliderGameObject.transform.SetParent(panelRoot, worldPositionStays: false);
													if (itemDisplayIndex >= 0 && buttonContainerIndex >= 0)
													{
														sliderGameObject.transform.SetSiblingIndex(itemDisplayIndex + 1);
													}
													sliderGameObject.SetActive(value: true);
													Slider unitySlider = sliderGameObject.GetComponent<Slider>();
													supplySlider = sliderGameObject.GetComponent<DecomposeSlider>();
													if (unitySlider == null)
													{
														DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ Slider组件缺失，正在添加...");
														unitySlider = sliderGameObject.AddComponent<Slider>();
														if (supplySlider != null)
														{
															unitySlider.transition = Selectable.Transition.ColorTint;
															unitySlider.interactable = true;
															unitySlider.wholeNumbers = true;
															Transform transform7 = sliderGameObject.transform.Find("Handle Slide Area");
															if (transform7 != null)
															{
																Transform transform8 = transform7.Find("Handle");
																if (transform8 != null)
																{
																	unitySlider.targetGraphic = transform8.GetComponent<Image>();
																	unitySlider.handleRect = transform8.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
																}
															}
															Transform transform9 = sliderGameObject.transform.Find("Fill Area");
															if (transform9 != null)
															{
																Transform transform10 = transform9.Find("Fill");
																if (transform10 != null)
																{
																	unitySlider.fillRect = transform10.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
																}
															}
														}
													}
													if (unitySlider != null && supplySlider != null)
													{
														int maxSupplyQuantity = Mathf.Min(playerItemCount, order.RemainingQuantity);
														DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 🔍 滑块调试信息:");
														DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 玩家拥有数量: {0}", playerItemCount));
														DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 求购剩余数量: {0}", order.RemainingQuantity));
														DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket]   - 计算的最大供货数量: {0}", maxSupplyQuantity));
														supplySlider.SetMinMax(1, maxSupplyQuantity);
														supplySlider.Value = 1;
														TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren = sliderGameObject.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
														foreach (TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI in componentsInChildren)
														{
															if (textMeshProUGUI.text.Contains("分解") || textMeshProUGUI.text.Contains("数量") || textMeshProUGUI.text.Contains("购买"))
															{
																textMeshProUGUI.text = LocalizationStrings.GetSupplyQuantityLabel();
																break;
															}
														}
														DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ 滑块初始化成功: 范围 1-{0}, 当前值 1", maxSupplyQuantity));
													}
													else
													{
														DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 滑块组件缺失: Slider={0}, DecomposeSlider={1}", unitySlider != null, supplySlider != null));
													}
												}
											}
										}
									}
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			if (supplySlider != null)
			{
				supplySlider.OnValueChangedEvent += delegate(float sliderValue)
				{
					selectedQuantity = (int)sliderValue;
					_currentSupplyQuantity = selectedQuantity;
					DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 供货滑块值变化: {0}, 单价: {1}", selectedQuantity, order.PricePerUnit));
					UpdateSupplyButtonState(panel, order, selectedQuantity);
				};
				DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 订阅滑块事件: " + order.ItemName);
				_currentSupplyQuantity = 1;
			}
			UpdateSupplyConfirmButton(panel, order);
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 创建供货数量滑块失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void UpdateSupplyButtonState(GameObject panel, PurchaseOrder order, int quantity)
	{
		try
		{
			long grossReward = order.PricePerUnit * quantity;
			long taxCost = (long)Math.Round((double)order.TaxPaid / (double)order.Quantity * (double)quantity);
			long netReward = grossReward - taxCost;
			long money = EconomyManager.Money;
			bool canAffordTax = money >= taxCost;
			bool hasUpdatedRewardText = false;
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🔍 开始查找供货按钮文本，总收益: +{0:n0}, 税费: {1:n0}, 净收益: +{2:n0}, 玩家余额: {3:n0}, 可支付税费: {4}", grossReward, taxCost, netReward, money, canAffordTax));
			Transform buttonContainer = panel.transform.Find("Panel/ButtonContainer");
			if (buttonContainer != null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 📍 找到ButtonContainer");
				Transform buttonTransform = buttonContainer.Find("Button");
				if (buttonTransform != null)
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 📍 找到Button对象");
					Button supplyButton = buttonTransform.GetComponent<Button>();
					if (supplyButton != null)
					{
						supplyButton.interactable = canAffordTax;
						DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 💰 按钮状态: " + (canAffordTax ? "可用" : "禁用（余额不足）"));
					}
					Transform buttonBackground = buttonTransform.Find("BG");
					if (buttonBackground != null)
					{
						DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 📍 找到BG对象");
						Transform line2 = buttonBackground.Find("Line2");
						if (line2 != null)
						{
							DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 📍 找到Line2对象");
							TextMeshProUGUI[] line2Texts = line2.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
							DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 📝 Line2内找到 {0} 个文本组件", line2Texts.Length));
							for (int i = 0; i < line2Texts.Length; i++)
							{
								TextMeshProUGUI line2Text = line2Texts[i];
								DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 📝 Line2文本 {0}: '{1}' (Path: {2})", i, line2Text.text, GetGameObjectPath(line2Text.gameObject)));
								if (Regex.IsMatch(line2Text.text, "[\\d,]+"))
								{
									if (canAffordTax)
									{
										line2Text.text = string.Format("+{0:n0} {1}", netReward, LocalizationStrings.GetTaxLabelFormat(taxCost));
										line2Text.color = Color.black;
									}
									else
									{
										line2Text.text = string.Format("+{0:n0} {1}", netReward, LocalizationStrings.GetInsufficientTaxLabelFormat(taxCost));
										line2Text.color = new Color(0.8f, 0.2f, 0.2f, 1f);
									}
									line2Text.fontSize = 24f;
									hasUpdatedRewardText = true;
									DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 通过正则匹配设置收益文本: " + line2Text.text);
									break;
								}
							}
							if (!hasUpdatedRewardText && line2Texts.Length != 0)
							{
								TextMeshProUGUI fallbackText = line2Texts[0];
								if (canAffordTax)
								{
									fallbackText.text = string.Format("+{0:n0} {1}", netReward, LocalizationStrings.GetTaxLabelFormat(taxCost));
									fallbackText.color = Color.black;
								}
								else
								{
									fallbackText.text = string.Format("+{0:n0} {1}", netReward, LocalizationStrings.GetInsufficientTaxLabelFormat(taxCost));
									fallbackText.color = new Color(0.8f, 0.2f, 0.2f, 1f);
								}
								fallbackText.fontSize = 24f;
								hasUpdatedRewardText = true;
								DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 设置第一个Line2文本为收益: " + fallbackText.text);
							}
						}
						else
						{
							DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ❌ 未找到Line2对象");
						}
					}
					else
					{
						DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ❌ 未找到BG对象");
					}
				}
				else
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ❌ 未找到Button对象");
				}
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ❌ 未找到ButtonContainer");
			}
			if (!hasUpdatedRewardText)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 未找到供货收益文本位置");
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 📈 供货按钮收益更新: {0} x {1} = +{2:n0} , 扣税: {3:n0} , 净收益: +{4:n0} ", quantity, order.PricePerUnit, grossReward, taxCost, netReward));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 更新供货按钮状态失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void UpdateSupplyConfirmButton(GameObject panel, PurchaseOrder order)
	{
		try
		{
			Transform panelRoot = panel.transform.Find("Panel");
			if (panelRoot == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			Transform buttonContainer = panelRoot.Find("ButtonContainer");
			if (buttonContainer == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			Button[] buttons = buttonContainer.GetComponentsInChildren<Button>(includeInactive: true);
			if (buttons.Length == 0)
			{
				return;
			}
			Button button = buttons[0];
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 🔍 处理按钮: " + button.name);
			Transform background = button.transform.Find("BG");
			if (background != null)
			{
				for (int childIndex = background.childCount - 1; childIndex >= 0; childIndex--)
				{
					Transform child = background.GetChild(childIndex);
					if (child.name != "Line1" && child.name != "Line2")
					{
						DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 🗑️ 删除按钮子对象: " + child.name);
						UnityEngine.Object.DestroyImmediate(child.gameObject);
					}
				}
				Transform line1 = background.Find("Line1");
				if (line1 != null)
				{
					for (int childIndex = line1.childCount - 1; childIndex >= 0; childIndex--)
					{
						Transform child = line1.GetChild(childIndex);
						if (child.name != "Text (TMP)")
						{
							DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 🗑️ 删除Line1子对象: " + child.name);
							UnityEngine.Object.DestroyImmediate(child.gameObject);
						}
					}
					Transform line1TextTransform = line1.Find("Text (TMP)");
					if (line1TextTransform != null)
					{
						TextMeshProUGUI line1Text = line1TextTransform.GetComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
						if (line1Text != null)
						{
							line1Text.text = LocalizationStrings.GetConfirmSupplyLabel();
							line1Text.fontSize = 36f;
							line1Text.fontStyle = FontStyles.Bold;
							DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 设置供货按钮主文字: " + line1Text.text);
						}
					}
				}
				Transform line2 = background.Find("Line2");
				if (line2 != null)
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🔍 Line2处理前有 {0} 个子对象", line2.childCount));
					TextMeshProUGUI[] line2Texts = line2.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 📝 Line2处理前找到 {0} 个文本组件", line2Texts.Length));
					for (int i = 0; i < line2Texts.Length; i++)
					{
						TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = line2Texts[i];
						DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 📝 现有文本 {0}: '{1}' (Path: {2})", i, textMeshProUGUI.text, GetGameObjectPath(textMeshProUGUI.gameObject)));
						if (i == 0)
						{
							textMeshProUGUI.text = "";
							textMeshProUGUI.fontSize = 28f;
							textMeshProUGUI.color = Color.black;
							DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 设置第一个文本组件用于显示供货收益");
						}
					}
					for (int childIndex = line2.childCount - 1; childIndex >= 0; childIndex--)
					{
						Transform child = line2.GetChild(childIndex);
						bool hasTextComponent = child.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true) != null;
						if (child.name == "CashIndicator")
						{
							DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 🗑️ 强制删除CashIndicator: " + child.name);
							UnityEngine.Object.DestroyImmediate(child.gameObject);
						}
						else if (!hasTextComponent && child.name != "Text (TMP)")
						{
							DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 🗑️ 删除Line2子对象（无文本）: " + child.name);
							UnityEngine.Object.DestroyImmediate(child.gameObject);
						}
						else
						{
							DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 保留Line2子对象（包含文本）: " + child.name);
						}
					}
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🔍 Line2处理后有 {0} 个子对象", line2.childCount));
				}
			}
			button.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
			button.onClick.AddListener(delegate
			{
				OnSupplyConfirmClicked(order);
			});
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 供货确认按钮已完全清理并配置");
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 更新供货确认按钮失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void OnSupplyConfirmClicked(PurchaseOrder order)
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🚚 确认供货: {0}个 {1}", _currentSupplyQuantity, GetItemDisplayName(order.ItemTypeId, order.ItemName)));
			string itemDisplayName = GetItemDisplayName(order.ItemTypeId, order.ItemName);
			int playerItemCount = GetPlayerItemCount(order.ItemTypeId);
			long requiredTax = (long)Math.Round((double)order.TaxPaid / (double)order.Quantity * (double)_currentSupplyQuantity);
			long money = EconomyManager.Money;
			if (money < requiredTax)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 余额不足支付税费: 需要{0}，余额{1}", requiredTax, money));
				NotificationStyleCustomizer.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetInsufficientBalanceForTaxNotification(requiredTax, money), NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Error);
				return;
			}
			if (playerItemCount < _currentSupplyQuantity)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 玩家物品不足: 需要{0}个，只有{1}个", _currentSupplyQuantity, playerItemCount));
				NotificationStyleCustomizer.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetInsufficientItemsNotification(playerItemCount, itemDisplayName), NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Error);
				return;
			}
			if (_currentSupplyQuantity > order.RemainingQuantity)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 供货数量超过需求: 供货{0}个，需求{1}个", _currentSupplyQuantity, order.RemainingQuantity));
				NotificationStyleCustomizer.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetExceedDemandQuantityNotification(order.RemainingQuantity), NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Error);
				return;
			}
			try
			{
				Type type = Type.GetType("Duckov.StrongNotification, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
				if (type != null)
				{
					PropertyInfo property = type.GetProperty("Instance", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
					if (property != null)
					{
						object value = property.GetValue(null);
						if (value != null)
						{
							FieldInfo field = type.GetField("confirmed", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
							if (field != null)
							{
								field.SetValue(value, true);
								DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 已关闭供货详情界面（设置confirmed=true）");
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			catch (Exception arg)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 关闭供货详情界面失败: {0}", arg));
			}
			ExecuteSupplyAsync(order, _currentSupplyQuantity).Forget();
		}
		catch (Exception arg2)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 供货确认失败: {0}", arg2));
		}
	}

	private void OnCancelPurchaseOrderClicked(PurchaseOrder order)
	{
		try
		{
			string itemDisplayName = GetItemDisplayName(order.ItemTypeId, order.ItemName);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🗑️ 取消求购订单: {0} (OrderId: {1})", itemDisplayName, order.OrderId));
			string.Format("确定要取消求购订单吗？ {0} x{1} 将退还 {2} 金币", itemDisplayName, order.Quantity, order.FrozenAmount);
			ExecuteCancelPurchaseOrderAsync(order).Forget();
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 取消求购订单失败: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private async UniTaskVoid ExecuteCancelPurchaseOrderAsync(PurchaseOrder order)
	{

		try
		{
			string itemName = GetItemDisplayName(order.ItemTypeId, order.ItemName);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🗑️ 开始取消求购订单: {0} (OrderId: {1})", itemName, order.OrderId));
			var (flag, text, refundedAmount) = await ApiClient.CancelPurchaseOrderAsync(order.OrderId);
			if (flag)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 取消求购订单成功: " + itemName);
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 💰 返还冻结资金到自提点: {0} 金币 (后端计算)", refundedAmount));
				await SendCashToPickupAsync(refundedAmount, "取消求购订单退款: " + itemName);
				NotificationStyleCustomizer.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetOrderCancelledSuccessNotification(refundedAmount));
				LoadPurchaseOrdersAsync().Forget();
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 取消求购订单失败: " + itemName + "，原因: " + text);
				NotificationStyleCustomizer.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetOrderCancelledFailedNotification(text), NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Error);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 执行取消求购订单异常: {0}", arg));
			NotificationStyleCustomizer.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetOrderCancelledFailedGenericNotification(), NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Error);
		}
	}

	private async UniTask SendCashToPickupAsync(long amount, string reason)
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 💰 发送现金到自提点: {0} 金币 (原因: {1})", amount, reason));
			int remainingAmount = (int)amount;
			int itemCount = 0;
			while (remainingAmount > 0)
			{
				Item item = await ItemAssetsCollection.InstantiateAsync(451);
				if (item == null)
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 创建现金物品失败 (TypeID: {0})，直接添加金币: {1}", 451, remainingAmount));
					EconomyManager.Add(remainingAmount);
					break;
				}
				item.Initialize();
				int maxStackSize = (!item.Stackable) ? 1 : item.MaxStackCount;
				int stackAmount = (item.StackCount = Mathf.Min(remainingAmount, maxStackSize));
				remainingAmount -= stackAmount;
				itemCount++;
				PlayerStoragePatch.BeginModPush();
				PlayerStorage.Push(item, toBufferDirectly: true);
				PlayerStoragePatch.EndModPush();
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 📦 现金物品 #{0} 已发送: {1} (剩余: {2})", itemCount, stackAmount, remainingAmount));
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ 所有现金已发送到自提点: 总计 {0} (分{1}个包裹)", amount, itemCount));
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 发送现金到自提点失败: {0}", arg));
			EconomyManager.Add(amount);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ Fallback已执行: 直接添加 {0}", amount));
		}
	}

	private Item CreateGameItem(int itemTypeId, int stackCount = 1)
	{
		try
		{
			Type type = Type.GetType("ItemStatsSystem.ItemAssetsCollection, ItemStatsSystem");
			if (type != null)
			{
				MethodInfo method = type.GetMethod("InstantiateSync", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
				if (method != null)
				{
					Item item = method.Invoke(null, new object[1] { itemTypeId }) as Item;
					if (item != null)
					{
						try
						{
							PropertyInfo property = item.GetType().GetProperty("StackCount");
							if (property != null && stackCount > 1)
							{
								property.SetValue(item, stackCount);
							}
						}
						catch (Exception)
						{
						}
						return item;
					}
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 创建游戏物品失败 (TypeID: {0}): {1}", itemTypeId, arg));
		}
		return null;
	}

	private void CustomizeSupplyItemDetailsPanel(GameObject panel, PurchaseOrder order, Type stockShopViewType, object stockShopInstance)
	{
		try
		{
			Transform[] componentsInChildren = panel.GetComponentsInChildren<Transform>(includeInactive: true);
			foreach (Transform transform in componentsInChildren)
			{
				if (transform.name.Contains("Output") || transform.name.Contains("Result") || transform.name.Contains("Cost") || transform.name.Contains("Demand"))
				{
					transform.gameObject.SetActive(value: false);
				}
			}
			ItemDetailsDisplay componentInChildren = panel.GetComponentInChildren<ItemDetailsDisplay>(includeInactive: true);
			if (componentInChildren == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 找不到ItemDetailsDisplay组件");
				return;
			}
			Type type = Type.GetType("ItemStatsSystem.ItemAssetsCollection, ItemStatsSystem");
			if (type != null)
			{
				MethodInfo method = type.GetMethod("InstantiateSync", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
				if (method != null)
				{
					object obj = method.Invoke(null, new object[1] { order.ItemTypeId });
					if (obj == null)
					{
						DuckMarket.Logger.Warning(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 无法创建Item (ItemTypeId={0})，使用占位图标", order.ItemTypeId));
						try
						{
							obj = method.Invoke(null, new object[1] { 174 });
							if (obj != null)
							{
								MethodInfo method2 = obj.GetType().GetMethod("SetInt", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public, null, new Type[3]
								{
									typeof(string),
									typeof(int),
									typeof(bool)
								}, null);
								if (method2 != null)
								{
									method2.Invoke(obj, new object[3]
									{
										"Count",
										order.RemainingQuantity,
										true
									});
								}
							}
						}
						catch (Exception arg)
						{
							DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 无法创建占位物品 (ID:174): {0}", arg));
						}
					}
					if (obj != null)
					{
						componentInChildren.GetType().GetMethod("Setup", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.NonPublic)?.Invoke(componentInChildren, new object[1] { obj });
						UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(obj as UnityEngine.Object);
					}
				}
			}
			try
			{
				Transform transform2 = panel.transform.Find("Panel/ItemDisplayCore/Basics/IconContainer");
				if (transform2 != null)
				{
					Transform transform3 = transform2.Find("CountContainer");
					if (transform3 != null)
					{
						transform3.gameObject.SetActive(value: true);
						TextMeshProUGUI componentInChildren2 = transform3.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
						if (componentInChildren2 != null)
						{
							componentInChildren2.text = order.RemainingQuantity.ToString();
							componentInChildren2.fontSize = 24f;
							componentInChildren2.fontStyle = FontStyles.Bold;
						}
					}
				}
			}
			catch (Exception arg2)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 修改图标数量失败: {0}", arg2));
			}
			FieldInfo field = stockShopViewType.GetField("priceText", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field != null)
			{
				TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = field.GetValue(stockShopInstance) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				if (textMeshProUGUI != null)
				{
					TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren2 = panel.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
					foreach (TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI2 in componentsInChildren2)
					{
						if (textMeshProUGUI2.name == textMeshProUGUI.name || textMeshProUGUI2.gameObject.name.Contains("Price"))
						{
							textMeshProUGUI2.text = order.PricePerUnit.ToString("n0");
							break;
						}
					}
				}
			}
			FieldInfo field2 = stockShopViewType.GetField("stockText", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
			if (field2 != null)
			{
				TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI3 = field2.GetValue(stockShopInstance) as TextMeshProUGUI;
				if (textMeshProUGUI3 != null)
				{
					TextMeshProUGUI[] componentsInChildren2 = panel.GetComponentsInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>(includeInactive: true);
					foreach (TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI4 in componentsInChildren2)
					{
						if (textMeshProUGUI4.name == textMeshProUGUI3.name || textMeshProUGUI4.gameObject.name.Contains("Stock"))
						{
							textMeshProUGUI4.text = LocalizationStrings.GetDemandAndBuyerFormat(order.RemainingQuantity, order.BuyerName);
							break;
						}
					}
				}
			}
			int playerItemCount = GetPlayerItemCount(order.ItemTypeId);
			string itemDisplayName = GetItemDisplayName(order.ItemTypeId, order.ItemName);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🎒 玩家拥有 {0} 数量: {1}", itemDisplayName, playerItemCount));
			int selectedQuantity = 1;
			GameObject sliderGameObject = null;
			DecomposeSlider decomposeSliderComponentRef = null;
			int maxSupplyQuantity = Math.Min(order.RemainingQuantity, playerItemCount);
			try
			{
				Type type2 = Type.GetType("Duckov.UI.ItemDecomposeView, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
				if (type2 != null)
				{
					PropertyInfo property = type2.GetProperty("Instance", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public);
					if (property != null)
					{
						object value = property.GetValue(null);
						if (value != null)
						{
							MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour = value as MonoBehaviour;
							if (monoBehaviour != null)
							{
								Transform transform4 = monoBehaviour.transform.Find("Content/VertLayout/Operation/CountSlider");
								if (transform4 != null)
								{
									sliderGameObject = UnityEngine.Object.Instantiate(transform4.gameObject);
									sliderGameObject.name = "SupplyCountSlider";
									Transform transform5 = panel.transform.Find("Panel");
									if (transform5 != null)
									{
										sliderGameObject.transform.SetParent(transform5, worldPositionStays: false);
										for (int j = 0; j < transform5.childCount; j++)
										{
											if (transform5.GetChild(j).name == "ItemDisplayCore")
											{
												sliderGameObject.transform.SetSiblingIndex(j + 1);
												break;
											}
										}
										sliderGameObject.SetActive(value: true);
										DecomposeSlider component = sliderGameObject.GetComponent<DecomposeSlider>();
										if (component != null)
										{
											decomposeSliderComponentRef = component;
											Slider component2 = component.GetComponent<Slider>();
											if (component2 != null)
											{
												component2.onValueChanged.RemoveAllListeners();
												if (maxSupplyQuantity > 0)
												{
													component2.minValue = 1f;
													component2.maxValue = maxSupplyQuantity;
													component2.value = 1f;
													component.Value = 1;
												}
												else
												{
													component2.minValue = 0f;
													component2.maxValue = 0f;
													component2.value = 0f;
													component.Value = 0;
												}
											}
											GameObject supplyTitleObject = new GameObject("SupplyTitle");
											supplyTitleObject.transform.SetParent(sliderGameObject.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
											RectTransform rectTransform = supplyTitleObject.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
											rectTransform.anchorMin = new Vector2(0f, 1f);
											rectTransform.anchorMax = new Vector2(1f, 1f);
											rectTransform.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1f);
											rectTransform.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(0f, 10f);
											rectTransform.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0f, 40f);
											supplyTitleObject.transform.SetAsFirstSibling();
											TextMeshProUGUI supplyTitleText = supplyTitleObject.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
											supplyTitleText.text = LocalizationStrings.GetSupplyQuantityTitle();
											supplyTitleText.fontSize = 24f;
											supplyTitleText.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
											supplyTitleText.color = Color.white;
											TextMeshProUGUI sourceText = sliderGameObject.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
											if (sourceText != null && sourceText.font != null)
											{
												supplyTitleText.font = sourceText.font;
											}
											if (component2 != null && maxSupplyQuantity > 0)
											{
												component2.onValueChanged.AddListener(delegate(float sliderValue)
												{
													selectedQuantity = (int)sliderValue;
													DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 供货滑块值变化: {0}", selectedQuantity));
													UpdateSupplyButtonState(panel, order, selectedQuantity);
												});
											}
											UpdateSupplyButtonState(panel, order, (maxSupplyQuantity > 0) ? 1 : 0);
											DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ 供货滑块初始化成功: 范围 1-{0}, 玩家拥有: {1}", maxSupplyQuantity, playerItemCount));
										}
									}
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			catch (Exception arg3)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 创建供货滑块失败: {0}", arg3));
				if (sliderGameObject != null)
				{
					UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(sliderGameObject);
				}
			}
			Button componentInChildren4 = panel.GetComponentInChildren<Button>(includeInactive: true);
			if (!(componentInChildren4 != null))
			{
				return;
			}
			Transform transform6 = componentInChildren4.transform.Find("BG");
			if (transform6 != null)
			{
				Transform transform7 = transform6.Find("Line1/Text (TMP)");
				if (transform7 != null)
				{
					TextMeshProUGUI component3 = transform7.GetComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
					if (component3 != null)
					{
						component3.text = LocalizationStrings.GetConfirmSupplyLabel();
						DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose("[DuckMarket] ✅ 设置供货按钮主文字: " + component3.text);
					}
				}
			}
			componentInChildren4.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
			componentInChildren4.onClick.AddListener(delegate
			{
				int requestedQuantity = 1;
				if (decomposeSliderComponentRef != null)
				{
					requestedQuantity = decomposeSliderComponentRef.Value;
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 📦 供货按钮点击 - 数量: {0}", requestedQuantity));
				}
				if (requestedQuantity <= 0)
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 供货数量为0，无法供货");
				}
				else
				{
					try
					{
						Type type3 = Type.GetType("Duckov.StrongNotification, TeamSoda.Duckov.Core");
						object obj3 = (type3?.GetProperty("Instance", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public))?.GetValue(null);
						if (obj3 != null)
						{
							type3.GetField("confirmed", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic)?.SetValue(obj3, true);
							DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 已关闭供货详情界面");
						}
					}
					catch (Exception arg5)
					{
						DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 关闭供货详情界面失败: {0}", arg5));
					}
					ExecuteSupplyAsync(order, requestedQuantity).Forget();
				}
			});
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ 供货按钮配置完成，最大数量: {0}", maxSupplyQuantity));
		}
		catch (Exception arg4)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 自定义供货面板失败: {0}", arg4));
		}
	}

	private int GetPlayerItemCount(int itemTypeId)
	{
		try
		{
			Inventory inventory = PlayerStorage.Inventory;
			if (inventory == null || inventory.Content == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 无法获取玩家仓库");
				return 0;
			}
			int totalItemCount = 0;
			foreach (Item item in inventory.Content)
			{
				if (item != null && item.TypeID == itemTypeId)
				{
					totalItemCount += item.StackCount;
				}
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Verbose(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 📦 玩家拥有物品 (ID={0}): {1}个", itemTypeId, totalItemCount));
			return totalItemCount;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ GetPlayerItemCount失败: {0}", arg));
			return 0;
		}
	}

	private int GetFullDurabilityItemCount(int itemTypeId)
	{
		try
		{
			Inventory inventory = PlayerStorage.Inventory;
			if (inventory == null || inventory.Content == null)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Warning("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 无法获取玩家仓库");
				return 0;
			}
			int fullDurabilityCount = 0;
			foreach (Item item in inventory.Content)
			{
				if (!(item != null) || item.TypeID != itemTypeId)
				{
					continue;
				}
				if (item.MaxDurability > 0f)
				{
					if (Math.Abs(item.Durability - item.MaxDurability) < 0.01f)
					{
						fullDurabilityCount += item.StackCount;
					}
				}
				else
				{
					fullDurabilityCount += item.StackCount;
				}
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 📦 玩家拥有满耐久物品 (ID={0}): {1}个", itemTypeId, fullDurabilityCount));
			return fullDurabilityCount;
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ GetFullDurabilityItemCount失败: {0}", arg));
			return 0;
		}
	}

	private async UniTaskVoid ExecuteSupplyAsync(PurchaseOrder order, int quantity)
	{

		try
		{
			string itemDisplayName = GetItemDisplayName(order.ItemTypeId, order.ItemName);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 🚚 开始供货: {0} x{1} 给 {2}", itemDisplayName, quantity, order.BuyerName));
			var (isSuccess, _, itemName, _, _, _, errorMessage) = await ApiClient.FulfillPurchaseOrderAsync(order.OrderId, quantity);
			if (isSuccess)
			{
				long grossIncome = order.PricePerUnit * quantity;
				long taxAmount = (long)Math.Round((double)order.TaxPaid / (double)order.Quantity * (double)quantity);
				long actualPayment = grossIncome - taxAmount;
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ 供货成功: {0} x{1}，获得 {2} (扣税: {3})", itemName ?? GetItemDisplayName(order.ItemTypeId, order.ItemName), quantity, actualPayment, taxAmount));
				try
				{
					RemoveItemsFromPlayerStorage(order.ItemTypeId, quantity);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ 已从玩家库存移除: {0} x{1}", GetItemDisplayName(order.ItemTypeId, order.ItemName), quantity));
				}
				catch (Exception ex)
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 移除库存物品失败: " + ex.Message);
				}
				try
				{
					EconomyManager.Add(-taxAmount);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 💸 已扣除税费: {0}", taxAmount));
				}
				catch (Exception ex2)
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 扣除税费失败: " + ex2.Message);
				}
				try
				{
					await SendSupplyRewardToMailboxAsync(actualPayment, order);
				}
				catch (Exception ex3)
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 发送收益到自提点失败: " + ex3.Message);
					EconomyManager.Add(actualPayment);
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ 已直接添加金币: {0}", actualPayment));
				}
				NotificationStyleCustomizer.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetSupplySuccessNotification(itemName ?? GetItemDisplayName(order.ItemTypeId, order.ItemName), quantity, actualPayment));
				RefreshAllPurchaseOrderEntriesInventoryCount(order.ItemTypeId);
				if (_isPurchaseOrderMode)
				{
					LoadPurchaseOrdersAsync().Forget();
				}
			}
			else
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 供货失败: " + errorMessage);
				NotificationStyleCustomizer.ShowNotification(errorMessage ?? LocalizationStrings.GetSupplyFailedNotification(), NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Error);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 供货异常: {0}", arg));
			NotificationStyleCustomizer.ShowNotification(LocalizationStrings.GetSupplyFailedNotification(), NotificationStyleCustomizer.NotificationType.Error);
		}
	}

	private async UniTask SendSupplyRewardToMailboxAsync(long amount, PurchaseOrder order)
	{
		try
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 💰 发送供货收益到自提点: {0} (TypeID: {1})", amount, 451));
			int remainingAmount = (int)amount;
			int itemCount = 0;
			while (remainingAmount > 0)
			{
				Item item = await ItemAssetsCollection.InstantiateAsync(451);
				if (item == null)
				{
					DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 创建现金物品失败 (TypeID: {0})，直接添加金币: {1}", 451, remainingAmount));
					EconomyManager.Add(remainingAmount);
					break;
				}
				item.Initialize();
				int maxStackSize = (!item.Stackable) ? 1 : item.MaxStackCount;
				int stackAmount = (item.StackCount = Mathf.Min(remainingAmount, maxStackSize));
				remainingAmount -= stackAmount;
				itemCount++;
				PlayerStoragePatch.BeginModPush();
				PlayerStorage.Push(item, toBufferDirectly: true);
				PlayerStoragePatch.EndModPush();
				DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 📦 现金物品 #{0} 已发送: {1} (剩余: {2})", itemCount, stackAmount, remainingAmount));
			}
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ✅ 所有供货收益已发送到自提点: 总计 {0} (分{1}个包裹)", amount, itemCount));
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			DuckMarket.Logger.Error("[DuckMarket] ❌ 发送供货收益失败: " + ex.Message + " " + ex.StackTrace);
			EconomyManager.Add(amount);
			DuckMarket.Logger.Info(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ⚠️ Fallback已执行: 直接添加 {0}", amount));
		}
	}

	private void CreateDemandText(GameObject parent, int quantity)
	{
		GameObject gameObject = new GameObject("DemandContainer");
		gameObject.transform.SetParent(parent.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
		HorizontalLayoutGroup horizontalLayoutGroup = gameObject.AddComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
		horizontalLayoutGroup.spacing = 5f;
		horizontalLayoutGroup.childAlignment = TextAnchor.MiddleLeft;
		horizontalLayoutGroup.childForceExpandWidth = false;
		horizontalLayoutGroup.childControlWidth = true;
		GameObject obj = new GameObject("Label");
		obj.transform.SetParent(gameObject.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
		TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = obj.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
		textMeshProUGUI.text = LocalizationStrings.GetDemandLabelText();
		textMeshProUGUI.fontSize = 16f;
		textMeshProUGUI.color = new Color(0.7f, 0.7f, 0.7f);
		textMeshProUGUI.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Left;
		GameObject obj2 = new GameObject("Quantity");
		obj2.transform.SetParent(gameObject.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
		TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI2 = obj2.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
		textMeshProUGUI2.text = LocalizationStrings.GetQuantityFormat(quantity);
		textMeshProUGUI2.fontSize = 18f;
		textMeshProUGUI2.color = new Color(0.9f, 0.7f, 0.3f);
		textMeshProUGUI2.fontStyle = FontStyles.Bold;
		textMeshProUGUI2.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Left;
	}

	private void CreatePriceText(GameObject parent, decimal price)
	{
		GameObject obj = new GameObject("Price");
		obj.transform.SetParent(parent.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
		TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = obj.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
		textMeshProUGUI.text = string.Format("${0:N0}", price);
		textMeshProUGUI.fontSize = 22f;
		textMeshProUGUI.color = new Color(0.2f, 0.8f, 0.2f);
		textMeshProUGUI.fontStyle = FontStyles.Bold;
		textMeshProUGUI.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Right;
		obj.AddComponent<LayoutElement>().preferredWidth = 100f;
	}

	private void CreateBuyerText(GameObject parent, string buyerName)
	{
		GameObject obj = new GameObject("Buyer");
		obj.transform.SetParent(parent.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
		TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = obj.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
		textMeshProUGUI.text = buyerName;
		textMeshProUGUI.fontSize = 14f;
		textMeshProUGUI.color = new Color(0.6f, 0.6f, 0.6f);
		textMeshProUGUI.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Right;
		obj.AddComponent<LayoutElement>().preferredWidth = 120f;
	}

	private void CreateTimeText(GameObject parent, string timeText)
	{
		GameObject obj = new GameObject("Time");
		obj.transform.SetParent(parent.transform, worldPositionStays: false);
		TextMeshProUGUI textMeshProUGUI = obj.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
		textMeshProUGUI.text = timeText;
		textMeshProUGUI.fontSize = 14f;
		textMeshProUGUI.color = new Color(0.5f, 0.7f, 1f);
		textMeshProUGUI.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Right;
		obj.AddComponent<LayoutElement>().preferredWidth = 80f;
	}
}

using System;
using System.Collections;

namespace FleaMarket.UI;

public partial class DuckMarketView_NoteClone : View
{
	private class SupplyEscapeKeyHandler : MonoBehaviour
	{
		private Type _strongNotificationType;

		private object _strongNotificationInstance;

		public void Initialize(Type strongNotificationType, object strongNotificationInstance)
		{
			_strongNotificationType = strongNotificationType;
			_strongNotificationInstance = strongNotificationInstance;
		}

		private void Update()
		{
			try
			{
				if (Input.GetKeyDown(KeyCode.Escape))
				{
					ReEnableStrongNotification();
					FieldInfo field = _strongNotificationType.GetField("confirmed", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
					if (field != null)
					{
						field.SetValue(_strongNotificationInstance, true);
						DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] 🚪 ESC键关闭供货界面");
						UnityEngine.Object.Destroy(this);
					}
				}
			}
			catch (Exception arg)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ ESC键处理失败: {0}", arg));
			}
		}

		private void ReEnableStrongNotification()
		{
			try
			{
				MonoBehaviour monoBehaviour = _strongNotificationInstance as MonoBehaviour;
				if (monoBehaviour != null)
				{
					monoBehaviour.enabled = true;
					DuckMarket.Logger.Info("[DuckMarket] ✅ 已重新启用StrongNotification");
				}
			}
			catch (Exception arg)
			{
				DuckMarket.Logger.Error(string.Format("[DuckMarket] ❌ 重新启用StrongNotification失败: {0}", arg));
			}
		}
	}

	private class ClickEventBlocker : MonoBehaviour, IPointerClickHandler, IEventSystemHandler
	{
		public void OnPointerClick(PointerEventData eventData)
		{
			eventData.Use();
		}
	}

  <Target Name="ValidateLocalReferences" BeforeTargets="ResolveReferences">
