`duckmarket_loader/DuckMarket.Loader/ModBehaviour.cs`:

```cs
using System;
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.IO.Compression;
using System.Linq;
using System.Net.Http;
using System.Net.Security;
using System.Reflection;
using System.Security.Cryptography;
using System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates;
using System.Text;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using Duckov.Modding;
using Newtonsoft.Json;
using Newtonsoft.Json.Linq;
using UnityEngine;
using Object = UnityEngine.Object;

namespace DuckNewMarket.Loader;

public class ModBehaviour : Duckov.Modding.ModBehaviour
{
	private class ParsedCheck
	{
		public bool NeedUpdate { get; set; }

		public int LatestVersionCode { get; set; }

		public int UpdateVersionCode { get; set; }

		public string? UpdateVersionString { get; set; }

		public int RecommendedVersionCode { get; set; }

		public string? RecommendedVersionString { get; set; }

		public bool ForceUpdate { get; set; }

		public string? ZipMd5 { get; set; }

		public string? CoreMd5 { get; set; }
	}

	private class VersionListEnvelope
	{
		public string? code { get; set; }

		public string? message { get; set; }

		public VersionListData? data { get; set; }
	}

	private class VersionListData
	{
		public VersionInfo[]? versions { get; set; }
	}

	private class VersionInfo
	{
		public int version_id { get; set; }

		public string? channel { get; set; }

		public string? version_string { get; set; }

		public int version_code { get; set; }

		public string? zip_md5 { get; set; }

		public string? core_md5 { get; set; }

		public int file_size { get; set; }

		public string? release_notes { get; set; }

		public bool is_force_update { get; set; }

		public int? recommended_version_code { get; set; }
	}

	private static Assembly? _loadedAssembly;

	private static object? _loadedInstance;

	private static GameObject? _loadedGameObject;

	private static MethodInfo? _loadedAwake;

	private static MethodInfo? _loadedOnEnable;

	private static MethodInfo? _loadedOnDisable;

	private const string DefaultApiBase = "https://api.example.com/api/v1/versions";

	private const string Channel = "stable";

	private static bool _loaderConfigLoaded;

	private static string? _configuredApiBase;

	private static bool _allowInsecureTlsForLoader;

	public static ModBehaviour? Instance { get; private set; }

	private void Awake()
	{
		Instance = this;
		Debug.Log("========== Duck Market Mod Loader Awake ==========");
	}

	private void OnEnable()
	{
		EnsureVersionAndLoad();
	}

	private void OnDisable()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_loadedOnDisable != null && _loadedInstance != null)
			{
				_loadedOnDisable.Invoke(_loadedInstance, null);
			}
			else if (_loadedOnDisable != null && _loadedInstance == null)
			{
				_loadedOnDisable.Invoke(null, null);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Debug.LogError(string.Format("[DuckMarket] Error invoking loaded OnDisable: {0}", arg));
		}
	}

	private void OnDestroy()
	{
		try
		{
			if (_loadedOnDisable != null && _loadedInstance != null)
			{
				_loadedOnDisable.Invoke(_loadedInstance, null);
			}
			else if (_loadedOnDisable != null && _loadedInstance == null)
			{
				_loadedOnDisable.Invoke(null, null);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg)
		{
			Debug.LogError(string.Format("[DuckMarket] Error invoking loaded OnDisable in OnDestroy: {0}", arg));
		}
		try
		{
			if (_loadedGameObject != null)
			{
				Object.Destroy(_loadedGameObject);
				_loadedGameObject = null;
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg2)
		{
			Debug.LogError(string.Format("[DuckMarket] Error destroying loaded GameObject: {0}", arg2));
		}
		Instance = null;
		_loadedInstance = null;
		_loadedAwake = null;
		_loadedOnEnable = null;
		_loadedOnDisable = null;
		_loadedAssembly = null;
	}

	private static void LoadLatestDll(string? specifiedVersion = null)
	{
		try
		{
			string location = Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly().Location;
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(location))
			{
				Debug.LogWarning("[DuckMarket] Cannot determine executing assembly location");
				return;
			}
			string directoryName = Path.GetDirectoryName(location);
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(directoryName))
			{
				Debug.LogWarning("[DuckMarket] Cannot determine mod directory from assembly location");
				return;
			}
			string versionsDirectory = Path.Combine(directoryName, "version");
			if (!Directory.Exists(versionsDirectory))
			{
				Debug.LogWarning(("[DuckMarket] Version folder not found: " + versionsDirectory));
				return;
			}
			if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(specifiedVersion))
			{
				string specifiedCoreDllPath = Path.Combine(Path.Combine(versionsDirectory, specifiedVersion), "DuckNewMarket.Core.dll");
				if (File.Exists(specifiedCoreDllPath))
				{
					try
					{
						_loadedAssembly = Assembly.LoadFrom(specifiedCoreDllPath);
						Debug.Log(("[DuckMarket] Loaded specified dll: " + specifiedCoreDllPath + " (version " + specifiedVersion + ")"));
						Type type = _loadedAssembly.GetType("DuckMarket.Core.ModBehaviour") ?? Array.Find(_loadedAssembly.GetTypes(), (Type t) => t.Name == "ModBehaviour" && (t.Namespace?.StartsWith("DuckMarket") ?? false));
						if (type != null)
						{
							if (!typeof(MonoBehaviour).IsAssignableFrom(type))
							{
								_loadedInstance = Activator.CreateInstance(type);
								_loadedAwake = type.GetMethod("Awake", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
								_loadedOnEnable = type.GetMethod("OnEnable", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
								_loadedOnDisable = type.GetMethod("OnDisable", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
								try
								{
									_loadedAwake?.Invoke(_loadedInstance, null);
								}
								catch (Exception arg)
								{
									Debug.LogError(string.Format("[DuckMarket] Error invoking specified Awake: {0}", arg));
								}
								try
								{
									_loadedOnEnable?.Invoke(_loadedInstance, null);
									return;
								}
								catch (Exception arg2)
								{
									Debug.LogError(string.Format("[DuckMarket] Error invoking specified OnEnable: {0}", arg2));
									return;
								}
							}
							_loadedGameObject = new GameObject("DuckNewMarket.Runtime");
							Object.DontDestroyOnLoad(_loadedGameObject);
							_loadedInstance = _loadedGameObject.AddComponent(type);
						}
						else
						{
							Debug.LogWarning("[DuckMarket] No ModBehaviour type found in specified assembly");
						}
						return;
					}
					catch (Exception ex)
					{
						Debug.LogError(("[DuckMarket] Error loading specified dll: " + ex.Message));
						return;
					}
				}
				Debug.LogWarning(("[DuckMarket] 指定版本未找到或缺少核心 DLL: " + specifiedVersion));
			}
			string[] files = Directory.GetFiles(versionsDirectory, "DuckNewMarket.Core.dll", SearchOption.AllDirectories);
			if (files.Length == 0)
			{
				Debug.LogWarning("[DuckMarket] No dll files found in version folder");
				return;
			}
			Version version = null;
			string latestDllPath = null;
			string[] array = files;
			foreach (string candidateDllPath in array)
			{
				try
				{
					string directoryName2 = Path.GetDirectoryName(candidateDllPath);
					string candidateVersionFolderName = ((directoryName2 != null) ? Path.GetFileName(directoryName2) : null);
					if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(candidateVersionFolderName) && Version.TryParse(candidateVersionFolderName, out Version result) && (version == null || result > version))
					{
						version = result;
						latestDllPath = candidateDllPath;
						continue;
					}
					try
					{
						Version version2 = AssemblyName.GetAssemblyName(candidateDllPath).Version;
						if (version2 != null && (version == null || version2 > version))
						{
							version = version2;
							latestDllPath = candidateDllPath;
						}
					}
					catch
					{
					}
				}
				catch (Exception ex2)
				{
					Debug.LogWarning(("[DuckMarket] Error checking dll '" + candidateDllPath + "': " + ex2.Message));
				}
			}
			if (latestDllPath != null)
			{
				_loadedAssembly = Assembly.LoadFrom(latestDllPath);
				Debug.Log(string.Format("[DuckMarket] Loaded latest dll: {0} (version {1})", latestDllPath, version));
				Type type2 = _loadedAssembly.GetType("DuckMarket.Core.ModBehaviour");
				if (type2 == null)
				{
					type2 = Array.Find(_loadedAssembly.GetTypes(), (Type t) => t.Name == "ModBehaviour" && (t.Namespace?.StartsWith("DuckMarket") ?? false));
				}
				if (type2 != null)
				{
					try
					{
						bool isMonoBehaviourType = typeof(MonoBehaviour).IsAssignableFrom(type2);
						if (isMonoBehaviourType)
						{
							try
							{
								_loadedGameObject = new GameObject("DuckNewMarket.Runtime");
								Object.DontDestroyOnLoad(_loadedGameObject);
								_loadedInstance = _loadedGameObject.AddComponent(type2);
							}
							catch (Exception arg3)
							{
								Debug.LogError(string.Format("[DuckMarket] Error creating MonoBehaviour instance: {0}", arg3));
								_loadedGameObject = null;
								_loadedInstance = null;
							}
						}
						else
						{
							_loadedInstance = Activator.CreateInstance(type2);
						}
						_loadedAwake = type2.GetMethod("Awake", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
						_loadedOnEnable = type2.GetMethod("OnEnable", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
						_loadedOnDisable = type2.GetMethod("OnDisable", BindingFlags.Instance | BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
						MethodInfo method = type2.GetMethod("Awake", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
						MethodInfo method2 = type2.GetMethod("OnEnable", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
						MethodInfo method3 = type2.GetMethod("OnDisable", BindingFlags.Static | BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.NonPublic);
						if (!isMonoBehaviourType)
						{
							try
							{
								_loadedAwake?.Invoke(_loadedInstance, null);
							}
							catch (Exception arg4)
							{
								Debug.LogError(string.Format("[DuckMarket] Error invoking loaded Awake: {0}", arg4));
							}
							try
							{
								_loadedOnEnable?.Invoke(_loadedInstance, null);
							}
							catch (Exception arg5)
							{
								Debug.LogError(string.Format("[DuckMarket] Error invoking loaded OnEnable: {0}", arg5));
							}
						}
						else if (_loadedInstance == null)
						{
							try
							{
								method?.Invoke(null, null);
							}
							catch (Exception arg6)
							{
								Debug.LogError(string.Format("[DuckMarket] Error invoking static Awake: {0}", arg6));
							}
							try
							{
								method2?.Invoke(null, null);
							}
							catch (Exception arg7)
							{
								Debug.LogError(string.Format("[DuckMarket] Error invoking static OnEnable: {0}", arg7));
							}
						}
						if (_loadedInstance == null)
						{
							try
							{
								method?.Invoke(null, null);
							}
							catch (Exception arg8)
							{
								Debug.LogError(string.Format("[DuckMarket] Error invoking fallback static Awake: {0}", arg8));
							}
							try
							{
								method2?.Invoke(null, null);
							}
							catch (Exception arg9)
							{
								Debug.LogError(string.Format("[DuckMarket] Error invoking fallback static OnEnable: {0}", arg9));
							}
							if (_loadedOnDisable == null)
							{
								_loadedOnDisable = method3;
							}
						}
						return;
					}
					catch (Exception arg10)
					{
						Debug.LogError(string.Format("[DuckMarket] Error creating instance of loaded ModBehaviour: {0}", arg10));
						return;
					}
				}
				Debug.LogWarning("[DuckMarket] No ModBehaviour type found in loaded assembly");
			}
			else
			{
				Debug.LogWarning("[DuckMarket] No valid version dll found");
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg11)
		{
			Debug.LogError(string.Format("[DuckMarket] Error loading dll: {0}", arg11));
		}
	}

	private void EnsureVersionAndLoad()
	{
		Debug.Log("[DuckMarket] ========== Duck Market Mod Loader Version Check ==========");
		Debug.Log(("[DuckMarket] 当前渠道: " + Channel));
		string versionsApiBase = GetVersionsApiBase();
		var (installedVersionString, installedVersionCode, installedCoreDllPath) = GetCurrentInstalledVersion();
		Debug.Log(string.Format("[DuckMarket] (同步) 当前本地版本: {0} code={1}", installedVersionString, installedVersionCode));
		string localCoreMd5 = null;
		if (installedCoreDllPath != null && File.Exists(installedCoreDllPath))
		{
			localCoreMd5 = ComputeFileMd5(installedCoreDllPath);
		}
		ParsedCheck parsedCheck;
		try
		{
			if (!TryParseCheck(HttpGetString(string.Format("{0}/check?channel={1}&current_version_code={2}", versionsApiBase, Channel, installedVersionCode), 2), out ParsedCheck data))
			{
				Debug.LogWarning("[DuckMarket] /check 解析失败，回退加载本地 DLL");
				LoadLatestDll();
				return;
			}
			parsedCheck = data;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Debug.LogWarning(("[DuckMarket] /check 请求失败: " + ex.Message));
			LoadLatestDll();
			return;
		}
		int targetVersionCode = ResolveTargetVersionCode(parsedCheck, installedVersionCode);
		string targetVersionString = ResolveTargetVersionString(parsedCheck, installedVersionCode);
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(targetVersionString) && LocalVersionMatches(targetVersionString, parsedCheck.CoreMd5))
		{
			Debug.Log(("[DuckMarket] 目标版本已存在且核心一致，跳过下载，直接加载版本 " + targetVersionString));
			LoadLatestDll(targetVersionString);
			return;
		}
		bool hasMatchingCoreForOptionalUpdate = parsedCheck.NeedUpdate && !parsedCheck.ForceUpdate && installedCoreDllPath != null && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(parsedCheck.CoreMd5) && string.Equals(localCoreMd5, parsedCheck.CoreMd5, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
		bool isNoUpdateAtCurrentVersion = !parsedCheck.NeedUpdate && targetVersionCode == installedVersionCode;
		bool isCurrentCoreHashMatching = string.Equals(localCoreMd5, parsedCheck.CoreMd5, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
		if (!parsedCheck.ForceUpdate && !hasMatchingCoreForOptionalUpdate && isNoUpdateAtCurrentVersion && isCurrentCoreHashMatching)
		{
			Debug.Log("[DuckMarket] 同步检查：无需更新，直接加载本地 DLL");
			LoadLatestDll();
			return;
		}
		int versionId;
		try
		{
			if (!TryFindVersionInList(HttpGetString(string.Format("{0}/list?channel={1}", versionsApiBase, Channel), 2), targetVersionCode, out versionId, out string versionString) || versionId <= 0)
			{
				Debug.LogWarning("[DuckMarket] 未找到目标版本 ID，回退加载");
				LoadLatestDll();
				return;
			}
			if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(versionString))
			{
				targetVersionString = versionString;
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex2)
		{
			Debug.LogWarning(("[DuckMarket] /list 请求失败: " + ex2.Message));
			LoadLatestDll();
			return;
		}
		if (hasMatchingCoreForOptionalUpdate)
		{
			Debug.Log(("[DuckMarket] 发现可更新版本但非强制且核心一致，后台下载版本 " + targetVersionString + "，下次重启加载。"));
			((MonoBehaviour)this).StartCoroutine(DeferredDownloadCoroutine(versionId, targetVersionString, parsedCheck.CoreMd5));
			LoadLatestDll();
			return;
		}
		byte[] packageBytes;
		string downloadedCoreMd5;
		string downloadedZipMd5;
		try
		{
			(packageBytes, downloadedCoreMd5, downloadedZipMd5) = HttpGetBytesWithHeaders(string.Format("{0}/download/{1}.zip", versionsApiBase, versionId), 60);
		}
		catch (Exception ex3)
		{
			Debug.LogWarning(("[DuckMarket] 下载失败: " + ex3.Message));
			ReportInstall(versionId, success: false);
			LoadLatestDll();
			return;
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(downloadedZipMd5))
		{
			string actualZipMd5 = ComputeBytesMd5(packageBytes);
			if (!string.Equals(actualZipMd5, downloadedZipMd5, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
			{
				Debug.LogError(("[DuckMarket] ZIP MD5 校验失败: " + actualZipMd5 + " != " + downloadedZipMd5));
				ReportInstall(versionId, success: false);
				return;
			}
		}
		string directoryName = Path.GetDirectoryName(Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly().Location);
		if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(directoryName))
		{
			LoadLatestDll();
			return;
		}
		string versionsDirectory = Path.Combine(directoryName, "version");
		Directory.CreateDirectory(versionsDirectory);
		string targetVersionDirectory = Path.Combine(versionsDirectory, targetVersionString);
		if (Directory.Exists(targetVersionDirectory))
		{
			try
			{
				Directory.Delete(targetVersionDirectory, recursive: true);
			}
			catch (Exception ex4)
			{
				Debug.LogWarning(("[DuckMarket] 删除旧目录失败: " + ex4.Message));
			}
		}
		Directory.CreateDirectory(targetVersionDirectory);
		File.WriteAllBytes(Path.Combine(targetVersionDirectory, "package.zip"), packageBytes);
		try
		{
			using MemoryStream stream = new MemoryStream(packageBytes);
			using ZipArchive zipArchive = new ZipArchive(stream, ZipArchiveMode.Read);
			foreach (ZipArchiveEntry entry in zipArchive.Entries)
			{
				string path = Path.Combine(targetVersionDirectory, entry.FullName.Replace('/', Path.DirectorySeparatorChar));
				if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(entry.Name))
				{
					Directory.CreateDirectory(path);
					continue;
				}
				Directory.CreateDirectory(Path.GetDirectoryName(path));
				using Stream stream2 = entry.Open();
				using FileStream destination = File.Create(path);
				stream2.CopyTo(destination);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception arg2)
		{
			Debug.LogError(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 解压失败: {0}", arg2));
			ReportInstall(versionId, success: false);
			LoadLatestDll();
			return;
		}
		string coreDllPath = Path.Combine(targetVersionDirectory, "DuckNewMarket.Core.dll");
		if (File.Exists(coreDllPath) && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(downloadedCoreMd5))
		{
			string actualCoreMd5 = ComputeFileMd5(coreDllPath);
			if (!string.Equals(actualCoreMd5, downloadedCoreMd5, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
			{
				Debug.LogError(("[DuckMarket] 新核心 DLL MD5 校验失败: " + actualCoreMd5 + " != " + downloadedCoreMd5));
				ReportInstall(versionId, success: false);
				return;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			Debug.LogWarning("[DuckMarket] 缺少核心 DLL 或核心 MD5 响应头");
		}
		Debug.Log("[DuckMarket] 同步更新完成，加载最新 DLL");
		ReportInstall(versionId, success: true);
		LoadLatestDll(targetVersionString);
	}

	private IEnumerator DeferredDownloadCoroutine(int versionId, string versionString, string? expectedCoreMd5)
	{
		string requestUri = string.Format("{0}/download/{1}.zip", GetVersionsApiBase(), versionId);
		using HttpClient client = CreateConfiguredHttpClient();
		client.Timeout = TimeSpan.FromMinutes(2.0);
		Task<HttpResponseMessage> httpTask = client.GetAsync(requestUri);
		yield return (object)new WaitUntil((Func<bool>)(() => httpTask.IsCompleted));
		if (httpTask.IsFaulted || httpTask.IsCanceled)
		{
			Debug.LogWarning(("[DuckMarket] 后台下载失败: " + httpTask.Exception?.GetBaseException().Message));
			ReportInstall(versionId, success: false);
			yield break;
		}
		using HttpResponseMessage resp = httpTask.Result;
		if (!resp.IsSuccessStatusCode)
		{
			Debug.LogWarning(string.Format("[DuckMarket] 后台下载失败: HTTP {0} {1}", (int)resp.StatusCode, resp.ReasonPhrase));
			ReportInstall(versionId, success: false);
			yield break;
		}
		Task<byte[]> readTask = resp.Content.ReadAsByteArrayAsync();
		yield return (object)new WaitUntil((Func<bool>)(() => readTask.IsCompleted));
		if (readTask.IsFaulted || readTask.IsCanceled)
		{
			Debug.LogWarning(("[DuckMarket] 后台下载读取失败: " + readTask.Exception?.GetBaseException().Message));
			ReportInstall(versionId, success: false);
			yield break;
		}
		byte[] packageBytes = readTask.Result;
		IEnumerable<string> values;
		string expectedOrHeaderCoreMd5 = expectedCoreMd5 ?? string.Empty;
		if (resp.Headers.TryGetValues("X-Core-MD5", out values))
		{
			expectedOrHeaderCoreMd5 = values.FirstOrDefault() ?? expectedCoreMd5 ?? string.Empty;
		}
		IEnumerable<string> values2;
		string headerZipMd5 = (resp.Headers.TryGetValues("X-Zip-MD5", out values2) ? values2.FirstOrDefault() : null);
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(headerZipMd5))
		{
			string actualZipMd5 = ComputeBytesMd5(packageBytes);
			if (!string.Equals(actualZipMd5, headerZipMd5, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
			{
				Debug.LogWarning(("[DuckMarket] 后台 ZIP MD5 校验失败: " + actualZipMd5 + " != " + headerZipMd5));
				ReportInstall(versionId, success: false);
				yield break;
			}
		}
		string directoryName = Path.GetDirectoryName(Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly().Location);
		if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(directoryName))
		{
			yield break;
		}
		string versionsDirectory = Path.Combine(directoryName, "version");
		Directory.CreateDirectory(versionsDirectory);
		string targetVersionDirectory = Path.Combine(versionsDirectory, versionString);
		string tempDownloadDirectory = targetVersionDirectory + ".downloading";
		try
		{
			if (Directory.Exists(tempDownloadDirectory))
			{
				Directory.Delete(tempDownloadDirectory, recursive: true);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Debug.LogWarning(("[DuckMarket] 清理临时目录失败: " + ex.Message));
		}
		Directory.CreateDirectory(tempDownloadDirectory);
		try
		{
			using MemoryStream stream = new MemoryStream(packageBytes);
			using ZipArchive zipArchive = new ZipArchive(stream, ZipArchiveMode.Read);
			foreach (ZipArchiveEntry entry in zipArchive.Entries)
			{
				string path = Path.Combine(tempDownloadDirectory, entry.FullName.Replace('/', Path.DirectorySeparatorChar));
				if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(entry.Name))
				{
					Directory.CreateDirectory(path);
					continue;
				}
				Directory.CreateDirectory(Path.GetDirectoryName(path));
				using Stream stream2 = entry.Open();
				using FileStream destination = File.Create(path);
				stream2.CopyTo(destination);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex2)
		{
			Debug.LogWarning(("[DuckMarket] 后台解压失败: " + ex2.Message));
			ReportInstall(versionId, success: false);
			yield break;
		}
		string downloadedCoreDllPath = Path.Combine(tempDownloadDirectory, "DuckNewMarket.Core.dll");
		if (File.Exists(downloadedCoreDllPath) && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(expectedOrHeaderCoreMd5))
		{
			string actualCoreMd5 = ComputeFileMd5(downloadedCoreDllPath);
			if (!string.Equals(actualCoreMd5, expectedOrHeaderCoreMd5, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
			{
				Debug.LogWarning(("[DuckMarket] 后台核心 DLL MD5 校验失败: " + actualCoreMd5 + " != " + expectedOrHeaderCoreMd5));
				ReportInstall(versionId, success: false);
				yield break;
			}
		}
		try
		{
			if (Directory.Exists(targetVersionDirectory))
			{
				Directory.Delete(targetVersionDirectory, recursive: true);
			}
			Directory.Move(tempDownloadDirectory, targetVersionDirectory);
			Debug.Log(("[DuckMarket] 后台更新完成: " + versionString + "，下次重启将加载新版本"));
			ReportInstall(versionId, success: true);
		}
		catch (Exception ex3)
		{
			Debug.LogWarning(("[DuckMarket] 后台移动目录失败: " + ex3.Message));
			ReportInstall(versionId, success: false);
		}
	}

	private static void EnsureLoaderConfig()
	{
		if (_loaderConfigLoaded)
		{
			return;
		}
		_loaderConfigLoaded = true;
		_configuredApiBase = DefaultApiBase;
		_allowInsecureTlsForLoader = false;
		try
		{
			string location = Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly().Location;
			string directoryName = Path.GetDirectoryName(location);
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(directoryName))
			{
				return;
			}
			string configPath = Path.Combine(directoryName, "DuckMarket_Config.json");
			if (!File.Exists(configPath))
			{
				return;
			}
			JObject val = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<JObject>(File.ReadAllText(configPath));
			if (val == null)
			{
				return;
			}
			string configuredApi = val.Value<string>((object)"VersionsBaseUrl");
			if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(configuredApi))
			{
				string apiBase = val.Value<string>((object)"ApiBaseUrl");
				if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(apiBase))
				{
					configuredApi = apiBase.TrimEnd('/') + "/versions";
				}
			}
			if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(configuredApi))
			{
				_configuredApiBase = configuredApi.TrimEnd('/');
			}
			bool? allowInsecure = val.Value<bool?>((object)"AllowInsecureTlsForLoader");
			if (allowInsecure.HasValue)
			{
				_allowInsecureTlsForLoader = allowInsecure.Value;
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Debug.LogWarning(("[DuckMarket] 读取 Loader 配置失败: " + ex.Message));
		}
	}

	private static string GetVersionsApiBase()
	{
		EnsureLoaderConfig();
		return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_configuredApiBase) ? DefaultApiBase : _configuredApiBase;
	}

	private static HttpClient CreateConfiguredHttpClient()
	{
		EnsureLoaderConfig();
		if (_allowInsecureTlsForLoader)
		{
			HttpClientHandler handler = new HttpClientHandler
			{
				ServerCertificateCustomValidationCallback = (HttpRequestMessage message, X509Certificate2? cert, X509Chain? chain, SslPolicyErrors errors) => true
			};
			return new HttpClient(handler);
		}
		return new HttpClient();
	}

	private static string HttpGetString(string url, int timeoutSeconds)
	{
		using HttpClient httpClient = CreateConfiguredHttpClient();
		httpClient.Timeout = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(timeoutSeconds);
		return httpClient.GetStringAsync(url).GetAwaiter().GetResult();
	}

	private static (byte[] bytes, string? coreMd5, string? zipMd5) HttpGetBytesWithHeaders(string url, int timeoutSeconds)
	{
		using HttpClient httpClient = CreateConfiguredHttpClient();
		httpClient.Timeout = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(timeoutSeconds);
		using HttpResponseMessage httpResponseMessage = httpClient.GetAsync(url).GetAwaiter().GetResult();
		httpResponseMessage.EnsureSuccessStatusCode();
		byte[] result = httpResponseMessage.Content.ReadAsByteArrayAsync().GetAwaiter().GetResult();
		IEnumerable<string> values;
		string item = (httpResponseMessage.Headers.TryGetValues("X-Core-MD5", out values) ? values.FirstOrDefault() : null);
		IEnumerable<string> values2;
		string item2 = (httpResponseMessage.Headers.TryGetValues("X-Zip-MD5", out values2) ? values2.FirstOrDefault() : null);
		return (bytes: result, coreMd5: item, zipMd5: item2);
	}

	private static void ReportInstall(int versionId, bool success, int timeoutSeconds = 5)
	{
		try
		{
			string requestUri = GetVersionsApiBase() + "/report-install";
			string content = JsonConvert.SerializeObject((object)new
			{
				version_id = versionId,
				success = success
			});
			using HttpClient httpClient = CreateConfiguredHttpClient();
			httpClient.Timeout = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(timeoutSeconds);
			using StringContent content2 = new StringContent(content, Encoding.UTF8, "application/json");
			using HttpResponseMessage httpResponseMessage = httpClient.PostAsync(requestUri, content2).GetAwaiter().GetResult();
			if (!httpResponseMessage.IsSuccessStatusCode)
			{
				Debug.LogWarning(string.Format("[DuckMarket] report-install 返回 HTTP {0} {1}", (int)httpResponseMessage.StatusCode, httpResponseMessage.ReasonPhrase));
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Debug.LogWarning(("[DuckMarket] ReportInstall 失败: " + ex.Message));
		}
	}

	private static (string versionString, int versionCode, string? coreDllPath) GetCurrentInstalledVersion()
	{
		try
		{
			string directoryName = Path.GetDirectoryName(Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly().Location);
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(directoryName))
			{
				return (versionString: "0.0.0", versionCode: 0, coreDllPath: null);
			}
			string path = Path.Combine(directoryName, "version");
			if (!Directory.Exists(path))
			{
				return (versionString: "0.0.0", versionCode: 0, coreDllPath: null);
			}
			Version version = new Version(0, 0, 0);
			string latestVersionDirectory = null;
			string[] directories = Directory.GetDirectories(path);
			foreach (string candidateVersionDirectory in directories)
			{
				if (Version.TryParse(Path.GetFileName(candidateVersionDirectory), out Version result) && result > version)
				{
					version = result;
					latestVersionDirectory = candidateVersionDirectory;
				}
			}
			if (latestVersionDirectory != null)
			{
				string coreDllPath = Path.Combine(latestVersionDirectory, "DuckNewMarket.Core.dll");
				string versionString = string.Format("{0}.{1}.{2}", version.Major, version.Minor, version.Build);
				return (versionString: versionString, versionCode: ComputeSemverCode(versionString), coreDllPath: File.Exists(coreDllPath) ? coreDllPath : null);
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Debug.LogWarning(("[DuckMarket] 获取当前版本失败: " + ex.Message));
		}
		return (versionString: "0.0.0", versionCode: 0, coreDllPath: null);
	}

	private static int ComputeSemverCode(string version)
	{
		string[] array = version.Split('.');
		while (array.Length < 3)
		{
			version += ".0";
		}
		array = version.Split('.');
		int major = ((array.Length != 0) ? SafeInt(array[0]) : 0);
		int minor = ((array.Length > 1) ? SafeInt(array[1]) : 0);
		int patch = ((array.Length > 2) ? SafeInt(array[2]) : 0);
		return major * 100000000 + minor * 10000 + patch;
	}

	private static int SafeInt(string s)
	{
		if (!int.TryParse(s, out var result))
		{
			return 0;
		}
		return result;
	}

	private static string ComputeFileMd5(string path)
	{
		try
		{
			using FileStream inputStream = File.OpenRead(path);
			using MD5 mD = MD5.Create();
			byte[] array = mD.ComputeHash(inputStream);
			StringBuilder stringBuilder = new StringBuilder();
			byte[] array2 = array;
			foreach (byte b in array2)
			{
				stringBuilder.Append(b.ToString("x2"));
			}
			return stringBuilder.ToString();
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Debug.LogWarning(("[DuckMarket] 计算 MD5 失败: " + ex.Message));
			return string.Empty;
		}
	}

	private static string ComputeBytesMd5(byte[] bytes)
	{
		try
		{
			using MD5 mD = MD5.Create();
			byte[] array = mD.ComputeHash(bytes);
			StringBuilder stringBuilder = new StringBuilder();
			byte[] array2 = array;
			foreach (byte b in array2)
			{
				stringBuilder.Append(b.ToString("x2"));
			}
			return stringBuilder.ToString();
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Debug.LogWarning(("[DuckMarket] 计算 MD5(内存) 失败: " + ex.Message));
			return string.Empty;
		}
	}

	private static int ResolveTargetVersionCode(ParsedCheck parsedCheck, int installedVersionCode)
	{
		if (parsedCheck.NeedUpdate && parsedCheck.UpdateVersionCode > 0)
		{
			return parsedCheck.UpdateVersionCode;
		}
		if (parsedCheck.RecommendedVersionCode > 0 && parsedCheck.RecommendedVersionCode != installedVersionCode)
		{
			return parsedCheck.RecommendedVersionCode;
		}
		return parsedCheck.LatestVersionCode;
	}

	private static string ResolveTargetVersionString(ParsedCheck parsedCheck, int installedVersionCode)
	{
		if (parsedCheck.NeedUpdate && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(parsedCheck.UpdateVersionString))
		{
			return parsedCheck.UpdateVersionString;
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(parsedCheck.RecommendedVersionString) && parsedCheck.RecommendedVersionCode != installedVersionCode)
		{
			return parsedCheck.RecommendedVersionString;
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(parsedCheck.UpdateVersionString))
		{
			return parsedCheck.UpdateVersionString;
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(parsedCheck.RecommendedVersionString))
		{
			return parsedCheck.RecommendedVersionString;
		}
		return parsedCheck.LatestVersionCode.ToString();
	}

	private static bool TryParseCheck(string json, out ParsedCheck data)
	{
		data = new ParsedCheck();
		try
		{
			JObject val = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<JObject>(json);
			if (val == null)
			{
				return false;
			}
			JToken val2 = val["data"];
			if (val2 == null)
			{
				Debug.LogWarning("[DuckMarket] /check 缺少 data 节点");
				return false;
			}
			data.NeedUpdate = val2.Value<bool?>((object)"need_update") == true;
			data.ForceUpdate = val2.Value<bool?>((object)"force_update") == true;
			data.LatestVersionCode = val2.Value<int?>((object)"latest_version_code").GetValueOrDefault();
			data.UpdateVersionCode = val2.Value<int?>((object)"update_version_code").GetValueOrDefault();
			data.RecommendedVersionCode = val2.Value<int?>((object)"recommended_version_code").GetValueOrDefault();
			data.UpdateVersionString = val2.Value<string>((object)"update_version_string");
			data.RecommendedVersionString = val2.Value<string>((object)"recommended_version_string");
			data.CoreMd5 = val2.Value<string>((object)"core_md5");
			data.ZipMd5 = val2.Value<string>((object)"zip_md5");
			return true;
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Debug.LogWarning(("[DuckMarket] 解析 /check JSON 失败(JSON) : " + ex.Message));
			return false;
		}
	}

	private static bool TryFindVersionInList(string json, int targetCode, out int versionId, out string? versionString)
	{
		versionId = -1;
		versionString = null;
		try
		{
			VersionInfo[] array = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<VersionListEnvelope>(json)?.data?.versions;
			if (array == null)
			{
				return false;
			}
			VersionInfo[] array2 = array;
			foreach (VersionInfo versionInfo in array2)
			{
				if (versionInfo.version_code == targetCode)
				{
					versionId = versionInfo.version_id;
					versionString = versionInfo.version_string;
					return versionId > 0;
				}
			}
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Debug.LogWarning(("[DuckMarket] 解析 /list JSON 失败(JSON): " + ex.Message));
		}
		return false;
	}

	private static bool LocalVersionMatches(string versionString, string? remoteCoreMd5)
	{
		if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(versionString) || string.IsNullOrEmpty(remoteCoreMd5))
		{
			return false;
		}
		try
		{
			string directoryName = Path.GetDirectoryName(Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly().Location);
			if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(directoryName))
			{
				return false;
			}
			string path = Path.Combine(Path.Combine(directoryName, "version", versionString), "DuckNewMarket.Core.dll");
			if (!File.Exists(path))
			{
				return false;
			}
			return string.Equals(ComputeFileMd5(path), remoteCoreMd5, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
		}
		catch (Exception ex)
		{
			Debug.LogWarning(("[DuckMarket] LocalVersionMatches 失败: " + ex.Message));
			return false;
		}
	}
}
```
